The 2 giant dragons circled in the air and flew back again. Anderlu’s body shook, launching a secret technique, and his speed suddenly increased, rushing straight toward Bracklin.

Bracklin opened his mouth, and a mass of dragon breath containing destructive breath was sprayed at Anderlu, but he was actually charging territory power to guard against the blind spots on the left and right, especially behind him. This move was called [Phase Shift]. It was Anderlu’s usual combat technique. The one rushing in front of him was not the real body, but his phantom. His real body would appear somewhere.

Bracklin had experienced this trick in previous battles. Anderlu had also used it in the previous rounds, so the first dragon breath only used 30% of his power. The purpose was to break the phantom. The real power was accumulated to guard against the sudden attack that appeared beside or behind.

However, an unexpected thing happened. The dragon breath did not pass through Anderlu’s ‘phantom’, but it hit his real body. Anderlu was only at the Demon Emperor, and he was hit head-on by the dragon breath of a Demon Overlord. Even if Bracklin didn’t use all his power, the blow was not light. The scales on his chest were all bloody. The fighting style of the shota dragon was the opposite of his introverted appearance. With a muffled sound, his speed did not decrease but increased as he rushing toward Bracklin. In the blink of an eye, he had already reached his front.

Bracklin didn’t expect that Anderlu didn’t use [Phase Shift] and rushed up against the dragon breath instead. Due to this miscalculation, it was too late to dodge now. Bracklin gritted his teeth, and the accumulated territory power charged throughout his body was ready to burst out like a hedgehog. If Anderlu didn’t avoid it, even with Samuel’s support, he would be severely injured or even killed by that powerful impact.

Unexpectedly, Anderlu didn’t mean to dodge at all and charged straight forward. Everyone below only saw the light shining brightly, and there was an unclear screaming. At the same time, their vision was distorted strongly. When their vision was restored, 2 huge figures in the air seemed to lose strength at the same time and fell down.

“ Boom! “

“ Boom !”

After the 2 consecutive tremors, there were 2 large pits on the ground as though meteorites had fallen. It could be seen that the impact of the falling was so hard that it was not just ordinary weight.

Zamindar could see it clearly that when the 2 giant dragons clashed, Anderlu was severely impated, and blood spurted from his scales. At the same time, Samuel’s dragon spear also penetrated Bracklin’s body. In pain, Bracklin bit Anderlu’s neck, tearing off a large piece of meat. Trinis’s reaction was half a beat slower. When the dragon spear stabbed into Anderlu’s chest, it only entered a little before being cut off by Samuel.

Samuel’s next move was the [Dawn Extinction]. The ‘Flying Obliteration’ burst into countless shards and splashed onto Bracklin’s huge body like a rain. This move was extremely close, and the shards were extremely sharp. The damage caused was quite terrifying. Even Bracklin, who had a strong defense, couldn’t resist it. He was seriously injured and fell down in tragic screams.

The seriously injured Anderlu also fell. Bracklin quickly got up, but Anderlu seemed to be out of strength and couldn’t get up again.

The 2 figures were still intertwined in the air, and a lightning-like sword light suddenly flourished. A figure fell to the ground with a muffled sound, and he seemed to have passed out; it was Trinis.

After knocking down Trinis, Samuel’s body flickered and stood beside Anderlu in an instant. His crossed the long sword, staring at Bracklin who was walking slowly across from him and asking, “Anderlu! How are you?”

In the melee battle just now, Samuel had to devote a part of his strength to protect Anderlu, so he was severely affected by Bracklin’s shock. In addition to the damage he suffered from the previous Bracklin’s sneak attack, he was also seriously injured.

“Not dead yet…” Anderlu replied weakly. He was unable to turn his head, but his pupils moved toward Bracklin who was moving forward, “Actually, that guy isn’t much better than me.”

“Little Anderlu, you lunatic! Idiot!” Bracklin gritted his teeth, “Why would you fight so hard for a human!”

“Because… the dragon knight is the partner of the giant dragon.”

“Partner?” Bracklin snapped, “Are you out of your mind with what those old men taught you?”

“Samuel is my partner, and that man is not yours.”

“Idiot! Let me help you wake up!”

“Come one step further, die!” Although Samuel’s body was shaking slightly from the pain, the hand holding the sword was still firm. Most of the shards of ‘Flying Obliteration’ were now in Bracklin’s body. Even if it had the function of automatic retrieval, it could not be recovered under the restriction power of the holy dragon. What he was holding was a spare long sword, which he used to defeat Trinis just now.

“This is your life-and-death duel with that Trinis, not me and Anderlu.” Bracklin sneered, “Let alone how much power you have left, my uncle is Demi-God Elder Stanwell of the Dragon Valley. You are a mere human. How dare you kill the most honorable holy dragon?”

Samuel didn’t talk nonsense. The long sword in his hand glowed with a strong light. Apparently, all his strength was gathered to do the fatal blow.

Bracklin stared at Samuel for a moment, and didn’t move forward. He suddenly shook his body, and countless shards with blood flew out in the blink of an eye. The dragon had turned into back into the human form. He looked bruised and wounded. He just sat on the ground, “ Hmph! Little Anderlu, you won. However, I didn’t lose to you, but because of that guy…”

With that said, Bracklin pointed at the ‘unconscious’ Trinis, “That guy lost the duel and faked being dead on the ground! This guy actually fought along with me just now. It’s my disgrace. If you still don’t get up, I’ll shred you into pieces!”

The last sentence was obviously addressed to Trinis, who shuddered and finally ‘woke up.’

He was utterly ashamed. Even the soldiers of the Iron Scale Legion looked unnatural.

“Not only the Ash Suit, but your previous power… and the effect of black potions.” Samuel’s long sword pointed at Trinis who got up, showing a contemptuous expression, “You’re the guy who can only rely on external forces. Dueling with people like you is also my shame. Since you have lost, your life is mine now.”

Trinis shuddered, and beads of sweat dripped from his face, “Wait a minute, I have something to say…”

Samuel didn’t give him a chance. He shook the long sword and walked over slowly. Trinis stepped back in panic, and he accidentally tripped under his feet and fell to the ground. He said in horror, “You can’t kill me!”

“Samuel!” A familiar voice sounded. Chen Rui and the others rushed over on horseback.

Trinis exclaimed, “Your Highness Arthur! Samuel is going to kill me!”

Chen Rui dismounted. He already had already seen the results of the battle. Before he could ask any questions, Zamindar hurried over and reported what had just happened to the ‘Holy Child’.

At this moment, 3 light streams flickered in the sky. In the blink of an eye, 3 people appeared in the field.

“Sir Fagerius!” Trinis’ tense nerves finally relaxed completely, “Help!”

1 of those who came was Commander Fagerius of the Dragon Bright Empire’s dragon knight legion. Fagerius was a Kingdom level powerhouse, and his niece was the wife of Second Prince Garfield. With this relationship, the 2 were relatively close. When Samuel injured Garfield who ‘harassed’ Veronica at the Shion Palace, he was the one who came and captured Samuel after hearing the news.

However, Fagerius was not completely on the second prince’s side. In his early years, he was greatly favored by Lex, and the whole family survived because of it. He swore allegiance to Lex. Now that his strength advancement was super-level, he didn’t retire for training like a normal super powerhouse, but he continued to serve Lex.

Seeing Trinis’ appearance, Fagerius frowned, “Samuel! What do you want to do?!”

“This is the result of a life and death duel.” Chen Rui’s voice sounded, “Obviously, this Sir Trinis is defeated.”

“1 is the legion commander of the Jade Legion, and the other is the legion commander of the Iron Scale Legion. You do not represent individuals, but the Golden Estate and the entire empire! What life-and-death duel? It’s simply nonsense!” Fagerius associated them with big names immediately and scolded both of them. He obviously did not acknowledge the result of the duel.

“Sir Fagerius, this is a fair duel of dragon knights with all the soldiers here to testify. As the arbiter, I don’t think it’s nonsense.” Zamindar’s voice sounded.

“You don’t have the right to speak here.” Fagerius said lightly, “This is the internal affairs of the empire. Even if your teacher, Parsali, is here, he is not qualified to interfere.”

“I am just a knight who is witnessing a fair…” While Zamindar was talking, he suddenly felt a terrifying pressure, and he actually could not speak for a moment.

“Bracklin!” Another voice sounded. A gloomy-looking man walked up to Bracklin’s side, “Who is so daring to hurt you like this?”

“Uncle…” Bracklin said embarrassedly, “It’s just a practice match.”

Zamindar was shocked. This man is actually the elder of the Dragon Valley, Demi-God Stanwell whom Bracklin had previously spoken of!

“Practice match? Little Anderlu from the Pelin Family doesn’t have this ability.” Stanwell glanced at Samuel who was treating Anderlu, and he ghastly said, “That guy did it?”

Samuel felt like he was locked in by an extremely terrifying breath as if the other party could annihilate him with a single thought.

“Whose uncle… are you.”

When the voice sounded, Samuel suddenly felt the terrifying breath being swept away by some kind fo force.

It was Chen Rui who spoke. He had already walked in front of Samuel.

This time even Fagerius was taken aback. Stanwell was the Demi-God level elder of the Dragon Valley. He was originally the most trusted person by the Dragon Emperor Pagris. He almost replaced Meria as the great elder. Later, for some unknown reason, he gradually fell out of favor, but he was still an important member of the elder council. ‘Arthur’ actually addressed Stanwell so rudely, which was simply ignorant.

“It’s just a fair duel.” Chen Rui smiled. In Fagerius’ eyes, this smile was simply a rhythm to court death.

This should be the prince of the Golden Estate. He gave Stanwell a strange feeling. He didn’t know how this person defused his oppression on Samuel (probably some kind of item). When he heard that the other party was so rude, he raised his brows and was about to give this ignorant person an unforgettable lesson. Then, a somewhat familiar voice suddenly sounded in his ears, “Isn’t it? Brother-in-law.”

Hearing the words ‘brother-in-law’, Stanwell’s heart skipped a beat. Although the prince looked different, the smile became more familiar the more he looked at it. He couldn’t help but recall the scene of him being abused in front of a group of juniors in the Dragon Valley. A chill rose from his back.

That’s right, it’s this guy! Meria’s son-in-law! The terrifying human that can kill me in 1 second!

It is true that the Dragon Valley and the Golden Estate have cooperation, but I never imagined that this guy is the lord of the Golden Estate and the third prince of the Dragon Bright Empire! How unfair!

No wonder the Royal Majesty Dragon Emperor strictly prohibited the spreading of anything related to this human in the Dragon Valley. No wonder Gueroas stayed here all the time… Stanwell glanced back at Gueroas who came with him.

Gueroas nodded, confirming his suspicions.

“Young people need to be trained to grow. Yes! It’s just a duel.” Stanwell, who quickly reacted, said with a certain look, “Fair duel.”

This time, not only Fagerius and the others, but even Bracklin was dumbfounded. Is this still my vengeful uncle? When did he become so ‘reasonable’?

chapters.title: Chapter 1012: Alone
chapters.body:
Chapter 1012: Alone

Stanwell’s words not only ignore the serious injuries that the ‘culprit’ Samuel caused to Bracklin, but it also declared the validity of the duel.

No one would think that Stanwell was convinced by the ignorant and fearless Prince ‘Arthur’ with just 1 sentence. Compared with a prince of an empire, even if it was a mechanical grand master, the Demi-God level powerhouse was still an existence that must be looked up to. Prince Arthur was rude because he came a step late and didn’t hear what Bracklin said. Therefore, he didn’t even know the identity and strength of the ‘uncle’ in front of him.

The key reason why Stanwell changed his tone was that he glanced at Gueroas. The 2 elders should have negotiated secretly. It must have something to do with Prince ‘Arthur”s ‘filial piety’ to Gueroas. No wonder the Royal Highness Prince appeared to be fearless after Gueroas appeared.

Only Stanwell and Gueroas, the 2 Demi-God level dragons elders, knew that it was not ‘Arthur’ who was ignorant and fearless, but everyone including Fagerius.

“Very good.” Chen Rui nodded to Bracklin, “You have a reasonable uncle.”

Bracklin didn’t react from his surprise for a while, and he nodded subconsciously. Stanwell’s eyes twitched. He finally acquiesced to the title of ‘reasonable’.

Fortunately, Chen Rui didn’t continue talking, but came to Fagerius and pointed to Bracklin, “General Fagerius, look, that young man is injured like this, and his uncle thinks it’s a fair duel. You still think it’s just nonsense?”

Bracklin was about to jump up when he heard the word ‘young man’, then Stanwell gave him a sideways glance, so he immediately lowered his head.

Zamindar happened to meet Stanwell before when he once went to the Dragon Valley with the church representatives to negotiate the magic game. He said, “Sir Fagerius should not question the decision of Sir Stanwell. This is the fair duel of dragon knights. Moreover, it’s a life-and-death duel.”

“That’s right!” Chen Rui was about to continue when Fagerius frowned and took a few steps forward.

“Your Highness Arthur, Trinis is the deputy legion commander of the Iron Scale Legion personally appointed by His Majesty. Like Samuel, he is a member of my dragon knight legion. He is also the supreme commander of the capital army stationed in the Golden Estate this time. Whatever the reason, if you have to put him to death, Your Highness will definitely not be able to explain to His Majesty.”

These words not only brought out Lex the Great, but also pointed out the fact that Samuel and Trinis were in the dragon knight legion, and Fagerius himself was the legion commander of the dragon knight legion, which was almost the same as Samuel — For both public and private reasons, Prince ‘Arthur’ should give consideration to this.

“I understand.” Chen Rui showed a pondering expression and nodded slowly. Trinis finally breathed a sigh of relief when he saw this scene.

As everyone knew, Samuel was loyal to Prince ‘Arthur’. If Prince ‘Arthur’ was asked to give Samuel a way out, there would be no problem.

“Then… Samuel.” Chen Rui glanced at Samuel, “Execute the result of this ‘life and death duel’ now. Loser, die.”

Fagerius was shocked. He didn’t expect that when he stated the pros and cons to Prince ‘Arthur’ like this, the other party still showed no mercy, which was tantamount to slapping the face of the dragon knight legion and super powerhouse.

Trinis thought he had heard it wrong, but when he saw Samuel approaching step by step with his long sword in hand, he just came to his senses. He used an item and turned into a red light, escaping into the distance.

The red light was fleeting, and it had turned into a luminous spot in the blink of an eye. However, this luminous spot was quickly magnified – Trinis suddenly went backward. Obviously, this was not what he wanted.

“How dare you run away cowardly after letting your dragon partner get hurt like this!” Stanwell snorted coldly with a cold light in his eyes.

“No…” Before Trinis could say ‘spare my life’, his body was suddenly torn apart into nothingness. The rest of the damaged ‘Ash Suit’ fell to the ground, looking bleak.

“That guy is not my partner.” Bracklin muttered in a low voice.

“Stop talking nonsense.” Stanwell said calmly, “Isn’t that shameful enough? Come back with me!”

Bracklin was afraid of this uncle since he was a child, so he didn’t dare to say more. He reluctantly stood up and walked to Stanwell’s side. Stanwell glanced at Gueroas and didn’t greet Fagerius, then he flickered and disappeared with Bracklin.

Fagerius didn’t expect things to actually take such a turn. Trinis was killed by Stanwell. His mind couldn’t digest what happened for a while.

Gueroas noticed that Stanwell never dared to look at Chen Rui. He knew that this guy killed Trinis out of anger. He shook his head secretly and waved toward Anderlu.

Anderlu’s body suddenly had a layer of silver-white light, and the serious injury recovered quickly at a speed visible to the naked eye. Anderlu had taken the potion given by Samuel. Now with the help of Gueroas, the recovery speed was faster. His body shape slowly turned into the little shota, but his body was full of terrifying scars.

However, the recovery power of the holy dragon family was extremely powerful. Now that the injuries had been brought under control, it was only a matter of time before they recovered.

“Thank you, Sir Gueroas.” Anderlu stood up and bowed.

“Little Anderlu, I heard that you were grounded. You sneaked out this time, right? As for your father Pelin… don’t worry, I’ll go and explain to him.”

“Thank you sir!” Anderlu expressed his gratitude.

Gueroas looked at Samuel and added, “You have a good partner.”

Fagerius’ facial expression on the side was even more unsightly. Gueroas’ words revealed his undisguised admiration for Samuel. Gueroas was a powerhouse at the Demi-God level, and he was also 1 of the elders that Dragon Emperor Pagris relied on, holding real power. In this way, Samuel’s position in the dragon knight legion would only get higher and higher. The possibility of excluding him from the legion was almost zero.

Although Elder Stanwell of the Dragon Valley caused the death of Trinis, the reason was still the persecution of Prince ‘Arthur’.

In this incident, the 2 elder dragons, Stanwell and Gueroas, both stood on the side of ‘Arthur’, Fagerius could no longer say anything, but he said to Chen Rui indifferently, “This is the end of today’s affairs, but, Your Highness Arthur, no matter what the cause of this incident is, the result is that the legion commander appointed by His Majesty died in your estate. You need to give His Majesty an explanation.”

Chen Rui smiled and said something that surprised Fagerius, “General Fagerius, can I understand that because of Trinis’ death, a conspiracy against the Golden Estate… or against me, the third prince, was shattered?”

Fagerius narrowed his eyes slightly, “What does Your Highness mean?”

“General should be very clear about what the Iron Scale Legion has done in the Golden Estate during this period. Especially today, after the trouble in the Flower Wine Tavern, your legion wounded the Jade Legion defense forces who came. In addition to the soldiers, 7 innocent civilians had died and the whole of the Fresh Flower Tavern has been razed to the ground. Knight Zamindar explained the whole duel situation to me in detail just now. At the beginning, it was Trinis who took the initiative to challenge. He took out the ‘Ash Suit’ in the duel, then he drank black potions which is obviously a premeditated plan. Not only that, when he lost to Samuel, he actually summoned a dragon to carry out a sneak attack. If Samuel’s dragon partner hadn’t arrived in time, Samuel would have been annihilated now! If this is not a conspiracy, what is it?”

“This is just a personal grudge between him and Samuel, and the so-called conspiracy is nothing but Your Highness’ guess! There is no evidence!” Fagerius replied coldly. He was a super powerhouse, yet he was actually questioned by the prince. If it wasn’t for Gueroas beside him, he had already flared up or left on the spot.

Prince ‘Arthur’ didn’t seem to feel the chill in Fagerius’ voice at all as he continued, “Unfortunately, Trinis is a useless weakling. Even with this advantage, he was defeated by Samuel. He was also a coward who left after losing.. Even the dragons who left showed contempt for him. What I can’t figure out is, how can such a person be worthy of being a dragon knight?”

The last sentence made Gueroas nod. At the same time, it also gave Fagerius a loud slap in the face. Fagerius was already furious, but Chen Rui didn’t mean to stop talking.

“There’s 1 more thing I’m curious about, why did the sir general appear so coincidentally when Trinis failed the duel and faced the death threat?”

“I can explain that.” Gueroas began, “I have been in the Golden Estate for some time now. Since I’ve comprehended about power recently, I want to go back to the Dragon Valley training. Elder Stanwell will be my replacement. Fagerius came with Elder Stanwell this time, specifically for some handover work. However, Fagerius’ suddenly sensed something, so Stanwell and I came here with him… It should be that Trinis used some kind of dragon knight legion’s unique item to cry for help. Speaking of which, Trinis is only opportunistic without the slightest fighting spirit and the knight’s spirit. It is true that he is worthy of being dead. Fagerius, I don’t want to see this kind of person become a partner of dragons in the future, even if it is just a candidate. “

“Understood, Sir Gueroas.” Today’s events were obvious to all, Gueroas’s words were very fair. Fagerius could only suffer secretly.

“Looks like I’m overthinking, general. I apologize to you.” Chen Rui smiled lightly, but unfortunately, there was no ‘apology’ in his tone or expression.

Fagerius raised his brows, only to hear Chen Rui say again, “As for what general said… I’ll go to Yerodisha with you now to meet His Majesty!”

Fagerius showed an unexpected expression. In fact, he knew very well that what Trinis did was not entirely instigated by Garfield. There was also some influence of Lex the Great behind it, and the purpose was to target the Golden Estate.

The performance of Prince ‘Arthur’ had already aroused the fear of Lex the Great. In the battle for imperial power, it was not uncommon for father and son to fight each other. Although it had not evolved to the worst situation, Lex the Great’s intent to suppress the Golden Estate was beyond doubt.

It was truly amazing that ‘Arthur’ was able to manage the Golden Estate to such an extent. It was impossible not to see Lex the Great’s intentions. The Golden Estate was only extremely developed economically, but its military strength was extremely weak, which was far from being able to compete with the extent of the entire empire.

So, there was a faint sign of hostility when ‘Arthur’ desperately contributed to Trinis’ death today. In this case, he actually chose to go directly to the capital to meet Lex the Great, which really puzzled Fagerius.

“Your Highness…” The veiled Isabella said, “I’ll accompany you.”

“No.” Chen Rui shook his head, “I just want to make some things clear to His Majesty. As for safety, with General Fagerius there, there should be no problem. If we are fast enough, we should be able to arrive today, right, general?”

Going alone? Fagerius suddenly felt that he couldn’t see through this ‘mere’ prince with only Warrior strength. He took a deep breath and nodded, “We can arrive at night.”

“At night…” Chen Rui showed an implicit smile, “The time is just right.”

TL: It’s time to destroy the main altar?

chapters.title: Chapter 1013: Main Altar
chapters.body:
Chapter 1013: Main Altar

The night gradually fell, and the hook-like crescent moon appeared in the sky.

Yerodisha, the main hall of the Royal Palace.

“According to Fagerius’ previous report, Arthur should have arrived by now.” Lex the Great looked at Ulse, the captain of the imperial guards team in front of him, “Why haven’t I seen him yet?”

“General Fagerius went to the Dragon Knight Legion,” Ulse replied, “His Highness Arthur has indeed entered the palace. But… he went to the Shion Palace.”

“Shion Palace?” Lex the Great frowned with a weird expression.

Not to mention Lex the Great, even Ulse himself thought it was unbelievable – According to Fagerius’ previous intel, Prince ‘Arthur’ ordered Samuel to kill the capital’s highest commander Trinis stationed in the Golden Estate today. Although Trinis was killed by Elder Stanwell of the Dragon Valley, and Samuel and Trinis had a fair duel, the real ‘line’ of the whole incident was clear: Prince Arthur took the opportunity to send some kind of message to the capital.

The nature of this incident was extraordinary. Now Prince ‘Arthur’ followed Fagerius into the capital alone, probably to explain the matter to Lex the Great.

However, the Royal Highness Third Prince did not come to meet Lex the Great directly, but he put His Majesty aside and openly went to the Shion Palace to meet his ‘old lover’!

This ‘old lover’ had a title, and that was the official wife of the Royal Highness Third Prince’s uncle!

“Your Majesty.” Ulse asked tentatively, “After the Royal Highness Third Prince entered the Shion Palace, it seemed that he activated some kind of shielding item. Outsiders could not perceive what is happening inside. Would you like me to take someone to the Shion Palace…”

“No!” Lex the Great shook his head immediately. “Don’t go near the Shion Palace. I’d like to see what he can do.”

“Yes.” Ulse was confused. But without asking more, he immediately bowed and stepped back.

In the Shion Palace, the soft moonlight dragged the 2 shadows in the flower garden long.

Veronica brushed her blond hair and filled his cup, “This is my tea made with your way, how does it taste?”

“It tastes good.” Chen Rui tasted it and said with a smile, “But to be honest, there is a still gap compared to Yini. Teacher has to work harder.”

“Yini is not only beautiful and smart, but also skillful. How can the teacher compare with her?” Veronica shook her head, showing a sad expression, “It’s a pity, Zola…”

“Zola is not dead, but she was seriously injured and went to a place to recuperate.” Chen Rui said mysteriously, “This is a secret. Please keep it confidential, teacher.”

“That’s good.” Veronica breathed a sigh of relief, “Don’t worry, I’m not a talkative person…”

“But the danger I encountered this time was real. I almost lost my life.” Chen Rui shrugged. “Won’t teacher comfort me?”

Veronica stared at him and suddenly sighed, “I don’t know how to comfort you. Perhaps the one who should comfort you the most is Princess Landbis. I remember when she was in college, she was very a innocent and lovely girl. Why did you hurt her like this?”

“It’s not that I want to hurt her. It’s… her own request” Chen Rui pointed to his heart, “I just happened to be at the right time to take this opportunity to tell everyone what ‘Little Arthur’ always wanted to say at the wedding.”

“You mean Landbis herself…” Veronica was taken aback. She intentionally ignored what he said later.

“People change.” Chen Rui met her gaze. “Just like you and me.”

Veronica’s blue eyes were clouded with a faint smoke, “Yeah, we’ve all changed.”

“Circumstances… especially time can change people. But, no matter how circumstances change, some things shouldn’t be changed. What do you think, teacher?”

“I don’t know…” Veronica looked away slightly. “I only know that once some things have changed, it is impossible to go back.”

“First, we should determine whether it has actually changed.”

Chen Rui finished his cup of tea, but Veronica didn’t pour it for him. She put down the teapot, “Why did you come to see me so late today?”

“I really wanted to see the teacher suddenly, so I came. Later, I will stop by to meet that Royal Majesty.”

“‘Stop by’ to meet Royal Majesty?” Veronica lightly covered her veil and smiled, “It turns out you want to meet Royal Majesty, so you ‘stop by’ to see me. It’s getting late. Go to the hall quickly. Don’t let His Majesty wait too long.”

“Teacher, you are wrong, I came to see you on purpose. As for Your Majesty, it’s really just ‘stopping by’.” Chen Rui’s tone was very sincere. “Besides, after this time, I don’t know if I can see you again, teacher.”

Veronica was slightly shocked, “Why would you say that?”

“The emperor became more and more wary of me, and he kept using various means to restrict me. This time I couldn’t bear it anymore and got rid of a chess piece that he placed in the Golden Estate, which also gave him a reason to play on the topic. If I have bad luck… I may never see teacher again.”

“How could he do this?” Veronica trembled, “In any case, you 2 are father and son after all, and you were his most beloved son…”

“So what if it’s the most beloved son? For the throne and the power, siblings, father and son fight brutally against each other; there are countless examples in history. It’s a pity…” Chen Rui looked a little sad, not for ‘Chen Rui’ but for ‘Arthur’.

“It’s a pity that His Majesty doesn’t know what Little Arthur want.” Veronica sighed. “Although you have changed a lot, I can see that you don’t care about what His Majesty is obsessed with.”

Chen Rui raised his brows slightly, “Teacher, do you know what I want?”

“Maybe it’s just this cup of tea, a quiet yard, someone who can put down all masks and burdens to talk.” Veronica’s blue eyes showed a touch of tenderness, “Just like Little Arthur back then…”

“It seems that I really have a lot of things that haven’t changed.” Chen Rui said implicitly, “‘Little Arthur’ or ‘Arthur’ have always had something in common. Some coincidences, may be more than chance. Anyway, I’m very happy to have such a cup of tea, a quiet yard, and a…”

“Okay, Little Arthur. ” Veronica interrupted, “Open up your heart and have a good talk with His Majesty. He’s the dad who favored you the most after all. As long as he understands your aspirations, he won’t make things difficult for you.”

“No, it’s not time yet.” Chen Rui gave Veronica a deep look, “Since the teacher let me open my heart, why did you lock the door of your heart tightly again?”

“You really should go!” Veronica avoided the question as if she had made up her mind, “This is the last time we will meet. I will not see you again, and you will not come to me again. After all, we are 2 people from different worlds.”

At this time, in another place… or another world.

Mias Empire’s imperial tomb; underworld.

This was an altar. Although only 3 stories high, it had a majestic momentum. However, it gave people the feeling of being creepy and terrifying, because it was surrounded by tall towers built by corpses as well as corpse roads, covering the entire vast underground world. No one knew how many lives had been sacrificed to complete this building complex that could be called a ‘miracle’ and a ‘hell on earth’.

On the altar, there were 2 mysterious men in crimson cloaks and masks, Kurci and Rotts. The 2 names were definitely pseudonyms, but the attire was a true identity – The archbishop of the Black Death Followers.

In addition to the 2 major archbishops, there were also chief bishops and chief leaders in several areas, as well as the most powerful combat representative of the church, Destruction Messenger.

The highest grade of Destruction Messenger was Chief Destruction Messenger, and there were only 2. Their strength was at the Demi-God level, while there were 6 ordinary Destruction Messenger. Even the lowest was at the early stage of the Kingdom level, which included the so-called strongest Destruction Messenger, Shura.

This was the once-in-100-year main sacrifice. Except for the pope, who was only known by his name, almost all the elites of the mysterious cult were gathered here.

Compared with the collapsed ‘fear’ main altar of the Golden Bright Underground Palace, this ‘hate’ main altar was already quite complete. Judging from the outer appearance, the history should be quite old.

Those who participated in the main sacrifice were the core of the Black Death Followers. When entering, these people also had to pass through layers of inspections and the most reliable faith verification. Those who did not have the real destruction faith could not pass at all.

Due to the lessons of the destruction of the Golden Bright Underground Palace’s ‘fear’ main altar, the originally stronger ‘hate’ main altar once again strengthened its defenses. The outer periphery gathered countless resentful souls’ powerful thoughts. With these most elite Destruction Messengers, coupled with the strength of the bone tower forest and the main altar itself that could accept the ‘hate’ faith everywhere, it was quite difficult for even the Pseudo-God powerhouse to break through the defense.

However, a strong castle was always breached from the inside. The so-called faith test was not foolproof. Shura who had a ‘destruction’ body could easily pass the ‘destruction faith’ test by using his instinctive will. His extremely pure destructive breath was also regarded as one of the most likely candidates to get the lord’s favor in this ‘lord’s descent’ sacrifice.

The sacrifice began. The essence of countless blood and life refining was poured into the altar. After a series of complicated rituals were completed, all the bone towers shone with a strong destructive breath, and countless blood-colored mist lingered on the towers. The special source power mixed with faith surged toward the main altar in the center.

About half an hour later, the blood mist around the bone tower group gradually thinned, and the entire dark red main altar turned bright red. The space in a concave sacrifice pit in the center began to distort, and a vortex-like entrance appeared, shining bloody-red light.

Under the action of this blood-red light, the gathered essence condensed into a blood-red ball, revealing a faint black ray.

Shura, who was guarding the altar, saw the blood bead, and a shocked expression flashed in his eyes as a familiar name surged to his mind.

“The Bloodfall Orb!” Kurci showed a surprised expression and exchanged glances with Rotts. It seemed that the power of the lord’s descent this time was far greater than before. The breath infection before the arrival could only be obtained by sacrifices of countless lives. It was like a powerful treasure equivalent to an artifact.

The blood mist around the bone towers became more and more bleak. As the power of the essence was concentrated on the main altar, the power of the bone towers began to drop significantly.

The main altar trembled, and the blood-red vortex in the center turned into a light beam, rising to the top of the underground world. The blood-colored light radiated out with a powerful destructive breath.

The nearby Black Death Followers clearly felt the might of the ‘god’, and they all showed their fanatical gazes.

The Dragon Bright Empire’s Shion Palace.

Veronica shook as she seemed to sense something.

“Teacher, what’s wrong?” Chen Rui asked with concern.

“I’m fine.” Veronica’s voice contained a hint of anxiety, “Go away, leave this place far away, and leave the Dragon Bright Empire!”

“Okay! Veronica.” Chen Rui didn’t call him ‘teacher’ this time and stood up, “Let me take you along. Let’s leave here together, go to a new place and start life again. No matter what status you want, sister, teacher or other… If you are tired of my company, you can also choose absolute freedom. This is the last and biggest wish of ‘Little Arthur’. “

Looking at those sincere eyes, Veronica’s hands began to tremble slightly as if she was trying to suppress something.

TL: Will she reject ‘Arthur’ and teleport him again?

chapters.title: Chapter 1014: Descent Of Hatred
chapters.body:
Chapter 1014: Descent Of Hatred

“It’s not worth it.” Veronica shook her head, “It’s really not worth it, you don’t even know…”

“Veronica, I know you’ve been through a lot of pain and suffering.” Chen Rui walked up to Veronica and held her hand, “The ‘Little Arthur’ didn’t have the ability to save you from the pain, but now I do! “

“No!” Veronica lowered her head. Her hands trembling even more, “You don’t know! You don’t know anything!”

Chen Rui sighed, “You’re wrong, actually, I know.”

“No…” Veronica clenched her fists so tightly that her knuckles had turned white due to the force. She suddenly raised her head with determination, broke her hands away with force, and screamed, “Do you know who caused you to be wandering for 7 years and lost most of your memory?”

Chen Rui looked into her eyes deeply, “It was just an accident. No matter what the reason is, ‘Little Arthur’ won’t blame you.”

Veronica’s facial expression changed, “You… you really know!”

“If the disappearance of memory is regarded as death, then ‘he’ is dead, and ‘I’ am just a person with reshaped memory or a person who comes back to life with part of the original consciousness of ‘Little Arthur’.”

Chen Rui uttered the greatest ‘truth’ for the first time since reborning in the world. Although it was only a pun, he pointed to his head, “However, in this part of memory, his greatest attachment has always existed. No matter what happened in the past, you are always the one in ‘Little Arthur’’s heart. You can dislike him, you can not love him, you can even hurt him, but you can’t stop his heart to want to make you happy; even if it’s just watching your happiness from a distance.”

Veronica was stunned. A teardrop slipped quietly from the corner of her eye and quickly melted into the veil.

“Follow me, Veronica. Get out of here. Leave all the pain and hatred behind, choose your life again, and truly choose freely.”

At this time, the blood-red light beam of the main altar became hotter and brighter in the Mias Empire’s imperial tomb. The entire huge underground world was illuminated. All the corpses on the bone towers seemed to be alive. They all made strange noises as if moaning and wailing. The red mist like countless resentful souls frantically rushed toward the light beam.

The blood-colored mist near the bone towers had been completely absorbed by the light beam, and the jagged white bones had gradually turned gray. It seemed that the power that had been accumulated for an unknown number of years had been transferred to the main altar.

The light beam condensed into a huge blood-colored phantasm suspended above the main altar.

All the Black Death Followers knelt down reverently, spread their hands toward the sky, and recited the chant aloud – Shura was among them, with a secret smile behind the mask.

Yerodisha, the Shion Palace.

Veronica’s tears were only fleeting before the gaze had been replaced by indifference.

“Very touching line, ‘Little Arthur’ or ‘Arthur’.” Her hand reached the veil on her face and slowly pulled it down, “Unfortunately, there are so many things you don’t understand, like… I look like this.”

From the day Chen Rui saw Veronica, she had been wearing a special veil. Except for those eyes, no one could see the details of the rest of her facial features. Now she finally took off the veil.

It should have been the flawless and beautiful face in his memory, but it had become a terrifying face. The face was covered with imprints that seemed to be spells. The patterns of the imprints seemed to be alive, slowly twisting and twitching, which looked horrific.

The pattern spread from the face all the way to the part below the neck that was covered by the clothes. One could imagine that the rest of the body should also have such a terrifying ‘patterns’.

Chen Rui carefully observed those ‘patterns’. He could clearly feel the rich life force and strange breath contained in them. This kind of existence was a bit similar to the parasitic living creatures such as cocoon silk. It lived in another creature’s body and absorbed the original body’s strength and ‘nutrients’ until the organism died.

The same soul variant physique, the feeling that Veronica gave to Chen Rui was completely different from the Hobbit King Inke and others he had seen. She exuded a breath that really needed to be looked up and made people shuddered from the inside out. She seemed like an avatar of the Abyss ruler; the momentum possessed was by no means comparable to that of a general Kingdom level powerhouse.

Soranly once said that very few people could be recognized by the ‘lord’ and given ‘Domination Heart’, and their strength as well as potential would greatly increase. In times of crisis, the lord’s will could be summoned and combined with lord’s power to exert incredible power.

Hatred Heart!

It must be because of this!

Veronica smiled coldly when she saw Chen Rui stunned and seemed dumbfounded. She raised her hand, and the smooth white palm began to change rapidly, turning into a terrifying claw with a foot-long sharp fingernail like a blade. It glowed blood red in the moonlight.

A wave of icy murderous aura rippled out, and the surrounding flowers and trees withered. A creepy smile appeared on her hideous face as her claw slowly stretched out toward Chen Rui, “I look like this. Do you still want to pull me out of the abyss?”

To Veronica’s surprise, ‘Arthur’ did not show the fearful look he imagined. Instead, he took a few steps forward to meet the claw and asked indifferently, “What are you afraid of?”

Veronica was shocked, and her movements suddenly froze in midair.

“Your eyes are full of terrifying breath.” Chen Rui looked directly at those blue-colored eyes, “but behind that is fear. You’re afraid.”

“You’re afraid of my approach; afraid that I will touch your heart wrapped in hatred and destruction; afraid that you will not be able to suppress some kind of will to hurt me.” Chen Rui wiped the hot tear on his cheeks, “Did you see that? This is the sadness of ‘Little Arthur’… because he sees the one he loves struggling in the endless hell. She can only look up at the ray of sunshine in the sky. He is… crying.”

Veronica’s eyes full of destructive breath trembled, and her eyes were already filled with mist. Although she tried her best to control it, she still couldn’t restrain the tears from her eyes.

“You asked me before, if you have fallen into an abyss with no sunlight… My answer is, I will use these hands to pull you out. Trust me!” Chen Rui stretched out his hand again, “Now, give me… your hands.”

Veronica looked at that hand, and her breathing became a little short. She looked at her hand that should be called a ‘claw’ and hesitated before she finally reached out to Chen Rui’s hand.

Suddenly, her body trembled as her face showed an expression of pain. She retracted her claw quickly as she tightly grasped her shoulders.

“Little Arthur! Get out of here!”

Chen Rui was taken aback, “Veronica!”

“Don’t come here!” Veronica’s body trembled as a powerful force field repelled out. Chen Rui’s body was pushed away by dozens of meters involuntarily.

“Kill! Kill! Kill!” Her voice turned into a deep growl as terrifying flames burned all over her body, and her eyes shot a terrifying light. The entire Shion Palace was filled with suffocating breath, and the ground kept cracking. There was lava-like heat and redness.

Such intense hatred.

He only felt it in the Tree of Nature at the Silver Moon Celestial Capital.

Chen Rui instinctively sensed danger. While he was on guard, his eyes suddenly froze.

He saw Veronica’s terrifying claw piercing through her own heart.

It was not an ordinary piercing, but the biggest blow that contained all the destruction power. Even the bloody blade protruding from the back had a blood mist, and the blood was rapidly evaporating.

Her body slowly collapsed. In the deep blue eyes like the sea, hatred and destruction quickly dimmed with the flames and all the vitality on her body. She seemed to want to look at him one more time, but she closed her eyes weakly in the end.

At this moment, the image in Chen Rui’s eyes lost all brilliance. Everything turned black and white, and he stayed in the scene where the weak body was pierced by a sharp blade.

A piercing feeling came. This blow was even more painful than directly piercing his heart.

Not only the pain belonging to ‘Little Arthur’, but also his own anger and sadness.

Above the main altar at the bottom of the Mias Empire’s imperial tomb, the huge phantasm slowly opened its eyes and looked down at the worshiping Black Death Followers.

It started to make a sound which was a weird language. Through the vibration of the power of the bone towers in all directions, it converged into a language that everyone could understand, echoing in the entire underground world.

“Human nature is inherently evil. Hatred is the source of all evil…”

“Those who believed destruction can gain eternal life in the destruction…”

“Subvert everything, and then re-create a world that can be destroyed at will…”

“…”

The Black Death Followers followed and recited aloud. The voice of phantasm not only had powerful penetration and appeal, but it also released an incredible power. Veils of blood-red mist spread out and shuttled among the followers.

Wherever the mist went, the Black Death Followers lit up with a little red light. They felt a special energy in their bodies. Knowing that it was the power bestowed by the ‘lord’s grace’, they were overjoyed. The voice of chanting was even louder and high-pitched.

In the palace, Chen Rui suppressed the strong emotions in his heart. He was about to step forward when Veronica’s body suddenly floated up. The originally closed eyes slowly opened. There was no sadness or anger, not even any excitement; only cold calmness.

The sharp claw was slowly drawn out from the body, and the dried blood was stained again. However, her expression did not waver at all as if this body was not hers.

“Idiot life! Stupid persistence!” Although this voice belonged to Veronica, it gave Chen Rui another familiar feeling, “You actually transcended my bestowed will in an instant, even transcending life and death…”

“However, this kind of persistent awareness is exactly what I need.” The cold gaze was set on Chen Rui, “Ignorant ant, you are the only fissure in her heart, right? Did you even forget to reveal the fear? As long as you are completely annihilated, this descendant can achieve perfection.”

When her gaze flashed, the terrifying coercion swept toward Chen Rui overwhelmingly. The ground along the way cracked. There was no mercy or hesitation.

If it was an ordinary powerhouse, he would have been annihilated under this kind of power, but when the crack reached Chen Rui, it stopped.

The cold blue eyes had a glimpse of surprise before she snorted, then the suffocating air suddenly became 100 times richer.

The space around Chen Rui’s body began to distort, and a crack in the space appeared. The degree of distortion of the crack rapidly multiplied, engulfing his entire body.

There was a contemptuous smile on her face with blue eyes. Although he was a powerful person at the Kingdom level, he was nothing but an ant.

For her, who had already descended on the avatar, this almost perfect descendant could burst out with power far from her own level. Perhaps it should be called might!

At this moment, a familiar crimson starlight appeared in the blue-eyed vision.

The starlight spread instantly, and the pupils of the blue eyes suddenly shrank.

The cracks in the space were quickly healed in the phantasms of the stars. The dazzling starlight filled the entire space of the Shion Palace, and the destructive breath seemed to be solidified by the starlight.

In the dazzling red starlight, the figure in the crystal armor became clear. Behind him were 2 pairs of graceful wings. At the same time, a familiar voice sounded, “Quilliana! Get out of her body!”

“It’s you!” The blue eyes roared full of hatred and anger.

chapters.title: Chapter 1015: The Black Death Follower Without A Soul
chapters.body:
Chapter 1015: The Black Death Follower Without A Soul

In the Shion Palace, the ground cracked, and countless blood-colored lights erupted, resisting the star phantasms. The 2 forces were in a stalemate.

Veronica, no, now it should be Quilliana. Her pupils had turned from the original blue to blood red, and the sharp claw swiped with fierce flames, tearing apart the circles of water ripples in the stars. However, after the flames tore through the ripples, it was already a spent force. It was swept away into nothingness by the sharp qi of the [Aura Blade].

[Aura Blade] slashed at Quilliana’s head with unabated speed. and Quilliana defended with the claw. The sparks splashed, and there was a sound of metallic clashing. A shallow mark was left on the nail.

Quilliana’s arm seethed with fiery flames. Countless intertwined rays of light appeared around Chen Rui’s body. From a distance, it seemed like a huge claw composed of countless fine ‘blades’ held him in the middle.

Chen Rui dodged quickly. In this space where the terrifying forces were intertwined, if he simply used shifting or teleportation, he would actively bump his neck against the blades, so he could only dodge by regular movement. If he was slightly slower, a few blood stains appeared on his face.

The ‘sharp claws’ didn’t need to touch the body; just the terrifying sharpness could cut everything across the distance.

Quilliana’s fighting style was ‘sharp’. Her heavy attacks were concentrated, attacking with point and line. It was similar to [Aura Blade]’s attack, but sharper and more variable.

It stood to reason that when Chen Rui activated [Red Pole Star Transformation], he could kill even Demi-God, but facing Quilliana, whose strength had only just passed the Demi-God level, he actually had a feeling of being totally suppressed. This was because Quilliana’s real strength had already surpassed that of ordinary Pseudo-God. The killing moves was fierce and elusive. Even in this body, her power was also faintly close to the real might.

It was like a peerless powerhouse. Even if her power was limited to the level of ordinary powerhouses, ordinary powerhouses still could match her.

The huge claw closed, and the countless blades overlapped in the blink of an eye. They were about to grindChen Rui into dust. Chen Rui could no longer dodge. The 2 pairs of starlight wings on the back wrapped him.

At the moment when the light of the flame and the starlight collided, the entire space shook violently. There was a sharp, soul-piercing sound. In the countless sparks, many fragments of the star wings were shattered apart. One could imagine how much pressure the wings had endured.

At this time, Quilliana’s movements suddenly stopped. The speed of those ‘blades’ suddenly slowed down, and the power also decreased radically. She had a painful expression on her face as if she was desperately fighting against something.

This was not the first time this phenomenon had appeared. Every time Chen Rui was in danger, Quilliana’s power would always stagnate for no reason. Although Quilliana controlled by overwhelming power, Veronica had been burning her soul desperately to struggle.

For the last ray of sunshine in my heart.

Even if there is no return for me.

Taking this opportunity, a cup with milky white brilliance appeared in the sky where the sparks were intertwined, then it turned into a trickle and merged below.

Holy Grail’s [Holy Protection]!

[Holy Protection] could increase ‘luck’ in a short period of time which could reduce the physical and magical damage of the blessed. The time of various debuff states would be greatly shortened whereas the time of buff states would be increased.

Under the buff of [Holy Protection], the starlight suddenly flourished. The 4 pairs of star wings spread out. The countless sharp rays of intertwined light were repelled and shot back toward Quilliana— [Star Guardian Wings]’s reflect damage!

Quilliana was caught off guard and wrapped up in her own ultimate move. Blood splattered all over her body. Numerous terrifying scars crisscrossed her entire body, and her flesh was rolled up.

“Stupid and lowly existence. How dare you resist the greatest will of the lord!” Quilliana sneered, “Don’t think that burning your soul can stop me. Even if I have to sacrifice this rare and supreme soul variant physique today, I must completely annihilate that bastard!”

After finishing speaking, the flames around Quilliana’s body burned more and more fiercely. All the clothes were burned, revealing the naked body.

As expected, the body that was supposed to be perfect and seductive was covered with terrifying and strange ‘patterns’. Those patterns began to distort and expand rapidly, completely wrapping the ‘human’ body like a piece of armor. The blade-likenails also extended, showing a cold sharp edge.

After this kind of mutation, Veronica’s will was completely suppressed. Quilliana let out a low growl. The entire blood-colored kingdom glowed so brightly that it even overshadowed the brilliance of the stars.

Chen Rui sensed the pressure suddenly doubled. What was even more terrifying was that the power of Quilliana was gradually increasing, as if the power of the original body was continuously transmitted to this soul variant physique through some kind of exhaustion secret technique.

If it was a Demi-God level powerhouse, he would have already collapsed under this terrifying power, but Chen Rui had the Super System and various means. Although he was suppressed at a disadvantage, he could always compete with Quilliana. This was not surprising to Quilliana. She has already experienced how extraordinary this enemy was in the battle of the Silver Moon Celestial Capital’s Tree of Nature. He might even have the kingdom of god. So this time, Quilliana did not waste her energy trying to control or subdue Chen Rui, but she adopted the most direct method—destruction.

Due to the sacrificial power of the main altar, the will received by Veronica, the soul variant physique, could be maximized. Quilliana was determined to eliminate Chen Rui even at the expense of this rare carrier. She was also fully confident to crush that difficult enemy with the strongest soul variant.

Mias Empire’s imperial tomb underground. The ‘hate’ main altar.

The huge phantasm in the air became more solid as the devotees continued to chant aloud and sacrifice.

Shura, who had been chanting with everyone, also discovered that among the worshiped ‘god’ statues around altar, apart from the middle and low-level the abyss creatures like the gap demon, berserk demon, blazing flame witch, the Abyss lord, the tallest the 3rd floor ‘god statue’ that was originally vague finally became clear.

This should be something that could only be seen by the core Black Death Follower after getting the ‘gift’ of the phantasm.

In the middle was a creature with obvious female characteristics, bulging boobs, a slender body, a tail on the back, and long fingernails that were sharp like knives. The bone spurs and protrusions on the body were more like a piece of armor. A strong feeling of ‘hatred’ poured out of Shura’s heart automatically.

This image was vaguely consistent with the phantasm in the air. Chen Rui had also seen it in the Tree of Nature space in the Silver Moon Celestial Capital. It was Hatred Lord Quilliana.

Beside ‘Hate’ were 2 male statues, 1 with a strong body and 6 arms was ‘fear’; the other one was ‘despair’ who was huge like a scorpion.

The 3 rulers of the abyss!

Hatred Lord Quilliana, Fear Lord Sosbach, and Despair Lord, whose name was unknown.

What was certain was that, like the other 2 abyss rulers, there was still a ‘despair’ main altar. It was just that no one knew the location specifically.

The blood-red mist floated around the Black Death Followers, constantly emitting energy and infiltrating the bodies of the Black Death Followers. In fact, these were just the ‘impurities’ that the giant phantasm emitted when absorbing and purifying the power of blood sacrifice. Even so, it was enough for these firm believers to get the corresponding power.

The blood-red mist danced for a while, then it gradually slowed down, condensing beside Shura.

This scene made the rest of the Black Death Followers show their envy expressions. Even the 2 archbishops were no exception, because this meant that Shura would become the highest blessed one of ‘lord’s descent’ this time. He could be bestowed the great benefit by ‘lord’.

“You have an amazing destruction faith, surpassing everyone else. I will give you the strongest soul variant power and Domination Heart.” Quilliana’s phantasm made a distant voice, shaking the entire main altar.

At the same time, this voice carried an unquestionable verdict, which made everyone had a ‘naturally agree’ in their minds. No one had any objection, especially Soranly. She secretly thought in her mind. I never thought that Shura will actually get the attention of the lord and become the highest favored person, then his use value will be greatly increased. He is very likely to enter the highest level of the mysterious cult in the future, so I must use the existing intimate relationship to further woo him, making him truly the backbone of the Cloud Rider Empire faction.

Next, just by dedicating a single soul, Shura could become the most powerful soul variant physique and get the Hatred Heart.

Shura took a few steps forward, and the surrounding blood mist slowly enveloped him.

At this moment, Hatred Lord phantasm’s voice changed suddenly.

“You… you don’t have a soul!”

As soon as this sentence came out, all the Black Death Followers showed horrified expressions. How could a person have no soul?

“Who are you?!” The phantasm’s voice had a special deterrent power.

Shura’s mask was torn apart immediately. Not only the mask, but the entire face and body were cracked under the question, but there was no blood spilling out of the crack.

Shura raised his head, looked at the phantasm in the air, and showed a strange smile. When he laughed, the skin on his face split, which looked gruesome.

“Bitch, aren’t you fighting me in another place?”

The meaning of these words was quite clear. The Black Death Followers were in a commotion. The aspiring ‘Shura’ is actually a spy!

“Damn it!” Quilliana finally understood. She didn’t expect to let the enemy’s avatar mix into the main altar. Her eyes flashed. She exuded might and decimated Shura’s body into nothingness.

However, in the center of the split body, a strange circular object was suspended.

This was a white polyhedron engraved with the imprint of ancient runes. There were 6 colors of colorful light around it, which gave Quilliana an extremely dangerous feeling.

The killer of Pseudo-Gods made by the supreme Angel Raphael himself: Brilliant Thunder of Light!

Not only that, Chen Rui also used the 6 element source power and attached the ‘Cosmos Annihilation’ taught by the Elemental King to it, which could buff the power of Brilliant Thunder of Light to an unimaginable level by multiplying the power.

Quilliana narrowed her eyes and saw the 6-color light immersed in the white polyhedron. In the next second, everything turned into an incandescent light.

chapters.title: Chapter 1016: Turning Into Butterfly
chapters.body:
Chapter 1016: Turning Into Butterfly

The white light was so dazzling. An indescribable force instantly illuminated the underground world.

Shura had been waiting for the best time. When Quilliana was ready to activate the ‘lord’s gift’ and the defense of the bone towers was at its lowest point, she finally showed her last fangs. Quilliana’s angry blow to kill Shura was equivalent to giving another boost to the ‘nuclear bomb’.

If Quilliana’s original body was here, no matter how powerful ‘Brilliant Thunder of Light’ and ‘Cosmos Annihilation’ were, it couldn’t cause much damage, but what appeared in the main altar was just a projection of her.

Originally, the bone towers, which had a strong faith power and blood sacrifice power, could withstand and share the damage suffered by the main altar, but now due to the main sacrifice ceremony to summon Quilliana, all the power of the bone towers was devoured by the main altar. Although there were many protections on the outside of the underground world, the inner area of the main altar was at its most vulnerable and could not resist this terrifying destructive force.

In fact, this enhanced version of Brilliant Thunder of Light was originally prepared by Chen Rui for the trip to the Holy Light Mountain. It was likely to be ‘repaid’ to Raphael, but he went to the Holy Light Mountain for the purpose of Tiffany and the source of creation, which was his personal gains and losses. The descent of the Abyss was a disaster for all living beings. Therefore, after weighing the pros and cons, he finally gave this ‘big gift’ to Quilliana.

Wherever the incomparably bright white light goes, everything, the Black Death Followers, the bone towers, the corpse road… instantly turned into particles and disappeared without a trace. Quilliana’s avatar only lasted for a few seconds, and she could no longer bear the terrifying power. In the shrill scream, she turned into nothingness together with the main altar.

The entire Mias Empire was shaking, the earth was cracking open, and the surrounding seawater was also affected by this terrifying force. A huge tide like a tsunami appeared. The clueless people thought that some kind of strong earthquake had occurred. They all fled from their houses in panic.

It took a long time for the ‘earthquake’ to subside, and the area where the imperial tomb was located had collapsed. If it weren’t for the strong protection set up by the main altar to prevent invasion, the power of this explosion would be enough to sink the entire island empire in the sea.

At the moment the main altar was annihilated, Quilliana at the Shion Palace shuddered. Her power suddenly stopped as she covered her head and screamed in pain.

“Damn it! Even if you destroy the main altar, the will of the Abyss will not be destroyed! It won’t be long before we meet again! By then…”

The words stopped abruptly before she finished speaking. In the blue eyes, the terrifying blood red gradually faded away, and the hideous ‘armor’ and sharp-blade-like nails disappeared at a speed visible to the naked eye, returning to the naked female body.

On her perfect body, the terrifying ‘patterns’ no longer existed, but she seemed to have lost all her strength. She staggered and slumped forward.

Chen Rui’s figure flashed and caught hold of Veronica before he slowly sat down.

Veronica’s sea-blue eyes looked exhausted, but her gaze carried an unprecedented peace.

“You did it, Little Arthur. No, I call you Arthur…”

“You pulled me up from the abyss of despair with both hands.”

Veronica’s beauty was comparable to that of Catherine and Zola, and her mature and perfect naked body was full of allure. However, Chen Rui’s eyes did not have any other thoughts at this moment, only a touch of sadness.

Whether it was the previous surpassing the Hatred Heart or the struggle with Quilliana, it was at the cost of burning her soul. Not to mention, Quilliana had exhausted all the power of this soul variant physique in order to kill Chen Rui.

Now Veronica’s body and soul were exhausted. Even the resurrection potion couldn’t work.

Veronica raised her hand and slowly stroked his face, “Little Arthur, you have grown up, take good care of yourself and the people around you in the future. My heart will always be with you.”

Chen Rui smiled as tears fell down on Veronica’s face. In his consciousness, an incomparably rich sadness surged into his heart. Whilst in perplexion, he couldn’t tell whether it was originally ‘Arthur’ or his.

“Sorry, I’m not the original Arthur.”

“Your tears are as warm as the sun.” Veronica looked at the sky. Although there was only moonlight, she seemed to see the sun, “I finally don’t have to hope anymore, because I’m already bathed in the sun… …”

Her figure gradually became thinner, and her beautiful smile was still peaceful. She suddenly raised her body and gently kissed Chen Rui’s lips.

Chen Rui trembled slightly. Before he had time to feel the touch of tenderness, the body in his arms lightened and dissipated into countless luminous spots. It was like a butterfly waving its wings to say goodbye.

He raised his head, looked at the luminous spots that were gradually dissipating in the air, and gently stretched out his hand. The luminous spots lingered in his hand for a moment with nostalgia and began to disappear.

In the air, a silver-white thing appeared, emitting a soft white light. All the luminous spots were quickly absorbed into it.

Holy Grail.

In addition to the [Holy Protection] that assisted the battle, the Holy Grail had another function, which was the [Holy Soul].

Originally, Chen Rui’s plan was to use the Holy Soul’s skill to stabilize Python, the biggest threat, but he didn’t expect it to be the last hope to save Veronica.

[Holy Soul] could put the damaged soul entity in the Holy Grail to nurture it until it recovered, and the effect of [Holy Soul] could be enhanced by sacrificing some kind of light power. However, [Holy Soul] was not omnipotent. The degree and time of recovery depended on the degree of damage to the soul entity. Veronica’s soul had almost completely collapsed, which was completely different from the damage of Python. No one knew the time needed for recovery or when she would recover.

Chen Rui closed his eyes and felt the warmth that seemed to still exist around him. The entire spirit power was also undergoing some kind of special change. The original ‘Arthur’ subconsciousness in the depths of his heart gradually dissipated and merged into his soul. His soul power was also strengthened with gradual refinement.

After a long time, he finally opened his eyes and strode out.

Before Chen Rui entered the Shion Palace, the strongest ancient runes formation had been deployed around using the prepared items, blocking the movement and power inside of the Shion Palace. Although the battle just now was very fierce, there was no sound outside – This battle was a combination of massive faith power and Chen Rui’s original body. If he was defeated by Quilliana, the formation would collapse.

When Chen Rui left, he did not close the formation directly, but turned on the runes function at a certain time. After a certain period of time passed, it would gradually disappear, revealing the true appearance of the Shion Palace, which was razed to the ground.

Chen Rui did not stop all the way and walked straight to the palace hall.

This time, he came to Yerodisha to meet this ‘father’.

Unsurprisingly, even though it was late at night, Lex the Great was still waiting for him in the main hall, and no one stopped him along the way.

“Your Majesty has been waiting for a long time.” Chen Rui came to the steps under the throne as he stood still and bowed.

“You also know that I’ve been ‘waiting’ for a long time?” Lex the Great snorted coldly, “You were quite comfortable in the Shion Palace.”

Hearing the word ‘comfortable’, Chen Rui shrugged speechlessly without explaining.

“You and the wife of your dead Uncle Sophil…” Lex the Great deliberately used this more taboo title.

Chen Rui shook his head and said, “There is no more ‘Sophil’s wife’ in this world.”

“You’ve made up your mind to take her away at all costs?”

“No, I haven’t finished my words. In this world, not only is there no ‘Sophil’s widow’, but there is also no ‘Veronica’ – No more.”

Lex the Great understood the meaning of this sentence, and he showed a shocked expression as if it was the first time he got to know the ‘son’ in front of him, “I really underestimate you, Arthur. You can be so cruel… I have to admit it. You already have the most important quality a ruler should have.”

“The most important quality… is being ruthless?” Chen Rui said indifferently, “All obstacles in front of that road, everyone, will be removed without hesitation, right? Your Majesty.”

Lex the Great narrowed his eyes slightly, “Are you asking knowingly?”

“Really?” Chen Rui showed an indifferent expression, “Looks like I asked a foolish question.”

“It’s not because of this question that you’re foolish. It’s…” Lex the Great held an extra piece of paper, which Chen Rui handed to him at the beginning, “I still don’t understand, it’s unbelievably foolish. “

“Isn’t Your Majesty doing this? Maybe you are still on guard, lest falling into a trap.” Chen Rui smiled, “Don’t tell me that Your Majesty never had this idea. Even if I didn’t ask explicitly, it’s just a matter of time.”

It turned out that the content of that paper was the real reason why the Golden Estate was ostracized, suppressed and even coerced during this period. The mastermind of everything was actually ‘Arthur’ himself.

“Are you willing to give up all this? Perhaps you are ready to give up all your efforts long ago?” Lex the Great shook his head, “Just for the Holy Light Robe? It’s just a symbolic item. Even if it has a special meaning to the church, it will not bring you any real and practical benefits. You clearly have the support of the church, and you have shown such ability, plus that kind of resolute will and means. Even if you overthrow me now, it’s not impossible to sit on this throne. Why did you make such a decision?”

“Shouldn’t Your Majesty be happy? Today I came to the door, indirectly killing the legion commander of the capital garrison, and fornicating with the so-called uncle’s widow. Isn’t this creating the best chance for Your Majesty?” Chen Rui looked around the quiet hall, “But, do you really know what I want? Your Majesty.”

“I don’t know.” Lex’s fingers slowly tapped the armrest of the throne, “I just know that you shouldn’t come alone today.”

chapters.title: Chapter 1017: Father
chapters.body:
Chapter 1017: Father

Chen Rui just smiled faintly, “Murder the legion commander of the capital garrison, fornicate and ‘kill’ the uncle’s widow… These may not be enough? Well, how about adding an ‘assassinating the ruler’?”

The last sentence made Lex the Great’s eyes turned fierce as he looked straight into Chen Rui’s eyes. However, apart from indifference, he didn’t see anything extra there.

“Your Majesty doesn’t want to do this?” Chen Rui looked Lex the Great directly in the eyes. “This is giving you a favorable opportunity once and for all. Isn’t this the ‘most important’ quality of a ruler?”

The rhythm of Lex the Great’s breathing quickened a bit. He took a deep breath, and it gradually calmed down, “So, you already have this awareness when you come here without bringing a guardian?”

“From the time I came to this palace… No, from the day ‘Arthur’ was born in this palace, I should have had this kind of awareness.” Chen Rui shook his head lightly, “The most ruthless is the ruler family. For the sake of power and survival, the more relatives you have, the more you will fight to the death. The tree wants to be quiet yet the wind is constant. It’s impossible to live a carefree life. Even the son you once loved the most may one day shake your throne and become an obstacle in the way of power pursuit, and you will not hesitate to remove him.”

“If that’s the case, why did you come back? Why did you show such amazing ability after you came back? Is it just for that woman? The woman you’ve already got rid of? All your efforts revolve around this kind love affair, and this is how it ends in the end?”

“It’s my own business. I don’t want to answer too much,” Chen Rui didn’t answer directly and changed the subject, “However, when it comes to Veronica, since I’ve completely settled with her, then… should our agreement be fulfilled as promised?”

“To completely remove the remnants of the Cloud Rider Empire? Even if you don’t tell me, I’ll do it.” Lex the Great sneered, “But I’m curious that you are still caring about this matter in this situation. What do you want actually?”

“If there’s anything I want to take away, it’s the Holy Light Robe.” Chen Rui pointed to his head, “But for ‘Arthur’, what he really wants is not this, because he is more naive and gentle than me. Foolish guy… but it’s pointless to say that now, Your Majesty. Now it’s not what I want, it’s what you want?”

The ruler on the throne was silent as tapped the armrest with his index finger. In this silent hall, it seemed extremely loud.

The atmosphere solidified for a while. After a while, Lex seemed to have made some kind of decision. With a wave of his hand, a space ring came out and floated in front of Chen Rui.

“This is what you want to take away.”

Chen Rui probed with his consciousness, and there was only 1 thing inside, a white robe as thin as a cicada’s wings, emitting a silvery white brilliance. He could sense the pure light breath with just the contact of consciousness, which was not inferior to the level of the Crown of Thorns and Holy Grail.

The highest holy relic of the Dragon Bright Empire, which was the last of the 3 holy relics – Holy Light Robe!

Chen Rui was stunned. It was indeed a bit unexpected that he could get the Holy Light Robe that he had always wanted so easily.

Lex noticed that puzzled look, and there was an inexplicable sense of relief as he said coldly, “Why? Isn’t that what you want?”

“Of course, it’s just a bit unexpected.” Although surprised, Chen Rui would definitely not refuse this good thing that was presented to him. He kept the space ring in the storage warehouse, “Then, Your Majesty… Next, what should I do as a prince?”

“Didn’t you plan it long ago?” Lex sneered, “I’m now finally sure that from the very beginning of your return, you don’t intend to stay here at all. Golden Estate, magic game, yellow dragon wine are just your chips.”

“ Oh ?” Chen Rui raised his eyebrows, “Your Majesty is sure there is no other conspiracy here?”

“ Hmph ! Don’t treat everyone except yourself as an idiot. Although I don’t know what you want, I already know what you don’t want.” Lex gave Chen Rui a deep look, “I don’t know if I should breathe a sigh of relief or sigh. I admit that I have wandered between inheritors and the throne I control, but no matter how great a ruler in history, there is always such hesitation. As many people think, you’re indeed the best successor to this empire. Why are you so dismissive of it?”

“Everyone’s pursuit is different. Of course, I also have my own peristence, but the throne and power are not among them. Moreover, I’m confident that I have the ability to transcend certain shackles and truly pursue what I want.”

Lex was silent for a moment, “What else do you wish for?”

Wish ? A smile appeared on the corner of Chen Rui’s mouth, “Freya. Although she has never raised any objection, it can be seen that she is reluctant to the political marriage you arranged. I hope that in the future, she will have the right to freely choose a marriage.”

“Ridiculous!” Lex said contemptuously. “Since she’s a princess, she should always be prepared to sacrifice her life for the empire, not to mention a mere marriage?”

“Only weak empires need to sacrifice their women’s happiness for temporary stability. I don’t think the Dragon Bright Empire and Your Majesty need to do that. If… you love Freya as much as you seem.”

Lex didn’t answer, but he asked out of the blue, “Is the Holy Grail in your hands too?”

Chen Rui looked into Lex’s eyes and nodded slowly.

“So that’s the case…” Lex nodded slowly, seeming to understand a lot, “The refusal to marry at the Blue Glory Empire was just a deal with Landbis.”

“That’s a deal of her own choice.”

“Just like between us now?”

“If… Your Majesty thinks so.’” Chen Rui stared at Lex for a moment, then he shrugged. “If there’s nothing else, I’ll leave first.”

“Are you going to bid farewell like this?” Lex said ‘farewell’ instead of ‘goodbye’.

“Yes.” Chen Rui took a deep breath, “I’m ready.”

“You have your own choices. I can’t stop you.” Lex was silent for a while, “I’ll just say one thing. It’s not too late for you to change your mind. It’s not a courtesy, you should know.”

“I think ‘Arthur’ has no regrets. No matter what he wants to do, there is always a father who takes him to heart.” Chen Rui bowed deeply to Lex and turned away.

Behind him, Lex’s low voice came, “You’ve been trying to separate yourself and the ‘Arthur’ who disappeared into 2 different people, but no matter what changes you’ve gone through, no matter what identity or ability you have, the blood of the Roland family has always flowed in your body. No matter what you do, you can’t deny the root.”

“So, this is the way I bid farewell.” Chen Rui didn’t explain anything. He turned his head and looked at the figure standing up on the throne. He felt a long-lost feeling in his heart as a certain image overlapped in his memory, “So, farewell, father.”

At this moment, Chen Rui felt that the last consciousness of ‘Arthur’ also dissipated, or it was completely integrated into his soul without any flaws or loopholes. They were no longer separated from each other. The power of the soul became unprecedentedly pure and abundant. Both quality and quantity had been greatly improved.

Just like before the advancement to [Red Pole Star Transformation], this improvement was equivalent to laying a solid and sturdy foundation for the advancement to the next realm. Next, he only needed an opportunity to induce qualitative change.

This opportunity was the creation origin!

Chen Rui’s last sentence was not loud, but Lex still heard it. His body shook slightly, staring at the back of the lone walker, only to feel that his vision suddenly blurred.

After all, Lex was the emperor who controlled the entire empire. Previously, his vision was obscured because he had always been vigilant of ‘Arthur”s talent and prestige, but when he jumped out of that frame now, he really saw a lot of things.

‘Arthur’ turned the Golden Estate into a great income source with his great talent, then he passed it on to him in this way.

Golden Estate, magic game, yellow dragon wine… They were not bargaining chips, but a gift.

A gift for his father.

Next, what ‘Arthur’ was going to do must be extremely dangerous. Judging from Holy Grail and Holy Light Robe, it was likely to involve the behemoth Holy Church. Therefore, before that, it was necessary to draw a line with the Dragon Bright Empire and his father, so Arthur gave him a piece of paper at that time. What happened next was planned on the paper, which was also Arthur’s best choice of bidding farewell.

Lex suddenly felt grateful for the choice he made in the end. Although ‘Arthur’ was about to bid farewell and take a path that even he could not have predicted, he did not lose his son anyway.

“See, Ikrina, our son…”

After a long time, the blurred vision gradually became clear, and the hunched figure regained its uprightness as he slowly sat on the throne.

“Ulse!”

Ulse, the captain of the imperial guard team, who had been on standby somewhere, immediately appeared in the main hall, “Your Majesty.”

“Has Arthur left?”

“Yes, Your Majesty. His Highness Arthur has left the palace, but the strange thing is that he seems to disappear out of thin air. Even Gus’ sensing ability can’t detect His Highness Arthur’s whereabouts.”

Lex the Great nodded calmly, “Immediately inform the whole city that Third Prince Arthur killed Veronica, the widow of the late Prince Sophil, and assassinated the legion commander Trinis of the Golden Estate, the capital garrison.
