Star god position: God of Knowledge

Armed Bestowment:

1. Law Soul Weapon (removable)

2. Purple Star Transformation Star Armor (removable)

Purple Star’s divinity might buff:

1. [Break Armor] (there is a chance to ignore the opponent’s defense).

2. [Concentrate] (immune to all mind control).

Controller Emperor’s Deterrence: Canceled status (recoverable).

Controller’s Devotion: Canceled status (recoverable).

Heart language: mind call is turned on (can be turned off)

Faith fusion: 5% (adjustable, currently the largest)

Star status: Soul Splitting.

Location: Galaxy Divinity Temple.

…

These data were slightly different from the previous ones. It included some new functions, and the previous faith ratio had also been adjusted to the ratio of faith fusion. At present, 5% was the maximum limit that Zola could accept, and the remaining 95% naturally went to him and the Super System.

The lives of the solar system provided faith power. The controller, Chen Rui, and the entire Super System receiving the faith power were enhanced. The higher the enhancement, the more vigorous the life of the solar system and the stronger the power. This was actually a cycle. Conversely, if Chen Rui died unfortunately, then this universe, including everything, would turn into nothingness.

“That’s why.” Chen Rui pondered for a long time, and he finally figured out some key issues.

No wonder Zola has been unable to condense [Armor of Faith]. To be precise, when she accepted the 1-star enhancement, her ‘path’ has changed in some way. She is no longer a trainer at the level of ordinary power in this world. Instead, she accepted the Super System. At that time, she obtained ‘soul weapon’ by star conferring (Zola’s soul weapon state is that the ‘Secret Shadow’ short staff becomes a long staff, and the power is greatly increased), which is equivalent to the original Armed Bestowment. The current Purple Star Transformation Star Armor is the second version of Armed Bestowment.

“What?” Zola asked curiously.

“I have to confess something to you, Zola.”

“I know.”

“ Huh ?” Chen Rui was startled. You know all this?

Zola glanced at Veronica and bit her lip, “Don’t you think your confession is a little late?”

(Hmph, if I hadn’t entered here and caught your adultery, I would have been kept in the dark!)

(But I’m in a great mood today…)

(Veronica is this guy’s first love, and she’s not bad, plus she is only a soul entity now…)

(No, I still can’t give in! When I said Tiffany’s marriage last time, I swore that she will be the last one!)

(By the way, it seems that I made the same oath in Isabella’s case…)

(Is it what the guy meant when he used to say, ‘Integrity is dead’?)

(…)

When Ms. Fairy Dragon’s thoughts were all over, Veronica, who was stunned by those words, had already reacted and smiled while covering her face.

Chen Rui also understood, “ Huh ?”

Zola and Chen Rui knew each other’s mind. When she saw his gaze, she knew that she had guessed wrong, and her face flushed slightly. However, Ms. Fairy Dragon had the attribute of fake daze inherited from the Elf King father. She even justly asked, “What?”

Chen Rui:  …

After some explanation.

“That’s it, you have now embarked on a different path from ordinary trainers.” Chen Rui said solemnly, “I don’t know if this is a curse or a blessing.”

Zola thought for a moment and asked, “Is this the path you’re going?”

“Should be.”

“ Oh. “

(What a fool! Since that is the case, of course I will go with you.)

(Whether… it’s a blessing or a curse.)

Soon after, Zola’s consciousness returned to the Rainbow Valley, and she continued to comprehend and master her newly acquired powers. In fact, her detached trace of soul had remained in the Super System forever. In normal times, she integrated into the Galaxy Divinity Statue to accept the purification and enhancement of faith and feedback it to the original body. When Zola consciously entered, she could also enter the Tower of Faith, perform miracles at the right time, and gain more faith power.

Veronica was also starting to get busy. As the highest oracle of Galaxy Divinity Temple, she had very special authority and power. What she had to do now was to help Zola select oracles and gods who had ‘knowledge’ among those believers who had reached the corresponding devotion. She was equivalent to the spokesperson of the lower management who would build a complete system and manage the temples as well as divinity statues in various places so that the faith could spread better.

Veronica, the ‘God Servant’, could actually be conferred a star position. After Zola left, Chen Rui was about to ask her about it, but Veronica saw his thoughts at a glance. She smiled and shook her head, turning into a light and disappearing in the Tower of Faith.

Chen Rui saw the meaning of that smile.

It’s good to just be with you like this.

After a moment of silence, Chen Rui also quit the Super System.

“What happened just now? Are you training?” Shea’s concerned voice sounded.

Chen Rui was talking to Shea about finding Tiffany just now, then he suddenly fell into a semi-dormant unconscious state. Shea knew that Chen Rui would sometimes enter a certain ‘training’ state, so she immediately ordered the lamp spirits to be on guard outside so as not to disturb him.

“It’s something similar.” Chen Rui gently held Shea’s hand, “If I tell you that because of me, your future life path may undergo some unpredictable changes, and you may miss a lot of things… I don’t even know if it’s a curse or a blessing, what will you do?”

“The future? It has already changed now.” Shea’s eyes showed a faint tenderness, “Actually, no one can be sure about the future. For us… the only thing I can be sure of is that if I don’t meet you in this life, it will be a big miss.”

A little different from Zola’s answer, but the same choice.

Chen Rui held Shea’s hand tightly while Shea gently put the other hand on his, “It’s not just me, I believe they are too. What you need to do is not to explain or worry, but walk firmly toward your own direction.”

Looking at the affection in the eyes of Her Majesty Empress, who was completely his, Chen Rui felt that his whole body was full of strength and confidence. No matter how the future path will turn out, whether it is Satan, 3 archangels, or the Abyss… I am not afraid.

“I mean, precious Shea, why are your sweet words more and more like me?” Chen Rui’s mood was completely relaxed as he blinked at Shea. His fingers actually drew circles in the palm of that jade hand.

“Didn’t you say ‘the one who is close to the pig will become foolish’?” Shea rolled her eyes at him madly. Her palm was one of her sensitive spots. When this guy fiddled her palm, she trembled and her hair stood on end.

“It’s ‘peers determines a person’s character‘, okay? It seems that we need to study some academic issues in depth…” Chen Rui grinned, looked around, and began to be handsy.

“Don’t mess around, Stiller is still waiting to report to me in the side hall.” Shea was startled. She wanted to withdraw her hand, but she was held tightly, “You better go and enlighten Tiffany first. 7 days later, you’re taking her back to the Bloody Empire.”

“Compared with Tiffany, my Shea is surely more important.” Chen Rui suddenly stopped laughing and talked about formal matters, “The invasion of the palace this time exposed the lack of defense strength. Those ancient runes are the ones I set when I’m still at the Kingdom level. The strength of the lamp spirits guards can only defend the ordinary strength, and there is almost no ability to resist the enemies of super-level, especially above the kingdom level. This is directly related to your safety, so before you leave the Fallen Angel Capital, I have to finish 2 matters. First, I had to hurry up and rearrange the ancient rune defense system near the palace, and then the super-level guards… Currently only 7 titans and 4 giant crystal beasts has evolved to super-level. Since the target is too large and obvious, I will first transfer 2 titans and 2 giant crystal beasts to guard the palace with the lamp spirits as well as the ancient runes. The rest should be assigned to the 2 empires too just in case. I will also speed up the research and evolution for your most powerful imperial guards, lamp spirits. Hopefully, there will be super-level as soon as possible. What do you think?”

“ En… “

“What?”

A certain empress couldn’t bear it anymore, “Shameless guy, can you stop those damn hands when you’re talking seriously!”

“ Wow ! There’s actually white silk in the skirt. Baby, are you finally willing to wear it? What is that wet patch, Hehe … ouch !”

“Bastard, stop! At this time…” Her Majesty Empress could no longer maintain her usual indifferent voice under the continuous harassment of those ‘damn hands’ to her sensitive parts. Her breathing began to become a little short, and her attitude softened, “Don’t! The side hall still…”

“Manlace! Immediately go to the side hall and tell Stiller that Her Majesty Shea has a very important matter suddenly.. Therefore, she can’t meet today; ask her to come tomorrow!”

“As ordered, master.”

“Absurd! What matters…”

“What’s more important than the great work of ‘making’ an imperial inheritor?” Chen Rui giggled as he princess-hugged the forever Princess Royal in his heart, and walked toward the bedroom at the back.

chapters.title: Chapter 1052: Journey
chapters.body:
Chapter 1052: Journey

The success of Zola’s 2-star enhancement and becoming the Goddess who was in charge of the ‘Knowledge’ of the Super System’s galaxy was an important breakthrough.

She would definitely not be the only ‘God’ because Ms. Fairy Dragon was not the only one who accepted the 2-star enhancement but all the relatives and friends. It was impossible for such a vast source of faith to produce only 1 ‘Goddess of Knowledge’.

At that time, the more gods were integrated into the super-level system, the stronger the Purple Pole Star Emperor’s power would be.

At this level, it was not only through training and hard work that one could advance or even make breakthroughs. Constantly growing and refining faith power was the real foundation for quantitative and even qualitative changes. This kind of basic quantitative change problem could not be solved by him alone. It required the common comprehension and efforts of all those who received the enhancement.

After practicing for an entire afternoon and an in-depth discussion with the Fallen Angel Empire’s Royal Majesty Empress on the academic research of how to ‘produce’ the throne inheritor, Chen Rui activated the Tower of Glory in high spirits with a group of the lamp spirits. He rushed to the City of Stars in the Blue Lake Mountain Range overnight. The lamp spirits such as Manlace had entered the culture tank to perform the experiment of super evolution, which required rule energy.

Since there were only 3 law fragments left in Chen Rui’s hand, he gave away the 2 Demi-God level law crystal balls originally reserved for Zola. Although the quality of the ‘rule energy’ contained in these 2 crystal balls was far more than the law fragment at the Kingdom level, at present Zola still needed a lot of time to comprehend the special faith power and Purple Star Transformation Star Armor. The safety of Shea, Catherine and Tiffany was the top priority.

Moreover, law fragments and law crystal balls were not ‘limited edition’. There was a place to obtain them endlessly.

After leaving the lamp spirits in the City of Stars, Chen Rui used the Tower of Glory to bring 2 super-level titans and 2 giant crystal beasts back to the Fallen Angel Capital palace. With the protection of the existing runes magic circles, he took 2 days to re-establish a protective magic circle. Even Demi-God would not be able to easily break into the current formation. Just in case, a special instant teleportation rune had been set up for Shea. In case of an unavoidable danger, she could be teleported out of the capital instantly when it was too late for rescue.

Chen Rui didn’t dare to take it lightly at all because his opponent was Satan. The strategy of buying time could not last for too long. The next batch of ‘envoys’ would probably come to the Fallen Angel Capital again soon.

After arranging all this, Chen Rui took Tiffany to a carriage driven by the lamp spirits to the Bloody Empire.

In fact, the Tower of Glory also had the ability of [Space Compression] to travel quickly, but Chen Rui spent a lot of effort in setting up defenses in the past 2 days, so he planned to take a day off. This carriage was a magic carriage with a small space like a house with 3 bedrooms and 2 living rooms. It did not feel bumpy at all, so it was suitable for rest.

Tiffany was sitting on the sofa in the hall while looking down at the coffee table. She had been silent for the whole morning. Except for eating, she hardly made any sound.

“Tiffany.” Chen Rui, who was at the opposite, saw that she seemed to have a tendency to fall into self-isolation again, so he finally couldn’t help but ask.

“ En .” Tiffany replied softly.

“What are you thinking about?”

“Nothing.”

“…” Chen Rui was speechless for a while. With such disinterest, he couldn’t find a topic at all.

After a long time.

“Chen Rui.” Tiffany took the initiative to speak.

“ En ?” Chen Rui was refreshed.

“Nothing.” She lowered her head again.

“…”

Chen Rui speechlessly covered his forehead. Alright, you won.

However, just now he keenly caught a trace of Tiffany’s mental fluctuations, so he asked tentatively, “Are you feeling nervous thinking of going back to the Bloody Empire?”

“A little.”

“So… do you hate me a little?”

Tiffany looked up in surprise and shook her head, “Why would I? You saved me.”

“If there is no upcoming political marriage,” Chen Rui sighed, “we could at least be friends.”

“Aren’t… we now?”

“Of course.” Chen Rui smiled slightly, “If you don’t mind being friends with the guy who pushed you back into the fire pit.”

Tiffany looked at Chen Rui and shook her head, “No, you’re a good guy.”

“…”

Alright, I’m a good guy.

Chen Rui, who had been receiving good praises since high school in his previous life, rubbed his nose vigorously – This is another world. Not only am I being given good praise by a sissy, this girl… should be my fiancee… shouldn’t her next sentence be something like ‘I already have someone I like’, right?

“Did I say something wrong?” Tiffany gave him a surprised look.

She’s really a sensitive girl . Chen Rui shook his head and smiled, “Actually, I really want to say that I’m not a good person.”

“Maybe I can’t tell what’s good or bad.” Tiffany’s eyes dimmed, “I just feel that you are trustworthy.”

When Chen Rui heard the sentence “I can’t tell the difference between good and bad”, he knew that she was reminded of the past again, “So, can I say a few sincere words as friends? Even if it’s a bit too direct?”

“ En .”

“Then I’ll say it directly. After that incident, do you feel that your whole life has collapsed and life has lost its meaning? Even now, you are just reluctantly giving yourself an unclear goal and living on?”

Chen Rui said several more words one after another, all of which were mercilessly revealing the scars.

Tiffany listened, didn’t speak, and just lowered her head.

Chen Rui could see clearly. A tear fell on the ground, 1 drop, 2 drops… Soon, the low sobbing sounded, and then, the uncontrollable cry again. It seemed that the emotions accumulated for many days burst out all at once. It was the first time she cried out in front of people, and the tears on the ground kept spreading.

When the crying finally subsided, Chen Rui spoke again with a very cold tone, “You’re so foolish for doing this!”

Tiffany nodded silently.

“You haven’t understood what I mean by ‘foolish’. You should have seen more people and more things in that world. Maybe this has become the strength to support your efforts to get up, but it is not enough because the responsibility you bear is far heavier than the average person. If you can’t really stand up, walk out of the trauma, and really find the way ahead, sooner or later, you will collapse again in confusion and pain.”

“Everyone’s life can’t be smooth sailing. You’re not the only one who has experienced pain. You should have a deep impression of Isabella, right? Although she is cynical about you, she actually wants to stimulate you to stand up again.”

Tiffany nodded indistinctly. With her talent, she could naturally sense Isabella’s kindness.

“But do you know that the pain that Isabella has experienced is no less than your own. Not only her own happiness, but her entire family has almost been annihilated because of this. It can be said that life is better than death for 100 years. And it was the woman who caused you pain who caused all this!”

Tiffany was shocked, and she finally looked up.

Isabella actually…

“Kia was born after her mother was raped. The ruthless man did not treat them as family after seeing that the girl who was born was of the succubus family. Instead, he let his wife and concubine use [Soul Shackles] to control her and her mother. She had been bullied and enslaved since she was a child. In order to save her mother’s life, she was forced to go undercover in the Dark Moon and nearly lost her life several times. In the end, her mother failed to…”

Chen Rui’s voice also softened, “These 2 are just examples around me. There are countless people who have experienced countless sorrows and hardships, and you are definitely not the only one who has been desperate in this world. Even Veronica also has an unimaginable pain in the past. You may feel that this painful experience is as long as hundreds of thousands of years, but even hundreds of thousands of years, millions of years, are only a moment in the entire solar system. This experience is just a small episode in your whole life, and it can represent the meaning of the whole life. Therefore, you have not lost anything. In fact, you have gained more things that allow you to see farther and be stronger on the road ahead.”

Tiffany’s red eyes moved. Her hands were a little tight and trembling slightly. After a while, she said 2 words while sobbing, “I’m sorry.”

“I’m the one who should say I’m sorry. What I said just now was really too direct. I’ll try my best to help you, if you’re willing to trust me. But you have to stand up first, and you must stand up by yourself. No matter what’s ahead, at least take the first step.”

Tiffany nodded. Chen Rui didn’t remember how many times she nodded. He let out a long breath, “Okay, I can see that you haven’t slept well these days. Now go back to your room and have a good night’s sleep. When you wake up, it’s a new day.”

Tiffany stood up, hesitated for a moment, and asked timidly, “Can I sleep here?”

Chen Rui couldn’t help but be stunned when he saw that what she was looking at was actually the sofa he was sitting on.

“ En … fine.”

Tiffany took out the blanket from the room, walked over, and slept on the sofa next to him. The sofa was very long and had the style of modern fabric sofas on earth that Chen Rui remembered, making it easy to sleep.

Chen Rui looked at Tiffany, who seemed to be curled up like a kitten under the blanket. He sighed and sat nearer, putting his legs against her head. After thinking for a while, he reached out his hand and gently stroked the long pale blue hair.

This was his fiancee. There was no need to be too detached. The most important thing was that this would make her feel at ease.

Tiffany shivered slightly at first, then she seemed to enjoy the warmth. Her tense body gradually relaxed completely, and the breathing began to become long and even as she fell into a dream.

4 days later, with the assistance of the Tower of Glory, the carriage reached the capital of the Bloody Empire.

It was an extremely grand welcome ceremony to greet the 2. It created a commotion in the entire capital.

The reason being was that before that, Raizen had already announced 3 shocking news in person through the 3 empires’ joint television station and the Bloody Empire’s first television station.

First, the royal family’s noble Ms. Tiffany. Mammon is actually Raizen’s biological daughter. This princess would become the first princess, that is, the empire inheritor.

Second, Raizen will pass the throne to Princess Tiffany within a month.

Third, after Princess Tiffany becomes the empress, she will marry the Fallen Angel Empire’s Prince Consort ‘Aguile’!

TL: Will Raizen not be ‘Raizen’ but a true father before that?

chapters.title: Chapter 1053: Rain
chapters.body:
Chapter 1053: Rain

The sky was gloomy with a faint sound of thunder. It was going to rain soon.

Chen Rui looked up at the dark clouds in the sky with a thoughtful expression.

“Why? Are you still missing your Royal Majesty Empress? By the way, now Her Highness should be just a princess, and now there are still 21 days before Raizen passes the throne.” A melodious voice sounded, “I just want to remind you that it is impolite to think about another woman while talking to a woman.”

“You’re thinking too much. I’m just thinking about some problems.” Chen Rui shrugged. The most stupid thing was to mention another woman in front of a woman, especially since these 2 women were still in some kind of ‘competition’. Although Tiffany was no match for this person in any way, because she was the Demon Realm’s top beauty and the Demon Realm’s top sage.

This ‘top’ might not be absolute, but at least, she was recognized by the vast majority of people.

The Dark Shadow Empire’s empress, Catherine. Asmodeus.

“I see.” Catherine smiled slightly and didn’t ask any further. She was a smart woman who knew not to overdo things. For example, reminding him would be enough. If she kept nitpicking on it, it would only backfire.

“ En … I’m thinking, Satan will definitely not stop there. Although I have strengthened the defenses, I can only play a certain defensive role against the enemies of the Demi-God level. In front of a peak stage of the Pseudo-God, these are almost useless. Once Satan is there, I have no effective way. Maybe I can only wait for Python to wake up to compete with him. The problem is that I cannot control the time of her awakening.”

“If Satan arrives early, we can show weakness to delay. The most important thing is that no matter what kind of enemy we face, we must not relax at any time, which is the key to victory.” Catherine also looked up at the sky, “I think the mysterious training you mentioned can be started as soon as possible.”

Chen Rui heard the meaning of Catherine’s words, “Are you going too?”

“I’ve arranged everything.” Catherine nodded, “Don’t you think my strength has reached a bottleneck now?”

“I was actually feeling incredible. In the martial battle competition, your strength has not yet reached the intermediate stage of Kingdom level. You only defeated Red Pipit by tricks, and now you are at the peak stage of the Kingdom level! If Red Pipit sees this, even his 3 hearts will jump out in fear.”

“The word ‘incredible’ sounds a bit insincere.” Catherine sighed deliberately, “I heard that Zola is about to enter the intermediate stage of the Demi-God, and she has become the goddess of the ancient inheritance world. Meanwhile, you yourself have the strength to fight against Pseudo-God. Is this hitting me in the face?”

“How could I be willing to hit you in the face?” Chen Rui looked at the extremely beautiful face. His eyes moved to the 2 rosy lips, and he couldn’t help thinking of a scene in the palace last night. A flame rose from his lower abdomen.

Catherine seemed to sense what he was thinking, and a blush quickly smeared on her face. She rolled her eyes at him with amorous feelings that made a certain guy feel more and more impulsive. However, Her Majesty Empress tactfully changed the subject immediately, “Giving birth to Duoduo has given me a very special power. I feel that I have only absorbed and digested a part of this power. If it is all integrated, my power will be even greater. Not only that, ‘Nirvana’ is Asmodeus’ most powerful talent. The higher the strength, the stronger the effect, especially since I have achieved Nirvana 5 times, so my training speed is much faster than the average person. Besides, your power of [Star-level Enhancement] and star conferring has also played a powerful role in advancement. I actually control the progress deliberately now. If I want to solidify the foundation step by step, actual combat is the best way to control and integrate the power.”

Chen Rui nodded. ‘Nirvana’ was indeed the most powerful talent of the Asmodeus Royal Family, but it was also the most difficult and dangerous. He had personally experienced Catherine’s 5th Nirvana. If it was not for Duoduo’s protection, not only Catherine, even he would also be annihilated together.

Duoduo… actually has such a powerful power, what kind of existence is the phoenix?

Catherine put her hand in his palm, “Even if I don’t have these, I will strive to train and be your helper like Zola just to increase your strength. I’m not only an empress of the Dark Shadow Empire, I’m also your woman.”

Chen Rui held her hand and felt a wave of warmth flowing through his heart. Whether it was Zola, Shea, Catherine or others, they all had the same mind, which was the biggest driving force for him to move forward.

“ Uh , can I invite my Royal Majesty Empress to go for a walk in the Green Mist Mountain in the suburbs? People said that it is a good place to watch the rain.” Chen Rui kissed the back of her hand and made an invitation etiquette.

“Is it compensation for thinking about other women before?” Catherine blinked playfully. In front of this man, she didn’t need to wear a veil or a ‘mask’, so she was more relaxed and joyful.

“Of course not, it’s just an impromptu romantic trip. Ugh , or an idea that has always been in my mind.”

“Why does it feel like you are exposing your own excuse?” Catherine said with a smile, “However, I’m honored to accept this invitation, my… um , someone else’s Royal Highness Prince Consort.”

The title of the last sentence ‘someone else’s Royal Highness Prince Consort’ obviously corresponds to the previous ‘my Royal Majesty Empress’. Chen Rui was sweating profusely. Seeing the appearance of the Royal Highness Prince Consort, Her Majesty Empress smiled and kissed his face lightly, “Before that, please allow your woman to change clothes, father of the child.”

This title and tone were full of warmth. Chen Rui’s speechlessness was filled with warmth. When he saw Catherine smiling while walking away, he couldn’t help feeling a little guilty.

Because he was really thinking about Tiffany just now.

He still remembered the scene clearly to this day.

Raizen’s announcement was truly astonishing. It shocked the entire Demon Realm.

The former top powerhouse, Raizen. Mammon, the supreme ruler of the Bloody Empire, was about to abdicate the throne! And the throne would be handed over to his daughter who ‘suddenly’ appeared!

Not only that, but this daughter would be married to Prince Consort ‘Aguile’ of the Fallen Angel Empire’s Empress Shea!

These 3 news were all explosive.

The name ‘Tiffany’ was no stranger to some of the upper noble families of the Bloody Empire. It was said that this mysterious noble lady once won the favor of the deceased Prince Edmund and Teris. They even caused the famous ‘banquet assassination’ because of jealousy.

For the vast majority of the population, Raizen’s sentence of ‘she is my biological daughter’ on the television was equivalent to absolutely recognizing the identity of the princess although Raizen did not mention who the mother of the princess was. There were also many people who speculated that the mysterious ‘imperial concubine’ might not be a member of the royal family, so he had hidden Tiffany’s identity for so many years. Then again, which royal family didn’t have similar secrets?

Therefore, there was no problem with Tiffany’s identity. Although the decision of passing the throne had caused a lot of domestic turmoil, under the means prepared by Raizen for many years and long ago, the voice of opposition was soon eliminated. It could be said that no one dared to question Raizen’s decision to pass the throne.

In fact, Raizen had several children, but most of them were not successful. They were far less outstanding than the deceased Aleus, Edmund, and Teris. After the death of the 3, some of them had fluke expectations. Now they had come to nothing with the decision announced by Raizen.

The last news was also booming. For the royal family, political marriage was not surprising, but the marriage object of the Bloody Empire’s empress was actually ‘Aguile’!

As a man who once shocked the whole Demon Realm, the story of ‘Aguile’ was already very well-known. In addition to the identity of super powerhouse and duo-specialized grand master, this mysterious figure also had the most eye-catching identity – The prince consort of the Fallen Angel Empire’s Empress Shea and the lover of The Dark Shadow Empire’s Empress Catherine (They even had a daughter). Now, coupled with the empress of the Bloody Empire who was about to enthrone…

What is going on?

The prince consort was similar to the queen. Originally, it was supposed to be just an accessory. From what had been disclosed so far, ‘Aguile’ was the only male spouse of Shea and Catherine. Then it meant that this guy had opened a harem that made all men jealous and hate; he took all 3 empresses into his arms!

The legendary unconcealable domination?

However, most people had noticed that Raizen’s move was definitely a good move for the Bloody Empire under the general trend of the alliance.

Although the alliance structure of the 3 empires’ alliance had been decided, it was only a temporary alliance rather than a real whole empire after all. The Dark Shadow Empire and the Fallen Angel Empire were undoubtedly more closely related because of their mutual lover ‘Aguile’. The key character, Aguile, was too crucial. Even if his personal strength was not taken into account, his unpredictable talent alone had an incomparably powerful control and influence over the entire association. The economic storm that shocked the entire Demon Realm was the best example. At that time, the Dark Shadow Empire and the Bloody Empire almost collapsed because of it.

If there was any change in the association, there was no guarantee that the terrifying situation or even more unpredictable situations would not happen again. The first victim would definitely be the Bloody Empire.

Now that Raizen had passed the throne to Princess Tiffany, then Empress Tiffany would marry ‘Aguile’, in a sense, the 3 empires were back on the same starting line. It was also a reassurance for the people of the Bloody Empire.

Although there was the support of the people and the strong suppression of Raizen, Tiffany’s ascending the throne should not be a problem, but the next test she would encounter would be more and more difficult. She could only face it on her own.

What impressed Chen Rui the most was Raizen’s first conversation with Tiffany in the palace, and the words added up to only 4 sentences.

“Are you sure you’re ready?”

“I’m still alive.”

“What’s the meaning?”

“Anything that doesn’t kill me will only make me stronger; whatever pain and sorrow I suffer now will become my greatest strength in the future.”

When Tiffany answered the last sentence, she just looked directly at Raizen without looking at Chen Rui. However, Chen Rui knew that she was looking at him.

Just as Tiffany nodded coldly when he left the Bloody Empire, but actually her mind had sent him far.

Tiffany didn’t have any special affection for him. It was more of trust and gratitude. At least he was already a friend- According to a dead duck dragon’s ‘heterosexual friend’ theory, the scumbag male protagonist had already succeeded.

Anyway, Tiffany, you must stand up and walk forward.

The thoughts of memories were quickly interrupted as Catherine had already changed her clothes. It was different from the usual elegant and solemn black theme. This was a light blue low-cut tight-fitting long skirt, which outlined a perfect figure. She looked sexy, charming, and especially eye-catching.

Chen Rui’s eyes lit up, but his brows wrinkled, “Will this be too… er , a little revealing?”

“Revealing? It’s quite alright.”

“Actually… I think this dress is more suitable for enjoying alone…”

“Are all men so petty?” Catherine smiled sweetly, and a cloak was already in her hand. She draped it over her seductive body, and her face was covered with a thin veil. Her sexy temperament suddenly became mysterious elegance, “Is that all right, sir husband— Is that the title in the story you told last time?”.

“That’s right, madam wife.” Chen Rui stretched out his arm, and Catherine gently held it. The 2 smiled at each other and disappeared instantly.

The rain began to fall.

chapters.title: Chapter 1054: Trial
chapters.body:
Chapter 1054: Trial

Due to the lack of time, Chen Rui did not stay in the Dark Shadow Empire for long. He soon arrived at the Dark Moon Estate along with Catherine. This made Duoduo, who had not seen mommy for a while, extremely excited.

As for the Dark Shadow Empire, Catherine had already made arrangements. Under the name of closed-door meditation and training, the new Internal Affairs Officer, Liliz, was responsible for government affairs, while the military affairs were fully handed over to Uncle Frentz. As everyone knew, the Dark Shadow’s Royal Majesty Empress was not only a sage, but also a powerhouse who could rival Raizen. There had been many similar meditations or trainings before, so this time also did not stir up any commotion.

At this time, the Dark Moon Estate had gathered all the relatives and friends as well as the spiritual link ‘connectors’ who were about to participate in the trail of the Ghastly Floating Land.

The harem troupe included Zola, Catherine, and Isabella.

The Ghastly Floating Land was extremely dangerous. Even Demi-God would be in danger of falling at any time. Athena was pregnant, so she definitely couldn’t take this risk, so she stayed in the Dark Moon to rest peacefully. Kia’s strength was low, and she was not good at combat. To avoid distracting Chen Rui and others, she chose to stay and take care of Athena.

It was not that Shea didn’t want to go, but her situation was different from Catherine’s. Besides, this trial was not a day or two, and the people that Satan would send next would definitely come to the Fallen Angel Empire first, so Shea’s responsibility and the pressure she faced would not be trivial.

Although Shea, Athena, and Kia were unable to go, they all accepted the 2-star [Star-level Enhancement], and they strived to comprehend the mystery of 2-star enhancement as soon as possible – to become the ‘goddess’ of the ‘great grand master inheritance world’ as soon as possible just like Zola. Even if they couldn’t battle directly, they could greatly enhance the strength of Chen Rui.

As a first substitute member of the harem (self-proclaimed), Alice also volunteered to participate, but the basis of 2-star enhancement was 1-star enhancement. Princess Loli was still in the first stage. 1-star enhancement would make the strength regress within a month. Fortunately, with Alice’s strength, it could basically be ignored. She just followed Athena to help out in the Dark Moon.

Tiffany, who was far away in the Bloody Empire, also received the 1-star enhancement before returning to the Bloody Empire.

At that time, Chen Rui didn’t have any extra plans. It was just to help her regain her strength and self-confidence. As Tiffany’s power was devoured by Eudora with Eliza’s talent, plus her foundation was severely damaged in the spirit gathering magic circle, she could not recover with ordinary training in a short time. There would be troubles in the future. 1-star enhancement could refine and recast her foundation, which was the right solution.

The members of the friends group were Paglio, Krobelus, Roman, Delia, Medilu and Dodo.

Paglio was the most enthusiastic one. He was a step away from reaching the peak stage of the Kingdom level, and he had been unable to succeed previously. This time was obviously the best way to train. Krobelus had just broken through the kingdomization realm, so she also needed actual combat to stabilize her realm.

Roman, who entered kingdomization not long ago, was not willing to fall back either. He clamored to catch up as soon as possible and ruthlessly abuse the poison dragon. Delia’s strength was equal to Roman’s back then. Later, due to the [Soul Shackles], her strength could not progress. After Broc’s death and the dispelling of the shackles, Delia had already been far behind him. Currently, she was only a Demon Overlord. She also wanted to enter the super-level in order to fight side by side with Roman. As a ‘mistress’, Medilu, who had always been assertive, naturally also wanted to keep up with the pace of the ‘legitimate wife’.

The least enthusiastic was Dodo. The slime, who had always been indulging in enjoyment and avoiding work, finally returned from the ‘dangerous human world’. He was definitely not willing to endure hardship and training. Nevertheless, he reluctantly went together under some coercion and temptation.

These people had already accepted the power of 2-star evolution. It only depended on when they could comprehend ‘god conferring’.

In addition to the relatives and friends group, there was also the subordinate group. Namely Samuel, Joanna, Ina, Guradam, Celine and Sicali.

Samuel was definitely going to participate in the Ghastly Floating Land’s trial, while Joanna and Ina stayed in the Dark Moon to assist Shea since they were not fighting types.

The matriarch of the Dark Shadow Empire’s top commercial family, Celine, was originally Chen Rui’s undercover agent in the Dark Shadow Empire. But now even the Dark Shadow Empire’s empress was Chen Rui’s wife. Therefore, this ‘undercover’ naturally lost its function. Celine knew Chen Rui’s strength and means very well, so she chose to truly surrender. She had been diligent, so Chen Rui gave her a 1-star evolution power this time.

The Corpse Necromancer Guradam was regarded as the ‘old minister’ of the Dark Moon Estate. The undead army under his command played a very important role in the civil war of the Fallen Angel Empire against Raizen’s army. At the beginning, Guradam wanted to advance to the Demon Overlord. Although he got the Dragon Power Essence found by Chen Rui, he could not succeed because of the lack of the siren’s heart. Later, Chen Rui defeated Lich King Glorios in the Dead Sea’s Land of Hatred, and he got the Lich King’s life box. He also defeated Dracolich Ukleus in the Fallen Angel Empire’s potioneer contest and got a complete dracolich skeleton. All the relics of the super powerhouse were handed over to Guradam for research.

Guradam had been in closed-door training since then. Finally, not long ago, he took a risk and used the power of the life box to fuse his own soul essence with the life essence in the bones of Ukleus. As a result, he successfully became a combination of corpse necromancer and the dracolich with 2 battle forms. His strength directly entered the early stage of kingdomization.

It happened that Guradam received Chen Rui’s call and came to the Dark Moon in high spirits, wanting to shock the ‘master’. At the same time, he wanted to shock the Poison Dragon Paglio who stepped on his head before. The poor corpse necromancer was so obsessed with research that he didn’t know anything about the Demon Realm’s martial battle. He almost pissed when he got to the Dark Moon (He didn’t seem to have this feature) – Paglio has approached the peak stage of the Kingdom Level, Roman and Krobelus’ strength is also at the Kingdom Level, even the slime! 1 of master’s wives, Fairy Dragon Zola, is actually Demi-God!

Catherine, 1 of the madams who just rushed back to the Dark Moon with the master, is at the peak stage of the Kingdom Level. The master already has the strength to contend against Pseudo-God!

In the face of this group of ‘monsters’, the corpse necromancer had to continue to behave…

After getting the 1-star enhancement and star conferring, Guradam was in high spirits. Upon hearing that the Ghastly Floating Land had unprecedentedly powerful wandering spirits, the corpse necromancer did not care about the 1-month period of weakness, and he requested to join. Anyway, as long as the life box was not destroyed, at most a skeleton would be sacrificed.

As for Sicali, he was currently the lord of the White Feather Estate. Unlike the previous ones, he signed a master-servant contract. Facing the legendary super powerhouse master, Sicali, who knew that life and death were entirely in the hands of the other party, showed great respect and devotion. Chen Rui thought about it and gave him a 1-star enhancement.

In fact, there was another servant who was the spearman Lucio of the human world. He was working as a deacon in the Holy Sanctuary of the Blue Glory Empire. Chen Rui had secret contact with him when he was in magician city. He was currently a semi-undercover agent.

Initially, Ms. Black Dragon Olypheus, Adeline, Demi-God subordinate Leslie, Helen and flat 3-stage transformation loli Lalaria could also play a role, but these people had all gone to the Dead Sea to visit relatives and explore. There was no news from them yet.

The Dead Sea was the home of Adeline and Helen. With Leslie and Lalaria there, safety wasn’t a big problem.

There was also a precious daughter, Duoduo. First, she was still young. Second, Chen Rui did not want to limit her future path now, so he did not allow her to accept the power of enhancement or link.

As for the development of new link targets, Chen Rui had not thought about it. The current situation was a little urgent, so he would think about it at the next step. The top priority was to strengthen himself as well as his relatives and friends as soon as possible and to obtain ‘rule energy’ to meet the needs of the City of Stars.

The people who decided to go to the Ghastly Floating Land training made some preparations. Chen Rui activated the Tower of Glory and put everyone in the tower. His mind moved slightly, and a light blue light appeared in front of him. Crystal clear starlights began to emerge around.

This time, in another place.

The 3 figures respectfully looked at the man sitting in the hall.

To be precise, there was a figure with only half of his body left, and his injuries should be quite serious, but in front of that man, he didn’t dare to take a breath.

The man closed his eyes and listened to the report of the woman who led the other 2. After hearing the word ‘convey’, those eyes finally opened slowly. The gaze was not particularly sharp, only a faint majesty. The 3 of them who had been keeping their heads down suddenly shivered in unison.

“Old friend?” The man expressed a thoughtful expression.

“When we came back, we happened to hear that Sir Satan was training, so we didn’t dare to disturb. Until sir finished training today…” The woman was Esqui, who was very arrogant in the Fallen Angel Empire, but now she was trembling. Lest saying a wrong word, she would be annihilated.

It turned out that this was the Mountain Seckred, and the man in the hall was obviously Satan, the mastermind behind the ‘Dark Divinity Temple’.

When Satan extended a finger, Esqui didn’t dare to explain any further, and she lowered her head.

“Is that person male or female? What are the characteristics?”

“A male with a very ordinary appearance. Now that I think about it, his facial features are very vague, but his gaze gives me a very terrifying feeling as if…” Esqui tried to recall the original scene.

“What is it?”

“The stars… Countless stars.” Esqui lowered her head and said, “His original strength seemed to be the peak stage of the Demi-God, then he revealed his true strength. I had no way to resist that terrifying momentum. It is definitely not the power that a Demi-God level can have, but I can be sure it is might.”

“Since it’s might, it’s really not something you can fight against the enemy.” Satan nodded slightly. Just as Esqui and the 2 others secretly breathed a sigh of relief, the faint voice sounded again, “However, it seems that you guys came back too quickly. Did you just go to the Fallen Angel Empire?”

“Yes.” Esqui burst into a cold sweat, “Because that person said…”

Before she could finish speaking, Satan snorted, and the 3 of them sensed a terrifying force rushing into their souls. They were torn apart in half, and they all shouted, “Sir, spare our life!”

The tearing force gradually subsided. The 3 of them trembled; no one dared to speak out.

“I’ll spare your life this time, but I’ve always been clear about rewards and punishments. Esqui, you’re the one in charge, so I’ll punish you for going to the Ice Prison for 1 year, and the other 2 for 1 month.”

When the 3 of them heard the word the ‘Ice Prison’, they shivered in unison, but in any case, their lives were saved, so they quickly retreated.

“Male?”

“The might of the stars? It shouldn’t be her…”

“What kind of old friend is that?”

“An answer will come soon…”

In the hall, the muttering voice gradually disappeared, and it returned to silence.

TL: Her? Someone has the similar might as Chen Rui?

chapters.title: Chapter 1055: The Ghastly Floating Land
chapters.body:
Chapter 1055: The Ghastly Floating Land

“Boom!”

An emerald green light exploded along with Krobelus’s coquettish shout. Countless ‘white mists’ around her were dispersed by the jittery explosive force. Many of them were frozen into ice when they dissipated.

These ‘white mists’ were actually wisps of ghost-like things that had no substance. There were 2 green light flashes that looked like eyes. Their hands were in claw shape. They make a low cry from time to time, which was creepy.

Wandering spirits!

After Krobelus made an attack, she shuddered. It was not because of the chill in her attack just now, but because of the wandering spirits’ ‘spiritual erosion’ talent.

The wandering spirits had a combat power that was far more than ordinary opponents of the same level. They had 3 special attributes: undead body, spiritual erosion, and life devour.

The undead body was not the characteristic of the general undead that was not afraid of spiritual magic, but a special attribute that was really close to ‘immortality’. Unless it was special targeted means or something that could eliminate this energy completely, it would continue to reborn.

Life devour referred to the ability of the wandering spirits to devour life entities other than the same kind, to expand themselves and generate new wandering spirits. This devour was almost a strong instinct that would actively attack all creatures that were not the wandering spirits.

Spiritual erosion was the most troublesome. The wandering spirits cpi;d emit special spirit power to erode the soul and spirit of the enemy. This kind of erosion was embodied in the fact that when attacked by the enemy, the enemy would automatically be subject to additional erosion, which was equivalent to a nasty attribute of ‘reflection’.

Although Chen Rui prepared targeted equipment including special items to reduce spirit erosion and quasi-artifact, ‘Shocking Thunder’, that targeted the undead for everyone before coming here for training, the wandering spirits were not ordinary undead. The effect of Shocking Thunder was not as good as imagined, and the ‘reduction’ in spiritual erosion did not mean ‘immunity’, so it was inevitable to be eroded by that kind of reflection. After all, not everyone had a treasure like the Wrath King Armor.

The wandering spirits were dispersed and frozen by Krobelus, but they were not annihilated. They recondensed or broke out of the ice before they continued to rush toward the emerald dragon. At this time, circles of black light arcs lit up beside Krobelus. When the wandering spirits approached, they were blown apart by the huge shock force.

This kind of shock carried an endless force and a soul-penetrating poison. The wandering spirits which were slightly weaker continued to be turned into powder and gradually exhausted their strength. In the end, they could not be reborn and were completely annihilated.

The light arcs disappeared, and Paglio’s figure appeared. The poison dragon was out of breath. In his hand was a black weapon ‘Thunder Flail’. The back of his hand was full of green blood.

The poison dragon bled not from being attacked by the wandering spirits, but from using the ‘Thunder Flail’. Although this powerful artifact was obtained from Paglio’s father, even Paglio could only use this method of burning bloodline before reaching the Demi-God level. He suffered some damage himself while killing the enemies

“Paglio!” The emerald dragon exclaimed. She knew that this method would do great damage to the poison dragon.

“Little Betty, run. I’ll cover you!” Paglio yelled and waved the flail again, clearing a path in the encirclement.

Although there were no elite leaders of the Demi-God Level, they were extremely numerous. More than 30 of them were at the Kingdom Level, and a few had reached the peak stage of the Kingdom Level. Plus the special attribute of immortality, even if Paglio had broken through to the peak stage of the Kingdom Level, he couldn’t hold on for too long.

“No!” Emerald Dragon’s voice was very firm. At this moment, the path was closed again.

Krobelus knew that the current situation was very bad. Paglio could only burn his life to open a way, but he would be exhausted and unable to escape. In this case, she might as well die with him.

The poison dragon felt an unprecedented self-blame in his mind. This time he was caught in the encirclement because he was overconfident. He thought he could ignore all opponents below the Demi-God after reaching the peak stage of the Kingdom Level. He wanted to get the law fragment to show off in front of Roman, so he left the team with the emerald dragon to act alone. As a result, when eliminating a small group of wandering spirits, a large group was alerted. At last, they were trapped and could not escape.

At this moment, a familiar shout sounded behind the wandering spirits. A special black color appeared behind the white mist of the group of wandering spirits.

Black flame.

This black flame was different from the destructive power of the Thunder Flail. It was full of vitality. The black flame spread instantly. The wandering spirits, which were indestructible by water and fire, were actually burnt when touched by this flame. They were finally annihilated with no trace.

This flame was simply the nemesis of the wandering spirits.

The most powerful talent of the Asmodeus Royal Family, the flame condensed by Nirvana power.

Paglio and Krobelus were in high spirits. The emerald dragon exclaimed in surprise, “Catherine!”

The spreading flames condensed in the air, wrapping a human figure. It swept in the direction of Krobelus’s voice. The wandering spirits were burned away along the way, showing a few crystal lights.

“Law fragments!” The poison dragon, meeting in the direction of the phoenix, reacted extremely quickly. He waved and took those crystals with a suction force.

“Go!” Catherine’s voice sounded.

“You come just at the right time. Let’s just eliminate all the wandering spirits! We should be able to harvest more law fragments.” Paglio still had the special attribute of the dead duck dragon. He didn’t mention the fault of his adventure with the emerald dragon.

Catherine shook her head, “I felt a strong sense of oppression in the distance from the changes in [Flame of Nirvana]. It is likely that the wandering spirits of the Demi-God level are approaching this way. It is not suitable to stay here for long.”

The poison dragon had suffered from rash advance before, and burning the bloodline had also damaged his power. Naturally, he did not dare to fight again. Under the cover of Catherine, he fought while quickly evacuating the dangerous place with Krobelus.

A few days ago, Chen Rui took the group into the Ghastly Floating Land for 2 days. In order to train them better, they were divided into 2 teams.

The first team was led by Zola. The team members include Catherine, Paglio, Krobelus and Dodo.

The leader of the other team was Chen Rui. The team members were Guradam, Isabella, Roman, Delia, Medilu and Samuel.

The overall strength of the Fairy Dragon team was very strong; they were all super-level. Zola herself was a Demi-God. If they cooperate properly, they should be able to receive good results.

The overall strength of Chen Rui’s side was much worse. Except for Chen Rui himself, there were only 3 super-level. Isabella and Roman had just advanced to the Kingdom Level, and the Corpse Necromancer Guradam was still in the weak stage of 1-star enhancement with the strength of less than the Demon Overlord. Therefore, there were only 2 Kingdom Level. Delia and Samuel were Demon Overlords, and Medilu was only at the peak stage of the Demon Emperor, so he had to care for all of them. However, Chen Rui’s strength had reached the peak stage of the Demi-God without the activation of the [Pole Star Transformation]. Coupled with his familiarity with the Ghastly Floating Land and the wandering spirits, he could lead these team members to maximize the training to a certain extent.

The 2 teams conducted the trial separately. Every 7 days, they would meet at the star point to exchange their experiences.

This time, Catherine and Zola split up to find the poison dragon. The timid Master Truly Handsome followed the strongest Madam Fairy Dragon, calling himself an assistant.

“Catherine, thank you for coming!” Krobelus said to Catherine emotionally. Nirvana power had special healing effect. The injuries of the poison dragon and emerald dragon had recovered a lot with Catherine’s help.

Catherine nodded to her, “The power here interferes strongly with senses. Even if there is Chen Rui’s item, its hard to search after exceeding a certain range. We are lucky this time.”

The emerald dragon looked at the stuttering poison dragon, and she couldn’t help but pinch him hard, “Say something!”

“ Uh , thank you.” Paglio finally said it embarrassedly. In fact, this guy was a little petty. He had always had a problem with Catherine. In the quarter-finals of the Bloody Empire’s martial battle competition, the opponent whom the poison dragon encountered was Catherine. The cunning the poison dragon deliberately flirted with the Dark Shadow Empire’s Royal Majesty Empress, but he actually secretly poisoned her. Nonetheless, he was completely defeated by Catherine. In the end, a human who was also equally petty rubbed it in with a ‘slanderous speech’ in front of little Ms. Betty. It also triggered a domestic violence within the little dragon family.

Although the relationship between Catherine and Chen Rui had been known for a long time, the poison dragon was inevitably a little awkward when he was in the same team as Catherine now.

Catherine smiled slightly, “It’s not necessary. We are all companions fighting side by side. Moreover, Duoduo has been under your care in the Dark Moon. Among her favorite people, there are you 2.”

As soon as she mentioned Ms. Duoduo, Paglio suddenly became energetic, and his expression became much more natural, “Everyone likes that little girl. She is much cuter than her cunning father!”

“How can you say that?” Ms. Emerald Dragon was speechless.

“ Hehe , just telling the truth.” Paglio’s voice was a little lower, but he was still stubborn, “I still have many adjectives that I haven’t used yet.”

Catherine laughed, “Actually, I can guess that. For example, greed and lust. Don’t even want life for a woman and so on.”

Paglio grinned and said to Ms. Emerald Dragon, “Little Betty, see? Even Catherine herself said so. Compared to that guy, how dedicated and reliable Master Poison Dragon is!”

Krobelus showed a thoughtful expression, “I remember there was a dedicated and reliable poison dragon who was determined to bring a group of female dragons to fly over a certain cunning, greedy and lustful guy’s house?”

“.”

This conversation brought the distance between the 3 of them closer. Just as they were on their way back, Catherine’s figure suddenly paused as if something special had changed.

“Catherine?” Krobelus asked carefully.

“Please protect me.” Catherine frowned slightly and covered her head, “When I activated the [Flame of Nirvana] just now, it seemed to have triggered some kind of effect. My soul seems to be attracted to some special space. Perhaps it is caused by faith enhancement that Chen Rui said.”

“Okay!” Paglio responded immediately. The poison dragon was a person who held grudges and grace well. Catherine rescued him and Krobelus just now, so he didn’t hesitate to help now.

The 3 immediately landed on an island suspended in the air and found a more secluded place. Catherine sat down and closed her eyes while the poison dragon and emerald dragon guarded her on both sides.

Out of habit, the cautious poison dragon temporarily placed the Dragon Inscription protective magic circles.

Time passed minute by minute. At this moment, Paglio’s ears moved. He faintly heard a certain sound coming from the direction where the 3 had fled the encirclement. Soon, Krobelus also heard it. The 2 looked at each other and saw solemnity in each other’s faces. This is a cry that is densely intertwined! How many of them are there?

A massive batch of wandering spirits!

They are approaching!

chapters.title: Chapter 1056: Wisdom
chapters.body:
Chapter 1056: Wisdom

In the sky, a large area of the white mist spread out mixed with countless terrifying howls. The entire space seemed to be shaking slightly.

Paglio and Krobelus were startled at the same time. The number of the wandering spirits in this batch was far beyond imagination. If the wandering spirits that surrounded them before were likened to a small stream, the one that appeared in front of them now was the big river!

According to Chen Rui’s introduction and the experience accumulated these days, the wandering spirits of the Demi-God level definitely exist in the group of the wandering spirits of this scale. Thinking of what Catherine said before, the 2 became more nervous.

[Flame of Nirvana] had a special effect on the wandering spirits. In addition to super effective killing, it could also sense the strength of the wandering spirits, seek good luck and avoid evil. These wandering spirits were probably the chasers that Catherine sensed when the 3 retreated before. They were chasing after their living breath.

Although Catherine’s [Flame of Nirvana] could restrain the wandering spirits, her own strength was only at the peak stage of the Kingdom Level which could not compete with the wandering spirits of the Demi-God level. While Paglio’s combat power was especially good for the wandering spirits, the lethality was far less than that of Catherine. If they fight head-on, the wandering spirits could engulf the 3 of them in an instant.

Now he could only hope for the concealment of the Dragon Inscription and not let the wandering spirits notice.

Contrary to what was expected, the speed of the wandering spirits’ progress suddenly slowed down as if they had noticed something. The hearts of the emerald dragon and the poison dragon were suddenly tense.

The wandering spirits had no intelligence nor emotions such as joy, anger, sadness, and so on; they only had a fighting instinct. However, the more simple this instinct was, the more terrifying it was. It was not disturbed by superficial illusions at all. The sensory abilities of the wandering spirits were not the hearing of ordinary people, but the sense of the breath of life. The more sensitive the wandering spirit sense was, the more powerful it was. Unless one had a special talent for hiding, it was almost impossible to survive.

Paglio’s Dragon Inscription was only the power of the Kingdom Level, and it might not be able to hide from the wandering spirits of the Demi-God Level.

The wandering spirits began to stop. There was no group. They just slowly dispersed in place, searching for a possible breath of life.

Paglio took Krobelus’ hands, feeling the cold sweat on each other’s hands, “If anything happens, I’ll hold them and you’ll run away immediately with Catherine.”

This inscription array had a sound insulation effect, so the movement inside could not be heard from the outside temporarily.

“Paglio.” Krobelus’ eyes were red.

“Now is not the time to talk about facing life and death together because it’s not just the 2 of us here” Paglio sighed, “Catherine, it’s me who dragged her into this or we dragged her. No matter what, we need to keep her alive.”

This time, at another place.

The same group of white mist-like wandering spirits but in far smaller numbers. The party in battle seemed at ease.

More than a dozen of the wandering spirits flew upward, not flying autonomously, but lost their balance and were knocked off by some force.

In the blink of an eye, a blue lightning flashed. The wandering spirits were repeatedly swept by the lightning from all angles in the air, shaking violently. After a few seconds, the lightning stopped. It was Roman who was holding blue blades.

Roman’s left eye flashed a strange light. He seemed to wave the blades at random, but he utilized the force to shake off the spirit erosion power. A breeze swept past, and the wandering spirits above shook in unison, turning into ashes and disappearing at the same time.

“So handsome!” Medilu’s eyes flashed like stars.

Roman became more smug when he heard it, but Delia’s indifferent voice sounded, “Medilu, don’t console him.”

Console? Master Roman raised his eyebrows and saw Delia beside him pointing to the sky.

A green lightning flickered with swift speed, several times faster than Roman before. It flashed in front of Roman in an instant, showing the figure of Isabella.

Roman remembered that the wandering spirits that had surrounded her before were around 5 times more than his, but now they were all cleared in an instant.

In actual combat, everyone unexpectedly discovered that the Eye of Evil of the Belphegor Royal Family could restrain the special undead characteristic of the wandering spirits to a certain extent. Combined with the soul power of Delia’s Eye of Incubus, they could completely eliminate the wandering spirits in a short time. Of course, due to the limitation of their own strength, the objects that could be restrained were generally the wandering spirits of the early stage of the Kingdom Level and below.

Madam Aunt looked at nephew with a smile and spread her palm. There were 2 law fragments in her palm, “Handsome Little Roman, what’s your harvest?”

‘Little Roman’ smiled sheepishly as his eyes were fixed on the Breeze Shadow Boots on her feet, “That seems a little unfair, dearest Madam Aunt.”

“I think it’s fair.” Sir Uncle’s voice sounded, “Little Roman, if you have any opinions, let’s go back to the Dark Moon and have a good discussion now?”

“ Hehe , most dearest Sir Uncle, of course I have no problem with that.” Little Roman’ didn’t want to leave this gem land of training – The leader could always avoid the hardest and find the most suitable group of wandering spirits for them to train. He had completely stabilized the strength of the early stage of the Kingdom Level. It was only a matter of time before reaching the next small realm.

“ Hmph! ” Delia asked Medilu while looking at the flattering Roman, “Is this guy still handsome?”

“ En .” Medilu nodded.

Delia was speechless for a while. Alright, I will not argue with an anthomaniac like you.

Chen Rui didn’t continue to tease Roman. With a wave, several Demon Overlord-level wandering spirits ambushing Samuel in the distance turned to dust. Samuel’s long sword swung out several light streams to slash the wandering spirits nearby. With a flash, he returned to Chen Rui’s side with multiple wounds on his body while panting heavily.

“Don’t force it, Samuel.” Chen Rui shook his head, “Haste makes waste. You are just forcefully breaking through to the peak stage of the Demon Overlord realm. The most important thing at present is to consolidate and master the existing power. Going too far will only backfire, understand?”

“Master, I understand.” Samuel lowered his head in shame.

After coming to the Demon Realm, the pressure on the golden knight was actually quite high because most of the helpers at master’s side were at the Kingdom Level. Yet, he had just reached the intermediate stage of the Demon Overlord, and it was also due to the star conferring and various buffs. So, Samuel had always wanted to quickly improve his strength. He would enter the ‘special space’ of time law every day and practice hard.

Now that he came to this mysterious place, the previous accumulation in the ‘special space’ finally unleashed and he broke through to the peak stage of the Demon Overlord. Unfortunately, as Chen Rui said, he was indeed too anxious for success.

The wandering spirits whose bodies shattered nearby began to gather again. Chen Rui looked at everyone, and the Crown of Thorns appeared on his head with white light. He had activated [Divine Healing]. Everyone’s injuries recovered quickly, and the spirit erosion power they had suffered also gradually faded away.

“Wait a minute! Master! Don’t use this power!” A horrified voice from a nearby ‘wandering spirit’. It was actually Guradam.

It turned out that the corpse necromancer had lost that skeleton on the first day of the trial, leaving only the soul. Subsequently, Guradam came up with the crazy idea of trying to merge with the wandering spirits. After capturing the weakest wandering spirit at the Demon Emperor, Guradam activated a secret technique to attach to the wandering spirits, and they actually merged into one after these days of hard work. This success made Guradam ecstatic, and he was currently conducting further research. Although he had become a ‘wandering spirit’, his soul was still afraid of the nemesis’ power, especially [Divine Healing] which could be regarded as the strongest healing power.

Chen Rui smiled slightly and turned on the target function, excluding Guradam from the healing target.

At this moment, Chen Rui sensed the changes in the Super System. He immediately informed everyone. With a thought, his consciousness had entered the Super System.

“Catherine!” Chen Rui was surprised and delighted when he saw Catherine appearing in the main hall of Galaxy Divinity Temple at a glance.

Being able to appear here means that Catherine has completed the 2-star evolution!

Chen Rui always thought that Isabella would be the second, but Catherine was a step ahead.

“This must be where Zola said, the inheritance world of ancient civilizations.” Catherine looked around curiously. She looked at the vast galaxy and praised sincerely, “It’s beautiful.”

“Congratulations, you are about to be 1 of the madams in this universe.” Chen Rui took Catherine’s hand, “How do you feel?”

“This is a special feeling with a bit of familiarity. It’s like when I am usually trusted and respected by my subjects as a ruler. When I see this universe, I feel as if I’m a nebula with countless stars, integrating into this great whole entity.”

“Ruler? Faith?” When Chen Rui was thinking, the Galaxy Divinity Temple flashed, and Veronica appeared.

“Sorry, I was dealing with some believers’ prayers just now, so I am late.” Veronica saw Catherine and bowed, “This must be Your Majesty Catherine. As an oracle, I’m honored to see your Galaxy Divinity Statue. I’m Veronica.”

Catherine smiled gently as she bowed back, “Just call me Catherine. It’s a pleasure to meet you, Veronica.”

Because of Zola and Isabella, the story of a prince’s ‘first love’ in the former human world had long been circulated in the harem, including the rather bleak ending. Everyone was still very sympathetic to Veronica who only had a soul left. Of course, Veronica losing her body also meant that she has lost a certain competitiveness and threat. This might be 1 of the reasons why the harem did not reject her.

Veronica nodded and praised Catherine’s extraordinary temperament. I heard Zola say that Chen Rui seemed to have more than 1 empress as his wives.

These women should be able to feel happy.

I can too now.

When Chen Rui’s thoughts changed, the 3 instantly came to the Pillar of Faith. A beam of light covered Catherine and absorbed her into the Tower of Faith.

The Tower of Faith shone brightly, along with Catherine’s Galaxy Divinity Statue at the Star Conferring Platform.

After a period of time, when Catherine reappeared, her breath had undergone earth-shaking changes. The entire Super System had also undergone corresponding changes. With the fusion of Catherine’s spirit and the galaxy, ‘miracles’ happened in those living planets just like Zola last time. A large number of believers and corresponding faith buildings had also appeared.

“It’s an amazing power.” Veronica’s eyes lit up and she bowed, “Once again, it’s my honor, madam goddess who masters ‘wisdom’.”

What Catherine integrated was the faith origin of ‘wisdom’.

Catherine looked at her hands in surprise, “This felt like a key that opened the door to the heart. The feeling and power that the [Star-level Enhancement] brought are infinitely magnified.”

Chen Rui also had this feeling. After adding a goddess, not only the Super System had changed, but his power had also become more and more majestic. This change contained a profound truth. It was constantly refined and filled with Star Power. In fact, it would be more obvious when he activates [Purple Pole Star Transformation].

“Not only that, I also clearly captured… Wait.” Catherine frowned as her tone changed, “The situation is not good.”

“What happened?” Chen Rui reacted immediately and was taken aback. “Your original body? Where is it?”

“It’s too late.” Catherine suddenly thought of something, “Is there room for that kind of time law here?”

Chen Rui glanced at her in surprise and already understood her thoughts, “Of course, and it’s the ‘original’ training ground. I’ll go in with you.

chapters.title: Chapter 1057: Phoenix Constellation
chapters.body:
Chapter 1057: Phoenix Constellation

An island in the Ghastly Floating Land!

The wandering spirits had invaded the edge of the Dragon Inscription magic circle, and many protective inscriptions had begun to react. One after another wandering spirits that were approaching had exploded. However, the wandering spirits did not have any agitation or anger. They indifferently gathered and reborn again as they continued to search for the looming breath of life.

This situation made Paglio and Krobelus felt even more stressed. It seemed that it was only a matter of time before they were discovered.

Krobelus was already standing next to Catherine while Paglio was holding the Thunder Flail. He was ready to launch the strongest blow the moment the inscription formation collapsed.

As the wandering spirits got closer, Paglio clenched the Thunder Flail. He glanced at Krobelus, and said the words that had been hidden in his mind for a long time, “Little Betty, if we don’t die this time, we will get married. We will have a grand wedding that makes those guys envy to death.”

“Bastard, you only say it until now?” Ms. Emerald Dragon’s tears fell drop by drop, “Since you lied to me by pretending to be Ranieri, I have waited for you to say this for many years.”

“ Hehe .” Paglio grinned and said nothing.

As Krobelus looked at the casual poison dragon, she made up her mind that as long as she could break through and send Catherine to a safe place, she would come back and die with this bastard.

At this moment, Catherine’s body exuded a strong breath with an incomparably powerful life force.

The breath of this life was so powerful that it instantly surpassed the shielding limit of the Dragon Inscription. The Dragon Inscription, which was already wearing thin, seemed to have countless holes. The breath was all spread out.

The wandering spirits in the surroundings immediately sensed it, and the instinctive talent of the life devour made them rush toward them. The Dragon Inscription formation could not stop this continuous impact and collapsed in an instant.

“ Oh no!” Paglio didn’t expect that Catherine would suddenly undergo such a change. It was too late to do anything to cover up again. Just as he was about to fight with all his strength, he sensed that Catherine’s breath had soared to an extremely terrifying height.

The majestic life force was like a huge torrent spreading out in all directions, and the wandering spirits that were approaching were pushed away by the force of this ‘torrent’.

The ‘torrent’ suddenly stagnated again as though being stopped by some force. The wandering spirits nearby suddenly began to devour the ‘torrent’ frantically. When 2 wandering spirits appeared in front of them, Paglio and Krobelus felt a shudder from the power flowing all over them – Wandering spirits of the Demi-God Level!

And not just 1!

Krobelus was about to take Catherine to escape, but she found that Catherine beside her had disappeared. At the same time, there was a clear chirp in the sky – a phoenix chrip.

As soon as the poison dragon and emerald dragon looked up, they saw a huge dark cloud in the sky. To be precise, it was a huge phoenix with black flames.

The phoenix chirped again, and it swooped down with a flutter of its wings. The ‘torrent’ of life force that had been stopped suddenly changed, showing a flaming stance. It instantly turned black, faintly revealing a hint of red inside.

The manic devouring wandering spirits did not expect the delicious ‘food’ to turn into a deadly ‘knife’. Before they could react instinctively, they were burned to ashes in the black flame.

Wherever the phoenix passed, there were huge fire trails crisscrossing the bottom correspondingly, dividing the wandering spirits group into fragmented sections. The power and scope of the flame sea were still expanding while the wandering spirits inside were constantly annihilated and reborn. In the end, their power was exhausted and they truly turned into nothingness. Even the wandering spirits of the Kingdom Level were no exception.

2 wandering spirits of the Demi-God levels were no longer able to suppress the power of the entire flame sea, and they just kept howling while repelling the approaching flames around them.

Paglio and Krobelus looked at each other and were shocked at the same time – This kind of power, even if the [Flame of Nirvana] counters the undead attribute, it is not to this extent unless…

The huge black fire phoenix burned with crimson flames, and its figure began to rapidly shrink into a human shape. The momentum did not drop but increased instead, becoming more and more blazing.

Under the surprised gaze of the poison dragon and the emerald dragon, the form of the figure in the crimson flames was astonishing.

This was a full armor with black as the main color and red embellishment. It faintly shone star-like brightness. It was elegant and gorgeous without losing the solemnity.

“[Armor of Faith]!” Paglio blurted out without the slightest doubt now.

[Armor of Faith] is an important feature of the Demi-God level powerhouse. Hence, Catherine is likely to directly break through to the Demi-God realm after completing the 2-star enhancement!

“Paglio!” Krobelus looked excited as despair turned to hope with the change of events.

The howls of the 2 Demi-God wandering spirits turned into roars as though they sensed some kind of crisis. The air suddenly became extremely cold. Paglio and Krobelus shuddered at the same time, and they quickly used their power to protect their souls.

Although the wandering spirits did not have a kingdom, their talents were very powerful. The wandering spirits of the Demi-God level could emit ‘spiritual erosion’ in their roars. If it was not for the protection of the black flame, this roar alone could heavily damage the souls of the poison dragon and the emerald dragon!

Although the sudden burst of flame sea eliminated most of the wandering spirits, the 2 Demi-God wandering spirits in front of them were the real enemies.

Catherine raised her hands slightly, and the dazzle around her body was even stronger as it quickly spread throughout the space. It seemed like a vague nebula which was vast.

Several stars in the nebula lit up. Paglio and Krobelus saw that the stars seemed to be linked by a strange power and formed a special pattern like a phoenix spreading its wings.

“Constellation?” Krobelus suddenly thought of a term mentioned in a story Chen Rui had told before.

“Things don’t look quite good-.” Paglio frowned, “The most powerful thing in Demi-God is not the [Armor of Faith] but the kingdom. This kind of kingdom has a qualitative difference from our current ‘pseudo-kingdom’. The kingdom of Demi-God is not a fictional energy but a real kingdom with life and faith. Although Catherine had a breakthrough and advanced to the kingdom, she has not been able to activate the real kingdom power. Perhaps that kind of elementary kingdom power cannot be used to compete with such a powerful enemy. With the pseudo-kingdom that she has activated so far, I’m afraid it will be difficult to resist the 2 wandering spirits, so we should prepare to escape as soon as possible, so as not to burden… ·”

The poison dragon stopped before he finished speaking. Although he had not yet reached the Demi-God level, he was conferred a star after all, so he could already feel it. The constellation didn’t contain ordinary energy but a huge amount of vitality and faith powerEven Ms. Emerald Dragon sensed it.

That constellation… is the real kingdom?

The stars in the ‘phoenix constellation’ emitted countless light beams covering Catherine. Catherine’s body suddenly became transparent, and a huge light stream in the shape of a phoenix rushed straight toward the 2 wandering spirits. The light stream was full of fluttering wings as if countless birds followed.

The terrifying power contained in this blow made Paglio and Krobelus tremble even from a distance.

The poison dragon suddenly thought of the real Galaxy Territory kingdom owned by a ‘cunning human’, and his heart subconsciously pounded – This is the power of ‘god conferring’ of the inheritance world after the success of 2-star enhancement?

As he was thinking about it, the phoenix-shaped light stream carrying countless birds had already struck the 2 wandering spirits that were leaning against each other.

In an instant, Paglio and Krobelus simultaneously felt the violent tremor of the nearby space due to the powerful impact. The dazzling light made them unable to see the specific scene inside, but they vaguely heard countless whistling sounds that pierced through the air like all birds were chirping.

The tremors in space finally ceased. The radiance of the stars and light stream had all disappeared along with all the wandering spirits. Only Catherine’s figure was suspended in the air, and the armor on her body had become so thin that it seemed that it was about to disappear.

“Catherine!” Krobelus quickly went to support her.

“Are you guys alright?” Catherine gasped in exhaustion. The blow just now was really powerful, but it took almost all her strength.
