“We’re all right. You are amazing!” The emerald dragon exclaimed excitedly, “You saved us again! Thank you!”

“Companions don’t need to be so polite. Speaking of which, it’s all thanks to you for protecting me.” Catherine smiled slightly, spread her palm, and there was a crystal ball inside.

“Law crystal ball!” Paglio’s eyes widened, “ Uh … that, well, I won’t say anything polite. This time, I am convinced.”

Catherine smiled wryly, “If the Nirvana power doesn’t counter the wandering spirits, I would never have eliminated the 2 Demi-God wandering spirits so easily. Also… due to the power exhaustion, I have almost lost all my combat power now. I have to rely on both of you to escort me back.”

“Of course, call me Betty from now on, Catherine.”

Ms. Emerald Dragon glanced at Master Poison Dragon, who quickly collected the law fragments and said with a smile, “I remember someone said about marriage or something?”

“What?” Master Poison Dragon asked pretentiously.

“Didn’t you say that if you survive this time, we’ll get married?”

“ Ah ?”

“Have you forgotten that most important promise? Dear poison dragon Sir Paglio.” Ms. Emerald Dragon’s voice was still soft, but those eyes were turning rampage.

“Look at that!” Master Poison Dragon pointed to the sky.

Ms. Emerald Dragon looked up and saw nothing. She suddenly reacted and saw that a dear sir had turned into a light stream and fled forward.

“Bastard! Stop right there!” Ms. Emerald Dragon knew that she was fooled and ran after him angrily.

“You guys seem to have forgotten something…” Catherine, who needed to be escorted, said innocently and speechlessly.

chapters.title: Chapter 1058: Double Kingdom
chapters.body:
Chapter 1058: Double Kingdom

When the pursuer, Ms. Emerald Dragon, finally remembered Catherine who needed protection, she turned back to escort the almost forgotten Royal Majesty Empress back to the team’s meeting point.

Zola brought Dodo to search in another direction and returned to no avail. Seeing Catherine advancing to Demi-God, she couldn’t help but be startled. In fact, in the mind of Ms. Fairy Dragon, the Demon Realm’s top beauty, Royal Majesty, had always been a strong competitor in the harem. Unexpectedly, she had also become a Demi-God. Her power also seemed to be able to rival against hers. Therefore, she was secretly surprised.

The 2 of them felt a special connection between each other, which should be the relationship between the goddesses of ‘that world’.

Soon after, Chen Rui, who was always worried about Catherine, rushed over with the Tower of Glory carrying his teammates.

Catherine’s weak period lasted for about half a day before returning to normal. The main reason was that she was not familiar with the power she currently had.

Before participating in this test, Catherine’s strength was at the critical point between the peak stage of the Kingdom Level and Demi-God. As she herself said to Chen Rui, Duoduo’s ‘parasitic birth’ gave her an incredible power in which she had only absorbed part of it.

With the success of this [Star-level Enhancement], Catherine gained the status of ‘Wisdom’ in the Galaxy Territory. At the same time, she felt the infinite life force and faith power in the entire Galaxy Territory. Facing the crisis, Catherine wisely chose to enter training ground.

Those who got the god position could freely use the training ground in the Super System. After advancing to the Purple Pole Star Emperor, the maximum time law of the training ground reached 1:1000. The training ground projection that could be placed outside was still only half the effect, but the users were not limited to linked targets. One could enter after taking the faith fruit that could be exchanged from the exchange center. The user relying on the power of the fruit was different from the link targets. There was a considerable time limit, and the highest privilege time law could not be used.

In the training ground of the Super System, Catherine’s talent and comprehension made Chen Rui secretly ashamed. This is the real genius! I only got lucky because of the Super System and the crossover. When Catherine launched a big move similar to the constellation, Chen Rui couldn’t help but be surprised.

That ‘phoenix’ constellation was not a virtual energy. Rather, it was composed of the strongest ‘Wisdom’ faith planet in the Super System’s galaxy, forming a galaxy territory with real life and faith.

In fact, this was equivalent to a small part of his ‘big galaxy kingdom’.

Chen Rui had seen a similar form somewhere. That was Chaos Realm. There were huge ‘corpses’ that were actually huge solar systems, but these solar systems were dead silent and had no life.

Did Catherine become a real god?

Then what about me who can confer a god?

In any case, it doesn’t make sense to explore these now. Even if he and Catherine and others really embark on this incredible road, his current strength was still only weak in front of those real powerhouses, let alone gods.

Perhaps this was a towering road, but there was still a long way to go.

Seeing Chen Rui’s anxiety while Paglio and Krobelus continued to express their admiration for Catherine’s kingdom, Ms. Fairy Dragon inevitably felt a little bit of a rivalry. Catherine was just a new Demi-God, and she’s on the verge of reaching the intermediate stage of the Demi-God. If she were to challenge her or something, it was obviously bullying. Not to mention that Catherine had been getting along very well with her during this time. Also, she was the mommy of the dearest Ms. Duoduo. Feeling helpless, Zola had to hide the little unwillingness in her mind.

However, Ms. Fairy Dragon’s depression was discovered by the attentive Isabella. She brought the ‘sister’ to the side. After asking a few questions, she already understood.

Soon, Chen Rui, who was instructed by Isabella, came to Zola and said a few caring words. Ms. Fairy Dragon was still fake dazed on the surface, but she felt much more comfortable in her mind.

Chen Rui took the opportunity to raise the doubt in his mind. Catherine advanced to the Demi-God after obtaining the ‘Wisdom’ Goddess position of the Super System, so she had the ‘phoenix constellation’ in the solar system territory. Meanwhile, Zola obtained the ‘Knowledge’ Goddess position after advancing to Demi-God, so was there any change in her the [6 Elements Kingdom]?

Zola immediately activated the [6 Elements Kingdom]. Chen Rui clearly sensed the element power and breath that belonged to heaven and earth instead of the ‘solar system’. Just as he was thinking about it, a playful expression flashed past Ms. Fairy Dragon’s purple eyes. The [6 Elements Kingdom] suddenly disappeared, and a dazzling starlight flickered, faintly revealing a colorful expression. When the shining stars stood out in the nebula, the majestic and vast life and faith power surged out.

Chen Rui’s eyes lit up. This is a double kingdom!

In addition to the [6 Elements Kingdom], Zola also has the ‘god conferring’ kingdom power of the Super System!

It turned out that after Zola became the ‘Knowledge’ Goddess last time, she had always felt a brand new power lingering in her. Due to the limitation of the original [6 Elements Kingdom], she had been unable to jump out of this frame and form its own shape. These days, through the actual combat training at the Ghastly Floating Land, although she still did not break through to the intermediate stage of the Demi-God, she successfully separated this brand new kingdom. Like Chen Rui, she became an extremely rare double kingdom owner.

Different from Catherine’s ‘phoenix’ constellation, Zola’s constellation was an arc with a faint sense of layers. Chen Rui named this constellation as ‘rainbow’. The name obviously won Zola’s heart, and she happily kissed him.

“The [6 Elements Kingdom], the power of the rainbow constellation, the Element Goddess Crown.” Chen Rui shook his head with a smile, “These are the rhythms of the protagonist’s halo. Are you the actual crossover, Zola?”

“What?” To Ms. Fairy Dragon, the word ‘crossover’ was indeed a bit new, so she humbly froze.

“Okay!” It was Paglio on the side who was furious. Master Poison Dragon’s face was full of jealousy, envy and hatred, “You all are… what is that word? Oh , the ‘cheating’ hero and heroine! Where should the poor and lowly bastard like us stand?”

Master Poison Dragon was really unwilling. In the beginning, this cunning human was just a weakling with no power. I watched this guy walk all the way to this stage. From looking down to looking straight and now looking up; the depression in my mind is indescribable. On the other hand, even if that madwoman turned out to be slightly stronger than I, she was still at the same level. Now she’s actually far ahead, and Catherine is the same. Little Betty’s close friend Isabella is about to be at the intermediate stage of Kingdom Level. Maybe someday, there will be women who seem to be related to this guy, except for those who are not the combat type, their speed of power increase is exponential!

What? The power of the man related to him is also increasing? I’m now at the peak stage of the Kingdom Level? My ass! Can that be compared to a woman?

The friendship between Chen Rui and the dead duck dragon had existed since he crossed over to this world. How could he still not know what this guy was thinking? After forcibly suppressing the unscrupulous nephew who was stirring troubles together with him as Sir Uncle, he lightly took a look at the poison dragon with a strange smile.

This ‘friendship’ smile made Master Poison Dragon shudder a little bit, “What are you smiling at?”

“Congratulations, my forever friend.”

“You cunning human, what…”

“I heard that you are going to propose to Betty?”

“ Ah ?” This knife firmly hit the weak point of Master Poison Dragon. Even if he didn’t look back, he could still feel the resentment and expectation of Ms. Betty behind him.

What is said at that kind of time doesn’t count.

You must have heard it wrong.

I still want to be single for a few hundred more years. I can’t just hang on a tree like this.

My harem dream has not come true. I want to bring a group of female dragons to fly above this guy’s house still.

I can’t say these out, otherwise I will surely be screwed. Paglio suddenly pointed to the sky, “Look, what is that?!”

Unfortunately, the same move wouldn’t work for the dragon fighter, that was, a dragon female fighter who was full of marriage resentment. In addition, the fairy dragon ‘accidentally’ cast a restraint spell on the side, causing the poison dragon who wanted to escape to suddenly stay in place.

Seeing that the situation was not ideal, Student Nephew, as an ally, immediately came to ‘assist’. He was the first one who jumped out and denounced the poison dragon as irresponsible for playing with feelings, and he strongly demanded that the wedding be held now. The marriage would be witnessed by everyone.

The poison dragon cursed the traitor thousands of times in his mind. However, when Ms. Fairy Dragon on the side ‘accidentally’ moved her finger again, Master Poison Dragon felt his neck lose control and nodded involuntarily.

It’s over. It’s fucking all over…

A farce started from here. No matter what the result was, it was a good relaxation for the nerves that had been tense because of the training.

Chen Rui was following the crowd to criticize the poison dragon, but his facial expression changed suddenly, and his movements stopped.

Because he clearly felt that something was being used.

Orb of Holy Shadow.

The Orb of Holy Shadow was a special creation of the Holy Light Robe, 1 of the 3 holy relics of light.

Holy Light Robe had the special ability of [Light Splitting Holy Projection], of which [Light Splitting] and [Holy Projection] were 2 different abilities. [Light Splitting] was to create 2 battle avatars, and the duration was only 5 seconds. Nonetheless, it was enough to activate a killing move like [Dimension Destruction]. Coupled with time law, it might be able to exert a stronger mystery.

[Holy Projection] was a projection creation technique. After enough light element power was charged, a bead was created. After use, a projection could be summoned. The projection lasted for 1 hour. It had all the skills of the original body, but every time the power was used, the energy of the projection was reduced. The projection would disappear when the energy was exhausted or the effective time ended.

Only 1 Orb of Holy Shadow could be made. Chen Rui left this to Shea just in case. He had the secret weapon ‘Shura’ if he wanted to cast an avatar, but strangely, after comprehending the creation origin, the avatar’s skill had turned gray on the skill tree, showing an unusable state. He couldn’t understand why.

Now, Shea actually used the Orb of Holy Shadow, which showed that the situation was quite serious. Chen Rui immediately told Zola and others to get ready before activating the [Star Gate].

At this time, a person was standing in the main hall of the Fallen Angel Empire palace.

This man’s attitude was not as arrogant as Esqui’s last time. He just stood there calmly, but he put a greater pressure on Shea on the throne as if she was standing and that man was sitting on the cloud.

This man suddenly appeared in the palace. Even the titans and giant crystal beasts that were protecting her didn’t notice it at all. The ancient runes protection that Chen Rui had placed in front of this man only caused a small obstacle before it turned into nothing in an instant.

Thus, Shea used the Orb of Holy Shadow without hesitation.

TL: Satan? Chen Rui still hasn’t gained any progress though… Also, can Catherine realize her own kingdom besides the galaxy kingdom?

chapters.title: Chapter 1059: Come In Person
chapters.body:
Chapter 1059: Come In Person

The man’s facial features were a little blurry, but his eyes shone with divine light. Seeing Chen Rui’ who suddenly appeared in front of him, he didn’t show any emotion; he was still as calm as water.

As Chen Rui waved, Shea stood up from the throne, bowed and retreated.

Chen Rui and Shea had obviously colluded in this scene for a long time. The more estranged and exploited the relationship, the safer Shea would be.

Chen Rui’s eyes were always on Satan. The eyes of the 2 were facing each other in the air. The space of the palace hall seemed to have solidified like iron and stone.

Chen Rui suddenly smiled, and the whole feeling of ‘iron and stone’ disappeared. He raised his hand and said, “Please sit down.”

The man didn’t sit down. He just looked at him lightly with a hint of indifference in his gaze.

Chen Rui was no longer polite and sat down by himself, “I didn’t expect Sir Satan to come in person. It’s a great honor.”

It turned out that it was Satan himself who appeared in front of Shea!

It was impossible to say that Chen Rui was not nervous at all. Unlike Michael and Raphael, he was in contact with Satan before Sariel. Since he first entered the Mountain Seckred, that unmatched and powerful man had left a deep impression on him. The powerhouse Old Dragon Emperor Father-in-law Auglas who appeared later also said that Satan was the strongest Pseudo-God, and he was far from being an opponent. After entering the Kingdom Level and possessing the [Pole Star Transformation] that rivaled Demi-God, Chen Rui felt the power of Satan and Sariel more and more. He also witnessed the duel between the 2 Pseudo-Gods. Now, he finally had to face this terrifying enemy alone.

Nervousness did not mean fear, but rather a fighting spirit.

He finally could look directly at the enemy whom he once needed to look up upon.

Chen Rui’s mind was uneasy, but his gaze became more and more steady. Similar to the powerful enemy on the opposite side, he seemed calm.

To be precise, the Satan in front of him was an avatar.

The importance of the Dark Divinity Temple to Satan was self-evident. This time, he chose to come in person. It must be to figure out the reality of the ‘mysterious powerhouse’. The reason he activated the avatar was also to be cautious.

Chen Rui also did not use his original body but a projection. This projection had the power of the [Pole Star Transformation]. Even if Satan’s avatar had mysterious power, it should not be difficult to defeat his avatar under normal conditions, but that would mean entirely going against against Satan. He didn’t have the strength to fight head-on with the opponent now.

The reason why it was said ‘normal condition’ was because Satan was a veteran peak stage of the Pseudo-God after all. Even if he was just an avatar, he might have the ultimate life-saving move. What’s more, Chen Rui once witnessed the avatar battle between Sariel and Satan. Both sides activated the secret technique and projected their original bodies onto the 2 avatars. Once Satan’s original body came, Chen Rui could only escape.

Whether it was the original body descending or killing the avatar, it was the worst result.

Chen Rui’s current title for him was to put the opponent on the same level.

“I don’t remember having an old friend like you.” Satan spoke up indifferently, “Perhaps the word ‘friend’ is not even worthy of it.”

“There are no permanent enemies nor permanent friends.” Chen Rui calmly said, “When the interests are higher than the contradictions, even for people like Michael might choose to cooperate with what they call ‘The Fallen One’.”

Chen Rui once heard the 3 words ‘The Fallen One’ when Michael and Python confronted each other. Satan raised his brows slightly, “You know more than I thought, but it is not enough to stand on an equal footing in front of me.”

“So what you said is strength.” Chen Rui smiled slightly, “Does Sir Satan want to test it?”

“ Hmph! ” Satan gave him a contemptuous look, “If you’re the only one behind the whole thing, then I advise you not to bluff. Surrender or annihilate; you choose.”

“I want to explain 2 things.” Chen Rui shook his head lightly in disapproval, “First, I’m the one behind the scenes indeed, but I’m not the only one. Second, you don’t have the ability to annihilate or make me surrender.”

Although the tone was flat, the words were already clearly rejecting the options. Satan squinted, and the great hall protected by ancient runes trembled slightly, “This great hall is just an ancient rune formation set up by Demi-God. If you want to project your real body, this place will surely collapse. Perhaps we can change to another place?”

When Satan heard the words ‘project real body’, his eyes flashed as he sneered, “I don’t need the real body to deal with you.”

“Too overbearing is not an advantage.” Chen Rui still maintained a calm smile, “Everyone’s strength or might is different, but in terms of avatar, honestly you are not an opponent.”

“Really?” Satan stretched out his hand slowly. Chen Rui sensed a strong fluctuation, and the hand grabbed his neck instantly. This was not pure speed but law power.

Satan frowned suddenly. He actually returned to the initial place with his hand still stretched out. The opponent’s neck was not in his grasp as if it was just an illusion.

Satan was very clear that it was not an illusion just now. He immediately felt the mystery of this law, and his gaze suddenly became solemn, “Time?”

Satan activated time law just now, which made the flow of time abruptly speed up so that the opponent could not resist it. However, an opposite time power was emitted from that person, and the flow of time slowed down again. The law powers canceled each other out, so there was the scene before.

‘Time’ had always been one of his greatest mysteries. He never imagined that this person would have the same law!

“You’re not the only one who has the law or might of time.”

The calm voice of the other party made Satan’s mind be full of murderous intentions as he ghastly said, “I underestimated you, but your time law is not worth mentioning in front of me. As you say, I’m not the only one who has the power of time, but after today, I will be the only one.”

“You can try.” Chen Rui’s mind became more and more calm. “The power of time is just one of my powers. As far as I know, time is not your only mystery. Maybe I can witness the power of [Collapse Extermination], [Rip] or [Blasphemy]?”

Satan secretly surprised when he heard that this person seemed to know his details. He shouted, “[Collapse Extermination]!”

The space suddenly had violent distortions before it actually cracked apart. The entire palace hall, which was protected by ancient runes, was turned into powder under this terrifying destructive power. However, the strange thing was that the outer frame was still intact as if It was an independent space. It actually remained motionless under such a terrifying destruction.

Satan noticed this and squinted, but his attention quickly shifted on the man across from him. The power of [Collapse Extermination] struck firmly on him, but his body suddenly became transparent. The power of [Collapse Extermination] was reflected back to Satan like a light reflected from the mirror!

This sudden twist of events caused Satan’s pupils to contract. His eyes burst into lights. The power of [Collapse Extermination] suddenly slowed down. He was about to try to dispel his attack, but he suddenly felt the flow of time was different. His pupils couldn’t help but shrink slightly.

This kind of change was fleeting, and there was no follow-up. The power of [Collapse Extermination] had already rolled back overwhelmingly. Without thinking about it, Satan shouted, “[Blasphemy]!”

When this word was uttered, Satan was already enveloped by his [Collapse Extermination], but a special force filled the air first. The power of [Collapse Extermination] that destroyed everything was disintegrated like gravels.

Chen Rui didn’t take advantage of the situation to attack. Instead, he just stood in front of Satan calmly. Satan looked at him coldly, but he didn’t speak.

However, Chen Rui knew that Satan had doubts in his mind. At that moment, Chen Rui, the enemy, could have activated the time law to offset Satan’s time law, so that he could not calmly resolve the [Collapse Extermination] that was reflected, but the opponent did not.

“The kindness to the enemy is cruelty to oneself. Both you or I are not foolish to be able to live to this day.” Chen Rui said lightly, “I just feel that we have not reached the level of determining life and death for the time being.”

Satan sneered, “You said ‘determining life and death’?”

“As I said just now, everyone’s abilities are different. If we talk about avatar alone, my abilities are quite special. It’s not difficult to kill you.” As soon as the words ended, a purple light filled the entire hall as bright as the stars, and a powerful force radiated out.

Satan was startled. This level of momentum and power has clearly surpassed the scope of Demi-God!

Is it a real projection?

No, there seems to be no sign of that kind of life transmission!

Generally speaking, the projection is a level lower than the original body. Even the powerhouse of the peak stage Pseudo-God can only project the peak stage of the Demi-God avatar. This enemy’s avatar can actually reach Pseudo-God!

Even if it is only a very elementary Pseudo-God, it is a Pseudo-God. It is definitely not an enemy that Demi-God can resist.

In the purple brilliance, a pair of star-like eyes looked at Satan’s, “I don’t like exaggeration. I said that everyone’s abilities are different. My avatar talent is just a bit special.”

“I seem to have seen the armor and strength of this attribute somewhere.” Satan’s eyes were fixed on the bright armor. “Who are you?!”

“Only the most loyal believers will have the Armed Bestowment that I have given.” Chen Rui’s voice was still indifferent. “As for me, am I not Sir Satan’s ‘old friend,’?”

“ Hmph! Old friend?” Satan sneered, “You’ve been controlling the Demon Realm’s empires behind the scenes? What’s your purpose?”

“My purpose may be the same as yours, except that faith power may not be the real shortcut to that road. Michael, Raphael, and Gabriel have used the Book of Creation to fool the human believers for so long without success.

“How do you know that they didn’t make it?”

“Not long ago, I went to the Holy Light Mountain and received a ‘special treatment’ from Michael and Raphael. Unfortunately, Gabriel was not there.” Chen Rui shook his head, “Michael’s strength may be slightly better than yours. However, if it’s a life-and-death confrontation, it’s hard to say who wins and who loses, but one thing is certain, he’s not a God yet. “

A different expression flashed past Satan’s eyes, “You even fought against Michael and Raphael?”

“I just wanted to see the Book of Creation, but I didn’t want to get entangled with them in places like the Holy Light Mountain, so I had to run away. Fortunately, I didn’t go in vain.” With that said, there was a faint light in Chen Rui’s hand.

“Creation power!” Satan felt the change in his sense of destructive breath. He said in shock, “No, it should be origin law power!”

TL: What plan will he propose to Satan?

chapters.title: Chapter 1060: 3 Months
chapters.body:
Chapter 1060: 3 Months

At this level, Satan could no longer look down at this opponent – Or rather, he should take him as a real ‘opponent’.

No matter who and what method was used, to get the origin law power of the Book of Creation under the watch of the 3 archangels was enough to get this kind of respect.

Satan himself might not have this ability.

Satan nodded slowly, “I underestimated you. You have the right to stand in front of me, but that’s all; you still don’t have the ability to shake my will.”

“I admit that I’m behind the 3 empires, and our interests do conflict.” Chen Rui canceled the [Purple Pole Star Transformation] and returned to the normal state, “However, no matter the Dark Divinity Temple or the Light Divinity Temple, they are just the tools to steal faith. The so-called 3 archangels are still shut out by that gate, including the self-proclaimed ‘closest to God’ Michael. Don’t you think it’s not worth it?”

“Michael?” Satan said proudly, “What he can’t do doesn’t mean I can’t do it.”

Chen Rui frowned. Most of the peak stage Pseudo-God he had come into contact with had been standing at the highest peaks in the world for many years. They appeared extremely confident or rather arrogant.

“I don’t know what the basis of your comparison is, maybe I don’t know a lot of things, but I know another thing. Faith is not the only way to god. There is another possible shortcut: destruction and creation.”

There was a twinkle in Satan’s eyes, “You mean…”

“The peak stage of power is absolute, but there is more than one way to reach the peak stage. Destruction and creation are the most original principles and the most powerful forces in the universe. If we can comprehend the real mystery, breaking through the greatest bottleneck is not impossible.”

These were the original words of Python. When Chen Rui said it, Satan did not refute, but he showed a thoughtful expression.

“From this point of view, our ultimate goal is actually the same.” Chen Rui threw a tempting chip, “I didn’t get the Book of Creation at Light Divinity Temple this time, but I stole the complete creation origin. If you want to set up a Dark Divinity Temple to steal faith, then there should be a complete Book of Destruction. As long as you can provide me with the complete destruction origin, then I think we can establish a mutually beneficial partnership.”

This chip looked tempting, but it was actually quite scammy because Satan only had 2/3 of the Book of Destruction. To provide a complete construction origin, all 3 silver boxes must be gathered.

Now Satan had 2, but the last one was actually in Chen Rui’s own hands.

This main plane was huge. If Chen Rui hid the silver box, perhaps Satan would not find it in his life, just like Python hid with the silver box.

Because Chen Rui knew about it, he deliberately dug a hole and waited for Satan to jump down. He also deliberately pointed out to Satan about having the ‘complete’ Book of Destruction, which was another reminder.

Satan pondered for a moment, and a playful smile showed on his mouth, then he laughed. This was Satan’s first real laugh since he came here. However, Chen Rui’s gaze became serious. Instead of relaxing, there was a bad omen in his mind. Satan’s laughter lasted for a while before he gradually stopped. His eyes were set on Chen Rui’s face, and the smile gradually turned cold, “You’re you and I’m me. Whatever path I wish to go, and whatever I wish to do, why should I be influenced by you!”

This sentence was full of arrogance and domineering. Chen Rui’s brows furrowed tightly. He didn’t expect the other party would not waver after throwing such a bait.

Every powerhouse had his own obsession, and they would never be diverted by external objects. Perhaps this was 1 of the reasons why they were truly powerful.

“Your biggest mistake is to compare Michael to me!” Satan’s voice had become cold and eerie like an ice sword that pierced the soul, “Put away your eloquent words! If you want to change my will, the only way is strength!”

“Really?” Chen Rui looked directly into Satan’s eyes. From the moment Satan laughed, this would not end peacefully. At this moment, his mood was suddenly surprisingly calm.

In fact, he had always had a strange premonition that sooner or later, he would face off against a formidable opponent like Satan.

The Demon Realm’s strongest Pseudo-God.

If Satan was an insurmountable mountain, his goal now was to accomplish this nearly impossible goal.

I will climb to the top of the mountain and dominate everything below me.

Chen Rui suddenly remembered that when he was still the strength of the Intermediate Demon, the scene of setting a War Contract with the strongest Higher Demon Arux was also an almost impossible mission.

In the end, he defeated Arux in the highly anticipated arena in front of Shea.

Although his strength at that time was not worth mentioning now, his will to move forward regardless of everything was amazingly consistent.

Chen Rui had a feeling of going back in time. The firmness of that time and today seemed to be integrated.

His gaze became calmer like a sword in a sheath.

“Didn’t you tell my subordinates that you want to visit your ‘old friend’?” Satan clearly sensed Chen Rui’s firmness and fearlessness, “I’ll be waiting for you at the Mountain Seckred. Don’t say that I didn’t give you time to prepare. 3 months!”

There was a crystal ball in front of Chen Rui which had a map-like pattern.

“This orb can bring you or some of your friends to the Mountain Seckred. If you can show me the same strength as determination, maybe I can consider some kind of cooperation. If you’d like to join the Dark Divinity Temple with me to be in charge of the faith of this world, you can also crush this crystal ball and contact me. However, if I don’t see you in 3 months, I will come here to find you. At that time, not only you, the so-called 3 empires and those ants who are unwilling to believe in the temple will be destroyed.”

Satan was a person with great talent and scheming. The reason why he gave this 3-month period was not because he really wanted to give Chen Rui time to prepare, but because he had his own plans. He wanted to solve the mysterious enemy at once in his visit to the Fallen Angel Empire this time, but the unpredictable ability displayed by the other party greatly exceeded his expectations, so he did not act rashly out of prudence.

More importantly, when Chen Rui showed the breath of creation origin just now, Satan’s original stagnation about the destruction origin suddenly became clear. He was eager to grasp that inspiration, so he made a temporary decision to use 3 months of closed-door training to further comprehend the destruction origin.

“Destroy everything? Even those ordinary people are not spared? Where is the pride of a powerhouse?”

“Ignorance is the real pride.” Satan sneered, “Don’t tell me about the super-level rule that doesn’t hurt ordinary people. The rule is designated by powerhouses. Since the current rule can’t satisfy me, then I don’t mind destroying it and then re-enacting it. In the eyes of the powerhouse, those ant-like beings are nothing more than tools in captivity and their destiny is to be enslaved or obliterated.”

Enslaved or obliterated ants? Chen Rui took a deep breath, “I only heard 1 sentence before: In God’s eyes, all life is just a plaything. You’re not a god yet.”

Satan gave him a deep look, “Then, I’ll be a god.”

The eyes of the 2 met and seemed to clash intangibly in the air.

“The 3 empires are only temporary tools. Sooner or later, they will be destroyed. At that time, I will use the Dark Divinity Temple as the center to build the world into a completely unified faith kingdom. All the ants will become puppets controlled by the Dark Divinity Temple. Those who believe in me will live; those who do not believe in me will die!”

Satan’s tone was full of strong confidence. He didn’t seem to care about speaking about his plans at all.

I have absolute strength. This is an upright conspiracy. What can you do to me?

This plan was somewhat in line with the Lord of Midnight Sun who possessed Teris back then: Those who obey me will live; those who do not will die!”

Now, Chen Rui didn’t hesitate anymore. He nodded slowly, “Okay! Within 3 months, I will come to ‘visit’ at any time.”

Anytime? Satan frowned as he walked out.

The Mountain Seckred was his base camp, so even if there were any emergencies during closed-door training, he could handle it without risk.

When Satan reached the entrance of the main hall, his footsteps suddenly stopped.

“I once heard someone say the same as what you just said just now about comprehending destruction and creation. That person is a real ‘old friend’.” Satan’s cold eyes flashed with a strange light, “If you have any association with her, I think you will bring me a huge surprise by then.”

This sentence made Chen Rui’s heart jump. He never thought that Satan actually would think of Python because of this, but he remained calm, “No matter who you are talking about, I believe it will be a meeting worth looking forward to.”

Satan didn’t say a word. He just glanced indifferently in the other direction, walked straight out of the hall, and then disappeared into the air.

After Satan left completely, the main hall of the Fallen Angel Empire, which was destroyed by [Collapse Extermination], gradually recovered to its original state. What was destroyed just now was just the projection of the main hall. This was a special space; even Satan or this avatar’s power could not really shake this space.

Tower of Glory.

Another Chen Rui’ figure gradually emerged in the direction Satan was looking at before leaving.

The 2 Chen Rui looked at each other. The one in front nodded slightly and disappeared.

The one that disappeared was the projection of the Holy Light Robe, and the one that appeared behind was Chen Rui’s original body that rushed back from the Ghastly Floating Land.

Although Satan was just an avatar, he actually felt like being peeped at. Plus the strong fluctuations displayed in this space, Satan couldn’t see through the depth of today’s palace. He did not directly turn hostile and chose to fight after 3 months.

This time, he barely passed Satan’s test and delayed the matter for 3 months. However, Chen Rui knew very well that after 3 months, it would be a huge test.

He learned from Python that Satan’s ambition was not recent. He had always wanted to control the entire Demon Realm, re-enact the rules led by himself, and make everyone a puppet of manipulation. This hidden ambition was now finally expanding and bursting out at an unprecedented level. Perhaps Satan also wanted to use this ‘unification’ to search for the last part of the Book of Destruction. Whatever the purpose, it would be a terrifying disaster for the Demon Realm that had finally settled down after much effort.

This was different from facing the archangels at the Holy Light Mountain. Chen Rui could not dodge or escape because behind him were Catherine, Shea, Tiffany and even the entire Demon Realm.

Those ant-like beings were nothing but tools in captivity, and their fate was to be enslaved or obliterated.

In God’s eyes, all life is just a plaything.

God?

Chen Rui closed his eyes, and there was an endless galaxy in his mind.

There were countless creatures in the galaxy.

Life.

For a time, Chen Rui was lost in thought.

chapters.title: Chapter 1061: Test Shoot
chapters.body:
Chapter 1061: Test Shoot

3 months: The maximum period given by Satan.

Chen Rui didn’t think the Demon Realm’s strongest Pseudo-God would bluff. In Satan’s eyes, life was nothing more than a tool for enslavement or playing. Even destroying the entire life of an empire was an understatement in order to achieve his goals.

Even if the 3 empires chose to submit, this kind of delaying would not last. Satan had made it very clear that his purpose was to build the entire Demon Realm into a unified kingdom where ‘believers live and those who don’t will die’ It was only a matter of time before the 3 empires perished.

The only purpose of survival for everyone in this world was to become a tool to provide faith. If one didn’t want to become such a puppet, there was only death.

Such a method was even more ruthless than the Light Divinity Temple of the human world.

What puzzled Chen Rui was why Satan was so confident that with the incomplete Book of Destruction, he could do what the 3 archangels with the complete Book of Creation couldn’t do?

Since the time was quite tight at the moment, Chen Rui had no extra energy to think about it. If he wanted to pass Satan’s test, it was impossible to use tricks or strategy. He could only rely on 1 word: Strength.

He showed his profound ability this time which made Satan choose to leave cautiously in the end. However, if Satan really wanted to fight head-on, Chen Rui was far from being an opponent. Moreover, it was still unsure if he could retreat safely when he went to Satan’s lair.

Chen Rui was very clear that the advancement of strength was gradual, just like he persuaded Samuel that haste makes waste. Although Chen Rui’s own improvement speed could be described as unimaginable on the surface, in fact, the real time he spent on the training ground was far more than that of ordinary trainers. Furthermore, the advancement of the Super System was not the same as the ordinary level of the Demon Realm.

This time was different from when he faced Arux back then. After reaching his current state, even a training ground with 1000 times the time could not solve the most fundamental problem. If he wanted to make great progress, he not only needed training and hard work, but he also required the power of other linkers.

This power was mainly manifested in the [Star-level Enhancement]. Zola and Catherine had successfully obtained the ‘Goddess position’ of the Super System. The mystery of this ‘god confering’ needed to be further explored. Judging from the current situation, the more people were conferred as ‘God’’, the greater the benefit to Chen Rui or the ‘god conferrer’ himself.

Although the trial in the Ghastly Floating Land was not long, the effect was very significant. It was only 3 months even though he trained full-time. It was necessary to formulate a training plan that took into account impromptu events.

After settling Shea, Chen Rui immediately went to the Ghastly Floating Land and told everyone about it.

The 3 months made everyone feel the pressure, especially Catherine. If Chen Rui was defeated and could escape, as an empress of the Dark Shadow Empire, Catherine would definitely not abandon the people of her empire; the same was true for Shea.

The Demon Realm finally bid farewell to years of war and confrontation, ushering in the precious peace and rapid development. Once the Dark Divinity Temple’s conspiracy succeeded, not only would the 3 empires perish, but everyone in the Demon Realm would become controlled puppets, which would be a terrifying disaster.

The problem was no one could compete heads-on with Satan right now. The only hope was Chen Rui.

Everyone already understood that 2-star enhancement and ‘god conferring’ could not only greatly enhance their own strength, but it also enhanced Chen Rui’s strength. Therefore, everyone was determined to complete the 2-star enhancement as soon as possible, and contribute to the Pseudo-God battle that was likely to occur after 3 months. Even Dodo was no exception; he was training desperately. However, according to reliable sources, the reason the slime was so diligent was because of the food and wealth promised by a certain Madam Royal Majesty. Why it was not a promise from a certain Madam Fairy Dragon? Refer to the story of ‘The Boy Who Cried Wolf’…

The only exception was Guradam. The corpse necromancer had basically completed the 1-star enhancement, but all his energy was focused on the research of the wandering spirits. Chen Rui didn’t expect much from this subordinate. He just gave him the power of 2-star enhancement without much expectation.

Soon, Chen Rui temporarily left the Ghastly Floating Land for the Blue Lake Mountain Range.

The Mountain Seckred trip was no better than the Holy Light Mountain, which must be ‘visited’ by brute force.

Even in a frontal battle, tactics must be emphasized. Satan stood the advantage of geographical location and people in the Mountain Seckred, so he was near-invincible. What Chen Rui needed now was to try to offset Satan’s advantage.

The first was ‘geographical location’.

Hence, Chen Rui came to the City of Stars.

The basic energy of the City of Stars was inexhaustible. What was lacking was the high-end ‘law energy’. Chen Rui collected all the law fragments and law crystal balls obtained during the trial, which was quite bountiful.

The City of Stars that upgraded to level 5 civilization metropolitan was quite efficient. It didn’t take long for the law fragments to be converted into ‘rule energy’. Because the energy intensity of the law crystal ball far exceeded that of the law fragment, the conversion speed was much slower.

With the addition of this batch of ‘new forces’, the red alert due to insufficient energy suddenly turned into an almost overflowing purple, not counting the law crystal balls being converted.

However, this was a consumable item. Even if there was more stocks, it would be exhausted. The ‘super evolution’ of the current evolution tank needed to consume a lot of ‘rule energy’.

Last time, Chen Rui went to the Storm Island in the human world before going to train in the Ghastly Floating Land. He brought a group of the strongest titans to the City of Stars from the Storm Island to accept various enhancements and improvements.

The titans of the human world were considered the first ‘origin’ generation while the titans of the Demon Realm were all made by Chen Rui based on the blueprint of the ‘mad scientist’ Doruda. In general, the strength and wisdom of the first generation of the titans were slightly better, especially the leader-level titans like Oceanus. Because of the “commander will” he gave, Chen Rui was able to create titans in the Demon Realm, and there would be no incidents like the previous rebellion.

At present, 12 elite titans of the Storm Island had all entered the culture tank to undergo the transformation of super evolution. Previously, due to the energy, the progress had been slow, but now the energy had been replenished, so the progress had suddenly started to accelerate. According to Crystal Phoenix, all these would probably be completed within a week.

With sufficient energy, the rest of the alchemy creatures in the metropolitan began to undergo super-evolution that could cross the realm of strength in batches. The prelude to the ‘great evolution’ of the alchemy civilization had begun.

Of course, this super evolution was not infinite. The super evolution of level 5 alchemy civilization was 1% of the number of controlled forces. For example, he could now control up to 15,000 giant crystal beasts. Then the maximum number of super evolutions was 300; the lamp spirits was 750,000, so the maximum number of super evolutions was 15,000, and so on. The only exception was the titans, which were controlled by Chen Rui alone. They were not included in this list, but the production speed of the titans was quite slow, and the difficulty of advancement was much more difficult than ordinary giant crystal beasts. He attempted numerous times before he succeeded with the 12 titans.

Super evolution was actually a function of level 4 civilization ‘city’. Once the evolution failed, the alchemy creatures like giant crystal beasts had a high chance of losing their strength. Some of them would be directly damaged or even completely destroyed. The most representative being the heart lamp of the lamp spirits.

Today’s level 5 alchemy civilization ‘metropolitan’ also had a more amazing elite culture tank, which could carry out a second evolution and create alchemy creatures at the Demi-God level. This was more difficult and risky. If evolution failed, they would be directly annihilated.

Unknowingly, night had fallen. The Blue Lake Mountain Range exuded a beautiful serenity.

A tauren was walking in the nearby mountain after the evening prayer at the temple when he suddenly felt that the purple moonlight in the sky seemed to be obscured by something. He looked up and saw a huge black figure appearing in the air, almost obscuring the existence of the 2 moons.

This black figure was so huge that at first glance it looked like a majestic huge beast. Even the giant dragon family seemed so insignificant in front of ‘it’.

Even taurens who had always been courageous could not help but be astonished. He only managed to scream after a few seconds.

The frightened scream was so harsh at night. The taurens in the nearby area thought there was some danger, so they immediately took the weapons and rushed over.

“What happened?”

“Isn’t that Watt?”

“Have you encountered any enemy?”

When Watt saw the tribesmen coming, he was relieved and he pointed to the black figure in the air. However, he was surprised to find that there was nothing there, and the 2 moons still glowed with a cold light as if what he saw just now was just an illusion.

In the central control hall of the City of Stars, Chen Rui did not know that when he lifted the City of Stars into the sky, he shocked an old tauren acquaintance whom he met in the underground below Mountain Xilang. He was currently immersed in a special feeling.

Captain.

Captain of the spaceship.

At this moment, Chen Rui really felt like he was in a sci-fi world.

The entire City of Stars had become a veritable giant flying ship after a certain ‘transformation’ that made it more suitable for flying in appearance. The most special thing was the space function inside where no tilt or shake was felt as though it was on normal flat ground.

The flight speed of the City of Stars was much faster than expected. Under normal energy status, it definitely exceeded the flight speed of an ordinary Kingdom level powerhouse. It was hard to believe that such a huge form could actually have such speed.

Of course, this speed was not as fast as shifting, but the City of Stars had a more powerful ability, which was space jumping.

Chen Rui looked at the star map, which was the temporarily drawn ‘satellite map’, displayed in the control center to estimate the distance. He ordered a space warp to the south. His destination was the Dead Sea, which was also the most suitable place for the experiment of the rule energy weapon.

During the space jump, a strange shake was finally felt in the City of Stars, but this shake did not cause much effect. Soon, in the distance of the display screen, he could see the vast sea under the moonlight. The sea water beat the shore and emitted a strange rhythm.

Clearly, he had reached the edge of the Dead Sea.

The warp distance was quite astonishing.

Of course, there was a certain risk in space warp. Unless it was determined that there was no interference or risk, special positioning was generally required, and the law energy consumed by such a huge ‘battleship’ to warp was considerably tremendous.

Chen Rui controlled the City of Stars to lock on an island that was barren and lacking in life response, and he launched 1 of the 3 main cannons, “Annihilation”.

A faint light shone out. The island did not shatter as he imagined, but… at the end of the light, a huge black hole appeared, devouring everything around it. The massive sea water and the island were torn apart by the terrifying suction.

Chen Rui was taken aback: It’s actually such an attack! This is simply an enhanced version of “[Star Devouring]”!

chapters.title: Chapter 1062: The 7 Artifacts
chapters.body:
Chapter 1062: The 7 Artifacts

As the output energy stopped, the black hole gradually disappeared, but the sea water and the island that were devoured before did not return to their original state. Instead, they disappeared forever.

Chen Rui could feel that there was a fundamental difference between [Annihilation] and [Star Devouring]. [Star Devouring] was the real [Devour]; [Annihilation] was [Annihilation]. It contained a special law of ‘space’. What seemed like a devour power was actually separating the target and expelling it to a special law space, where it would be crushed and annihilated.

In addition to ‘Annihilation’, the 3 main cannons also include ‘Break’ and ‘Mind’.

‘Break’ was an attack with extremely strong penetration, with a law similar to ‘ignore defense’. It could destroy the defense or enchantment to the greatest extent with remarkable power.

‘Thought’ could inflict powerful damage on soul-type or ‘intangible’ enemies. Not only that, this move also had a special function of teleportation, which could teleport his ally to the shooting position unscathed.

The test shoot of the 3 main cannons was a surprise. In fact, the power of these 3 main cannons had surpassed the ordinary level 5 metropolitan civilization, thanks to the ruins of the level 6 civilization capital gifted by Alucier. Among them were the capital level main cannons, which were remodeled by Crystal Phoenix with the current alchemy skills.

In addition to the 3 main cannons, the rest of the weapons were also quite powerful. Among the army of the alchemy civilization, gremlin servants that comprise the majority were the only non-combat army, but their role was indispensable. The manufacture, repair and control of various equipment were completed by the gremlin servants – Controlling equipment, including weapon, was also their specialization. The processes of detection, aiming, and activation had a clear division of labor.

The gremlin servants could also super-evolve in the evolution pool, and the successfully evolved gremlins could also become assemble warriors who control the assemble puppets to fight.

With powerful and faithful subordinates such as gremlin servants, Chen Rui as the controller only needed to give orders, and they would obey faithfully.

In addition to the powerful weapons, the City of Stars also had the same excellent defense power and various special ability devices. After some experimentation, Chen Rui was quite satisfied with this giant ‘super battleship’, apart from the larger than expected consumption of rule energy.

Chen Rui was quite satisfied with the results of this experiment. He did not return to the Ghastly Floating Land. In the next period of time, he would not go to that place again even for training.

Because this trial belonged to them.

The strongest effect could only be achieved in a real trial without Chen Rui’s safeguard and some kind of fluke, although that would be quite dangerous and even cause irreparable casualties.

This was the consensus and perseverance of all the friends and relatives in the trial. It was also the only effort that they could contribute – The faster they comprehend the [Star-level Enhancement], the more they were able to help Chen Rui. (1 exception was the slime, but for the noble master, and more importantly, for the many glittering things promised by the noble madam, the slime master also went all in.)

After the City of Stars landed on the island, the color and shape changed rapidly to integrate with the island. Plants, reefs, and so on were all there. At a glance, they looked the same.

Chen Rui was now in a quiet room dedicated to training in the City of Stars. There were 3 things around him: A cape, a pair of boots, and a shield.

His hand slowly stretched out to the cape, and those moving eyes appeared in his mind again. The beautiful black eyes were like the stars in the night sky, shining with a serene brilliance.

“What’s the point of this so-called supreme artifact if the whole of the Asmodeus Royal Family is gone or lingering like a walking dead? If I can, I’m willing to use it in exchange for the life of the royal family and the people. “

Chen Rui gently stroked the light cape as if he was stroking the lustrous silky black hair.

After stroking the cape, he picked up the pair of pale green boots.

“I’m not as high-sounding as our Royal Majesty Empress said. I will say it openly. I just feel sorry for my man, and I’m willing to give you everything.” There was a trace of undisguised affection in the charming blue eyes, “What’s more, you were the one who took them back.”

“Wait a minute, Madam Aunt. That, that thing seems to…” A discordant voice sounded.

The affection in the blue eyes vanished as she sneered and looked to the side, “Do you have any opinion? Little Roman, didn’t we agree to it by unanimous vote?”

“What vote? Why am I unaware… Ouch! It hurts! It hurts! Approve! Madam Aunt, your great will is the sole purpose lowly people like me exist.”

After a while, the discordant guy leaned forward again, “I mean, Sir Uncle, these boots seem to have been on Madam Aunt’s feet all the time. Could it be you have some kind of fetish… Ouch , Delia, are you trying to murder your husband?!”

After her hand dealt with a certain wretched guy, she handed over a small silver buckler.

“I’m sorry, leader. I just made up my mind to give it to you today.” Blue eyes with a warm and beautiful smile.

According to a certain dragon’s theory, there was no pure friendship between men and women, but in Chen Rui’s mind, she was a comrade-in-arms as well as a sister who shared life and death. It was indeed not only a friendship, but a kind of family affection between brothers and sisters.

“ Hey , I mean, leader! Sir Uncle! You can feel moved, but there’s no need for hugs or anything!” A wretched voice sounded again.

Before he could finish speaking, this guy was hugged by Sir Uncle and his bones made a clear cracking sound.

Chen Rui looked at the little shield with a knowing smile on his face.

The Dark Shadow Cape, the Breeze Shadow Boots, and the IIlusive Shield.

Together with his Sword of Fallen Angel, God-Eating Mask, Wrath King Armor, Bloody Ring and Demon Shield, the Demon Realms’ great royals’ supreme artifacts were all here.

These artifacts had irreplaceable significance and functions for the royal family, but they still gave them to him.

These were the blessings that his women, his best friends, and his relatives gave.

In the eyes of the mechanic grand master, these 7 so-called ‘artifacts’ were actually just quasi-artifacts. However, Chen Rui heard the title of ‘Supreme…’ from more than one person, including the Holy Dragon Rodriguez, Elemental Kings and archangels. Although there was no following, it was obvious that the real power of these 7 artifacts should not be individual, but a combination.

Chen Rui remembered the concept of ‘set’ in the games he played before. If one collects more than 1 piece, one can get an additional buff. The most classic was the Diablo series from Blizzard company. Some green equipment was far better than dark gold equipment. However, the 7 artifacts seemed to be somewhat different. He already had 4.5 pieces before, but there was no so-called ‘buff’.

But every time those guys mentioned the 7 artifacts, they always seemed to be secretive as if they are something remarkable.

Then, if all 7 pieces are put together… will there be any special changes?

Fuse into the supreme artifact?

This title is too awesome. Not to mention destroying the world and killing Gods, it should be no problem to gain the power to counter Satan, right?

Chen Rui thought for a while, and the God-Eating Mask appeared on his face, the Wrath King Armor appeared on his body, the Demon Shield in his left hand, the Sword of Fallen Angel in his right hand, and a Bloody Ring on his fingers.

After all the 7 artifacts appeared, Chen Rui waited quietly.

1 minute, 2 minutes… 10 minutes passed.

A gust of breeze rolled up a fallen leaf, and a crow flew across the sky ‘cawing’. This was his current mood.

What about the legendary resonance?

What about the legendary supreme artifact?

What about the legendary girlfriend who can be summoned by collecting all 7 level 4 admission tickets?

…

The damn ‘legend’ is unreliable after all. There is not even a strand of hair.

But having said that, if the 7 artifacts can really become a world-destroying artifact when put together, people like Satan would have already snatched up the 7 artifacts of the Demon Realm.

Alright, let’s start [Deep Analysis] honestly.

However, the common artifact ‘acknowledgement’ is different from the analysis of the Super System. The former is acknowledgement while the latter is to seize. I don’t know if this can produce the effect that should appear after the original 7 artifacts are complete. As of now, I can only take one step at a time.

In any case, these 7 artifacts have all fallen into my hands, and maybe there will be a miracle at that time, but I can’t completely pin my hopes on it. I still have to rely on my own strength.

Since the 7 artifacts did not have the resonance and changes as imagined, Chen Rui calmed himself and began to immerse himself in his training.

There was no hard training on the training ground, and no closed-door training to refine Star Power.

Rather…

He sat on the reef every day and watched the tides ebb and flow.

Caught fish and grilled fish.

Chopped wood and built houses.

Sculpted, wrote and drew.

Took a walk on the beach in the evening and felt the sea breeze blowing.

Lying on the beach at night while watching the stars.

This kind of training was more like living a life.

In other words, life itself was a kind of training in life.

In this environment, Chen Rui seemed to have forgotten the 3-month deadline and the battle. His mental state was completely ‘empty’.

If someone was nearby, he could feel that Chen Rui had become one with nature.

Every simple action seemed to contain an indescribable mystery.

In the blink of an eye, a month had passed.

Under the purple moonlight, Chen Rui, who was lying on the beach, suddenly jumped up. There was shining purple starlight all over his body. His hands waved with trails of star marks.

An endless galaxy appeared beside Chen Rui; it was the [Pole Star Kingdom]. There were 2 constellations in the galaxy that were particularly dazzling. 1 was a big bird fluttering its wings, and the other was an overlapping and curved arch. They exuded a pure and strong brilliance full of distinctive life force, becoming the 2 cores of the galaxy.

The star marks in Chen Rui’s hands became more and more profound. Even the stars in the night sky seemed to be changed by some kind of traction.

He was obviously just an insignificant element in the universe, but it seemed that the entire universe had become a factor surrounding his existence.

All of a sudden, Chen Rui’s movements became stiff. The star marks began to stagnate, and he finally could no longer maintain it. Boom , the entire kingdom collapsed.

Chen Rui’s figure appeared on the beach below, panting heavily on the ground.

“It seems that it is really difficult to gather the star power of the universe to launch a big move…” Chen Rui wiped the sweat from his forehead, “Meanwhile, the comprehension of the 2 origin laws some time ago has achieved good results after this quiet comprehension. The current [Purple Pole Star Transformation] should be equivalent to the intermediate stage of the Pseudo-God.”

The higher the super powerhouse reaches the top level of strength, the greater the gap between each small realm.

Although my combat power of the [Pole Star Transformation] has reached the intermediate stage of the Pseudo-God, it is still far from that person.

Therefore, I still cannot relax yet.

TL: Things may be different if he gains recognition from all 7 artifacts though…

chapters.title: Chapter 1063: Awakening And Conditions
chapters.body:
Chapter 1063: Awakening And Conditions

Chen Rui did not continue with that kind of ‘quiet comprehension of life’ because the mystery of what he had comprehended some time ago had been basically digested completely. There would be no results if this continued.

In 1 month, the combat power of the early stage of the Pseudo-God of the [Pole Star Transformation] had advanced to the intermediate stage, which was indeed quite amazing. Ordinary Pseudo-God might take hundreds or even thousands of years to do it. What’s even more rare was that this month was a genuine month, not a thousand-fold extension in time law. Under ordinary circumstances, it was unbelievable.

It was a pity that training was not equal to arithmetic. Reaching the intermediate stage of the Pseudo-God in 1 month did not mean that he would reach the peak stage Pseudo-God in the remaining 2 months.

The reason why Chen Rui had this kind of achievement was entirely due to the accumulation of previous training, plus the result of comprehension and digestion of ‘god conferring’ faith power. It was almost impossible to reproduce this incredible result next time.

Chen Rui initially wanted to use the power of the constellation to launch another big move, but he failed unfortunately.

The super evolution result of the City of Stars was also out this month. The super evolution was unusual. Generally speaking, the longer the alchemy creature was in the culture tank, the more energy it could absorb, and the stronger the power after the conversion was successful. There was also a chance to acquire some special abilities. However, the more energy absorbed, the higher the failure rate.

The super evolution of the 12 elite titans had all ended with 7 successes and 5 failures.

Ordinary alchemy creatures would be completely annihilated if they failed to evolve. For instance, the lamp spirits’s heart lamp would break and disappear directly after failure; even giant crystal beast was no exception. The titans were different. They didn’t die, but their strength dropped by a big realm, so the 5 titans had regressed to the Demon Emperor level.

Among the 7 successful titans, Oceanus and Cronos had the longest evolution time and had reached the peak stage of the Kingdom level. Among the other titans, there were 2 who were at the intermediate stage of the Kingdom level and 2 at the early stage of the Kingdom level.

Oceanus, Cronos, and another Mnemosyne at the intermediate stage of Kingdom level gained special abilities.

Oceanus gained [Devour] and [Regeneration]. He could devour ordinary energy entities and automatically recover after being injured. For the titans, this was a very practical ability.

What Cronos got was [Space Defense], which could create a space shield to protect himself and his companions.

Mnemosyne’s ability was [Copy], which could copy mirror image to fight. The attack power was half of his own, and the time limit was about 10 minutes. The only disadvantage was that the defense power was weak and the mirror image would disappear after bearing a certain amount of attack.

At the insistence of Oceanus, the 4 failed titans lost their given names, and Oceanus proposed that all the titans of the peak stage of the Demon Overlord should participate in the super evolution. Finally, the 12 most powerful re-selected titans were given names given by the master.

Chen Rui agreed to this request. This time, he brought back a lot of rule energy which would be enough to make a qualitative breakthrough in the alchemy beings of the entire City of Stars.

Crystal Phoenix was trying to use some residual information and materials of alchemy to study a higher level of secondary super evolution, which could make the alchemy creatures evolve again. This evolution was a unique function of the highest level 6 capital. It was only the initial stage of experimentation and research.

The only regret was the maroon lamp spirit, Manlace, who was one of Chen Rui’s most promising future super-levels, couldn’t evolve.

The normal strength of the lamp spirits was Demon Emperor. After super evolution, it could reach Demon Overlord, and the heart lamp would also become a dark gold color. Maroon lamp spirits with S++ strength were the most promising to break through to super-level, but unfortunately, no matter how she tried the super evolution, the maroon lamp spirit never succeeded. Fortunately, her heart lamp was extremely special and would not disappear because of failure.

No one knew what method or material Doruda used to make her in the first place. So far, Crystal Phoenix had not analyzed the formula for the maroon heart lamp. The lamp spirits’ combat power that evolved to Demon Overlord was far inferior to Manlace.

At this moment, Chen Rui had a sense in his mind, so he immediately entered the Super System.

In the galaxy space, a translucent cluster gradually appeared.

This cluster spread out like a cloud. The first impression it gave people was pure. In the seemingly thin ‘clouds’, pure and powerful energy was condensed. Soon, a round object in the middle gradually shone with crystal light, then the whole cluster of energy began to rapidly condense and become smaller. The shape of a woman appeared.

This woman’s body quickly turned from translucent to solid. Her facial features looked a little blurry, but the features looked vaguely delicate. She was slender and well-proportioned. Her almost perfect body was covered with a close-fitting silver armor. In the midst of the heroic aura, she revealed a murderous evil spirit.

The woman’s closed eyes slowly opened, and her golden pupils seemed to be releasing cold lightning. Her pupils seemed to be able to see through Chen Rui’s soul.

If in the outside world, the pressure brought by this gaze would frighten Chen Rui who had [Pole Star Transformation].

However, this was the Super System.

No matter how strong the power this woman exuded, it was just a drop in the ocean in this vast and vast universe.

Chen Rui didn’t activate the [Pole Star Transformation]. He didn’t panic and just looked at the woman quietly, “You finally woke up, Python.”

The woman in front of him was the long-sleeping Python.

When Chen Rui was at the Holy Light Mountain, Python deliberately used the method of soul fusion to help him comprehend the complete creation origin law, then she showed her ferocious fangs, wanting to devour Chen Rui’s body and soul together with the complete creation origin law.

Unfortunately, despite Python’s careful calculations, she did not expect that Chen Rui actually used her power to comprehend the creation origin law on purpose. Instead of gaining benefit, she was imprisoned by the Tree of Nature and Seal of Fire and Wind.

After comprehending the creation origin law and fusing the destruction origin law, the power of the Super System had undergone a qualitative change. No matter how powerful Python was, she couldn’t shake the boundless galaxy in the Super System. After using all her means, not only she failed, but Chen Rui, who activated [Purple Pole Star Transformation], had comprehended the profound effect of might. As the soul-exhausted Python prepared to explode the Pseudo-Godhood in desperation, Chen Rui threw a tempting chip, that was the sealed power of Quilliana’s projection, 1 of the 3 rulers of Abyss.

In the end, Python chose to stay alive and signed a master-subordinate contract with Chen Rui. After devouring Quilliana’s power, he fell asleep in the Super System. Until now, she finally woke up.

This awakening could be said to be quite timely because Chen Rui would face a strong enemy like Satan in 2 months. Python was Satan’s old enemy and a powerful peak stage of the Pseudo-God. Although she was only in a soul state, her strength was undeniable. With the help of Python, his winning chances would definitely increase greatly after 2 months.

Python looked away from Chen Rui as if ignoring him. She did not speak, but a faint light shone on her body, exuding a strange soul power.

After the light of Python’s body changed several times, her brows furrowed tightly.

After a long time, Python’s eyes were set on Chen Rui’s face again, “I lost.”

Chen Rui looked straight into those eyes. In her eyes, he saw many things. The most conspicuous one was arrogance.

“Have you been really thinking that you’ve never lost?”

“My soul has a special power, especially for contracts. However, I tried several times just now and I still couldn’t get rid of it. If I remember correctly, the might you showed at the beginning was special, but the level was only at the early stage of the Pseudo-God. But now my soul has recovered 70%, far better than the ordinary peak stage of the Pseudo-God, yet I still can’t break free from the power of your contract.”

“So, I lost. It’s hard to accept, but losing is losing.”

“I can see that you are someone who can afford to lose.” Chen Rui nodded, “I don’t want to beat around the bush. You woke up at the right time. I need your help.”

“According to your scheming, it should not be a difficulty in strategy, but an inevitable powerful enemy.” Python was no doubt extraordinary. She saw through his intention in one sentence, “Did I guess it right?”

“Yes, I have an enemy. Within 2 months, I will have a fight with him, so I need your strength.”

“Enemy?”

“This person… should be your ‘old friend’.” Chen Rui took a deep breath, “Satan.”

“Satan! Your enemy is actually him!” Python was slightly shocked. She suddenly thought of something, and some kind of strange light flashed, “I remember, you once showed the Light Badge, the Earth Badge and the Fire Badge in front of me. It turned out you’re actually… Hmph , maybe I already understand why you are fighting against Satan. Although this battle is a matter of time, it is still too early for you. You should not fight him so soon.”

These remarks revealed quite an unexpected amount of information. The Fire Badge and the Earth Badge that Python said were the 7 artifacts like the Wrath King Armor and Sword of Fallen Angel that Chen Rui deliberately took out in order to deter and disturb her when he fought against her in front of the Light Divinity Temple. What does this represent? What do I have to fight with Satan sooner or later?

Although Chen Rui was full of doubts, dealing with Satan was the most important thing, “So, Python…”

“ Hahaha …” Python laughed suddenly. The laughter sounded very alluring at first, but Chen Rui frowned, because of the pride and arrogance contained in this laughter; he also heard it from Satan’s laughter before in the Fallen Angel Empire.

Python’s laughter finally stopped, “I didn’t finish a sentence earlier.”

“Say it.”

“Although I lost, you haven’t won yet.”

“Why?” Chen Rui raised his brows.

“This is your kingdom. I tried it just now, it is very special. With my current strength, I can’t escape.” Python said firmly, “Now that I have activated the secret technique, my soul will be closed and won’t obey any of your commands. Moreover, this secret technique also has a function, that is, self-destruction. Perhaps this kind of self-destruction can’t destroy your kingdom, but you can’t get any benefit or power from me.”

“If you’re really not afraid of death, why did you accept the contract previously?”

Python sneered, “Just doing a last-ditch effort, trying to regain strength and then fighting back, but unfortunately… I’ve admitted that I’ve failed in this regard.”

“Have you really decided? Would you rather die than truly surrender?”

“Don’t underestimate the madness of women.” Python smiled again. “There was a guy called Uriel back then. Because he underestimated this, when I killed him, he still couldn’t believe that he died in my hands.”

Chen Rui was actually clueless about some ancient secrets. He just remembered that the name ‘Uriel’ was vaguely mentioned in the conversation between Python and Michael, but he didn’t know the context. If a senior Pseudo-God was here, he would be shocked when he heard the name that was as famous as Michael and others back then.

When Chen Rui could see that Python’s determination was not fake, his heart sank: The strong aid I have been waiting for is actually in vain.

At this moment, Python’s eyes flashed with some kind of brilliance, “However, if you can do 2 things, I’d really like to be your helper, but you have to promise me that you won’t hurt me before you finish or fail these 2 things.”

TL: Seems like this woman has some stories too. Is she like Isabella, meeting an ungrateful man?

chapters.title: Chapter 1064: The Unexpected Crisis Of The Treasure Hunting Team
chapters.body:
Chapter 1064: The Unexpected Crisis Of The Treasure Hunting Team

The change in Python’s attitude could be called a sharp turn. After the change of mind just now, Chen Rui calmed down and asked, “Which 2 things?”

“First, collect all the 7 artifacts.”

“What’s so special about this?”

“Wait until you have collected all the 7 artifacts…” Before Python finished speaking, her pupils contracted suddenly because she saw 7 things appearing around Chen Rui.

“Wind Badge! Fire Badge! Darkness Badge” Even Python, who was always calm, couldn’t help but be shocked, “You have actually been recognized by the 7 artifacts!”

“I’d say surrender rather than recognition.” Chen Rui was right. He did not get the recognition of the artifacts, but he forced the imprint of ‘Chen’ on the 7 artifacts with [Deep Analysis]. It was indeed equivalent to surrender.

“Surrender?” There is another inexplicable meaning in Python’s shocking gaze, “Who are you?”

“Chen Rui. Chen Rui’s Chen, Chen Rui’s Rui.” Chen Rui spread his hands, “But now the Illusive Demon Shield, the Dark Shadow Cape and the Breeze Shadow Boots have not fully merged. Can you tell me what happens when the 7 artifacts fully merge?”

Python was silent for a moment, “I’m not sure either. Maybe nothing will happen; maybe everything will end because of this, and it’s a new beginning.”

“I seem to have heard someone say this kind of the answer before, but in fact it means nothing.” Chen Rui could see that Python was not willing to talk on this topic for a long time, so his tone changed, “Anyway, your first condition has been satisfied already.”

“ En .” Python nodded slowly, “The second condition is to defeat Satan without using my power this time. If you can do this, then I will truly surrender to you.”

“No doubt.” Chen Rui took a deep breath, “According to your conditions, I can’t hurt you until I do this. Then if I get killed by Satan during the battle, you who only signed the master-subordinate contract will also be free again, right? You may also be able to reap the benefits at that time, which is indeed a good plan. But have you ever thought about it, now you are imprisoned in my ‘world’. Once I really die, you may perish together as well.”

“That’s my business, you don’t have to worry about it.” Python was unmoved, “Anyway, this is my condition, do you agree?”

“I have to rely on my own strength to fight Satan. Even without you, I already have this realization.” Chen Rui said calmly, “Okay, I promise you.”

“Very good.” There was a hint of admiration in Python’s eyes, and she slowly nodded, “I will continue to restore my soul in your kingdom now – This world feels very strange to me. it’s like a real universe. I also want to feel the special power here. You’re a smart person, I believe that you will not do self-defeating things like forcibly controlling me, but I still want to remind you that my secret technique works at all times. Any external interference or attempt has only 1 result: Perish together.”

“You’re also smart, so you should know the consequences of not keeping your promises. I will never tolerate your worthless or even threatening existence.”

“If you can beat Satan in 2 months, I, Python, swear by my soul and this strange kingdom power, will follow you for life.”

Chen Rui clearly sensed that the soul of Python did not fluctuate in the slightest. This oath seems to be a real determination. Since the 7 artifacts appeared before Python, this woman’s attitude seemed to have undergone some special changes. Chen Rui also didn’t know why.

Python gave him a deep look after saying her oath.

“If you really are, you can create real miracles”

The voice drifted as the woman’s body gradually disappeared.

I really am? What I am really? Chen Rui was curious, but he didn’t waste time to think further. Python’s awakening could be regarded as cutting off the last fluke in his mind. Next, he could only prepare for the battle.

Just as Chen Rui was about to leave the Super System, his facial expression suddenly changed, because he felt a certain link in his mind was suddenly disconnected. To be precise, it was the power of someone’s link.

The Super System’s link was somewhat similar to the soul contract, but its strength was far greater than that of the soul contract. Even a linker whose strength was above him could not take the initiative to cancel the link.

Now, auto-disconnected links only meant 1 thing: The linker died.

What made Chen Rui secretly relieved was that the disappearing link object was not the members of the Ghastly Floating Land test nor his most cherished relatives and friends, but someone else. His brows furrowed immediately because the death of this person was quite unexpected.

Vesilna!

Vesilna was the Demi-God level powerhouse that Chen Rui subdued in the Ghastly Floating Land. After accepting the [Star-level Enhancement] and star conferring, her strength had almost reached the peak stage of the Demi-God level. Due to the Super System, she became a faithful believer of Chen Rui.

Chen Rui had long heard from Alice a while ago that Adeline and Helen wanted to go back to the Dead Sea to see their long-lost tribe and relatives. Coincidentally, Lalaria got a ‘treasure map’ from the Dead Sea. Olypheus’ eyes turned into black crystal coins, then she proposed to explore treasures together, which was immediately approved by several people. Vesilna went together to protect them. Alice originally wanted to follow secretly, but she was caught by the maroon lamp spirit, Manlace.

Unexpectedly, Vesilna died suddenly now. This means that Lalaria and the others must have encountered great danger!

The link of Olypheus was still there, but due to the limited quota of the original equality link, several other girls had not been linked, so it was impossible to know their specific safety. The most awful thing was that there were only 2 months left until Satan’s due date for the battle. Time was precious. Yet at such a time, such an accident occurred!

Chen Rui thought for a while and decided to set off for rescue immediately.
