Although he had no love between man and woman for Olypheus, and the contract between the boss and the bodyguard was purely a scheme, the naive and greedy Ms. Black Dragon had always been a sister-like existence in Chen Rui’s mind (Yini: Hey , the little girl is much older than you, isn’t she?). The obedient and docile Adeline was also akin to a younger sister. The little mermaid princess with a vicious mouth was actually just complaining a lot, but her other factors were definitely worthy of a friend title. Sisters and a friend are now in danger, I must not sit back and watch.

Uh… As for the flat-chested loli who has 3 forms, she can only be counted as a bonus. I’ll consider it a favor for the Old Dragon Emperor Father-in-law.

The location happened to be the Dead Sea, and he had a super spaceship like the City of Stars. He really came to the right place for training.

First of all, it was necessary to find out where Olypheus and others went to search for treasures. The most likely to know was the tribes people of Helen or Adeline, so his first destination was the land of the sirens and nagas.

Chen Rui took out the map drawn by the sandmen in the Dead Sea. Crystal Phoenix quickly absorbed the information displayed on the map, accurately positioned the known sea area, and quickly determined the nearest siren tribe before the spaceship flew at full speed.

The speed of flying in the air was the fastest, especially for a super spaceship like the City of Stars. The Devil’s Snare Ship had to sail for several days to reach the siren area, but it took a moment for the battleship to arrive.

Chen Rui already heard that long-lost wonderful singing through his keen sensing system.

However, the current feeling of the singers was definitely not ‘wonderful’. When this behemoth object came out of the air at a terrifying speed, the first reaction of the sirens was panic. A lot of sirens then bravely sang the battle song, trying to confuse this huge ‘demonic beast’. Unfortunately, that kind of singing had no effect on the City of Stars or the alchemy beings inside.

Some sirens began to chant magic in preparation to attack. At this moment, a figure appeared in the sky above the sea area, “Don’t panic. I’m a friend of siren. I want to meet Matriarch Elena.”

This voice revealed a deterrence that was unimaginable by the sirens. Their whole soul was shaking, and the battle song as well as magic stopped involuntarily.

“Which ‘friend’ wants to see me?”

The sea in front slowly surged, and a graceful figure appeared under the moonlight. This was a very beautiful woman with black hair and golden eyes. There was a little golden crystal on her forehead. She was wearing a sexy robe, exuding mature charm all over her body.

It was not the first time Chen Rui had seen this attractive mature woman. This was Helen’s mother, Matriarch Elena of the siren tribe.

Chen Rui put on the ‘Aguile’ face which was familiar to the sirens, and he nodded slightly to Elena, “Hi Matriach Elena, we meet again.”

“Sir Aguile!” Elena expressed her surprise and hurriedly bowed. Chen Rui and the Old Dragon Emperor Father-in-law joined forces to get rid of the Holy Dragon Rodriguez, and also solved the biggest existential crisis in this sea area. For the siren tribe, he was indeed a benefactor.

“Thank you sir for taking care of Helen in the Fallen Angel Empire.” Elena already knew that after her daughter didn’t encounter some of the things she imagined after leaving the Dead Sea. In contrast, she lived a very free and happy life. Elena was really grateful to ‘Aguile’.

Not only that, Elena’s current strength was the peak stage of the Demon Overlord, but ‘Aguile’ was becoming more and more unfathomable in her eyes. It was obvious that he had stepped into the super-level, so her mind was more fearful.

“Matriarch Elena, skip the courtesy. I have something urgent. Is Helen still here?”

Elena shook her head, “Helen and her friends came here about 4 months ago, but they didn’t stay long, Then, they went to the nagas’ Thunder Snake Archipelago, saying they were visiting Ms. Adeline’s mother and sister. Next, they went looking for a treasure, but I don’t know the exact location of the treasure.”

“Thunder Snake Archipelago?” Chen Rui nodded, “I’m going to the Thunder Snake Archipelago now, excuse my rudeness.”

“No problem, sir.” Elena suddenly remembered something again, “By the way, does sir know someone named ‘Chen Rui’?”

Chen Rui was taken aback, “He’s considered my friend. What’s wrong?”

“It’s nothing. It’s just that Helen seems to be talking about this person’s name a lot when she came back. I don’t know if that’s her crush.”

“ Huh ?”

Chen Rui was speechless. Judging from Elena’s words, the little mermaid princess with a vicious mouth did not reveal his true identity, but Elena must have misunderstood.

The so-called nagging was not because she liked the person, but the habit of complaining. He could already imagine the derogatory words such as ‘lousy’ and ‘shameless’ used by the little mermaid princess.

“ Uhm , I don’t know about this. I will leave now.”

“Have a smooth journey, sir.”

TL: Who is related to the 7 artifacts really?

chapters.title: Chapter 1065: Accompany Of The King
chapters.body:
Chapter 1065: Accompany Of The King

Chen Rui left the siren tribe and quickly came to the Thunder Snake Archipelago, where he met Matriarch Modesty and her inheritor, Strena, of the naga tribe. He fought alongside Strena on the Land of Hatred at the bottom of the sea, and they forged a strong friendship.

Reuniting with comrades was a joy, but Strena, the host’s reaction, was a little jerky. Nonetheless, she soon returned to normal.

The news from Strena was not ideal, because Lalaria and others did not stay long in the Thunder Snake Archipelago as they embarked on a ‘treasure hunt’ process. Strena knew very little about the treasure hunt, but she heard an unfamiliar term: Crimson Double Teeth Sea Area.

The sea area of the Dead Sea was too huge. Even Matriarch Modesty of the naga tribe did not know where the Crimson Double Teeth Sea Area was. it should be far away from this sea area.

Now only Vesilna’s link was disconnected, while Olypheus, who was also the linker, was still there, he did not know what happened to the others. It only meant that Olypheus had not died yet, and she was probably facing the threat of death, so Chen Rui must race against the clock.

The first key was to find the location of ‘Crimson Double Teeth Sea Area’. Chen Rui pondered about it and thought of another ‘old friend’ nearby, Water Elemental King Lambost.

With the Water Elemental King’s knowledge and familiarity with the Dead Sea, there should be clues in this regard.

After Strena heard that her sister might be in danger, she insisted on going together. Strena’s talent was one of the best among the nagas. Over the years, her strength had already reached the peak stage of the Demon Overlord, but unfortunately, she had never been able to cross that gap to enter the super-level. During this time, she was thinking of going out for training.

Before Chen Rui agreed or refused, Strena’s mother, the nagas’ Matriarch Modesty, spoke up. In short, she was mocking that Strena’s strength would become a burden, then she whispered a few words in her daughter’s ear. Strena’s face actually turned red, and she pulled out the scimitar with a loud clang .

Soon, the mother and daughter began a fierce battle.

Out of courtesy, when Modesty whispered earlier, Chen Rui put away his perception and did not eavesdrop.

Seeing that the 2 sides’ shots were getting more and more ruthless, as if fighting for their lives, Chen Rui finally couldn’t stand it anymore. He moved his fingers slightly, and the 2 winding and graceful figures suddenly stopped.

“I’m sorry, you 2. I can’t stay here for long, so I’ll take my leave.”

Strena and Modesty felt the irresistible force of imprisonment disappear at the same time, and their bodies regained their freedom when Chen Rui seemed to just raise his fingers casually. Both of them knew very well what this force represented. Strena was silent immediately, and she no longer requested to follow suit.

“Matriarch Modesty, I have heard Adeline say that due to the innate relationship, it is very difficult for the naga tribe to break through to the super-level. Usually, one needs to go through some kind of strong and special spiritual stimulation. However, as a super-level powerhouse, I want to say that there are many ways to break through the bottleneck. It is not necessary to sacrifice one’s own life to induce some kind of stimulation.”

Chen Rui’s words stunned Modesty, then he glanced at Strena, “Strena, although you accepted the power given by Adeline, your foundation is not very steady, if you believe me… “

“I believe.”

Strena’s firm gaze made Chen Rui sigh softly. He signed an equality link with her, gave her the power of 1-star enhancement through the link, explained the matters to be aware of, and entered the City of Stars.

Soon, the giant ‘space castle’ disappeared from the nagas’ vision.

“Hopefully your strength matches your vision as well.” Modesty didn’t continue to challenge or fight. After she said the last sentence, she threw down the scimitar in her hand dejectedly before she turned her back against her daughter as she slowly walked away.

Chen Rui had been to the water elemental residence for more than once. Soon, the alchemy metropolitan, which was renamed the ‘Star Ship’, arrived at the Deep Blue Island. He met the Water Elemental King Lambost.

Lambost was not too surprised by Chen Rui’s improvement in strength. In fact, the last time when the 3 Kings of Darkness provided element source power for ‘Cosmos Annihilation’, he had seen the ‘Red Pole Star Emperor’ Chen Rui. At the same time, he also learned about Zola becoming a Demi-God.

When Chen Rui came to the Deep Blue Palace for the first time, Earth Elemental King Moore said that he was an inheritor of a Pseudo-God. Now that Chen Rui’s strength had reached the peak stage of the Demi-God, Lambost only thought it was just a ‘gradual recovery of strength’.

“Crimson Double Teeth Sea Area?” The name made Lambost frown as if he was recalling something. After some time, he shook his head.

“Your Highness Lambost?” Chen Rui asked.

“The Dead Sea is vast and huge, and the sea area that you know is just a tiny part of it.” Although he didn’t answer the question, Chen Rui’s eyes really lit up. He didn’t interrupt, but quietly waited for the following. Since Lambost started the topic like this, he must know something about the ‘Crimson Double Teeth Sea Area’.

“The sea area is no better than the inland. There are countless unknown areas and forces hidden in the deep sea. Even Demi-God is in danger of falling at any time when entering some dangerous areas.” Lambost revealed a pondering expression, “A long time ago, at that time… I searched around the Dead Sea in search of the Crown of Wave. When I came to a sea area, I felt my control over water elementals actually weakened rapidly. For an Elemental King, this is an incredible phenomenon, and it is also a very deadly thing. The sky in the sea area is crimson red. Judging from the fluctuations of the surrounding water elementals, I can faintly sense that there seem to be 2 huge islands in the sea area. I tried to approach the sea area, but I didn’t sense the power of the water origin fragment. On the contrary, I felt a terrifying danger, so I didn’t enter the sea area rashly and chose to leave wisely. If according to the ‘Crimson Double Teeth Sea Area’ you mentioned, and the contract party at the Demi-God level has fallen, then it is likely to be the terrifying sea area back then.”

“There is actually such a sea area!” Chen Rui was taken aback. Not to mention the level of power contained in that sea area, the Water Elemental King is the absolute controller of the water elementals. The fact that the water elementals of the Crimson Double Teeth Sea Area is out of his control is especially strange. The ‘treasure hunting ground’ of Lalaria and others is likely to be where this terrifying force is.

“It’s not that I underestimate your ability. Even Pseudo-God cannot ignore the level of danger there. You must consider it carefully.”

“Then, can Your Highness do me a favor and mark the approximate location of this sea area.”

“Looks like you’ve made up your mind.” Lambost nodded slowly, “Okay.”

“I know Your Highness wants to remind me of the danger, and I’m grateful for Your Highness’ kindness. ” Chen Rui shrugged, “It’s not that I’m trying to covet any treasure, but my friends are very likely to get lost in it, and their lives are in danger, so I have to go.”

“For friends? No wonder Moore trusts you so much.” Lambost expressed his admiration.

“I remember Your Highness also said that I’m a friend of water elementals.”

“It was just an investment politeness when Sir Auglas was present; for profit.” Lambost smiled lightly, “As we all know, water elementals are always shrewd, but…”

“But?”

“Maybe there will be a shocking war in the future, but before the storm comes, there will be a long and boring silence. On the main plane, our strength is limited in some way and we can’t move an inch. After getting the Crown of Wave, all I can do is just wait. All I’m thinking about now is how to pass this boring time… So, let’s go.”

Chen Rui showed a surprised expression, “Your Highness means…”

“The sea area in that area is very strange. Back then, I succeeded in entering with the Elemental King’s intuition about water elementals. If I were to give you an ordinary sea map, it might take you several months to find the exact location. I’m afraid it will waste a lot of precious time.” Lambost laughed, “Besides, after what you said, I also want to find out what’s going on in that place. However, ‘my’ current strength can’t help you much.”

“Since this is the case, let’s go.” Chen Rui was very clear that the role of the Water Elemental King could never be measured by superficial strength, especially in this almost boundless Dead Sea. With his help, they would definitely be able to get to that mysterious Crimson Double Teeth Sea Area as fast as possible.

“Thank you very much for your help, Your Highness.” Chen Rui entered the ‘Star Ship’ with Lambost without too much politeness.

“This is what you got from the ancient heritage?” Despite countless years of memory and wisdom, Lambost couldn’t hide his surprise after entering the Star Ship.

“To be precise, it is the ancient alchemy civilization, a civilization outside the main plane.”

Chen Rui didn’t hide it. However, he would definitely not reveal the secret of the Super System. It was his biggest secret. So far, he had not disclosed it to anyone. Besides, the ‘great grand master inheritance’ had been perfectly overlapped with this ancient civilization, becoming the best alternative excuse.

He was now in the central projection control room, which could temporarily exercise most of the functions of the central control palace and issue orders. This was equivalent to a centrally controlled projection building, which would not affect Crystal Phoenix’s original body after being destroyed.

Crystal Phoenix could project any building in the alchemy city into a temporary control room, which was 1 of the wonderful uses of level 5 metropolitan civilization.

“Very special civilization.” The well-informed Lambost saw the difference between ‘technical’ civilization and ordinary magical civilization at a glance. He was even more amazed when he saw those alchemy creatures that had never been seen before.

“Regardless of how special the existence, there is a day of destruction after all. What I get is the civilization that escaped to the main plane before extinction… There is only a small part left. The real plane of the alchemy civilization had long been destroyed by a terrifying power.” While Chen Rui said, he ordered the gremlin servants to construct the current map.

Lambost didn’t care about the alchemy civilization. He glanced at the map, and a blue light appeared in his hand. It was a sea area map, “This is the sea area that I know; it should be helpful for your flight.”

Chen Rui immediately asked Crystal Phoenix’s projection to scan and copy this sea area map, and it was integrated with the one the ‘Star Ship’ previously verified. The result was a surprise. It turned out that the sea area map given by Lambost was huge while the sea area that he knew was just a drop in the bucket.

“Flying in this direction, at this speed of… you call it a ‘battleship’, we will reach the Miro Sea Area in about 3 days. After this, we need to leave this big guy and ‘walk’ to sense the mysterious sea area.”

chapters.title: Chapter 1066: Crimson Double Teeth Sea Area
chapters.body:
Chapter 1066: Crimson Double Teeth Sea Area

Due to the existence of many powerful and unfathomable forces in the Dead Sea, Chen Rui did not activate space warp to shorten the time in order to prevent self-defeating. Instead, he followed Lambost’s advice and adopted flight mode.

With that giant map, the ‘Star Ship’ flew to what Lambost called the Miro Sea Area with few obstacles.

The sea in this area was very windy with huge waves. The Star Ship landed next to a small island. After entering this Miro Sea Area, Chen Rui and Lambost left the Star Ship because of the need to sense water elementals.

“What an amazing camouflage technique! It is not only an appearance change, but it really seems to merge with the island. Even if I sense the water elemental fluctuating in the air, I can only vaguely feel something strange.” Lambost praised when he saw the Star Ship merging the island, “If I hadn’t seen it with my own eyes, I wouldn’t believe it. Perhaps only Moore, who has the highest sense of earth elements, would have discovered the existence of this castle.”

Chen Rui nodded, the camouflage of the Star Ship was really brilliant. If it wasn’t for his spiritual sense, he wouldn’t even be able to detect it. Chen Rui was about to take out the Devil’s Snare Ship when he saw Lambost had taken off the Crown of Wave above his head, and a strange small ship appeared in front of him. The whole ship was transparent with crystal-like material, exuding beautiful blue light.

“This is… Aqua Water Ship.” Chen Rui remembered when he went to the Land of Hatred with the 2 Elemental Kings and the Old Dragon Emperor Father-in-law to deal with the Holy Dragon Rodriguez at the bottom of the sea, they boarded this ship formed by the water origin fragment.

This ship was much more powerful than Devil’s Snare. It could maximize the power of the Water Elemental King. It could even transform into a ‘submarine’.

Chen Rui entered the Aqua Water Ship. When Lambost’s eyes flashed, the surrounding water slowly carried up the boat. The boat moved forward quickly like some kind of high-speed booster. It was smooth and fast, not affected by the surrounding wind and waves at all. Even if the Devil’s Snare Ship was at full speed, it was far less than this speed. He was really worthy of the Water Elemental King title. The ship seemed to be walking on flat ground on the sea.

The speed of the Aqua Water Ship was quite fast, but 2 hours later, the ship that was traveling at a high speed in a straight line still did not find anything. Chen Rui had a familiar feeling in his mind. The small island where the City of Stars merged appeared again in front of him.

They were obviously sailing in a straight line, but they returned to the same place unexpectedly!

During this period, Chen Rui just felt a little abnormal. It was not unusual for some sea areas to have corresponding reactions due to their special power. He finally understood why Lambost said that even if he was given the sea area map, he would not be able to enter the ‘Crimson Double Teeth Sea Area’ any time soon.

Lambost pondered for a while, and the Aqua Water Ship gradually transformed into a big fish, wrapping the 2 of them in it before it dove into the water.

Chen Rui, who had been activating his perception, sensed that he had entered a special state, as if he became one with the surrounding seawater, and the seawater was like the blood flowing in his body. His ability to perceive underwater was not only not suppressed as usual, but it expanded several times.

This was of course due to the power of the water origin fragment. Unfortunately, Chen Rui was not a trainer of water element magic but a magic dummy. Otherwise, this perception alone could raise his control of water element to a higher level.

Lambost controlled the Aqua Water Ship that turned into a big fish to dive to the bottom of the sea. Chen Rui experienced the deep-sea training scene in the training ground. By right, the pressure of this depth would be quite overwhelming. Even the hard metal would be squashed and deformed. However, the Aqua Water Ship hadn’t changed in the slightest.

According to the scientific principles that Chen Rui knew, it should be due to the internal and external pressures being adjusted to be consistent, but in this magical world, especially for the elemental king who controlled the water elements, everything was possible.

Gradually, Chen Rui felt that the perception of ‘becoming one’ became stagnant and weaker. Soon, the merge became a rejection. It was almost impossible to sense distant things as if he was almost blind.

Although the Water Elemental King’s strength was only at the peak stage of the Demon Overlord, his control and sense of water elementals were much stronger than Chen Rui. The big fish flexibly sneak in the deep sea, avoiding various dangers along the way.

A few hours later, the Aqua Water Ship, which was traveling in the deep sea, quickly floated and finally surfaced.

This was a brand new sea area.

Chen Rui’s first feeling was gloomy. When he looked up, the sky was covered with thick dark clouds. The dark clouds were like a huge cover, covering the sea area.

Looking back, there were no clouds in the sky, but looking forward, the entire horizon was filled with black color.

It seemed that these dark clouds had been lingering all year. He suddenly had a heavy sense of depression in his mind. It was not only because of this environment but also because of some unknown power.

“The breath of the water element here is full of violence and hostility which is almost uncontrollable.” Lambost frowned, “In my memory, the breath back then was far less intense. It is at least dozens of times more intense now.”

“This area is the Crimson Double Teeth Sea Area?” Chen Rui looked around. No doubt, there was a sense of danger.

“To be precise, this is the outer edge of the Crimson Double Teeth Sea Area. I thought it would be easy to enter the inner sea area with the power of the water origin fragment, but unfortunately, we are forced to stop here.”

“Is this just the outer edge?” Chen Rui looked at the sea area full of unknown dangers shrouded in black clouds ahead, and he was secretly vigilant.

“I’m thinking, since the hostility of the water element here is dozens of times stronger, then, that kind of attack…” With that said, the small ship quickly turned into the form of a big fish, wrapping the 2 in its belly.

“That kind of attack?”

As soon as Chen Rui finished speaking, a warning sign suddenly surged. Since they were in the Aqua Water Ship, the Water Elemental King responded faster. The ‘big fish’ jumped like a typical fish and leaped dozens of meters in an instant.

Countless sharp fangs suddenly stretched out from the sea where the Aqua Water Ship was originally located. These fangs ranged from several meters to dozens of meters in length, looking like the fangs of some kind of giant demonic beast.

Immediately afterward, the fangs burst open together. This explosive force was quite powerful. The Aqua Water Ship, that was still in the air, was instantly blown away.

The blow did not damage the Aqua Water Ship. Although it had lost balance, after spinning in the air a few times, it landed on the water smoothly with a special power. The next second, the Aqua Water Ship was ejected again and rushed to the side, rendering a huge tentacle stretched out from the water to miss the catch.

The tentacles that hit the air slammed into the sea, splashing huge waves that turned into hundreds of fists in the air and rushed toward the Aqua Water Ship.

Aqua Water Ship nimbly dodged the ‘fists’.

Chen Rui frowned, “These things don’t seem to be physical entities?”

“These are water element powers that incorporate some kind of strange power, resisting all outsiders who try to pass through.” Lambost replied while controlling the Aqua Water Ship to dodge, “As expected, the density and intensity of the attacks are much stronger than they were back then.”

“It’s better to transform into a ship again. Let me deal with these attacks.”

“With your strength, it’s not difficult to defeat these attacks. However, we can’t pass through this outer sea area because it is equivalent to a huge maze with layer upon layer and continuous circulation. This is even more powerful than the previous Miro Sea Area. The only way is to endure the attack while sensing the source of the strange power that affects the water element. This way, we will be able to enter the real Crimson Double Teeth Sea Area.”

Chen Rui knew that this kind of sea area was extremely vast. If he just relied on brute force, he would definitely get half the result with twice the effort. Therefore, he had no choice but to nod and leave the Water Elemental King to handle it.

The attacks in the sea area became more and more intensive. They turned into various forms to launch attacks from time to time. Moreover, it was inexhaustible. The power of the Water Elemental King was unleashed to the fullest.

The Aqua Water Ship was like a swimming fish that slid and cruised smoothly to save itself from all kinds of dangers. It was also like a leaf, no matter how the sea roared, it could still sway along the force.

This state of ease seemed to be relaxing, but it actually consumed a lot of Lambost’s power. Chen Rui noticed it, but he couldn’t help.

At this moment, the Water Elemental King’s eyes lit up, “I found it! It’s up to you next!”

“Okay!” Chen Rui had been holding back for a long time. He began to gather his Star Power quickly.

The Aqua Water Ship rose into the air, and its form changed rapidly from a ‘swimming fish’ to a huge seahawk flapping its wings.

The water element condensed on the sea surface did not stop attacking because of this. The huge water pillar rising into the sky turned into a palm and grabbed the ‘seahawk’. There were several vine-like tentacles winding down below.

Lambost suddenly felt the temperature drop, and his heart froze slightly. By right, as the Water Elemental King, he was immune to any water element magic, and he was not afraid of cold at all, but this low temperature could actually affect his water elemental heart – This is no ordinary freezing!

At this moment, all the attacks were stagnant as they condensed into ice in an instant. This freezing spread quickly, and the nearby sea surface was condensed into ice. Those strange powers were immediately suppressed.

Lambost had already sensed the true attribute of this frozen power, and he was slightly surprised, “Very powerful destruction law. It seems that your power is even above the ordinary peak stage of the Demi-God.”

Peak stage of the Demi-God? Chen Rui smiled and did not explain anything. This was the power of [Winter Territory]. After being promoted to Purple Pole Star Emperor, his use of law had approached perfection, far surpassing those of the same level of strength. Nonetheless, the Water Elemental King’s self-proclaimed praise actually still underestimated him.

The Aqua Water Ship that transformed into a seahawk spread its wings and flew like a frozen messenger. Wherever it passed, the sea behind it was frozen.

With the help of Chen Rui, Lambost could activate the power of the Crown of Wave without any distractions. He waved his hands with strange ripples. Immediately, crisscrossing water marks appeared in the sea ahead, and a strange whirlpool appeared in front.

However, the whirlpool soon began to shrink rapidly. The seahawk turned into a light stream and rushed toward the whirlpool. Chen Rui put away the large-scale [Winter Territory] freezing power, and he struck out his fists rapidly. The various forms of attacks formed by the seawater along the way were dissipated into powder.

At the moment of approaching the whirlpool, the Aqua Water Ship transformed from seahawk into a fish form and plunged into the whirlpool.

After a few seconds, the shrinking whirlpool disappeared, and the various forms of attacks stopped, returning to the original serenity.

After a dizzy transfer, Chen Rui and Lambost finally appeared in another sea area.

chapters.title: Chapter 746: One-Stop Service (4)
chapters.body:
Chapter 746: One-Stop Service (4)

…

On the other side, at the dining table.

Seeing the chef’s reaction, Mu Si felt relieved.

If he didn’t mind, what else could he mind.

After tasting the fried steak, the taste was very good. It wasn’t inferior to the Michelin restaurants he had eaten in foreign countries.

But he kept feeling that something was missing..

“Shi Yu, Lan Lan, don’t eat so much. It’s not good for a child’s health if he eats too much!”

As they met, they spoke in a high-sounding manner. Their hands moved non-stop as they scooped three-quarters of the meat into their bowls.

…..

Shi Yu:”…”

Shu Xinglan:”…”

As they met, they were boasting shamelessly. They did not have any psychological burden when it came to scamming children. “Have you heard of being generous to others? That’s our traditional virtue! Come, I’ll give the two of you a chance. Shi Yu, Lan Lan, give up the hotpot!”

Shu Xinglan was shy and did not know what to say. He obediently responded with an assent and did not even dare to put more food in his mouth.

Shi Yu, on the other hand, had inherited the evilness of the Shi family. The little boy raised his hand and called out in a childish voice, “Sister Xiang Yi!”

Xiang Yi gave him a look. “What’s wrong?”

They had met: … ! !

He quickly covered Shi Yu’s mouth and laughed dryly. “Nothing, nothing. He’s thirsty. I’ll pour him a glass of juice.”

“It’s not good for children to drink juice. There’s too much sugar. It’s better to give him milk instead.”

“Alright!”

After dealing with Xiang Yi, Xiang Feng heaved a long sigh of relief. She lowered her voice and ground her teeth. “Why are you still complaining?!”

Shi Yu said, “Grandpa, give me some food.”

Xiang Feng: ? ? ?

He couldn’t believe his ears. “What did you say?”

“Sister Xiang Yi…”

Xiang Feng immediately changed his words. “Pinch pinch pinch pinch, I’ll pinch it for you!”

Bang!

Shi family’s dog had indeed been engraved with genes!

…

Xiang Feng and the three of them ate until their bellies were round. They slumped on the sofa and watched cartoons together.

Three people, three ages, but all of them were watching with great interest.

… This could be considered as a side proof of the saying that a man would be a youth until he died.

The process of the French meal was long, and Mu Si was already a little listless towards the end.

He could not explain why he did not have any interest in this table full of delicacies…

On the contrary, he felt that the leftover hotpot next door was very fragrant..

The last course, dessert,q was served.

It was an exquisite three-layered cake, the size of a palm, was decorated with cream, strawberries, and blueberries.

Regardless of whether it was in terms of color or style, it was perfect.

Xiang Yi quite liked the cake, but she only wanted to eat strawberries and did not want to eat blueberries.

If she did not eat it, she would feel like it was a bit of a waste.

The little girl was still worrying when she saw Shi Sui chatting with Mu Si by the side. He was also exchanging their strawberries and blueberries.

As a result, the small cake that suited them only had strawberries and no blueberries.

The little girl’s brows curved into the shape of a crescent moon, and she ate happily.

A hint of a smile appeared in Shi Sui’s eyes as well.

To Mu Si, the cake was delicious, but compared to the taste of the Hotpot, it was simply..

Bland and tasteless!

He tightened his grip on the cutlery and finally could not hold it in anymore. He stood up with a whoosh.

“Madam Xiang, please let me taste your hotpot!”

Xiang Yi was shocked by him. “Eh? What flavor do you like? Let me change the pot for you.”

“No need! I’ll just eat that pot!”Mu Si pointed at the small copper pot left over by the three of them. “I’m too curious about the taste. One bite, I’ll try one bite!”

…

Two minutes later, the pot boiled and Mu Si took the first bite.

Twenty minutes later, Mu Si grimaced in pain, but he still shouted, “Give me another plate of meat! !”

chapters.title: Chapter 747: One-Stop Service (5)
chapters.body:
Chapter 747: One-Stop Service (5)

…

…

Director Mu Si, who had finished six plates of meat, finally walked with his hands on his waist.

Before he left, he was especially reluctant to part with her.

The way he addressed her changed from Madam Xiang to “Sister Yi.”

“Sister Yi, your house is so nice! I love this place so much! Oh, I really love China, I love Chinese food so much! Although my body is overseas, my heart will always belong to China!”

She was very polite and not only did she send a lot of hand-holding gifts, she also smiled and said, “When you are on vacation, you are welcome to come and play anytime.”

Looking at the hot pot seasoning, mu Si’s eyes were wide open. She was even more excited than the previous movie, which had a global box office of over two billion!

…..

“Is this the magic seasoning? Sister Yi, you are really a super, super good person!”

In the live broadcast room, the audience was already used to the process of Mu Si’s fragrance.

——[ director mu: wearing a dress, my heart is still Chinese/Dog Head ]

——[ as expected, as long as I have a bite of sister Yi’s rice, I can’t escape the law of true fragrance ]

——[ when will this hot pot seasoning be served? I want to mobilize all my friends and family to help me snatch it! ]

..

After bidding farewell to director Mu, Xiang Yi and Shu Xinglan exchanged sword blows again, and the young man left with satisfaction.

Just as he left, Xiang Yi received a notification from Li Jianyu.

“The guest has arrived early!”

“Eh?”

And, unfortunately, the car broke down on the road.

Shi Sui: “Shall We go over and pick her up?”

Xiang Yi: “Sure, I’ll drive.”

In the live broadcast room:

——[ A dumbass appears ]

——[ Can a female driver do it? Don’t get into an accident ]

——[ Are you sick? Do you have to add the word ‘female’ as the prefix? Go and check the ratio of men to women in traffic accidents yourself! ]

…

The comments section was filled with chaos, but when the camera switched to the garage, the atmosphere instantly changed!

The sports cars, SUVs, and motorcycles were dazzling, and many of them were limited edition models from around the world. They could be said to be a paradise for car lovers!

Li Jianyu was extremely surprised. He asked the audience what they were thinking, “Sister Yi, are these all your cars?”

“They’re my brothers’ cars.” Xiang Yi did not understand why everyone liked to leave their cars with her. Little did she know that this was a childish comparison between a few men in front of her sister. “And my little uncle’s car.”

Everyone understood.

Upon a closer look, from the style and color, one could basically guess whose car it was.

For example, the black and stable design should belong to Big Brother Xiang Chen.

For example, the red and flashy design should belong to third brother Xiang Chen.

As for the various toy cars, children’s trolleys, and cartoon bumper cars in the corner, other than the overbearing CEO Xiang Shi Feng Feng, whose car could it belong to?

Of course, Xiang Yi also had a few cars. Most of them were given to her by her family, which was more like a young girl’s car.

For the convenience of picking her up, she chose her big brother’s business car.

It was just to look for the keys, which took up some time..

Everyone:”…”

Ah, this damned, enviable trouble!

The young girl skillfully reversed the car like flowing water, using her strength to break the prejudice.

She jumped out of the car and opened the passenger door for Shi Sui. With a straight face, she said, “Boyfriend, you go in first.”

Shi Sui chuckled. “Thank you, Girlfriend.”

Everyone:”…”

Isn’t it just dog food?

I don’t care! I don’t care at all!

Our hearts are already numb! !

The staff also drove a car and followed behind.

Li Jianyu warned, “Sister Yi, try to be faster. Don’t let the guests wait too long.”

Xiang Yi tilted her head. “Faster? Okay, understood.”

chapters.title: Chapter 748: One-Stop Service (6)
chapters.body:
Chapter 748: One-Stop Service (6)

Upon hearing the appropriate answer, Li Jianyu suddenly had an ominous feeling…

He vaguely heard the girl say to Shi Sui, who was sitting in the passenger seat, “Fasten your safety belt.”

Shi Sui said, “Okay, Sister Xiang Yi.”

Not only did he fasten his seatbelt, but he also calmly pulled on the handrail.

He was very cooperative.

!!

Li Jianyu was confused.

What? Want to race?

Xiang Yi was a cute little girl who would be more suitable for driving a bumper car. This was not possible… What the f*ck?!

…..

Before everyone could react, the commercial car had already shot past like an arrow leaving the bow!

Li Jianyu hurriedly shouted, “Keep up, keep up!”

The driver stepped on the accelerator and said confidently, “Don’t worry, I’m an experienced driver. I’m experienced enough to chase a little girl’s car. I’m steady.”

The next second, the car suddenly accelerated. He screamed endlessly.

After driving for some distance, the driver’s expression changed.

“Alright, the little girl has some skills.”

Very good, this success aroused his desire to win!

He drove the car even faster!

At the front, when Xiang Yi saw that he was driving so fast, she whispered, “Does Uncle Wang think that I’m driving too slow?”

Therefore, the young girl also accelerated!

The two cars sped on the road like a race.

The audience in the live broadcast room also witnessed Xiang Yi’s driving skills, and they were all shocked.

——[Holy Sh*t! Is there anything that Sister Xiang Yi doesn’t know? ?]

——[Oh my God, drifting around corners? Isn’t this a skill that only exists in movies?!]

——[Xiang Yi, do you have some misunderstanding about ‘faster’? ! You’re not just going faster, you’re flying! ]

…

Xiang Yi only took seven minutes to reach her destination after the original 20-minute journey..

After a while, the staff’s car finally caught up with them with much difficulty.

When Li Jianyu got off the car, his face was pale and he was about to vomit.

The conversation between the girl and the guest entered his ears along with the wind.

“Sorry, we’re too late. We haven’t driven for a long time, so we’re a little rusty.”

Li Jianyu: ? ? ?

Sorry, he took back what he said earlier!

Xiang Yi wasn’t racing, she was speeding! !

She was the Rabbit Mountain Racer God! ! !

Everyone’s attention was on the guests of this episode.

There were two guests in total, and the one who was smiling and talking to Xiang Yi was the singer, Zhou Yan. He had debuted as a teenager, and his first album had been popular all over the country. From then on, he became a god in the music industry.

The other man who was not good with words was the well-known composer Xu Rendong. He was wearing a gray sweater and a pair of black-framed glasses on his face. His skin color was not normal, and he looked like an otaku who had lived at home for a long time.

“Xiang Yi, Hello, Hello, I’m your fan!” Zhou Yan was 29 years old this year, but he was still like a teenager. His voice was clear and pleasant. Just listening to him talk was a kind of enjoyment.

Xu Rendong had interacted with Shi Sui before. He nodded stiffly as a form of greeting.

A staff member stayed behind to deal with the trailer. Zhou Yan and Xu Rendong got into a suitable car.

Li Jianyu’s heart tensed up. He whispered to Ruan Qing, “I heard that they don’t get along. Will they fight if they ride in the same car?”

Ruan Qing smiled. “Do you think they can fight with Xiang Yi around?”

Li Jianyu:”…” He knew that he was thinking too much. Xiang Yi’s punch could probably make them both cry.

“These two have a feud. Can’t you tell?”

chapters.title: Chapter 749: One-Stop Service (7)
chapters.body:
Chapter 749: One-Stop Service (7)

What was that?

“Didn’t we just meet? Wife, how did you tell that there’s a story between them?”Li Jianyu was stunned.

Ruan Qing raised her eyebrows. “What did you call me?”

“… Daddy! You’re my Daddy!”A certain director had never had any dignity in front of his wife.

Ruan Qing looked at the commercial car that was disappearing in front of her from afar. As if she had seen through something, her red lips curled up slightly.

!!

“A woman’s intuition.”

…

The manor.

…..

When he got off the car, Zhou Yan’s smile was clearly a little out of control. His legs were weak as he walked.

Xiang Yi asked him to drive faster. He thought to himself that it wouldn’t be that fast so he readily agreed.

Right now, he was thinking to himself, “I’m too stupid, really.”

After walking on a cobblestone path, he almost fell down. A pair of strong hands by his side supported him.

Zhou Yan said, “Thank…”

Before he could finish his sentence, he swallowed the rest of his words.

The person who held him up was Xu Rendong.

Zhou Yan did not say anything. After Xu Rendong confirmed that he had stabilized himself, he quickly withdrew his hands and pulled a distance away from him.

Then.

He took out a hand sanitizer from his shoulder bag and seriously rubbed his hands. Then, he took out an alcohol-based wet towel and carefully wiped each of his fingers.

Zhou Yan couldn’t help but ask, “Do I have so much bacteria on my body?”

This question reminded Xu Rendong. Then, he took out a bottle of disinfectant spray and sprayed it crazily.

Zhou Yan: “…”

Xiang Yi and Shi Sui noticed their movements and looked over.

“Sorry, I’m a little OCD and mysophobic.” Xu Rendong finally spoke up, and his voice was indescribably magnetic.

“I see.” Xiang Yi recalled that he was in the car just now, and her expression was particularly ugly.

So there was a reason.

Zhou Yan complained softly, “He still has so many bad habits…”

The comments in the live broadcast room were suddenly not so friendly.

——[ Zhou Yan is the one who has a problem, don’t you know how to Respect People! ]

——[ Xiang Yi, seriously, why didn’t you do your homework in advance? You can imagine how uneasy Xu Rendong was in the car! ]

[ please, Xu Rendong was the one who came to help us Yanbao first. After helping US Yanbao, he complained that our Yanbao was dirty. What’s wrong with Yanbao complaining? ]

..

In this regard, the loyal fans of “Two in a room”were very calm.

By blocking keywords, reporting personal attacks, and sending a rainbow-shaped essay, the whole world had become peaceful.

At the same time.

The host and guest entered the living room together.

Xiang Yi specially took out disposable slippers for Xu Rendong. The latter gave him a grateful look, but he still used his own alcohol spray before putting it on reluctantly.

Zhou Yan was a teenager, so he let Xiang Yi take him out for a walk.

Xu Rendong was very resistant to going out, so he sat down by the French window — of course, he also wiped the chair with a wet towel.

Shi Sui brought some tea over, and Xu Rendong was very tense:

“Um… Please Don’t talk to Me, Okay?”

Shi Sui smiled and nodded. He got up and went to the bookshelf to pick some books.

Xu Rendong felt relieved and let out a sigh of relief.

…

On the other side.

Xiang Yi and Zhou Yan were on opposite sides of each other.

Zhou Yan was a friendly person, and soon he was talking and laughing with Xiang Yi.

“Sister Xiang Yi, watch me drift six times in a row!” Zhou Yan picked up a small stone and threw it out. The stone kept jumping on the surface of the water, creating layers of ripples. He put his hands on his waist and said, “Amazing, right? Do you want to learn? Call me Big Brother and I’ll teach you!”

Xiang Yi pondered for a while and said, “Let me try first?”

chapters.title: Chapter 750: One-Stop Service (8)
chapters.body:
Chapter 750: One-Stop Service (8)

“Let’s give it a try then.” Zhou Yan grinned. “You’ll know how difficult it is after you try it! I’ve practiced for a long time before I can drift six times in a row!”

The girl lowered her head and casually picked up a stone.

Zhou Yan immediately said, “No, no, you can’t pick this stone. You have to choose a flat or disc-shaped one!”

“It’s okay, I’m just practicing.”

“Xiang Yi, you have to be careful in everything!” Zhou Yan was made foe variety shows. He forcefully pulled the stone from Xiang Yi’s hand and led her to pick it carefully. He even commented on the stones one by one, “Too big, no good. Too fat, no good. Too ugly, no good.”

!!

The effects of variety appeared in an instant.

——[ Yan Baoyan is a real dog! ]

——[ Three-year-old Yan is too cute to bring little Xiang Yi to look for a Rock! ]

——[ I’m laughing so hard that I’m spiraling into the sky. Little Xiang Yi is having it too difficult! It feels like she’s taking care of her cubs every day. Little Baby Yu Yu, little brother Lan Lan, and now there’s even a giant baby Yan Bao! ]

…..

…

Finally, Zhou Yan chose a suitable rock and gave a lecture as if it was a matter of fact:

“Little Xiang Yi, do you know why the rock bounces when you drift? It’s actually very simple. The higher the flow rate, the lower the pressure.

“The density of a stone is higher than water. When it is floating in water, the water will flow quickly for a short period of time, so the surface of the water will create pressure on the stone.

“When the pressure is greater than the gravity of the stone, the stone will bounce up. The more times this happens, the more times the stone will jump on the surface of the water.”

Yi agreed. “Yes, the theory of fluid mechanics.”

Zhou Yan gave her a thumbs up. “Smart.”

The audience in the live broadcast room was almost dumbfounded.

Wasn’t it just a flop?

Why was it so high-level? !

Xiang Yi weighed the rock in her hand. It had to be said that Zhou Yan had chosen the rock very well, and it felt extremely good.

The girl used her thumb and thumb to pinch the rock, and her index finger was behind it. Seeing her gesture, Zhou Yan called out to the professionals, “Hey, you’re an expert!”

Xiang Yi smiled calmly and slowly bent down. Her posture was elegant and casual. She did not seem to use much strength as she used her index finger to move the stone. However, the stone was thrown out by her with an extremely strong force!

“Bang!”

“Bang!”

“…”

After more than ten consecutive sounds, the stone “Plopped”into the water!

Zhou Yan: ? ?

The audience: ? ?

Was it an illusion? It had to be? !

Xiang Yi let out an “OH”as if she was not satisfied with her results. She took out a spare rock and threw it again!

The familiar “Bang Bang”sounds once again dominated everyone!

This time, it was a total of twenty-three times!

Zhou Yan was dumbfounded.

Recalling what he had said just now, “Call Me Big Brother and I’ll teach you.”His toes dug into the soles of his shoes awkwardly, and he wished he could jump into the pond on the spot!

This was F * * king… This was not scientific!

The girl opened her cherry lips lightly, and her voice was gentle. “There was once a professor who summed up a famous equation through the weight and speed of stones, as well as the influence of the air, and other conditions — the formula for water retention.”

Zhou Yan was confused. “Ah?”

The audience was in a trance. [ Xiang Yi is fooling people, right? Is that right? ? ]

She continued, “This equation is: M X A = P something MG + air impact. M represents mass, a represents vertical acceleration, p represents water surface feedback pressure, and Mg represents gravity.

“Through this equation, the research on ‘aircraft icing’has played an important role, and it has also been used in the field of criminal investigation to calculate blood spatter.”

Zhou Yan: ? ? ?

Audience: ? ? ? ?

Excuse me, I’m really sorry.

Is this science?

I’m sorry, I’m not worthy! !

chapters.title: Chapter 751: One-Stop Service (9)
chapters.body:
Chapter 751: One-Stop Service (9)

Zhou Yan: “…”

What did it mean to be struck by lightning for poor posturing?

This was it..

He had been calling out “Big brother” just a moment ago, but he had changed his words in just a moment. “Brother Yi, by God, accept my bow!”

Zhou Yan’s sense of variety was really strong. He immediately cupped his hands at Xiang Yi. “From today onwards, you’re my big brother!”

!!

Xiang Yi: “There’s no need to be so polite…”

“No, no, no, brother Yi, please teach me how to drift!”

Men were able to bend and stretch.

Xiang Yi: “Actually, there’s a little trick. When you throw a stone, try to keep your arm and body at 45 degrees, and keep the angle and level of the stone at 20 degrees…”

…..

In the live broadcast room:

——[ Why did I, who was watching a variety show to relax, actually start taking notes seriously? ]

— [ F&ck, I went to search for it. Xiang Yi’s water-skipping formula is actually true! ]

——[ the world record for water-skipping is 88 bounces? F * ck, what kind of God Is This! ]

——[ there’s actually a competition for water-skipping. She can play more than 20 bounces, which is almost at the level of a professional player. Doesn’t that mean that sister Yi’s water-skipping is at the level of a big shot? ! ]

Everyone:”…”

Sister Yi was so terrifying!

..

Zhou Yan was completely convinced by her. On the way back, he kept calling her brother Yi. He couldn’t wait to become sworn brothers at Rabbit Manor on the spot.

The two of them picked some seasonal fruits and came back. Zhou Yan volunteered to wash them and brought them out not long after.

When he saw Xu Rendong, who was so weak that he could fall down with a gust of wind, even though his reason told him to stay away from her, he couldn’t control his feet and walked up to Xu Rendong..

“Here, try the freshly washed fruit.”Considering Xu Rendong’s mysophobia, he added, “I washed it twice!”

Xu Rendong’s eyes were filled with shock. “Only twice?”

That doubt came from the bottom of his heart, and he blurted it out.

Zhou Yan’s mouth twitched. “What else?”

Xu Rendong opened his mouth and wanted to say something, but he hesitated. He raised his hand and picked up a peach. His fingertips gently caressed it, but he could not bear to eat it. He asked hesitantly,

“Did you use fruit and vegetable detergent? Or did you use baking soda starch? Or did you soak it in salt water?”

Zhou Yan:”…”

He stared at Xu Rendong expressionlessly for a few seconds, then forcefully snatched the peach back and took a bite.

The Peach’s juice was full and sweet and delicious. He narrowed his eyes in enjoyment and mumbled, “Don’t make things difficult for yourself. I’ll eat it for you.”

Xu Rendong’s expression was even more shocked. “You’re eating everything I touch without even washing it? !”

Zhou Yan:”…”

Zhou Yan shut himself off.

From an outsider’s point of view, this interaction between the two clearly confirmed the rumors of discord!

It was only after he washed the fruit and brought over disposable gloves that Xu Rendong reluctantly put on the gloves and ate some.

However, the taste of the peach was indeed stunning to him.

A certain Germaphobe silently took a few more bites..

Zhou Yan was born with a small sun. He didn’t feel depressed for long before he returned to normal.

“Best actor, I heard that you’re going to be the male lead of director Mu Si! What a coincidence, he asked me to sing the song for the promotion of his movie in China, and the composer is Xu Rendong.”

Shi suipian said politely, “Oh? That’s really fate.”

Behind the camera, Li Jianyu crossed his legs and teased, “You guys can be considered to be working together. From the actors behind the scenes to the promotion, it’s all done!”

At this moment, a staff member hurriedly handed him a cell phone.

On the screen, there was a trending search:

# Xu Rendong plagiarized! #

chapters.title: Chapter 752: What A Handsome And Pretentious Man 1
chapters.body:
Chapter 752: What A Handsome And Pretentious Man 1

1

Zhou Yan: “…”

What did it mean to be struck by lightning for posturing.

This was it..

He had been calling out “Big brother” just a moment ago, but he had changed his words in just a moment. “Brother Yi, by God, accept my bow!”

Zhou Yan’s sense of variety was really strong. He immediately cupped his hands at Xiang Yi. “From today onwards, you’re my big brother!”

!!

Xiang Yi: “There’s no need to be so polite…”

“No, no, no, brother Yi, please teach me how to drift!”

Men were able to bend and stretch.

…..

Xiang Yi: “Actually, there’s a little trick. When you throw a stone, try to keep your arm and body at 45 degrees, and keep the angle and level of the stone at 20 degrees…”

In the live broadcast room:

——[ Why did I, who was watching a variety show to relax, actually start taking notes seriously? ]

— [ F&ck, I went to search for it. Xiang Yi’s water-skipping formula is actually true! ]

——[ the world record for water-skipping is 88 bounces? F * ck, what kind of God Is This! ]

——[ there’s actually a competition for water-skipping. She can play more than 20 bounces, which is almost at the level of a professional player. Doesn’t that mean that sister Yi’s water-skipping is at the level of a big shot? ! ]

Everyone:”…”

Sister Yi was so terrifying!

..

Zhou Yan was completely convinced by her. On the way back, he kept calling her brother Yi. He couldn’t wait to become sworn brothers at Rabbit Manor on the spot.

The two of them picked some seasonal fruits and came back. Zhou Yan volunteered to wash them and brought them out not long after.

When he saw Xu Rendong, who was so weak that he could fall down with a gust of wind, even though his reason told him to stay away from her, he couldn’t control his feet and walked up to Xu Rendong..

“Here, try the freshly washed fruit.”Considering Xu Rendong’s mysophobia, he added, “I washed it twice!”

Xu Rendong’s eyes were filled with shock. “Only twice?”

That doubt came from the bottom of his heart, and he blurted it out.

Zhou Yan’s mouth twitched. “What else?”

Xu Rendong opened his mouth and wanted to say something, but he hesitated. He raised his hand and picked up a peach. His fingertips gently caressed it, but he could not bear to eat it. He asked hesitantly,

“Did you use fruit and vegetable detergent? Or did you use baking soda starch? Or did you soak it in salt water?”

Zhou Yan:”…”

He stared at Xu Rendong expressionlessly for a few seconds, then forcefully snatched the peach back and took a bite.

The Peach’s juice was full and sweet and delicious. He narrowed his eyes in enjoyment and mumbled, “Don’t make things difficult for yourself. I’ll eat it for you.”

Xu Rendong’s expression was even more shocked. “You’re eating everything I touch without even washing it? !”

Zhou Yan:”…”

Zhou Yan shut himself off.

From an outsider’s point of view, this interaction between the two clearly confirmed the rumors of discord!

It was only after he washed the fruit and brought over disposable gloves that Xu Rendong reluctantly put on the gloves and ate some.

However, the taste of the peach was indeed stunning to him.

A certain Germaphobe silently took a few more bites..

Zhou Yan was born with a small sun. He didn’t feel depressed for long before he returned to normal.

“Best actor, I heard that you’re going to be the male lead of director Mu Si! What a coincidence, he asked me to sing the song for the promotion of his movie in China, and the composer is Xu Rendong.”

Shi suipian said politely, “Oh? That’s really fate.”

Behind the camera, Li Jianyu crossed his legs and teased, “You guys can be considered to be working together. From the actors behind the scenes to the promotion, it’s all done!”

At this moment, a staff member hurriedly handed him a cell phone.

On the screen, there was a trending search:

# Xu Rendong plagiarized!

chapters.title: Chapter 753: What A Handsome And Pretentious Man (2)
chapters.body:
Chapter 753: What A Handsome And Pretentious Man (2)

The song ended.

Zhou Yan felt pretty good about himself and asked everyone expectantly, “How is it? Do I still have some talent in composing?”

“I’ll drink some water to calm down first.”Ying Yi took a small sip of water. “Other people need money to compose, but you compose… For Your Life?”

Shi Sui said, “I heard that you wanted to debut as a singer-songwriter back then? Congratulations on not going astray.”

“It’s not that bad!” Zhou Yan looked at Xu Rendong, who was the only one in the living room who didn’t speak. “Come, great composer, give me an explanation!”

!!

Xu Rendong hesitated for two seconds and said in a low voice, “It’s okay.”

Everyone: ? ? ?

Did Xu Rendong lack a sense of hearing or the ability to appreciate the arts?

…..

——[ If it’s poisonous, just lick it. ]

——[ Now, I greatly suspect Xu Rendong’s professionalism… ]

——[ He plagiarized it! He must have plagiarized Xu Xinyi’s song! Poor Xu Xinyi, not only was his father taken away, but his own blood and sweat has also been stolen! ]

..,

Zhou Yan was like a kindergartener who had received a compliment. “Xu Rendong, I knew you understood me!”

He proudly raised his chin at Xiang Yi and Shi Sui as if he was showing off.

Xu Rendong adjusted his black-rimmed glasses, and his gaze fell on the grand piano in the living room.

“Can I borrow the piano?”

Xiang Yi agreed, “Sure, sure. Do you want me to sterilize it for you first?”

“No, thank you.” Xu Rendong lowered his head shyly. “I’ll do it myself.”

Xiang Yi instantly understood.

The man carefully cleaned the piano, even the pedals and the piano bench.

He stretched out his hands. His fingers were long and fair, like a work of art meticulously carved by God.

He casually and lazily played a melody that was exactly the same as the tune that Zhou Yan had just hummed!

Zhou Yan’s expression changed drastically. The corners of his mouth twitched incessantly, and his expression was rather pained.

“My… My tune… Is it that bad?”

The fact that Shi Sui and Xiang Yi did not cover their ears was already the greatest respect they could give him!

Xu Rendong, who was sitting in front of the piano, seemed to have changed into a different person. He was confident and dazzling.

When he was doing what he was good at, he could overcome his social phobia to a certain extent.

“There’s still hope,” he said.

Xu Rendong thought for more than ten seconds, and then dropped one note after another.

In general, it was still the same melody from before.

But the amazing thing was that the melody unexpectedly became better!

It was just a few minor changes and a few chords added, but it was as if the muse goddess, had kissed his fingertips, giving him an unbelievable miracle!

Zhou Yan listened attentively and even deliberately turned his body so that his right ear was closer to the piano.

Xiang Yi also became interested. She took out a guitar and plucked the strings with her soft white fingers. Based on Xu Rendong’s modifications, she made another version.

“Isn’t it better this way?”

Xu Rendong was flabbergasted.

A bright light burst out of his eyes. It was the look of someone who had found his soulmate!

“Very good! Very good!” Under the stimulation of Xiang Yi, his inspiration also began to burst out. “If it’s a chord, I can make some adjustments, such as this…”

“Try to speed up the beat by half a beat? I think this song is suitable for a relaxed and lively style.”

The two of them looked at each other. One was the piano version while the other was the guitar version. Within half an hour, they had changed the original version of Zhou Yan’s wailing and sawing to an extremely beautiful version!

Zhou Yan: Everything is better now. I feel like I can do it again! ! !

chapters.title: Chapter 754: What A Handsome And Pretentious Man (3)
chapters.body:
Chapter 754: What A Handsome And Pretentious Man (3)

He muttered to himself, “I, Zhou Yan, am a little genius composer!”

Shi Sui: ? ?

The audience: ?

——[Dear, do you have any misunderstanding about yourself?]

——[Hahahaha Baby Yan, the current version is not exactly the same as your version. At the very least, it can be said that it is nothing close to it.]

!!

— [Master tuners are nothing compared to them! Sister Yi and Xu Rendong are literally the god of music cultivators! ! !]

…

After Xiang Yi and Xu Rendong finished their modifications.

…..

Zhou Yan used his phone to record the entire process and said happily, “I want to use this as my ringtone! Brother Yi, you’re too awesome!”

Xiang Yi smiled and did not take credit for it. “It’s Xu Rendong who’s awesome. I modified it based on his foundation, and he modified it based on yours.”

Zhou Yan:”…”

It was a little heart-wrenching.

Xu Rendong, who had always been afraid of society, pursed his lips and said carefully, “Zhou Yan, can you send me a copy?”

Although he knew that the staff would have a recording, after thinking about it, only Zhou Yan was able to open his mouth.

Zhou Yan said loudly, “No problem!”

But when he was about to send it, he realized that he had already blocked Xu Rendong.

Pretending as if nothing had happened, Zhou Yan sent the audio over.

Xu Rendong’s fingertips paused on his profile picture for a moment before he saved the audio.

After using his phone to edit it briefly, he asked Zhou Yan for permission. “Can I post it on Weibo?”

“It’s a small matter, up to you,” Zhou Yan said with a smile.

Not long after, Xu Rendong’s fans received a tweet.

[@Rendong] :

A full stop and an audio file.

The file name of the audio file was called [ composition: Zhou Yan, Xiang Yi, Xu Rendong. ]

The fans had long been used to his way of posting, so they all shared it. Xu Rendong had turned off the comment function, so the fans could only express their feelings in this way.

——[ Ah Ah Ah, finally you! ]

——[Camping in the front row for a better view, Xu Rendong is the GOAT!]

——[F * ck, this is too good to listen to! I feel better after listening to it, and I’ve entered the cycle mode of single songs!]

…

At the same time.

Xu Rendong’s younger brother, Xu Xinyi, saw this Weibo post.

He was overseas, so he did not watch the live broadcast, nor did he care to watch it. In his opinion, the higher Xu Rendong climbed, the better he would be.

As for Zhou Yan and Xiang Yi, he was not familiar with them. He thought they were just Xu Rendong’s friends.

Xu Xinyi’s lips curled up. He thought he had thought of a good plan.

…

With the experience of creating together, Xu Rendong was slightly more open-minded. Gradually, he was able to chat with Xiang Yi.

Xiang Yi found that he had a rich knowledge of music theory. Whether it was classical music or pop music, his basic skills were very solid.

He also had his own unique views on traditional folk music and opera.

“I think combining rap and opera will be a new trend…” Music was Xu Rendong’s passion, and his eyes always lit up when he talked about it.

Zhou Yan: “I can rap!”

He improvised a freestyle.

Xiang Yi also tried to hum a part.

Xu Rendong’s eyes lit up even more.

His brain, which was originally exhausted, was now like a dry well, suddenly filled with a great swamp!

Inspiration! Endless inspiration was pouring in desperately!

He took out a notebook from his bag and quickly recorded the score.

…

At the same time.

Xu Xinyi updated a new dynamic.

[@Xu Xinyi : So taking a step back is not the vast sky, but the end of the cliff. @Rendong, this song is clearly mine, why would my brother sign the names of you and your friends?]

chapters.title: Chapter 755: What A Handsome White Lotus 4
chapters.body:
Chapter 755: What A Handsome White Lotus 4

After posting on Weibo, he was satisfied with the copywriting. He felt that his Weibo post was too good.

It was pitiful, and he was retreating in order to advance.

He even hinted that he had been robbed more than once or twice.

This time, he had to fight a beautiful comeback!

However, after a few minutes, Xu Xinyi refreshed the software and saw the following comments:

!!

——[ What is that? Say it again ]

——[ A thief calling out a thief? That’s too funny, hahaha ]

——[ It’s just a rotten melon. Everyone, disperse. This Xu Xinyi doesn’t look very smart. ]

——[ What a beautiful… Ahem, a handsome and pretentious man. He’s quite a good-looking person. Why can’t he be a mute? ]

…..

Xu Xinyi: ? ? ?

Are these netizens crazy?

Why aren’t they speaking up for him?

They even turned around and scolded him!

Xu Xinyi was furious. Just as he was about to pretend to be pitiful with the netizens, he received a video call from his mother.

The call was connected.

“Are you an idiot!?! Didn’t I tell you that if you endure for a few more years, everything in the Xu family will belong to you!?! Why are you so eager for instant success and instant benefits!?! If you want to scheme against Xu Rendong, you have to consider if you have the ability to do so! But now, you’ve backfired by scheming against yourself and even left me behind. I regret having a son like you!”

When he found out about the composition of this song, Xu Rendong felt as if he had been struck by lightning. He hurriedly deleted his Weibo post.

Unfortunately, it was too late. Screenshots of that Weibo post had already been taken by countless people and became evidence that cannot be erased!

…

In the living room.

When Li Jianyu saw this Weibo post, he was completely dumbfounded.

What was going on?

When did this song become Xu Xinyi’s?

Ruan Qing also saw it, and her red lips lightly clicked her tongue. “This isn’t how you court death.”

Li Jianyu still hadn’t reacted. “Wasn’t this song written by Zhou Yan? Xiang Yi and Xu Rendong composed it twice.”

“…”

Ruan Qing looked at him quietly for a while before she patted Li Jianyu’s head. Her eyes were filled with pity. “You must have used up all your luck meeting Xiang Yi and best actor Shi.”

Li Jianyu was even more confused. However, he felt that what Ruan Qing said made sense. He chuckled foolishly. “Not at all. Half of it was meeting them, and the other half was meeting you.”

Ruan Qing:”…”

She sighed and shook her head helplessly.

‘Forget it, forget it. I was the one who decided to make him my boyfriend. I’ll just treat him as a fool.’

…

Zhou Yan and Xu Rendong were both northerners. After asking them about their preferences, they decided to make dumplings for dinner.

Making dumplings was a rather troublesome task for an ordinary family.

The process of making the filling and wrapping them up was extremely long and tedious.

But it was a piece of cake for Xiang Yi.

The girl used two knives to chop the meat and vegetables. She was so fast that she almost left afterimages.

After mixing three different fillings, she brought them to the coffee table in the living room. Everyone wrapped the dumplings together, and even Li Jianyu and Ruan Qing came over to help.

Everyone wrapped the dumplings in all kinds of shapes. There were simple triangles and ingots, but there were also complicated crescent moons, willow leaves, and goldfish.

Everyone except Xiang Yi ended up in a miserable state.

However, when it came to making dumplings, the most important thing was to participate.

Zhou Yan really wasn’t good with his hands. He even failed to make a few dumplings. He was clamoring for a beginner’s guide. He took out his phone and was about to search for a video when he saw the trending search for Xu Rendong’s plagiarism.

He was furious. “Xu Rendong, your pretentious brother is causing trouble again.”

Xu Rendong frowned. Every time he wrapped a dumpling, he wished he could wipe his hands with a wet towel. When he heard this, he asked blankly, “I have a brother? Who is he?”

chapters.title: Chapter 1067: Premonition
chapters.body:
Chapter 1067: Premonition

Crimson.

The dark cloud above his head had turned crimson, covering the sky endlessly.

Not only the sky, but even the sea was red, rolling and undulating while exuding scorching heat as if it was boiling. The air was filled with suffocating breath.

“This is our destination?” Chen Rui asked when he saw the Water Elemental King Lambost looking a little shocked.

“Yes.” Lambost came back to his senses, and the surprise in his eyes gradually settled down, “But, I still guessed something wrongly; I was already wrong back then.”

Chen Rui rarely saw such a solemn expression on Lambost. He asked, “What’s the matter?”

“I didn’t expect that not only the mutation of the water element, but also the danger level of this Double Teeth Sea Area is countless times stronger than what I expected back then, no, before I came here.” Lambost said solemnly, “If your friends are really trapped here, I’m afraid things don’t look great. If we leave now, it’s still not too late, otherwise even you will be trapped in it. “

“Since I decided to look for them, I will not make other choices. I can sense that at least one friend is still alive, and I will not abandon her.” Chen Rui glanced at Lambost, “I don’t know if it’s an illusion. The danger to Your Highness should be higher here, but Your Highness doesn’t seem to want to leave?”

“The only thing I can hope for right now, or ‘extravagant hope’, is that it’s an ‘illusion’ – Hope my feeling is wrong.” Lambost did not deny it, “This is not about accompanying you to find your friends. Just that I myself have to figure out the real secrets contained in this sea area.”

“Then, let’s continue together.” Chen Rui nodded.

The environment here was completely different from the outer area just now. The sea contained powerful strange powers and uncontrollable aggressive water element, which were even more terrifying than lava. Not to mention diving into the bottom of the sea, they were under heavy attacks when even sailing on the water. Meanwhile, the sky felt even more dangerous. The red color emanating from the clouds implied more terrifying power like intangible reefs. A slight carelessness would erupt a chain of dangers. The higher the altitude, the higher the danger.

Therefore, the Aqua Water Ship did not transform into a seahawk or a swimming fish this time, but into another form.

This was a slender figure. The most notable feature was that the 3 pairs of feet were very long, especially the middle and hind feet, which were like spiders. When it landed on the sea, there were circles of tiny ripples, but it didn’t seem to touch the sea water at all. When it moved forward lightly, it slid dozens of meters away.

Chen Rui immediately remembered a certain kind of water insect he saw by the pond when he was a child, and the local name was ‘water spider’. But when he grew up, he learned that the real water spider was another kind of insect which was called ‘water strider’. After crossing over to this other world, he occasionally saw similar insects, but he didn’t pay attention. Now when he saw the transformation of the Aqua Water Ship that was activated by Lambost, he couldn’t help but sigh.

Of course, now was not the time to study these principles. Chen Rui’s attention was all focused on the eerie sea area nearby.

After the Aqua Water Ship slid for a while, the suffocation in the air became stronger and stronger. They were apparently approaching some kind of power in the sea area.

The sea ahead began to boil violently. A stream of water flow suddenly burst out and rushed toward the Aqua Water Ship.

Looking carefully, this was not a ‘water flow’. Instead, it was emitting a steaming mist on the outside while the inside was a blood-colored light. A long trajectory like a tail extended out of the mist. Lambost instinctively had a very dangerous omen. The water elemental heart told him that even if he was an elemental king who had special abilities that surpassed ordinary Demon Overlord or even super-level, once he was hit by the power of this kind of thing, he would immediately collapse and die.

Race: Blood soul

Comprehensive Strength Assessment: SS

Physique: SS, Strength: SS, Spirit: SS, Speed: SS.

Attribute: Immortality, soul-snatching.

Danger level: Low.

Chen Rui saw the data of this thing from the [Analytical Eyes]. With a flick of his finger, a sharp wind easily smashed the incoming blood soul away. Soon, the data became so dense that it was almost impossible to display it individually. The Aqua Water Ship had been surrounded by blood souls appearing in all directions.

Not all of them were at the Kingdom Level. There were many at the Demon Overlord and Demon Emperor, and the number was very large. That kind of ‘soul-snatching’ attribute, which made the Super System frequently alarm, was obviously a strange power that invaded one’s soul.

So many powerful blood souls. If they were in the ordinary place of the Demon Realm, it was impossible to imagine. In Chen Rui’s cognition, only the Ghastly Floating Land could be compared with it. Who knew what place this Crimson Double Teeth Sea Area exactly was.

A single blood soul was not very dangerous for Chen Rui at the peak stage of the Demi-God level. Even at the Kingdom Level, the danger level was not high. However, there were so many blood souls in front of them, and there was the Water Elemental King beside him. Therefore, Chen Rui had to be cautious.

Chen Rui raised his hands slowly while exuding bursts of chills. He activated the power of [Winter Territory] again. The blood souls were frozen in the air. The boiling sea gradually stagnant. The freezing began to spread around the Aqua Water Ship.

This time, Chen Rui clearly sensed a different resistance from the previous outer edge. Although the range of hundreds of meters was frozen by the cold power of the [Winter Territory], the range could no longer be expanded. Under this solidification, there was an agitated and terrifying force.

The restless power became stronger and stronger as the ice surface began to show cracks. Chen Rui frowned. When his open palms suddenly clenched into fists, all the frozen things, including the blood souls, burst open.

The whole seawater seemed to be emptied; it was only refilled by the surrounding seawater the next moment.

However, the sea began to boil again. Countless blood souls reappeared and encircled them again.

Chen Rui frowned. Unexpectedly, even [Winter Territory] could not completely eliminate the blood souls. The breath around him changed again. There was a strange vitality in the boiling sea water. Even Lambost felt that the power that he had lost before quickly recovered.

On the contrary, the blood souls, which were the crimson core wrapped in mist, were mixed with a special power, which immediately destroyed the original balance. The whole thing burst open and turned into nothingness.

Lambost was secretly surprised. As the Water Elemental King, he knew very well that this was not an ordinary water element or light element treatment but another type of powerful law power.

“Creation!” Lambost said the word in surprise. This Chen Rui actually has both creation and destruction law power. Judging from that kind of law power, it seems to be quite close to origin?

The [Spring Territory] that combined creation power had a much stronger targeted effect on the blood souls than destruction power. Consequently, the blood souls close to the [Spring Territory] dissipate one after another.

It was a pity that the power of these blood souls seemed to be endless as they were constantly reborn from the sea and rushed toward them. Chen Rui’s [Spring Territory] was tyrannical, but the opponent’s frenzy attack regardless of casualties also gradually consumed his power bit by bit. If it went on like this, he would eventually be exhausted.

“We should have entered some kind of special kingdom. If we don’t defeat the source, these things will be reborn infinitely.” Lambost saw the key and looked up at the sky. “If I guessed correctly, the source should be there. “

Chen Rui raised his head following the Water Elemental King’s gaze. He looked at the endless red cloud and took a deep breath, “Got it.”

With that said, his figure had already appeared in the air, and his body was burning with violent breath. In the shouting, countless winding and huge Scorching Dragons flew out. The charging energy was like a deafening roar that flew toward the sky of crimson clouds.

[Scorching Dragon Roar]!

This blow [Scorching Dragon Roar] carried the pure and powerful power of destruction law. It seemed to span through the distance and space as it rushed straight to the red cloud.

Chen Rui frowned. When the Scorching Dragons approached the crimson clouds, the great impact didn’t even move the crimson the slightest as if it was a stone slab.

Then, the Scorching Dragons quickly dimmed before disappearing in the blink of an eye.

Lambost sighed. The [Scorching Dragon Roar] just now was almost equivalent to the strongest strike at the Demi-God Level, but it couldn’t even shake the crimson clouds.

“Unfortunately, it seems that my guess is correct. It is impossible to break through here. Follow the Aqua Water Ship and try to escape. I will cover you.”

Chen Rui glanced at Lambost unexpectedly. The Water Elemental King shook his head and smiled, “I’m not Moore, our friendship has not yet reached the stage of life and death together, but the situation is very critical now, I can’t rely on myself alone to escape. The discovery here today is very important. If you manage to escape, be sure to tell Moore about it right away; he’ll understand.”

Chen Rui waved his hand, defeated the blood souls approaching Lambost, and shook his head, “It’s not time for despair yet.”

“The strength of the enemy has far surpassed that of Demi-God.” Lambost was calm as he slowly rose into the air, “You should know that for the elements, death is just another way of existence. Not to mention that the Elemental King will not really die. After a few years, there will be a new king. Compared with life and death, it is more important to pass on what you have seen and heard today. If possible, I hope you will hand over the water origin fragment to the next Water Elemental King .”

“Demi-God’s power is really no longer effective.” Chen Rui didn’t look at the Aqua Water Ship under his feet. He just looked up at the sky, “Lambost, I don’t know what your guess is, but I have a hunch that I will meet some kind of ‘acquaintance’. I didn’t expect a ‘reunion’ so soon. Let’s see if it is 1 of those 2 ‘old friends’ or the third ‘new friend’.”

The Water Elemental King was about to speak, but his elemental heart suddenly felt a shocking breath emanating from Chen Rui’s body. The breath instantly surpassed the initial Demi-God level.

The next second, his vision was full of bright purple light.

A low voice came from the figure in the bright starlight, “[Invade Like Fire]!”

The ‘destruction’ law power in the elemental heart’s perception had undergone an indescribable fusion. In the blink of an eye, it had stacked to a level that surpassed the perception of the elemental heart.

No, this is no longer law!

Lambost was startled, “Might!”

In the starlight, a crimson light rushed straight to the sky.
