There was no astonishing momentum or extraordinary speed. Although it was just a bland blow, before it got close, the crimson clouds that were like an immovable rock quickly rolled up.

The red light pierced into the crimson clouds. Lambost heard the sound of something breaking from the sky. Explosions and vortexes kept appearing in the boiling sea water. The blood souls collided with each other like headless flies as the entire sea area space shook.

The shaking of the sea area far exceeded the general tsunami. The Water Elemental King felt that his vision was distorted as everything became blurred. He could only sense with the elemental heart that some kind of displacement had appeared in the space.

When Lambost’s vision recovered, he found that the surrounding scene had changed. A suffocating and oppressive force rushed to his face.

It was no longer the endless sea and sky. 2 islands shaped like teeth could be seen in the distance, facing each other far away.

In the sky, the crimson clouds were still dense, but there was a deep hole that could not be closed for a while. It was caused by the blow just now.

It was this blow that brought the 2 of them to their true destination.

Lambost had never been to this place. He just barely sensed the existence of the 2 islands with the weak feedback from the water element.

The dazzling light in the air had converged into the armor that faintly emitted brilliance. The owner of the armor slowly landed beside him.

Lambost’s gaze on Chen Rui was different. In the situation just now, Demi-God’s strength will definitely not be able to break through the space. It is indeed a real might. It turns out that this Chen Rui is not Demi-God but Pseudo-God!

Pseudo-God is already the peak existence in the world. In terms of qualifications, a Pseudo-God already has the ability to approach God.

No doubt as Earth Elemental King Moore said, this is a Pseudo-God’s inheritor. I just didn’t expect that the speed of accepting inheritance would actually be so fast.

Moreover, he is not just at the early stage of the Pseudo-God. Judging from the power of the strike that pierced the crimson clouds, he should have reached the intermediate stage of the Pseudo-God.

However, Lambost was not in the mood to think about Chen Rui’s strength now. He was looking at his feet.

Underneath was sea water – Boiling sea water.

However, this was no longer ordinary ‘water’ but a high-temperature lava. The fiery torrent was filled with dangerous destruction breath.

In the torrent close to the island, there was a faint reflection of crystals. If one looked closely, these were flower-like things. They floated up and down in the terrifying torrent that was enough to melt metal as if they grew in this torrent.

TL: The third ruler of the Abyss?

chapters.title: Chapter 1068: Despair Main Altar
chapters.body:
Chapter 1068: Despair Main Altar

“Sometimes, it’s not a good thing to have a correct hunch.” Chen Rui saw the anomaly in the sea in the distance, “I don’t know whether to be glad or to sigh. I am meeting an ‘old friend’ again soon in this kind of place.”

“Have you encountered this kind of power before?” Lambost glanced at Chen Rui.

Chen Rui nodded slowly, “It’s not the first time. Not only for me, but for the power I have inherited. They are all ‘old friends’. I can feel that Your Highness is also very sensitive to the Abyss?”

Lambost suddenly remembered that Chen Rui once said that the ancient alchemy civilization was ‘destroyed by a terrifying force’, and it finally dawned on him. Some doubts in his mind were dispelled as he nodded, “Yes, this is a taboo force. This is where that power is projected the most. We can call it the main altar.”

“Main altar!” Chen Rui was shocked. He had come across 2 main altars, hate and fear, in the human world. I didn’t expect that the Demon Realm also has a main altar. Since it is the main altar, it must be unique to the 3 rulers. This should be the main altar of the 3rd ruler- despair!

“You know about the main altar?” Lambost was surprised.

“As I said, ‘they’ and I are old friends.” Chen Rui shrugged, “Not long ago, I destroyed 2 main altars in the human world, and I also destroyed the plot of Quilliana in the elf tribe. I believe whether it’s Hatred Lord or Fear Lord, their memory of me is still fresh. This place should be ‘Despair’ then.”

“You actually destroyed the 2 main altars of hate and fear!” Lambost was shocked again. He knew better than anyone what the main altar meant to the rulers of the Abyss.

“I got Moore’s earth origin fragment from the Fear Main Altar, but at that time it was with the help of the Holy Church’s Supreme Angel Raphael; as for Hatred Main Altar… Your Highness should still remember that you gave me the water source power last time?”

“So you used ”Cosmos Annihilation’.” Lambost realized.

“To be precise, it’s ‘Cosmos Annihilation’, plus Raphael’s ‘Brilliant Thunder of Light’.” Chen Rui looked at the vast sea area, “The 2 main altars are underground, and there were buildings like bone towers and altars. It seems to be very different from this ‘Despair Main Altar.”

“Bone tower? It turns out that the 2 main altars you have experienced are in the primary form. They should not have been built for a long time, or they haven’t passed some special ritual to advance to this…” Lambost’s gaze gradually became solemn, “Although it has not yet reached its full final form, it is almost complete. No wonder, from the Miro Sea Area’s maze, no living creatures can be seen both on the sea surface or the bottom of the sea.”

“You mean…”

“All living creatures have been sacrificed. This place was originally supposed to be a kingdom of the far sea, ruled by some kind of sea demonic beasts with a huge life force, but now it’s all turned into the power of the Abyss.” Lambost looked at the 2 teeth-like islands in the distance, “The 2 islands should all be solidified from the sacrificed bones, which is the final form of the bone tower you said will develop into.”

Chen Rui’s heart trembled. Those 2 islands are actually made of bones. It can be imagined how many souls died. Compared with this, the Lich King’s practice of turning all the demon beasts in the nearby sea area into the undead at the Land of Hatred is simply dwarfed.

Chen Rui took a deep breath, “If the final form of the main altar is completed, what will happen?”

“The ruler will break the seal and descend directly to this world with the endless power of the Abyss.” Lambost stared at the crimson sky. With these few words, the hole previously pierced through by Chen Rui had been restored.

“The original body of the ruler?” Chen Rui was shocked. I didn’t expect that the ultimate form of the main altar would be like this! Even without the incident of Olypheus and others, I must not sit idly by.

Once the Abyss Ruler descends, then with this sea area as the center, the terrifying destruction will spread rapidly until it engulfs the entire Demon Realm.

Thinking of this situation, Chen Rui’s face couldn’t help oozing cold sweat, “Without further ado, let’s destroy this place immediately. In my experience, we should first destroy the 2 islands that function like bone towers.”

“Yes.” Lambost frowned. The Aqua Water Ship turned into a crown and appeared above his head, “I can’t help you with my current power. I can only provide some technical advice. If there is any situation, you don’t have to worry about it and just unleash all your power. I need to remind you that you have to be mentally prepared to face Dillosro. In this state of the main altar, even if he can’t project the full real body, it is closer to the existence of the original body. It is far from what the average avatar can compare.”

“It turns out that Despair Lord’s name is Dillosro.” Chen Rui nodded, “I will give him the same gift as Quilliana and Sosbach!”

With that said, Chen Rui had already shifted toward 1 of the islands, but after shifting several times, he always kept the same distance from that island.

“This is the power of space dislocation. Don’t forcefully shift. Otherwise, you will be exiled to a space far away from here, and it will be difficult to come back.” Lambost spoke up, and a little crystal light appeared in his hand. When the crystal light spread, crisscrossing patterns suddenly appeared in the air. The patterns were ever changing, “All I can do is make little marks. Pay attention to the pattern and gaps of those space changes.”

Due to the interference of the surrounding power, the crystal lights were rapidly weakening, but Chen Rui had used the precious opportunity to spot the gaps formed by those dislocated spaces. The change of these gaps was extremely fast, which meant that the space near the island was divided into layers of ‘doors’ that were constantly changing, making it impossible for people to shift closer.

“[Swift As Wind]!”

Lambost felt that he was being pulled by a power. Before he could react, he had passed through the intricated gaps in a flash and appeared before the island.

It wasn’t a straight line shuttle just now, but a high-speed dodging movement in the countless overlapping spaces that were moving. To be precise, there were countless broken lines and curves, but the speed was actually faster than a straight line.

Speed might! Lambost secretly marveled.

The high-temperature lava was boiling around, and crystal-clear Flowers of Abyss floated in it, emitting a beautiful and enchanting light. The air was transpiring with an extremely oppressive breath. Ordinary strength couldn’t be exerted here at all.

The originally vague island finally became clear, and it looked quite huge. It was opposite the other one in the distance. Lambost is right. This island is made of countless bones. I don’t know how many souls have been sacrificed. The pressure it exudes is stronger than any main altar I have seen before.

Chen Rui was most concerned about the safety of Olypheus and others. I don’t know where they are. With the special attribute of spiritual link, I can perceive the existence of the linker if they are close. Also, star conferrer can directly keep the people within the corresponding range into the Star Conferring Platform.

However, the space power here is intricate and complicated. Perhaps because of the distance, I cannot sense the existence of Olypheus. The only good thing is that her link is still valid, which means that she has not died. However, it is unpredictable for Adeline, Helen and Lalaria.

Chen Rui’s mood suddenly became somber. No matter what, the 2 bone islands must be destroyed first!

The starlight all over his body shone as stars appeared in the air. 7 huge white light balls shot toward the bone island. The light balls seemed to be connected by some invisible thread, bursting apart the moment they touched the bone island.

This kind of connection was equivalent to a double buff structure where the power of the overall explosion was several times or even more than that of a single one.

[7-star Explosion]!

In the successive explosions, the bone island was blown up with a large gap. Debris flew all over, and a dent with a diameter of about 200 meters appeared in front of him. However, this range was far smaller than Chen Rui’s expectations. For the entire Bone Island, it was just the tip of the iceberg.

If it was that kind of bone tower, with a blow at the level of Chen Rui’s Pseudo-God, it would definitely be shattered. It seemed that this kind of bone island was much stronger than the bone tower.

Chen Rui was about to attack again when he felt a huge suction force coming from the gap. The Pole Star Kingdom power actually rushed out uncontrollably, and it was quickly sucked up by the gap. More precisely, it was the faith power and life force in the kingdom. What happened later was even more surprising. Perhaps due to devouring the faith and life force, the collapsed debris actually re-gathered and flew back to the bone island. The previous gap was restored to its original state in the blink of an eye.

Chen Rui was surprised when he found that he couldn’t suppress this devour. At this time, the Flowers of Abyss in the lava flew up and began to rapidly merge in the air. A huge ‘face’ appeared in front of him. His eyes were shining with blood-like luster. The whole sea of lava started to boil.

“Retreat quickly!” Lambost’s anxious voice sounded from behind, “It’s Dillosro!”

With that said, Chen Rui felt a pain in his head, feeling that his soul had been hit hard by a terrifying might. He was involuntarily knocked back.

With Chen Rui’s current soul strength after activating [Purple Pole Star Transformation], he was already equivalent to the intermediate stage Pseudo-God or even more than that, but he couldn’t completely resist the power of this blow. He just felt a sharp headache, and he had been gravely injured. This was still after being partly offset by the Super System.

The power of this blow was continuous. The strange spirit power penetrated into Chen Rui’s soul like tentacles, but it disappeared in an instant, because Chen Rui was wearing the Wrath King Armor which was immune to spiritual erosion.

Spiritual erosion and soul shock were 2 concepts. Although the power of subsequent erosion was resisted, he still endured the previous soul shock. Chen Rui hadn’t recovered from the headache. The Flowers of Abyss on the sea surface under his feet rose out again. In the blink of an eye, it had formed a huge palm that grabbed Chen Rui’s body and quickly dragged him back.

Almost at the same time, the face opened its mouth wide and swallowed the entire palm, along with Chen Rui inside.

TL: This is the stronger Abyss Ruler he faces so far, and there is no powerful ‘ally’ like he was in the human world, so what’s the plan?

chapters.title: Chapter 1069: Escape
chapters.body:
Chapter 1069: Escape

This scene shocked the Water Elemental King Lambost. Unexpectedly, Chen Rui, who had reached the level of Pseudo-God, was defeated so quickly!

After that giant face swallowed Chen Rui, his eyes were set on the Water Elemental King as if he had seen some enemy. His murderous intention surged.

This kind of gaze alone made Lambost unbearable, and his body had a tendency to collapse, but the gaze of the Water Elemental King was extremely calm. He stared directly at those blood-red eyes without caring about life and death at all. Instead, there was a hint of contempt.

The giant face was about to destroy Lambost when it trembled suddenly. The blood-red eyes suddenly turned purple, faintly shining brightly.

Immediately afterward, countless starlights burst out. All the Flowers of Abyss that made up the whole face vanished under the starlight, and Chen Rui’s figure reappeared in front of Lambost’s eyes.

Now Chen Rui’s expression was full of caution. The intensity of that soul shock was beyond imagination. He had suffered a serious injury. Since there was no time for treatment, he could only temporarily suppress the injury.

It seemed that the main altar, which was close to the complete form, was far from what he had encountered before. Dillosro’s projection was already closer to the existence of the original body, and his strength was quite astounding.

“This is just Dillosro’s phantom with only a small part of the avatar’s power. The real projected avatar should still be in a state of sleep to fully absorb the power of the main altar in order to complete the ritual of the original body’s descent! The bone islands must be destroyed!”

Chen Rui was even more surprised by Lambost’s voice. This is only part of the power of projection!

A terrifying blood-colored wave stirred up in the sea area, and the Flowers of Abyss regrouped and reassembled into the form of Dillosro. This time, it was not only the face, but also half of the body and arms. When he raised his hand, blood waves with massive power rushed toward Chen Rui in all directions.

Lambost sensed that this blood wave contained a might similar to ‘corrosion’, which was Dillosro’s special ability. It was capable of destroying and disintegrating the power of the kingdom.

“[Unshakable Like Mountain].” Chen Rui also felt the threat of the blood waves. He grunted, and the starlight around him seemed to solidify, forming an intangible force field that protected himself and Lambost in it.

No matter how the power of the blood wave surged, the starlight remained absolutely motionless.

When the impact of the blood waves became stronger and stronger, the solidified starlight seemed to be unable to resist it and it collapsed. At this moment, everything became blurred. With Lambost’s eyesight, he could no longer see clearly. He could only sense with his elemental heart. Those high-speed purple lights drew countless shining terrifying arcs with a special rhythm. The power continued to stack up.

Whirlwind! No, a whirlwind of this magnitude should be called a storm.

[Purple Pole Star Storm]!

The approaching blood wave was knocked back by the [Purple Pole Star Storm], and a huge vortex formed in the nearby sea area. Dillosro’s body was immediately divided into countless fragments as the storm continued to roll toward the bone island.

The outer edge of the bone island was continuously ground off under this storm, and it had shrunk by the size of 1 circle in the blink of an eye.

By the time the storm subsided, the huge island had been reduced by a third of its volume. However, it was still useless. The strange power that devoured faith and life appeared again, and it soon returned to its original state.

Following [7-star Explosion] and [True Red Extinction], [Purple Pole Star Storm] was in vain again!

Looking at this situation, even if the last killing move [Dimension Destruction] was activated, it would not work.

Chen Rui gasped slightly. Although [Purple Pole Star Transformation] is far superior to [Red Pole Star Transformation], it is not endless. The previous continuous attack and defense have consumed a lot of Star Power. The most important thing is that it is impossible to do any real damage to the main altar.

Lambost exclaimed in surprise, “The 2 bone islands should have complementary special effects. Unless they are destroyed at the same time, there will be no real damage.”

A sense of powerlessness surged in Chen Rui’s mind. I can’t destroy even one, let alone two. Not to mention Dillosro’s phantom is still in front of me.

He suddenly found that Lambost’s voice was extremely weak. As he looked back, he saw that the Water Elemental King’s body had become thinner, and his life force was rapidly weakening. It seemed that he had suffered a lot of damage just now.

The ‘Purple Pole Star Emperor’ had already spent a lot of energy just now, and the injuries he suffered from the previous soul shock started to flare up again. Chen Rui knew that he couldn’t do anything today. He thought quickly and shouted, “Lambost, don’t use your strength to resist. I will take you away with the Tower of Glory!”

Lambost immediately withdrew all his strength. With a flash of light, he was kept in the Tower of Glory.

While keeping Lambost, the [Star Gate] had already appeared in front of Chen Rui. At this time, the phantom of Despair Lord torn apart by the [Purple Pole Star Storm] condensed again. A powerful soul wave erupted again which was the might of the soul shock that previously hit Chen Rui.

Chen Rui’s figure instantly became transparent. The intangible soul shock’s might was reflected back inconceivably. Dillosro’s body shook as cracks appeared in his giant face. Blood-red lava was flowing out of those cracks. After healing, the enemy was gone as the light door gradually dimmed and disappeared.

After a few seconds, at another place.

Chen Rui’s figure appeared in the light door. Lambost reappeared as the light flickered, and the purple starlight on Chen Rui quickly dimmed.

“Your injury is not light.” Lambost glanced at Chen Rui, “It’s Dillosro’s soul might which is very powerful. It can also cause terrifying erosive power. Fortunately, you are not affected by erosive power. Only your soul has been traumatized to a certain extent. The recovery of the soul is a bit troublesome, unlike ordinary injuries. Unfortunately, my power is greatly depleted, otherwise I should be able to help you recover quickly.”

“I’m fine.” Chen Rui saw that Lambost was in a bad situation, “How is your injury?”

“Not dead yet.” Lambost shook his head, “Your ability is astonishing. In that kind of kingdom, you can actually escape easily. This island… is the Miro Sea Area!”

“It’s just a special space skill.” When Chen Rui was in the Miro Sea Area, he had already set up a star point just in case. This star point was reset with the Bloody Empire’s star point that he took back at the last moment. After setting a 3-month period with Satan, the star points of the 3 major empires seemed a bit redundant.

“It can be seen that your condition is not good, let’s treat our injuries first.” A crystal crown appeared on Chen Rui’s head, exuding a soft and sacred light.

Under the shine of this light, Lambost’s thin body became solid again, and Chen Rui’s own injuries began to recover quickly.

The Crown of Thorns’ [Divine Healing] could fundamentally heal the wounds of the soul and body, promote the power of breeding and regeneration, and had no hidden danger of overdrawing the potential of life. It could be called the most powerful healing.

“The power of the light element? And it is so powerful that even my soul is recovering.” Lambost was greatly surprised, “No, you don’t have the fluctuation of the light element. It’s the effect of the item instead. That crown…”

“It’s called the Crown of Thorns, or perhaps you’ll be more familiar with another name: The Creation Vessel.”

“The Creation Vessel! Is it the container of the creation origin!” The Water Elemental King looked at Chen Rui with a little more shock, “You can actually activate the Creation Vessel so easily?”

“Not only this, but all 3 containers… uhm , recognized me.” Chen Rui shrugged. A glass appeared in his hand, Holy Grail.

“I still remember that you were able to activate 2 artifacts of the 7 royal families at the same time…” Lambost finally nodded solemnly, “I’m basically sure who you are now.”

Chen Rui was startled: Who? The crossover? The Super System? Impossible right?

“You save my life, so I won’t reveal your secret. If you’re worried, you kill me.” Lambost said lightly.

Secret? The more certain the Water Elemental King was, the more curious Chen Rui became. Thinking of Python’s original tone, he vaguely understood that this should be a ‘wonderful’ misunderstanding.

The Water Elemental King’s last words made him laugh, “I now believe that water elemental’s last name is skeptical, my friend Lambost.”

The title of ‘friend’ silenced Lambost for a moment, “As a friend, your adjective should be wise.”

“It’s my pleasure, wise and skeptical water elemental, Lambost.”

Lambost bowed his head slightly, “The same honor, the mysterious descendant? Or the inheritor?”

What mysterious? Chen Rui saw that ‘Don’t be pretentious’ was written on Lambost’s indifferent face, so he shook his head helplessly, “Let’s change the subject. You seem to know much more about the Abyss than I do. Are ‘they’ also the ultimate enemy of the Elemental King?”

“‘They’ are a taboo,” Lambost didn’t deny, “In the sense of existence, they should be the ultimate enemy of the entire world.”

“Then Elemental War…”

Lambost interrupted, “Sorry, I can’t answer this kind of question for you, whether as an Elemental King or as a friend. You’ll understand when you have a complete inheritance or memory.”

“Okay, I was being presumptuous.” Chen Rui didn’t dwell on the topic of this misunderstanding, “If I get the full approval of the 7 great royal artifacts or control all the 7 artifacts, what will happen?”

“I don’t know either.” Lambost shook his head, “Maybe it will be some kind of ending, or maybe some kind of beginning.”

“This is the standard answer for me.” Chen Rui smiled wryly. He had heard similar answers from the Dark Elemental King and Python, but now the Demon Shield, Dark Shadow Cape and Breeze Shadow Boots have all started to accept the analysis of the Super System. The only thing he needed was time. Perhaps there would be an answer after all 7 artifacts were assimilated.

“Well, this is not the time for archaeology or exploration. This time we have failed miserably. I wonder if there is any way to solve that Despair Main Altar?”

Speaking of this, Lambost’s expression immediately became solemn, “Destroy 2 bone islands at the same time, then eliminate the projection of Dillosro. This is the only way!”

Chen Rui’s brows furrowed speechlessly. This is almost a mission impossible.

TL: What if he uses the Star Ship?

chapters.title: Chapter 1070: Weighing
chapters.body:
Chapter 1070: Weighing

Destroy 2 bone islands at the same time, then eliminate the real projection!

Judging from the situation in the first battle just now, this is too difficult.

Even the undying phantom of the Despair Lord was an invincible existence, let alone a projection close to his original form. According to the Water Elemental King, in order to defeat Dillosro, both bone islands must be destroyed. Otherwise, Dillosro’s power would be inexhaustible. There was no chance of victory.

After the destruction of the bone islands, it was equivalent to cutting off Dillosro’s continuous power, which made it possible to defeat him. Not to mention the sturdiness of the bone islands, it also had complementary special attributes. It was almost immortal, unless 2 powerful people with great strength attacked at the same time.

To complete this first step, at least Chen Rui needed to find a powerful helper.

Olypheus and Lalaria were the only 2 daughters of the Dragon Emperor Auglas. If he knew that his daughters were in danger, with the temperament of the Old Dragon Emperor Father-in-law, he would come immediately. The problem was that Auglas was only an early stage Pseudo-God at most, which was far inferior to Chen Rui. Even if he had the strong talent of dragons, he was not strong enough after all. Even if he tried his best, he would not be able to succeed. Letting Auglas come here was equivalent to killing him.

Chen Rui now had a Holy Shadow Orb in hand. He could consider using an avatar to attack at the same time, but the Holy Shadow Orb could only unleash half of the original body’s attack power. Moreover, its power was limited, just like an energy storage battery that would reduce with consumption. In particular, the [Pole Star Transformation] state consumed a lot of power and could not last long.

In the face of the enemy, even his real body could hardly withstand Dillosro’s attack, let alone his avatar.

Chen Rui thought about it, entered the Super System, found Python, and explained the situation.

“Abyss?” Python seemed to reveal a reminiscence expression, “That’s a forbidden curse…”

“Curse?”

“Your kingdom is quite profound.” Python changed the subject, “I can hardly tell the truth of this universe. Even the kingdom of Pseudo-God can only be regarded as a drop in a bucket in front of this power that has vast faith and life.”

“What you feel is only part of this universe.” Chen Rui asked after thinking about it, “Do you want to be a God?”

“Of course.” Python’s eyes were set on Chen Rui as she said indifferently, “Can you make me a God?”

“You once said that the peak stage of power is absolute, but the way to reach the peak stage is relative; there is more than 1 way. I can let you have the faith and God position of this universe. This is not an illusion, but a real God. This should be the best shortcut for you to embark on the road to God.”

“I know your purpose.” Python pondered for a moment, “What if I don’t want to?”

Chen Rui frowned, “You should be very aware of the outcome of the Abyss’ arrival. At that time, even if you can gain freedom, what you will face will be destruction.”

Seeing Python’s indifferent smile, Chen Rui’s heart sank, and he asked unwillingly, “You would rather give up life? You would rather choose to destroy everything? Why?”

Python trembled slightly, and there was an incomprehensible meaning in her eyes, “I just wanted to do this.”

Chen Rui shook his head. This woman’s mentality is simply beyond common sense. Maybe she can really be described with the word ‘crazy’ as she said.

“In your eyes, the reason I haven’t been destroyed is value. You want to fight against enemies like Satan, Sariel or Michael, and you want to protect some people, so you need my strength.” Python said lightly, “The value of my existence is those 2 conditions. You still have not fulfilled 1, so I will not give you any help before that. Even if my soul is annihilated or the whole world turns into nothingness.”

After that, Python gradually faded away.

Maybe this ‘crazy’ woman had her own special story, but these were not in Chen Rui’s consideration. What he was worried about now was the main altar. Python clearly would not make a move, so he had to find another way.

After Chen Rui’s consciousness left the Super System, he adjusted his emotions, “Lambost, do you know some friends in the Pseudo-God level?”

“The Elemental King’s friends… are very few.” Lambost shook his head, “Or you can say a friend is a superfluous term for the elemental king.”

“There are always exceptions, aren’t they?” Chen Rui shrugged, implying that there was one in front of him.

“Maybe. In fact, I just want to try something new. I have a clear purpose. You and Moore are real friends.”

“No doubt it is the skeptical… Uhm , okay, plus wise water elementals. Everything has a start.”

“Let’s talk about serious matters. On the main plane, the elemental king has no other friends of Pseudo-God. The enemies… especially the enemies of the past, there are lots, but most of these people’s lives were submerged in the long river of history.” Lambost hesitated for a while. A little crystal blue light appeared in his hand, and flew toward Chen Rui, “This is for you.”

The blue light was a necklace with a blue bead pendant. The breath seemed to have contained, looking bland.

“What is this?”

“The Water Shadow Pearl. It has a special restraint on Dillosro’s kingdom, but the effect is limited and cannot be completely relied on.”

“Thank you. With this, I’m more confident.”

“You’re too optimistic. Judging from the situation of the main altar just now, the real projection of Dillosro may have reached the level of peak stage Pseudo-God. Unfortunately, my power in this world is too weak, so I can only give you this little help. The premise is that you have to destroy the 2 bone towers first.”

“The projection has reached the level of peak stage Pseudo-God?” Chen Rui was taken aback.

“Dillosro is the weakest among the 3 Rulers.” Lambost’s words shocked Chen Rui again.

“So, aren’t the 3 Abyss Rulers at the God Level?”

“They’re not Gods yet.” Lambost looked at the high sky, shook his head, and didn’t say anymore.

After Chen Rui recovered from the shock, he put the Water Shadow Pearl in his clothes and fell into contemplation.

Putting aside the real strength of the 3 rulers, the most important thing at the moment is the avatar of the Despair Lord. Since the avatar’s strength is peak stage Pseudo-God and is on par with Michael and Raphael, I will definitely not be able to compete with him. There is only 1 month left in the 3-month period with Satan. It’s like facing enemies from both sides..

“The power of the Creation Vessel has healed most of my injuries. Now I’m going to the sea to use the water element power to heal my injuries. It should heal in a day.” Lambost explained before he turned into a stream of water and flew away. He disappeared into the sea, leaving only Chen Rui, who was still contemplating.

Chen Rui’s mind was like flipping through some kind of pictures quickly in search of all kinds of possibilities. Suddenly, there was a flash of light, and the picture was frozen on one thing.

“I think I found a helper, Lambost?” Chen Rui came back to his senses, only to find that the Water Elemental King had disappeared. He pat his head when he recalled Lambost said about curing himself in the sea.

He thought about it and didn’t rush to accomplish something. He just sat down with his knees crossed as he channeled the Star Power to recover.

As time flew by, it was already the next morning when Chen Rui opened his eyes.

At this time, there was a thing in his hand.

A ball shining with crystal light.

Chen Rui took a deep breath, squeezed it with force, and the ball shattered.

The shattered fragments flew up automatically and condensed into a vague human shape in the air.

The human figure became clear in an instant, and his eyes exuded a cold light on Chen Rui.

“I didn’t expect you to actually use this ball, but it is also understandable. At least you made the right choice. Let me confirm, can I say the welcome speech for you joining the Dark Divinity Temple?” This figure was actually Satan!

What Chen Rui crushed was the communication crystal ball that Satan left behind.

Satan was an enemy, and so was Dillosro. It was definitely unwise to be attacked on both sides. It was the best strategy to cooperate with each other and drive away the main enemy.

When in the Fallen Angel Empire, Satan gave him 3 options: Firstly, visit the Mountain Seckred within 3 months; second, crush the crystal ball to join the Dark Divinity Temple; third, 3 months later, Satan would come to the Fallen Fallen Angel Capital to destroy everything.

Now that Chen Rui crushed the crystal ball, Satan’s natural first reaction was that the other party gave in and was willing to join him.

“Sir Satan, don’t get me wrong, I have no intention of joining your Dark Divinity Temple.”

This sentence changed Satan’s facial expression slightly, “This kind of provocative trick is not a wise move. This crystal ball is actually a secret treasure of positioning. I can come at any time. Since you really want to seek death in advance, then I will now give you an annihilation ending.”

“Space positioning? Very good.” Chen Rui was not flustered, “Sir Satan, before you make a certain decision, let me explain that I’m calling you not to provoke you. Instead, I have a very important matter. The nature of this matter far exceeds even the dispute between us.”

“ Hmph , I’ll give you a chance to play tricks as your last word.”

Chen Rui smiled indifferently and was unmoved, “I’m not sure about the trip to the Mountain Seckred, but I have not lost confidence. This is the battle between us, or the controller that will control the world. Whether this person is you or me, it’s after all. Even if it is to be destructed, it’s us, not other beings like…”

“It’s me, not us.” Satan’s mind was extremely agile. He interrupted Chen Rui’s words and said contemptuously, “Okay, now you can tell your tricks to sow discord. You want to make use of me to fight against who?”

“Dillosro.” Chen Rui said a name.

Satan’s gaze suddenly became solemn, and his burning gaze was set on Chen Rui’s face, “What do you want to use this name for?”

“Don’t be too overbearing! To underestimate your opponent is to underestimate yourself.” Chen Rui said sternly, “I just discovered the main altar of Dillosro, plus the main altar is about to complete the final form.”

“Final form?” Satan’s pupils contracted slightly.

“I think, based on Sir Satan’s knowledge, I don’t need to explain more things. My current location is the Dead Sea. I just escaped from that place yesterday. The main altar has 2 bone islands, which must be destroyed at the same time to defeat the entire main altar and the projection of the Despair Lord. I alone cannot destroy 2 bone islands at the same time, so I would like to invite Sir Satan to join hands to deal with the coveting people outside our battlefield.”

“Why should I believe your words?” Satan sneered, “Even if it’s not sowing discord, it may be some kind of trap. I’m not afraid of your damn tricks, but I won’t insult my own wisdom.”

“What if I give you the guarantee from the Water Elemental Messenger?” Lambost’s voice sounded. Chen Rui noticed that Lambost used the self-proclaimed ‘Water Elemental Messenger’ instead of the ‘Water Elemental King’.

“The Water Elemental Messenger…” Lambost’s appearance made Satan finally move.

“I discovered the anomaly in this sea area back then, but I didn’t expect it to be Dillosro’s main altar. The present main altar is about to complete its final form. Once the Ruler’s true body descends, the power of sealing the prohibition will be completely broken. Regardless of what you all want, the only thing you can have at that time is to lose everything.”

” Water Elemental Messenger, or I should call you a projection, I don’t know what kind of friendship you have with that guy. I can not believe him or you.” Satan pondered for a while, showing a solemn expression for the first time, “But I can’t help but trust the things that come out of the mouth of the Water Elemental Messenger about ‘them.’”

TL: Yeah, just the he used Satan to defeat the Abyss lord back then… Python really resembles Isabella’s past self…

chapters.title: Chapter 1071: Betting Agreement
chapters.body:
Chapter 1071: Betting Agreement

The ‘positioning’ function of the secret treasure crystal ball that Satan said was definitely not an alarmist. Soon after, Satan used this positioning to project his avatar in the way of space projection.

It was not only the avatar that came, but the power of the avatar was progressively strengthened, and it soon became a real original body.

Feeling the pressure from the strongest Pseudo-God in the Demon Realm, Chen Rui secretly channeled the Star Power, making his state of mind completely ‘calm’. He spoke up, “Welcome, Sir Satan, this time we will work together to destroy the Despair Main Altar.”

“‘Cooperation’ is not the key word between us, even if we have a common enemy.” As Satan’s eyes locked on Chen Rui coldly, the intangible soul pressure was amplified, Chen Rui clearly sensed Satan’s murderous intention. He had been secretly charging various means of defense and escape. On the surface, he had always remained calm and tranquil like the sea.

“Water Elemental Messenger, we haven’t seen each other for many years.” Satan looked at Chen Rui for a while, withdrew his killing intent, and looked at Lambost.

“We are neither friends nor enemies, so we can be called acquaintances, Sir Satan,” Lambost nodded. “According to the power of this projection, it is not an exaggeration to call you sir.”

Satan set his sights on the Crown of Wave, “Water origin fragment? I seem to have seen it in someone’s hands before.”

Chen Rui had shown the water origin fragment to Satan at the Mountain Seckred. He knew that Satan was already suspicious, and he continued, “This is the treasure that my believer discovered, and that’s the reason I got to know the Royal Highness King.”

Lambost naturally wouldn’t expose him, “No matter what grievances the 2 of you have before, this time I hope everyone can work together to destroy Dillosro’s main altar.”

“Since Water Elemental Messenger is here, I’ll take this opportunity to give you another choice.” Satan looked at Chen Rui with a sneer, “This time, if I eliminate Dillosro first, you will surrender to me, present me with the creation origin law, and join Dark Divinity Temple; if you eliminate Dillosro first, then I…”

“Abandon the plans for Dark Divinity Temple?”

“You don’t have this qualification.” Satan said proudly, “However, I can give you an extra 100 years.”

Chen Rui quickly thought. Satan should have decided this betting agreement on the spur of the moment, and the creation origin should be the key. Although I don’t know why Satan is suddenly so eager to get the creation origin, which he was not really interested in before, it is also an opportunity for me. With my current strength, there is almost no chance of winning if I go to the Mountain Seckred 2 months later. Now in the bet of defeating Dillosro first, I see a glimmer of hope. The Water Shadow Pearl given by the Water Elemental King should also play a role.

“I’m sorry, it’s impossible under this condition!” Chen Rui’s thoughts turned, and he already had an idea. He shook his head resolutely. “It seems that the full creation origin I have at hand is quite valuable to sir, and I do need some time to comprehend the creation might. We might as well change the betting agreement. If I lose, I will show you the full origin power of creation to you. The 3-month period is still the same; if you lose, we will push back the date of the battle for another 10 years. I wonder if Sir Satan has confidence in yourself?”

“Lame little trick. I’m afraid you’ll die at the hands of Dillosro.” Satan snorted, obviously expressing his disdain for the provocation in the last sentence.

In fact, Satan had his own plans. The Book of Destruction was still 1 page short of completeness, and there was still a big gap in trying to barely complete the transfer of faith. Therefore, he had been preparing a secret technique to complement the Book of Destruction by temporarily replacing the incomplete part. At least, he could complete the most important function of stealing faith more smoothly.

Satan was a talented and brilliant person. After feeling the origin power of creation in the Fallen Angel Empire last time, he was inspired by the reverse deduction of the creation origin, which actually gave him an amazing insight into the stagnant comprehension of destruction origin power.

Although Chen Rui looked mysterious, Satan believed that as long as this enemy dared to come to the Mountain Seckred, he had full confidence that he would be annihilated. Nonetheless, after comprehending the great benefits of creation origin in this month’s closed-door training, Satan had the idea of capturing the enemy alive to obtain the creation origin – ‘showing’ the origin power and ‘presenting’ origin were 2 concepts, but for Satan, the significance of creation origin was not possession, but comprehension, so there was not much difference.

For the time being, this person’s life was worth more than death.

However, Pseudo-God powerhouse had his own uniqueness. It was more difficult to capture alive than to kill. Moreover, this man escaped from the hands of Michael and Raphael while obtaining the complete creation origin, which was definitely not a fluke.

When Satan activated the pressure just now, the calmness shown by Chen Rui was not fake. He must be confident to escape from Satan’s hands.

Hence, Satan came up with that betting agreement.

Now that Satan heard Chen Rui’s bargaining, his mind began to move. Although the strength of this guy is hidden at the level of the peak stage of the Demi-God, he should be far inferior to me. If Dillosro’s projection is really close to the final form, then the strength must definitely be higher than this person. I just need to be careful, don’t let him take advantage of it, then it should be a sure win.

“Life and death are destined. I’m not in a hurry, so Sir Satan doesn’t need to worry.”

Lambost looked at Chen Rui, then at Satan before he added, “I also want to see how close this ‘closeness’ to God is.”

There was a twinkle in Satan’s eyes, and he had made up his mind, “Okay!”

Chen Rui nodded, and a faint light appeared in his hand, “Before we go together, in order to protect the integrity of both parties, please sign this equality contract first, sir.”

“Your name is Richard? What’s this condition? Don’t do anything harmful to each other for 10 years? Don’t attack your companion in the cooperative battle? Hmph , ridiculously cautious.” Satan glanced at the content of the contract while showing a contemptuous expression. Then, he waved his hand and signed the contract.

After signing the contract, Chen Rui secretly breathed a sigh of relief, but he knew that in this betting agreement, he still stood at an absolute disadvantage, so he still could not relax at all. He had to judge the situation and seize every possible opportunity.

The strength of the Despair Lord was no trivial matter, especially this terrifying main altar hat was close to the ultimate state, Dillosro was already close to the real body. Chen Rui wanted Lambost to stay, but the Water Elemental King insisted on going with him.

The journey from Miro Sea Area to Crimson Double Teeth Sea Area was still dangerous. Satan’s strength was also revealed at this time. He just activated a little strength to easily get through the maze of Miro Sea Area. Even when Chen Rui activated [Invade Like Fire], he only broke open the kingdom outside the Crimson Double Teeth Sea Area. Meanwhile, with just a wave of hand, Satan canceled the imprisoned space and went directly to the sea area of the main altar.

Looking at the rolling lava under his feet and the bone island in the distance and feeling the suffocation in the air, Satan’s gaze began to become serious.

“This kind of breath is no doubt close to the final form.” Satan didn’t wait for Chen Rui to move. His figure flashed, and he had already appeared in front of a bone island. A dark golden light shone out of his hand toward the bone island.

The nearby lava blood sea was divided by the aftermath due to the light. When the light struck the bone island, it burst open, leaving a huge gap. The power of this casual blow alone was far greater than the killing move that Chen Rui activated with the [Purple Pole Star Transformation] state.

Satan frowned, because he had felt the subsequent loss of faith and life force. In the blink of an eye, the gap had returned to its original shape.

With a thought, Satan appeared in the center of the 2 bone islands, and a powerful momentum burst out from his whole body. With a push of his palms, countless flames erupted instantly with Satan as the center, rolling toward the 2 bone islands. Wherever the flames went, the already extremely hot lava was evaporated by the powerful breath. The entire sea area seemed to be lower.

Satan’s movements were extremely fast. The bone islands were swallowed up in the blink of an eye. In the violent tremor, countless pieces of debris exploded. Chen Rui was shocked; he didn’t even have time to make a move.

At this moment, the Water Elemental King shook his head at Chen Rui, only to see that the fragments soon recovered into the bone islands. Satan’s brows furrowed even tighter not only because of the recovery of the bone islands, but also because of the strange power of rule. Those who attack the bone island would lose considerable faith power and life force, which was the most important basic power of super powerhouses, even for Pseudo-God powerhouses.

“Attack separately!” Satan originally wanted to destroy the 2 bone islands in one go, then eliminate Dillosro to win the betting agreement. Unexpectedly, the strength of the bone island was far beyond imagination. It was very difficult to destroy 2 of them at the same time, and it would cost a lot of faith power and life force. He naturally did not want to let Chen Rui sit on the sidelines and reap the benefits.

Chen Rui knew that the real enemy was still behind, so now he must destroy the bone island first. He immediately flew toward another bone island. Countless purple lights shone. He had activated [Pole Star Transformation] while flying.

“[Swift As Wind]!”

As the 2 words were uttered, the speed of the purple light suddenly accelerated, as if lightning shot directly at the bone island. This speed was extremely astonishing. When Satan caught a glimpse of this scene, his brows were slightly raised, but his attention quickly turned to the front where countless crystal lights solidified into a huge hand, grabbing toward him.

Satan snorted, stretched out his hand and shook. The lava under his feet suddenly vibrated, showing numerous tiny ripples of high-speed vibration as a strong shock force spread out in the air.

Under this power, the giant hand was scattered into countless pieces. This was the special ability that Satan once demonstrated as the avatar in the Ghastly Floating Land. It was similar to the concussive function of a ‘high frequency weapon’. The power launched by the original body now was more than 100 times stronger. The arm of Dillosro’s phantom collapsed in an instant.

After the shock wave smashed the arm, the remaining momentum did not stop. It went straight to the bone island. A large area of the huge bone island immediately collapsed before it slowly recovered again.

This time, the recovery speed of the collapse was much slower than the previous smash. In addition, the faith power and life force absorbed also decreased. The reason was very simple, because the bone island on the other side was attacked by Chen Rui at the same time.

Lambost nodded secretly. The simultaneous attacks of the 2 of them had disturbed the bone island’s balance of the main altar’s power. Even if the bone islands could recover, at this speed, it wouldn’t be long before they would really collapse.

chapters.title: Chapter 1072: The Real Projection And Fire Origin
chapters.body:
Chapter 1072: The Real Projection And Fire Origin

In the Crimson Double Teeth Sea Area, the 2 bone islands were under fierce attacks. Meanwhile, in the center of the lava, a huge figure was also constantly collapsing.

This huge body was Dillosro’s phantom. Facing the 2 enemies, especially Satan, who could easily defeat the phantom, although he could be reborn continuously, his phantom’s power was not enough to prevent the 2 from destroying the bone islands.

The bone islands were still re-condensing, but Chen Rui and Satan could sense that the power of regeneration was weakening. In order to achieve this effect, the 2 had also paid considerable faith power and life force.

With Satan as the main attacker, Chen Rui learned the lesson of attacking the bone island last time, so he did not rashly activate the big move. Instead, he just mainly used ordinary attacks that could merely achieve the effect of damaging and weakening. Facing Dillosro’s phantom, Chen Rui controlled the momentum very well. He was mainly fighting slowly, avoiding frontal contact as much as possible, which put more pressure on Satan on the other side.

Although he could be reborn infinitely, there was a gap in strength after all. Dillosro’s phantom did not bring much resistance to Satan and was easily defeated. In fact, Satan also didn’t activate too much might. Both of them knew very well that the real enemy had not yet appeared.

The power of the bone islands was getting weaker and weaker, “ Boom Boom Boom Boom …” In a few deafening sounds, the bone island in front of Satan was blasted into powder and scattered. The bone island on the other side was also cut into countless pieces by Chen Rui’s [Aura Blade].

This time, neither of the 2 bone islands was restored; they seemed to have been completely destroyed together with Dillosro’s phantom, which shattered into the crystal shards of the Flower of Abyss.

However, Chen Rui and Satan didn’t seem relaxed at all. Instead, they became more cautious because an extremely terrifying breath suddenly appeared in the space. It was continuously spreading out.

The lava in the sea area began to boil violently while the terrifying strong and fiery power surged out. With a ‘whoosh’ , the entire sea area actually turned into a real sea of fire.

Before the flames approached Satan, they were blocked by an intangible force field. However, the tense expression on Satan’s face was not reduced. There was a special might mixed in these flames, which was beyond his expectations. Even with the protection of kingdom power, he still felt the intense burning sensation. In this sea of fire, not only was his strength further suppressed, even the power consumption was far greater than the usual state.

Compared with Satan, the fire element power of the sea of fire had little effect on Chen Rui who had [Fire Phoenix Stigmata] given by his daugther. At this time, the Water Elemental King on the side immediately exclaimed, “Fire element origin! This is the fire origin fragment!”

Chen Rui was surprised. This Crimson Double Teeth Sea Area actually has a fire origin fragment that the Fire Elemental King Ogmarton can’t find anywhere!

This powerful fire environment was the most dangerous place for the Water Elemental King. In the blink of an eye, his body had begun to vaporize. Chen Rui activated the Tower of Glory without hesitation and kept Lambost into it.

“It’s unbelievable. The fire origin fragment is actually here!” Although Lambost entered the space of the Tower of Glory, his voice sounded from Chen Rui’s Star Armor. This was the function of the Water Shadow Pearl.

“It stands to reason that except for the Fire Elemental King, I have the strongest sense of fire elements. Let alone back then, even yesterday I didn’t realize the existence of the origin power of the fire element. Dillosro must have used some kind of special might to hide the fire origin power. Perhaps his real projection has been absorbing and fusing the origin power of the fire element!”

Chen Rui had promised the Fire Elemental King that he would look for the fire origin fragment. Although he had found it now, the difficulty to obtain it was far beyond imagination.

The surrounding temperature was getting higher and higher. Even Satan had started to break into a sweat on his forehead. 2 huge flames flew out of the sea of fire toward Satan and Chen Rui respectively.

Chen Rui’s first impression of this flame was deterrence. The deterrence contained indescribable ferocity and rampant, which made one involuntarily have a strange feeling of being unable to escape, parry, resist or defeat it… It felt like all hope was cut off, and there was only despair.

This was the special soul might of the Abyss Rulers. It was extremely powerful, just like the ‘hatred’ encountered in the battle at the elf tribe’s Tree of Nature.

Chen Rui seemed to be deterred by this might and lost his ability to adapt. He could only watch the flames approaching and engulfing him instantly.

This scene made Satan frown. He also sensed the effect of ‘despair’. He snorted and drew a circle with his 5 fingers. Then, the flame in front of him quickly froze and gradually stopped. The 2 astonishing power were in a stalemate in the distance, and everything nearby was repelled. A huge vortex appeared from the sea of fire lava under his feet. The shape of flames gradually turned into the shape of a huge palm.

The flames that engulfed Chen Rui on the other side also turned into a giant palm and flew toward Satan from behind. Satan pointed to the center of the circle drawn in the sky just now and shouted, “Disintegrate!”

With that point as the center of the circle, the nearby space appeared to be split and peeled off.

The giant palm was also split and peeled off. The countless intangible flames were annihilated like tangible things, but the giant palm seemed to have only peeled off a layer of skin and was not affected.

At this time, another giant palm had appeared behind Satan. When Satan was about to activate his power to attack, the direction of the giant palm suddenly changed. It flickered with starlight, bypassed Satan and actually hit the giant palm in front.

The 2 huge palms shook at the same time, and the raging flames quickly spread backward, showing the outline of a huge body more than 10 meters high.

Satan glanced at Chen Rui who appeared not far away with a slightly surprised expression. Just now I saw that ‘Richard’ was engulfed by flames, but the equality contract was not canceled. Therefore, ‘Richard’ did not die or maybe he was hiding. I didn’t expect that he had such a special ability to let that palm turn back and hit itself.

This was the skill of [Star Diversion] which could divert a massive power like Dillosro’s.

Satan’s astonishment was just a glimpse; his mind immediately focused on the huge body in front.

This body had become incomparably clear, covered with raging flames. It had blood-red eyes and ferocious facial features. Even Satan showed a rare cautiousness when it exuded a powerful breath – There was no doubt that this was no longer the previous phantom, but a real projection of Dillosro!

A powerful projection close to the original body in the main altar!

Race: Might projection

Comprehensive Strength Assessment: SSSS+

Physique: SSSS+, Strength: SSSS+, Spirit: SSSS+, Speed: SSSS+.

Attribute: Destruction Body, Despair Flame, erosion, soul shatter, space, faith devour, life devour.

Danger level: Extremely dangerous!

Chen Rui was secretly stunned when he looked at the data of the [Analytical Eyes]. No doubt, the real projection of this Dillosro has reached the level of peak stage of Pseudo-God. Apart from the ‘despair’ power, the projection’s existence alone gave Chen Rui a sense of oppression equal to peak stage powerhouses like Michael and Satan.

This is just an avatar close to the real body! If it is the real body, what kind of terrifying level it will reach!? According to Lambost, the real bodies of the 3 rulers have not yet reached the realm of gods, but obviously, compared with Michael’s self-proclaimed ‘the person closest to God’, the 3 rulers are beyond the ordinary Pseudo-God level and are closest to the existence of God.

I can imagine that once a certain seal collapses, what a terrifying apocalypse will be when the Abyss really comes to this main plane.

Satan’s data was:

Race: Fallen Angel

Comprehensive Strength Assessment: SSSS+

Physique: SSSS+, Strength: SSSS+, Spirit: SSSS+, Speed: SSSS+.

Attributes: Fallen Body, Seal of Divine Blessing, Blasphemy Heart, Time, Destruction.

Danger level: Extremely dangerous!

Although both were at the level SSSS+, Satan gave Chen Rui a feeling even more unfathomable than Dillosro. The Fallen Angel ‘race’ display reminded Chen Rui of the ancient legends of another world.

Despite the feeling that Satan’s power prevailed, here was the Despair Main Altar, the ‘home court’ of Dillosro. In this kind of battle with a similar power level, any outcome could happen.

When the blood-red eyes met Satan’s icy, knife-like gaze, the 2 gazes confronted each other as if they were tangible forces in between them. The nearby air was about to freeze.

Chen Rui, who was ‘weaker’ on the side, was selectively ignored by Dillosro. In the eyes of the powerhouse, only powerhouses of the same level were acknowledged.

Either of these 2 people brought a strong sense of oppression to Chen Rui. With his current strength, although he had reached the intermediate stage of Pseudo-God in the state of [Pole Star Transformation], it was said that the gap between the intermediate stage and peak stage of Pseudo-Gods was quite large. Particularly, these 2 were the strongest peak stage of Pseudo-Gods.

“Dillosro! This world doesn’t belong to a cursed one like you! Go back!” Satan spoke in the Abyss language, but Chen Rui, who had [Analytical Eyes], could hear it clearly. He just didn’t know what ‘cursed one’ meant.

Dillosro’s reply was just 1 word, “Die!”

With that said, a huge arm rushed toward Satan with high temperature flames. Satan waved his hand, and the flames stagnated immediately. Although much smaller in size, Satan’s strength was no less than that of Dillosro. An amazing breath was swaying in the air, contending the huge arm in an even state.

Chen Rui, who was on the side, was immediately sent flying away by the huge force.

Seeing that he couldn’t suppress Satan, Dillosro’s other arm suddenly hit the sea of fire, and countless lava splashed out, turning into countless fireballs containing strange breaths and flying toward Satan.

Not only Satan, Chen Rui was also within the reach of the fireballs.

chapters.title: Chapter 1073: Olypheus?
chapters.body:
Chapter 1073: Olypheus?

Satan was focusing when he heard a voice behind him, “[Slow As Forest]!”

At the same time, Satan felt a familiar might fluctuation and the fireballs suddenly slowed down. Not only the fireballs, but everything but himself.

No, besides him, there was also the voice behind.

This is the might of time! Satan reacted immediately.

Although Satan was surrounded by this might, he was not affected in the slightest. It could be seen that ‘Richard’ controlled the might of time with fine precision. Even Satan, who also had the might of time, couldn’t help but be surprised.

Chen Rui was very aware of his strength. If he fought head-on, he would be annihilated in no time. Therefore, he chose the most suitable position, which was supporting. Let Satan attack, then wait for the right timing to launch the most fatal blow.

Satan’s mind moved. His body swayed, and he had appeared in a position where the fireball trajectory could not attack.

This kind of large aoe time freeze was quite difficult, especially with a terrifying opponent like Dillosro. In the blink of an eye, the ‘slowness’ had returned to normal.

However, it was at this moment of delay made Dillosro miss all the attacks. In the next second, before Dillosro could react, he was hit hard by some colossal power. The figure in the sea of fire retreated several hundred meters, and the originally sealed space was also ripped apart by this impact.

Chen Rui’s eyes lit up, if the [Slow As Forest] he activated just now was to slow down the flow of time, then at the moment when the [Slow As Forest] disappeared, Satan activated might to speed up the time, making the attack hit Dillosro ‘in advance’. He couldn’t dodge at all.

Both of them had time might. When facing the same enemy, they showed a tacit understanding that even surprised themselves. In fact, the 2 were still enemies.

Satan’s blow was quite strong. A dent appeared in Dillosro’s chest.

Dillosro seemed to be angered by this heavy blow as he let out an angry roar. Chen Rui and Satan sensed that the exhaustion of life force and faith power was rapidly accelerating. Their souls also trembled in this roar that carried a strange power.

Chen Rui’s heart skipped a beat, but it was not because he was deterred by this roar. He had already put on the God-Eating Mask and the Wrath King Armor, which merged with the star armor on the surface, so he was not affected by spiritual erosion. The reason why he was shocked was because he suddenly sensed the breath of Ms. Black Dragon’s link!

The missing Olypheus is nearby?

As long as the linker was within a considerable range and his perception was not sealed, he could directly sense the existence of the linker.

However, this feeling quickly disappeared. Apparently, it was disturbed by some kind of space force. Chen Rui immediately tried to use the Star Conferring Platform to retrieve Olypheus, but nothing happened.

But he was very sure that it wasn’t an illusion just now; Olypheus should be imprisoned in some kind of space nearby.

Dillosro’s roar wasn’t just spirit erosion. Countless flames danced in the sea of flames, emitting a strong resonance, as if being buffed by a loudspeaker. The sound became enchanting in their ears… Satan felt that the sound seemed to penetrate his mental defenses directly to his soul. It was as if hundreds of pairs of intangible tentacles wanted to control his whole soul and body.

Even Satan’s soul was shaken under the roar of the Despair Lord.

However, with his extremely powerful soul power, he quickly got rid of this interference. When he came back to his senses, the flames glimmering in the sky flew around like phantoms. The power driven by it greatly accelerated the exhaustion of faith power and life force.

Satan raised his right hand to the sky and spread his 5 fingers, saying slowly, “My body came from the luminous gem. In the apocalypse, it is still flawless.”

This sentence was not a poem, but a might that contained great power.

As soon as he finished speaking, those phantom-like flames rolled back one after another while the power that controlled the soul immediately dissipated. Satan’s raised hands exuded a magnificent green light as he walked toward Dillosro step by step. Wherever he passed, the bubbling sea of lava fire gradually evaporated, and the ‘sea water’ under his feet was a lot lower. Around the main altar, that suffocating and suppressive momentum also began to decline.

That magnificent green light became more and more powerful. Satan was secretly surprised when his peripheral vision caught a glimpse of ‘Richard’ who was covered in faith armor and a mask. He didn’t seem to be affected by that kind of soul power either, and he was moving behind Dilloslow from the side like a phantom.

In the blink of an eye, Satan’s raised light had turned into countless meandering curves, flying toward Dillosro.

Chen Rui could see it clearly, they were snake-shaped like real living things. In the blink of an eye, they turned into dense green ropes, tightly binding Dillosro’s huge body.

Satan gradually grasped his 5 fingers gradually clasped together, and the green cord became tighter and tighter. Dillosro couldn’t move at the moment, and the flames on his body quickly dimmed.

Chen Rui’s eyes flashed, and his figure flashed behind Dillosro’s head in an instant.

This time, he was not only teaming up with Satan to deal with Dillosro, but he also had a competitive relationship with Satan. It was like 2 players fighting for the last hit against the boss. Whoever got the last hit would receive the ‘bound equipment’ dropped by the boss.

The power of the contract was fair. Both sides would sense whoever killed Dillosro first, and there was no need for outsiders to judge.

Chen Rui had been waiting for this opportunity. He felt relieved especially after feeling that Olypheus might be imprisoned in a certain space by Dillosro. At least Ms. Black Dragon is fine. As long as Dillosro is eliminated, I will definitely be able to rescue the chick.

Now that Dillosro is bound by Satan’s power, and the power of the main altar is greatly weakened, it is the best chance to do it!

“[Invake Like Fire].”

At this moment, a dangerous omen suddenly surged in Satan’s mind. The source was ‘Richard’. He had suddenly turned into 3 figures and surrounded Dillosro in all directions. Satan had been paying attention to Richard’s movement before. He found that although the opponent’s ability was strange, except for the speed that was barely close to the peak stage of Pseudo-God, the attack power was only equivalent to the intermediate stage Pseudo-God – Such strength obviously did not pose a real threat to Dillosro. It was almost a sure-win for him in the betting agreement.

However, the fact was that ‘Richard’ deliberately hid his power. This move ‘triangular space’ brought a rare sense of threat to Satan. Even he himself couldn’t ignore it. Maybe Dillosro would be defeated in this attack. The outcome of the betting agreement seemed to have suddenly turned upside down.

At this time, Satan felt a special power breath, which seemed to be ‘destruction’ or ‘creation’, but he couldn’t tell the difference. Nonetheless, the warning signs of danger became more and more prominent.

The 3 figures shot out a purple-red light at the same time, which intertwined into 1. At this moment, even Satan felt that his vision became blurred, but he faintly noticed that the 3 silhouettes activated a kind of terrifying power to form an independent triangular space, imprisoning Dillosro in it.

More than just imprisonment.

In less than a second, the overlapping images of the triangle had spread. At the same time, the entire ‘triangular space’ and everything in it was shattered.

[Dimension Destruction]!

[Purple Pole Star Transformation]’s strongest killing move!

After Chen Rui further comprehended the power of [Purple Pole Star Transformation], through repeated practice in the training ground, the use of this move became more and more proficient. The destruction and creation origin were almost integrated. Even Satan found it difficult to distinguish. In addition, the power was a lot higher than when he first activated at the Holy Light Mountain that day.

When the blurred vision became clear, Satan’s eyes narrowed slightly before he sneered. Chen Rui, whose 3 figures were reunited into one, was greatly shocked.

The huge body still appeared in vision. [Dimension Destruction] actually couldn’t kill Dillosro; even his breath isn’t weakened by a lot!

Chen Rui gasped, and his heart sank immediately. This move combined the special attribute of Holy Light Robe [Light Splitting], which cost me a lot of power, but it didn’t work!

The shape of Dillosro had changed rapidly – The flames originally burning on the huge body had been absorbed back into his body, and he was covered with a layer of white armor. If one looked closely, it was a huge armor that was condensed by countless bones, faintly revealing fiery red ‘skin’ inside.

Chen Rui and Satan suddenly understood. It turned out that the bone islands had never been really destroyed before, but they re-condensed on Dillosro’s body in such a form. It was equivalent to integrating with the avatar, making his defense stronger and making him harder to be completely destroyed.

What was ‘destroyed’ by [Dimension Destruction] just now was just the ‘bone armor’, and the damage to the real body was not significant. In this kingdom of the main altar, it would soon be restored.

“Lowly ant!” As Dillosro roared, a powerful devouring power exuded from his huge mouth and wrapped toward Chen Rui. Chen Rui felt his body fly forward involuntarily, and the exhaustion of kingdom power and life force suddenly sped up several times faster!

In fact, the Despair Lord was also surprised just now. I didn’t expect that the neglected little character actually launched such an unexpected terrifying attack. If it wasn’t for the protection of the bone armor, I’m afraid my avatar would have already suffered a lot of damage.

It seems that this ant should not be underestimated. He must be removed as soon as possible to avoid another accident when I confront Satan.

All of a sudden, Chen Rui was shocked again – He sensed the breath of Olypheus again. Although it was only fleeting, he had determined the source of the breath.

Dillosro’s mouth!

At this time, Satan’s attack arrived in time, and the green ‘snakes’ bound Dillosro’s body again. It was not because Satan had any kindness, but once Chen Rui died, he would not be able to get the creation origin power that he wanted.

Chen Rui’s thoughts turned quickly while looking at the huge bloody mouth. He didn’t take the opportunity to retreat, but he made a firm decision.

“[Swift As Wind]!”

Seeing that ‘Richard’ did not retreat but advanced toward Dillosro’s giant mouth like lightning, Satan, who coveted the creation origin, couldn’t help but be dumbfounded.

chapters.title: Chapter 1074: Bloody Cocoon
chapters.body:
Chapter 1074: Bloody Cocoon

The moment Chen Rui rushed into Dillosro’s mouth, he felt a terrifying fire force enveloped him, which was 100 times stronger than the flames outside. Even with the power of the intermediate stage of the Pseudo-God, he would be instantly turned to ashes.

However, Chen Rui was an exception.

Because the [Fire Phoenix Stigmata] on him could not only reduce the fire damage by 90%, but it also gave him 10% chance to be completely immune from fire damage, which was even stronger than the [Body of Light Glory] against the effect of light element power. This was thanks to the gift of his precious daughter back then.

The star armor’s special attribute could integrate his equipment and abilities, so Chen Rui also avoided the phenomenon of streaking.

Although the greatly reduced fire damage was not completely ineffective, Chen Rui only needed to activate [Star Guardian Wings] to basically isolate the effect. However, he was not immune to another power: Devour.

The life force and faith power all over his body were venting like a torrent uncontrollably. This was the terrifying talent of Dillosro’s ‘life devour’ and ‘faith devour’.

The strangest thing was that after rushing into Dillosro’s body, he didn’t see anything like internal organs, but it was like a high-temperature abyss. His body just fell down in that never ending dim space.

This situation was completely different from the feeling of being wrapped by the strange power when he was devoured by the phantom last time. If it was another Pseudo-God powerhouse, the faith and life of the entire kingdom that had been accumulated via hard work would be devoured entirely. In the end, he would be completely exhausted or lose the protective power, leading to only 1 dead end.

At this time, the attribute of the Galaxy Kingdom in Chen Rui’s Super System was fully revealed. The vast life force and faith power were almost inexhaustible, and it had been protecting Chen Rui. However, he was always in a passive state. Sooner or later, his power would be exhausted. This was the same as waiting for his own death.

What’s more, after falling all the way, there was no sense of link to Olypheus at all.

Chen Rui had experienced many battles and was no longer a rookie. He could see from the previous [Dimension Destruction] that Dillosro’s offensive and defensive strength was far superior to him, but it was not completely unshakable. This near-unsolvable situation in front of him was not really unsolvable. The key was to find the flaws or to break a certain balance and create flaws.

“[Invade Like Fire]!” After Chen Rui activated the might that increased his attack, his breath was surging. With a wave of his hand, 7 huge light balls appeared in front of him and burst open in an instant.

Although the power of [7-star Explosion] was strong, the surrounding space did not change.

Chen Rui frowned and activated a powerful aoe attack again.

“[Pole Star Storm]!”

Countless terrifying starlights drew dazzling arcs of death. The [Pole Star Storm] whistled through space. However, it was still useless like countless punches hitting the empty space, wasting all the effort.

Chen Rui frowned. This space not only has the power of devour, but the suppression of power is also quite strong. My attack power is much lower than usual, and the consumption of Star Power is almost doubled. The most troublesome is that my 2 strong attacks have no effect at all.

At this moment, the Water Shadow Pearl in his chest vibrates suddenly, and innumerable blue rays of light flew out to the surroundings. Affected by the power of this blue light, various special ‘patterns’ appeared in the originally dead space immediately.

“This should be the power of Dillosro’s Abyss space. I can feel that this space is composed of countless moving space layers that are constantly changing and overlapping, forming an endless loop. You need to find the trajectory of space movement, then attack the weakest joint. But the Water Shadow Pearl has a limited duration, so you need to hurry up.”

The Water Elemental King’s voice sounded. This bead was like Lambost’s eyes and ears. He could clearly sense the situation outside. The quality of this bead was also very special; it didn’t shatter due to Dillosro’s power. Of course, Chen Rui’s special physique and Star Power protection were also a major reason.

Chen Rui’s eyes lit up, Lambost once said that the Water Shadow Pearl had a special restraint on Dillosro’s kingdom, but its power was limited and could not be completely relied upon. Previously, when he tried to kill Dillosro by activating the [Dimension Destruction], he had no chance to use it. Now, it finally worked wonders here.

Chen Rui immediately activated the [Deep Analysis]. The pattern of the Water Shadow Pearl radiated as if some kind of special ‘developer’ was poured on an invisible picture. The brushwork and colors that were originally hidden were suddenly revealed.

As Lambost said, the effect of the Water Shadow Pearl was quite limited, and the blue light soon started to disappear, but in this short period of time, Chen Rui had figured out the rhythm of this space loop. As he shouted, the power of [Invade Like Fire] had risen to the apex. The magnificent power that had been charged in his right arm burst out. A red light with a strong destructive breath blasted out, [True Red Extinction]!

The red light of [True Red Extinction] did not divide the space into halves as usual. Instead, the red light suddenly twisted as if a straight line was folded into a lightning mark.

In fact, this powerful ultimate move hit a key part of the space, destroying the power of space that was circulating continuously, and the turning point was the crack formed by the blocking space.

“[Swift As Wind]!”

Chen Rui turned into a swift lightning and disappeared into the crack before the space engulfed the [True Red Extinction].

After passing through layers of barriers and finally penetrating the originally dead space, Chen Rui felt the light in front of him brighten, turning from a dark space to a dazzling blood red space.

This was a cave-like environment which was very huge. It was somewhat similar to the scene Chen Rui encountered in the Nightmare Volcano in the human world’s Nightmare Wilderness. Although the space was large, the atmosphere here was much more depressing and terrifying than there.

Chen Rui sensed the breath of Olypheus’ link nearby immediately. It was just right ahead.

Looking forward, the most conspicuous thing was a huge blood-colored vortex in the space.

The blood-colored vortex gave Chen Rui an extremely dangerous feeling. On the ground before the vortex, there were at least thousands of large and small circular red things. Looking closely, they were cocoon-like objects wrapping various forms of creatures with only the heads exposed. Most of these creatures were alive, exuding a rich emotional power: Despair.

The link breath of Ms. Black Dragon came from within. Chen Rui moved up and down at high speed before he found a bloody cocoon along the breath.

No doubt, Ms. Black Dragon was being imprisoned. Her black eyes seemed to have lost focus, staring blankly at the vortex ahead.

“Olypheus!” Chen Rui shouted, but Ms. Black Dragon still didn’t respond. Her face was dazed like she was a dead body.

At this moment, the Water Shadow Pearl on Chen Rui’s chest emitted blue light waves again, shining on Olypheus’ face. Gradually, Ms. Black Dragon’s eyes finally recovered a little bit of vitality.

“Boss…” Olypheus saw Chen Rui at first sight, and there was a strong surprise in her weak voice.

“What about Adeline and the others?”

“I don’t know…” Ms. Black Dragon suddenly thought of something, showing an extremely frightened expression as she cried, “Vesilna… Vesilna was eaten! Go and save Adeline and the others!”

“Eaten?” Chen Rui frowned. Seeing that Ms. Black Dragon was extremely exhausted both mentally and physically, he didn’t ask any further, “Don’t worry, I’ll look for Adeline and the others. Have a good sleep. When you wake up, it’ll be fine.”

With that said, Chen Rui activated the power of the Star Conferring Platform. Olypheus immediately disappeared from the bloody cocoon, and she was kept into the Super System in the merged state. The maximum duration of this merged state was 3 days, which could effectively treat mental and physical injuries. I believe Ms. Black Dragon should be able to recover after waking up from the merged state.

The question now is, are Adeline, Helen, Lalaria still alive?

Chen Rui began to quickly search through the bloody cocoons. At this moment, the ‘vortex’ in front of him suddenly wriggled like some kind of digestive organ, sending out a strong devouring power. Nearly 100 bloody cocoons that approached suddenly floated up and flew toward the vortex.
