Chen Rui thought swiftly, and he finally understood what Olypheus meant by ‘Vesilna was eaten’. This ‘vortex’ should be equivalent to some kind of sacrificial altar!

Olypheus and others should have broken into the main altar for ‘treasure hunt’. Subsequently, they were captured by Dillosro and imprisoned in this sacrificial space as a sacrifice.

Every once in a while, the ‘vortex’ would automatically suck up a certain amount of bloody cocoons to complete a certain sacrifice ritual.

The reason why Vesilna’s spiritual link disappeared should be due to bad luck. Before Chen Rui found her, she was killed by devour. But then again, if it wasn’t for the disappearance of Vesilna’s spiritual link, Chen Rui would have no idea what happened to the ‘family-visiting and treasure-hunting team’ on the Dead Sea side.

Chen Rui’s eyes froze, because he suddenly saw 2 smaller bloody cocoons with 2 familiar faces, Helen and Lalaria, among the ‘sacrifices’!

“[Slow As Forest]!”

The speed of the bloody cocoons flying toward the vortex suddenly slowed down, and everything around it became ‘slow’. At this moment, Chen Rui had appeared in front of the vortex and grabbed the 2 blood cocoons one after another. No doubt it was Helen and Lalaria!

In the blink of an eye, the vortex resumed its original speed, engulfing all the blood cocoons. Meanwhile, Chen Rui appeared in the distance with the 2 blood cocoons that he took away while gasping for breath—From activating the [Pole Star Transformation] to now, he had already consumed a lot of Star Power. When he activated the time might again just now, he felt insufficient in power.

Neither of them had gone through the 1-star [Star-level Enhancement]. Even if he could perform star conferring on the spot, he could not integrate them into the Star Conferring Platform like Olypheus, so he could only use the Tower of Glory. However, that kind of bloody cocoon carried the powerful Abyss power that stopped them from being kept in the Tower of Glory. The bloody cocoon must be removed first.

chapters.title: Chapter 1075: Devour
chapters.body:
Chapter 1075: Devour

Chen Rui tried a few more times and found that the [Spring Territory] containing the creation power had a special dissolving effect on the bloody cocoon. At this time, under the blue light of the Water Shadow Pearl, the flat-chested loli and the little mermaid princess successively recovered from the original sluggishness.

“It’s you! You saved us just now!” Lalaria’s strength was Demi-God, so she was the quickest to wake up. She was sure that Chen Rui saved her and Helen just now at the last minute. Apparently, unlike Olypheus whose consciousness was in a half-awake, half-blur state.

“Vesilna is dead! Go save Olypheus and Adeline!” The flat-chested loli was very experienced and immediately explained the situation in the shortest sentences.

“Olypheus is all right. Where is Adeline?”

“I remember that her position seemed to be behind Olypheus…”

With that said, Helen also woke up, “Chen Rui…”

At this moment, a warning sign surged in Chen Rui’s mind. At the same time, Helen and Lalaria’s exclamations sounded, “Be careful!”

Seeing that the huge ‘vortex’ had changed into a hideous face, the blood-red gaze locked Chen Rui firmly.

Before Chen Rui could react, he sensed a terrifying wave of soul power surging toward him. He felt as if a sharp cone had been plunged into his mind, and the indescribable pain instantly spread throughout his soul. His entire consciousness seemed to have almost shattered.

A huge pressure came from inside to outside. With a ‘clack’ , the star armor actually cracked.

Soul shatter.

Dillosro’s talent.

The strength of this soul shock was several times stronger than that of Dillosro’s phantom last time. Chen Rui was caught off guard, so he suffered a major injury.

If Dillosro was not distracted to fight Satan on the other side, perhaps it was more powerful than that.

However, after this blow, the face immediately had a violent shock like a wave as if he had received a strong impact.

This was the [Punishment] special attribute of the Super System, which had a chance to reflect all damage suffered. The activation rate of the Purple Star Pole Star Level was about 50%, and the power of the reflection was 50-80% of the power of the attack.

The power of soul shatter was reflected back, which greatly exceeded Dillosro’s expectations. The effect of this blow was stronger than that of Chen Rui’s direct attack, and his consciousness lost the ability to respond for a while.

Most of Dillosro’s will was in the fight with Satan, and this accident caused his body to freeze. Naturally, his enemy would not give up this opportunity. A strong [Collapse Exterminate] was launched, and Dillosro’s bone armor shattered into pieces.

Satan was very experienced. Immediately after the activation of the time might, before the bone armor was restored, he launched another ‘cut’.

This blow was very fatal. Dillosro could not dodge, so his lava-like left arm was cut off. The broken arm turned into countless broken pieces and scattered in the might. After the bone armor recondensed, the broken arm still did not recover. It was just recondensing little by little very slowly.

Dillosro was damaged internally and externally, so his breath finally began to decline.

After a while, Chen Rui had barely regained clarity from the heavy blow to his soul, and he felt blood all over his mouth and nose. Fortunately, Dillosro also suffered a heavy blow, so he had no time to pursue.

Helen was speechless for a moment when she looked at the blood in his nose and mouth.

“You should leave quickly!” Although Lalaria usually liked to cause trouble, she was a person who clearly distinguished kindness and hatred. Chen Rui had done his best by coming here to save people; she should not let him die together.

“Relax…” Chen Rui took a deep breath and used Star Power to forcibly suppress his injury, “I will definitely take you all out of here!”

The giant face that recondensed in the vortex let out a furious roar, and the face began to change. Long horns grew on the forehead, and the appearance became more and more terrifying. The sense of depression in space suddenly rose several times.

At the same time, Dillosro in front of Satan had also changed. The huge body had rapidly shrunk into 2 meters tall. He was wearing a half-body skeleton, had bone spurs all over his body, and a long tail behind him. He exuded hot and bloody breath all over.

This should be the true form of the Abyss Rulers. Although the body had shrunk, the momentum was much stronger than the original giant. The regeneration of that arm was also accelerating, fully recovering in the blink of an eye.

However, after the transformation, the breath of the entire blood sea had dropped significantly, and the lava had been reduced by about 2/3. It seems that this transformation requires a considerable amount of energy from the main altar. No wonder Dillosro has not used it before.

The blood mist and the suffocating energy made Satan squint. Dillosro had appeared in front of him like lightning, and his claws attacked directly with a much faster speed than before.

Satan swiftly moved both his hands and gripped the claws. Dillosro’s hands were as bright as red-hot metal, while Satan’s hands were gray and mysterious.

Under the stalemate between the 2 forces, the entire sea area was shaking violently.

Just as Satan was about to increase his strength, he suddenly sensed danger. Before he could react, he had already been knocked away by Dillosro’s tail. It was actually as flexible as an arm.

After Dillosro knocked Satan away, he swung his claws continuously, and hundreds of high-temperature flames containing despair breath chased him away like a meteor shower. The ‘meteor shower’ surrounded Satan’s figure and burned violently. Dillosro was not done yet. His arms folded, and the nearby space was turned over, surrounding the burning core.

The sharp claws shook and shattered the space and flames. A figure rushed backward, seemingly seriously injured.

Dillosro’s body flickered, and he caught up with the retreating figure in mid-air. When he wanted to launch a fatal blow, he felt a pair of cold eyes appear in the sky ahead with some kind of special might. He could not help but pause.

When Dillosro reacted quickly, he found that the eyes in the sky had disappeared. It seemed to be just an illusion, but the sense of crisis of being targeted was there. Satan was coldly looking at him.

At this time, Satan had a black armor on his body. His whole body seemed to be dark, icy and cold.

In the next second, Dillosro was clasped by a hand on his shoulder, and he flew into the air involuntarily under a tremendous force. Before he could stabilize his body, those cold eyes appeared below, and a punch hit his abdomen.

This blow carried some kind of piercing force. Although there only a shallow fist mark on the abdomen, the back of the bone armor exploded. Dillosro snorted and subconsciously swung his claws, but Satan grabbed his claw and threw him out.

Satan didn’t get close this time. With a flick of his hand, black lightning covered Dillosro. Then, countless explosions sounded, and the terrifying power instantly drowned Dillosro completely.

Satan could see clearly that Dillosro curled his body into a ball, and the bone armor was constantly thickening, looking like a big ball. This bone armor fused the power of the entire main altar. Although the black lightning completely suppressed it, it could not break through the bone armor immediately.

As long as the most troublesome bone armor was broken and the main altar’s protective power was completely destroyed, then Satan was confident that Dillosro would be defeated in the shortest possible time.

At the same time, in Dillosro’s ‘body’, Dillosro’s huge face let out a terrifying roar, and a wave of soul shock that was far superior to the previous one rushed toward Chen Rui frantically from all directions.

Satan was extremely powerful, and he was Dillosro’s number 1 enemy, so he must get rid of the internal hidden danger of Chen Rui before he could focus on fighting Satan.

In the face of the terrifying soul shatter, Chen Rui still did not move. He quickly used the creation power to dissolve the bloody cocoons. The soul shock had approached in the blink of an eye, but it stopped about 5 meters in front of Chen Rui and could no longer break through.

This was the Holy Light Robe’s ability, [Absolute Barrier], which could create a protective force field with a diameter of 5 meters. It could protect against attacks of any form or intensity, but it could only last for 10 seconds and he could not move around.

10 seconds passed in the blink of an eye, but a small part of the bloody cocoons still had not been dissolved. This time it was not a single-target attack, but an aoe attack. If he used [Mirror Body] or [Demonic Flies Transformation] at this time, he could survive it, but Helen and Lalaria would definitely be annihilated under this attack.

“[Unshakable Like Mountain]!” Facing the terrifying soul shock, Chen Rui gritted his teeth and groaned. The surrounding space suddenly solidified, forming a barrier. This was the protection he activated in combination with the Tower of Glory’s might.

If it was a normal attack, it could be blocked and diverted by [Unshakable Like Mountain], but Dillosro’s power was much stronger than his. Moreover, he also had the space talent.

The entire solidified space trembled violently, and countless cracks appeared, but they did not burst immediately. Chen Rui was already severely injured. This time, not only his nose, but his eyes and ears were also oozing blood.

Fortunately, after this delay, the bloody cocoons on Lalaria and Helen had been completely dissolved, and the 2 girls had been kept in the Tower of Glory.

Almost at the next moment, the protective space of [Unshakable Like Mountain] was completely shattered. Under the terrifying soul shock, Chen Rui’s body was torn apart— In fact, he was split into countless scattered flies. He used the God-Eating Mask’s ability to dodge this blow.

The flies flew toward the bloody cocoons. According to Lalaria, Adeline was behind Olypheus, and that position was very far behind. It stood to reason that she should not have been devoured.

After locking the approximate range, Chen Rui finally found the bloody cocoon that imprisoned Adeline. At this time, the skill duration for [Demonic Flies Transformation] had ended, and his body returned to human form.

Before he could stand still, Dillosro’s soul shock arrived again. This time, countless soul shocks merged into 1, attacking with unprecedented power.

Chen Rui’s body immediately became transparent, and this extremely powerful soul shock seemed to encounter the light of a mirror and was refracted back.

[Mirror Body]!

The damage caused by this reflection was several times stronger than the previous reflection. In Dillosro’s stern roar, his facial features blurred and returned to the original vortex shape.

TL: Will Chen Rui eliminate Dillosro from the inside first?

chapters.title: Chapter 1076: Final Outcome
chapters.body:
Chapter 1076: Final Outcome

At this time, Chen Rui had found Adeline’s bloody cocoon, and the light from the Water Shadow Pearl made the naga girl gradually regain her sanity. Seeing Chen Rui’s appearance, she showed a surprised expression, but her surprise immediately turned into nervousness when she saw the blood on Chen Rui’s facial features and the cracks in his armor.

When Chen Rui was about to use the origin power of creation, the vortex suddenly emitted a dazzling blood light, causing the temperature in the air to rise rapidly. In the blink of an eye, it had reached an extremely terrifying level. If Chen Rui hadn’t used his power to protect Adeline in time, the naga girl would have turned to ashes.

The vortex began to move, and the volume continued to expand. The devouring power suddenly increased dozens of times, and all the bloody cocoons were sucked into it.

It seemed that Chen Rui’s ability to ‘reflect’ and ‘refract’ finally caused Dillosro to be vigilant. He switched to another way to attack.

He didn’t know that Chen Rui could no longer activate the [Mirror Body] skill.

However, not only had his soul been severely damaged, but he had also consumed a lot of Star Power, so his condition was quite dire.

The Water Shadow Pearl emitted blue light in time, showing the gap nodes in the space. Chen Rui took Adeline’s bloody cocoon and constantly shifted. He used special nodes to evade the devouring power. At the same time, he activated creation origin to dissolve the bloody cocoon. However, this space was Dillosro’s kingdom. In the blink of an eye, the expanding vortex had sealed his movement.

Right now, the bloody cocoon still had at least a minute left to be resolved. Judging from the approaching vortex, it was too late. Unless he abandoned Adeline and immediately used the [Star Gate] to leave, he would be devoured.

“Chen Rui…” Adeline had a very special sensing talent, so she was keenly aware of this danger.

“Adeline, I know what you’re going to say.” Chen Rui shook his head while increasing the creation power output to the bloody cocoon, “Remember when we were in Black Sea? Back then, I didn’t give up on you, let alone now…”

Adeline bit her lip and nodded as tears welled up in her eyes. She held back her tears for fear of distracting him.

Looking at the rapidly approaching vortex and feeling the terrifying tearing and devouring power, Chen Rui’s mind seemed unusually calm for some reason, “Lambost, I would like to ask, what will happen if we enter this vortex?”

Lambost’s voice came from the Water Shadow Pearl, “Your everything will be devoured: Faith, life, soul…”

“If this guy devours my faith power and life force, can he digest that for his own use?”

“This is just an avatar. There’s only so much power that can really be converted for his own use.”

“So, there is a limit on his devour?”

“There must be.” Lambost had already guessed what Chen Rui wanted to do, and he was taken aback, “This idea is stupid and crazy. Are you sure if you…”

“It seems that it’s too late to be sure…”

The huge devouring power had wrapped Chen Rui. At the same time, Chen Rui’s body was full of purple light, showing the appearance of universe stars. The surrounding power gathered in the 2 pairs of star wings, wrapping him and Adeline.

In the main altar sea area, the black lightning became more and more violent, and the ‘bone ball’ that wrapped Dillosro already shattered in pieces. It wouldn’t take long before the entire main altar’s protective power could be completely defeated. Without the main altar’s protection, eliminating this Despair Lord’s avatar would be much easier.

The reason ‘Richard’ rushed into Dillosro’s body is definitely to take a risk, but judging from the strength of Dillosro’s later transformation, ‘Richard’ didn’t have any chance.

Fortunately, the contract has not disappeared now. ‘Richard’ should still be alive, and it is very likely that he is imprisoned in a certain space by Dillosro. As long as Dillosro is killed, ‘Richard’ can be rescued – This ‘rescue’ was naturally to obtain the creation origin.

According to the contract regulations of the betting battle agreement, after obtaining the creation origin, the 3-month period would remain unchanged. After more than a month, he could kill ‘Richard’ and remove the biggest obstacle block of the Dark Divinity Temple plan. It could be said to kill 2 birds with 1 stone.

At this moment, the bone ball shuddered suddenly, and those lightnings actually were repelled. Then, the bone ball gradually swelled up. Satan knew that Dillosro still had some killing moves, so he quickly focused his mind.

However, the swollen bone ball gradually began to shrink. Before it retracted to its original state, it swelled suddenly. The magnitude was even greater than before.

“ Bang! “

The bone ball that wrapped Dillosro actually shattered on its own, revealing the lava-like body inside.

What’s even more amazing was that the swelling did not stop. Dillosro’s body kept showing various uncontrollable and strange twists, as if a balloon was constantly being inflated and deflated. The power breath became disordered.

“ Oh no!” Satan’s facial expression changed when he suddenly thought of Chen Rui who had rushed into Dillosro’s mouth earlier.

After reacting, Satan waved his hands continuously without hesitation. The special symbols like snake patterns gradually became clear with the trajectory of the stroke. The cold eyes began to change, becoming the typical vertical pupils like snakes or giant dragons. The fiery heat of the entire main altar was replaced by a chilly breath, and the undulating and boiling lava quickly solidified.

It was not frozen, but another strange blue crystal emitting a crystal light like a gem.

Dillosro’s body had swelled to an astonishing level. It was obvious that he was trying desperately to suppress it, but he couldn’t succeed.

Light flashed in Satan’s eyes as he waved his hands faster and faster. His hands became blurred, and the snake pattern symbols flashed away, appearing on Dillosro’s body. It was like countless dense texts.

The Despair Lord’s boiling lava-like body quickly solidified into a crystal. Satan’s face was also covered with a layer of crystal blue light, and the solidified light was like a mask.

“[Blasphemy Sin]!” Satan’s high-speed waving hands stopped, and his fingers clasped together. A magnificent might burst out, and those snake patterns suddenly went into Dillosro’s body like blue cracks.

The next second, the patterns turned into real cracks, causing fissures on Dillosro’s entire body. There were also fine cracks in the corners of Satan’s face – This was a powerful move, but he had to pay a considerable price too.

He originally thought that the strength of that ‘Richard’ was simply not enough to win, so he had been fighting steadily, but now that the sudden change occurred, he could no longer watch idly.

Almost at the same time as Dillosro’s body cracked, the Despair Lord’s avatar let out an earth-shattering roar. An intense purple light suddenly flashed from his eyes and mouth.

Those body fragments that were split by [Blasphemy Sin] also burst out with this dazzling purple starlight, which spread instantly.

There were 2 areas in the starlight that were particularly eye-catching. The large and small stars in the area form a pattern representing a certain meaning. 1 was like a phoenix spreading its wings, and the other was like a rainbow.

Under the internal and external pressure, Dillosro’s body could no longer bear it. The cracked fragments were instantly annihilated. There was a faint furious roar in the air, “It won’t take long…”

As soon as Dillosro disappeared, the crimson clouds suppressed in the sky quickly dissipated, and the suffocating heat nearby disappeared, leaving only the gloomy coldness that sealed everything.

When Satan activated [Blasphemy Sin], the solidified blue light on his face gradually disappeared, and the cracked patterns at the corner of the eyes turned into traces of blood mark, which quickly disappeared into his skin.

In mid-air, a figure fell on the frozen sea. He was half-kneeling and gasping for breath. The starlight that was surrounding his body had disappeared without a trace, and his breath of the Pseudo-God level had also become the Demi-God level. A lot of bloodstains that had not dried up could be seen on his facial features, and there were countless gruesome wounds.

Satan’s eyes were particularly cold, but he finally nodded, “You won.”

The judgment of the contract was the fairest. Satan’s response was very fast, he immediately activated a fierce killing move and shattered Dillosro, but the real fatal final blow was the purple starlight attack launched by the opponent inside.

This kind of result was unimaginable for Satan. This ‘Richard’ is incredible. Obviously, his strength is much inferior, and he is not on the same level as me, but he actually went ahead of me and eliminated Dillosro’s avatar first!

Chen Rui gasped and stood up. Just as he was about to speak, his chest felt stuffy. He coughed a few times and choked out blood. This time, his ears and nose began to bleed again.

Chen Rui wiped it with his hands casually while Satan said coldly, “Who are you actually?”

“It’s clearly written on the contract, Richard.” Chen Rui smiled.

“Even though you try to hide, I can still sense that special power.” Satan’s gaze became more and more fierce, “Not only the creation origin, but also the almost perfect destruction origin!”

Chen Rui’s heart skipped a beat: Satan actually noticed the destruction origin? Then the secret of the silver box…

Satan clearly sensed Chen Rui’s mood swings, and he was more certain in his mind, “When you launched that kind of triangle area attack, you actually merged creation and destruction. Although the power is still very weak, I’ve only seen this form of attack from a person! No wonder when I signed the contract, I felt the power in your soul is very special…”

With that said, Satan’s eyes turned to the Water Shadow Pearl hanging from Chen Rui’s chest, “Also, the Water Elemental Messenger actually gave you the water elemental heart. Hmph! “

Chen Rui was shocked, and he finally understood. Elemental heart! The Water Shadow Pearl is actually an elemental heart!

“Anyway, I admit my defeat!” Satan shook his head, “It turns out that I was really wrong. You are indeed an ‘old friend’! It’s astonishing. I didn’t expect you to be able to reappear in this way in front of me. Then, let me see how much you can recover in 10 years!”

Old friend? Chen Rui was surprised for a while. It seems that Satan didn’t associate it with the silver box, but… he seems to have misunderstood something?

However, Chen Rui would definitely not explain. This kind of misunderstanding was definitely more pros than cons for him now.

“Everything that stands in my way will be annihilated, even you.” Satan raised a finger, “Your life and soul will be the best sacrifice for me to step on the peak stage. I look forward to the moment when I finish you off with my own hands 10 years later. That feeling may be more beautiful than ending the whole world.”

With that said, Satan’s figure gradually faded away, and the solidified crystal plane under Chen Rui’s feet began to melt.

Due to the annihilation of Dillosro and the main altar, both the crimson clouds and lava disappeared while the nearby sea area returned to normal. All of a sudden, Chen Rui sensed something and took down the ‘Water Shadow Pearl’ hanging on his chest in surprise.

He saw a striking crack on the round blue bead.

The water elemental heart had cracked!

TL: Well, elemental heart can be repaired right? Did Satan think he is Python? Or someone else? Eh , that means Python will only surrender to him after 10 years?

chapters.title: Chapter 1077: Heart
chapters.body:
Chapter 1077: Heart

Chen Rui was shocked. He had experienced the battle in Mountain Xilang and knew exactly what this ‘Water Shadow Pearl’ meant to Lambost.

The elemental heart was the core of the Elemental King, which was equivalent to the human heart. Once the elemental heart was broken, even the powerful Elemental King would be completely annihilated within 7 days.

Although the Elemental King of this main plane would not really die, it would take tens of thousands of years or even longer to recreate the Water Elemental King.

From the moment Lambost accompanied him to the Crimson Double Teeth Sea Area, Chen Rui had regarded the Water Elemental King as a true friend in his mind. Since Lambost deliberately activated some kind of shielding power, he never knew that the ‘Water Shadow Pearl’ was the water elemental heart.

At the moment of being engulfed by the vortex transformed by Dillosro, Chen Rui wrapped by [Star Guardian Wings] finally completely resolved Adeline’s blood cocoon and successfully brought the naga girl into the Tower of Glory. Under absolute power, there was no fluke. In fact, even without Adeline, he must also face this real test.

Immediately afterward, he was ‘greeted’ by a terrifying battle with endless devour, endless eruptions, endless despair, and endless splitting of souls… He almost exhausted all his strength. Until now, he couldn’t describe the battle situation just now. He just remembered that when he almost collapsed several times, he was relying completely on the power of the ‘Water Shadow Pearl’ to protect his last bit of consciousness.

In this life-or-death moment when the soul was on the verge of dissipating, many feelings were gone, and only instinct remained.

Driven by instinct, the previously failed idea of trying to use the power of constellations to construct a killing move actually became clear. The guidance of the ‘Water Shadow Pearl’ also played a key role. The galaxy power that combined the power of constellations gushed out like the rush of the sea, becoming the last straw that broke the camel’s back.

Dillosro was like a balloon that was about to burst. Chen Rui’s fatal move finally burst him. Although Satan’s reaction was fast, he was still half a beat slower than Chen Rui, becoming the loser of the betting agreement.

In all fairness, Satan’s strength was indeed higher than Dillosro’s avatar, but it was not that he was saving his ultimate move, but because the main altar’s protective power was there previously. Even with all his strength, he couldn’t really destroy Dillosro’s body – Even the 2 blows of [Collapse Extermination] and [Cut] that cut off Dillosro’s arm were both opportunities seized after Chen Rui entered into Dillosro’s body.

Satan’s contempt for Chen Rui was also 1 of the reasons for his failure. No wonder he had this mentality, because he had absolute strength. Chen Rui could match neither Satan nor Dillosro. However, it was this underestimated little character who became the ultimate victor. If it wasn’t for the explosion of Chen Rui in Dillosro, causing the protective bone armor to completely collapse due to the absorption of indigestible power, Satan’s [Blasphemy Sin] would also be unable to kill Dillosro in 1 hit.

Chen Rui was inconceivably able to defeat and kill Dillosro with weaker strength. It could be said that the ‘Water Shadow Pearl’, also known as the Water Elemental King Lambost, played a major role, but now this water elemental heart had actually cracked!

Chen Rui tenuously channeled his strength and floated on the sea. The light flickered, and he had released the Water Elemental King and others from the space of the Tower of Glory.

“It seems that Dillosro’s avatar and main altar have been annihilated…” The Water Shadow Pearl actually cracked long ago. From that moment on, Lambost in the Tower of Glory had been unable to perceive the outside world. It was not until he came out that he sensed that the surrounding water element had returned to normal.

As Lambost spoke, the elemental heart turned into a blue light and sank into his body, then the sea under everyone’s feet began to freeze rapidly.

In the blink of an eye, an iceland with a radius of about 50 meters with Lambost as the center appeared in the vision. Lambost’s body also slowly froze starting from his feet, and the solidification spread upward at a speed visible to the naked eye.

Although he didn’t understand what this change represented, Chen Rui clearly sensed that Lambost’s breath was rapidly weakening. He was both sad and anxious, but his injuries were already critical. He felt dizzy as blood oozed from his facial features again.

Lambost said indifferently, “The injury to your soul is so severe that even the power of the Creation Vessel cannot…”

“I’m not dead yet.” Chen Rui suppressed the wound and stared into Lambost’s eyes, “But you are going to die. Even if the annihilation of element is just a form of energy conversion, the Lambost I know will cease to exist. “

“It never occurred to me that someone would feel sad for my existence.” Lambost shook his head, “You don’t have to feel sorry. In fact, it’s not directly related to you. Any Elemental King, in the face of enemies like ‘them’, will make the same choice as me.

“Lambost…” Chen Rui suddenly thought of something, and he hurriedly took out a handful of strange fruits from the storage warehouse, “I once helped Moore repair the earth elemental heart. Now I still have requiem fruit and earth source! Will this help your elemental heart recover?”

“Requiem fruit?” Lambost showed a surprised expression, “I didn’t expect you to have such a thing. What’s even more unexpected is that you helped Moore repair the elemental heart. No wonder you have such a deep friendship with him. I can imagine that it took a lot of effort for you to get these 2. However, the reason I gave you the elemental heart before was just to use you to seal…”

“Stop talking nonsense!” Chen Rui yelled and interrupted Lambost unceremoniously, but due to the wound on his body, he gritted his teeth in pain, “I just want to know if these 2 things are useful to you?”

“Although I’m skeptical and ‘hypocritical’ as you said, I don’t want to annihilate like this.” This tone made Lambost laugh. The requiem fruit automatically left Chen Rui’s hand, turned into a stream of juice, and seeped into this small iceland, “The requiem fruit is no doubt magical. In my elemental heart, the soul that is about to dissipate has begun to reunite. But I’m not the Earth Elemental King, so the Earth Source has no effect on me. I need a liquid called the ‘Phantom Ice Spring, then only I can mend the cracks in the elemental heart. Unfortunately, I don’t know where the Phantom Ice Spring is.”

“As long as it exists in this world, there must be a way to find it. If you use requiem fruit alone, how long can you hold on?”

“According to the time, Moore’s elemental heart rupture should be when he came to the Deep Blue Palace to accept the ‘earth imprint’. Before that, he couldn’t even sense the water origin fragment. Or I should say that he was only the Earth Elemental King at that time, not the Earth Elemental Messenger, so he can’t activate many abilities. As for my current situation… The effect of the requiem fruit just now is obvious. If you can also activate the healing power of the ultimate light element last time, in this sea that is extremely rich with water elements, I can survive for about 5 years.”

Chen Rui breathed a sigh of relief. Although 5 years was not a long time, at least now Lambost would not be in danger of annihilation.

The Crown of Thorns immediately appeared on his head as he activated [Divine Healing]. Under the influence of [Divine Healing], Lambost’s declining breath gradually stabilized. Not only the injuries of Lambost and Chen Rui, even Lalaria, Helen, and Adeline also quickly recovered.

“Lambost, within 5 years, I will definitely meet you here with the Phantom Ice Spring.”

Lambost saw the firmness contained in this sentence. Contrary to the previous words, he just looked at Chen Rui silently, letting the freezing gradually cover his head. The light of his eyes gradually extinguished, turning into a complete ice sculpture.

At this time, the light of [Divine Healing] also disappeared. Chen Rui suddenly felt a strong dizziness as if his nearly broken soul was about to come out of his body.

Although the power of the Crown of Thorns was very strong, it still had its own limit. [Divine Healing] was not omnipotent. This time, Chen Rui’s wounds were so severe. The external wounds were secondary as they were completely stabilized under the action of the [Divine Healing]. It was only a matter of time before he recovered fully.

However, the serious damage suffered by the soul exceeded the extent of [Divine Healing]’s treatment. In the end, he fought completely head-on in the space within Dillosro’s body on the verge of life and death. No one knew how many times he suffered soul shatter’s terrifying impact. If not for the protection of the water elemental heart, it was almost impossible for him to pull through.

Now that he had won after a hard battle and stabilized Lambost’s situation, his nerves that had been tense had finally relaxed.

With this relaxation, the will to persevere under the heavy pressure immediately loses the motivation to hold on. He could no longer persevere and fell down in the 3 women’s exclamations.

Lalaria’s strength was the strongest. After the treatment of [Divine Healing], her injuries had basically recovered, but her physical strength and spirit power had not recovered. Her reaction was extremely fast. She instantly appeared in front of Chen Rui to catch his fallen body. As the current form of the flat-chested loli was too short, she could only carry him and slowly lay him down on the ground.

“This guy has passed out, but… he doesn’t seem to be doing well.” Lalaria frowned.

“I’ll take a look.” Adeline hurried over and put both hands on Chen Rui’s temple as she started to sense. The naga girl was born with a very keen perception talent, especially after obtaining the magic power of the mirage, her perception of the soul had been improved to a higher level.

After a moment of sensing, Adeline’s facial expression changed, “ Oh no, his soul is on the verge of collapse. Lalaria, find a way to save him!”

“I have no choice but to take him to Dragon Island to see if father can do anything, but Dragon Island is far away from here. I’m afraid he won’t last until then.

Adeline was shocked while covering her face and crying, “It’s all my fault. If he didn’t save me…”

“It’s not just you…” Lalaria thought of the situation in which Chen Rui sacrificed his life to save her and Helen, and her emotions were a little complicated, “I also owe him a life.”

Helen had been silent. She was just looking at the sky as if recalling something. In her golden eyes, there was a trace of tenderness.

“Such a lousy man…” The little mermaid princess finally sighed and slowly came to Chen Rui’s side.

Her melodious and moving singing sounded, and the little golden crystal on the little mermaid princess’ forehead began to flash with dazzling brilliance, illuminating the eyes of Lalaria and Adeline.

Adeline, who was also from the sea creature tribe, suddenly thought of the ‘thing’ that the siren tribe cherished most. 2 words came to her mind.

TL: Siren’s Heart?

chapters.title: Chapter 1078: The Value Of Existence
chapters.body:
Chapter 1078: The Value Of Existence

Chen Rui slowly opened his heavy eyes, and the blurred vision gradually became clear.

His first reaction was headache; the second reaction was surprise.

Because his soul power had more than doubled than before. Chen Rui clearly felt that not only his soul, but also his spirit power seemed to have been sublimated in some way, becoming more and more pure. The reason for the headache was not some hidden disease, but because he had not fully adapted to this new soul power.

This was obviously not the effect that ordinary training could achieve.

How so?

In the previous battle with Dillosro, my soul suffered seriously. Even the healing power of the Crown of Thorns could not heal it.

The strange thing is that I am still the [Purple Pole Star Emperor] now; there is no advancement.

“Are you awake?” Adeline’s voice sounded. Her senses were very keen. Although she fell asleep on the bed just now, she noticed it as soon as Chen Rui woke up.

“Adeline.” Chen Rui rubbed his temples and looked at the somewhat familiar room, “Where am I? How long have I slept?”

“This is the Thunder Snake Island, home to the naga tribe. We only came back here yesterday, but it’s been 10 days since you fell asleep.”

“10 days?” Chen Rui didn’t expect he had fallen asleep for so long, “Are you all right?”

“I’m fine.” Adeline’s eyes were a little red, “It’s all my fault…”

Chen Rui interrupted the naga girl’s words, “’Fault’ is not a suitable word for us. If you say this when we go back, even Athena will be angry. Besides, that Abyss Ruler is my worst enemy… Alright, let’s not talk about that. Where’s Helen and Lalaria?”

“Lalaria is a little tired. She has been leading us while racing against time for the past few days. Olypheus suddenly appeared beside you on the third day, which startled us. As for Helen…”

Chen Rui knew that Olypheus’s ‘sudden’ appearance was because the Star Conferring Platform’s merging time limit had ended, so she was automatically released. Ms. Black Dragon should be fine. He asked casually, “How is Helen?”

Adeline hesitated for a moment, “She… she went back to the Reqium Sea Area of the siren tribe.”

Chen Rui’s head was still a little heavy, so he didn’t notice Adeline’s hesitation. He smiled and said, “You have been guarding by my bedside right. I’m all right. You should go to rest quickly, otherwise you will not be beautiful if you have dark circles under your eyes.”

Adeline blushed and wanted to say something, but Chen Rui pressed his temples, “My head still hurts a little. I want to meditate in a calm space. Go ahead and sleep for a while. Let’s talk about things when you wake up after a good sleep. “

“ En .” The naga girl didn’t want to disturb his rest, so she quickly stood up and walked out.

It seems that everyone is fine since we can return here, but Vesilna’s death is a pity. Chen Rui let out a long sigh. He calmed down and entered the Super System.

Although the battle was extremely dangerous, he finally won.

This victory was not only the fight with Dillosro, but also the bet with Satan. He won another 10 years. However, Satan seemed to have misunderstood him and regarded him as a real ‘old friend’, and it seemed to be a very competitive ‘old friend’. In any case, this difficulty was temporarily over. Since he won the bet with Satan, then he had to find another person to fulfill his promise.

In the Super System, the galaxy was as vast and bright as always. Chen Rui could sense that due to the improvement of the whole soul, the power of the galaxy had also undergone some corresponding changes. With the training in the future, the specific benefits should be manifested step by step.

Chen Rui’s thoughts moved a little, and he appeared in front of Python.

Python was a special existence in the galaxy territory. As the spiritual linker of the master-subordinate contract, Chen Rui gave her the ability to travel freely in the universe, but it was limited to this. She could not reach any planet of the galaxy in an instant like an oracle like Veronica, let alone see or enter the Galaxy Divinity Temple. If she wants to reach a certain planet, she must fly with her own strength. The universe was so large and the distances between the planets were quite vast. Even at Pseudo-God speed, with no restrictions on breathing, eating, or physical strength, it was an extremely long journey.

The sudden appearance of Chen Rui seemed to surprise Python slightly. She looked at him for a moment and said, “It’s unbelievable.”

“Unbelievable?” Chen Rui asked, noticing that there was some other meaning in this word.

“The unbelievable I’m saying is your luck.”

Python said lightly, “I was originally in a good mood, because at that time, the faith power and life force of this ‘universe’ quickly depleted. I could even feel the power of contract through my innate ability that your soul power is rapidly weakening and is on the verge of collapse. If your soul collapses, maybe I can leave this strange ‘universe’ with this godsend opportunity. Unfortunately, my good mood was soon gone. Not long after, your soul recovers to normal, and it’s even greatly enhanced – It’s not due to your own strength; it should be some kind of special external force. So I said that your luck is unbelievable.”

External force? Chen Rui frowned. Lambost had already been already frozen. In that case, only Lalaria, Adeline and Helen could provide external force to help me recover my soul. Who was it? What kind of power was used?

“Since you can train to this level, you should understand that luck is also a part of strength.” Chen Rui did not discuss too much in this regard with Python. He asked straight to the point, “You once said that your value of existence is with those 2 conditions. First, I collect all the 7 artifacts; second, I defeat Satan. Now, the 2 conditions have been fulfilled…”

“Did I hear that right?” Python interrupted with a contemptuous expression, “You beat Satan?”

“The enemies I faced this time were Dillosro’s avatar, who was close to the real body, and the Despair Main Altar. I couldn’t resist the enemy alone. I had invited you to take action before, but you refused, so I found Satan.”

“Satan agreed to make a move?”

Chen Rui spread his hands, “In front of interests, there is no absolute enemy. Satan and I formed an association very smoothly. It’s just that this ally coveted the origin power of creation in me, so he proposed an additional betting agreement: Whoever kills Dillosro first will win the 3-month battle ahead of time. In the end, I was lucky enough to kill Dillosro’s avatar first, won the bet, and agreed with Satan to decide the outcome in 10 years. What you sensed before, my soul was about to collapse, was caused by Dillosro’s soul shatter in the final battle, but luckily I got my life back.”

“Python, I just want to ask you, is your promise still valid?”

“ Hmph ! You should add the word ‘final’, then it’s more threatening.”

“You don’t believe what I said?”

“No, I can sense that you are not lying.” The contempt on Python’s face gradually disappeared, “I know very well that if I break my promise, then for you, I will lose the value of existence. Before I make a decision, I also want to ask you a question. Did Satan have any special reactions when he was in contact with you?”

“There is no special reaction, if ‘hostility’ is just a normal emotion.”

“As I said, I can sense the truth of what you say.” Python pointed, “If you don’t want to answer, then this is my ‘final’ sentence.”

“Okay.” Chen Rui shrugged, “Satan was normal in the beginning, but after killing Dillosro in the end… his tone was a bit strange, saying that I was an ‘old friend’. He even said he was going to finish me off in 10 years and step onto the real peak stage.”

Python shook slightly and fell silent.

“I think he may have misunderstood something.” Chen Rui raised his brows as he looked at Python who was bowing her head and said nothing. “Or he is not the only one who misunderstood?”

“It doesn’t matter whether it’s a mistake or a misunderstanding. The key is to go on the path that you have identified. Similarly, you will bear the ending yourself.” Python lost her usual deepness. Instead, she had a strange emotion as she looked up. Her eyes were set on Chen Rui’s face with burning eyes, “My last question, do you believe in fate?”

“If fate and destiny as you know are controlled by the same god or goddess.” Chen Rui shrugged, “Unfortunately, I had a wish a long time ago, that is – let this beauty sing a tune called ‘Conquest’ for me in an ungracious manner.”

The corners of Python’s mouth curled slightly, and there was a strange look in her eyes. She suddenly bowed to him, “I think, I can try the value of existence that I have found, sir.”

Sir?

Chen Rui’s mind moved, but he felt inexplicable that the name ‘sir’ seemed to have been said thousands of times by Python, “Although it is very gratifying to have the help of a powerhouse like you, this should be the result of me completing the agreement between us, not some kind of misunderstanding or deception.”

“I said that those are no longer important. The important thing is that for me, I have returned to the path I want to take.” Python gave him a deep look, “I swear by my soul to follow the person in front of my eyes. Whoever the Sword of Fallen Angel points to, even if the enemy is god, I will have no fear. If I disobey, my soul will be annihilated and will never exist in the world.”

Chen Rui clearly sensed that Python’s oath of the soul had added a special power into the spiritual link. This made the original master-subordinate contract have a special power of rule. Once Python violated the oath, this power of rule would erupt, annihilating her soul directly.

This was more demanding than a normal master-subordinate contract.

Chen Rui was a little surprised by Python’s move. In any case, this once biggest threat had become the biggest help; at least he could breathe a sigh of relief.

“I have a lot of questions I want to ask you, but before that,” Chen Rui waved his hand, and the surrounding environment suddenly changed, “Let’s change to a more convenient place to speak first.”

TL: Please stop beating around the bushes Python. The truth is so tempting.

chapters.title: Chapter 1079: Ancient Secrets
chapters.body:
Chapter 1079: Ancient Secrets

Python looked at the new environment around him in surprise, “This is the palace built by sir’s kingdom power? The breath inside is quite amazing. It gives me the feeling that… even the real palace of the Kingdom of God is nothing more than this.”

“Welcome to the Galaxy Divinity Temple.” Chen Rui smiled indifferently, “I don’t know what the real Kingdom of God looks like… But you can see that this is some kind of Kingdom of God-like existence. Have a seat.”

Python frowned and wanted to say something, but she held back in the end and sat on the chair.

“The question I want to ask mainly involves some secrets that should be called ancient or far ancient.” Chen Rui thought for a while and said, “I know that some secrets may have certain restrictions and taboos, if you can’t answer, I will not force you.”

Python nodded.

“Okay, then I’ll start to ask the first question. What is the secret of the war between humans and the Demon Realm every 500 years? I remember you once said that this is actually like a sacrifice. ‘No result’ is the rule for this kind of war. Once someone violates the rule, it will be ‘corrected’? Why is there such a sacrifice? Who is the sacrifice to?”

“Yes, they are all equivalent to sacrifices.” Python sighed, “Actually, in this world where the strong dominates the weak, people are all sacrifices. The weak sacrifices to the powerhouse, and the so-called powerhouse is nothing but playthings and sacrifices in the eyes of those who are truly supreme. Therefore, the only way is to become the supreme existence, truly looking down on all living beings.”

“The supreme being you’re talking about is god?” Chen Rui frowned, “You haven’t answered the question I asked before.”

Python was silent, obviously not wanting to answer. Since Chen Rui said it before, he did not force her. He then asked, “What exactly is the ‘Abyss’?”

“‘They’… are a curse, also a taboo.”

Chen Rui remembered that Satan once called Dillosro a ‘cursed one’. The ‘Abyss’ also means taboo in ancient languages, but I’m not sure what it is specifically. “What is the curse? Why does the Abyss want to destroy everything?”

“Destruction is for creation.” Python looked a little solemn, “But creation is based on erasing the original things, including you, me, and everything. This question… I can only answer you so much.”

What does the Abyss that destroys everything want to create? Chen Rui had more doubts in his mind, but all the previous questions had also been answered: Why do both the 3 archangels of the human world and the Demon Realm’s Satan regard the Abyss as the most important enemy.

“The next question is, what exactly are the 7 artifacts? The supreme artifact? If so, why haven’t the 7 artifacts been snatched by the super powerhouse for so many years in the Demon Realm?”

“The 7 artifacts… can be said to be the supreme artifact. They are also a kind of taboo. Only those scattered bloodlines can barely activate them. In fact, they are only able to control the corresponding power. No one can use 7 artifacts at the same time. No one can unleash its true power, not even Satan, me or Michael.”

With that said, Python’s eyes were set on Chen Rui, “Unless it’s someone…”

“Unless? Someone?” It suddenly dawned on Chen Rui, and he smiled bitterly, “I understand now. No doubt it is a big misunderstanding.”

“Whether there is a misunderstanding or not, you are the only one who can control the 7 artifacts.” Python didn’t look at Chen Rui, but she just extended her gaze toward the starry sky outside the hall, “Maybe…”

She didn’t say anymore and fell silent again.

Chen Rui knew that the answer should end here. It seems that the root of the misunderstanding of Python, the Water Elemental King and others, lies in the 7 artifacts. The problem is that ‘someone’ controlling the 7 artifacts should be recognized by the artifact. I am clearly seizing the artifacts illegally. I can only blame the Super System for being too OP, even the highest artifact can be snatched.

“What secrets do the Book of Destruction and the Book of Creation contain? What is the Creation Vessel or the Destruction Vessel?”

“If the Book of Creation is likened to a ‘book’, then the Creation Vessel is equivalent to the ‘cover’, where the origin is sealed and preserved. I know you have the so-called 3 holy relics, but that’s really just something made with the ‘cover’. The real vessel has incredible sealing power. It should still be in the Light Divinity Temple.”

This secret surprised Chen Rui. It turns out that the 3 holy relics are not really ‘silver boxes’.

“The Book of Creation and the Book of Destruction are the things left over from the creation of this world by the Originator. Legend has it that the one called ‘Originator’ by god took 3 days to destroy everything, and then took 3 days to create everything that is today.”

“Does ‘everything’ include Gods?” Chen Rui heard the term ‘Originator’ from Python’s for the second time. This was simply a different version of the creation myth. In his original materialistic plane, it would be dismissed, but in this plane, everything was possible.

“Including Gods.” Python said solemnly, “Most of what I’ve learned about the ‘Originator’ comes from mysterious ancient legends and can’t be sure of the truth or the specifics.”

Speaking of gods, Chen Rui thought of something and asked, “What is ‘Twilight of the Gods’? Are the Gods really dead?”

As soon as this question was asked, Chen Rui suddenly felt that Python’s facial expression was a bit strange, “Why are you looking at me like that?”

“This is another taboo question. The so-called ‘death’ is actually the beginning of ‘life’. Everything in the world is a cycle of life and death. I can only answer this much.”

“I suddenly realized that you have the potential to be a master abbot.” Chen Rui sighed. Female benefactor, you are very clever. I have asked so many questions, but almost all of which are specious answers.

Python frowned, “I don’t have much research on alchemy, is ‘abbot’ a special honorary title?”

“Okay, I was wrong.” Chen Rui shook his head. Although there were still a lot of unresolved questions, he finally got a clue, “Maybe it’s because the new soul power has not been fully digested. My thinking is not very clear today. I’ll ask some questions next time.”

“Sir, if you’re done asking, could you let me say a few words.”

Chen Rui was stunned for a moment, then he nodded.

Python pointed to the vast galaxy, “I admit that this universe is extremely realistic. Even I was deceived a few times before, but to be honest, no matter how realistic the faith power and life force of this ‘Kingdom of God’ are, it is still not a real existence. Sir should concentrate on comprehending the creation origin and destruction origin, then strive for an early comprehension of a stronger power, instead of wasting time on this illusory self-indulgence.”

“You’re wrong, I’m not so bored to this extent. To build a kingdom and pretend to be a God in it is simply self-deception.” Chen Rui shook his head, “What I want to say is, this should be a real universe…”

“A real universe? Isn’t this self-deception?” Python’s gaze became cold, and her tone was straightforward, “Compared to Satan, your current strength is too far behind, whether it is strength recovery or strength advancement, 10 years are not enough. If you really want to compete with him, you have to get rid of all these flashy and impetuous things.”

“I was actually thinking of giving you some special abilities. It seems that before that, I need to correct your concept first.” Chen Rui was startled by Python’s unceremonious but pertinent criticism. Veronica’s figure appeared in front of them, “Let me introduce to you. This is Veronica, and this is Python.”

“Veronica?” Python glanced at Veronica, “I seem to have heard of this name when I was in the human world, and there seems to be some dispute about your identity. I didn’t expect you to extract her soul and become your own believer. Although this woman’s soul is very weak, her talent is not bad. If Sir does soul fusion training with her, it would be of great benefit to the growth of strength.”

Being able to get a ‘not bad’ evaluation was indeed a very high evaluation for Python, but Ms. Python seemed to be too self-serving. The soul of Veronica was not deliberately extracted by Chen Rui.

Hearing Python’s words, Veronica finally realized that this woman was completely different from Zola and Catherine before. She seemed to have a different relationship with Chen Rui, so she couldn’t help expressing surprise.

Chen Rui shrugged, “Veronica, I’ll give you a task now. Um … 3 days, let this Ms. Python believe that where we are in now is a real universe.”

“ En , so… oracle?” Veronica asked inquiringly. Chen Rui understood what she meant. He nodded and glanced at Python.

Python felt that there was a special power in her body as though she had a part of the power to control this vast universe. At the same time, Chen Rui’s image in her eyes suddenly became taller, and she couldn’t look directly. Instead, she needed to look up like he was a God. Even with her current peak stage Pseudo-God soul, it was still difficult to resist the generation of this emotion.

“Sir, what have you done?” Python’s facial expression changed slightly.

This was the ‘Heart Servant’ special attribute of Divinity Temple Servant. It would ensure absolute awe of Chen Rui, the controller, and put an end to all violations of will – When Chen Rui looked at Python just now, he had already given her the ability of an oracle, but it was an ordinary oracle whose power and authority were under Veronica.

Feeling the shaking will of Python, Chen Rui thought about it and canceled the effect of this special attribute. Only then did Python come back to her senses and said in shock, “What kind of power was it just now? It’s not like the power of contract. That kind of feeling is simply…”

“Come with me, Ms. Python. We still have 3 days left. I believe what you will see and experience with your own eyes is much more convincing than what I can tell you.” Veronica smiled slightly and walked toward the hall. Python felt a special power coming from this ‘incomparably weak’ woman, and she was actually driven forward involuntarily.

TL: Nice answers, its a taboo👍

chapters.title: Chapter 1080: [All Star Gods View]
chapters.body:
Chapter 1080: [All Star Gods View]

After Python left with Veronica, Chen Rui went straight to the training ground. In the final battle with Dillosro, when his soul was on the verge of life and death, he was driven by instinct and activated a big move that had never been successful before.

The previous method had caused a considerable effect on Dillosro. He devoured too many faiths and lives and almost overloaded. Furthermore, Satan was attacking at the same time outside, which was suffering damage internally and externally This blow carried irresistible power, completely defeating Dillosro’s soul, so the power was evident.

This was based on [Pole Star Kingdom]. The 2 ‘Goddess’ constellations were the core, and the buff structure of ‘Cosmos Annihilation’ was used as a reference. The refined and compressed Star Power, spirit power, soul power, faith power, life force and other powers were all condensed into 1, resulting in the ultimate move.

Chen Rui named it [All Star Gods View], which was actually very ‘ambitious’, because the real power of this move was definitely not the current level, but the future.

The current ‘Star Gods’ were only Zola and Catherine. In the future, as the rest of the people comprehend the 2-star evolution, more and more people would be star-conferred. For each additional person, the power should be doubled. If everyone who accepted the 2-star evolution could become the ‘Star Gods’ of the Super System, then the power of this move would rise to an unbelievable level.

But the premise was that Chen Rui could really control this power and activate it as he wanted.

As his soul was almost completely shattered previously, many memories were blurred. The [Deep Analysis] function that had been turned on before had copied most of the feelings of the [All Star Gods View] into his memory. Of course, this kind of move that contained life force was also a kind of ‘life’, so he couldn’t apply a certain pattern rigidly. Instead, he should capture the ‘instinct’ of life and death and understand the mystery in order to really grasp this move.

After Chen Rui’s soul was inexplicably restored and greatly enhanced, not only his strength was enhanced, but he also felt that his control in all aspects had also been improved by a certain qualitative change. If he was an ordinary trainer, he might have found a breakthrough to advance to the next realm. Unfortunately, his training path was different from that of ordinary people. Now, the Purple Pole Star Emperor of the Super System seemed to have a basic strength limited to the Demi-God level.

With the further comprehension of faith power and life force, including the magical feeling of conferring star and conferring ‘God’, Chen Rui vaguely felt the mystery of the Purple Pole Star Emperor: ‘Control’.

Controlling everything: from himself to the entire ‘universe’. The peak stage of the Demi-God was just a foundation accumulation and comprehension whereas the [Pole Star Transformation] was the real mode to truly exert this comprehension.

From [Blue Pole Star Transformation] to [Red Pole Star Transformation] to today’s ‘Purple’ was step by step for him to grasp and comprehend ‘control’. Chen Rui had a hunch that this was the greatest mystery of the 6-star evolution.

[Pole Star Transformation] was equivalent to a ‘preview’ or a ‘trailer’, as if ‘galaxy’ was just a drop in the ocean of the whole universe. If one day, he could see the whole ocean through this drop, then this was the time for a real qualitative change, and it would also be the time to grasp the ultimate power.

With this kind of joy and insight of ‘seeing the Tao (Way)’, Chen Rui entered the training ground with 1,000 times the time law and began to practice [All Star Gods View].

When Chen Rui’s consciousness left the Super System, another day and night had passed in the outside world.

After this training, he had basically mastered the secrets of the [All Star Gods View]. At the same time, he had adapted to the greatly improved soul power.

Chen Rui got up from the bed and walked out the door.

The house he was in was Adeline’s residence, located in a small secluded valley on the Thunder Snake Island and surrounded by colorful flowers that exuded a refreshing fragrance.

It could be seen that the flowers and plants here were well taken care of. It was likely that Adeline’s closest sister, Strena, did it. Chen Rui thought about it, set up a star point, and then came to the Miro Sea Area through the [Star Gate]. He found the island where the Star Ship was located.

After the disappearance of Crimson Double Teeth Sea Area (Despair Main Altar), the Miro Sea Area at this time no longer had the previous maze-like strange power. He could reach the little iceland where the Water Elemental King was located. Just in case, Chen Rui left a Kingdom level titan and some alchemy creatures to guard the frozen Lambost.

Then, he returned to the Star Ship, marked the coordinates of the Thunder Snake Archipelago on the chart, and launched a space warp.

Due to the extraordinary power of the Dead Sea, the space jump encountered some troubles this time, but with the calculation and adjustment of Crystal Phoenix, the difficulties were finally overcome. After about 3 hours, the Star Ship finally appeared near the Thunder Snake Island.

When Chen Rui returned to the hut, there was already a purple moon in the sky. He happened to see Olypheus, Lalaria, and Adeline there with anxious expressions on their faces. They obviously thought that he was missing.

Seeing Chen Rui appearing in the vision, Adeline was obviously relieved while Ms. Black Dragon flew over, crying and shouting, “Boss!”

“Sorry for worrying everyone. I just went out to do something…” Before he could finish speaking, Ms. Black Dragon plunged into his arms and burst into tears.

“I mean, Olypheus, don’t be so exaggerated.” Chen Rui was taken aback. To be honest, Ms. Black Dragon was a true beauty. Although her breasts were unremarkable, she was tall and had slender legs. Coupled with a pair of stockings and a short skirt, she would attract many eyeballs when walking on the streets of the Dark Moon.

However, Chen Rui really only had brother and sister feelings for this chick with the title of ‘fiancée’ (Isabella: Hey , isn’t she older than you?) The chick was also an ignorant person, and she didn’t seem to regard Chen Rui as a fiance at all. Instead, she regarded him as her boss and relative.

“Okay, stop crying, ain’t I fine?” Chen Rui stroked Ms. Black Dragon’s hair.

“No, boss, I almost died this time! I almost couldn’t see you and sister!”

“ Uh … well, aren’t you all right now?”

“I almost can’t receive allowances and year-end bonuses!”

“I almost can’t get the cold protection fee!”

“I almost can’t get pension insurance!”

“I almost can’t get the housing provident fund!”

Chen Rui was speechless, “…”

Listening to Ms. Black Dragon’s sobbing cry, Chen Rui waved his hand, “Okay, Olypheus, in order to soothe your shock, I will give you those subsidies in advance when I go back. The year-end bonus is doubled!”

“Boss, you are so kind!”

No doubt this move worked. Ms. Black Dragon immediately burst into laughter and excitedly gave him a kiss on the cheek.

This action made Chen Rui stunned for a moment. Olypheus herself felt a little awkward, and she scratched her head embarrassedly as she let go of his arms. Nonetheless, before leaving, the little chick conveniently wiped her tears and snot on Chen Rui.

The virtue of dragons: The clothes of others do not matter.

Chen Rui, “…”

Lalaria came over, looking a little stammering, “That… Chen Rui, I, that… owe you 1 life. No, 2, Vesilna also counts as I owe you! I am the one who took out the treasure map this time. It originally recorded the treasure of an ancient sea creature tribe, but I didn’t expect it to be such a terrifying existence. Vesilna… I caused her death. Also, Olypheus and the others almost died, it’s all my fault.”

“Forget it, things are over now. Vesilna is a pity, but fortunately, everyone else is safe.”

“No, I’ve always had a clear distinction between kindness and grievance. When I say I owe you, I owe you!”

“If that’s true, you seem to owe me a lot.” Chen Rui shook his head. The flat-chested loli was the loser in the Bloody Empire’s martial battle competition last time.

“That’s right, Lalaria still owes me money, and the IOU is still buried in the mound next to the toilet. Mommy said that as a good dragon, even sisters have to settle the accounts.”

Ms. Black Dragon interjected, causing Lalaria to be dumbfounded. She pretended not to hear and raised her eyebrows provocatively at Chen Rui, “ Hmph Hmph , the debt has accumulated to this extent. I don’t have money but I am here. As a last resort, I will pay the debt with my body… as long as you have the guts to ask for it.”

Paying off gambling debts with your body. Chen Rui was also dumbfounded. This flat-chested loli was very aware of the combat power and conflicts of his harem. The reason she said this was that she was sure that he had no guts. (and interest) – No doubt she is shameless, worthy of being an inheritor taught by the Dragon Island’s old father-in-law.

The flat-chested loli was actually a good person and a loyal member of the ‘Duoduo Opera Troupe’. As a friend, Chen Rui naturally didn’t want to make it difficult for her, “Last time I took your most precious… beard, in fact, I have already called it even. This time, um , I don’t like your ‘master’ title. If you can change it, we will not owe each other.”

“ Hmph ! Master… Well, okay, I won’t use ‘master’ in the future, so as not to be confused with Paglio and Roman. Let’s do this! Master… I can’t make you suffer loss like this. I will also give you a thank you kiss, but this thank you kiss will be passed on to your woman. I am so smart! Let me think about it. Should I choose my beauty Yini? Or beauty Kia? Oh Hohoho …”

Can’t there be a normal partner by my side? Chen Rui wiped his sweat and set his eyes on the most normal naga girl.

For some reason, the well-behaved Adeline’s gaze was a little unusual, seeming to be dodging his gaze.

“Adeline, what happened?”

“No… nothing.” The naga girl lowered her head.

Chen Rui did not ask more when he noticed that she refused to speak, “I have been in the Dead Sea for a while. Zola and the others are still training in a dangerous place. If there is nothing else, let’s go back. Adeline, do you want to stay or come with me?”

“Sister has already gone for closed-door training.” Adeline hesitated before answering, “I… I’d better go back with you.”

Chen Rui nodded and asked casually, “ En , what about Helen?”

“Helen…” Adeline bit her lip and finally mustered her courage to say, “You better go to the Soul Song Sea Area to meet her.”

“Go meet her? What’s wrong?” Chen Rui noticed that something was wrong with Adeline.

chapters.title: Chapter 1081: Song
chapters.body:
Chapter 1081: Song

“Adeline, we promised Helen not to say it.” Ms. Black Dragon called out immediately.

“I still can’t do it.” Adeline said with a bitter smile, “I can’t sit back and watch her contribution to Chen Rui. At least, Chen Rui should know the truth.”

“What do you mean? Helen’s contribution?” Chen Rui frowned, “What happened?”

“Master, uh … I’ll say it. It’s already been revealed anyway.” Lalaria spread her hands, “When you were in that iceland, you were unconscious, and your soul was about to collapse. The situation was very dangerous, so Helen activated some kind of talent to save you.”

“Helen?” Chen Rui suddenly realized, and he finally understood the reason why his soul recovered and was strengthened.

“Helen, she…” Adeline sighed, “gave you the Siren’s Heart.”

Siren’s Heart! Chen Rui was shocked. He knew the term because the Corpse Necromancer Guradam’s advancement needed the Siren’s Heart. The Siren’s Heart was the siren’s most precious vital crystal. It was very special. No one could get the Siren’s Heart by force unless it was voluntary.

Later, when he went to the Dead Sea to ask the Dark Elemental King to dispel the [Light Annihilation Seal] in order to save Isabella, he happened to be attacked by sea creatures when he and the Earth Elemental King passed the Requim Sea Area. This was the first time he saw Helen. Compared with her beauty, Helen gave her the biggest impression of being stubborn and unyielding. Later, he came to the Dead Sea with the Old Dragon Emperor Father-in-law Auglas again, defeated the Holy Dragon Rodriguez, and saved all the sea creature tribes of the sea area including the siren tribe. In the end, the Old Dragon Emperor Father-in-law took the little mermaid princess in order to heal Olypheus with her singing.

Facing the powerful Auglas, Helen still did not yield and never surrendered the Siren’s Heart. Later, when she gradually integrated into the Dark Moon family, Chen Rui never mentioned the Siren’s Heart again because the siren who lost the Siren’s Heart would be greatly hurt. He didn’t want to hurt a friend like that.

Unfortunately, that little mermaid princess had never been appreciative. She was still haunted by someone’s ‘evil deeds’ of ‘robbing people’s women’. She had always been hostile to Chen Rui. This attitude made the women in the harem feel very at ease with Helen, and their relationship was naturally very harmonious; even above Adeline. Sometimes they even confided in her about their dissatisfaction and grievances, so the little mermaid princess who had first-hand information often criticized the male protagonist with a vicious mouth, making him speechless.

In the group of relatives and friends, the little mermaid princess was obviously the most special existence. Perhaps in Helen’s mind, Chen Rui had never been regarded as a real friend.

Unexpectedly, this time Helen actually gave him the Siren’s Heart.

For a while, Chen Rui was silent. After some time, he said, “Let’s go to the Soul Reqium Sea Area.”

Everyone said goodbye to the nagas’ Matriarch Modesty. Before leaving, Modesty looked at Adeline. She never spoke to her, but after Adeline stepped onto the Star Ship, she whispered to Chen Rui, “Take care of her.”

Chen Rui nodded to Modesty. Soon, the Star Ship lifted off into the sky and flew toward the Requiem Sea Area.

The Star Ship’s speed was very fast, and it only took a moment to reach the Soul Song Sea Area. This was not the first time the sirens had seen the Star Ship, so they were not as panicked as they were last time.

Soon, the Matriarch of the siren tribe, Elena, Helen’s mother, appeared in front of Chen Rui.

“Aguile… Sir.” Elena bowed. Her gaze toward him was obviously a bit different from the last time.

Chen Rui knew that Elena must know something, “Matriarch Elena, I’m sorry I didn’t tell you before. I’m Chen Rui, Aguile is just my pseudonym. I want to meet Helen.”

“I’m so sorry, Sir Chen Rui. Helen said… she doesn’t want to see you. She doesn’t want to see anyone. Please go back.”

“I just want to say a few words to her. I will definitely not force her to do anything.”

“Sorry, I can’t agree to sir’s request.” Elena stared at Chen Rui for a moment and sighed while shaking her head, “The siren tribe’s character is very persistent. Once we decide something, it will not change. If sir is really caring for her, please don’t force it; give her some time first.”

Elena seemed a little weird to Chen Rui. She seemed to have misunderstood the relationship between him and Helen.

Chen Rui thought for a while, but he still didn’t explain. He gave Elena a bow and turned away.

When Chen Rui flew in front of the Star Ship in the air, he faintly heard a singing.

Familiar singing.

It carried a strange power that seemed to resonate with his soul.

It was her singing.

Castle in the Sky.

Chen Rui looked around, only to see the rolling waves and the quiet silhouettes of the sirens. The singing seemed to be coming from all directions, and he could not identify the specific source. It was just the melody that went straight into his soul and could not be dissipated for a long time.

At this moment, Chen Rui sensed a feeling that he couldn’t even explain as if something suddenly entered his heart. He couldn’t help but cheer. He couldn’t be sure now whether ‘something’ was misunderstood by Elena or himself.

In any case, this wouldn’t be the last time he hears this song, and it wouldn’t be the last time he comes to the Requiem Sea Area.

In the sea, a figure floated above the sea while singing a beautiful and slightly melancholic song, letting the moonlight dye her long silver-white hair into a faint purple. She watched the huge city disappear in the vision and slowly closed her golden eyes.

The Star Ship’s speed was very fast. It had left the Dead Sea and flew toward the Dark Moon Estate.

Lalaria was in the City of Stars for the first time, and everything inside was so shocking that the flat-chested loli was stunned. However, her little partner, Ms. Black Dragon, was no stranger to it. She showed her around in a spirited way as if she was the owner. In fact, this little girl had not been there many times, especially after the City of Star advanced to level 6 civilization metropolitan where great changes had been made. Therefore, she lost her way after just turning around for a while.

Fortunately, the chick knew the killing move of ‘summoning the boss’. After shouting, they were automatically teleported to the game room that she wanted to go to. Olypheus enjoyed Lalaria’s surprised look, and she led her in.

There were various types of games. Namely martial fighting, management, tile-matching, and so on. Unlike ‘Infinite Warrior OL’, they were not introduced to the Demon Realm. They were the internal beta version of Chen Rui’s original ‘game faith plan’. Lalaria was quickly hooked and had a lot of fun with Ms. Black Dragon.

Compared with the heartlessness of the 2 chicks, Adeline was much more sensitive. She could see that after Chen Rui left the Requiem Sea Area, his mood had been a little low. The naga girl didn’t make a sound. She just quietly stayed by his side.

Chen Rui felt something strange. He quickly calmed down, closed his eyes, and entered the Super System.

Veronica was standing in front of the Tower of Faith with Python beside her.

Chen Rui nodded and said, “It seems that you completed the task ahead of time, Veronica.”

“It’s because the deadline you gave is too long. With her experience and ability, it doesn’t take 3 days at all.” Veronica looked at Python, “I still have a lot of unresolved prayers, so I’ll leave first.”

“Veronica.”

Chen Rui’s voice made Veronica pause.

“Thank you.”

Veronica could hear that these were not ordinary polite words. She smiled gently, turned into a ray of light and disappeared into the Pillar of Faith.

“She likes you very much,” said Python, who had been silent for a while.

Chen Rui shook his head gently, “She likes another person, or rather, another person likes her.”

“But she definitely won’t like a second person anymore, even if she can get out of here and be reborn.”

“She can be reborn?”

“I have the [Soul Transfer] technique, which can perfectly transfer the soul into a new body. This is equivalent to a real resurrection. That’s why after I snatched the silver box back then, I decisively gave up my body.” Python said indifferently, “It’s just that, even if she can be reborn, she won’t leave here.”

“These… are all off-topic.” Chen Rui changed the subject, “As for your personal experience, don’t you want to say something else?”

“Veronica took me to many places, including the temple of Wisdom Goddess and Knowledge Goddess.” Python was really shocked at first, but now she had calmed down, “I can’t believe what I see, and I can’t explain what kind of existence you are like. It’s a real universe that’s growing in size and power, and you’re the master and God of this universe?”

“There is no such weak God.” Chen Rui shook his head, “According to my true strength, I’m not your opponent now.”

“The first time I contacted you, you were only the lowest level of strength at that time. In less than 10 years, you have the power that is almost on par with me. If it is another 10 years…” Python took a deep breath, “I am really wrong. Satan is also wrong. He will surely regret giving you 10 years.”

“I can give you the corresponding power. As long as you can comprehend the real power of the 2-star, you can have the same special Goddess position and faith as Zola and Catherine.”

“Goddess position? So, can I also become a Goddess?” Python smiled, “It’s a strange feeling, as if something I’ve been pursuing has reappeared in front of my eyes after I thought it was lost. Plus, it was gained so easily, although it’s a little different from what I expected.”

Chen Rui stared into Python’s eyes, “You don’t want to say anything? For example, I’m who you think I am…”

“It’s too early to judge like this. I have made a choice, no matter who you are and whether my choice is right or wrong…”

Python shook her head and looked at Chen Rui deeply, but her eyes saw through him and fixed on the starry sky behind him as if she was remembering something. After a long time, she said, “I just don’t want to regret it anymore.”

Chen Rui didn’t understand the meaning of this sentence, but he felt a trace of inexplicable frustration in Python’s tone. He suddenly thought of the singing under the moonlight and fell into contemplation.

In the Star Ship, Adeline, who had been by his side, couldn’t help showing joy when she saw Chen Rui open his eyes.

Chen Rui felt warm, “Sorry for worrying you, Adeline.”

The naga girl’s eyes lit up, and she shook her head.

“I’m all right.” Chen Rui smiled and took out a lot of delicate gadgets, “By the way, I brought back some small gifts from the human world. You can choose what you like first. If Olypheus, the little miser, is here, she will take it all.”

“ En .” Adeline blushed slightly and nodded.

chapters.title: Chapter 1082: Soul Fusion
chapters.body:
Chapter 1082: Soul Fusion

With the encouragement of Chen Rui, Adeline also joined the game, but the naga girl did not participate in the battle game between Olypheus and Lalaria. Instead, she chose her favorite single-player simulation game. Soon, she was indulged in entertainment.
