The army slowly made a way, and a team of extremely well-equipped knights appeared in the rear. These knights were all dressed in gold and silver armor, exuding a powerful momentum. At a glance, one knew that they were the elites of the elites.

Among the knights was a middle-aged man in a pale golden robe, riding a pure white warhorse, with a crown on his head and a long sword across his waist. There was a supreme majesty in his eyes.

“Your Majesty! Why did you come in person?” Vajoron hurriedly took a few steps forward and bowed, “These suspicious characters are probably the Black Death Follower. They are very dangerous. My son, Bortuli, was severely injured because of trying to stop their plot… “

It turned out that it was actually Lex the Great who came to the Dragon Horn City to inspect the legion!

It was said that Lex the Great encountered several assassinations of the Black Death Follower previously. No wonder Stanwell and Pelin were here. They came immediately upon receiving the warning from Lavdino, mistaking Catherine for the Black Death Follower and causing a fight to break out.

The arrival of Lex the Great was supposed to be a semi-secret situation. The people only knew that a VIP was coming, but they didn’t know it was Lex himself. But now, Lex didn’t hide his identity anymore, and he showed himself directly.

Vajoron said a few words, only to find that Lex the Great completely ignored him. Instead, he focused his gaze on the ‘Black Death Follower’, looking very strange.

“Your Majesty…”

Lex the Great waved his hand. Vajoron didn’t dare to say more and stepped back.

Then Lex the Great jumped off his horse and walked toward the ‘dangerous people’ step by step. The golden knights and the silver knights behind him quickly formed a circle to isolate the army brought by Vajoron.

Lex the Great walked into the arena step by step and activated an enchantment item. Vajoron only felt that his vision became blurred, and he couldn’t hear the voice. Could it be that His Majesty is familiar with those dangerous people? Then Bortuli… An ominous feeling began to arise in Vajoron’s mind.

TL: Is Duoduo biologically Lex’s granddaughter? Hmm …

chapters.title: Chapter 1089: He Is My…
chapters.body:
Chapter 1089: He Is My…

In the field, Lex watched Chen Rui quietly.

“Elder Stanwell, Elder Pelin, I’m sorry. I have a few words to say to this sir alone.”

Stanwell saw that Chen Rui didn’t raise any objection, so he immediately signaled Pelin. The 2 bowed at Chen Rui and left the enchantment range.

Lex the Great was also an eyewitness to the battle of the Holy Light Mountain. Stanwell knew that the Great Emperor probably recognized ‘Arthur’. Of course, he didn’t think ‘Arthur’ would be Lex’s son. He kicked out this ‘son’ of the Empire and reported to the Holy Church – Now even the Church itself had fully clarified the matter.

However, it now appeared that there might be other entanglements between the 2.

Lex then spoke up to Chen Rui, “What a surprise. I actually meet you here.”

“I’m also surprised.” Chen Rui said indifferently.

“Phil… misses you.” Lex shook his head, “No matter how I explained it, she always believed that you are her brother.”

“At least having a wish is hopeful. Take good care of her.”

Lex sighed, “Garfield is dead.”

“ Oh ?” Chen Rui raised his eyebrows.

“Luke.” Lex said a name.

“The fourth prince?” Chen Rui said with a disdainful smile, “He has also been holding back for a long time. He finally can’t bear it?”

“He has always colluded with the remnants of the Cloud Rider Empire. The assassinations I encountered were planned by him. He wanted to put the blame on Garfield and create the illusion of Garfield committing suicide. As a result…”

“Is Luke dead too?”

“No, he was just imprisoned in secret by me. He can only spend his life in a yard.” There was loneliness in Lex’s eyes.

“You’re in your prime, firmly controlling the entire empire.” Chen Rui shook his head lightly, “For an empire, it is lucky; for a ruler’s family, it is unlucky. Not every inheritor has sufficient patience; not every ruler has the guts and determination to let go. Whether it’s Luke or Garfield, this ending is a relief. Don’t tell me there’s no successor. You’re still young, so is the empire, you totally have time to cultivate or give birth to inheritors. I just hope the same results… don’t appear again.”

Lex stared at him for a moment and sighed softly as he said, “Blue Glory Empire’s King Klongter also encountered assassination, but he seemed to have less luck than me. He was seriously injured, which induced old injuries. Now, he is unconscious. During this period, Princess Landbis quickly wiped out all dissidents including Second Prince Victor with the blood and iron policy, firmly controlling the situation. If everything goes smoothly, when Klongter wakes up or dies, the Blue Glory Empire is about to be replaced by an empress.”

Landbis… finally got her wish?

“These have nothing to do with me.” Chen Rui smiled indifferently.

Lex looked at Bortuli and Lavdino outside the enchantment, “I already know what happened today. Leave these 2 to me.”

Chen Rui thought for a while and nodded, “If your handling can’t give me and my family a satisfactory explanation, I don’t mind handling it myself.”

“Family? This is…” Lex’s eyes were set on Catherine and surprise flashed across his eyes, because he keenly felt that there was a very special demeanor in this seemingly mysterious woman.

A superior!

And not an ordinary superior.

That gaze, that temperament, breath and momentum, is clearly…

A ruler who controls everything!

Catherine also noticed the abnormality. When the eyes of the 2 met, they both felt the feeling of ‘the same kind’!

Perhaps even Chen Rui had no such feeling. Only those who had also stood on the power peak stage for many years could feel this.

Lex’s pupils contracted slightly. I don’t know when the human world has such a ruler – not an ordinary king, but a great ruler!

“She is my woman.”

Catherine seemed to understand something, and she bowed deeply to Lex. Lex understood that if it weren’t for Chen Rui’s words, the etiquette between him and her would never have been like this.

“Daddy, mommy…” Duoduo said curiously. Chen Rui shook his head at her. Duoduo pouted her mouth in dissatisfaction, but she didn’t speak anymore. She just rubbed daddy’s hair back and forth.

When Lex heard the words ‘daddy mommy’, he couldn’t help being shocked. His gaze that looked at Duoduo softened immediately, “This is your daughter? What’s her name?”

“Her name is Duoduo.” Chen Rui took her daughter from Catherine’s arms and lovingly straightened her crooked braids, “There is something wrong with her body.”

“What is the problem?”

“You don’t need to know that. I’m going to take her to the Flaring Sun Volcano in the Red Eagle Empire for treatment.”

“The Flaring Sun Volcano?”

Chen Rui sneered, “It seems that you don’t know yet? As long as one is willing to pay a lot of money, those elite scout griffons of your Thunder Legion can be turned into private aircraft for carrying cargo or personnel at any time.”

“I know now. There are other things that I want to solve together this time.” Lex took a deep breath and nodded slowly, “By the way, the Thunder Legion is going to the Flaring Sun Volcano for a flight practice… …”

“Let’s not talk about the harsh environment of the Flaring Sun Volcano. As far as the location is concerned, it should be in the westernmost part of the Red Eagle Empire. Your legion is going to practice across the hinterland of a neighboring country?”

“You don’t need to know. I just want to tell you that the top elite war griffon in the legion is much faster than the ordinary scout type.”

“Of course, I don’t need to know, your practice has nothing to do with me because I don’t need a griffon anymore. There is a creature that is much faster than a griffon.” Chen Rui said lightly, “I’m sorry, my time is limited. I must go… Please take care.”

Lex the Great was silent for a while. He looked at Chen Rui who turned away and said nothing.

Catherine turned her head to Lex. This time Lex didn’t stand still, but he cautiously bowed back in the same way.

Catherine didn’t speak and followed behind Chen Rui.

“Daddy.” Duoduo whispered to Chen Rui’s ear, “Who is this uncle?”

“You can’t call him uncle.” Chen Rui paused and replied softly, “He is my…”

Lex immediately pricked up his ears, but unfortunately, he couldn’t hear him clearly because Chen Rui had already strode out of the soundproof enchantment with Duoduo in his arms.

When Lex removed the enchantment, Chen Rui had come to Stanwell with Duoduo and Catherine in his arms.

Duoduo should have understood the relationship with this ‘uncle’. Probably because of some kind of order from his father, she didn’t speak and just waved desperately at Lex with her eyes flashing with surprise.

Seeing the little girl’s pure smile without any impurities, Lex felt a soft spot in his heart being touched heavily.

This kind of emotion was like the first time he met his beloved Ikrina on the ball, and it was like the feeling of being a father when the first child was born.

Afterward, Dragon Elder Stanwell changed from a human form to a huge dragon body, and he bowed his usual proud head. Chen Rui and Catherine hopped up with Duoduo, and the holy dragon fluttered its wings and rose into the sky.

Lex saw that the little girl was still waving at him.

Not reverence, not fear, just closeness.

Lex wanted to wave hard at her too.

But he couldn’t.

He could only silently watch him, her, and her, riding the giant dragon and disappearing from his vision.

After withdrawing from the distant gaze, Lex slowly walked back to the center of the golden knight, returning to the cold and dignified gaze which glanced over the still incontinent Bortuli and the slumped Lavdino. They finally set on Vajoron whose eyes flickered.

“The Black Death Follower you mentioned is the honored guest of the Dragon Valley.” Lex made Vajoron’s cold sweat broke out in 1 sentence, “I haven’t introduced to you yet. This is Elder Pelin of the Dragon Valley, who is under the control of the Dragon Emperor Royal Majesty Pagris’ order to secretly protect me, and the one who flew away just now is the confidant of the Dragon Emperor Royal Majesty Pagris, the holy dragon Elder Stanwell of the Demi-God Level.”

Only then did Vajoron know that these 2 strangers were the dragons who were hiding and protecting Lex. The one who did not hesitate to change the dragon’s body in public and respectfully carried the 3 of them and flew away, was actually a powerful holy dragon who was the Dragon Emperor’s confidant elder. He possessed the strength of Demi-God level!

No wonder Lex the Great went so cautiously. The soundproofed conversation was probably negotiating.

Then, ‘Black Death Follower’ whom I personally identified just now…

When Vajoron thought of this, he was sweating profusely. That kind of extraordinary strength could be said to have surpassed the ordinary world. Some rules were simply non-existent to them. If they really wanted to retaliate or attack, the consequences would be disastrous.

Fortunately, behind the Dragon Bright Empire were the dragons, that person should have given face to Lex the Great.

“Your Majesty, it seems that it was a misunderstanding just now. In fact, my son Bortuli… is also thinking for Your Majesty’s safety.”

“Shut up! What does my safety have to do with your son’s desire for beauty?” Lex the Great said angrily, “You still want to argue! According to the accurate intel I got, the cause of this incident is because your good son has bad intentions for that madam! And you! Lavdino, you not only coveted their treasure, but you framed that madam as the Black Death Follower. You are so disappointing! Elder Pelin, I’m sorry for recommending such a despicable character to you.”

What’s the use of saying sorry? I am almost killed by this idiot… Pelin muttered to himself, but he shook his head resolutely on the surface, “I have received the order of that sir, and I will never be associated with Lavdino again. Your Majesty can deal with him as you wish, don’t worry about me. Besides… I suggest that you punish him severely and set an example!”

The last sentence made Lavdino, who was already tormented by pain and fear, unable to hold back. He finally fainted.

Then Lex the Great said something that made Vajoron almost faint too, “Let’s not talk about your damn son. Talk about my son. Do you also call 1 of my sons as ‘Your Majesty’ in private?”

“Your Majesty! I never…”

Before he could finish speaking, a booklet was thrown at Vajoron’s feet, and Lex’s cold voice sounded, “Look for yourself.”

Vajoron timidly picked up the booklet, and he shivered after turning a few pages.

“Your plan accomplices, Legion Commander Folie of the Thunder Legion, Deputy Legion Commander Temondry… and many others have already confessed.” Lex said sternly, “I came to Dragon Horn City this time not only to inspect but also to prove some things. The results… really surprised me. Don’t carry any more hope. What you see now are the troops that are completely loyal to me, and all your forces have been removed by me. “

“Your Majesty! I was just confused at that time, and I was threatened by the fourth prince. Your Majesty, in view of the Lakne Family’s many years…” Vajoron knew that the situation was over, and it was useless to argue, so he quickly begged for mercy.

Lex said ghastly, “Since you are so confused, the Lakne Family no longer needs to exist.”

Genocide? The Government Administration Council Dean, Old Kovax, on the side was surprised and spoke up, “Your Majesty…”

Lex raised his hand and stopped Old Kovax’s advice, completely ignoring the wailing of Vajoron who was being dragged down. He slowly looked away and set his gaze on a cloud where the huge figure disappeared.

TL: It would be a spectacular scene if Duoduo smooches Lex’s face 😆

chapters.title: Chapter 1090: Duoduo’S ‘Illness’
chapters.body:
Chapter 1090: Duoduo’S ‘Illness’

Chen Rui didn’t know about Lex the Great’s purge at Dragon Horn City. In fact, it really had nothing to do with him. His main concern now was to get to the Flaring Sun Volcano as early as possible because Duoduo’s ‘cold illness’ started to act again.

“Daddy, Duoduo is so cold.”

“Stanwell, can you be faster?”

“It’s already the fastest. At this speed, we can reach the Flaring Sun Volcano in about 2 days.”

Chen Rui nodded. Just now, he was overly concerned. In fact, Stanwell’s strength and flying speed far exceeded that of a griffon. To reach the Flaring Sun Volcano in 2 days was much faster than he thought.

“Duoduo, daddy will sing you a song.”

Listening to Chen Rui’s out-of-tune singing, Stanwell had previously thought it was funny, but slowly, he couldn’t help but recall the situation where he and his younger sister, Loraine, depended on each other. He suddenly felt a little melancholy. Some of his hatred and fear unknowingly faded.

After traveling day and night, they finally arrived at the Flaring Sun Volcano area in the afternoon of the second day.

This was not a volcano, but a huge volcanic group. Just like the name of ‘Flaring Sun’, many craters would emit sun-like flares from time to time. The eruption was continuous, and hot lava flowed all year round.

Although this was the territory of the Red Eagle Empire, there were no people at all because the environment was too harsh.

“There are too many volcanoes here, and the geographical span is very large. Stanwell, do you know where the fire elementals are located?”

Stanwell shook his gigantic head, “It’s so damn hot here. I’ve only been here occasionally with the red dragon a long time ago, and I haven’t explored it carefully.”

“Okay, you can go now.” Chen Rui nodded and flew down with Catherine and Duoduo. After thinking about it, a bottle of black potion appeared in front of the holy dragon, “I already knew that what happened before was a misunderstanding. This bottle of resurrection potion is a reward for you.”

Resurrection potion? Stanwell’s eyes were bright. This is the potion that can only be crafted by the great grand master. It is a unique treasure in this world where there is no great grand master.

Duoduo waved to Stanwell, “Uncle, you are not a bad person. Goodbye!”

Stanwell waved his hand subconsciously before he suddenly came to his senses. His face flushed red, and he disappeared into the sky in a white flash.

“Your daughter is more lethal than you.” Catherine touched Duoduo’s little face.

“Lethal! Lethal!” Duoduo waved her fist proudly.

“What to do? This daughter is like her mother. She conquers the city with a smile, and wins without fighting against the enemy.” Chen Rui winked his eyes pretending to be relaxed. Due to Duoduo’s condition these days, both he and Catherine had been under tremendous mental pressure. It was rare to relax a little bit of tension.

“Flowery words.” Catherine shook her head, “Let’s figure out how to find the fire elementals.”

“After much deliberation, there is only one stupid solution.” Chen Rui covered Duoduo’s ears, “You should cover your ears too.”

“No doubt it’s stupid,” Catherine said oddly, “But I think you’re even more stupid, why don’t you keep us in the Tower of Glory?”

“Okay, I admit you’re right, smart woman.” Chen Rui shrugged.

After a while, the purple starlight shone in the sky. Then, a deafening sound enveloped the entire area of the main volcano.

“Ogmarton! Fire origin fragment!”

Although there were only 2 short terms, Chen Rui believed that as soon as Ogmarton heard ‘fire origin fragment’, he would come immediately.

No doubt, about 20 minutes later, 3 rays of light appeared in vision.

White, green, red.

3 Kings of Light.

Chen Rui let out a long breath and deactivated the [Pole Star Transformation].

“Even in the memory of the Elemental King, you are the first person to shout with the strength of Pseudo-God.” Light Elemental King Delkus showed a bewildered expression.

The Wind Elemental King Sethtine’s eyes twinkled, “I’m amazed by your strength advancement, my friend Chen Rui.”

“I’m not like these 2 hypocritical guys who like to beat around the bush.” Fire Elemental King Ogmarton asked in a hurry, “Where is the fire origin fragment?”

“It’s a long story.”

Ogmarton immediately interjected, “Then keep it short!”

“Actually, I did find the fire origin fragment.” Chen Rui looked at the 3 Elemental Kings with different expressions and sighed, “But, there is 1 thing that I need your help…”

Soon after, at the Blazing Flame Hall, where the fire elementals reside.

After listening to Chen Rui’s brief account of Duoduo’s situation, the Fire Elemental King Ogmarton looked at the little girl who excitedly flew around the palace filled with lava and flames. A surprised expression on his burning face, “Chen Rui, is your home similar to the Blazing Flame Hall?”

Chen Rui was speechless. Your house is the one full of fire. Well, it is indeed full of fire here.

Sethtine shook his head, “Your metaphor is as shitty as your temper, Ogmarton. You should say, this little girl is a fire elemental in human skin.”

This metaphor is even more shitty. Chen Rui was more speechless, “Your Highnesses, I know that the appearance of the fire origin fragment makes you all feel good. However, my wife and I are very worried. Is there any way to help my daughter out of the pain?”

Ogmarton took a close look at Duoduo with a suspicious expression, “Is that little girl your biological child?”!

“If someone else asks me that, I’ll punch him unceremoniously.” Chen Rui frowned, “I’m here to ask for help. Seriously, how to cure Duoduo’s illness? If you really have a way, if you really treat me as a friend, please answer truthfully.”

“I’m serious too, is she really your daughter?”

Chen Rui originally thought after coming here, the Fire Elemental King should have a way to save Duoduo, but who knew that the other party would ridicule him like this. The pressure accumulated in his mind suddenly burst out, and he shouted, “Ogmarton!”

“Chen Rui.” Catherine pressed Chen Rui in time, “Your Highnesses, as it is related to the safety of my daughter, so my husband is a little rude. Please forgive us. Although it is the first time we meet, I have heard Chen Rui say that the 3 Kings of Light can be regarded as good friends, especially the Your Highness Wind Elemental King Sethtine. For Your Highness Ogmarton and Your Highness Delkus, Chen Rui can keep his promise to find the light origin fragment and fire origin fragment, so he should also be a friend who keeps his promises. Therefore, I want to confirm 1 thing first – Is the condition of Duoduo serious?”

“Ms. Catherine, your observation skills are admirable.” Sethtine said. “It’s just that your daughter’s condition is more special than you think.”

“Yes.” Ogmarton replied, “The breath of the power in this little girl feels vast and intimate to me. Not only that, she may also have some ancient and rare bloodline power.

That’s why I wanted to clarify if she is your real daughter. “

Chen Rui also gradually calmed down, “I’m sorry Ogmarton, I was too impatient just now.”

“I prefer straightforward friends.” Ogmarton shook his head, “Unfortunately, my current state is far from being your opponent. Otherwise, a good fight will be enough to make friends.”

“Put away your bad habits; don’t get off topic.” Delkus spoke up, “As Elemental Kings, we are very grateful to you for bringing back the origin fragment. You are the true friends that Elemental King admits. Now that you need help, we will definitely exert all effort. At present, the exact situation of Duoduo must be found out before the correct judgment and method can be selected.”

“I won’t say more courtesies.” Catherine nodded, “Frankly speaking, I’m from the Demon Realm’s Asmodeus Royal Family. We are indeed Duoduo parents, but my original pregnancy may well be due to… a special power that I accepted from Chen Rui. It was under this power that I completed the 5th nirvana of the Asmodeus Royal Family and became pregnant with this child.”

“Special power?” Delkus glanced at Chen Rui.

“I wonder if the 3 of you have heard of an existence called the ‘phoenix’?”

“Phoenix?” Delkus patted his head, “No wonder I feel that degree of fire affinity in her. Phoenix is an ancient demonic beast with powerful combat power, and it can be reborn in flames. However, after a certain catastrophe, they have almost disappeared. I didn’t expect phoenix to still exist! But why is she currently a human body?”

“I once happened to hatch a phoenix, and it was like a daughter to me. Because of an accident…” Chen Rui showed the [Fire Phoenix Stigmata] on his left arm, “But she did not really annihilate. Instead, she was kept in this mark — You may not be able to see it, but in fact, this mark exists. Later, Catherine and I became husband and wife. Duoduo probably reincarnated into a human body in this way, and she was reborn as our daughter.”

Delkus pondered and said, “This may explain why Duoduo likes the fire environment so much, but that’s not the key question. Even the phoenix wouldn’t have a bloodline like that.

“The ancient bloodline you’re talking about isn’t a phoenix?” This greatly exceeded Chen Rui’s expectations.

“She was kept in your body and was born through the maternal body…” Sethtine looked at Catherine for a while, shook his head, and finally set his eyes on Chen Rui.

Not only Sethtine, but Ogmarton and Delkus also looked at Chen Rui. He felt a little awkward being stared at, “What’s wrong with me?”

“2 possibilities. 1 is Duoduo’s own reason, and the other is you.” Sethtine said profoundly, “No matter which reason, I can answer you accurately, Duoduo’s condition is not an illness.”

“Not an illness?” Chen Rui and Catherine said in unison.

“This should be an ‘awakening’ of bloodline power.” Delkus said solemnly, “It’s not a phoenix bloodline, because she originally had the purest phoenix power. This kind of bloodline is very rare, and it can be called the closest to the ultimate existence! In other words, it is the easiest shortcut to reach the ultimate.”

Ultimate? Catherine and Chen Rui looked at each other. Catherine couldn’t help but speak up, “Duoduo has the closest bloodline to the ultimate?”

“It could be Duoduo, or it could be him…” Delkus looked at Chen Rui, but he finally said to Catherine, “The strange thing is, you also have a little bit of it. It should be because something happened to him or her. This kind of transfer has benefited a lot.”

“Transfer? Benefit?” Catherine expressed surprise and suddenly understood something, “The 5th nirvana!”

TL: Is Duoduo going through a nirvana? What about the ancient bloodline?

chapters.title: Chapter 1091: Fire Condensing Crystal Sand
chapters.body:
Chapter 1091: Fire Condensing Crystal Sand

“I still need to confirm again. Chen Rui, Ms. Catherine, please give me your hands. Relax all your strength and don’t resist.” Delkus’s hands glowed with crystal white light.

Catherine and Chen Rui stretched out their hands according to his words. Delkus took their hands, closed his eyes, and enveloped them with a white light that flickered uncertainly.

After a while, the light disappeared. Delkus let go of his hand and looked at Chen Rui’ with a meaningful gaze, “It stands to reason that the [Body of Light Glory] like you should be more easily detected by my light elemental heart. But surprisingly, I didn’t have any substantial discovery. I couldn’t even detect the ‘stigmata’ you mentioned. I just vaguely felt with my instinct that the boundless and vast power in your body is as unfathomable as the universe. In other words, the secrets you have are far beyond the limit of what I can detect.”

The Wind Elemental King and Fire Elemental King looked at each other in amazement. The Light Elemental King’s elemental heart has the ability to ‘see through’ everything, especially this kind of deep body detection. Even Pseudo-God couldn’t hide from his ability. Yet Delkus actually said that Chen Rui’s secrets were beyond the limits of his knowledge.

Chen Rui knew that this was because of the Super System.

“Ms. Catherine, you’re equally incredible. If the ‘Nirvana’ you’re talking about is some kind of talent in the Demon Realm’s Asmodeus Royal Family,” Delkus turned to Catherine, “I can tell you that kind of talent’s real secret is to seek to get closer to a certain origin bloodline step by step, so as to obtain the strongest power. This process of climbing high from low is quite dangerous, and you will be annihilated if you are not careful. Judging from your state, you should be introduced by a stronger bloodline and successfully merged with it. In the process, a small part of that bloodline remains in your body, and it also induces special changes that give you a strong power.

I can feel that your power is beyond imagination. With your current early stage of the Demi-God, you should be able to compete with the existence of the intermediate stage of the Demi-God. “

Delkus’ remarks reminded Chen Rui of the [Fire Phoenix’s Favor] on Catherine shown in the [Analytical Eyes] while he himself was [Fire Phoenix’s Yearning]. These should be due to Duoduo.

Delkus’ judgment was indeed quite accurate. Catherine’s special power in the Bloody Empire’s martial battle competition had begun to show signs. Catherine herself had said that Duoduo had given her a very powerful power, but she had only digested part of it. As for cross-level confrontation, it was best demonstrated by the fight against Stanwell on the intermediate stage of the Demi-God in Dragon Horn City. Although Catherine was concerned about revealing herself as a demon, she had already stopped when Chen Rui arrived. Nevertheless, she had not fallen behind in the confrontation with Stanwell before that, not to mention the disadvantage of carrying Duoduo.

“Approaching… the origin bloodline?” Catherine noticed the secret of ‘Nirvana’ that Delkus said.

“It’s true that the origin bloodline is extremely powerful. Although it is divided into 7 strands, relatively speaking, the power of ‘Void’ possessed by your bloodline should be the most quintessential existence.”

“Void?” Chen Rui’s thoughts turned around, and a cloak appeared in his hand, “What do you call this?”

Catherine recognized that the cape in Chen Rui’s hand was the Dark Shadow Cape, 1 of the 7 artifacts. Sethtine had already called out its other name, “It’s really the Void Badge!”

“Wind, Fire, Water, Earth, Light, Darkness, Void.” Chen Rui seemed to understand, “The 7 scattered bloodlines you mentioned are these 7?”

“That’s right.” Delkus frowned, “How did you take out the Void Badge just now? Unless you’re an approved bloodliner, you won’t be able to keep it even in a space item.”

“I will tell a secret to you. I hope to get an accurate answer.” With that said, another long sword appeared in Chen Rui’s hand. The 3 Kings of Light were shocked again.

“Light Badge! No, there is also the Earth Badge, the Fire Badge… Dear Elemental God!” Ogmarton exclaimed, “The 7 parts of the supreme artifacts are actually all together, do you want to repeat… “

Ogmarton didn’t say more, and Chen Rui immediately asked, “What is the supreme artifacts? What are the secrets of these 7 items? It isn’t the first time I heard about this, but I still didn’t get the answer.”

“As their past and present master, you should know better than us.” Delkus gave Chen Rui a deep look, “No wonder I have that feeling about you; no wonder your daughter has such a bloodline.”

“I can say with confidence that you all have misunderstood.” Chen Rui shook his head resolutely. It was not the first time he was misunderstood like this. It seemed that the 7 artifacts had become the source of misunderstanding again, “Duoduo has that kind of power because of herself. As for these 7 things, strictly speaking, I’m not the real master of them, but I used a method similar to the secret technique to forcefully control their power.”

Sethtine interjected, “It doesn’t matter how you do it, you are their master now. Sooner or later, you will understand…”

Duoduo, who was flying and playing in the distance, suddenly trembled and fell to the ground. Chen Rui and Catherine had been paying attention to their daughter’s movements, and they moved almost at the same time. In the end, Chen Rui took a step faster and caught their daughter in time.

“Daddy, I’m so cold.” Duoduo’s voice became weaker.

“You’ll be fine, baby.” Chen Rui’s heart trembled while hugging her daughter who was turning cold rapidly.

“Daddy! Cry.” The little girl reached out and touched Chen Rui’s red eyes!

Feeling the coldness of that little hand, Chen Rui squeezed out a smile, “Daddy’s eyes are uncomfortable, and it’s not a cry. Duoduo should be brave too.”

“ En .” Duoduo curled up trembling, and she didn’t say a word. Catherine took Duoduo from Chen Rui’s hand and hugged her tightly.

Chen Rui instantly returned to the 3 kings, “I don’t want to know any secrets now. I just want to know how I can get rid of my daughter’s suffering?”

Delkus shook his head, “I understand your feelings. As I said, she is not sick, but it is a symptom of the bloodline’s awakening. This is a natural and inevitable process. As long as the awakening is successful, she will gain unimaginable power and potential. It’s just… it’s probably because of what you call ‘reincarnation’ or something else, this awakening is a little early.”

Sethtine said, “Actually, this is a normal phenomenon. It’s not a big problem. When the awakening is successful, all the symptoms of discomfort will naturally disappear. What you should be worried about is not this but another thing – This kind of bloodline awakening is quite dangerous. If she fails, she will not only lose her strength, but her life is also at risk.”

Chen Rui glanced at Catherine and her daughter before he said decisively, “I don’t want her to have any unimaginable power. I just want her to live in peace.”

This is parent.

It was only now that Chen Rui understood what parents’ selfless love meant.

Real understanding.

Unfortunately, he had no chance to repay his parents.

“Bloodline’s awakening cannot be stopped or reversed.” Ogmarton’s voice sounded, “Fortunately, she has a pure fire element body. With the flame fist… that is, the fire origin fragment, I can activate the origin secret technique to integrate the fire source power into her body in the form of a mark. This kind of origin mark will greatly increase her chances in completing the entire awakening process, and it can also cancel the occasional cold symptoms. I’ve got all of the materials here, but you’ve got 1 more thing to look for.”

“What is it?” Chen Rui asked quickly.

“Fire condensing crystal sand. It contains the essence of the earth element power, which can neutralize the origin power. It is the most suitable medium for activating the fire element origin’s secret technique.” Ogmarton expressed regret, “Unfortunately, this kind of thing is extremely rare. I don’t know where to find it.”

“It’s really rare, but I know there’s a place that might have something like this,” interrupted Delkus, “I overheard it when I was cooperating with the Holy Church.

That place is — Dreamy Oasis of the Black Prison Desert.”

“Black Prison Desert?” Chen Rui thought for a while, “I seem to have heard of it. It is known as 1 of the few dangerous places alongside the Storm Island, Nightmare Volcano and other places.”

“You’re wrong. Compared with the Black Prison Desert, Storm Island is not worth mentioning.” The Wind Elemental King Sethtine looked solemn, “I found the wind origin fragment on the periphery of the Black Prison Desert. The process can be described as a dangerous experience. If I hadn’t possessed the element power to control the wind, I would have been annihilated. I have never been to the Dreamy Oasis, which is said to be the core of the Black Prison Desert. Let me give you a sincere piece of advice, even if you rush in rashly now, you will also encounter unimaginable dangers.”

“I wouldn’t doubt the advice of a friend, especially one from an Elemental King. But nothing can stop me from bringing back the fire condensing crystal sand.”

“This Gale Tide Pearl is for you. It can be used 3 times to resist any storm or wind element attack, but it can’t deal with the certain anomalies in the desert.” The Wind Elemental King spread his hand open, and a blue bead flew to Chen Rui.

“Thank you, and thank all of you, my friends.” Chen Rui took the Gale Tide Pearl, “By the way, there is 1 more important thing. I forgot to tell you about the fire origin just now because I was so eager to talk about Duoduo’s condition. It’s about the fire origin fragment and the Water Elemental King.”

Ogmarton spoke up, “I was about to ask you too. Where did you find the fire origin fragment?”

“The Demon Realm. To be more precise, at Despair Main Altar. At that time, the avatar of Dillosro, an avatar that was approaching its final form, owned it…” Chen Rui described the battle that took place in the Dead Sea briefly. He included the Water Elemental King’s elemental heart cracking and the Phantom Ice Spring required for repairing it.

“So that’s what happened…” Ogmarton rubbed his chin, “I thought that once we get all the origin fragments together, then we can… I didn’t expect that guy’s elemental heart to shatter.”

We can what? Chen Rui glanced at Ogmarton, but unfortunately, the Fire Elemental King did not continue.

“Actually the Water Elemental King is right, any Elemental King would do that.” Delkus spoke up, “To be able to destroy the Despair Main Altar, you all did a great job, but I don’t know where the Phantom Ice Spring that repairs the water elemental heart is.”

“In 10 years, I will definitely find it.” Chen Rui said to Catherine. “You stay here and take good care of Duoduo. I will leave immediately for the Black Prison Desert.”

“Be careful with everything.” Catherine nodded and reminded him while holding Duoduo who was gradually falling asleep.

TL: Don’t let Duoduo die again 😰

chapters.title: Chapter 1092: Border Town
chapters.body:
Chapter 1092: Border Town

Vast Sand Empire, Tolia City!

A black and skinny 14 years old boy old was trying his best to sell goods to a traveler from out of town, “Respectable sir, this is the most famous handicraft, Clear Sand Mirror, in the Vast Sand Empire. It is the best gift for women.

I bought the goods directly from the boutique, and I only charged 1 at the cost price of 4 purple crystal coins. If you buy 3 pieces, there will be more promotion, that is 10 purple crystal coins. You won’t find this price anywhere in the city. “

The foreign tourist was Chen Rui who rushed all the way. The Black Prison Desert was located in the southwest of the human world. The area was extremely vast, but due to its remote location and harsh environment, there were only 2 barren and small empires in the periphery. The Vast Sand Empire was 1 of them.

Tolia City was the largest city in this empire other than the capital. It had a small area and a small population. In Chen Rui’s view, this second largest city was at most equivalent to a small town in the Dark Moon Estate.

Seeing Chen Rui’s interested look, the teenager had an idea and put the mirror back into the small bag in his hand, “It should be sir’s first time to Tolia City. Although the girls here are not as good as the big cities, they are unique. Do you want me to take sir to a good place? The girls there are the cleanest and hottest in the city. I guarantee sir will be satisfied! Sir only needs to give me a small tip.”

Looking at the young man who spared no effort to pimp, Chen Rui shook his head secretly and asked, “I’m not interested in souvenirs or women. Are you familiar with the desert area?”

“Sir, I’ve grown up here since I was a kid, and there’s no one here who doesn’t know me, Little Jim. I am known as Know-it-all. I even know how many dunes there are in the Black Prison Desert.” Little Jim said graciously.

“It’s really my first time in Tolia City, so tell me about the Black Prison Desert, Know-it-all Little Jim.”

“ Uh …” Little Jim blinked while looking at Chen Rui without speaking.

Chen Rui smiled. With a flick of his finger, a purple crystal coin was thrown high up. Little Jim caught it quickly, nodded and bowed, but he was secretly thinking that he could cheat a lot of money today because he met a generous foreigner.

While thinking about it, another purple crystal coin appeared in the foreigner’s hand. Little Jim was overjoyed, but the hard purple crystal coin instantly turned into powder between the foreigner’s fingers, “I will ask other people the same question. If what you say is not true, I don’t think I need to talk nonsense anymore.”

Little Jim shuddered, and he immediately put aside some extra thoughts to honestly introduce the desert situation. Chen Rui inquired about a batch of materials, and among them was the fire condensing crystal sand. Little Jim was worthy of being a know-it-all. He was quite clear about common materials and could tell which shops sell them in the city, but he didn’t know anything about fire condensing crystal sand; he had never heard of such a thing at all.

Chen Rui could see that the boy was not lying, but the Light Elemental King Delkus would not lie to him, so the fire condensing crystal sand must be in the Black Prison Desert.

There was also a legend about the Dreamy Oasis. Long ago, there was a mysterious and remote empire in the desert called Red Battle Empire. The king was incompetent, and he favored an ambitious prime minister. Under the tyrannical rule of the prime minister, the people believed in cruelty, and there were fewer and fewer people believing in light.

This prime minister not only coveted the throne, but he also coveted the beauty of the princess. The princess was a devout believer of the Holy Church, and her fiancé was a young and promising general of the empire. Unfortunately, the general was killed after the prime minister slandered him to the king, and the king re-married the princess to the prime minister. The grief-stricken princess went on a 3-day hunger strike to pray to Light God and died of love.

The sincerity and infatuation of the princess moved the Light God, and a terrifying storm was set off to engulf the Red Battle Empire. Only the place where the princess died of love was turned into an oasis, and the believers of the light were spared in the oasis.

The soul of the princess entered the Kingdom of God under the guidance of light. She was granted the name, ‘Tezaneer’, by Light God, which was the ancient saying of ‘desert messenger’. Over time, she becomes the Desert Goddess.

“Sir, this goddess is a real existence and will show miracles every few years or hundreds of years to help those lost in the desert to return safely, and only those who believe in her will be able to have good fortune.” Little Jim took out an ornament from his clothes. A small god statue was engraved on it, “This is the Desert Goddess Tezaneer’s statue, although it is only a small god under the Light God, in this Black Prison Desert, she’s the real god. If sir really wants to go to the desert, then please wear this goddess statue and get the blessing of the goddess. This high grade goddess statue only needs 10 purple crystal coins…”

Hearing that Little Jim was selling products again, Chen Rui shook his head to reject, “You all believe in the Goddess Tezaneer? So does Tolia City have the Holy Church?”

“Only the capital has the Hall of Light, but the Desert Goddess is the god under the Light God, and it is located on the edge of the desert. The church in the capital also admits that this faith is not in conflict.”

The Holy Church admits it? Chen Rui was a little more curious about this so-called Desert Goddess.

According to Little Jim, it was rumored that the Red Battle Empire had left a lot of treasures, and the key breakthrough was Dreamy Oasis. Many adventurers once flocked to it. Unfortunately, not only did they find nothing, but most of the treasure hunters never returned. Consequently, the popularity had also been greatly reduced, but the dangerous name of the Black Prison Desert had spread since then.

Little Jim mentioned Dreamy Oasis-related intel in the end- Dreamy Oasis was actually active! In other words, this oasis did not have a fixed location, but it moved like a living thing.

Chen Rui frowned secretly. The Black Prison Desert is as huge as the sea, the environment is very harsh, and the magic map cannot be used. Finding a small oasis in such a huge area is as difficult as finding an unknown island in the Dead Sea.

Since it was concerning the safety of Duoduo, plus the lesson that he almost took the wrong way in the Storm Islands area before, Chen Rui did not dare to risk it. He asked, “Little Jim, is there a guide in Tolia City who can find the Dreamy Oasis?”

“Sir, you… do you want to find the treasure of Dreamy Oasis?” Little Jim revealed a surprised expression, “It is said that the location of the oasis is in the core of the Black Prison Desert. Let alone finding the oasis, no one can even enter the core area. In addition to the terrifying sandstorm, there are vicious sand bandits on the road. These bandits attack towns from time to time, looting food and property. Just last month, Tolia City was attacked.”

“You don’t need to worry about the reason why I’m looking for the Dreamy Oasis. You just need to answer,” Chen Rui had a black crystal coin in his hand.

Prices in such a small place were much lower than those in big cities, and a black crystal coin was already quite an astonishing amount of money. Little Jim swallowed involuntarily, but he shook his head regretfully, “Although I really want this money, unfortunately, I really don’t know.”

“It seems that I’m unlucky.” Chen Rui didn’t look at Little Jim. He just looked around, put away the black crystal coins, asked where the hotel in the city was and walked straight. He soon disappeared from Little Jim’s vision.

When Little Jim saw Chen Rui walk away, he looked around, walked slowly into the side alley, then turned several corners. He seemed to relax and ran forward quickly. Suddenly, something tripped his foot, and he fell heavily to the ground. The small pouch in his hand fell out. He felt so painful that he couldn’t get up for a while.

Immediately afterward, several pairs of old cowhide boots appeared in the vision. At the same time, a voice that he didn’t want to hear most sounded, “Little Jim, you are indeed fast.”

Little Jim endured the pain, looked up at the face full of flesh, and smiled apologetically, “Sir Pino, I’m just worried about Old Father Lal. Recently, the old man’s old problems happened again.”

The big man who came with Pino shouted, “Stop fake daze! I heard from Old Kerry who sells cakes. Did you meet a stranger and make a lot of money just now?”

“Old Kerry must have seen it wrong. I sold him a mirror and got a few white crystal coins…”

Before he could finish speaking, Pino’s right hand was firmly stomped on by Pino’s foot, “Still trying to pretend!”

Pino stepped harder. Little Jim finally loosened his right hand, and the sweaty purple crystal coin slipped out of his fingers and was snatched by Pino.

“That’s the money I am paying for my dad’s treatment! Give it back to me!” Little Jim struggled to get up to try to get the purple crystal coin back.

“Where did that foreigner go? Say it and I’ll give it back to you.”

Thinking of Chen Rui crushing a purple crystal coin, Little Jim replied, “Hotel.”

“Let’s go to the hotel.” Pino waved to his accomplice.

Little Jim was in a hurry, “Give me the money back!”

“Fuck you!” Pino turned around and kicked Little Jim’s thin body into the wall.

“Big Brother Pino,” An accomplice suggested by the side, “Regarding the hotel… let’s explore the background first?”

“ En .” Pino weighed the purple crystal coin in his hand. “We need to do it as clean as last time. If that guy is not strong…”

Pino grinned wickedly, made a knife-like hand, and swiped at his neck, but this swipe actually caused blooding. Pino was stunned. Until he felt a sharp pain in his throat and his hands were covered in his own blood, he understood what was going on. He covered his neck and made a horrified ‘ click ’ sound.

This bizarre scene looked like a bad joke, but no one could laugh out loud when a voice sounded, “You guys are looking for me?”

Everyone realized that there was another person around at some point. At the same time, a chill rose from everyone’s mind; their limbs seemed to be frozen and could not move.

Little Jim got up and looked equally horrified at the ‘foreigner’ who had given him money.

“Who are you?! Pino’s brother-in-law is the leader of the defense forces in the city. If you dare…”

“It turned out to be a family of officials and bandits. It seems that you are all veterans of killing people and stealing goods. Since you dare to kill people, you must have the awareness of being killed.” Chen Rui flicked his finger. Under the horrified gaze of Little Jim, the 4 burly men including Pino were instantly shattered into dust-like particles and disappeared without a trace, not even a drop of blood was left.

Only the purple crystal coin stolen by Pino automatically floated in front of Little Jim, but the young man’s mind was frightened by the scene just now, so he didn’t dare to take it.

“Little Jim, it seems that it’s not me, but you who are unlucky.” Chen Rui shook his head, “Actually, I noticed earlier that you didn’t tell the truth. Is the person I’m looking for is… the Old Father Lal as you mentioned?”

Little Jim shuddered while Chen Rui smiled slightly, “Let’s go to your house. I forgot to tell you. In addition to killing people, I can also save people. As long as your dad still has a breath, I can save him.”

chapters.title: Chapter 1093: Unexpected News
chapters.body:
Chapter 1093: Unexpected News

This was an extremely dilapidated house with all the attributes of a ‘broken house’ such as leaking air and rain, but the house was fairly tidy.

The only relatively complete piece of furniture was a wooden chair on which the emaciated Old Father Lal was lying feebly.

Old Father Lal with a long beard was actually not very old. His actual age was only in his 50s, but he looked like a walking dead.

Seeing that Little Jim didn’t bring back any food, but a stranger who ‘didn’t look like a good person’ (Chen Rui), Old Father Lal didn’t save Little Jim’s face at all. He yelled at him, and he even started throwing things to drive Little Jim and Chen Rui out.

“Your injury is not ordinary, but a deadly poison.”

Chen Rui’s first sentence stopped the old dad’s scolding abruptly.

“You can see that Little Jim seems to be forced by me to come here. You’re afraid of implicating him, so you deliberately drive him away. Don’t worry, I have no ill intentions.”

When the second sentence fell in his ears, Old Father Lal’s eyes suddenly froze. Little Jim was about to say something when he saw a dazzling white light emitting from Chen Rui’s body. He couldn’t even open his eyes for a while.

After the light subsided, Old Father Lal’s expression had changed from shock to surprise. The haggard look on his face gradually faded away, and his face became rosy.

Old Father Lal let out a low grunt, and a momentum containing power burst out and spread to the surroundings. The muscles of his whole body swelled like an inflated ball. The shirt was almost burst, and some kind of tattoo on the chest was revealed. The whole house was shaken.

Little Jim couldn’t believe his eyes. He had only seen such power in the famous powerhouse in town, Sir Sheriff William. When did dad have this kind of power? It is even more powerful than Sir Sheriff William!

This strong man… is the sick old guy?

Old Father Lal took a few deep breaths, “Thank you, sir.”

Although he said thank you, Old Father Lal’s tone didn’t show any gratitude. The expression on his face was also very cold, and his eyes were full of vigilance.

“You burst out that kind of momentum on purpose. If I can’t stand it, I’m afraid your ‘thank you’ is another way.” Chen Rui frowned and glanced at Little Jim, “A person who is willing to raise an orphan and behaved like that just now, you should not be the kind of ruthless and unrighteous person. Why do you treat people who are kind to you with this attitude?”

“Sir doesn’t need to go around in circles. I didn’t expect that I was hiding here for more than 10 years, but I was still found here.” Old Father Lal sighed, “I don’t think sir is the kind of judge who kills indiscriminately, you should hold a high position. I can go with you. But this child is innocent. He has no strength or value at all; please spare his life. Otherwise, once I die, even if I can’t die with sir, sir will inevitably suffer a minor injury.”

Judge?

Hiding for 10 years?

Chen Rui shook his head. Okay, another misunderstanding.

Nonetheless, he had a lot of experience of being misunderstood. At this time, the more he explained, the more unclear it was, so Chen Rui didn’t say much. He moved his fingers slightly.

Little Jim felt his vision blur as if something had happened. Old Father Lal was already standing there, his eyes full of horror and despair – Little Jim couldn’t sense it, but he could sense it clearly. That kind of power he sensed just now, almost shattered the entire space. The power was far beyond his imagination. It was not something he could shake at all. A finger could annihilate him. The funny thing was that he just threatened to perish together with the other party.

“Let’s clarify 1 thing first. You have misunderstood. I’m not a member of the church, and I don’t know you. I came to you today just for something else, understand?”

Old Father Lal was startled. Chen Rui walked over and sat directly on his chair. He shook his head for a while before he came to his senses. He couldn’t help but smile, and his body shrunk again, returning to his usual thinness. He deeply bowed down and saluted.

“Understood! With the strength that sir just showed, my life and death are completely under your control. I can’t even commit suicide. There is no need to lie.”

Chen Rui thought to himself. No doubt this is the best way to cancel the misunderstanding. Unfortunately, for other misunderstood people such as Python and Satan, I’m afraid it’s impossible to use this method to solve it. Even the Elemental King’s real body should be an incomparable presence.

“To tell the truth, I was the target of the church’s pursuit back then, and I have been hiding in this small town for 17 years. The dispelling power that sir activated to remove the poison from me could only be activated by the senior executives of the Holy Church. That’s why I have such a misunderstanding. Please forgive me, sir.”

Chen Rui nodded, “The poison on your body is unique and stubborn. In fact, it hasn’t been completely healed just now, but this ability of mine can only be used once an hour. I will activate it several times later again, and it should be completely removed.”

“Sir’s power is simply amazing.” Old Father Lal lamented, “You can actually detox the poison of the Phantom Springwater.”

“Phantom Springwater?” Chen Rui’s ears pricked up suddenly. Can it be the treasure that repairs the elemental heart of water?

Wait a minute, the ‘Phantom Ice Spring’ and ‘Phantom Springwater’ are just 1 word difference, I but are they the same thing?

“Sir heard of the Phantom Springwater before?”

Chen Rui calmed down and asked, “I’ve heard about ‘the Phantom Ice Spring’, is there any connection between the 2?”

“Sir no doubt is well-informed. The Phantom Ice Spring is the essence of the Phantom Springwater. Only 1 drop is produced every few hundred years. The specific function is unknown.”

I toiled efforts to find it to no avail, yet I got the news so easily now! This time, my luck is really good. I actually got this unexpected good news!

Chen Rui was overjoyed, but he asked calmly, “This ice spring is useful to me. Where were you poisoned in the first place?”

The Phantom Springwater has only produced a drop of the Phantom Ice Spring in hundreds of years. I don’t know if it’s time now, but in any case, I must have a look.

“It’s in the Black Prison Desert. I wonder if sir has ever heard the name Dreamy Oasis?”

“The Phantom Springwater is in the Dreamy Oasis?” Chen Rui expressed surprise. This trip to the Black Prison Desert seems to be worthwhile!

Old Father Lal nodded as Chen Rui glanced at him, “I came to you this time just for the Dreamy Oasis. I wonder if you would like to accompany me to find this mysterious oasis?”

Old Father Lal gave Little Jim a look, and Little Jim shook his head quickly, “Dad, I didn’t say anything!”

Chen Rui smiled lightly, “He really didn’t say. You know, there are some things in this world, even if you don’t say it, you may not be able to hide it. Not to mention that he is still a child.”

There should be a lot of secrets about this Old Father Lal, such as why he was hunted down by the church, why he was hiding in this small border town for more than 10 years, and so on. However, for Chen Rui, Lal’s greatest value was the Dreamy Oasis, and he wouldn’t delve into the rest.

Fire condensation crystal sand and the Phantom Ice Spring, I must get them.

“I can guarantee your safety, and the price is not a problem.”

“Although sir is powerful, the Black Prison Desert is not an ordinary place. I’m afraid you can’t even protect yourself by that time. I also barely escaped by luck…” Old Father Lal sighed, “I dare not ask what is the purpose of sir going to the Black Prison Desert, but since you decide to go, you must have a considerable awareness.”

“So, you have agreed?”

Old Father Lal gave a wry smile, “Can I still refuse?”

Soon after, Chen Rui and Old Father Lal changed into a suit of ordinary desert dwellers and walked out of the city gate.

“This is actually not the closest inhabitant to the Black Prison Desert in the Vast Sand Empire. There is also the Stone Horse Town on the outer edge of the desert, which is rich in magical materials such as mystic sand and blue earth sand. There were originally many residents, but now a considerable part is controlled by the sand bandits and is almost turned into their base. Only some businessmen with strong guards dare to trade there. There are also some bold people who bypassed the Stone Horse Town and went directly to the outer edge of the desert to explore and mine materials. However… some of these people were killed by the sand bandits, and some were buried in the desert with a very small chance of surviving.”

“But there are still people going, right?” Chen Rui frowned.

“Just to make a living.” Old Father Lal shook his head. “Me too.”

“Don’t worry. I said you won’t die, so you won’t die.”

“Actually, sir has given Little Jim a huge sum of money, and you killed the city guard leader who is Pino’s brother-in-law. It has saved him from future troubles. As long as that kid is smart, he won’t have to worry about his life.” Old Father Lal laughed at himself, “At that time, I just wanted to raise him as a cover-up, but after so many years, I have some feelings too.”

“We’re going to the Stone Horse Town now?”

“The scope of the Black Prison Desert is as vast as the sea, and the Dreamy Oasis that sir is looking for is in the core area of the Black Prison Desert. It contains special power, and the danger is also multiplied in the periphery. Even if people can survive the terrifying sandstorm on the periphery, they will get lost in the strange power along the way, and they will never find the true core area.”

Chen Rui nodded. It is like in the Dead Sea. Even if I have a sea area map, I’m afraid it is difficult to succeed in a year or half to find the real Crimson Double Teeth Sea Area without the help of the Water Elemental King. Moreover, in this desert, there is no map at all. It is necessary to rely on a well-informed veteran like Old Father Lal.

“I was a little distracted just now. You can continue.”

“Let’s go to the Stone Horse Town and make a deal with the ship factory there, that is to buy or lease a desert boat. With a desert boat, it will be much easier to enter the core desert. Sir, don’t worry. The owner of the ship factory, Old Panrui, and I are old friends. Although we haven’t seen each other for a few years, he will still give me some face.”

Desert boat? The 9-year compulsory education in the other world was undoubtedly a success. Although Chen Rui had been crossover for so long, his first reaction when he heard these 2 words was that it was some kind of animal.

Old Father Lal didn’t speak anymore because he had already entered the sandstorm area. Even though it was only in the outer area, the sand and dust still made it very inconvenient to speak. Most of the time, he used a mask or face towel to cover his face.

When Chen Rui followed Old Father Lal all the way to the Stone Horse Town, he finally saw the so-called desert ship. It was not a camel but a real ship.

On the surface, this kind of ship was not much different from ordinary small sea ships. The masts, ship sails, ship cabins, ship anchors, and so on were all available, but the shape of the ship body was slightly different, and the bottom was a special wheel-type ship paddle.

chapters.title: Chapter 1094: The True Identity Of Old Father Lal
chapters.body:
Chapter 1094: The True Identity Of Old Father Lal

“1000 black crystal coins, and this ship is yours. I only sell it, not rent it!” The tall bald man stretched out a finger.

“This is the smallest ship, and it’s too old-looking. Many key parts are rotten and deformed. 1000 black crystal coins are simply a sky-high price. It is not worth even 1000 purple crystal coins!”

“This is the only ship. If you don’t want it, get out!”

“You think I don’t know that sand ships can be temporarily assembled?” Old Father Lal sneered, “Where is Old Panrui? Ask him to come out to see me. I’m his old friend. I don’t believe Old Panrui dares to use this kind of thing to fool me!”

“Old guy, your news is too outdated.” The bald-headed strong man flashed murderous intent in his eyes, slammed the table, and suddenly a dozen people rushed into the room, “Old Panrui died in my hands last year. This ship factory is now under my control, Sir Okafor! Now I’ve changed my mind. Hand over all your money! Otherwise, I’ll take your life!”

While Old Father Lal was on guard, Chen Rui took a step forward. Everyone felt that the air suddenly solidified, and a chill that pierced the soul quickly spread throughout their bodies, making them completely lose the ability to move.

“This ship is indeed very old.” Chen Rui just said a word, and the ship collapsed in an instant. Everything turned into gravel-like particles and disappeared as if it had never existed in this world.

This scene made the people who rushed in broke out into a cold sweat, including the bald ‘factory director’.

Chen Rui said slowly, “Your name is Okafor, right? Do you want to find the ship just now, or give me a ship that will satisfy me? I did not restrict your ability to speak. If you don’t say it within 5 seconds, I will assume you chose the first path.”

“Sir!” Okafor shuddered and shouted quickly, “I’ll give you the best ship! I’ll send someone to assemble it now!”

After an hour, a reassembled sand ship appeared in his vision. No matter how big or sophisticated this ship was, it was far better than the small ship that ‘disappeared’ just now.

“Sir, this kind of ship needs at least 6 people to operate.” Old Father Lal stepped forward and said.

“This is the first time I’ve been on a desert boat like this. Sir Okafor, may I have the honor to invite you to be a captain?” Chen Rui looked at the bald head with indifferent eyes.

“It’s my honor!” Everyone could see that the bald Sir Okafor was so ‘honored’ that he was about to cry.

Before long, Chen Rui entered the desert in that brand new desert boat.

The sand ship was still slow previously, but as the wind and sand got stronger, they raised the ship’s sails, and it began to slide in the sand. The speed was also gradually increasing. Especially when crossing the dunes, although there were ups and downs, it did not turn over the ship, which was really wonderful.

Chen Rui was wearing a sand-proof cloak and goggles specially made for sand-ship sailing. Looking at the endless sandy land, it felt like a frozen sea. There was a trace of grace in the majesty. Walking in this world, the mood would become lighter and detached.

Of course, the majesty was only a small part of the desert, especially the Black Prison Desert. Most of the time, it was berserk.

The sand and dust in the sky swept across the desert boat wave after wave, and the drag marks caused at the back by the driving of the ship gradually disappeared in the sand and dust as if nothing came before.

Old Father Lal pulled Chen Rui into the ship.

“Sir, I saw that Okafor seemed to send out some special signal just now. Even if he is not a sand bandit, he must have colluded with the sand bandits. We must be prepared to resist the sand bandit attack.”

Chen Rui asked curiously, “We are far away from the Stone Horse Town, right? The sand behind has covered up the traces of this ship, and there should be a strong interference with magic or sensing power. How do those sand bandits find us?”

“Because they are sand bandits. Just like sailors who are in the sea all year round, they can always ‘smell’ something by instinct.” Old Father Lal shook his head, “They may not dare to break in near the core, but in the outer areas, they are very familiar with it.”

“So, I should ask the sand bandits to lead the way instead of you?”

Chen Rui’s relaxed attitude made Old Father Lal frown, “Sir, I know your strength is strong, but in this environment, you must not take it lightly. The leader of the sand bandits, ‘Bloodbeard’ Montrami is notoriously fierce and powerful. Furthermore, the ships of the sand bandits are more sophisticated, faster, and equipped with large weapons than ordinary sand boats. The few people on our ship are already having ulterior motives. I’m afraid…”

Chen Rui nodded, and Old Father Lal added, “The sand bandits’ methods are very strange. Just in case, from now on, we must be very careful about our diet, especially the water. Before we drink water, please activate that kind powerful decontamination so as not to be poisoned.”

“ En .”

3 days passed in the blink of an eye from the tedious and long voyage.

On the night of the third day, Chen Rui closed his eyes on the ship and suddenly heard some kind of ‘woooo’ sound in the wind, which seemed to be the sound of some kind of horn.

Old Father Lal hurried over and said loudly, “Sir! Bad news! It’s the sand bandits!”

The speed of the sand boat suddenly slowed down, and the bald Okafor and others who were operating the ship jumped off the ship and fled.

Chen Rui didn’t panic. He slowly stood up and glanced at Old Father Lal, “Aren’t you going to run away?”

Old Father Lal felt that his eyes seemed to be able to see through his mind. He couldn’t help trembling, and shook his head, “I’m on the same ship as sir. Where can I escape?”

Chen Rui nodded and didn’t say anything. He just stood quietly at the head of the ship, looking at the direction from which the horn sounded.

Soon after, the enemy appeared in the vision. Although the sand and light affected the vision a little, he could still see the 4 huge sand ships under the moonlight, which were much larger and faster than this ship.

Lal was shocked when he saw the blood-colored flag flying on the largest ship, “Blood Claw Flag! ‘Bloodbeard’ Montrami! The leader of the sand bandits! He actually came in person!”

Chen Rui glanced at the big ship, “That ship should be much better than ours.”

Lal was taken aback, thinking he heard it wrong, “What did sir say?”

The big ship of the sand bandits was getting closer and closer, and the ship Chen Rui was in had stopped because of the escape of the ‘sailors’. It was like waiting for its own death. The sand bandits from the big ships were already rushing over on horses. There were about 30 of them.

Chen Rui didn’t even look at the oncoming sand bandits, and he just said indifferently, “If we were on the main ship with that red flag, it would be much faster to reach the destination.”

With that said, Chen Rui slowly stretched out his palm and raised it slightly. The Blood Claw Flag desert ship in the distance actually slowly rose into the air. The sound of the horn on the ship stopped abruptly, and it was replaced by bursts of terrified cries.

He slowly turned down his palm and pressed it down slightly. Except for the leader ship suspended in mid-air, the other 3 desert ships seemed to be under some terrifying pressure. They collapsed in an instant, turned into powder, and dissipated in the dust.

This scene completely frightened the approaching sand bandits like it was a dream.

Even Bloodbeard Montrami, the bandit leader on the main ship in the sky, felt this way. The 3 excellent combat sand ships were turned into powder just out of thin air?

I must be dreaming!

In this dream, not only the sand ship, but Montrami himself and all the sand bandits’ bodies began to decompose, just like the ashes of burning houses or living people, dissipating bit by bit.

A nightmare.

This was the last consciousness of almost all the sand bandits.

Then, they were thoroughly annihilated.

Old Father Lal stared at this scene with a dumbfounded gaze. The surroundings were filled with dead silence, and he could not even hear the whistle of the wind. Apart from him and Chen Rui, there was no third living person in the entire area, including the floating main ship.

This kind of strength was simply beyond words to describe.

“Disappointed?” Chen Rui’s indifferent sentence shocked Old Father Lal, “I’m sorry, my time is limited, so I didn’t give you a chance to perform.”

“Sir…” Old Father Lal’s back was soaked with cold sweat.

“It’s not only the bald Okafor who is in contact with the sand bandits, you left a mark in the ship factory. Previously, you asked me to pay attention to our food and activate the decontamination magic to prevent poisoning, but after the last time I activated the decontamination power, you poisoned the drinking water, and I can no longer detoxify. Unfortunately, that doesn’t work for me.”

Old Father Lal’s body trembled slightly. He just witnessed this man destroy all the sand bandits in an instant, including Bloodbeard Montrami. Montrami’s strength is stronger than me, but he can’t stand this man’s casual wave. The strength of this man…

Saint?

No, I’m afraid it’s not just Saint!

“The last time I saw a tattoo on your chest, it felt familiar to me. Then I remembered, it turned out that you were from the Cloud Rider Empire in the past. To be precise, a high-level royal family guardian.”

Old Father Lal clenched his fists, gritted his teeth and said, “Cut the nonsense. Kill me if you want!

“If it’s just to use your power to find Dreamy Oasis, I have a very simple way to directly control you and become a puppet that completely obeys my orders. You should be thankful that I didn’t treat you like that because of a person.”

Old Father Lal didn’t ask who the person was, apparently putting his own life and death aside.

“Is there not even the most basic curiosity? I’m curious, the dignified Royal Instructor Regia of the Cloud Rider Empire has actually been reduced to the point of being a sand bandit!”

The real name of ‘Regia’ made the corners of Old Father Lal’s eyes tremble, but he was not too surprised, “Stop pretending! The one you used to heal my poison is clearly the Holy Relic, Crown of Thorns, of the empire! You even said that you aren’t someone from the church. However, you won’t get any secrets from me!”

Chen Rui shook his head, “I have no interest in the treasures of the Cloud Rider Empire. Although I now know it is in Lobo Lake in the Cloud Mist Mountain Range, the wealth is not worth mentioning to me at all. The wealth I possess is 100 times more than that treasure.”

“How do you know…” Old Father Lal was shocked, “Who told you?!”

“Before you want to commit suicide or do something, meet someone first. I need to use a newly comprehended secret technique here that is somewhat similar to [Battle Projection], but unfortunately, it has not been completely successful, so the projection time is limited… ” Chen Rui was saying something that Old Father Lal didn’t understand. With a show of his hand, a light appeared in the vision, and the light gradually condensed into a woman form.

When the figure gradually became clearer, Old Father Lal’s eyes froze. He couldn’t believe his own eyes.

“Is that you? Teacher Regia.” A soft voice sounded.

This familiar voice and title made Old Father Lal no longer hesitate and knelt down on one knee, “Royal Highness Little Princess!”

chapters.title: Chapter 1095: Guard
chapters.body:
Chapter 1095: Guard

The ‘Royal Highness Little Princess’ was of course not Alice, but Veronica!

Old Father Lal was 1 of Veronica’s teachers. His strength was not very strong. He had only just touched the edge of Pseudo-Saint, but he was good at military strategy and knowledgeable in astrology, geography, appraisal, and herbal medicine. He also took charge of the treasure map of a secret warehouse of the former royal family back then.

Although the Cloud Rider Empire had perished for a long time, it was 1 of the former Holy Empires after all. The Cloud Rider’s royal family had never been extinct, and there were still a group of loyal subordinates.

Unlike the devotees of the Abyss, Black Death Followers, these subordinates were true loyalists of the royal family. Most of them opposed the union between the royal family and the mysterious cult. Regia (Old Father Lal) was one of them, when Veronica was just a teenage princess. She was chosen by the mysterious cult as the ‘Blessed One’. Regia and others who were trying their best to oppose the matter wanted to escape with Veronica, but they were eventually captured because of the failure. Veronica offered to participate in the blessing ceremony in order to save the lives of Regia and others. Meanwhile, Regia and others were expelled.

On the way, Regia and others were surrounded and suppressed by the Holy Church and they were seriously injured in order to keep the secret of the treasure map. When Regia and 2 companions fled to this border town, they were caught up by the judges sent by the church.

Outnumbered by the enemy, Regia and the other 2 were forced to flee into the depths of the desert. The judges were still chasing after them, and they started a decisive battle in the desert in the end. At a critical moment, the Dreamy Oasis suddenly appeared and everyone strayed into the area of Phantom Springwater. Except for Regia, who was the least poisoned, the rest of the enemies and allies were killed by the poison.

Regia barely escaped. Since then he assumed the name of Lal. He had lived in seclusion in this border city, but due to the poison of the Phantom Springwater in his body, he couldn’t get dispell it with all his efforts. His strength kept weakening.

Over the years, he had lived a rough life. He had participated in an adventure group, worked as a desert guide and was once captured by the sand bandits. With knowledge and wit, he improved the desert boat for the sand bandits, and he finally left the bandit den safely.

When Chen Rui appeared previously, he activated [Divine Blessing] and dispelled the poison on Regia, but Regia recognized the Crown of Thorns. Therefore, he increasingly believed that Chen Rui was related to the church. In order to eradicate the enemy, the resourceful Regia first fostered a false relationship with this ‘high-level church member’. He brought Chen Rui to the Stone Horse Town, deliberately induced him to conflict with the bald head of the ship factory, and secretly left behind the special mark that he had learned from the sand bandits. It meant that there was a ‘big fish’.

On the desert boat, Regia took the initiative to point out that bald Okafor was suspicious and reminded him to be careful of the food and drink. After Chen Rui activated [Divine Blessing], Regia poisoned the water bag and wanted to use the hands of the sand bandits to completely remove the enemy.

Unexpectedly, all these plans were noticed by the other party. It was even more unexpected that this person actually ‘summoned’ the soul projection of Little Princess Veronica!

Soon after, the desert ship, namely Red Sand Ship, set off on its voyage again.

By right, such a large ship couldn’t be operate by Chen Rui and Regia alone; at least 10 sailors were required. However, the death of the sand bandits did not mean that Chen Rui had no sailors. Although these sailors were new at ‘sand sea voyage’, they quickly got the hang of it. The Red Sand Ship was faster than usual.

These sailors were of course the sandmen. The power of the sandmen in this desert, where the elements were extremely rich, was stronger than that at sea.

“Regia,” Chen Rui frowned, “you heard my conversations with Veronica just now that I completely destroyed the main altar of the Black Death Follower. The Cloud Rider’s royal family no longer exists. Speaking of which, I’m also an enemy of the royal family…”

Regia interrupted Chen Rui’s words, “Sir is wrong. They are the Black Death Follower, so they are no longer descendants of the Cloud Rider Emperor. Royal Highness Little Princess is the only one. To be precise, Royal Highness Little Princess was rescued by sir.”

“Even so, didn’t Veronica say it already? You’re completely free.”

“No sir, please don’t underestimate the previous oath, which is the highest loyalty oath of our Cloud Rider’s royal family.”

Chen Rui knew that Regia didn’t lie, and the oath made by Regia had formed a master-subordinate spiritual link that appeared in the Super System, “I understand, but as long as you want, I can easily cancel it with my strength. Let me tell you, I actually don’t belong in this sunny world, you understand?”

“Since the fall of the Cloud Rider Empire, we have been walking in the dark. The loyalty of the guardian covers any time, any place. If sir canceled the power of my oath, then not only the oath and loyalty will dissipate but also my life.”

Regia said stubbornly, “I’m loyal to sir, not because of sir’s strength, but for Royal Highness Little Princess. Sir is the most important person for the little princess, so you are like her highest guardian. Of course, if sir does not take interest in my strength and loyalty, you can obliterate me at any time.”

Chen Rui thought of the phrase ‘the most important person’ that Veronica said when introducing him, and sighed, “Okay, I officially accept your allegiance.”

The Cloud Rider Empire has perished for a long time. Since he can become a guardian and not join the Black Death Follower, he can be said to be an absolute loyalist!

Regia had a tough temperament and was resourceful. If it wasn’t for the absolute power gap, Chen Rui would have fallen to his trap.

“Thank you, sir.” Regia performed a solemn etiquette.

“Okay, I’ll not elaborate on other matters. This time I came to the Black Prison Desert to find the Dreamy Oasis for 2 purposes. 1 is the fire condensing crystal sand, and the other is the Phantom Ice Spring. Both of these things are very important to me. I want to hear your advice.”

“I have only seen fire condensing crystal sand in some ancient books. It is a rare treasure that combines the essence of fire elements and earth elements. Its function is unknown, and I don’t know if it is in an oasis; the Phantom Springwater is something I witnessed with my own eyes. I’m not sure if the Phantom Ice Spring is formed in it. I’m just sure that the Phantom Springwater, like the Dreamy Oasis, will move freely; its position is not fixed. Moreover, it will also turn invisible. For me, it feels like some kind of predatory living creature.”

“Living creature?” Chen Rui was slightly surprised. He didn’t expect the Phantom Springwater to be able to move and turn invisible. No doubt it was worthy of the name ‘phantom’.

“Let’s talk about the Dreamy Oasis again.” Regia said solemnly, “I joined a certain desert adventure group over the years, and I became familiar with the terrain in this area. Later, the adventure group was disbanded due to heavy casualties during a mission, and I was seriously injured. Coupled with the poison, I almost lost my strength, so I started to work as a desert guide. For more than 10 years, because I have stayed in this kind of place for a long time, I also have some sense of smell to seek fortune and avoid danger. Apart from being chased by the church judges, I only encountered the Dreamy Oasis once, but it disappeared before I could get there. In the following years, my legs and feet became more and more inconvenient, and Little Jim was gradually able to take care of himself. Therefore, I don’t have to be a guide anymore. I know that sir is extremely powerful, but I have to remind you not to underestimate the Black Prison Desert. Always be cautious at all times, otherwise, even if you can get out, you may not be able to get what you want.”

“I understand.” Chen Rui nodded, “The sandmen are now able to control the sand ship proficiently. Why don’t we rest in place for a while, then we will set off at full speed when we are energized.”
