“No, this journey has to go at full speed.” Regia said apologetically, “Because I mistook sir as the enemy, so I also thought about what to do if the sand bandits couldn’t solve sir… Just in case, I used some scheming when guiding the way. Although we can reach the core area at the fastest speed in this direction, it is a very dangerous area. There are many terrifying creatures such as sand scorpions, giant lizards, and the most terrifying desert demonic earthworms.”

“From your point of view, I should applaud your exhaustive calculations.” Chen Rui shrugged, “But you don’t have to worry, it’s good to be able to arrive at the fastest speed.”

With that said, Chen Rui frowned suddenly. Regia felt his vision blurred for a while as if some kind of displacement had taken place in space. When he regained his vision, he found that the entire ship had instantly retreated dozens of meters.

The ground where the ship was originally located had erupted, and a huge body appeared. This body was only half exposed. It was like a magnified earthworm with a long and winding body. It had no limbs, but it had terrible mouthparts growing at the end.

“The desert demonic earthworm!” Regia blurted out, “Damn, we really alarmed this thing!”

The desert demonic earthworm was a giant sandworm with infinite power. It usually lurked in the depths of the sand and attacked passing creatures. It was the most terrifying predator in this area. If it weren’t for the power of Chen Rui that elevated the Red Sand Ship in time, the blow that broke through the sand just now could shatter the entire ship.

After the huge desert demonic earthworm missed a hit, it only made a low whistle sound toward the ship that was moving forward. Regia’s strength was already close to the level of Pseudo-Saint (Demon Emperor). However, when he heard this whistle, he couldn’t help but feel chills in his heart.

Chen Rui’s figure instantly appeared above the huge body, and the desert demonic earthworm’s whistle stopped abruptly. Instead of attacking Chen Rui, it quickly escaped into the sand pit as if seeing something terrifying.

The desert demonic earthworm also had a special attribute of burrowing to the ground. The huge body dove into the depths of the ground in a flash. The surface of the dunes did not have any visible ups and downs at all.

Chen Rui slowly stretched out his hand and waved in front. A huge body broke out from the sand and was suspended in the air. Judging from the desperately struggling appearance and the panicked whistle, it was obviously not ‘voluntary’.

Soon, the desert demonic earthworm returned to the ground, burrowed into the sand, and exposed half of its body.

“If this thing is the most terrifying demonic beast in this area, then I think, before leaving this area, no ‘guest’ will dare to approach us anymore.’”

Chen Rui’s voice sounded beside Regia again. Then, under Regia’s stunned gaze, the desert demonic earthworm was burrowing in the sand in front like a guard who opened the way.

chapters.title: Chapter 1096: Goddess
chapters.body:
Chapter 1096: Goddess

With the desert demonic earthworm leading the way, the Red Sand Ship did not encounter any uninvited guests except for the sand along the way.

Regia didn’t know how Chen Rui did this. He just felt that he was lucky. In the face of this absolute strength, his strategy was utterly a joke. Whether it was with the help of the sand bandits or the power of the demonic beasts along the way, they couldn’t withstand a blow from Chen Rui. If this sir hadn’t seen that tattoo and happened to have the soul of the Royal Highness Little Princess by his side, he would have been a corpse like those with Bloodbeard.

This was naturally due to Chen Rui using the [Analytical Eyes] plus Demi-God level coercion. After successfully passing through this area, Chen Rui let go of the spiritual suppression of the desert demonic earthworm. It immediately dove into the sand and disappeared with relief.

The journey to the desert was boring and long. Now, he had lost the feeling of appreciation that he had when he first entered the desert. He only saw monotonous and endless sand.

Half a month had passed, and the Red Sand Ship had entered the core area of the desert.

This was even the result of the presence of Regia as a guide. Regia’s strength was not worth mentioning in front of Chen Rui, but his ability to ‘smell’ in the desert was even better than Chen Rui. Those dunes looked similar to Chen Rui, but Regia could find the right direction.

Everyone had their pros and cons. If Chen Rui set off on his own, even if it was another half a month, he would probably be still wandering around the desert.

The sand wind in the core area was much stronger than in the outer area. Even for the sandmen, it became quite difficult to control the ship to travel in the designated direction. The demon beasts encountered along the way also appeared more frequently. With Chen Rui around, surely they could not pose a threat. Nevertheless, he just could not find the moving Dreamy Oasis.

“The wind is finally slowing down.” Chen Rui took off his goggles and patted the sand on his cloak. Although his strength was extraordinary, it was inevitable that he would be a bit tired when he continued to travel in this environment.

He was even sitting in the Red Sand Ship, where the storage warehouse guaranteed food and drinking water. If one were to walk directly into the desert like a historical character recorded in another world, it was simply unimaginable. “It should stop for a while, but it’s definitely not time to be optimistic now. In the core of this kind of desert, you have to be vigilant at all times. When we encountered the scorpion swarm yesterday, we nearly…” Regia’s voice suddenly stopped while staring ahead, dumbfounded.

Chen Rui followed his gaze, and the white clouds in the sky in the distance condensed into a slender figure. It was vaguely a female body with long robes and long hair. The robes and hair roots extended into the white clouds in the sky, emitting a faint light as if it controlled the entire sky.

At the first sight of this scene, there was a sense of vastness and sacredness, making one could not help but worship.

“Te… Tezaneer!” Regia stammered out a name. He had been in the desert for more than 10 years and heard a lot of rumors about this desert goddess, but this was the first time he had seen her in ‘person’.

Chen Rui also remembered the legend of the Red Battle Empire that Little Jim said at the beginning. He never expected to see the ‘desert messenger’ named by the Light God today.

“Sir, shall we kneel down and pray?” Regia whispered.

Chen Rui’s eyes kept staring at the figure in the cloud. When he heard Regia’s words, he asked, “Do you believe in the Light God?”

“ Uh. ” Regia was silent. Although the Cloud Rider Empire was the Holy Empire favored by Light God, it was later eroded by the mysterious cult which led to the collapse of the country. The church once publicly declared that they had been abandoned by Light God and sent Tribunal Judges to suppress the ‘remainders’. As the guardian of the royal family, although Regia was extremely disgusted with the mysterious cult, he also had a hostile rather than a friendly feeling toward the Holy Church, so he would not believe in the Light God.

“Real faith requires devotion from the heart. If it’s just superficial respect, it will definitely arouse God’s dissatisfaction, so…” Chen Rui indifferently looked at the figure that looked like ‘Tezaneer’ in the sky, and added another sentence in his mind. If she is a real god.

Regardless of the authenticity of that legend, it didn’t matter whether this Tezaneer was a god or an oracle. Chen Rui had actually seen the gods of this world, or more precisely, the dead or dormant god. Even the huge corpses that had lost their vitality were still unfathomable galaxies.

The cloud in front of him seemed magnificent and vast with an extraordinary momentum, but compared with the ‘corpse’, it was only a bluff on the surface.

Chen Rui had a feeling that the goddess’ eyes never seemed to open.

“Sir, then we…” Regia was in awe of the existence of god even though he was not a believer, so he asked again carefully.

In the white clouds ahead, the graceful figure had gradually distorted and faded before disappearing in a moment.

This scene made Regia nervous again. Chen Rui smiled, “Our true attitude is the best respect for her. Since Tezaneer has disappeared, then let’s go on. To be able to witness the temperament of this ’goddess’, at least it’s worth the ticket price.”

Ticket price? Regia didn’t understand what Chen Rui said, but Tezaneer was gone, so it was useless to say anything.

The Red Sand Ship drove for a while without encountering any obstacles. Even the sand wind blowing on their faces seemed very mild. Perhaps due to illusion, Regia felt that the atmosphere of ‘dead silence’ in the vicinity was getting stronger and stronger. He couldn’t help but feel more uneasy.

At this time, the color of the white clouds in the sky gradually calmed down as the clear sky began to dim. Soon, a thick smoky black cloud appeared on the distant horizon.

“Black Death Sandstorm!” Regia’s tense nerves seemed to be bounced as he exclaimed, “This is the most terrifying sandstorm in the Black Prison Desert, known as the Black Reaper. It is at least 1000 times more violent than we have encountered before!”

“Can it still be avoided?” Chen Rui frowned. It was not the first time he encountered a sandstorm, but as Regia said, the power of this sandstorm was far greater than before.

Not only that, he could also sense that there was a strange and powerful force in this sandstorm. His soul was even trembling at such a distance.

An intangible sense of suppression began to accumulate like a thread, entwining in his mind.

More precisely, it was a strange will power.

“No one can survive the sandstorm! Sir, if you have any means of escape, just activate it!” Regia seemed to feel something. Thinking of the previous scene, his body trembled, and he shouted, “Tezaneer! It must be the punishment from the desert goddess!”

Chen Rui’s facial expression changed slightly because the accumulation of that ‘will’ was getting stronger and stronger. Even if he was now at the peak stage of the Demi-God, his soul still couldn’t help trembling.

The rolling black clouds on the horizon had ‘gradually’ approached. This speed was actually very fast as the black clouds were becoming bigger.

The suppression in Chen Rui’s mind continued to increase as he felt a face with closed eyes beginning to become clear in his soul, just like the figure in the cloud before. There was no doubt that this was Tezaneer’s will.

“It’s too late, sir! Immediately dig a big hole, the deeper the better! Let’s hide in it and fully activate the protection. Perhaps there is still a chance for survival!” Regia shouted, feeling the pressure of the air was increasing. Even his sound was almost drowned out. Seeing that Chen Rui was actually standing still, he thought he was dumbfounded. He gritted his teeth and started to dig a hole desperately with a shovel.

With Black Death Sandstorm’s momentum, it was hard to survive even with Regia’s method, but in his opinion, this was the only possible way to survive.

The black smokes were approaching. The power was extremely terrifying, but the wind element power was not the most deadly. The real ‘reaper’ was the spiritual storm containing the will of Tezaneer. This kind of spirit power had been materialized. Even the Misty Tide Pearl from the Wind Elemental King didn’t work either.

Worship!

Surrender!

Believe!

God is invincible.

No matter how powerful you are, you can only look up to the sky.

Countless thoughts of surrender popped up in Chen Rui’s mind. The Super System didn’t have any special response. This was not an ordinary soul erosion, but Chen Rui’s own thoughts under that suppressive force. His willpower was constantly weakened by Tezaneer’s will, and some weak aspects in his mind were infinitely magnified.

Rather than fighting Tezaneer, it was more about fighting himself.

“Those who believe in me will live; those who don’t believe in me will die?” Chen Rui took a deep breath, stared at the rapidly approaching dark clouds ahead, and finally said, “The so-called god…”

“Sir! Hide in here!” Regia had dug a hole more than 1 meter deep and shouted, but even his sound was poured back into the mouth by the huge pressure. His whole person was staggering and unsteady. .

“No, even if it’s a real god…” Chen Rui was still talking to himself and didn’t move. He just slowly closed his eyes. The lovely face of his daughter appeared in his mind, and his body was full of surging fluctuations.

When Regia was about to pull Chen Rui into the pit, he suddenly found himself unable to move. Everything around him suddenly became silent, or more precisely, time stopped, including the overwhelming Black Reaper in front of him.

This strange stillness only lasted for a moment. After about 3 seconds, the flow of time suddenly accelerated several times.

Regia felt his entire vision shake violently.

Then the approaching Black Reaper seemed to be torn apart by some incomparable force.

An illusion on the verge of death?

Regia rubbed his eyes vigorously. In his vision, the terrifying Black Death Sandstorm seemed to be torn apart in front of the figure.

The whole world seemed to be shaking.

Until the black sand completely dissipated.

The dust had settled.

“If you stand in front of me, I will kill you without hesitation.” Chen Rui slowly withdrew his fist. He did not use the [Pole Star Transformation], nor any special moves or equipment. It was just the purest blow from his mind, will and soul.

This blow defeated not only Tezaneer’s will but also his own ego.

As said, he was not afraid even if it was god.

Regia watched in disbelief at the fist-raising figure. Black Death Sandstorm, the power of god is defeated by a punch!

The biggest impact this punch gave him was not strength but faith and will. It was an unwavering determination, even if it was God standing in front.

At this moment, Regia couldn’t help but feel a sense of worship, not for a certain goddess, but for this person.

The Royal Highness Little Princess has found a very remarkable man.

A true guardian.

chapters.title: Chapter 1097: Dream
chapters.body:
Chapter 1097: Dream

Another 3 days had passed, perhaps because of the defeat of the Black Death Sandstorm before, the journey had been calm. There was not even a single demonic beast assaulting them.

If Regia’s surrender to Chen Rui was because of Veronica, he was now completely convinced.

After climbing over a huge sand dune, Regia, who was looking at the head of the ship, exclaimed, “Sir, over there!”

Chen Rui, who was closing his eyes and resting, suddenly opened his eyes. He got up and took a look, only to see a little greenery in the flat topography in the distance. There was a faint light in the green, which seemed to be a water reflection.

“Oasis!”

Chen Rui regained his energy and commanded the sandmen to drive the Red Sand Ship at full speed toward the green light.

When the oasis was getting closer, Regia exclaimed in surprise, “This fresh breath! This charming green! Yes, it’s the Dreamy Oasis! I still remember what it looked like!”

Hearing what Regia said, Chen Rui also felt some kind of fresh greenery. He was secretly delighted. As long as I find the fire condensing crystal sand and the Phantom Ice Spring in it, I will be able to save Duoduo and the Water Elemental King.

“Great! We finally found this moving oasis!” Regia suppressed her excitement and took a deep breath, “Sir, although we have found the oasis, we should still be careful.”

“You’re right, let’s get off the ship first!” Chen Rui nodded as he put away the sandmen and walked toward the oasis with Regia.

Trees and grass could be seen everywhere in the oasis, and the air humidity was obviously higher than that in the desert, so there was no such dry and scorching vibe. After traveling in the desert for so long, they felt extra comfortable after entering the oasis. Nonetheless, entering the oasis did not mean safety. Apart from the highly poisonous things like the Phantom Springwater, there might be other dangers. Therefore, Chen Rui and Regia did not let their guard down.

Not far away was a small lake. As the cool wind blew, sparkling waves spread out, wrinkling the reflected green trees.

“Sir, be careful. The last time I entered this oasis, I encountered the Phantom Springwater near this small lake. Several judges who were chasing me were engulfed by the springwater that suddenly appeared. They were quickly corroded. Not even their bones remained in the end. I had a companion who fled to the front, and the springwater moved to him in an instant to devour him. I noticed that the situation was not good, so while it was devouring others, I escaped from the oasis without looking back. I’m ashamed to say that that’s all I know about this oasis. Later, I heard a lot of rumors that most of the adventurers who had gone to the Dreamy Oasis never returned. When I recalled the past, I was really lucky.”

“Don’t worry, I’m here.” Chen Rui patted Regia’s shoulder, “I’ll do my best to keep you safe.”

Chen Rui said something similar before coming to the Black Prison Desert. At that time, Regia secretly snorted and did not take it seriously. Now, after witnessing Chen Rui defeat the scary Black Death Sandstorm, Regia was deeply confident in this sir’s strength, so he nodded.

Chen Rui slowed down, opened his perception, and walked toward the small lake with Regia.

After walking along the small lake for a while, he didn’t locate the Phantom Springwater, and there was no abnormality in his perception. On the contrary, the Super System indicated that there was a spirit invasion and was automatically converted. It seemed that there was no doubt that this oasis was strange.

“Sir!” Regia whispered, “Look there…”

Chen Rui looked in the direction he was pointing. Beside the bush, there was a clear springwater, transpiring with white air and faintly showing a faint green light.

“This is the Phantom Springwater?”

“ En . This is what I encountered last time. It just appeared, but sir, be careful.”

Chen Rui’s eyes lit up. I didn’t seem to notice the appearance of the springwater. Really worthy of the name ‘phantom’.

The Phantom Springwater seemed to have realized their gaze and gradually disappeared in the vision. This springwater will really turn invisible!

At this moment, Chen Rui’s mind had a warning sign. A pale green light suddenly appeared in the air, coming down toward him and Regia.

Chen Rui’s figure flickered, and he had already shifted together with Regia. After the pale green light missed the target, it seemed to seep into the ground and disappeared.

“Sir…” Regia finally came to his senses, still having a lingering shock. Just now, he told Chen Rui to be careful, but he was almost devoured. .

Before he could finish speaking, Chen Rui started shifting again, and they appeared by the small lake. The green light under them missed another blow.

Chen Rui’s brows furrowed slightly – This Phantom Springwater is really as Regia said at the beginning like an invisible predator. Water element demonic beast?

But strangely, there is no response in the [Analytical Eyes] as if the springwater doesn’t exist at all.

At this time, a huge wave suddenly set off in the small lake and transformed into a huge hand glowing with a faint green light. The huge hand grabbed Chen Rui. Chen Rui tapped his feet and took off into the air with Regia. Since repairing the elemental heart required the Phantom Springwater, Chen Rui did not activate the destructive power, but he chose to catch it ‘alive’. When his mind moved, he activated the time law.

The strange thing was that the giant hand was not controlled by the time law. It was still approaching without slowing down.

Chen Rui was taken aback. He flickered again and dodged.

Is the special environment here immune to time law or is the activated power not enough? Should I use the [Pole Star Transformation]?

A strange green color appeared under Chen Rui’s feet again and approached speedily. Chen Rui sensed the spirit power invasion that the Super System had been prompting. He had a plan in his mind. He actually didn’t avoid it, which startled Regia.

The pale green light enveloped Chen Rui and Regia. Regia’s vision turned black, and his body seemed to be torn apart by countless sharp teeth. He couldn’t help screaming.

At this moment, he felt that his soul was shaken heavily by something. He opened my eyes involuntarily and found that he was safe and sound. He was protected by a translucent dome, which was the defensive shield that Chen Rui activated.

“Quite amazing spiritual talent, even I was fooled by it…” Chen Rui’s eyes flashed with a scorching light as he glanced at the Phantom Fountain that kept hitting the defensive shield.

“Sir, what happened?”

“Did you feel like you were devoured just now, then found out that you’re alright?”

“Yes, why is that?”

“Because this defensive shield isolates spiritual power. I can now confirm that you really entered here when you escaped the pursuit of the church back then.”

“Sure, I remember this Dreamy Oasis.”

“No, what you entered is only here, and here is not the Dreamy Oasis at all.” Chen Rui shook his head, “You were really lucky at the time or maybe ‘it’ was sleeping, so it was just instinctual preying. Otherwise, you would not survive even with bones.”

“Is the ‘it’ that sir just said referring to this Phantom Springwater?” Regia pointed to the pale green light that was still attacking the defensive shield.

“This is not the Phantom Springwater; it’s just a preying power. More precisely, a substantial illusion.” Chen Rui took a deep breath, “I don’t know if you’ve heard of the ‘mirage’ creature?”

Chen Rui encountered the mirage on the Hidden Misty Island when he was in the Dead Sea, and he was almost bewildered by the illusion. In the end, with Shura’s help, he defeated the mirage and Adeline absorbed the mirage’s illusion power.

“Mirage?” Regia thought quickly, “The kind of demonic beasts that create large-scale illusions to prey on? I’ve only heard of this rare creature, but I’ve never seen what it looks like.”

“As expected of a royal instructor, full of wisdom.” Chen Rui nodded approvingly, “The power of the mirage should have reached the super-level. In addition to the illusion talent, it also possesses special space abilities, otherwise I would have been able to detect its existence long ago.”

The power of the current mirage was far more than the previous one, probably not only at the Kingdom level, but at the Demi-God level. The spirit talent was extremely wonderful. Not only the illusion became substantial, but it could even emit corresponding fluctuations according to one’s mental state, which made the illusion more realistic. Chen Rui’s perception of this oasis was mostly based on Regia’s subjective feeling and introduction. Even the discovery of the Phantom Fountain was also an illusion generated by Regia’s mentality, thus affecting Chen Rui.

If one was trapped in the illusion for too long, even if the mirage did not devour him, the person’s soul and would be weakened step by step until he collapsed.

Regia was shocked, “Sir is saying that what I saw back then… and what I see now, is the illusion created by the mirage?”

“The only difference is that now the mirage is awake.” Chen Rui’s eyes see through the ‘Phantom Fountain’ that was constantly attacking the defensive shield in front of him like a sharp sword. The awakening was not necessarily ‘natural awakening’. It was probably related to the desert goddess that they encountered before.

“No wonder the Dreamy Oasis in the Black Prison Desert can move! It turns out that it sometimes wakes up! So, is the Dreamy Oasis real or…”

“No matter what, let’s get rid of this illusion first.” Chen Rui recalled what the Light Elemental King said. When Delkus and the Holy Church were in a cooperative relationship, and ‘desert goddess’ was recognized by the Holy Church, the Dreamy Oasis should be a real existence, even without the Phantom Ice Spring, there should be fire condensing crystal sand.

With that said, the defensive shield on Chen Rui’s side disappeared immediately, replaced by a black hole.

At this moment, the nearby things seemed to be torn apart as they twisted and flew toward the black hole. The ‘Phantom Fountain’ was the first to bear the brunt, then the small lake, the woods… everything was devoured by it.

The root of this kind of devour was the spirit power of the mirage. Things that had been devoured previously could continue to recover, then they finally began to fade and unable to recover.

Chen Rui put away the power of [Star Devouring] as his eyes fell in a certain direction in the distance. His hand turned into a knife shape and slashed in the air. The space was divided into 2 like it was an entity. At the same time, a beast grunted miserably.

The space that was slashed apart gradually returned normal, and there was a 5-meter-tall thing there. It was in the shape of a huge 2-lobed shell, emitting silver-gray light. The space inside was blurred, and only 2 blue dim lights flickered faintly like eyes.

An astonishing crack had appeared on the 2 huge silver-gray shells, and green juice was constantly leaking out. It was obviously because of the serious injury from the blow just now.

Race: Mirage

Comprehensive Strength Assessment: SSS+

Physique: SSS-, Strength: SSS, Spirit: SSS+, Speed: SSS-.

[Analysis]: Illusion power, spirit inducement, and space refraction.

Danger level: High.

When this thing appeared, the entire oasis completely disappeared, leaving only the barren desert.

The so-called oasis was just a dream.

TL: Another mirage? Can he enslave it and force it to find the Dreamy Oasis or it doesn’t exist at all?

chapters.title: Chapter 1098: Oasis
chapters.body:
Chapter 1098: Oasis

Chen Rui’s eyes flickered with a he cold light— It really is a mirage, and it is even at the peak stage of the Demi-God. It seems that it had been staying in the Black Prison Desert for many years, posing as the Dreamy Oasis to prey on the incoming people. Then the real Dreamy Oasis…

“Sir!” Regia exclaimed in surprise, “This mirage looks like… it’s the legendary guardian subordinate of Tezaneer!”

“Guardian subordinate?”

Chen Rui frowned, then he saw Regia suddenly being startled as if he saw something unimaginable. His face was full of horror. He actually knelt down, “Your Majesty…”

Before Chen Rui could speak, the scene in front of him suddenly changed greatly. He saw Duoduo, whom he had been worrying about for a long time, locked in a cage-like enchantment, and outside the cage, there was a figure with 6 pairs of wings. Raphael!

Under Raphael’s feet, lies a blood-soaked woman. Obviously, her life was in danger. It was actually Catherine!

Chen Rui’s eyes narrowed. Although it felt so realistic, he knew very well that it was just the mirage’s illusion power. At the same time, the Super System’s spirit power invasion prompt sounded again.

Chen Rui snorted and disregarded any scene that appeared in front of him. He waved his hand at the place shown by the [Analytical Eyes], and 7 huge light balls suddenly shot out. The light balls were connected together by wisps of light. The explosion happened in an instant.

The white light shone, and the entire illusion was torn apart. The original appearance of the mirage appeared again, but most of the shell on its body had been shattered, and its breath had also been weakened.

The mirage itself was the best at creating illusions. Its spirit power was so strong that even those who had the same level of strength could not escape, but its own physique and strength were weak. After being hit by this [7-star Explosion], it was seriously injured.

When Chen Rui folded his hands together, the hot air suddenly became icy cold. The mirage’s body suddenly froze. Half of its body was frozen by the power of [Winter Territory], unable to activate the illusion power.

Regia just woke up from the illusion, sweating like rain while panting heavily, “What just happened?”

In fact, Regia was just affected by the aftermath of the illusion. The real target of the mirage was Chen Rui. Unfortunately, it was defeated before the illusion power was exerted. Otherwise, once Regia fell too deep into the illusion, his spirit would collapse directly.

“No matter what you see, it’s not real,” Chen Rui turned his head and asked, “You said just now, that this thing is the guardian subordinate of Tezaneer?”

“Yes.” Regia wiped the sweat from his head, “In Tezaneer’s related books, its name is ‘Doandroma’, which means Dream Guardian. I just don’t know that it is a mirage. Even in Tezaneer’s goddess statue, it also has a place. It is usually in the form of a mount at the feet of the goddess.”

“Understood, then it must know the whereabouts of the real Dreamy Oasis.” Chen Rui slowly walked toward the mirage. The mirage exerted all its strength to erode Chen Rui’s mind but to no avail.

Because Chen Rui was now wearing a black armor: Wrath King Armor.

The Wrath King Armor could not only greatly reduce physical damage and magic damage, but it also protects the soul against spirit erosion. Before entering the ‘Dreamy Oasis’, Chen Rui did not realize that he was facing a mirage, so he did not put on the Wrath King Armor.

Chen Rui did not only equip the Wrath King Armor, but also another item, the God-Eating Mask.

The God-Eating Mask glowed with a faint yellow light, and a strange power enveloped the mirage. The mirage felt the crisis and struggled desperately, but it still could not escape this strange power.

What Chen Rui had to do next was to use the God-Eating Mask to control the mirage’s soul and find out where the real Dreamy Oasis was.

The mirage was shrouded by the power of the God-Eating Mask, and all the spirit power it emitted was reflected back. At the same time, a terrifying power infiltrated its soul.

The God-Eating Mask could control the soul of the enemy weaker than himself and make it a subordinate of his own accord. The spirit power of Chen Rui and the mirage were both at the level of SSS, and they were the peak stage of the Demi-God level. The spirit level of Chen Rui with galaxy faith was above the mirage, plus the mirage was now severely injured and imprisoned by [Winter Territory], so he should be able to fully control it.

Chen Rui’s brows raised abruptly behind the mask, because he felt that in the soul of the mirage, there was a powerful will that was actually fighting against the power of the God-Eating Mask.

This will was by no means the mirage’s own. It felt a bit familiar as though he had encountered it in Black Death Sandstorm just now.

In the clouds, the pair of closed eyes.

Under the influence of this will, the power of the God-Eating Mask was temporarily unable to infiltrate the soul of the mirage.

During the stalemate, the mask’s eyes flashed a purple starlight, and his whole body showed a dazzling light. The powerful force instantly covered that will. If it was the will itself, even if he used the starlight power, he could not suppress it. But in the body of the mirage, the power that the will could exert could not exceed the limitations of the mirage itself, so in just an instant, the God-Eating Mask broke through the defense of that will.

Just as Chen Rui was about to succeed, he frowned suddenly – Before the God-Eating Mask could control the mirage’s soul, the mirage’s body suddenly twisted and burst apart.

At the moment the God-Eating Mask wanted to control the mirage’s soul, that will detonated the mirage’s soul and body.

The mirage that had always been good at controlling others with illusion was just a manipulated puppet in this short and fierce battle from beginning to end.

Chen Rui’s closed eyes slowly opened. Although the explosive power of its soul was sudden and strong, it was not enough for him who had activated the [Pole Star Transformation].

“Sir, look over there…” Regia’s voice sounded behind him. Chen Rui looked over. It turned out that the mirage’s body didn’t disappear after it burst apart, but it turned into a path of faint white light to the space ahead.

This was not the power that Chen Rui activated. It was…

Clearly, the real battle had only just begun.

“You don’t want me, an uninvited guest, to continue destroy the kingdom you’ve built… or the system, so have you finally decided to meet?”

The surrounding space began to collapse, leaving only the path.

It seemed that Tezaneer did not give more than one option.

When Chen Rui glanced at Regia, Regia fainted. Then, he saw a flash of light beside Chen Rui and disappeared.

After Chen Rui used the Tower of Glory to keep Regia, he took a deep breath and walked toward the path of white light step by step.

At the end of the path was a light door.

The light door opened on its own, and Chen Rui walked in. It was a refreshing green with fresh breath everywhere. This scene made Chen Rui feel familiar. Small lakes, woods… Yes, an oasis!

Exactly the same, the oasis created by the mirage just now!

Chen Rui thought of the ‘space refraction’ attribute of the mirage in the [Analytical Eyes], and he immediately understood that the oasis was not completely fabricated. Rather, it was a real projection that was refracted! In other words, the oasis in front of him was the real Dreamy Oasis!

So, is the Phantom Springwater also real? And the fire condensing crystal sand that still has no clues?

Chen Rui walked forward unhurriedly. With every step he took, he was secretly adjusting his Star Power to maintain the optimum state as much as possible.

He didn’t know what kind of existence he was going to face, but at the moment, his mentality was as unstoppable as when he punched in the face of the Black Death Sandstorm.

Chen Rui’s footsteps stopped, and he raised his head. The white clouds in the sky began to gradually condense and form a shape. It was the image of the woman that he saw at the beginning. It was much clearer than last time, but the appearance was relatively hazy; her eyes were still closed.

The woman’s body glowed with white radiance, giving people a feeling of sacredness that could not be looked directly at. Chen Rui clearly felt that it was faith power.

The white light shone on the ground, and the breath of life in the entire oasis suddenly became 100 times richer. The sky seemed brighter, and the lake water was clearer. The breath that seemed to be alive brought great pressure on Chen Rui. He felt that the surrounding space was full of terrifying might; even the air almost solidified.

“Very powerful faith power.” Chen Rui suddenly said. A strange power spread along the sound, and the surrounding might seem to be swept by the rippling water waves. Even the strongest power might not be able to completely eliminate that kind of soft power. The original ‘solidified’ balance was suddenly broken. Although it was still terrifying, it was no longer perfect.

Use the greatest softness in the world to tame the strongest in the world.

[Water Sword].

A real sword was not necessarily a sword.

Chen Rui had launched a sword strike to dispel the might of the woman in the cloud.

“However, I can feel the incomplete of this faith power. Obviously, this faith doesn’t really belong to you. Perhaps you can’t truly own these faiths.”

Chen Rui looked up at the image of the cloud, but that kind of looking up was more like ignorance. He slowly turned around and said behind him, “Because you are not a god. Nonetheless, most of the time, you regard yourself as a god. Have you been playing a role for too long that you can’t extricate yourself from the role and return to your real self?”

He was talking, but it was also another sword strike.

If the previous sword strike was tangible, then this sword was intangible.

The sword that attacked the mind was more deadly.

The woman formed by the white clouds in the sky disappeared. On the other hand, a silhouette of rays of light began to quickly become clear behind Chen Rui.

Long silver hair.

The eyes were still closed, and the facial features were slightly blurred, but the proportions were extremely perfect.

The snow-white robe without extra inlays or patterns looked luxurious and graceful.

There was a calm breath all over her, but a storm-like terrifying power seemed to be brewing in this calm.

Chen Rui just turned around and faced the woman who should be called the oracle.

Even without looking at the data in the [Analytical Eyes], he could sense the power of this woman. This kind of feeling could only be experienced when facing the most peak stage powerhouses such as Michael, Satan, and Raphael!

chapters.title: Chapter 1099: 5 Minutes
chapters.body:
Chapter 1099: 5 Minutes

Most of the angels were male while some were genderless and neutral. Meanwhile, the proportion of female angels was relatively small, especially the high-level ones. The one who appeared in front of Chen Rui at this moment was a beautiful and holy female angel.

But Chen Rui’s eyes showed no appreciation for beauty, but vigilance, extreme vigilance.

In the [Analytical Eyes], Tezaneer’s data was shown as.

Race: Angel

Comprehensive Strength Assessment: SSSS+

Physique: SSSS+, Strength: SSSS+, Spirit: SSSS+, Speed: SSSS+.

[Analysis] attribute: Wind attribute, soil attribute, fire attribute, water attribute, body of war intent, heart of saint fighting, proficiency in all martial arts.

Danger level: Extremely dangerous!

No doubt, this is a peak stage of the Pseudo-God.

Tezaneer was also an angel, but unlike Michael and Raphael, who had the light element power, she had all 4 element powers except for the 2 elements of light and darkness. What surprised Chen Rui even more was that such a seemingly demure and beautiful female angel actually had the attribute of ‘proficiency in all martial arts’. There was no doubt that she had the most terrifying melee combat ability.

Chen Rui secretly channeled the Star Power, constantly dispelling the enormous suppression emanating from Tezaneer, “Am I right? Madam Tezaneer. Or should I call the beautiful and charming Ms. Angel?”

Although Tezaneer didn’t open her eyes, and Chen Rui was wearing the God-Eating Mask fused with star armor, she could clearly feel the indifference, “Who are you?”

This voice sounded very pleasant, but it contained an intangible threatening vibe.

“Just a passerby.” Chen Rui slightly bowed to Tezaneer, “First of all, please forgive my presumptuousness. I didn’t know that the mirage was your subordinate.”

Tezaneer raised her head slightly, and her quiet voice was about to pierce the mask and cut his soul, “What power did you use to control Doandroma just now?”

“A kind of spirit power that erodes the soul, similar to the way Doandroma did to me; I just gave it back.” Chen Rui didn’t think Tezaneer had the ability to see through the God-Eating Mask fused with the star armor. The focus of these remarks was on the mirage ‘Doandroma’ making the first blow at him. Even if he wanted to use the secret technique to control Doandroma, it was just a counter-attack, not an active provocation.

“Really?” Tezaneer’s tone had a faint inexplicable emotion, “That kind of power gives me a familiar feeling, which is why I let you into this kingdom to confirm it. Now it seems that it should be my illusion .”

Chen Rui then understood why after the mirage died, Tezaneer did not continue to attack or leave, but she instead led him here.

“Ms. Tezaneer may have misunderstood. Although I feel very honored, it is indeed our first time to meet.” Chen Rui smiled slightly, “To tell the truth, I came to the Black Prison Desert to find the Dreamy Oasis, fire condensing crystal sand and…”

Tezaneer interrupted him directly, “Since it’s a misunderstanding, then you only have 2 options left.”

Chen Rui heard the strong hostility in Tezaneer’s words, and he frowned, “Let’s not talk about the Doandroma thing. Miss was the one who took the initiative to attack me with the Black Death Sandstorm. I didn’t offend miss.”

“I don’t need an explanation.” Tezaneer cut off his retreat completely in 1 sentence, “And you, just need to choose.”

“Death or surrender?” Chen Rui shook his head, “You’re not the first to give me this choice. Of course, you won’t be the last.”

“I feel your strong self-confidence. It is not ignorant trash arrogance, but real confidence.” Tezaneer nodded, “Although your current level of strength is at the intermediate stage of the Pseudo-God, I’m sure that you have the methods to fight those that are higher level. You can even pose a certain threat to the peak stage of the Pseudo-God. The most admirable thing is your will. What you saw before is not the real me. It’s just a consciousness that contains my will released from my sleep. However, this will was shattered by your punch, and the determination contained in that punch woke me up from my slumber. It’s great… to meet an opponent like you!”

Chen Rui’s pupils contracted slightly. He had already encountered several peak stage of the Pseudo-God like Satan, Sariel, Michael, Raphael, Python, and the avatar of the 3 rulers of Abyss. These peak stage powerhouses had 1 thing in common, that was, they were arrogant. Even the scheming Python also had this mentality. Of course, the key to this pride depended on the difference in strength. For an ‘ant’ like him, this pride was also reasonable.

However, Tezaneer was completely different. Although her strength level was comparable to that of Satan, Michael, and so on. Chen Rui was seen from the height of an ‘opponent’ from the very beginning.

This was not only prudence and respect, but it also meant that the woman in front of her would be more difficult to deal with.

“The fire condensing crystal sand you just mentioned…” Tezaneer stretched out her hand and twirled her fingers slightly. Chen Rui felt countless pale yellow crystal lights flying out of the oasis at high speed, and they quickly gathered toward her palm.

Chen Rui stretched out his hand toward the crystal light, but the crystal light actually passed through his hand like a phantom.

“Don’t waste your efforts. Even if you get these phantom crystal sands, it’s useless. In fact, they are also of little use to me. The entire kingdom’s phantom crystal sands are here. The new one needs at least 100 years.”

Tezaneer said indifferently. The crystal light had solidified into a huge light ball with a diameter of about 5 meters above her palm. Then, Chen Rui felt the powerful golden and red power in Tezaneer’s hand, wrapping the light ball. The light ball began to change rapidly, flickering violently. Finally, it was compressed into a crystal ball about the size of a fist, showing a golden-red brilliance.

“This is the real fire condensing crystal sand.”

Chen Rui understood what Tezaneer said. It turned out that the fire condensing crystal sand was made of the power of the fire element and the earth element. From the power level that Tezaneer activated, it was definitely not the ordinary power of the 2 elements. It should be created by combining the power of the peak stage of the Pseudo-God with innate abilities.

“For the sake of your punch, I’ll grant your little wish. The fire condensing crystal sand is here. If you want it, get it yourself,” Tezaneer stretched out her finger and pointed lightly at the fire condensing crystal sand that was hovering in the air. A light arc shrouded the crystal sand, “But you must have corresponding awareness, such as death. Besides, you have only 5 minutes.”

With that said, the light arc glowed, and the edge of the fire condensing crystal sand began to dissipate into powder little by little.

Chen Rui didn’t expect Tezaneer to choose this way to ‘grant’ his wish. The fire condensing crystal sand didn’t disappear very quickly, but because the crystal ball was not big, it would disappear completely after a few minutes.

That was the meaning of ‘5 minutes’.

Chen Rui didn’t know how much fire condensing crystal sand was needed to help Duoduo get through the difficulties, but for sure, there could only be more, not less. Therefore, I must hurry up!

As soon as he thought of this, his figure immediately disappeared. In the blink of an eye, he appeared in front of Tezaneer, grabbing toward the crystal sand.

“[Swift As Wind]!”

The speed might had been activated before he shifted.

Although Chen Rui’s hand reached out to the crystal sand, almost all his attention was focused on Tezaneer, but Tezaneer didn’t move. She just watched him grab the fire condensing crystal sand.

Just as Chen Rui was about to touch the fire condensing crystal sand, Tezaneer suddenly disappeared from his perception.

Chen Rui, who had been on guard, discovered Tezaneer’s location in the [Analytical Eyes]. It turned out that Tezaneer had already appeared beside him in an instant – This speed is much faster than I expected. If it was not for the [Analytical Eyes], even with the power of [Swift As Wind], I couldn’t keep up at all!

Almost at the same time, a sense of terrifying crisis enveloped Chen Rui; Tezaneer’s fist.

Before it hit, Chen Rui already felt an extremely terrifying ‘will’ covering his whole body. The intangible force made the operation of Star Power stagnate. Under that indescribable power, his soul trembled involuntarily.

The environment of this kingdom was far stronger than ordinary places. Under this punch, the space actually appeared to be torn apart. It was not an ordinary tearing, but a vacuum state.

Such a vacuum state would only appear when Chen Rui activated the ultimate moves like [Dimension Destruction]

Tezaneer just launched a random punch!

Delicate-looking fist with such pure and berserk power! It’s unbelievable!

If this punch hits me, even with the protection of Star Armor and the Wrath King Armor, my body and soul will be completely shattered.

Chen Rui had fought against the peak stage of the Pseudo-God such as Michael and Satan, but even those powerhouses did not have the absolute terrifying power like Tezaneer. It could be more accurately described with another word – ‘momentum’!

At the critical moment, Chen Rui unleashed a force without hesitation. His body turned into a green lightning bolt. His movement speed increased several times again. He had already appeared 100 meters away, avoiding the punch.

Tezaneer frowned, and she punched toward the air again. The distance between them was hundreds of meters away, but the power of this punch was not weakened by the distance. The resulting space fissure was like a huge chain.

Chen Rui’s figure turned into green lightning again, dodging the blow. He dodged far away, otherwise the vacuum alone would inflict terrifying damage to him.

Tezaneer swung both her fists, and countless terrifying punches were intertwined into a huge criss-crossing net, completely shrouding Chen Rui. Even if he was not hit, the incomparable berserk fluctuations still shocked Chen Rui’s mind. It felt like the first time he entered the surfy sea of the training ground. He was like a small boat, bumping in the roaring sea. If he was not careful, he would be smashed to pieces.

In the terrifying power like a surfy sea, the green lightning dashed away. Although it was looming, it never disappeared.

This kind of power was exactly 1 thing Chen Rui had recently analyzed successfully – Breeze Shadow Boots!

TL: A warlike Pseudo God, seems like he needs to break through his current strength now…

chapters.title: Chapter 1100: Blitz
chapters.body:
Chapter 1100: Blitz

The Breeze Shadow Boots had 3 abilities.

1. [Wind Escape]——Greatly enhance the movement speed and speed ability. It came with [Sparkle] skill, which could further triple the speed. [Sparkle] is effective for 1 minute and can be used twice.

2. [Wind Catch], [Shadow Catch]:

[Wind Catch]——Double the attack speed. The duration is 30 minutes.

[Shadow Catch] – Locks on the attack target. No matter what distance or space the target escapes, he can launch an attack. The duration is 3 minutes.

3. [Wind Body] – In this state, he will slide backward using the opponent’s attack power, greatly reducing the damage. The duration is 10 minutes.

In fact, this was equivalent to 4 abilities. All of which was very practical.

Chen Rui had deeply experienced [Wind Escape]’s acceleration power. It not only improved his own speed, but also the ‘ability’ and ‘talent’ of speed. For example, Chen Rui’s might of [Swift As Wind] got a big buff, so he could successfully dodge that level of intensive attacks from Tezaneer.

[Sparkle] was a powerful skill to escape or win at critical moments.

The attack acceleration of [Wind Catch] did not increase the base attack speed like ordinary equipment. Instead, it increased the speed after all skills or equipment buffs, which meant twice the total speed that accumulated all factors.

[Shadow Catch] was even more mysterious. It could lock on the target and carry out cross-space attacks. Even if the opponent escaped to another space, he could continue to attack. It was simply a ‘super tracking missile’ that surpassed all obstacles. Of course, there were hit count and a 3-minute duration.

[Wind Body] was an extremely practical unloading and defensive ability.

If there was anything that was still lacking, it was that these abilities of the Breeze Shadow Boots, except [Wind Escape], could only be used once every 24 hours.

If it weren’t for the Breeze Shadow Boots, facing Tezaneer’s terrifying attack, Chen Rui would have exhausted his life-saving skills such as [Mirror Body], [Demonic Flies Transformation], and [Star Diversion].

A sneer appeared on Tezaneer’s face when she saw that green lightning flashed and escaped from her punch net. While dodging, he was approaching the fire condensing crystal sand step by step. Tezaneer tapped her feet and instantly appeared in front of Chen Rui.

Chen Rui knew that he was not her opponent in face-to-face battle, so he had to take advantage of his speed. He shifted his body sideways, bypassed Tezaneer with all his strength, and rushed toward the fire condensing crystal sand in a quick u-turn. However, Tezaneer followed him closely. That speed was even on top of Chen Rui who had the [Wind Escape] buff!

Chen Rui was also a veteran of running away. He tried his best to use detours to dodge; he was almost caught up several times.

With Chen Rui’s current strength, after adding the might of [Swift As Wind], it was already close to the speed of the Pseudo-God peak stage. Coupled with the buff power of the Breeze Shadow Boots, it should reach the level of SSSS+, but Tezaneer was faster than him!

Terrifying power, terrifying speed!

Tezaneer punched again; faster than before. At this moment, Chen Rui almost mistakenly thought that the opponent was wearing the Breeze Shadow Boots.

When the berserk power was about to tear his body apart, Chen Rui’s green lightning flashed again. His speed suddenly tripled, instantly escaping out of the range of her punch power.

[Sparkle] by the Breeze Shadow Boots!

Although the battle between the 2 went back and forth for many rounds just now, due to the extremely fast speed, the actual time did not even reach 1 minute. Chen Rui kept in mind his purpose of coming here. With the power of [Sparkle], he swept toward the fire condensing crystal sand floating not far away.

At this moment, the sense of crisis approached again, and Chen Rui was shocked – Tezaneer actually keeps up with [Sparkle]! Is this her true speed?

No! Tezaneer is not equipped with [Armor of Faith] yet!

This woman is definitely the fastest opponent of all the peak stage Pseudo-God I have encountered. Perhaps she is also the strongest opponent in pure strength!

Chen Rui was already terrified of Tezaneer’s punch.

This time, the punch contained the might that had not been activated before. Countless strong rays of light shot out with spatial cracks. This time, instead of ‘lines’, they merged into ‘surfaces’ and sealed Chen Rui in all directions.

In the blink of an eye, the ‘surfaces’ had become larger and larger, quickly spliced and folded together, turning to a fully enclosed space similar to a cube. Chen Rui was trapped in it. There was nowhere to run.

In the enclosed space, those ‘surfaces’ shot out countless ‘lines’ condensed with terrifying power, rushing toward Chen Rui. Wherever they passed, everything was shattered. The cube space was rapidly shrinking.

This was no ordinary attack, but one of Tezaneer’s ultimate mights, [Solitary Vanish]!

Facing the power of destroying everything, Chen Rui couldn’t avoid it at all. His eyes flashed, and he finally launched a life-saving move as his body suddenly became transparent.

[Mirror Body]!

Tezaneer frowned again. The ‘cube’ that should have been reduced to nothingness together with Chen Rui was strangely distorted. The “surfaces” were disintegrated back into “lines” and shot back at her. The space around her suddenly shattered.

Although this kind of reflected ‘lines’ couldn’t destroy the space like her attack, the power was still terrifying. What made her in disbelief was that the opponent who was at the intermediate stage of the Pseudo-God actually reflected the attack of the peak stage of the Pseudo-God!

Before Tezaneer could think much, she was wrapped in countless powerful forces that were reflected back. The nearby space began to shatter in chaos. The defensive forces scattered around her were invaded by lines of extinction, and countless cracks appeared on her white robe.

Chen Rui didn’t look back at his ‘masterpiece’. Instead, he quickly rushed to the fire condensing crystal sand with the power of [Sparkle], which was the most important thing.

The speed of [Sparkle] was extremely fast. Within the blink of an eye, the crystal ball suspended in the air was within reach.

In an instant, Chen Rui noticed that the breath behind him suddenly increased several times. All the chaotic lights and fragmented space around Tezaneer instantly turned into powder. Almost at the same time, a figure with a purple light blasted out.

The purple light was so fast that it almost caught up with Chen Rui in the blink of an eye.

That light contained extremely terrifying power. Even before it touched Chen Rui, he felt pain in his back. Even the star armor fused with the Wrath King Armor could not block it. If he was hit by such a momentum, there would be no chance of survival.

Tezaneer was about to completely finish off with this enemy, then she felt that the opponent’s speed was speeding up again. She actually couldn’t catch up. She was secretly shocked, “How come he can still accelerate?”

Not right!

She immediately reacted. It wasn’t that the other party became faster, but that she became slower!

The flow of time is changing!

Time might!

These few turning points, including the psychological changes of the 2, were all in less than a blink of an eye. The green lightning-like figure was only 1 step away from the fire condensing crystal sand. Tezaneer who kept her eyes closed all the time, ignored the time law of slowing down and opened her eyes!

Chen Rui felt his soul tremble, and a pair of eyes appeared in his mind: 1 pupil was red and the other was silver. The moment the eyes appeared, the blood in his whole body seemed to stop flowing. Not only the blood, but also Star Power, spirit power and even consciousness stopped. At the same time, time might actually stopped too!

Chen Rui was horrified. Even Satan could only use the opposite power of time to offset the time might I activated. What ability did Tezaneer use to actually be able to directly crack the time might!

The fire condensing crystal sand suspended in the air in front was within reach, but without the effect of time might, the purple light instantly pierced Chen Rui’s body, and his body suddenly shattered.

At this time, Chen Rui’s voice only came, “[Slow As Forest]”.

From the previous offense and defense to the might battle, the whole process was instantaneous, far exceeding the speed of sound.

Chen Rui, who was about to get fire condensing crystal sand, finally failed. He was smashed to pieces before getting the fire condensing crystal sand.

Tezaneer’s silver and red pupils shrank slightly. In her vision, the shattered body was actually flies. After the ‘shatter’, the flies reassembled into Chen Rui’s body. He was unscathed.

[Demonic Flies Transformation] of the God-Eating Mask!

Chen Rui’s right hand was holding a crystal ball that emitted golden red light: Fire condensing crystal sand.

“Madam Tezaneer, I don’t think there’s any need for us to continue fighting… At least, for the time being.”

Although Chen Rui got the fire condensing crystal sand, he was alredy soaked in cold sweat. The battle just now was extremely short, but it was all fought at an extremely high speed. It could be called a blitz. It was no less intense and dangerous than any hard battle he had ever experienced.

To be honest, Tezaneer’s fighting talent and abilities were too terrifying. If it weren’t for the power of the Breeze Shadow Boots and the God-Eating Mask, perhaps he would have been eliminated.

Tezaneer snorted and really stopped attacking. The white robe on her body had been shattered by the power of the previous [Mirror Body] reflection, so she simply threw the robe on the ground, revealing the suit inside.

These were white tights convenient for fighting. Tezaneer was only medium in height, but her body proportions were extremely well-proportioned. Although this outfit showed very little skin, it wrapped her body in perfect curves.

If Tezaneer wearing a white robe was a quiet and peaceful desert goddess, then the current Tezaneer was a heroic Valkyrie, exuding a powerful fighting breath as if every inch of her skin could become a raging burning force.

She held a very strangely shaped weapon in her hand. It was a sword with a long, narrow, spiral-shaped blade, similar to the drill bit Chen Rui had seen in her previous life. The main blade was purple, and the edges were sharp silver blades.

It was such a terrifying weapon that nearly harvested Chen Rui’s life and soul. If he did not activate [Demonic Flies Transformation] in time, his body would really be shattered by this sword.

Tezaneer’s eyes were set on Chen Rui’s face. Her silver-red eyes glowed like a sharp sword as if she wanted to see through his mask, “Earth Badge! Wind Badge!”

chapters.title: Chapter 1101: Name
chapters.body:
Chapter 1101: Name

Chen Rui was secretly shocked. Nevermind the [Demonic Flies Transformation], but she even sees through the Breeze Shadow Boots.

“It turns out to be you!” Tezaneer’s voice suddenly became cold. Her pupils flashed, and the previous terrifying feeling of freezing Star Power and soul reappeared in Chen Rui’s mind.

Chen Rui was on full alert immediately. She was also a peak stage of the Pseudo-God powerhouse. Compared with Michael and Satan, Tezaneer was more of a ‘physical attack’ type. The power of might was perfectly integrated with her body, but she also had a very terrifying strange power that actually made the time might, [Slow As Forest], invalid. This was most likely caused by the talent of that War Intent Body or Saint Fighting Heart.

At this point, Tezaneer was the toughest opponent he’d ever faced.

Now that [Demonic Flies Transformation] and [Mirror Body] had been used up, once the time might was suppressed, in case of danger to life, it would be quite difficult to even activate the [Star Gate] to escape.

“Where’s your Fallen Sword?” Tezaneer’s icy voice was like a sharp sword. It was filled with the berserk momentum that was far superior than before.

“The Fallen Sword?” Chen Rui frowned, “You’ve mistaken my identity!”

At this moment, Chen Rui’s facial expression suddenly changed, not because of Tezaneer’s power, but because of the fire condensing crystal sand in her hand. On the fire condensing crystal sand, the light arc that was gradually dissipating suddenly turned into an odd-shaped mark, which emitted silver and black lightning arcs. The fire condensing crystal sand began to be annihilated quickly again.

Chen Rui tried his best to activate the power of [Star Devouring], but he could only slow down the disappearance of fire condensing crystal sand. With this kind of attached power, he couldn’t keep it in the storage warehouse.

“Madam Tezaneer,” Chen Rui continued to stare directly at the silver-red pupils without even blinking his eyelids despite the sharp pain in his eyes, “What do you mean?”

“I’m not used to talking to people like this.” Tezaneer said coldly, “Take off your mask.”

Chen Rui frowned. The Star Armor’s visor disappeared together with the God-Eating Mask, revealing Chen Rui’s ordinary appearance.

“You don’t even have the guts to show your true face?” Tezaneer just glanced at his face, then she showed a contemptuous expression.

“This is my true…”

“Stop talking nonsense!” The spiral sword in Tezaneer’s hand turned toward the sky, and the sky of the entire oasis became dark. The dark clouds in the sky were flashing silver and black lightning. A huge mark that seemed the same as the one on the fire condensing crystal sand appeared.

Chen Rui’s feelings became clearer and clearer. What this sword contained was not the power of Tezaneer’s 4-element innate talent, but the breath of light element and dark element!

The light element and dark element power are pure and strong, it is hard to believe that the human world also has such a strong dark element power – It should be the power of the sword itself!

“The mark on fire condensing crystal sand is one with this ‘Void Slashr’. If you want to cancel that mark, take this sword!” The cold voice suddenly sounded in mid-air. Tezaneer raised the spiral sword as if merging with the entire sky. Her appearance also changed: 6 pairs of silver wings appeared behind her, and her power breath skyrocketed again.

No doubt she was the highest level 12-winged angel!

In no time, the turbulent power of light and darkness on the sword made the long sword seem to have expanded hundreds of times. It turned into a towering purple greatsword lingering with black and white lightning, beheading Chen Rui.

This was not just 1 sword, but thousands of sword intents that merged into 1. Before the sword struck, the ground nearby had been cracked due to the magnificent momentum.

Chen Rui had no more time to think. A sword appeared in his hand in an instant to parry against it.

The body of the sword was snow-white, engraved with 2 strange marks, and the quillons were 2 angels back to back, exuding a simple and mysterious breath.

Sword of Fallen Angel!

Regardless of whether this sword was the Fallen Sword as mentioned by Tezaneer, the only thing Chen Rui had to do now was to take the ‘Void Slash’ that contained a powerful light element and dark element power!

In an instant, the overwhelming momentum had wrapped Chen Rui, and the entire oasis shook violently. Under the agitation of the huge force, large rocks escaped gravity and floated into the air.

After a long time, the dark clouds and lightning gradually dissipated while the sky returned to its original blue.

The cracks on the ground could not be restored like the sky. Even if this was a special kingdom comparable to the solid ground of steel, there was a huge pit as though a meteorite fell to the ground.

After the dust cleared, Tezaneer held the spiral sword and maintained a downward slashing posture while Chen Rui, who was parrying with the horizontal sword on the opposite side, became blurred, like the fallen leaves blown away by the wind.

Tezaneer’s eyes were fixed on the front, where Chen Rui’s figure became clear again.

Tezaneer said 2 words coldly, “[Wind Body].”

[Wind Body]——1 of the Breeze Shadow Boots’ skills. It could allow the user to slide backward according to the opponent’s attack power, greatly reducing the damage. The duration was 10 minutes.

As Tezaneer said this, her icy eyes glanced at the Sword of Fallen Angel in Chen Rui’s hand. Chen Rui’s right hand that was holding the Sword of Fallen Angel shook suddenly, making an explosion sound. The star armor wrapped around the arm cracked open one after another, and bright red blood appeared in the cracks.

Chen Rui didn’t seem to realize it. His focus was entirely on the piece of fire condensing crystal sand in his left hand; there was still 1/3 of the fire condensing crystal sand left. Tezaneer no longer attacked. Following the disappearance of ‘Void Slash’, the mark on the fire condensing crystal sand also disappeared.

Chen Rui shifted his thoughts and kept it in the storage warehouse. He was finally relieved in his mind- I finally have the fire condensing crystal sand that Duoduo needs!

After Chen Rui relaxed his mind, he felt the severe pain caused by the heavy injury to his right arm. He directly took the big blow just now. With Tezaneer’s strength, even Satan and Michael might not be able to take the blow like this, but he did it just like that.

There was only 1 reason, the Sword of Fallen Angel.

The Sword of Fallen Angel had 3 abilities: [Soul Searing], [Sword Control], and [Blazing Wing].

Chen Rui commonly used [Soul Searing] to kill the soul; [Sword Control] could double the damage, and he could control the sword from the distance. In addition to fighting, it could also be used occasionally to impress others; only [Blazing Wing] was rarely used.

[Blazing Wing] – During the effective time, he was completely immune to light element and dark element attacks; limited to once per hour.

The biggest mystery of the ‘Void Slash’ just now was that the light element and the dark element blended with each other to repel the explosion, which was somewhat similar to Zola’s [Element’s Fury] and Elemental King’s ‘Cosmos Annihilation’. However, before the power exploded to the extreme, it was restrained by the special effect of [Blazing Wing].

The impact Chen Rui received was only Tezaneer’s own power after filtering out the power of that ultimate move. Of course, the power of the peak stage of the Pseudo-God was still no small matter, especially for Tezaneer’s type. Although most of it was removed by the power of the [Wind Body], the rest still inflicted heavy damage on his right arm. He could barely hold the Sword of Fallen Angel.

“No doubt it’s the Fallen Sword, and the power of [Blazing Wing] just now. Do you still want to deny it?” Tezaneer seemed to be very familiar with the 7 artifacts. She recited the ability that Chen Rui used just now. What made his heart palpitate the most was that the silver-red pupils exuded an intangible deterrence. The terrifying feeling of ‘freezing’ was like a sword of Damocles hanging over his head, which could kill him at any time.

“Deny?” Chen Rui vaguely understood that Tezaneer activated the ‘Void Slash’ just now to force him to use the Sword of Fallen Angel to resolve it. Perhaps she was testing him before because the Breeze Shadow Boots or the God-Eating Mask might have given her some preconceived notion.

“I have nothing to say.” Chen Rui sighed as the Sword of Fallen Angel disappeared, and he shook his head, “You’re not the first person to misunderstand me, but it seems that even if I explain it, it is useless. “

“I wanted to kill you like this, but it seems that you have forgotten a lot of things or you haven’t remembered yet…” Tezaneer stared at him for a moment before her eyes slowly closed. Chen Rui suddenly felt relieved as the ‘freezing’ deterrent disappeared while Tezaneer had put on a brand new white robe at some point. The 6 pairs of silver wings on her back disappeared, and the terrifying spiral sword was also gone.

“To kill you in this state is an insult to the Holy Song Sword of mine. Go, before I change my mind.”

Chen Rui was surprised. He had been on high alert and prepared to activate the [Star Gate] and the Tower of Glory, but he didn’t expect Tezaneer would let him go so easily.

However, he couldn’t leave yet.

“ Uh … Madam Tezaneer, 1 more thing.”

“There’s a limit to my patience, especially for guys who don’t know when to stop.”

“Please give me a minute, Madam Tezaneer. I’ll ask one thing first: Does this oasis have the Phantom Ice Spring?”

“Phantom Ice Spring?” Tezaneer said coldly, “The Phantom Springwater does exist, but you can’t find it here. In my kingdom, the real ice spring will take at least 3 years to condense successfully.”

“3 years?” Chen Rui was secretly delighted. Lambost could survive at most 5 years. When he learned from Regia that the Phantom Ice Spring would take hundreds of years to produce, he was worried that it would be too late. Now Tezaneer said that it would only take 3 years, it was completely enough to save the Water Elemental King in time.

Tezaneer’s voice interrupted his thoughts, “Don’t be delusional. The value of the Phantom Ice Spring is not like the fire condensing crystal sand; it is a necessity for my training. One of the reasons I chose this place as the kingdom is because of the Phantom Ice Spring.”

Chen Rui asked tentatively, “What if I exchange it with something equivalent?”

“You still have 30 seconds.” Tezaneer’s meaning was obvious.

“Resurrection potion? Longevity potion? Magic item? Holy relic of light?”

“20 seconds.”

Seeing that she was unmoved and not even curious, Chen Rui couldn’t help but get anxious. He suddenly thought of something, and a flower appeared in his hand, “What about this?”

The flower was pure white and crystal clear. It was as delicate as a carved gem, exuding a divine and holy breath.

Despite closing her eyes, Tezaneer recognized the flower’s origin, “Snow Dallet?”

“Yes, it’s the Holy Flower.”

Tezaneer said contemptuously, “I don’t know where you got this flower, but this thing is not a rare thing to me at all. The Holy Light Mountain has 3 Snow Dallet Trees. I can have as many as I want.”

“The relationship between Madam Tezaneer and the Holy Light Mountain is indeed extraordinary.” Chen Rui smiled confidently, “But it seems that madam has been sleeping a little too long. You don’t even know what happened in the Holy Light Mountain. The Holy Flower is extinct at the Holy Light Mountain!”

“What?” Tezaneer was shocked, showing an incredible expression. The degree of this kind of shock was beyond Chen Rui’s expectations.

Afterward, the ‘desert goddess’ didn’t care about the time limit of 1 minute. She immediately activated the secret mystic art to draw a mark.

The mark disappeared into the space. Soon after, the light began to condense again, and a figure appeared where the mark disappeared.

Chen Rui was taken aback because this figure was his ‘acquaintance’.

1 of the 3 archangels, Raphael!

Obviously, this was just a projection, and there was no power; it should be used for communication.

Chen Rui was startled by Raphael’s first sentence, “Gabriel, have you finally woken up from your slumber?”

TL: She is Gabriel? Would she team up with Raphael and hunt down Chen Rui?

chapters.title: Chapter 1102: Gabriel
chapters.body:
Chapter 1102: Gabriel

This name really shocked Chen Rui. She is actually Gabriel!

Gabriel, Michael and Raphael are called the Holy Light Mountain’s 3 archangels.

Gabriel is a female angel?

Chen Rui never imagined that this ‘goddess’ in the border desert was actually 1 of the 3 leaders of the Holy Church!

Chen Rui figured out a lot of things in an instant. The reason why Gabriel would sleep in the Black Prison Desert and become Goddess Tezaneer in the desert must be to try another way to ‘become a god’. No wonder the ‘desert messenger’ is recognized by the Holy Church and is being worshipped by people. This further derives into the ‘desert goddess’.

However, it seems that Gabriel’s attempt has not achieved the desired results. Chen Rui could sense it before. The faith power in the ‘Tezaneer’s’ kingdom was relatively mottled and messy, because those faiths belong to the ‘desert goddess’, not Gabriel herself. As an angel, Gabriel couldn’t really own these faith powers that should only belong to god.

After all, Chen Rui was the most wanted criminal of the Holy Church. Now he met his ‘old friend’ Raphael again, so…

Gabriel still didn’t open her eyes as she said indifferently, “Raphael, you are awake too? Where’s Michael?”

“ Hmph , Michael went to sleep again. Not long ago, he was attacked at the Light Divinity Temple by Python and an accomplice, and he lost the Wind Badge… By the way, speaking of the Wind Badge, after you fell asleep, about 100 years ago…”

Raphael said a few words, and he finally noticed a man in armor with a faint purple starlight in the distance. His pupils shrank suddenly, “It’s you!”

Despite the difference in appearance, Raphael still remembered the star-like armor and the power breath, so he recognized him at a glance.

You just found out? Chen Rui shrugged and bowed deliberately, “Dear Sir Raphael, we meet again.”

“You know him?” Gabriel asked rhetorically.

“Of course I know this guy!” Raphael’s eyes flashed with murderous intent, “He killed Isyorul and stole the Snow Dallet Trees! He is even possibly teaming up with Python!”

“Python?” Gabriel’s tone changed.

“Because of her, Uriel…”

“I haven’t lost my memory yet.” Gabriel’s tone was even colder.

“Sir Raphael,” Chen Rui grinned, “Those matters of killing and stealing happened long time ago, so don’t fret over it anymore. Last time… didn’t you almost kill me too?”

A long time ago? Don’t fret anymore?

Damn, how long has it been?

This relaxed and casual tone made Raphael’s facial expression suddenly unsightly. Especially the ‘almost kill me’ , it sounded like a mockery.

Last time, in front of so many people, he suffered a great shame to let him escape easily. Raphael secretly swore that if he met this man next time, he would capture him alive and torture him to death in every possible way. However, he didn’t expect that he would meet Chen Rui again in such a situation. As a communication projection, his combat power was almost zero. He had no way to deal with this enemy.

Fortunately, Gabriel is there. Judging from the appearance of the enemy, it seems that he was injured by Gabriel.

“Gabriel, catch him quickly! He must be caught alive!”

“Are you ordering me?” Gabriel asked back with a faint coldness in her voice.

“Gabriel!” Raphael was a little anxious, “Now is not the time for this! The Snow Dallet Trees have already fallen into his hands! You should know what this means!”

“You don’t need to remind me.” Gabriel said slowly, “Before you came, he was talking to me about a trade, and 1 of the items in the trade is the Snow Dallet Tree. That’s why I activated the summon rune. “

“ Hmph , there’s no need for a trade at all. Catch him, and we can get everything! By the way, this guy has a very special might. He escaped from my hands last time. Your Saint Fighting Heart can crack all might, so you can absolutely catch…”

As soon as Raphael finished his words, a light door appeared beside Chen Rui. Next, his figure flashed and disappeared into the light door without a word.

Raphael, “…”

Gabriel, “…”

Gabriel’s reaction was very fast. With a flick of the white sleeves, an intangible power rolled toward the [Star Gate], which had not completely disappeared. She wanted to grab Chen Rui out of the space, but this power passed through it without any effect.

Gabriel’s expression became solemn, “Saint Fighting Heart can’t cancel the power of this space transmission! My power can’t enter the space either!”

Raphael was shocked: This strange space door can’t even be dispelled by Gabriel’s strongest Saint Fighting Heart. No wonder I failed last time.

At this moment, Chen Rui walked out of the space door again and smiled at the 2 of them, “You 2, where did we stop just now?”

Raphael was suddenly speechless. He comes and goes as he wishes.

This method proved something more than any words.

If they turn completely hostile toward him, then the Snow Dallet Tree would be sacrificed for real.

“Good trick.” Gabriel nodded slightly, “You talked about a trade.”

“Okay, since it’s a trade, then we can temporarily put aside all the unpleasant pasts and talk about the issue of chips.” Gabriel’s strength was evident. Since there was a precedent for the time might failure, Chen Rui was really afraid of the Saint Fighting Heart, so he didn’t go around in circles again, “I told Raphael last time at the Holy Light Mountain that the Snow Dallet might be a bargaining chip for our trade… I can give you the Snow Dallet Trees, but I want the Phantom Ice Spring.”

“Why should I believe that the Snow Dallet Trees are still safe?”

Raphael didn’t say more, because he had already seen the Snow Dallet Flower in Chen Rui’s hands. He could feel the ‘freshness’ of the flower. It was just picked from the tree!

“Is this enough to prove that the Snow Dallet Tree is still under my control? Sir Raphael?” Chen Rui deliberately emphasized the word ‘control’, which had a very simple meaning: He could control the life and death of the Snow Dallet Tree at any time.

“ Hmph !” Raphael stared at the Snow Dallet Flower, “You can have the Phantom Ice Spring, but you must hand over 1 first…”

“Who said yes?” Gabriel’s cold voice interrupted Raphael’s words, “Raphael, do I need to remind you? This is the Black Prison Desert, and I’m Tezaneer!”

“But you’re also Gabriel!” Raphael seemed like he was about to blast off, but he held back, “The past is over. We don’t need to fight in front of outsiders. The Holy Light Mountain is also your foundation. We surely need to get the Snow Dallet Trees back.”

Chen Rui’s mind moved. It seems that the 3 archangels are not that united. In other words, Gabriel came to the Black Prison Desert not just for ‘experiment’. It must be related to something that happened back then.

Gabriel didn’t argue with Raphael anymore, and she turned her head to Chen Rui, “I have only 1 condition. If you don’t agree, then even if you destroy the Snow Dallet Trees, don’t even think about getting the Phantom Ice Spring.”

Chen Rui heard the firm tone, and he frowned slightly, “What is the condition?”

“The generation of the Phantom Ice Spring is still 3 years away. After 3 years, you will bring the Snow Dallet Trees…” Gabriel’s mouth curled into a strange arc, “to the Holy Light Mountain to trade.”

Holy Light Mountain!

Raphael was about to speak, but when he heard this condition, his eyes suddenly lit up.

Chen Rui raised his frowning brows. Gabriel actually put forward the condition to trade in the Holy Church’s lair!

At that time, I am likely to face not only Gabriel or Raphael but also Michael!

Facing 3 archangels together, do I still have any chance?

“Do you have the guts?” Although Gabriel’s eyes were closed, Chen Rui had a feeling that the peculiar silver-red pupils were watching him in his soul with an inexplicable sneer.

Chen Rui pondered for a moment, then he suddenly smiled, “I promise you.”

He thought to himself: I am not a righteous person, but I will return the kindness of others. No matter what secrets the 6 Elemental Kings have or what will happen after the origin fragments are assembled, for the sole reason of everything the Water Elemental King did for me at the Crimson Double Teeth Sea Area, I have to go.

I must get the Phantom Ice Spring.
