Pseudo-God’s combat speed and strength were extremely amazing. Fortunately, Chen Rui activated the [Pole Star Transformation] on the spot and activated the time might to stop Python’s blow. Otherwise, Auglas would have been severely injured.

Auglas lost this battle because of his carelessness and self-confidence. First of all, he underestimated Python at the beginning. The [Dragon God Eyes] did not directly kill her. Then Python took advantage of the unexpected opportunity to launch [Deprivation] on the might to get the best timing which was quite deadly. Combined with the poison, it was almost a 1-hit kill.

Now that Auglas had seen the terrifying might of Python, if the 2 of them had a fight, even if the Old Dragon Emperor Father-in-law was not Python’s opponent, he would not be defeated so quickly.

Auglas’s facial expression was a bit unsightly. In any case, he almost suffered a big loss. He was even more furious when he glanced at Paglio who was naked with a barrel, “You bastard! Are all the women in this world dead? You just have to take a fancy on that kind of woman? You deserve to be trolled to death!”

Paglio was full of grievances, “Sir Auglas, that’s not Betty…”

“By the way, Krobelus… Betty?” Auglas seemed to remember something, and he scolded again, “You don’t want the woman Krobelus, but you’re going to provoke that woman named Betty? Betty… Uh , Krobelus is also my apprentice. Now, I’ll bring her back to Dragon Island this time to find a more suitable and reliable man for her!”

Paglio was speechless for a while. You have clearly noticed your mistake, but you are just stubborn…

“Still here? You’re a shame for dragons!” Auglas gave Paglio a stern look.

Master Poison Dragon didn’t dare to say more. He grabbed the barrel and ran away. In order to prevent that terrifying woman, Python, from causing more trouble, Master Poison Dragon simply continued to clear his throat and shouted.

Seeing the figure of the naked man disappearing in the wind while shouting. “Ms. Betty, I love you.”, Auglas covered his forehead and just shook his head, “This bastard…”

“Sir, don’t mind. In fact, this incident is just for entertainment. It can be regarded as a little lesson for a certain playboy guy.”

“ Hmph ! The playboy guy? That guy is far inferior to you, right?” Chen Rui was speechless with the 1 sentence by the Old Dragon Emperor Father-in-law, “What is actually going on with your strength?”

“It’s a long story, sir. Let’s go to the Dark Moon palace. Olypheus and Lalaria should be there.”

Speaking of his 2 daughters, Auglas’ facial expression finally eased, “ Hmph! With your current strength, shouldn’t I call you sir ? “

Chen Rui said sincerely, “I have always remembered sir’s help in my mind. I have always regarded Olypheus as my dearest sister. No matter what level of strength I have, sir is an elder I will respect.”

The Old Dragon Emperor Father-in-law nodded, but he was suddenly furious again, “What? I handed Olypheus to you for so long, and you only think of her as a sister? Are you a man? What about Lalaria?”

“ Uh , this, it seems that the differences between us are quite big. Let’s sit down and have a good talk…”

Soon after, at the Dark Moon Palace.

“Where’s Paglio? We heard that he is famous now. We want to get him to sign his autograph.” The flat-chested loli took a notebook and said loudly on purpose, which made a celebrity hiding in a corner pound his chest again.

“Betty, I didn’t expect Paglio to be so infatuated with you.” Little succubus maid, who had not yet figured out the truth, said with a look of envy, “If only someone treated me like this.”

Chen Rui rolled his eyes and directly ignored Kia’s expectations – Anything else is fine, but don’t even think about this!

“ Haih , it’s a pity that no one wants to do this to us.” Isabella, the insider, sighed deliberately, “That’s the difference.”

What made Chen Rui mad was that Zola, another insider, sighed and nodded too.

Here, the Old Dragon Emperor Father-in-law no longer looked furious. No matter who was holding a cute little girl like Duoduo, he couldn’t hold his poker face – Perhaps, except Python.

Python seemed to be in a good mood since she came back from the Ghastly Floating Land. She was now holding a glass of fruit wine, sipping it like no one else was around.

“Grandpa Auglas, eat this Lala Potato. It’s delicious.”

“This girl is so sweet.” The Old Dragon Emperor Father-in-law burst into tears, “Lalaria would only eat all the delicious food when she was a child, and leave the leftovers for me…”

“ Cheh! Old man, what did you say?!” The flat-chested loli said disdainfully, “Isn’t this what you taught, ‘If a dragon does think for her own sake, she would die’, ‘Everything good must be kept for oneself’ and so on. “

“A bad early education will harm a child’s life.” Joanna came to a conclusion. As a former education theorist, she was not afraid of Auglas’s strength.

The flat-chested loli shook her head helplessly, “Who ask us to have such a bad dad?”

Auglas, “…”

Chen Rui was also secretly guilty. It was because of his ‘education’ that Duoduo was still very aggressive toward pig head things, which made the braised pig head and other related industries popular with the residents of the Dark Moon disappeared for a while. He was also criticized mercilessly by the harem troupe.

“Mommy said, don’t be selfish about good things. We should share them with those close to you.” Duoduo nodded earnestly, then she took out another fruit and handed it to Auglas, “Grandpa Auglas, eat this. This is the devil pomeg that daddy gave me. It is very fragrant.”

The little girl didn’t know that she was rubbing it in on grandpa. Auglas burst into tears again.

Olypheus frowned and muttered, “Mommy said, you have to eat first if there is good food?”

Auglas regained his senses, kissed Duoduo’s little face, and deliberately said loudly, “If only you and Lalaria or Olypheus’ children were as cute and docile in the future.”

Chen Rui just pretended not to hear the hint of the Old Dragon Emperor Father-in-law. Auglas gave him a sideways glance. He and looked at Olypheus. After he thought about it, he moved his eyes to Lalaria.

Because Olypheus was too naive in this regard. She is definitely good in counting money, but to get her married, she usually only asked strange questions such as ‘can I eat it’. Lalaria is more reliable.

Before Auglas could speak, the flat-chested loli cut off the topic, “Old man, don’t think we don’t know what you’re thinking. Put away those unrealistic nasty ideas!”

“Where’s your mustache?” Auglas asked.

“ Hmph , knowingly asking! I lost the bet to this human!”

“Why don’t you call yourself ‘master’?”

“It’s all because this guy saved Mas… I, so I promised him.”

Auglas slapped his palm, “Yes, look, you and him…”

“Old man, he and I don’t match up like you and him. I think you 2 are a match made in heaven.” The flat-chested loli showed a strange smile, “We are also old friends, so let’s divide equally. This man belongs to you, and his wives belong to me?”

Auglas attacked Lalaria.

Lalaria dodged.

Lalaria fought back.

Auglas got hit! 20 HP loss (80/100).

Chen Rui was completely speechless. Auglas pointed at this weirdo daughter, and he was speechless for a while.

“Old man, you don’t need to explain anymore. In fact, I am the most open-minded and understand you very well. If you want help, just say it. I can help you hold his feet if necessary.”

Lalaria shrugged smugly, giving Father Dragon Emperor an unruly back, and added a series of signature weird smiles, “ Oh Hohoho …”

Lalaria unleashed a critical strike.

Auglas lost (0/100).

chapters.title: Chapter 1110: The Mystery Of Pseudo-God
chapters.body:
Chapter 1110: The Mystery Of Pseudo-God

Auglas came to the Dark Moon this time mainly to visit Lalaria and Olypheus. He broke into a cold sweat when he heard that his 2 daughters had nearly died in the Dead Sea treasure hunt.

The treasure map was actually 1 of his collections. It was said that it recorded the location of the treasure of an ancient sea creature tribe kingdom. The authenticity was unknown. Later, it was stolen by Lalaria, and she even took Olypheus on a treasure hunt. If Chen Rui hadn’t arrived in time, they would have died in the terrifying Abyss main altar.

Chen Rui knew in his mind that this treasure map was not deliberately left by the Abyss rulers. The treasure map should record the real treasure, but because a long time had passed, the sea creature tribe kingdom just happened to be turned into the main altar by the Abyss. Fortunately, he sensed that the link to Vesilna disappeared. Otherwise, if he went 1 step late, the consequences would be disastrous.

Auglas seemed to have thought of something, “Chen Rui, you said earlier, that woman’s name is Python?”

“Yes, sir heard of her?”

“It can’t be her… Could it be the same name?” Auglas whispered to himself, and suddenly realized, “By the way, she said recovering to the intermediate stage Pseudo-God? It must be her then!”

“I think your guess is correct.” Chen Rui shrugged, “Python’s strength was originally at the peak stage Pseudo-God. Due to some circumstances, her strength has temporarily regressed. She is now recovering step by step.”

“No doubt it’s her.” Auglas said with a bitter smile, “When I left the Dragon Island to train, my father, Crusier, once warned me that there are a few people I should never provoke. Among these names are Satan and Python. It’s a pity that I was young and arrogant. After an advance, I wanted to challenge Satan, and I was easily defeated in the end. If it wasn’t for Satan’s old relationship with my grandfather, Ceshon, I’m afraid I would have turned into ashes. “

“It’s not your grandfather, Ceshon, but your grandfather’s grandfather, Mirsto.” Python’s indifferent voice came, “You should only meet Satan’s avatar, but that guy is never a person of friendship. His real body should be comprehending the power of the silver box while sleeping, so he didn’t want to let external factors affect him. Otherwise, you would already be the dust of history, little black dragon.”

“ Hmph! ” Auglas glanced at Python. Although according to the real age, Python and Satan should be the same age powerhouse who was indeed much older than him, the phrase the ‘little black dragon’ still sounded unpleasant to the Royal Majesty Dragon Emperor.

“You are not satisfied with my evaluation of dragons? I said the same to Mirsto back then.” Python sneered, “If you don’t like it, we can fight again! Your Pseudo-Godhood has just been condensed and even the faith and life have not been fully integrated. You are not my opponent at all. Even if you have that [Dragon God Eyes], it’s useless. Your current [Dragon God Eyes] is just an inferior product. It has never been restored after it was damaged back then.”

Auglas was about to have a seizure when he heard “If you don’t like it, we can fight again”, but he calmed down when he heard the following words, “I stepped into Pseudo-God because of the Dragon Power Essence of the Holy Dragon Rodriguez, which is actually a Pseudo-Godhood. However, something has gone wrong with the integration of faith and life. Hope you can advise me accordingly.”

Auglas actually said these words to Chen Rui. In his opinion, Chen Rui had reached the intermediate stage of Pseudo-God, so he should be able to give him corresponding advice. Unfortunately, Chen Rui’s ‘Pseudo-God’ was completely different from ordinary trainers. He didn’t even have a Pseudo-Godhood at all. Of course, he couldn’t answer, so he had to turn his gaze on Python.

“You seem to have asked the wrong person, little black dragon.” Python gave Auglas a half-smile, “He can’t remember anything now, so let me tell you.”

Auglas looked at Chen Rui in surprise, knowing that Python didn’t lie. It seemed that this guy really didn’t know (or couldn’t remember). He bowed slightly to Python at the moment and said solemnly, “Please advise.”

This attitude made Python nod, “The most fundamental difference between Pseudo-God and Demi-God is not the rise of ordinary law to the level of the law might, but the fusion of kingdom, faith and life. Fuse the Demi-God’s real kingdom step by step into the soul, forming the core of faith and life. As long as the soul does not die, the core will not disappear. This is the ‘Pseudo-Godhood’.”

It was the first time Chen Rui heard such a theory, and he asked, “How to fuse the real kingdom into the soul?”

“First of all, you need a real kingdom and many creatures that are completely faithful to you. These are actually the foundation laid at the Demi-God level. Then, it is like creating a space in the soul and integrating all real things in the kingdom into it. This fusion would make the law qualitatively change to might.”

“Creating a space?” Chen Rui vaguely thought of something, “Does it mean that the kingdom of the powerful kingdomized powerhouse is built by energy, which is equivalent to a general framework of qualitative change from the territory to the kingdom. The kingdom of the powerful Demi-God level is a real entity converted from the fictional kingdom of energy. The kingdom’s avatar can be cast in battle to assist, but the kingdom is still separate from oneself. At the Pseudo-God level, the kingdom has merged into the Pseudo-Godhood and completely become a part of oneself?”

It was like the realm of cultivation and realization of certain Buddhist teachings: Kingdomized was equivalent to seeing mountains as mountains and seeing water as water.

Demi-God level was equivalent to seeing mountains as not mountains and seeing water as not water.

Pseudo-God was was equivalent to returning to the original point: Seeing mountains as mountains and seeing water as water. Nonetheless, compared with before, there had been a completely different qualitative change.

“Of course, this is common sense. You didn’t forget this, did you?” Auglas asked Chen Rui curiously, but instead of asking more, he turned to Python, “I’m facing some problems in merging the kingdom now.”

When Python heard Auglas describe the difficulties he encountered, she nodded slightly, “The reason is very simple, your kingdom faith power is not enough in terms of quality or quantity. Faith can be said to be the most important part of the kingdom. The purer and larger the faith, the more solidified the Pseudo-Godhood will be, the stronger the power will be, and the larger the life space it can hold. To take a simple example, if your current life space of the Pseudo-Godhood is an island, then Satan and I are a sea!”

Auglas was shocked. With the in-depth explanation of Python, many puzzling or difficult points were resolved.

The training and perception of faith power was by no means an overnight effort. It required a long time and a lot of energy. The most commonly used state was to enter a certain dormant state so that the body and spirit were at the lowest consumption, yet the soul was free to comprehend faith in the kingdom.

Python also explained some of the use of Pseudo-God’s faith and the secret technique of the dormant state. Auglas couldn’t help listening attentively.

Chen Rui, who was listening on the side, finally understood why all peak stage Pseudo-Godpowerhouses like the 3 archangels, Sariel, Satan, including Python (in the silver box) would often enter a long ‘sleep’.

Although the lifespan of Pseudo-God was very long, it was not endless. Sleeping could not only comprehend and train faith, expand and strengthen the kingdom of Pseudo-God, but it would also greatly reduce the consumption of life.

Chen Rui couldn’t help but ask, “How is your current Pseudo-Godhood?”

“Because it was badly damaged at that time.” Python was referring to the time when she fought against Chen Rui at the Holy Light Mountain, “But the soul fusion physique of this body is almost absolutely pure, so my soul fusion is quite perfect. It can accommodate my kingdom power well. Plus my previous training in that place, my recovery is in good shape overall. For now, recovering to the early stage of the Pseudo-God is basically a short-term limit. In order to quickly recover to peak stage Pseudo-God, I must take some kind of shortcut.”

“The shortcut you said…” Chen Rui thought of what Python said in her previous battle with Auglas, “Is it devouring others’ kingdom?”

“It is more accurate to say devour Pseudo-Godhood. Not everyone has this ability. Pseudo-Godhood has great power. If I am not careful, I will perish together, but I happen to have this talent. The power obtained is not as pure and powerful as training personally. It takes longer to digest and assimilate to achieve the desired effect, but it is the only shortcut to rapidly expand my strength.”

“The higher the opponent’s Pseudo-Godhood level, the greater the benefit to me, such as this little black dragon. After devouring, I can try to recover or call it ‘breakthrough’ to the intermediate stage of the Pseudo-God.” Python looked aside at the ‘little black dragon’ Auglas. He was immersed in comprehension and had completely entered a certain state at this moment, so he was unaware of other things.

Chen Rui certainly wouldn’t agree with Python, “Is there any other way?”

“Then change to another person. Get me Satan to devour now, and I can directly return to the state of peak stage Pseudo-God. If you give me time to fully digest it, then my strength will be even greater than before.”

“This is too difficult.” Chen Rui smiled wryly, “I still want to rely on you to quickly recover your strength to deal with him, so let’s give you a try of [Star-level Enhancement] in that special world, just like I did before. Based on my friends’ conditions, the effect is quite good.”

“Okay. However, taking the example I gave with the little black dragon before, even if I restored to the peak stage Pseudo-God, my kingdom is just a sea. So what if it includes the whole world? The legendary god kingdom is as vast as the galaxy of the sky. There are countless lives in it. That is the real Godhood.”

With that said, Python’s gaze toward Chen Rui was a little more profound, “Usually, even the God descendants who are carrying God bloodline or Godhood fragments, a.k.a the real Demi-God, can’t break through the bottleneck and become a real god. However, there may be certain talented people who may be able to touch the height that others can’t reach, and thus embark on the real road to becoming a god.”

Chen Rui sighed. Okay, anyway, it’s getting more and more mysterious. Why don’t you just say I’m that person.

After intentionally deepening the misunderstanding, a certain person’s mind became clearer, “I understand now. The reason why Michael and the others stole the faith is to use the faith power of countless believers of the light to continuously expand their kingdom. They want to use ‘quantitative change’ to induce the real ‘qualitative change’ of the Pseudo-Godhood, so as to pursue the road of god. And what you mentioned, comprehending the creation origin and destruction origin, is another way. Starting directly from the perspective of qualitative change, because creation and destruction are the most basic laws of the universe. “

“Actually, this theory was not proposed by me.” Python looked directly into Chen Rui’s eyes, “Plus, it is not merely a theory. Someone has personally practiced this road. It can be said that he almost touched the final realm back then. Now I can’t be sure whether he succeeded or failed.”

Chen Rui thought of when he said this theory to Satan, Satan’s reaction was that he had an ‘old friend’. This old friend, in Satan’s view, was not necessarily Python, but a person who had been misidentified as Chen Rui all the time.

“I don’t want to explain any misunderstanding anymore.” Chen Rui shook his head, “If you try to get a certain person to recall something, you obviously fail, because it’s just playing music to the bull… Uh , this phrase, you can understand as trying to play music to the lowest level demonic beast and letting it understand the music theory, get it?”

“Got it.” Python was silent for a moment, then she suddenly showed a rare smile as she nodded, “Sir lowest level demonic beast.”

Chen Rui:”…”

chapters.title: Chapter 1111: Suitors
chapters.body:
Chapter 1111: Suitors

In the following time, life returned to its original stability.

Chen Rui stayed in the Dark Moon palace to accompany the pregnant Athena. Duoduo was naturally a firm follower of daddy. Kia still served as Athena’s assistant while Samuel continued to take over the role of the Dark Moon’s legion commander.

Isabella returned to her small yard while Zola returned to the Rainbow Valley along with Guradam and Python. Guradam had merged with a strange wandering spirit, which intrigued Zola. The corpse necromancer also wanted to study it, so they hit it off. Python was going because the silver box was in the Rainbow Valley. Since she now had a real entity, she wanted to use the silver box to try to regain some of her strength.

The Roman Family, the Paglio Family, Dragon Emperor and his daughter, Adeline and Dodo returned to the house.

Auglas temporarily stayed in the Dark Moon because Python’s words benefited him a lot. The Dragon Emperor planned to stay here for a while to ask more mysteries about Pseudo-God, then he would return to Dragon Island to try sleep training.

Due to the streaking incident, Paglio became famous, but this guy’s face had become so thick that he was able to talk and laugh casually afterward. He even quoted a strange sentence from a certain human: The big nerve can make a killing move at a critical moment.

As the saying goes, dead pig is not afraid of boiling water. Even Dragon Emperor Auglas couldn’t do anything about him.

On the surface, the usual life was the same as before, but everyone knew very well what was brewing behind this peace and tranquility.

Isabella boiled water and tea in the small yard every day. For her, this was not just waiting but a kind of training for her soul.

Zola was now encountering a real bottleneck. Ms. Fairy Dragon was extremely talented. The [6 Elements Kingdom] and [Rainbow Goddess Kingdom] were extremely powerful kingdoms, which made her almost peerless at the peak stage of the Demi-God level. Even Catherine’s real combat power was slightly inferior, but this also made her advancement to the Pseudo-God exponentially more difficult.

According to Python’s judgment, it would take at least 2,000 years for Zola to become a Pseudo-God, except for some unreasonable factors that might be brought about by ‘the inheritance world’. 2,000 years was definitely a rather astonishing genius speed for ordinary Demi-God level powerhouses especially dragons, as long as the lifespan was long enough. However, for Zola, it was still too long. Because 3 years later, Chen Rui would face terrifying enemies like the 3 archangels. 10 years later, Satan. She must advance to Pseudo-God as soon as possible, in order to be able to fight side by side with her beloved man and become his real help.

Therefore, Zola, who had reached the peak stage of the Demi-God, was not proud. On the contrary, she trained with more urgency and went to the training ground of time law every day.

The rest of the people were mostly the same. Everyone wanted to comprehend the power of 2-star evolution as soon as possible like Zola and Catherine to become the god of the ‘inheritance world’. This would make them a part of Chen Rui’s real combat power to overcome the crisis 3 years later.

For some reason, even Paglio who advanced to the Demi-God level was not successful. It could be seen that Demi-God level was not the standard to comprehend the 2-star evolution (Catherine comprehended 2-star evolution first before breaking through to Demi-God).

Relatively speaking, Guradam had the least sense of belonging or the most ‘passive’ one. The loyalty to Chen Rui was more out of the constraints of the contract and the special coercion of star conferring, but the achievements of the corpse necromancer were not to be underestimated. He not only advanced to the intermediate stage of the Kingdom level, but he had also become a wandering spirit. This would not only make it easier for him in the trials, but he also had made amazing progress in the research of a certain field: ‘rule energy’.

Rule energy was the basic energy for super weapons of the City of Stars and the super evolution of alchemy creatures. Generally, it could only be converted from the law fragments or law crystal balls that were dropped by hunting the wandering spirits. In this short period of time, although he obtained a lot of fragments in the trial, which greatly supplemented the needs of City of Stars, it would be finished after all.

After devouring a Kingdom level wandering spirit with fragment, Guradam sensed the peculiarities of that power. He became intrigued, and he tried to create similar power without the wandering spirits. If the corpse necromancer’s research was successful, it would be a leap forward for the overall strength that Chen Rui possessed.

Compared with Guradam, Dodo’s loyalty was unquestionable (mainly because he was used to having long term free meals), but the slime’s laziness was also unquestionable. In terms of talent and ability, the slime was firmly in the top 3 of the family and friends group, but in terms of diligence, he was recognized as the last one. After just coming back, he was hooked by Alice to the royal college as a companion to study with delicious food.

According to the Python training plan, the previous high-pressure training of the Ghastly Floating Land was the first stage. What was needed now was to digest and understand the insights of the Ghastly Floating Land. The second stage would start in about a year, so everyone was calm on the surface, but they were secretly working hard to train in their own way.

Fallen Angel Empire’s royal college.

The entrance of the woods.

“Princess Alice, today is your birthday. Please be sure to accept this gift that I carefully prepared – A colorful-winged bird.” A young man bowed Alice gracefully and handed a caged colorful bird.

“Tuman, there are so many such birds on the market! Stop embarrassing yourself.” Another young man in luxurious clothes glanced at Tuman disdainfully, “Princess Alice, my string of sulfur fire crystal beads is different. It is the most precious fire-type treasure…”

“Suvor, even a cheap pearl can be worthy of the word ‘most precious’?” Tuman sneered, “You really don’t know how to distinguish the goods. It’s not an ordinary colorful-winged bird, but a rare variant of dragon bloodline. It not only sings melodiously, but it also protects the master’s safety!”

“Isn’t it just a mutated bird? My sulfur fire crystal beads can greatly improve spirit power training, and it can also release flame power for self-protection. The most special thing is that it has the special attribute of ‘unparalleled’. Any fire treasure will be eclipsed in front of it, which is in line with the noble status of Princess Royal Highness.”

“Thank you for your kindness.” Alice nodded politely, but she did not accept the gifts. She grabbed the onion that coveted the sulfur fire crystal beads and continued to walk forward. Both of them were not willing to give up and continued to follow while repeatedly persuading Alice to accept her gift.

Alice’s older sister, Shea, was the current Royal Majesty Empress, who firmly controlled the Fallen Angel Empire. If they could marry Her Majesty Shea’s only sister, Alice, the benefits to the family and individuals could be imagined. Coupled with Alice’s pure and lovely beauty, there were many suitors in college. Suvor and Tuman were the representatives.

Both were from the elder families. Suvor was the inheritor of the Leif Family whereas Tuman was a young talent from the Boll Family, and his uncle was the royal college’s Deputy Dean Ciaro; he had a solid background. It was a pity that the 2, like many suitors, not only did not get the favor of Princess Alice, but they were tormented by the blackhearted princess.

However, the 2 did not give up. They tried repeatedly despite the failure. This time, knowing that it was Alice’s birthday, they specially prepared a gift long ago to present the treasure.

Before that, the 2 had coerced and lured away many other competitors.

Alice was already a little depressed. She felt that the 2 of them were buzzing like flies and were annoying. Just as she was about to get angry, her nose suddenly sniffed as if she had found something, and her eyes suddenly lit up.

Suvor and Tuman saw Alice’s smile, and they thought she was moved. Then, Alice threw the onion in her hand and ran forward quickly. She was actually flying into a figure.

“Elder brother!”

Alice let out a cheerful cry, hugged the man’s neck tightly, and showed an extremely excited smile. She was completely different from the sullen face just now.

Brother? No! I thought Alice has only a sister? Tuman and Suvor frowned at the same time.

Chen Rui patted Alice’s back with a bitter smile. He didn’t expect that the camouflage technique could not hide from the little princess’ nose. To be more precise, it should be some kind of intuition. This kind of super intuition plus Sherlock Holmes-like powerful reasoning should be Alice’s strongest ‘talent’.

The initial haze on Alice’s face was swept away as she shouted joyfully to Chen Rui, “Today is my birthday; hand over the gifts!”

The facial expressions of Tuman and Suvor were even more unsightly. Just now, the 2 took the initiative to give gifts but Alice didn’t even look at them. Now she took the initiative to ask this person for a gift…

The two looked at each other. This is the biggest enemy. He must be eliminated first!

When Chen Rui heard the birthday present, “ Uh , this…”

“ Hmph , it seems that you can’t even remember Princess Alice’s birthday.” Tuman’s bizarre voice came over.

Suvor also added, “This kind of person is not worthy of appearing in front of Princess Royal Highness today; even more unworthy in the future.”

Alice was furious. Before she spoke, a familiar voice came from behind, “Sister Alice!”

A little girl broke free from the arms of the old man behind and flew toward Alice. It was Duoduo. Seeing Alice’s arms around daddy’s neck, Duoduo turned in the air and simply rode on daddy’s head – Each occupying their own ‘turf’.

“Duoduo, I’ve said it many times, call me aunty!” Alice tiptoed and kissed Duoduo’s face, and she ‘conveniently’ kissed Chen Rui’s face.

This scene made Suvor and Tuman stunned. Princess Alice, who usually doesn’t show friendliness to anyone, actually likes a guy with a daughter!

Tuman hurriedly exclaimed, “Princess Alice, don’t be fooled by this guy of unknown origin!”

Chen Rui didn’t say anything yet. Alice sneered coldly, “Shut up! I like to be fooled by him! What’s so great about your colorful-winged bird? Dodo!”

That onion responded tactfully. He instantly turned into an identical colorful-winged bird and chirped a moving song. It was actually the most popular ‘Castle in the Sky’ at the Demon Realm concert that was broadcast by magic television countless times. It was the exact same voice as the original singer, Helen.

Not only that, there was also a hint of dragon demeanor in the singing, which scared the so-called colorful-winged bird with dragon bloodline to the point of trembling. After a few moments, it was scared to the point of being unable to withhold its pee and poo before fainting.

Alice looked at Suvor, “And you, the unparalleled sulfur fire crystal beads, right? Bring it!”

Suvor hurriedly offered the sulfur fire crystal beads. Alice waved, and the fiery red sulfur fire crystal beads flew toward Duoduo, “Duoduo, I’ll give you something delicious to eat.”

Princess Blackhearted deliberately lowered her voice in the last sentence. Duoduo caught the sulfur fire crystal beads and sensed the fire element power. Hearing Alice said that she could ‘eat’ it, she immediately showed a beaming expression and fiddled with the beads with her little hands.

Then, a scene that left Suvor in disbelief happened. The light of the sulfur fire crystal beads, which were said to be able to dim fire treasures, weakened little by little in the hands of the little girl. In the end, it became transparent.

“Using this kind of fake thing as my birthday present… Hmph! I think you are the one who got fooled.” Alice threw the completely transparent sulfur fire crystal beads to Suvor again.

Suvor thought he had seen it wrong. He wiped his eyes and looked in disbelief. What happened? The sulfur fire crystal beads actually completely lost their power!

The blackhearted Princess Royal Highness handed Duoduo a handful of jelly beans and deliberately asked, “Isn’t it delicious, Duoduo?”

How did Duoduo know what was going on? She only said that the sulfur fire crystal beads were delicious, “It’s delicious. Sister is really good!”

“It’s aunty!”

Meanwhile, Suvor looked at the bead string that turned into trash in his hand, and Tuman was carrying the birdcage. The 2 little friends were astounded for a while.

chapters.title: Chapter 1112: A World Full Of Hope
chapters.body:
Chapter 1112: A World Full Of Hope

Chen Rui witnessed all this and naturally understood that Alice was deliberately pranking them. He shook his head secretly. At this moment, a voice came from the side, “What are all of you doing here?”

Alice turned her head to look. Without being rude, she let go of her arm that was holding Chen Rui tightly and bowed to the middle-aged big bearded man, “Dean Ciaro.”

“Princess Alice.” The royal college’s deputy dean looked at Alice. Then, his eyes were fixed on the little girl riding on Chen Rui’s neck, and his pupils shrank slightly.

“Uncle!” As soon as Tuman saw the backer coming, he was instantly spirited and pointed at Chen Rui, “Quickly take this asshole of unknown origin…”

“ Slap !” Before Tuman could finish speaking, Ciaro ruthlessly slapped the rest of the words back.

Ciaro gave Chen Rui a deep bow, “Princess Alice, this sir, I’m sorry. It’s all the fault of these 2 useless things. Please forgive me for the rudeness.”

Chen Rui smiled and spoke up, “It’s just a small matter. Alice, let’s go first.”

Alice nodded to Ciaro and held Chen Rui’s hand, “Brother, you rarely come to college, I’ll show you around.”

“Ok.”

Seeing Alice leading the man away from a distance, Tuman couldn’t help but feel anxious, “Uncle! That guy and Princess Alice…”

“Ignorant trash! If Princess Alice really likes that sir, the 2 of you and those other guys, should forget about your delusion… You all have no hope at all!”

Tuman said unwillingly, “Now that Princess Alice is not married, everyone has hope. Moreover, the guy is obviously…”

“Shut up! If you want your whole family to perish, you can try provoking that sir!” Ciaro glared at his nephew.

The whole family perishes ? The weight of this sentence made Tuman dumbfounded, “Who is that man?”

Suvor wisely interjected, “I remember, that old man seems to be Old Gauss, a close minister beside Her Majesty. Old Gauss has been following Her Majesty since the Dark Moon Estate. Could this man be Old Gauss’ nephew? Even so …”

“Are all the Boll Family idiots like you? You still have the face to pursue Princess Alice! Would he be that respectful if he is just a nephew?” Cairo reprimanded unceremoniously, “Although I don’t know that sir, I have a little impression of the little girl he is holding…”

“Little girl?” Tuman and Suvor said in unison. How could the royal college dean be intimidated by a little girl? What’s the origin of that little girl? Could she be Her Majesty Shea’s daughter?

“ Hmph ! Did you forget the finals of the Demon Realm’s martial battle competition held at the Bloody Empire?”

“That final was famous throughout the Demon Realm. Who didn’t know about top powerhouse His Highness Prince Consort Aguile and Empress Catherine…” Tuman finally remembered, and his voice suddenly stuttered, “Then that little girl…”

Suvor answered with difficulty, “She seems to call that person ‘daddy’ just now.”

Both of them figured it out – Not Royal Majesty Shea’s daughter, but another ‘Royal Majesty’’s daughter!

This little girl’s father is stronger and more dazzling than her mother.

The man who became a household name in the Demon Realm!

We actually provoked him just now?

Tuman and Suvor, who just realized it, almost urinated.

Both Suvor and Tuman were just insignificant little characters, so Chen Rui didn’t take it to heart. He let Alice lead him and strolled around the campus, attracting the attention of countless people.

Everyone was surprised to see that Princess Alice, who had always rejected all men, actually took the initiative to hold a man’s hand while chatting and laughing. The strange thing was that the man was not a handsome and good-looking person. Instead, his appearance was extremely ordinary. It was unbelievable that Alice’s expression was unprecedentedly ecstatic.

Although the royal college was built not long ago, Shea attached great importance to this aspect. No matter its area or facilities, it was not inferior to the most famous Starlight College in the human world, which was full of style.

Duoduo was also very interested in this novel place and asked many questions. Chen Rui had the intention to let his daughter feel a good learning atmosphere in advance, so he answered carefully one by one. Alice interjected a few words from time to time. Princess Loli was determined to achieve her goal from another direction, so she let go of Chen Rui’s hand and walked around with Duoduo in her arms. However, because of her figure, they looked more like a pair of sisters.

“Sister Alice! What kind of dress is that?”

“That’s a tiger suit. It’s for performance. There is a school stage play recently, and they are rehearsing.”

“Tiger suit? So interesting!”

“I’ll get one for you.” Alice rolled her eyes, “But you have to call me mommy.”

“Okay, sister. But mommy is taller than you, and…”

Duoduo looked suspiciously at Alice’s relatively barren chest. Compared with Catherine, a certain princess could only be regarded as an airport.

A certain princess secretly burst into tears. You think I want it?

“Then call me aunty.”

“Okay! Sister.”

“…”

The little loli approached the girls who were rehearsing, and Duoduo’s cute appearance made those girls surround them.

“Princess Alice, who is this little girl?”

“Cute little sister! What’s your name?”

“This…” Alice’s purple eyes blinked and said proudly, “This is my daughter!”

This sentence caused a commotion. When did Princess Alice, who was pursued by many boys, have such a grown up daughter?

At this time, Duoduo’s words exposed her, “Sister Alice, I want tiger suit.”

It turns out to be her sister. The girls all laughed. 1 of the girls brought a tiger suit and let Duoduo wear it. This suit was made of magic material that could automatically adapt to the size.

“ Wow , what a cute little tiger!” Seeing Duoduo in a tiger costume, little stars flickered in the eyes of the girls.

“Sister Alice, why aren’t you a tiger?”

Alice hurriedly put on a tiger suit and growled. She held Duoduo’s hand and asked the girls around her with anticipation, “Do we look like a tiger mother and daughter?”

“It’s the tiger sisters!”

“ Haha! So cute!”

The girls laughed hilariously.

“ Hmph , no eyesight.” Alice pouted in dissatisfaction. She dragged a small tail and left the stage with Duoduo.

“Duoduo, you secretly call me mommy, and I’ll take you to drink the college’s special sourn juice, okay? It’s delicious!”

“Okay, sister!”

“…”

Looking at the 2 cute big and small tigers, Chen Rui smiled heartily.

Old Gauss from the back said, “It can be seen that Princess Alice is very happy. I haven’t seen her smile like this for a long time.”

“Really?”

“Your Highness should understand what the little princess thinks of you. Princess Royal… well, Her Majesty is also very clear.” Although Shea had ascended to the throne for a long time, the old man who grew up watching Shea was still used to calling Her Majesty Empress as Princess Royal.

This title also made Chen Rui feel nostalgic, then he shook his head, “I know, but I’m going to have a big wedding with the 2 empresses of the Dark Shadow Empire and the Bloody Empire…”

Old Gauss nodded, “Little princess was actually 1 of the first people to know this news. She happened to be by Her Majesty’s side when the envoy reported it. Little princess must have been depressed at the time, but she is still very happy now. That kind of happiness is not fake. Does Your Highness know why?”

Before Chen Rui answered, Old Gauss had already said the answer himself, “Trust. It is not so much of self-confidence, but more of a trust in you.”

Chen Rui stared at the ‘medium-sized tiger’ who was walking briskly, and he was silent for a while.

“I have a son and a daughter. My daughter died soon after birth due to sickness. My son went on an expedition with the Lord of Midnight Sun and never returned. I watched Princess Royal and the little princess grow. Pardon me, in my heart, they are like my daughters.” Old Gauss’s eyes showed a kind expression. Chen Rui nodded. He was very clear of the old lich’s loyalty to Shea. Even in the most critical time back then, he did not leave Shea.

Not just loyalty, but another kind of love.

“Your Highness, with all due respect. As far as I know, you have quite a few women, including the 3 Royal Majesty Empresses; each one of unparalleled excellence. But whether it’s the human world or the Demon Realm, the number of women you have can only be considered pitifully small compared to the noble families with concubines. Royal Princess… Her Majesty lost her mother since she was a child, and she completely changed herself under the pressure of His Highness Grimm. However, she is very happy now. Not only because she has fulfilled His Highness Grimm’s last wish and regained control of the empire, but also because she is with you. It can be said that meeting you in the Dark Moon was the biggest turning point in her life and the luckiest turning point. As for the Royal Highness Little Princess, I know you may have your own arrangements, but in any case, please give the little princess happiness too.”

With that said, Old Gauss bowed deeply, “Thanks to Your Highness for listening to an old guy nagging for so long. Speaking of which, I’m not qualified to say this to Your Highness, but…”

“You’re wrong, as an elder who loves Shea and Alice, you are fully qualified.” Chen Rui addressed him respectfully, “I will not let my loved ones who trusted me be disappointed, including Alice.”

Old Gauss didn’t pay attention to the difference, but when he heard Chen Rui’s last sentence, his eyes lit up and he nodded, “Thank you, Your Highness.”

“As relatives of Shea and Alice, you don’t need to thank me.”

“Let’s not talk about anything else. You saved my life.” Old Gauss smiled, “The changes over the years have been tremendous. Take the royal college as an example. Although it was established not long ago, it has won the attention of Her Majesty. Not long ago, in the college exchange competition of the 3 empires, we also won 3 championships; outstanding talents emerged from each department. The status and weight of the college are also increasing. It has become an important base for the empire’s talent pool and training.”

After the establishment of the royal college of the 3 empires, corresponding exchange competitions would be held every year. Not only were the prizes attractive, but the winners could also be noticed by the upper echelons of the empire, so their prospects were limitless.

Compared with the well-known colleges in the human world, the facilities and scale of the 3 royal colleges of the Demon Realm were not inferior, but there were still big differences in terms of teachers and students. Nevertheless with the passage of time, it would eventually become an indistinguishable presence.

“Looking back now, it’s like a dream. When I was struggling in that dilapidated Dark Moon Estate, I never imagined that it would be like this. It’s not flattery or exaggeration. I have to say that the present achievement of the Dark Moon, the Fallen Angel Empire, and the entire Demon Realm, is thanks to Your Highness. The extraordinary ability of Your Highness is in no way inferior to the powerful combat power you possess. Maybe even more than that. You are worthy of being the Demon Realm’s number 1.”

Chen Rui shook his head slowly, “No, it’s not my contribution. Even without me, sooner or later, it will naturally develop to this point. Moreover, now… it’s not enough.”

To fight the Abyss that may come in the future, these are indeed not enough; far from enough.

Although the 3 main altars have been destroyed, it does not mean that the crisis of the Abyss is completely resolved. It can only be said to be delayed.

The avatars of the 3 rulers of the Abyss showed strong confidence before being destroyed as if it is only a matter of time before they descend to this world. This time will not be too long.

Bluffing or not, I must not let my guard down.

Regardless of whether I still exist when the Abyss comes, what is certain is that the economy must develop faster, the military must become stronger, and the magic game must make more people stronger and more adaptable to the Abyss enemies’ specialty.

“Not enough?” These 2 words made Old Gauss very surprised. Based on the Dark Moon, he overthrew Obsidian in one fell swoop, helped Shea ascend the throne, and brought the Fallen Angel Empire’s military and economy into an unprecedented period of rapid development. The 3 empires’ alliance, the unification of the Demon Realm, and ushering in true peace. These are ‘unprecedented’ great achievements. Are these still not enough?

Chen Rui didn’t explain. He just looked at the 2 white moons in the sky.

When he first came to this world back then, facing these 2 moons, his mood was of incomparable loneliness, despair and fear, and even cursed everything he had encountered. But now, the smiling faces reflected in the moon made him feel hope. Because of these people, the whole world was full of hope.

“Daddy! This sourn juice is delicious, come quickly!”

Heavenly voice.

Just like an angel.

Not the so-called angel in this world, but the most beautiful and pure angel in my heart.

Chen Rui smiled, informed Old Gauss, and strode forward.

No matter what the purpose of the Abyss destroying the world is, no matter whether I will face the real Abyss in my lifetime, no matter what enemies there are in the future, or even… God.

To protect this voice, to protect all hopes, I will burn everything to fight.

chapters.title: Chapter 1113: Big Wedding
chapters.body:
Chapter 1113: Big Wedding

On this day, everyone was talking about a grand event.

Wedding.

In fact, this wedding had been planned for a long time. It was also what the Demon Realm had been looking forward to for a long time. It had been announced in various media of the 3 empires and had become the hottest topic of the Demon Realm.

Wedding of the Fallen Angel Empire’s Prince Consort ‘Aguile’ to the Dark Shadow Empire’s Empress Catherine and the Bloody Empire’s Tiffany.

Unlike the kingdoms and empires in the human world, the Demon Realm had only 3 empires in total, and the 3 empresses symbolized the supreme ruler. The Demon Realm paid more attention to strength and ability, which was different from the patriarchal preference in the human world. There were plenty of empresses in history, but this was the first time that all women ruled the empires.

Generally speaking, the prince consort of an empress was just a symbolic position, which was equivalent to a vassal. Like a male ruler, an empress could also have a huge harem. However, today in the Demon Realm, the 3 empresses had only 1 prince consort, the same man.

As a prince consort, ‘Aguile”s achievements could only be said to be unprecedented.

However, everyone knew that the ‘achievement’ of ‘Aguile’ was not just ‘luck’ but more about talent and strength.

In the final of the Demon Realm’s martial battle competition held at the Bloody Empire, the Dark Shadow Empir’s Empress Catherine revealed a shocking truth: ‘Aguile’ was the 1 behind the rapid economic and military development of the Fallen Angel Empire. In the Fallen Angel Empire military parade that shook the Demon Realm, the powerful ancient legion that appeared was his subordinate! He also had incredible tactics in economic warfare. The financial turmoil of the bank almost destroyed the Bloody Empire and the Dark Shadow Empire without a single shot. It could be said that this prince consort, which seemed to be a vassal of Shea the Great, was the king who truly controlled the fate of the Demon Realm.

He was fully capable of eliminating the Dark Shadow Empire and the Bloody Empire and uniting the Demon Realm.

In the Demon Realm’s martial battle competition, ‘Aguile’ also showed strong individual power. The original top powerhouse, Bloody Empire Lord Raizen, was unexpectedly eliminated by the terrifying Lalaria in the quarter-finals. Then, ‘Aguile’ actually defeated Lalaria and met Catherine in the final.

In that final, there was no real battle, but it was more memorable than a battle.

‘Aguile’ gave up war and ambition for Catherine, and Catherine finally confessed her heart to ‘Aguile’. It turned out that the 2 had a daughter long ago. touching scene of the family reunion was still unforgettable to this day.

This became the node to ushering the peace of the Demon Realm. The 3 empires subsequently formed a confederation alliance after much negotiation. Not long ago, Raizen the Great gave his position to his daughter, Tiffany, and he announced the marriage of Tiffany and Aguile. There was no doubt that this was a political marriage. What the people were more concerned about was not the marriage itself, but the far-reaching significance brought by the marriage. This meant that the 3 empires had returned to the original equal relationship in the alliance, and the alliance would be more stable. This was unity in another sense; it was also the beginning of true peace.

After Tiffany accepted Raizen’s offer to take over as the empress, she immediately showed her Blood and Iron Policy beyond imagination. She eradicated dissidents who opposed her with lightning speed, deposed many of Raizen’s old officials, and supported a group of obedient officials. She came to power with her own new forces and followed the example of the Fallen Angel Empire and the Dark Shadow Empire by carrying out a series of reforms, especially focusing on the development of the royal college and economic development. The results were remarkable and won unanimous praise from the public.

There was naturally Raizen’s plan and support here. Long before he decided to let Tiffany take the throne, Raizen deliberately left many ‘blanks’. Now Tiffany filled them one by one after taking the throne, making her seem capable. It could showcase the talent of the new empress.

Chen Rui learned this through the intel department and nodded secretly. Raizen’s method was like the Tang Dynasty in the previous life. Li Shimin deliberately demoted the famous officer, Li Ji, to another place before his death. After Li Zhi ascended the throne, he reused Li Ji again, making him very grateful. In fact, he was equivalent to a chess piece played by power. Tiffany’s enthronement was much easier than Shea’s. Whether it was economic reform or personnel reform, including eliminating dissidents, there was a great god named Raizen behind it. Even if there were any waves, there would be no storms. Soon, her dominant position would be basically consolidated.

This time, the big wedding was the focus of the whole Demon Realm. It was held with 2 empresses in the Frostland City that connected the 3 empires.

Frostland City was originally just a remote border mountain area; it was not even a small town. After the martial battle competition, after the 3 empires unified the cooperation intention, they jointly paved the way to build a city shared by the 3 empires there. This symbolized the eternal peace of the 3 empires.

Today, with the rapid development of this city, it had become a prosperous commercial center. It had a very special meaning to hold a wedding with 2 empresses here.

Almost all the famous people of the Demon Realm gathered in the Frostland City. The Fallen Angel Empire’s Empress Shea, who was married to ‘Aguile’, served as the witness of the 2 empresses. The group of relatives and friends naturally attended. The most resentful of them was Auglas. The ‘son-in-law’ actually held a big wedding with other women which shocked the Demon Realm, and my 2 daughters…

But looking at his 2 daughters, 1 was very excited (because the wedding had abundant free meals), the other was more interested in the bride than the groom. Sir Dragon Emperor could only cry. Fortunately, there was a lovely Darling Duoduo by his side, saying ‘Grandpa Auglas’. This made Auglas feel much better. The Dragon Emperor especially liked this little girl. From the Dark Moon to the Frostland City, he took Duoduo with him all the time, and he also gave her many small gifts – All the treasures that could be taken out by the Dragon Emperor were of extraordinary value, which made a certain slime jealous. It’s not that the slime had not used the ‘wisdom of the little character’, but unfortunately, the Duoduo little master that he transformed couldn’t hide from the Royal Majesty Dragon Emperor’s Pseudo-God eyesight. Alas, he could only give up.

Athena and Kia originally had a little resentment. Zola and Isabella held a wedding in the human world’s Dragon Valley. Shea was married at the Fallen Angel Empire. Now Catherine and later Tiffany were married at the Demon Realm. Athena and Kia whom he knew first fell behind instead. However, the small dissatisfaction of the 2 women disappeared immediately, because before this big wedding, Chen Rui re-held a grand wedding for the 2 women at the City of Stars in the Blue Lake Mountain Range. Shea and General George presided over the wedding. At the wedding, even Catherine and Tiffany came to attend, and General George recognized Kia as his daughter. The ceremonial team composed of those huge alchemy creatures was by no means beneath an empire.

The wedding ceremony with the 2 empresses was naturally unprecedented and grand. This kind of wedding was of the highest status and class. The whole ceremony was not long, and the whole process was broadcast live to the Demon Realm. The previous preparation work was extremely complicated, and the time taken was even multiple of the official ceremony.

Under the spotlight, the wedding ceremony witnessed by the Fallen Angel Empire’s Empress Shea was finally completed. Chen Rui appeared on the magic television holding the hands of the 2 empresses of the Bloody Empire and the Dark Shadow Empire. When he gestured to everyone below the castle, whether it was the live audience or those in front of the television machine were cheering.

The people witnessed a miracle in the history of the Demon Realm. A ‘prince consort’ with 3 empresses. They also witnessed the coming of a long and stable period of peace.

After the ceremony, there was a large banquet and a grand ball on the scale of the whole city. All the people got relevant gifts, and people celebrated and jumped cheerfully like it was a festival.

“ Fuh … I can finally rest for a while.” Chen Rui threw his jacket and lay directly on the sofa with his limbs spread out.

“Pay attention to your demeanor, Royal Highness Prince Consort. You have to give a public speech in a while.” Catherine smiled and glanced at Tiffany, “But today is indeed a little tiring. Let’s take a rest while there is still time, Your Majesty Tiffany.”

“Okay.” Tiffany’s face seemed a little indifferent. She sat opposite Chen Rui with Catherine, and her movements were meticulous.

“Just a little tiring?” Chen Rui wiped the sweat from his forehead, “It seems that your combat power is much stronger than mine… Hey , Tiffany, don’t be reserved. Relax, it’s just the 3 of us here.”

“Got it, Your Highness.” Tiffany nodded. She was still tense.

Chen Rui shrugged, “Okay, as you wish.”

Catherine slowly got up, “I’ll go to the next room to touch up my makeup. It will take about half an hour.”

“As long as half an hour?”

“Don’t think women are troublesome, Royal Highness Prince Consort. You should be considered experienced.” Catherine winked at Chen Rui, “Your Majesty Tiffany, excuse me for now.”

“Your Majesty Catherine, please…”

“If you don’t mind, just call me Catherine or Sister Catherine on this private occasion.” Catherine smiled slightly, “Tiffany?”

“Okay, Sister Catherine.”

Chen Rui could hear that Tiffany’s tone was still stiff. She was obviously very nervous. He and Catherine were an old couple, and they knew very well that the purpose of the child’s mother ‘makeup touch-up’ was to leave a space for him and Tiffany to ease the atmosphere.

When Catherine closed the door, Chen Rui said, “Tiffany.”

“ En …”

“Well, actually I…”

“ En .”

“…”

He couldn’t find a topic, and the awkwardness continued.

“Okay!” Chen Rui stood up and stretched out his hand.

Tiffany looked at him in surprise.

“Follow me.”

This sentence made Tiffany shudder a little. It was the same sentence in the Mysterious Land and in the Holy Light Mountain.

It gave her hope in life again.

While distracted, her hand had stretched out involuntarily, being held in warmth.

Just as warm as before.

Even this indifferent personality could not isolate that special feeling.

“Take off your ceremonial dress first. We only have half an hour.”

Undressing? Half an hour? Tiffany felt her face instantly become hot, and her heartbeat was racing. She looked at the sofa, “You mean… here?”

Isn’t the ceremony not completely over yet?

The location is not right. It should be in the special bedroom of the castle after the end…

“Yeah.” Chen Rui suddenly realized it when he saw Tiffany’s head turning so red that it was about to smoke, and he patted her head, “I mean, let’s change clothes and sneak out…”

Only then did Tiffany know that she had misunderstood. She blushed even more, then she was startled, “Sneak out? How can we do that?!”

chapters.title: Chapter 1114: Sudden Change
chapters.body:
Chapter 1114: Sudden Change

In the sky that just turned dark, the 2 moons exuded a faint purple light.

In Frostland City, there were singing and dancing carnivals everywhere.

All major taverns and restaurants had launched special discounts and even free wine. The only ones who kept calm were the guards. The garrison force had increased tenfold compared to usual. On a special day like today, nothing wrong should happen.

On the street, a man and a woman appeared. The man looked ordinary, and the woman wore a cloak and a veil, just like a woman in the Dark Shadow Empire. The appearance of the man and woman did not attract any unnecessary attention. Everyone was enjoying themselves.

It was just a simple disguise. No one could have imagined that Prince Consort ‘Aguile’ in the castle and the Bloody Empire’s Royal Majesty Empress would be in a place like this at a time like this.

Although holding hands, there always seemed to be a sense of distance, and this sense of distance could be felt by the 2 of them.

“I’m sorry, Tiffany.”

“Why do you say that?”

“It’s my first time going shopping with you in such a long time.”

“ En .”

“Actually, what I’m really sorry for is…” Chen Rui shook his head, “This political marriage.”

Tiffany lowered her head and remained silent.

The 2 continued to walk forward until Tiffany suddenly stopped at the door of a tavern on the street.

“You’re a good person.”

“…” Chen Rui wiped the sweat from his forehead. Although they had no emotional foundation before, now that the wedding was completed, Tiffany was his official wife. Yet, she actually sent a good person card.

“This…” Chen Rui scratched his head, “In my hometown, when girls say this to boys, it means that you are a good person, but we can only be ordinary friends.”

The corners of Tiffany’s mouth moved behind the veil. The somewhat tense face seemed to have resolved a lot as she nodded, “You’re a good person.”

“Okay.” Chen Rui sighed, “I admit it.”

“You said,” Tiffany looked up, “that you would do that at the Holy Light Mountain even without that person’s entrustment.”

Chen Rui knew that ‘that person’ referred to Raizen, and he nodded, “Yes, I also said that I’m not doing it for so-called justice. I just want to do what I want to.”

“I see.” Tiffany looked into his eyes with a blush on her face, “You don’t really need to apologize.”

“ En ?”

“Since it’s an unavoidable political marriage…” Tiffany took a deep breath and seemed to summon up her courage, “It’s not unacceptable if the other party is you…”

This sentence was straightforward enough. Chen Rui was stunned. He saw that Tiffany’s eyes were so resolute as if she had made up her mind.

From that look, Chen Rui saw a sentence in his mind.

Anything that can’t kill me will only make me stronger; whatever pain and sorrow you are suffering now will become your most solid strength in the future.

He said this sentence to Tiffany – But, in this case, using such words seems to be a little bit…

This kind of determination disappeared in less than a minute. Tiffany shook slightly. Her eyes became soft and shy while her cheeks were as red as fire. Even if she was wearing a veil, he could feel it, “That, Chen Rui, I …”

Another person? Chen Rui felt the change in Tiffany’s temperament, which was clearly from a cold personality to a tender personality. Alright, in fact, the ‘combat power’ of that personality is just so so.

“Needless to say, I understand.” Chen Rui shook her hand, “Although the order is a bit reversed, get married first, then fall in love. Anyway, let’s try to give each other a chance.”

“ En …” Tiffany bowed her head shyly and came over a little, which undoubtedly brought the distance between the 2 of them closer – Not only on the surface.

It seemed that this tender personality was more courageous than another in a certain aspect.

Tiffany’s current strength was the peak stage of the Demon Overlord. In the beginning, because Holy Lady Eudora used Eliza’s talent to take part of her strength, Tiffany’s power declined, Chen Rui gave her the power of 1-star enhancement before sending her back to the Bloody Empire. Tiffany was originally Satan’s apprentice. Satan intended to train her to become a ‘key’ who would open up the mysterious place. This ‘key’ must reach a certain level of strength, so he even taught her some real skills. Now, under the effect of 1-star enhancement, she was rebuilding the foundation, and her strength quickly returned to the original level. However, most of Tiffany’s energy was focused on state affairs, and the training time was relatively little. Otherwise, with the powerful special attribute of 1-star enhancement, coupled with her original foundation, it was likely that she would break through to the Kingdom level.

The clamor on the side became louder and louder, and there seemed to be some contradiction between those people.

Since there were too many people in the tavern, a lot of tables were added outside the store. On the outermost table, 2 groups of people quarreled.

“Everyone knows that Her Majesty Catherine is the Demon Realm’s top beauty. Of course, Her Majesty Catherine is even more beautiful!” The one who spoke loudly was a handsome man, and there were 2 beauties wearing veils beside him. They should be the residents of the Dark Shadow Empire.

“I admit Her Majesty Catherine’s beauty, but our Royal Majesty Tiffany is no less!” The man arguing was obviously from the Bloody Empire, “Her Majesty Tiffany has not only beauty, but she also has ability and wisdom. In a short period of time, the situation of the Bloody Empire has been stabilized. The empire has embarked on a high-speed development path that is not inferior to the rest of the 2 empires. In the hearts of all the people of the Bloody Empire, she is the top beauty!”

“Her Majesty Catherine is even a top sage!” Someone at the side began to support Catherine.

“Her Majesty Tiffany!”

“Her Majesty Catherine!”

“…”

Only then did Chen Rui know that it was an argument about who was the most beautiful of the 2 brides today. Although it was a bit boring, for the public, this was indeed a topic that could be discussed after dinner, especially today. Although the fan clubs on both sides quarreled fiercely, they did not demean the 2 empresses in the slightest. Speaking of which, Catherine had been famous for a long time, so the fan club had the upper hand.

Tiffany’s eyes widened when she heard others comment that her appearance was comparable to Catherine’s.

While Chen Rui was watching interestingly at the side, the man from the Dark Shadow Empire came to him with a wine bottle and handed him a glass of wine. He said, “Brother, Her Majesty Catherine from the Dark Shadow Empire is the most beautiful, don’t you agree?”

This man saw that Chen Rui’s ‘woman’s’ outfit looked like someone from the Dark Shadow Empire, so he wanted to come over and get reinforcements for a decisive victory. However, none of these people could have imagined that the woman who seemed to be from the Dark Shadow Empire was actually the Bloody Empire’s ruler herself.

Chen Rui had already reacted. He took the glass of wine and drank it, then he said with a smile, “Actually, the 2 great empresses have their own beauty, so it’s too hard to judge. In my heart, Her Majesty Tiffany and Her Majesty Catherine are both unique.”

The words of the Royal Highness Prince Consort were naturally accepted by Her Majesty Tiffany, but the fan club in the tavern didn’t buy it.

“ Cheh ! Two-faced!”

“I know. This guy is from the Fallen Angel Empire!”

“That answer is not cool at all…”

Tiffany timidly spoke up, “Actually, I think Her Majesty Catherine is more beautiful.”

In Tiffany’s heart, at least in this personality’s heart, she really couldn’t be compared with the ‘sister’ who was full of confidence and wisdom.

“This guy’s woman is more straightforward!”

“As expected of the beauty of our Dark Shadow Empire!”

“If this guy dares to mistreat you, tell me and I will teach him a lesson for you!”

“That’s right! Haha !”

“…”

Chen Rui knew that these were all well-intentioned noises, so he didn’t take them seriously. He deliberately asked, “You guys only talk about the beauty, but does anyone think that the Royal Highness Prince Consort is actually quite handsome?”

As soon as these words came out, the noise of the fan club suddenly quieted down. Chen Rui felt a little creepy from the strange eyes around him.

Finally, someone spoke up.

“The appearance of the Royal Highness Prince Consort… um , I heard that’s not his true face.”

“Even if it’s not the real face, it’s just the same… Let’s talk about strength.”

“Yes, his strength is still worthy of the 2 Royal Majesty.”

“His ability is also not bad.”

“…”

Seeing Chen Rui rolling his eyes, Tiffany couldn’t help but smile, and she left the tavern with the Royal Highness Prince Consort who ‘could only be compared with strength’.

Tiffany changed from holding hands to Chen Rui’s arm while walking on the street. The magic fireworks rising from time to time in the sky illuminated the 2 approaching shadows again and again.

Compared with the hustle and bustle outside, Tiffany’s mind was completely at peace. She had not experienced that kind of feeling even on that throne, only in that warm residential yard.

There were many men in this world, but only this person could truly touch her heart and walk into her heart, regardless of ability or appearance.

This political marriage, in fact…

“Half an hour is almost up. We should go back.” The man’s voice made Tiffany’s heart tightened slightly. So soon?

Chen Rui saw Tiffany’s thoughts, “Don’t worry, we still have a long future…”

“ En .” Tiffany nodded lightly. That kind of peace and tranquility in the future… I should be able to have it all the time, right?

At this moment, Chen Rui suddenly looked up at the sky. 2 dots of light were fading into the sky like lightning. They were not particularly conspicuous in the dazzling and gorgeous magic fireworks in the sky, but Chen Rui faintly sensed a breath of terrifying power. Even at his current state, he still had a creepy feeling. He immediately focused his eyesight to look.

In the blink of an eye, some kind of intertwining had occurred between 2 rays of light. 1 ray of light had dropped sharply.

Chen Rui was shocked and disappeared in place.

Because he had already seen the figure of the falling light – Giant dragon, and it was a black dragon!

Dragon Emperor Auglas!

chapters.title: Chapter 1115: Shocked
chapters.body:
Chapter 1115: Shocked

Judging from the fall of Auglas, it seems that he has completely lost the ability to control the balance of his body. The strike of the 2 rays of light just now seems to have caused him to suffer unimaginable damage.

Under the guidance of Python, Auglas has gained a deeper understanding of the mystery of Pseudo-Godhood. His strength has improved a lot, and he has the dragon’s artifact [Dragon God Eyes]. To defeat him in this way, the enemy is surely an extremely terrifying existence.

Chen Rui didn’t dare to neglect. He instantly activated the [Purple Pole Star Transformation]’s might to launch [Swift As Wind], and he appeared below Auglas rapidly to support the huge figure.

Auglas’ situation was worse than expected. The huge body equipped with faith armor was full of cracks. The cracks were full of blood and terrifying wounds. There were even cracks in the vertical pupils of both his eyes.

Chen Rui was about to rescue him, but Auglas’ next sentence made his facial expression changed, “Don’t worry about me! Duoduo.”

Right! Auglas has been carrying Duoduo all the time!

Chen Rui was shocked. He instantly turned into a purple lightning, chasing after the white light that almost disappeared in the night.

The speed of the white light was extremely fast. In the state of the [Purple Pole Star Transformation], after activating the power of [Swift As Wind] and the Breeze Shadow Boots’ [Wind Escape], Chen Rui barely followed suit on the white light; he was unable to catch up immediately.

Chen Rui activated the Breeze Shadow Boots’ triple speed skill [Sparkle] without hesitation. Finally, he closed the distance.

There was a vague figure in the white light, but there was no trace of Duoduo. However, Chen Rui knew that Duoduo must be under the control of this person. At this time, the speed of the 2 sides was too fast, and the distance was too far to activate the time might. He shouted loudly, and a powerful destructive power condensed in his right fist instantly. A crimson light shot straight toward the figure in the white light. The night sky along the way seemed to be divided in half by this light.

[True Red Extinction]!

White light figure felt the power of the blow, but he did not look back. He just waved his hand casually backward, and the light of [True Red Extinction] instantly disintegrated like the snow meeting flame.

Chen Rui only felt a majestic force coming toward him like a sharp sword.

This power was so terrifying that Chen Rui could clearly feel that as long as it touched him, his entire body would be completely shaken just like [True Red Extinction].

[Mirror Body]? [Demonic Flies Transformation]? No, the opponent’s movement speed is too fast. If I slow down a little, I will be left behind. Furthermore, [Sparkle] is only effective for 1 minute. In this case, only [Star Diversion] can be used.

A faint brilliance immediately appeared in Chen Rui’s hands, and it swayed quickly. The sword-like power was drawn away to the sides, but because the man’s speed was too fast, he couldn’t divert it back.

Immediately afterward, several high-speed criss-crossing rays of light came.

Chen Rui had experience in ‘speed battle’ with Gabriel. This time, he was on full alert and tried his best to use [Sparkle] to dodge through the criss-crossing rays of light, so that all those rays of light were futile. Even so, cracks also appeared in the star armor that was swept by the afterglow of light – Such a terrifying power!

The person in the white light was slightly surprised that none of his attacks hit. Chen Rui was already approaching slowly. The person looked back suddenly, and Chen Rui felt that the entire night sky lit up by the colorful flame sparks suddenly darkened. Only the 2 purple moons in the sky were left.

No, not the moon.

Rather, eyes.

2 huge eyes.

These 2 eyes looked quiet and peaceful, but at this moment, Chen Rui’s hairs stood up as he already sensed that extremely dangerous breath.

And, it’s not the first time he’d seen this ‘eye’!

He finally understood who this enemy was.

The next second, Chen Rui felt that, except for the white light that escaped in the distance, everything around him had stagnated.

This was not because the flow rate of time had changed, but the space was frozen!

A word from the distant white light sounded, “Doom!”

As soon as the word was said, the 2 eye-like moons immediately turned blood red.

The strange breath filled the entire space in an instant. This was not only an ordinary restrictive power, but a power full of special might. His body and soul were imprisoned at the same time. Intuition told Chen Rui that the power was connected with his soul by an invisible special rule like the thread of fate. If it remained there, his soul would continue to erode and destroy. On the other hand, a slight movement would trigger a chain reaction like the butterfly effect.

The power of this reaction will be extremely terrifying. If I want to break through the shackles of these threads, even my soul will be shattered.

This is the power of [Doom]!

Can’t move, can’t use [Mirror Body], can’t use [Demonic Flies Transformation].

I can only use methods such as [Star Devouring] to slowly counteract this strange power.

Chen Rui once witnessed that person use this kind of might to compete with Satan. Now, as he experienced it personally, then only he knew the magnitude of this power. This is not even the strongest [Doom Calamity 7 Chapters] of that person!

The figure had turned into a luminous spot in the distant. With every second delayed, the hope of catching up would be less.

Duoduo is still in his hands! Chen Rui couldn’t take it any longer. He made up his mind and burst out with all his strength, fully activating the power of [Sparkle] and dashing forward. In an instant, Chen Rui felt a violent shock in his soul. The entire solidified space was like dynamite that had been ignited by a thread, annihilating everything.

His consciousness suddenly blurred.

His power was declining quickly as his body continued to fall down. At the same time, his shattered soul also fell.

He struggled hard to fly up, but it was futile; he was unable to gather strength.

His eyelids were getting heavier and heavier. Although he knew that as the world was spinning like this, his vision would gradually fall into darkness.

I can never wake up! No! How can I faint here!

Wake up!

Duoduo, Duoduo

The name of her daughter made Chen Rui rekindle a strong fighting spirit from the ‘futile’, Chen Rui struggled to open his eyes, “Duoduo!”

There was neither night sky nor white figure, just a beautiful face, showing concern.

Catherine. Not just Catherine, but also Tiffany and Kia. Kia trotted out as soon as she saw that he was awake, apparently to call the others.

Chen Rui felt the sharp tearing pain from his soul, and his body seemed to be falling apart. It was not a dream just now, but a real fact.

“Where’s Duoduo?”

“Let’s recover from the injury first. You’ve been in a coma for 2 days and 2 nights.” Catherine’s eyes suddenly dimmed, “His Majesty Auglas’ injuries are more serious. He is still in a coma.”

“Who took Duoduo?” It was Tiffany who had always been silent. She rescued Chen Rui and Auglas, but when she arrived, she only saw both of them lying on the ground. The white light in the air had disappeared without a trace.

Tiffany also had special feelings for Duoduo. When she isolated herself from the world, Duoduo accepted her without any hesitation. Even though she only had a few pitiful sentences in a certain ‘drama’ and she even said it wrongly, it was at that time that she returned to the world of hope. When leaving the Dark Moon, Tiffany, who had always seemed indifferent, cried in front of everyone while hugging Duoduo. For Tiffany, Duoduo was a ray of warm sunshine in the icy world in her heart, and so was Chen Rui.

“Sa, ri, el!” Chen Rui gritted his teeth and said a name. Although I didn’t see the person’s appearance clearly, judging from that ability, it is the ‘old acquaintance’ – Sariel!

Back then, Sariel used the power of the evil eye to control Chen Rui, and he later lost in a fierce battle with Satan for the silver box.

“It’s really Sariel.” Python’s voice came from the side, “So it seems that you were hit by his [Moon Soul] power. This strange power would cause the consciousness to keep collapsing automatically. With your current level of strength, I’m surprised that you can actually break free from the power of [Moon Soul] by your own willpower.”

In terms of strength, Sariel and Satan were on par. Even if there was a slight gap, the difference was extremely limited. When Satan defeated Sariel in the battle for the silver box, he really used a lot of scheming and effort.

So this time when Chen Rui was chasing, it was not surprising that he was easily defeated in a short time, or rather, he was lucky to survive.

In this kind of frontal battle, Chen Ruie was indeed far from being an opponent with his current strength.

Catherine heard Chen Rui talk about Sariel before. Knowing that this was a Pseudo-God peak stage who was at the same level as Satan, she frowned, “Why did Sariel capture Duoduo?”

Chen Rui shook his head. Although he used the name ‘Aguile’ against Sariel, the name ‘Aguile’ was very ordinary, and no one outside knew the true face of ‘Prince Consort Aguile’. Chen Rui had long ago communicated this to Raizen who invited him to the Book Collection Hall. Most importantly, Sariel had seen ‘Aguile’ being killed by Satan with his own eyes. With Satan’s level of strength, eliminating ‘Aguile’ at that time was simply effortless and should not arouse suspicion.

In fact, when Chen Rui tried to appear in the Demon Realm as Aguile again, there was no turbulence, but Chen Rui did not relax his guard. Even during the wedding, he remained quite cautious.

But I can’t imagine that Sariel didn’t find me, but he took Duoduo. Could it be that he saw through my identity and deliberately took my daughter? With Sariel’s strength, he can kill everyone as he wishes; there is no need to do this.

“I think I know why.” Python spoke up.

“What is it?”

“Bloodline. Duoduo’s bloodline.”

“Duoduo’s bloodline?” Python’s answer surprised Chen Rui and Catherine, and they both recalled the ‘special bloodline’ emphasized by the 3 Kings of Light in the human world.

“Can’t you even remember this?” Python’s gaze was a little strange, “She’s your daughter.”

“Now I don’t have the patience to explain anything.” Chen Rui looked Python in the eyes, “Go straight to the point.”

“It seems that you really don’t understand” Python did not avoid Chen Rui’s persecuting gaze. She said 2 words that shocked the whole room, “God’s descendant!”
