TL: Sariel wants to consume her to become God? Not Duoduo again…

chapters.title: Chapter 1116: Devour
chapters.body:
Chapter 1116: Devour

As soon as these 2 words came out, everyone was shocked.

God’s… descendant… The descendant of God!

Chen Rui remembered the strange attitude of the 3 Kings of Light at the beginning, and they even repeatedly asked whether Duoduo was his biological daughter. Then, he finally realized it.

“Duoduo, is God’s descendant? Then…” Catherine also understood, and she looked at Chen Rui in disbelief, “You…”

“Don’t look at me like that. I’m sure that I’m definitely not a God.” Chen Rui smiled wryly, “Maybe as the 3 Kings of Light said, the bloodline of Duoduo itself…”

Before he finished explaining, he was interrupted by Python, “Even the children born directly by God and non-god creatures may not necessarily have the real bloodline of God. But there is no doubt that God bloodline is beyond imagination and powerful, even just a little bit is enough to make people with this kind of bloodline far superior to their peers. Their starting point is destined to be superior to others, and their potential is unlimited. They will get twice the result with half the effort in training. Such bloodline people are generally called ‘Demi-God’, this is not the Demi-God stage of the training realm, but the Demi-God with God bloodline in the true sense. But the God’s descendant I’m talking about may also be descendant of intergenerational inheritance or Demi-God’s descendant who may still have a thinner god bloodline, so the strength is relatively weak, but compared with ordinary people, it is still strong. This should be the case for Duoduo.”

Chen Rui nodded as he thought of the myths and legends on the earth, especially in Western mythology, the existence of these half-human Demi-Gods such as Pal Seus and Hercules, “According to you, Duoduo may be transgenerational inherited God’s descendant, which means that her parents were not necessarily Gods, but Demi-God…wait! Do you think I’m…”

“Demi-God?” Catherine had already asked directly with a hint of doubt in her eyes. Not long ago, she took Duoduo to the human world to seek medical treatment with Chen Rui, and she learned about Duoduo’s bloodline from the 3 Kings of Light. She herself got huge benefits because of this bloodline. Now she knew that this bloodline actually had the power of God, no wonder the effect was so amazing. The Elemental King has already said that there is no direct connection between Duoduo’s phoenix body and the bloodline, so there are only 2 possibilities: The first is that the little phoenix has God’s descendant bloodline, and the second is Duoduo’s father…

Catherine thought of the ‘small universe’ similar to [Kingdom of God] possessed by Chen Rui, and she also thought of the faith power and life force received by her after being conferred as Goddess in that world. Could it be…

“Catherine, why do you also show that gaze?” Chen Rui knew very well that he was by no means the so-called God’s descendant but a soul crossover. Before crossover, he belonged to the Earth’s loser from a decent family, so he was utterly impossible to be a descendant of God . That kind of universe-like ‘Kingdom of God’ is just a crossover welfare, the Super System.

“Although it may be an illusion, I do have a feeling that a shocking mystery is being slowly revealed, but what I want to know more about is how to make Duoduo come back safely.” Catherine sighed.

“Yes, now is not the time to explore these things.” Chen Rui clenched his fists, “The point is how to rescue Duoduo!”

“I’m afraid it’s difficult. Sariel must have come here by chance, then he discovered that Duoduo’s bloodline is different. Although Duoduo’s bloodline power has not fully awakened, it can’t hide from some super powerhouses with extraordinary talents. With Sariel’s power of the Evil Eye, he must have seen through the secret that Duoduo is God’s descendant, so he attacked Auglas to capture Duoduo.”

Chen Rui nodded. Python raised a finger, “According to my guess, Sariel has only 1 purpose for doing this, to devour her bloodline!”

The last 3 words shocked everyone, including Shea and the others who entered the room from behind – So, isn’t Duoduo in extreme danger?

“Because people who have the bloodline of God, even if there is only a trace, will have a lot of opportunities for the top powerhouses on the road to God. Sariel will never miss this kind of opportunity.”

“No! I’m going to the Bloody Empire immediately and rescue Duoduo!” Chen Rui suddenly got up from the bed. He felt as if the bones supporting his whole body were broken. He couldn’t stand still and had fallen to the ground.

“Bloody Empire?” Tiffany was startled. “Where’s Sariel?”

“The 4th floor of the Book Collection Hall is Sariel’s kingdom!” Chen Rui said through gritted teeth. The Crown of Thorns had appeared on his head, and he activated [Divine Healing] to himself. Sariel’s [Moon Soul] power was no trivial matter. Although he broke free from the disintegrating power of his soul, his body and soul had been severely damaged. Even if [Divine Healing] had an extraordinary effect, he would not be able to heal in a short time.

“So… so, the last time I received the power of the ‘key’ from Sariel!” Tiffany finally remembered. When she was instructed by Satan to go to the 4th floor of the Book Collection Hall, she received the power of a giant eye, which turned her light and dark body into the ‘key’ to open Mysterious Land. Thanks to Chen Rui’s help, otherwise she had completely lost her self-consciousness and become the real key.

Satan didn’t explain too much about the origin of the giant eye, but he just gave her an order. Now she knew that the giant eye was Sariel himself!

“That place should be his sub-kingdom.” Python’s voice sounded, “I once said that the Pseudo-God’s kingdom is all merged into the Pseudo-Godhood, but the Pseudo-Godhood is not nearly as close as the real endless Godhood; the capacity is relatively limited. It cannot hold too many faiths and lives. The stronger the strength, the stronger the Pseudo-Godhood. In general, the Pseudo-Gods will transfer the excess believers to a fixed place and wait until the Pseudo-Godhood power is enhanced before they can be merged again. In other words, after the believers disappear or annihilate, the sub-kingdom can replenish it at any time. The sub-kingdom is equivalent to the foundation of the Pseudo-God. Of course, this phenomenon does not exist in the real Kingdom of God, which is a universe-like solar system with infinite potential and cyclic life.”

Devout believers and faith power were very valuable to Pseudo-God, sub-kingdom was like a base. As long as the power of Pseudo-Godhood allowed or reached a corresponding level, or believers needed to be replaced, the second and third batch of the base could continue to integrate and further strengthen one’s strength.

Satan’s Mountain Seckred, Gabriel’s Black Prison Desert, Sariel’s Book Collection Hall, and the Holy Light Mountain of the 3 archangels were all the same. Only Python was an exception. In order to take away the silver box, she completely gave up her body and sub-kingdom. Only her soul was left to train and comprehend in the silver box.

“That’s right! We will definitely find Sariel in the Book Collection Hall and rescue Duoduo!” Chen Rui gritted his teeth and stood up again with the support of Catherine.

“If you go like this, I’m not sure if you can save that little girl. The only thing I can be sure of is that you will die.” Python sneered. Her words were direct, “I advise you to think clearly before courting death!”

“Even if I die, I will rescue Duoduo!” Chen Rui yelled angrily. Thinking that Duoduo might be devoured by Sariel at any time, he couldn’t help but feel anxious. Every extra minute delayed, Duoduo’s situation would become more dangerous.

Although he knew that Python was right, as a father, having been deprived of his most beloved child, the anger and impatience that burned any logical thinking were simply irrepressible.

“I don’t know when you became so reckless. Where’s your wisdom? Where’s your calmness?” Python said coldly, “If we fight head-on, combining the forces of everyone here, we will still be no match for Sariel!”

“She’s right.” It was Catherine who spoke. After learning of her daughter’s situation, Her Majesty Empress’ nails had been embedded into her flesh, but her face remained cold and firm, “You can’t just go like this; absolutely not.”

Catherine’s determination made Chen Rui finally sober a little. He tried his best to stabilize his emotions, “Python, I want to listen to your advice first.”

Python continued, “God’s bloodline is no trivial matter. It cannot be absorbed by ordinary means. Even for Sariel, it is not so fast. Until then, Duoduo is safe. Therefore, we still have a certain amount of time; at least half a month.”

“How can you be sure that there is still half a month?” Tiffany asked. Under this situation, Tiffany switched back to the cold personality.

“Because…” Python showed a sinister smile, “When I found out that she had God’s descendant bloodline, my immediate mentality was no different from Sariel’s. After all, this type of bloodline is an unparalleled rare treasure in today’s era… …”

“You…” Tiffany didn’t expect Python to have such an answer. Devour Duoduo? Everyone’s eyes on Python suddenly turned hostile.

“Don’t be nervous, if I really want to devour, maybe there is a better candidate.” Python glanced at Chen Rui, then she turned the topic back, “It’s not easy to get bloodline transfer by devouring. It requires a special combination of ritual, strength and secret technique. With my talent and secret technique, it takes at least 20 days to devour bloodline at the peak of my power. Although Sariel has the unique power of the Evil Pupil, his secret technique is inferior to mine. Even if he has sub-kingdom power, giving him another half a month is already overestimating him. However, in order to avoid accidents, you only have half a month to recover and prepare.”

“Then we still have at least half a month.” Catherine had regained her composure. She overlooked some of Python’s remarks and grasped the point, “Just now Python said that our strength is inferior to the other party, so wisdom should be the most appropriate method, but you must also be prepared to deal with it head-on. Chen Rui, you can’t be impatient. You must heal your injury first.”

“That’s right.” Python’s voice was still cold, “Sariel’s strength is comparable to Satan’s. I haven’t regained my strength now, and the only one who can compete with him head-on is you. If you don’t want to die impulsively, and if you really want to rescue your daughter, you must face the terrifying enemy at the optimum state! Your biggest test is not 3 or 10 years later but half a month later!”

“Understood.” Chen Rui took a deep breath and nodded vigorously.

Python glanced at him and walked straight out of the room. Shea and others also walked out, leaving only Catherine and Chen Rui in the room.

“Catherine.” Chen Rui hugged Catherine, “Our daughter will come back safely. I swear with my life.”

Catherine’s long-suppressed tears streamed out, allowing him to hold her trembling body tightly.

“Both of you… must be safe.”

chapters.title: Chapter 1117: [Moon Kingdom]
chapters.body:
Chapter 1117: [Moon Kingdom]

Bloody Empire.

The Mechanic Association building was lined with various construction tools and structures.

Half a month ago, the Mechanical Association announced that the facilities and magic circle of the building would be renovated. Currently, the association was temporarily relocated to a large mansion in the east of the city. The most important Book Collection Hall was temporarily closed.

This was a secret order issued by Empress Tiffany, but only President Turia and Master Mavinna knew that that time was actually when Her Majesty Empress got married in the Frostland City!

In fact, this was exactly the problem faced by the Mechanic Association itself. Master Turia submitted a maintenance and renovation report last month. At that time, Tiffany’s reply was to start construction in the second half of the year. Unexpectedly, it was suddenly approved at this time. Although the content and timing of the secret order were somewhat bizarre, Turia faithfully carried out the order.

Due to the magic circle involved, an isolation area was established near the building to ensure safety. Originally, the Mechanic Association was located in the edge of the city due to its particularity. There were no ordinary residential buildings around. After this isolation, it became very deserted, only the sounds of digging and construction were heard.

These were naturally just superficial disguises. The 2 empires were still celebrating their marriage on the surface, but no one would imagine what happened behind the scenes.

“Sir Auglas, one last word.” Chen Rui stared at the Book Collection Hall in the distance, “You should know what kind of enemy we will face this time. Actually, you…”

“Duoduo was lost in my hands. I failed to protect her!” Auglas said decisively, “Don’t talk nonsense!”

Chen Rui was silent for a moment and nodded. He could see that maybe it was some kind of emptiness left by Olypheus and Lalaria or maybe it was Duoduo’s super lethal power, Auglas really had a father-daughter-like kinship to Duoduo. This kind of generation was a bit messy, but it was true.

The Dragon Emperor had been in the torment of self-blame since he woke up. He also tried his best to protect Duoduo that day, but he was eventually defeated by Sariel’s terrifying power. If it wasn’t for the protection of [Dragon God Eyes], he would have been smashed to pieces. However, [Dragon God Eyes] had also been severely damaged and could no longer be used now, which meant that Auglas had almost no chance of luck when he came to the Bloody Empire this time.

Even so, Auglas, who had just recovered from his injury, still insisted on coming.

Without further persuasion, Chen Rui walked straight to the Book Collection Hall, and Auglas followed silently.

This time, there were only 2 people in the building.

The Book Collection Hall was temporarily sealed, and the books on the first 3 floors were basically transferred away. The 2 walked straight to the 4th floor without pausing.

They saw a heavy gate that sealed the entrance. The gate was painted with quaint patterns without any keyhole.

This was not the first time Chen Rui had come to this mysterious Book Collection Hall. He condensed the kingdom power of Demi-God level to draw the ancient runes that opened the door. With a rumbling sound, the door slowly opened. On the central ground was a blue glowing halo.

Chen Rui set up the prepared materials into the corresponding position, and a light door appeared. It took a lot of trouble to open previously, but now he could easily open it.

But this time, what Chen Rui would face was not a kingdom or an avatar, but the real Sariel at the peak stage.

Inside the light door was the real entrance to the 4th floor of the Book Collection Hall, which was Sariel’s sub-kingdom.

Ordinary people needed to wear special capes and glasses to enter here, so as to be able to read the knowledge and power of the 4th floor ‘world’. Moreover, there was a strict time limit. Once the time limit was exceeded, one would be annihilated.

This was 1 of the mysteries of Sariel’s kingdom. The equipment such as glasses was likely to be used to select believers, and ‘annihilation’ was not necessarily true death, but to become a believer or part of the energy of this kingdom.

Chen Rui did not wear a cape and glasses. The power he had now enable him to look directly at the real origin of this kingdom.

The sky was full of ever-changing ancient runes, forming a complete and coherent historical poem-like novel.

After fighting opponents including the peak stage of the Pseudo-God, Chen Rui’s insight and power had changed. In the depths of the [Analytical Eyes], these ancient runes were like mazes full of dangerous traps. If one wore glasses and a cape, one could automatically avoid these traps, but one could never get to the essence of this maze.

This maze was actually not the real kingdom but the outer layer protection. This meant that the so-called world of the 4th floor of the Book Collection Hall was only the outer periphery of Sariel’s real sub-kingdom. To enter the real core, avoiding danger was not enough. Instead, they had to break through the maze!

“Sir Auglas.” Chen Rui spoke up while drawing a mysterious light mark in his hand, “I shouldn’t use too much power for the time being. Please channel the power of Pseudo-God according to the ancient runes I’ve drawn to break through this maze of ancient runes.”

“Understood.” Auglas knew that this ‘son-in-law’ was now far stronger than himself, and he was the key to rescuing Duoduo this time. Furthermore, he, the Dragon Emperor, only knew little about these ancient runes, so he immediately followed his words and quickly channeled power into those light mark ancient runes.

The light mark turned into text-like symbols, submerged in the runes in the sky. 1 of the runes began to shine with a distinctive light, followed by the second and third… They quickly spread. These glowing symbols were connected into a series of sentences, which were out of tune with the surrounding runes world as if they were a game of their own.

Soon, the world of runes began to become chaotic, and the scene changed again. In the absence of those special glasses, the runes into large and small worlds. The space of these worlds became extraordinarily chaotic as if they would explode at any time. Only the self-sufficient runes turned into 10 golden stairs.

Chen Rui nodded to Auglas, and the 2 stepped onto the stairs together. With each step, the stairs behind them began to disappear while the stairs in front began to extend step by step.

After about 10 minutes, the 2 felt that the scene had changed. They had entered a special place.

This was a relatively independent space, which was somewhat similar in nature to the Rainbow Valley but with a much larger area. There were 2 moons in the sky, mountains, soil, rivers, and smoke from cooking in the distance. There were probably humans. It was a real kingdom or ‘kingdom’.

One could feel the rich life breath as if every grass and every tree had the essence of life energy and faith.

Not only this, Chen Rui and Auglas also felt that this kingdom was permeated with a special power, which seemed to repel outsiders without faith. Their strength was suppressed to a certain extent. This was kingdom power. Chen Rui also felt it when he was in Despair Main Altar, but the suppression there was far greater than this sub-kingdom.

Chen Rui and Auglas moved to the place where the cooking smoke was. This was a small town with a lot of people. The small plaza in the center was a huge sculpture of a giant eye. The residents of the town wore various eye-shaped accessories; they were obviously the most devout believers.

Chen Rui owned the universe kingdom of the Super System. Therefore, he was very sensitive to believers and faith power. He immediately discovered something strange. The faith power emitted by the residents was very strong for individuals. It was already equivalent to the level of firm believers, but there was a special dullness in the gaze of these people, which was similar to a puppet controlled by the God-Eating Mask.

Chen Rui frowned. These believers seem to be in a state of confusion, that is, they have lost their consciousness and their independent personalities.

According to Python, life and faith are the 2 most important elements of the kingdom. At the same time, they are also a weather vane for growth and development. The two are directly related to the characteristic and power of the kingdom. Generally, powerhouses will choose the balance of the 2 according to their own conditions, or develop equally, or focus on one aspect alone.

Those who can enter the Pseudo-Kingdom of God or sub-kingdom are the most devout believers. Generally speaking, except for the faith, they are no different from ordinary people. Those who lose faith or are not religious will be expelled from the kingdom. But there are also some Pseudo-Gods who, in order to enhance the power of the kingdom, do not hesitate to forcibly deprive believers of their consciousness and turn them into walking corpses.

In this way, absolute loyalty and faith can be maintained, and the faith power will be more refined and powerful, but the spirituality of life will be reduced a lot. This situation in the kingdom should be a deliberate choice by Sariel. His [Body of Moon Soul] is already strong enough, and it is likely that he wants to specialize in the direction of faith, so as to comprehend a higher realm.

The spatial fluctuation in front suddenly changed, and several figures had already appeared in front of the 2 of them.

“Who are you? How dare you trespass this great [Moon Kingdom]!”

Chen Rui could see that these people had reached the Kingdom level, and the leader was at the intermediate stage of the Demi-God. It seemed that he was the guardian of this sub-kingdom. Chen Rui naturally was not bothered by such strength.

“We made a special trip to see Sir Sariel.” Chen Rui spoke up.

“How bold, you call Sir Sariel directly!” The leader Demi-God was furious, “Let me, Leeds, come and take your life as a sacrifice to the supreme ruler of [Moon Kingdom]!”

When Auglas snorted, that Demi-God suddenly felt a terrifying breath coming toward him. His strength was shaken by this simple sound, and his body began to tremble constantly. He could not exert any power at all.

Although he had only recently recovered from the injury, [Dragon God Eyes] had been seriously damaged, and there was even a special suppression power, Auglas’ strength was Pseudo-God after all, far from being shaken by a person of such strength.

The rest of the people were also unable to move under the dragon demeanor of Pseudo-God Auglas. At this moment, the light of the sky suddenly dimmed, and 2 moons turned into 2 huge pupils.

As soon as this pupil appeared, the people who were shocked by the dragon demeanor suddenly felt relieved and recovered. When the residents below saw this pupil, they all knelt to the ground, including Leeds and others, showing piety and fanaticism on their faces.

The 2 giant eyes ignored the believers and focused on Auglas. Auglas immediately felt the terrifying pressure. He was like a frog being stared at by a viper, and cold sweat broke out from his forehead.

Evil Pupils!

Sariel finally showed up!

chapters.title: Chapter 1118: Exchange
chapters.body:
Chapter 1118: Exchange

“This must be Sir Sariel. We have already met before.” A calm voice sounded, and the giant pupils slowly turned their gaze behind Auglas – The man at the peak stage of the Demi-God looked like a follower of the dragon, but the calmness in his eyes far exceeds that of Auglas at the Pseudo-God as if he is the mastermind.

I met… this person before?

Although Sariel’s gaze made him feel the amazing pressure, Chen Rui was no longer a newbie. After facing the peak stage powerhouses such as Michael, Gabriel, Raphael, Satan, the 3 rulers of the Abyss, Sariel’s coercion could no longer let his mind fear or shake at all.

The most important thing was he could only win and not lose today.

Chen Rui showed a faint smile, “My name is Aguile.”

The huge pupils flashed slightly, and the eyes became fiercer and fiercer.

“This is a very common name. Let alone historically, even now, there are at least several thousand people with this name in the Demon Realm.” Chen Rui said indifferently, “Sir Sariel seems particularly surprised?”

“It’s just the name is the same as a certain name in my impression.” Sariel finally spoke. His voice seemed to penetrate his soul. It echoed back and forth in the space, “Whether it is the same person or not, it’s an insignificant ant anyway.”

Chen Rui didn’t seem to hear the disdain in his tone, but he looked directly at Sariel’s Evil Pupils, “I want to emphasize that this is a father’s name. Half a month ago, you took my daughter from this dragon’s hands.”

“‘She’ is your daughter?” Sariel’s pupils shrank, then he smiled contemptuously, “Funny!”

“I don’t think it’s funny at all. I’m here today to bring back my daughter.”

“Stupid and ignorant ant! Since you know my prestige, how dare you speak out like this! Turn into ashes under the might of [Moon Soul]!” The silver light shot out from the giant pupil on the left toward Chen Rui. The space along the way seemed to be cut open.

The attribute of this blow was somewhat similar to [True Red Extinction], but its power was much higher than [True Red Extinction].

As the purple starlight shone in an instant, the silver light suddenly slowed down, and the entire kingdom froze. In the blink of an eye, it returned to normal. A bottomless huge hole appeared on the ground. It was obviously caused by the giant pupil’s blow just now. However, the figure shining with the purple starlight appeared in the other direction first.

“It’s you. We have no doubt met before.” Sariel sneered. He had already recognized Chen Rui as the Pseudo-God who wanted to snatch the little girl from him after the dragon that day—— This person’s strength is even above the dragon. It seems to be at the intermediate stage Pseudo-God with a speed might, but his overall strength is still far from me.

This ‘Aguile’ is far different from my subordinate who was killed by Satan. It must be 2 people. In fact, it is impossible. Who is Satan? How could he fail? And I also witnessed the death of that subordinate!

“I didn’t expect you to recover from my [Moon Soul] power so quickly.” Sariel’s giant pupils narrowed slightly, “In addition to speed might, you also have… time might? What is your relationship with the Mountain Seckred?”

“Not everyone who has time might is directly related to Satan.” Chen Rui shook his head.

“It seems that you are not unfamiliar with the most peak-stage powerhouse like Satan and I. Otherwise, you would not have found this kingdom directly. That little black dragon that has the incomplete [Dragon God Eyes] should be from Dragon Island; perhaps he is the current Dragon Emperor, and your strength is even far above him. Nowadays, a person with strength like you is a rare existence in this era. I’m just a little curious. I have never actually heard of your name! “

“Name is just a codename.” Chen Rui was not surprised to see that Sariel could easily see through Auglas’ identity.

“I don’t have time to talk nonsense with you!” A sneer sounded from the giant pupils, “Since you are a discerning person, don’t deceive yourself. I already know that little girl’s secrets! I can understand your mood to see a prey that can be enjoyed at a glance being taken away, but this is a world where the strongest one is honored. I’m stronger than you, so I’m the master of the bloodline of God!”

Sariel judged him by his own assumptions, thinking that Chen Rui also ‘adopted’ the little girl because of Duoduo’s bloodline while falsely claiming to be his daughter.

Chen Rui did not explain, because the topic was meaningless. Even if he could prove that he was Duoduo’s father, Sariel would not let her go, “Where is she now?”

“Obviously in my true kingdom!” A giant pupil in the sky turned into a mirror. In the mirror, a little girl curled up in a light blue sphere with her eyes closed; it was Duoduo.

Duoduo’s body faintly glowed red. Strange things could be faintly seen behind her, which seemed to be some kind of rudiment of wings.

“She seems to have experienced some special baptism. With the support of my kingdom power, her bloodline will be perfectly awakened. At that moment, it is time for me to harvest.”

As Chen Rui stared at Duoduo in the sphere, the knuckles of his fists were turning white, but he knew that this was just Duoduo’s mirror image. The real place was in the core kingdom of Sariel’s Pseudo-Godhood, so he quickly calmed down.

“Since you have the courage to enter my kingdom, you should have corresponding awareness. So now there are only 2 paths in front of you: become my follower or be annihilated. With your power, I will give you the highest power and trust. Especially you, I recognize your strength, even after I devoured the God’s descendant and step up to a higher level in the future, you can become my assistant and get further improvement under my guidance. Otherwise… you will face the worst and last choice in your life.”

“Death or surrender.” Chen Rui shook his head calmly, “I believe that Sir Sariel yourself has experienced such a choice countless times in training. Don’t you think it’s too old-fashioned? Sir should see that since we came here, we have already prepared to die, so we naturally will not take the death threat to our hearts. We are all smart people. There are some things that need not be said. Let’s talk about the third option, exchange.”

“ Haha …” Sariel’s sneer turned into a loud jeer, “Do you think there is anything more important to me in this world than the bloodline of God?”

“Her bloodline of God is actually very thin. Even if your devour can really succeed, it will have a limited effect – Of course, for the powerhouse that is already at the peak stage, every small step forward is very difficult. If a certain level of breakthrough can be achieved, or even make the path smoother in the future, it is indeed an extremely rare opportunity. However, this kind of devour also has certain risks and failure probability. There will also be a recoil that hinders the power. Even Sir Sariel can’t be 100% sure of success.”

These were all knowledge obtained from Python. As a former powerhouse with the experience of the same level, Sariel’s eyes showed a slightly surprised expression when Chen Rui mentioned it, “Yes, your knowledge seems to be more commendable than your strength, but I don’t have time to beat around the bush with you. What kind of things can you come up with that can be compared to a God’s descendant?”

“This thing definitely has such value, even… above it.” Chen Rui calmly said, “First of all, please pardon my rudeness to activate a little space trick.”

He walked into a light door that appeared in front of him, then he disappeared into it; only Auglas was left.

Sariel’s giant eyes flashed a strange expression. This space door actually completely ignores my kingdom power and appears without any interference. Even when I secretly use the special power, I still cannot track the location of ‘Aguile’.

When his kingdom power hit the light door, it can only pass through it, as if the light door was just a transparent illusion, but Sariel clearly felt that ‘Aguile’ did enter the light door and disappeared. So, this door repels any power other than the master, even if it is an existence stronger than its master.

It should be some kind of special talent, and it is also what the opponent relies on. It is indeed a tricky talent.

The figure of ‘Aguile’ quickly came out of the light door again with a square package in his hand.

“This is the thing.”

“Are you sure you can exchange this kind of thing for that little girl?”

“I’m pretty sure, because this thing, not only Sir Sariel, but even Satan is coveting it all the time.” Chen Rui slowly opened the package.

“ Hmph! Just…” Before Sariel could finish speaking, his pupils shrank suddenly, because he had already seen the item inside the package.

Box.

Silver box.

Could it be …

“1/7 and also 1/2 of something. It sounds a bit contradictory, but for Sir Sariel, I don’t need to explain more.” Chen Rui slowly opened a gap on the silver box, and the whole space was instantly filled with a terrifying destruction breath.

The breath disappeared in an instant because Chen Rui closed the box.

Before Sariel could react, Chen Rui immediately disappeared into the light door.

When he appeared again, the silver box was no longer on him.

“I wonder if this thing is enough to exchange for my daughter?”

“You… you actually own this thing!” Sariel’s voice became emotional. He never imagined that the other party’s chip was actually the Book of Destruction!

Back then, he had tried his best to compete with Satan, Python and others for the Book of Destruction. The first time, Python did not hesitate to give up her body and escaped with the silver box; the second time, he miscalculated and let Satan snatch the silver box that he almost obtained. He regarded the 2 defeats as the biggest setbacks. This time, someone actually delivered the silver box to him!

Satan has already obtained 2 silver boxes, and Satan will never exchange the silver boxes for God’s descendant. This must be the silver box that Python took away, and it somehow fell into the hands of this person!

This is the last part of the Book of Destruction. As long as I get it, I will have the power to compete with Satan. Not only that powerful destruction origin power, but if possible, I can also cooperate with Satan to utilize the complete Book of Destruction of Destruction to imitate Raphael and others, stealing god faith for my own use and coveting a higher realm.

There are no permanent friends or enemies, only permanent interests.

The same applies to Satan . Sariel knew it well.

“Sir Sariel, can we give up some frivolous choices and have a good talk?”

Chen Rui’s voice brought Sariel back to his senses quickly. Yes, in terms of value alone, the Book of Destruction is a more long-term and stable thing than the bloodline of God’s descendants that is likely to fail and bring recoil.

The 2 moons gradually merged into a figure with curly blond hair and vague facial features that gave a faint sense of delicacy. He was wearing a robe. It was Sariel’s original body.

“Of course.” Sariel smiled. This opportunity is a once-in-a-lifetime – It is very likely that I, Sariel, will truly embark on the highest road and become the new God after the Twilight of Gods.

It is not only the Book of Destruction but also the God’s descendant’s bloodline that can pave the way for me.

chapters.title: Chapter 1119: Unforeseen Changes
chapters.body:
Chapter 1119: Unforeseen Changes

Race: Fallen Angel

Comprehensive Strength Assessment: SSSS+

Physique:SSSS+, Strength: SSSS+, Spirit: SSSS+, Speed: SSSS+.

Analysis: [Body of Moon Soul], power of doom, the Evil Pupil, confinement, seal contract.

Danger level: Extremely dangerous!

Seal contract? Chen Rui frowned secretly, but he showed an indifferent expression while bowing, “Sir Sariel, it’s a pleasure to meet you. I’m sorry, my strength is far inferior to sir, so in order to ensure the security of the exchange, I have to take some measures.”

“ Hmph! ” Sariel’s eyes swept over Auglas and landed on Chen Rui. Although this man is not very strong, his methods are strange. It is not easy to eliminate him quickly. Maybe it will give him a chance to escape. The most troublesome is that the space door that excludes outsiders, and the Book of Destruction is hidden in the space door by this person. Who knows what is in it? In case of any mistake, it’s not worth the loss.

So, before I get the Book of Destruction, I can’t alert him.

“Then, Sir Sariel, please release my daughter first, then I will give you the Book of Destruction.” Chen Rui was not a fool. He also understood Sariel’s thoughts, but for Duoduo, he must take this risk, “Otherwise, I will forever exile the Book of Destruction in a special space. Even if you kill me, you can’t get it. Now I’m in the [Moon Kingdom] of sir, I may not have the confidence to escape, but I still have the confidence to kill myself before being captured.”

“Your gaze tells me you’re serious.” Sariel said lightly, “To be honest, I don’t like dealing with a lunatic like you.”

“I can take this as a compliment… Then, please, sir, release my daughter.”

“Your daughter?” Sariel clearly expressed disdain for this title. This person is nothing more than wanting to get the bloodline of God like me. Due to his lack of strength, the Book of Destruction is far less beneficial to this person than the bloodline of God. This guy’s courage and methods are indeed different. He may still have some cunning schemes too.

But this is my [Moon Kingdom]. Even if it is a real fair exchange, with the small characters at the intermediate stage and early stage of the Pseudo-God, I’m not afraid of them playing any tricks.

“Okay, I can give you that little girl.” Sariel thought about it. A blue light ball appeared beside him instantly. Inside was the sleeping Duoduo, which was exactly the same as the one he saw in the mirror image, “Now, give me the Book of Destruction!”

The voice had a might that stunned the soul, but Chen Rui was unmoved and shook his head, “Cancel the imprisonment first, then hand her over to me. I will give you the Book of Destruction.”

“I’m not interested in playing tricks with you.” When Sariel sneered, Chen Rui and Auglas felt a terrifying pressure in space at the same time. They might be annihilated at any time, “Hand over the Book of Destruction or this exchange shall end. You will also pay the price with your life!”

If there was no previous detection of the [Analytical Eyes], Chen Rui would definitely propose a way to sign a contract and use the Super System contract to restrict Sariel. Even if Sariel was stronger than him, he might not be able to violate the contract.

However, in Sariel’s attribute analysis, the power of ‘seal contract’ appeared. This power was likely to have an incalculable effect on the contract. The ability of the peak stage of the Pseudo-God should not be underestimated, and the power of linking was not omnipotent. With the lesson from Python that day, he should not rashly take risks now since Duoduo’s life was at stake.

Seeing the stalemate, Chen Rui took a step forward, “Sir Sariel will release my daughter first, then I will take out the Book of Destruction from space. When she returns to my side, I will hand over the Book of Destruction.”

Sariel thought for a moment, “Let’s do this. The dragon comes to the place between us. I hand the little girl to the dragon, then you take the Book of Destruction from space. While the dragon returns to your side, you give the Book of Destruction to me. Don’t try to play tricks or run away with the Book of Destruction ahead of time. Even if you have some kind of talent for space, I may not be able to kill you in an instant, but I’m absolutely sure that the dragon and little girl will be annihilated.”

Chen Rui thought quickly, and he exchanged an eye gesture with Auglas. They had already reached a tacit understanding.

Auglas had communicated with him before entering the Book Collection Hall. At that time, he was surprised for a while to know that the silver box of the Book of Destruction was actually in Chen Rui’s hands, but these were not the focus now. The most important thing was to rescue Duoduo, and the Tower of Glory that the Dragon Emperor gave to Chen Rui back then was the key to escape.

Chen Rui’s thoughts turned rapidly and he nodded, “Okay, but you have to cancel the space power that imprisoned her first. I want to confirm her authenticity and safety before exchanging.”

Sariel didn’t say more. He glanced at the light ball around Duoduo, and it gradually dimmed. After that kind of imprisoning space power disappeared, Duoduo’s attribute was immediately displayed in the [Analytical Eyes].

Race: ??

Comprehensive Strength Assessment: S++

Physique: S++, Strength: S+, Spirit: S++, Speed: S+

Attribute: Fire attribute, phoenix body, Nirvana power, Seal of Divine Blessing.

The question mark of race has existed before. It should be due to the mixed-race of human and demon, but the attribute ‘Seal of Divine Blessing’ is a new one. Could it be that this is… the bloodline of God’s descendant?

Chen Rui felt that the term was a little familiar, and he suddenly remembered that he had seen this attribute on another person – Satan!

Satan is actually a God’s descendant!

Chen Rui finally understood why Satan would disdain Chen Rui for comparing him to Michael.

“Your biggest mistake is comparing Michael to me!”

As a God’s descendant, Satan has a sense of superiority far beyond Michael’s; perhaps more than just a sense of superiority. The plan of the Dark Divinity Temple is probably that he has realized the power of the bloodline of God to a certain extent, and he wants to use the huge faith to further improve or break through.

Whether intentional or not, Satan’s plans are ultimately halted because of me, and in 10 years it will be completely over.

These thinking changes were completed in an instant. When Chen Rui glanced at Auglas, Auglas understood. He flew to the middle of the 2 sides.

Duoduo slowly floated toward Auglas and was picked up by the Dragon Emperor. The little girl’s heartbeat and breathing were normal, but she was not awake. There were also 2 small wings behind her.

“She’s fine. She just accepted my kingdom power. Her bloodline is about to fully awake. She will wake up naturally.” Sariel’s voice sounded.

Auglas felt uneasy, so he sensed for a while and found no abnormality. He nodded to Chen Rui, but he didn’t dare to act rashly, because Sariel’s spirit power had already locked him firmly.

The [Star Gate] appeared in front of Chen Rui. His figure flickered, disappeared and reappeared with a silver box in his hand.

Sariel’s eyes were fixed on the box. Although he could see that this box was the previous silver box, he needed to finalize it.

“Open it.”

Chen Rui opened it slightly, and Sariel immediately felt the strong destructive power leaking out. Indeed! It is the Book of Destruction. His eyes suddenly lit up.

“I will count to 3. The moment the dragon starts shifting, you throw the box over. If the silver box has not left your control after the dragon shifts, I will attack immediately. Then, the little girl and the dragon will be annihilated together!”

Auglas and Chen Rui exchanged quick glances and nodded.

At this moment, all of Chen Rui’s coping strengths were on stand-by – Even if Sariel attacked directly when Auglas teleported, he could use the time might and protective power to resist. It would only take a split second to keep Auglas and Duoduo in the Tower of Glory and leave with the [Star Gate].

“1, 2…” Sariel’s eyes flashed with brilliance, “3!”

The next second, the light flashed and alternated rapidly, then the entire [Moon Kingdom] vibrated with a violent frequency, mixed with Sariel’s proud laughter.

The tremor in the space gradually calmed down. Sariel held the silver box in his hand while Chen Rui was next to Auglas, who was holding Duoduo in his arms. They suspended in mid-air. At this time, Duoduo’s closed eyes had opened. Her pupils had turned dull blue, and most of Auglas and Duoduo’s body had turned into blue crystals that were spreading rapidly. Soon after, the 2 turned into crystals.

Chen Rui was breathing heavily at this time, the star armor on his body was cracked. His raging eyes behind the visor were staring at Sariel.

Just now, within the split second, several turning points and changes occurred – Auglas’ body immediately solidified into crystals after shifting. This crystal contained powerful energy, which made Chen Rui unable to keep them into the Tower of Glory that had been activated. Sariel seized this momentary opportunity, attacked Chen Rui, and took the silver box that had already been released.

Sariel laughed wildly, “ Hahaha! After so many years, I finally got it! Stupid guy, how dare you bargain with me!”

“Sariel!” Chen Rui tried several times, but he couldn’t keep the frozen Auglas and Duoduo. He roared, and the destructive light of [True Red Extinction] shot straight toward Sariel.

Sariel glanced at the red light. The red light immediately stopped as if bound by something, then it disintegrated in an instant.

“If we are at the intermediate stage of the Pseudo-God, this blow may be a little threatening, but in the realm of Pseudo-God, the gap in strength between the peak stage and the intermediate stage is farther than the ordinary big realm. Let alone this is even in my kingdom!” Sariel opened the silver box, “Looks like you’re doing me a favor by presenting the Book of Destruction today. I’ll give you 1 last chance…”

Sariel’s words came to an abrupt end, because he felt that his power was being suddenly drained by something, and the source of this ‘thing’ was… the silver box that had just been opened!

The Book of Destruction?

No, it’s that special power lurking in the destruction origin!

This eerie feeling was no stranger to Sariel, who exclaimed, “Deprivation!”

TL: Isn’t Python still at the early stage of the Kingdom Level? Can this attack work?

chapters.title: Chapter 1120: Calculations
chapters.body:
Chapter 1120: Calculations

It’s actually deprivation!

Sariel seemed to be punched hard in the heart as the smug smile froze on his face.

In his memory, only 1 person had this special might.

This person happened to be the original master of the silver box in front of him.

Python! It must be her!

So this ‘Aguile’ is under Python?

And that little girl I kidnapped was originally Python’s prey?

I got tricked!

That vicious and crazy woman!

Many self-assumed ‘truths’ were instantly revealed in Sariel’s mind, shocking him even more.

The feeling of being deprived of power was only a moment, but this moment seemed to have become longer.

Time might!

At this moment, Sariel suddenly had a feeling of extreme danger. This guy, who was obviously only at the intermediate stage of the Pseudo-God, could actually make him have such a strong warning sign.

The figure with brilliant purple starlight suddenly turned into 3, surrounding him in a triangle formation. A powerful and special breath quickly soared. There seemed to be an incomparably destructive power in this breath, but it also contained the completely opposite force. Without thinking further about it, the figures shot out a purple-red light at the same time, forming an independent triangle space that completely enclosed him in it.

What kind of move is this? The power of this blow has far exceeded the level of the intermediate stage of the Pseudo-God! Sariel felt that his body and soul were completely frozen by the space, and he couldn’t help being horrified.

In the blink of an eye, the triangular space was completely shattered.

The center suddenly became a complete vacuum. Everything, including Sariel, disappeared without a trace.

The silver box had automatically flown to Chen Rui’s side, and a vague figure flew out of the opened box and quickly became clear. It was Python.

More specifically, it was Python fused with Manlace’s body.

Python used the secret technique to temporarily turn her body into a soul entity and hide in the silver box. She had been lurking in the silver box for countless years. Therefore, she was well versed in the art of concealment and was extremely familiar with the Book of Destruction, so even Sariel didn’t notice either.

Python and Sariel were old rivals. She knew that Sariel would definitely turn hostile or cheat, so she used the secret technique to lurk in the silver box to deliver an unexpected blow at the crucial moment.

On the other hand, if Sariel didn’t play any tricks, Chen Rui could also use the Star Conferring Platform to withdraw Python at any time. Python had now completed the 1-star enhancement and was successfully conferred a star, but the 2-star enhancement had not been fully comprehended.

No doubt, as Python expected, Sariel didn’t think about exchanging from the beginning. Instead, he wanted to embezzle the 2 ‘treasures’ of Duoduo and the Book of Destruction. As a result, when Sariel was most complacent, he was suddenly hit. The timing of the Python blow was perfect. With her current early stage of the Kingdom level strength, she succeeded in one hit, but this was not enough to kill Sariel. Chen Rui was the one who truly launched the deadly attack.

Due to the difference in the level of strength, neither the deprivation of Python nor the time might. The opportunity was fleeting, but a big move like [All Star God View] would take some time to charge. Hence, Chen Rui activated the strongest ultimate move second to [All Star God View], [Dimension Destruction]!

The power of this move was extremely powerful. Even the original Despair Lord Dillosro almost suffered a big loss. If it weren’t for the protection of the bone armor and the power of the main altar, he was likely to be fatally wounded.

Now that Chen Rui’s power was more refined, under this blow, in the space of [Dimension Destruction], Sariel’s body was torn apart as the space shattered, turning into powder.

However, Chen Rui was well aware of the power of Sariel. Although this attack was surprising, it would make him suffer some damage, but it was impossible to kill him. The real problem was how to rescue Duoduo first.

“Python! Quickly see what happened to Auglas and Duoduo?”

Duoduo and Auglas had all turned into crystals now. Chen Rui was bounced back by a strong force when he tried to get close. He couldn’t keep them into the Tower of Glory or the storage warehouse at all.

“Moon Mirror! It’s actually this thing!” Python frowned. “Moon Mirror is Sariel’s artifact that integrates with the kingdom. It is very tricky. The most troublesome thing is that Auglas is now imprisoned by the power of Moon Mirror too. The Moon Mirror will completely devour his Pseudo-Godhood, then Duoduo’s bloodline awakening will be further accelerated. Consequently, the success rate of being absorbed by Sariel will also be greatly increased. After awakening, her life force and bloodline power will pass through a kind of Moon Stigmata’s mark to Sariel.”

Chen Rui was taken aback. He didn’t expect that even Auglas would be implicated. He asked quickly, “How can we stop the Moon Mirror? Is direct attack effective?”

“The Moon Mirror should be fully activated now and this state is irreversible. Even if Sariel launches his own attack, he will not be able to destroy the artifact and terminate the process in a short period of time, unless…”

“Unless you kill me.” Sariel’s cold voice sounded from all directions, and the countless voices overlapped, making it even more creepy.

Countless figures appear from the shattered body and quickly merge into 1.

Chen Rui’s heart trembled. No matter from the breath and body appearance, Sariel who suffered the blow [Dimension Destruction] just now was actually unscathed!

“As expected of the [Body of Moon Soul].” Python’s face was full of solemnity, “If it were another person, he would be impossible to survive the trick just now; even if he was at the peak stage of the Pseudo-God.”

“It turns out to be you, ‘old friend’. I haven’t seen you since the war that year. I can’t believe that we will meet again in such a way, Python! “Sariel looked at Python and shook his head, “You found a good subordinate, but unfortunately, your own level of power has regressed too much. Back then, when you gave up your body and fled, you must have suffered some kind of change, right? But you have fallen to this level. I’m disappointed. That God bloodline should be the key to your recovery, but unfortunately, she is mine!”

Sariel obviously misunderstood the relationship between Chen Rui and Python, Duoduo and Python. Python didn’t explain; she just looked at him coldly.

“As you said, the Moon Mirror is now activated, so you don’t have any chance. With the help of the dragon of that early stage of the Pseudo-God. Her bloodline will be fully awakened and passed to me through this Moon Stigmata. Only by killing me can you cancel it all.” With that said, Sariel pointed to a special mark on his forehead with a playful smile, “The question is, can you do it?”

Chen Rui suddenly shouted with his eyes burning brightly, “Run now!”

This sound was obviously shouted to Python. At the same time, the appearance of stars appeared around Chen Rui. The wings behind the star armor suddenly spread out into the stars and blended into 1. A series of high-speed blue stardust appeared in the space, drawing countless irregular death arcs. All the scenery quickly became blurred. Criss-crossing ravines appeared even on the ground of [Moon Kingdom] under this terrifying pressure.

[Pole Star Storm]!

In the fatal purple storm, there were traces of cracks in the space, but the figure in the middle remained motionless.

There was a sound in the storm. Even that berserk terrifying storm couldn’t cover up the sound.

“In the name of doom! Slow!”

The high-speed storm actually slowed down, and the rapid whistle’s airflow became heavier and heavier. In an instant, it was turned into nothing.

Chen Rui was shocked. It was the first time he had seen someone so easily disintegrate the power of [Purple Pole Star Storm]. Before he could make the next reaction, he felt a terrifying force penetrating his soul. With a muffled snort, blood spilled from his eyes, mouth and nose at the same time. He was seriously injured.

The power of [Doom Calamity].

Not only it eroded the power of [Pole Star Storm]. The aftermath also hit Chen Rui hard. Because of the ‘slow’, it only broke out now.

“Compared to the previous blow, this storm seems flashy but impractical.” Sariel shook his head, “I don’t even need to use [Body of Moon Soul]. If you have the strength of the peak stage of the Pseudo-God, maybe you can scare me, but your current power is not worth mentioning at all!”

Sariel’s eyes fell on the light door that appeared behind Chen Rui. It was a golden light door, which was different from the light blue one before. Python was flying to the light door, holding the silver box of the Book of Destruction.

However, because of the [Doom Calamity]’s ‘slow’ that Sariel just activated, Python who should have rushed into the light door slowed down.

Since this was Sariel’s kingdom, everything was under his control. He immediately sensed the strangeness of this golden light door. The difference between the golden light door and the previous light blue light door (the [Star Gate]) was not only the color. The light blue space door with faint starlight excluded everything except ‘Aguile’. Even Sariel was no exception. Obviously, this ‘no exception’ also included the ‘master’ of ‘Aguile’- Python.

Therefore, Python could not enter the light blue light door, and this golden light door was another kind of space door with a relatively common attribute, in which the moon’s kingdom power could penetrate.

Although feeling the powerful space power, this also meant that Sariel could enter like Python!

Kill the old enemy -Python!

Reclaim the Book of Destruction!

Devour god’s descendants’ bloodline!

A dark silver light burned in Sariel’s pupils. Planet-like objects appeared around him as if the 2 moons ‘planets’ in the sky were slowly opening. It turned out to be countless huge ‘eyes’.

Chen Rui sensed a terrifying coercion emanating from those eyes. The previous [Doom Calamity] power had not completely dissipated, and his body was deterred by this coercion, so he could not move for a while.

This was the powerful might of Sariel’s Evil Pupil combined with imprisonment. His most important target was not Chen Rui, but Python!

Python’s graceful body was surrounded by heavy black gas, and a relatively slow voice sounded.

“The real poison is the human heart.”

Sariel felt a tightness in his heart as if his heart was being grabbed by something. Those huge ‘eye’ planets began to rot and fall one after another. This kind of corrosion was different from the rot might of [Doom Calamity 7 Chapters] but a kind of terrifying poisonous power.

The poison might of Python!

This corrosion soon disappeared, and the ‘giant eye’ returned to its original state.

Python turned into black smoke and flew toward the light door quickly. She was just about to enter the golden light door.

A cold light flashed in Sariel’s eyes. Although Python’s poison might was extremely terrifying, she was too weak now. If the past Python launched this might, even his [Body of Moon Soul] would have consumed a lot of power to resist, but now he just activated the kingdom power slightly, and the poison power was easily resolved.

All the giant eyes burst out with terrifying imprisoning might at the same time, wrapping toward Python. Sariel was absolutely sure to imprison Python before she entered the light door. However, at this time, the power of the giant eye slowed down, the flow of time changed again. Everything slowed down.

Except for Python.

In the nick of time, the figure of Python with the silver box had already disappeared into the golden light door, and the imprisoning might was futile. At the same time, the light door began to dissipate quickly.

“Damn!” Sariel shouted angrily. Damn time might! That damn ‘Aguile’!

The Moon Kingdom power erupted with all its strength, and the aftermath of the time might was instantly shattered. Sariel had already rushed toward the rapidly shrinking golden light door like lightning, but he did not see that when Python entered the light door, a strange smile was revealed on her mouth.

TL: Seems like they are baiting Sariel into the golden light door. Could it be connecting to the space that rejects Pseudo-God?

chapters.title: Chapter 1121: The Final Battlefield
chapters.body:
Chapter 1121: The Final Battlefield

“Don’t think about it!” Chen Rui tried his best to hold back the heavy damage and rushed toward Sariel, trying to prevent him from entering the golden light door.

Just as Chen Rui rose into the air, Sariel turned his head abruptly. The giant eyes in the kingdom turned into silver half-moon waves crisscrossing toward him. Chen Rui’s body was instantly divided into countless pieces. and Sariel secretly sneered when he caught a glimpse of this scene. Then, he flew straight into the golden light door.

In front of him was a huge open space, which should be an independent space similar to [Moon Kingdom]. Python was suspended in front of him. Instead of running away, she quietly looked at Sariel while holding a silver box in her hand.

“ Hmph! Frightened?” Sariel sneered, “Actually, with your current strength, even running away is useless! Your subordinate is indeed quite capable, but it was a pity that I completely destroyed him. This battle is over; you have no luck anymore!”

“Really?” Python’s mouth curled into a meaningful smile, “You’re mistaken, the battle has just begun.”

“Have you lost the courage to admit defeat?” Sariel shook his head disdainfully, and the kingdom power surged toward Python, “You still want to perish together with me? I’m not an arrogant idiot like Uriel. I won’t give you a chance. Moreover, I will not give you any conditions of surrender, because a crazy woman like you will not bow to anyone except that person! So, for the sake of an old opponent, I’ll just finish you off quickly!”

“You still like to act smart, Sariel.” Python didn’t evade the imprisoning power coming to her, and she smiled a little more mockingly, “Let’s not talk about strength, just in terms of brain, you are much worse than Satan.”

Sariel’s eyes were full of murderous intent, but he was vigilant in his mind. He quickly looked at the surrounding environment.

This is an independent space, but there is no environment for escape or hiding. Python escapes here is tantamount to self-destruction. She has always been cunning, how could she leave such a retreat for herself?

There was an ominous omen in Sariel’s mind. There must be something wrong with this space!

As soon as he thought of this, Sariel made a decision. The power of the peak stage of the Pseudo-God instantly increased to the extreme, and the terrifying breath made the space tremble violently. A third eye gradually appeared in the Moon Stigmata on Sariel’s forehead, and a silver flame burned on his body. With a loud roar, the power of the Evil Pupil burst out with all his strength. Under this unparalleled pressure, cracks appeared in the entire space like broken glass. With the violent tremors, the cracks spread more and more. Finally, with a ‘bang’ sound, the entire golden space actually shattered.

1 blow shattered the entire independent space.

This was the terrifying power of the peak stage of the Pseudo-God. Python was not the direct target. The previous imprisoning power was equivalent to a kind of protection – Even so, it had caused her considerable damage. Her facial expression was pale.

After Sariel shattered the space, he was about to kill Python to take the silver box when he saw Python burst into laughter.

Sariel frowned, but the eruption did not stop at all. When he was about to approach Python, he was startled, because his strength was dropping sharply.

The decline in power was unstoppable as if he was affected by some kind of supreme rule, where even the peak stage of the Pseudo-God couldn’t resist! Sariel was utterly shocked: Why is this happening?!

Is it due to shattering the space?

Even if the golden space is shattered, it should be still in my [Moon Kingdom]…

No! This is actually not [Moon Kingdom]!

Sariel looked around in horror. What is this place?

And that’s… Aguile’s smashed body? No! Not corpses, but flies!

The flies merged and turned into a complete human form, which was the figure full of purple starlight. But the purple starlight disappeared immediately, and the armor gradually disappeared into the man’s body. Like Sariel, the breath of strength dropped suddenly below Pseudo-God.

“Python!” Sariel clenched his fists. “What did you do?!”

“Don’t you understand? It’s just a change of battlefield.”

“The Earth Badge! Beelzebub Royal Family!” Sariel glanced at Chen Rui next to Python. Although the mask was no longer on his face, Sariel recognized the [Demonic Flies Transformation] just now.

Chen Rui’s injuries were not light now. Not only because he was hit by Sariel’s [Doom Calamity] before, but more because Sariel shattered the space just now. That space was formed by the Tower of Glory!

The Tower of Glory had the ability of ‘kingdom merging’, which could fuse the kingdom to form a special life space. It could load a large number of life entities to freely transfer the space. In this state, Chen Rui and the Tower of Glory were integrated. Due to the space shattering, not only did this artifact suffer huge damage, but Chen Rui himself was also severely injured.

However, at this moment, in addition to the blood, there was a smile on his face.

Because the strategy had been successful.

This will be the key to turning the tide!

“The truth will be much more interesting than you think.” Python took a deep breath, and the power in her body began to channel rapidly. A faint black gas lingered around her body. The rapid erosion had greatly reduced the power of imprisonment, “But you won’t have the chance to touch many truths again, because this is where you will be buried!”

“No shame!” Sariel sneered coldly, “You think you can fool me with this trap? An intermediate stage of the Pseudo-God and an early stage of the Pseudo-God, I just need to move my finger…”

“Unfortunately,” Chen Rui began, “there is no Pseudo-God now; only Demi-God.”

“Demi-God?” Sariel snorted coldly while looking around secretly. He suddenly thought of something, and he was shocked, “Is this space… impossible!”

“You finally noticed it? Your reaction is really slow.” Python waved her hand lightly, removing the last trace of imprisoning power.

“How is it possible?!” Sariel’s face was full of disbelief, “How could this place be that… forbidden place! How could you have such power!”

The Ghastly Floating Land!

It rejected all powers above the Pseudo-God!

Sariel was in disbelief. Even he, in a special time period when the enchantment was the weakest, required a lot of effort to open this place, and he could only reach the outermost part of the Lost Land.

In less than a minute just now, Python took me to the Ghastly Floating Land near the core!

Even if Satan and I join forces, we can’t do it!

When did Python have this ability?!

“It’s not me, it’s him.” Python looked at Chen Rui, “Sir deliberately stopped you before, just to play hard to get you into the Tower of Glory. Then, he uses his special ability to bring you here. Actually, this plan is not considered impeccable, it’s just that you are too stupid.”

This was actually a trick within a trick. Using the silver box to bait Sariel to actively enter the Tower of Glory, then Chen Rui used kingdom merging to instantly enter the [Star Gate], bringing Sariel to the final battlefield.

In fact, the timing just now could be described as thrilling. Sariel’s response was very fast. When he found out that something was fishy, he immediately shattered the fusion kingdom space. If Chen Rui had not entered the Ghastly Floating Land one step earlier, all his efforts would be in vain.

Now, despite paying a high price, Sariel had finally been brought to the Ghastly Floating Land.

“It’s him?” Sariel was startled, then he was shocked by another thing, “You call him… sir? You’re willing to surrender to such a lowly powerful rat?”

“Are you curious? Just before your life is annihilated,” Python’s figure flashed and appeared in front of Sariel, “I may tell you the answer.”

Sariel was on guard, and his third eye flashed, “In the name of doom, curse you: Weak! Slow! Fear! Blind! Paralysis! Disease! Rot!”

This was the strongest [Doom Calamity 7 Chapters].

A sure death blow !

It was indeed the power of [Doom Calamity], but it was not the imaginary ‘might’. What it emitted could only be regarded as the power of ‘law’.

The power of [Doom Calamity] enveloped Python: Weak, Slow, Fear… Various debuff states were applied to Python at the same time. Python said a word without haste, “Deprivation!”

The space twisted for a while, and all the power of [Doom Calamity] receded like a tide. This time, instead of trying to solve it in [Moon Kingdom], she completely deprived the power of [Doom Calamity].

Because in this place, there was no absolute difference in the level of strength, and the 2 sides were back on the same starting line.

At the level of Demi-God, Sariel naturally couldn’t easily suppress Python.

Immediately afterward, Sariel felt that Python’s punching power was like some kind of sharp weapon, rushing toward his face. He quickly reached out to parry. Both were evenly matched.

The feeling of the sharp weapon instantly appeared under Sariel’s ribs. He had no time to be surprised as he blocked Python’s oncoming attack again. At the same time, with a flick of his body, he moved backward, narrowly dodging a kick to his crotch.

There was a sense of danger from behind again. Sariel turned around and caught the cone-like punch, “ Bang Bang Bang …” In the sound of high-speed blows, the 2 sides were at a standstill.

Facing Python’s ferocious attacks, Sariel was secretly shocked. How did this woman’s melee combat ability become so powerful? This is as if she is born with a terrifying fighting instinct. I remember that this was her weakness back then!

Light flashed on Python’s body, and Sariel felt the opponent’s speed as well as strength suddenly increased. The cone-like attacks instantly turned into countless rays of light. The trajectory could not be seen clearly.

The unique buff talent of the lamp spirits!

Sariel had a special [Doom Calamity] talent. If she applied a debuff to him, it was actually equivalent to giving him a buff. As a familiar old opponent, Python would naturally not make such a low level mistake.

Ceng! There was a trace of blood on Sariel’s cheek, followed by another 1, 2…

Python’s attack became more and more berserk. With a ‘boom’ sound, Sariel’s body moved back dozens of meters. When he stabilized his body, there were many bloodstains on his face and body, and several were gruesome blood holes. No one knew what kind of attack Python used to cause this wound.

Sariel’s eyes were fixed on Python, “I admit I have miscalculated. I am actually lured into such a place by you. However, this is just the Ghastly Floating Land, not the Chaos Realm. Although the space force is extremely powerful, it doesn’t mean I can’t leave! As long as I find the space node of the Blazing White Way and sacrifice a part of the origin power, I can open the Blazing White Way in an instant, return to the Lost Land, and then return to the Demon Realm from the Lost Land! “

Only then did Chen Rui know that Sariel actually had the ability to go directly from here to the ‘upper level’ Lost Land, and then from the Lost Land back to the entrance, which was the ancient magic tower of the Dark Shadow Empire. Of course, the price required was also substantial.

In fact, this was quite normal. If it weren’t for the entire mysterious location that limited the power of Pseudo-God and the massive risk, Sariel or Satan would have gotten the silver box in the Chaos Realm long ago.

Python said indifferently, “That’s right, but that not only requires a lot of origin power, but also a considerable amount of time. Are you sure we will give you this opportunity?”

“ Hmph Hmph … Dead people will not cause any hindrance.” Sariel let out a ghastly laughter as the wound on his body healed automatically in an instant as if he had never been injured, “So what if this is the Ghastly Floating Land? So what if the strength is only the peak stage of the Demi-God? Your biggest mistake is to underestimate my strength. Both of you are wounded, and my [Body of Moon Soul] is immortal and is the best at protracted battles! The winner in the end will only be me!”

TL: Who is underestimating who?

chapters.title: Chapter 1122: Collision Between Sub-Kingdoms
chapters.body:
Chapter 1122: Collision Between Sub-Kingdoms

“Not only that!” Sariel’s voice was full of absolute confidence, “Did you forget about the Moon Mirror? Although I’m here, it doesn’t stop! It is my kingdom avatar. Even if I’m here, it can also pass on the power of the devoured bloodline to me!”

Chen Rui was shocked that the space of the Ghastly Floating Land could not block the transmission of Moon Mirror.

Sariel laughed loudly while pointing his hand to the sky. The image of [Moon Kingdom] suddenly appeared in the space above, showing the solidified blue crystal image of Duoduo and Auglas. The outer edge had solidified into a sphere.

“As long as the Moon Mirror turned red completely, the dragon’s Pseudo-Godhood will be completely devoured and the little girl’s God’s descendant bloodline will be completely awakened. Her strength will directly enter the super-level, which will be the birth of a genius. Unfortunately, her glory is only for a brief moment, because Moon Mirror will completely absorb all her bloodline power and life force, and I, who have obtained these powers, will be greatly improved in strength. You will no longer be my opponents! Moreover, as soon as I leave here and go back to the Demon Realm to fully fuse and comprehend the true mysteries of the bloodline– even Satan will be trampled under my feet

Python was about to attack when Chen Rui’s deep voice sounded behind her, “Don’t interfere.”

Python noticed that the voice was a little different. When she turned around, she saw Chen Rui’s eyes. Even Python, who had a steadfast mind, couldn’t help but feel a chill in her mind. She had fought with Chen Rui several times, but this was the first time she saw this kind of gaze.

Full of rage, killing intent and even madness.

The glance was just a glimpse. In the blink of an eye, Chen Rui’s figure disappeared.

At the same time, Sariel’s mind was full of warning signs. Chen Rui had appeared in front of him. The speed far exceeded expectations. Before Sariel could react, his chest and abdomen were already hurt by his punch.

Although the punch didn’t penetrate Sariel’s body, the corresponding position on the back protruded, which showed how violent it was. Sariel’s body flew upside down. Before he could stabilize his weight, Chen Rui chased up. He launched a powerful knee attack and hit him into the air. Chen Rui’s figure appeared in the air with a flash, then he clasped his fists and slammed Sariel’s head with a heavy blow.

“ Bang! ” Sariel’s figure shot down like a meteor, and he was about to land on a floating island. Chen Rui’s figure flashed again, and 7 huge light balls suddenly appeared and exploded on Sariel’s side.

The entire island was immediately torn apart. The air was filled with a large cloud of smoke caused by the explosion.

This movement was quite big, but this was where the relatives and friends gathered at the Ghastly Floating Land for training. The wandering spirits in the vicinity had already been cleared, so there was no external interference.

In the smoke, a figure slowly floated out.

Sariel.

His body was full of terrifying scars with large pieces of mutilation on his shoulders, chest, and legs. If he was still at the peak stage of the Pseudo-God, then the [7-star Explosion] just now might not be able to hurt him in the slightest, but now, this move dealt a huge damage to Sariel.

The blood on Sariel’s body had flowed back, and the wounds were rapidly recovering. The mutilated body grew back instantly just like winding back the television screen.

This regeneration was not a simple restoration. Sariel’s power breath had not been depleted or weakened because of this.

This was [Body of Moon Soul].

Despite this, Sariel had put away his underestimation. He knew his strength had been suppressed to the level of Demi-God, but he had the fighting experience and means of peak stage Pseudo-God after all. Only Python could be regarded as a strong enemy. He didn’t expect that ‘Aguile’ was also a tough opponent, especially the speed was extremely terrifying. Though they were both at the peak stage of the Demi-God’s strength, his speed was close to the Pseudo-God level; even Sariel thought he was inferior to him.

The breath around him became extremely violent in an instant. Then, countless crimson giant beasts roared toward Sariel. Before they approached, he already felt the tearing destruction power. The next second, his whole person was engulfed by the Scorching Dragon Sea.

After surrounding the target and squirming for a long time, the crimson destruction light gradually extinguished. Sariel’s body turned to nothing with just some broken fragments that could be vaguely seen.

“It’s useless!” The fragments made a sound at the same time, and they soon gathered together to form Sariel’s body, “For the immortal [Body of Moon Soul], no matter how powerful your attack is, you cannot really hurt me nor exhaust my true strength.

“We are old rivals. I admit that your [Body of Moon Soul] is really extraordinary. I had suffered a few losses back then.” Python sneered, “However, there is no absolute thing in the world. I was not sure previously, but after entering your sub-kingdom today, I can finally be sure that the so-called ‘immortality’ should be related to the sub-kingdom. The energy consumed by the [Body of Moon Soul] will be relayed to the sub-kingdom with a special link and replenished by the sub-kingdom. As far as a Pseudo-God’s kingdom is concerned, it is indeed almost endless, but as long as your sub-kingdom is destroyed, you can only consume the limited power of Godhood. At that time, it is your death!”

Sariel was shocked. He knew Python’s eyesight and judgment, but he didn’t expect her to see through the mystery of his [Body of Moon Soul]. He immediately pointed to the sky image, “So what? The Moon Mirror has been activated, and the bloodline of the God’s descendant will soon be completely converted to my power! I can totally afford it, and you are lacking time!”

Just at this moment, the [Moon Kingdom] displayed suddenly had a change. In the kingdom, the distant mountain range suddenly shattered. Then, a light flashed. Everything around the mountain range was destroyed.

The source of the light was a dark cloud. Looking closely, it was a huge castle, suspended in the sky. The outer shell was faintly flickering with silver light, which made people feel shocked and overwhelmed at the same time.

“What is that? !” Sariel was taken aback. There was a bad premonition in his mind. How did this thing enter [Moon Kingdom]!

The huge castle moved unhurriedly, shooting hundreds of lights in a row. Wherever the light passed, the ground would collapse. The whole kingdom was trembling under the lights.

Star Ship!

This was another killing move of Chen Rui. He gave orders to the Star Ship lurking outside the Book Collection Hall before bringing Sariel to the Ghastly Floating Land.

The Star Ship was originally just a backup in case, but after learning about Duoduo’s situation, Chen Rui knew that he and Sariel were already in a life and death fight, so he did not hesitate to order the Star Ship to attack.

This metropolitan battleship of level 5 alchemy civilization finally showed its fangs for the first time. It directly invaded the fourth floor of the Book Collection Hall with unstoppable power, defeated all the defensive enchantments along the way and entered the core space for the [Moon Kingdom].

In a sense, the Star Ship was actually Chen Rui’s sub-kingdom. This battle was like the collision between 2 sub-kingdoms.

Due to the protection and isolation of the magic circle, the people of the Bloody Empire did not notice the arrival of the Star Ship, but the powerful attack force still caused an amazing tremor in the area. Fortunately, Tiffany had already ordered the residents to evacuate and explained in advance some kind of similar situation that might occur. As a result, the public only regarded it as a normal phenomenon triggered by the transformation of the Mechanic Association magic circle.

The arrival of the Star Ship alarmed all the guardians of [Moon Kingdom], and they all came together.

The Star Ship burst out powerful firepower, destroying the [Moon Kingdom] while dropping countless alchemy creatures to face the approaching kingdom guardians.

Sariel looked at the creatures who were fighting fiercely with the [Moon Kingdom] guardians, including huge beasts covered in crystals, floating veiled women, metal-mechine combatants, and giants releasing thunder and storm… Even for Sariel, it was his first time seeing such strange beings.

The number of alchemy creatures was astonishing. Not only the individual combat power was quite amazing, but they also formed a well-trained battle formation with double the lethality. Soon, the guardians of [Moon Kingdom] were completely suppressed.

Not only the ordinary combat power but the high-end combat power was also suppressed. In addition to strange super-level creatures, there were also several powerful dragons and some men and women of extraordinary strength (plus an onion that specialized in picking up weaklings). What caught Sariel’s attention the most were 2 women. A purple-haired lady in a robe with a stunning appearance, a pair of glasses, a crown, a star-lit armor, and a wand; the other black-haired woman was wearing similar armor with a veil covering her face.

These 2 women alone were able to withstand the 10 strongest Demi-God guardians in the [Moon Kingdom], including 3 peak stage of the Demi-Gods. With 2 vs 10, they still had the upper hand! 2 of the 10 people had already been severely injured. It seemed that the defeat was only a matter of time.
