“I don’t know either. I originally wanted a highly poisonous faith, but there is no faith source of highly poisonous. Instead, the plague flew over. I can feel that this ‘disease’ itself contains a highly poisonous power that will make my poison power even stronger. Hehe , no matter what, I’m a God now!”

Paglio smugly shook the [Armor of Faith] on his body, “Let Little Betty see my heroic style when I go out!”

“Fortunately, the helmet is not green.” Chen Rui nodded solemnly.

“Bastard, what did you say?” As the first friend who came into contact with Chen Rui, he already knew the meaning of this word.

“I mean… um , your heroic appearance was already fully revealed when you ran in a wooden barrel.” Chen Rui grinned.

“ Hmph! I’m in a good mood, so I won’t be bothered by you.” Paglio was in a really good mood now. Not only had the kingdom and faith been resolved, but he could also activate the Demi-God kingdom power and use the artifact, Thunder Flail, freely without having to exhaust the power of bloodline riskily as much as before.

“Come to think of it, your status doesn’t seem to have changed. You can’t beat Python, me nor Zola… By the way, Catherine’s small realm seems to be breaking through again, and Nirvana power has complete advantage over your poison, so you can’t beat her too.” Chen Rui counted, “You’re still in 5th place as usual.”

“I could easily beat you badly back then!” The poison dragon suddenly thought of something, “Speaking of Python… I am now a Plague God, and that madwoman told me not to be a burden at the [Moon Kingdom]. Up till now, she herself has not become a Goddess here. Next time I see her…”

“What are you going to do?” An indifferent voice came over, and Paglio shuddered. No way!

The voice appeared in front of him in an instant, “Go on, Master Paglio.”

A madwoman indeed!

In line with the principle that a good dragon does not suffer immediate losses, Paglio swallowed some harsh words with difficulty and put on a smile, “It turns out to be Ms. Python! I knew that you can always be one step ahead! I don’t know what god elder sister is? Beautiful Goddess? Wisdom Goddess?”

“Wisdom Goddess is Catherine, Python is Doom Calamity Goddess.” Veronica kindly explained.

Doom Calamity? It fits this ruthless madwoman! Master Poison Dragon slandered in his mind, but a surprised look appeared on his face.

“Sariel’s soul has the power of [Doom Calamity], but unfortunately I can’t use it. Now that I have the power of [Doom Calamity], I have another powerful might.” Python said indifferently, “Actually, I am not the fastest to comprehend the 2 -star evolution. In addition to Zola and Catherine who have been successful before, there is another one ahead of me.”

“Who is it?” Paglio was surprised again. He thought he could take third place, but unexpectedly Python appeared out of the blue. Now there was actually another person who was faster than Python, he was ranked fifth again.

“It’s me.” A familiar voice sounded next to Paglio.

“Isabella!” Master Poison Dragon was stunned. “How could you possibly be faster than us?”

Python said dismissively, “This is not unusual, I got 2-star evolution much later than you guys. Shame on you, Paglio! Yini is only at the Kingdom Level, and now she owns a kingdom and becomes a Goddess in this space. Her training path is smooth sailing. It’s only a matter of time before entering Demi-God. If you get complacent with a little achievement, you will soon be overtaken.”

“Demi-God… is still far away from me. In fact, Zola and I were the first to get the power of 2-star evolution. Coupled with Zola’s guidance, I somehow succeeded after getting the soul power given by Python, “Isabella laughed, “It’s just a coincidence. There is still a part of the soul power that I haven’t fully absorbed yet, so I have no choice but to work hard.”

Paglio knew that the so-called ‘Zola’s guidance’ was just an excuse. Yini was Little Betty’s best friend. It was obvious that she was saving his face for the sake of Little Betty. He shook and sighed, “All the good looking girls have been taken by the ugly<a h<=”” a=””>ref=”https://en.wiktionary.org/wiki/men”> men.”

Chen Rui rolled his eyes: This dead duck dragon. Isabella gave you face, you just need to appreciate it. Why go back to this sentence?

“By the way, Isabella, what Goddess are you?” Paglio asked curiously. Isabella was resourceful and scheming. She should be able to become a Goddess of the wisdom type, but Catherine was already Wisdom Goddess.

“Deceit Goddess. In charge of deception, lies, blackmail, and so on. There are too many good women around a guy. It’s easier to get attention if I turn bad.” Isabella smiled, “Actually… in my life, I died because of a lie, and I resurrected because of a lie. I’ve been swayed by deceit all my life, so I want to deceive others.”

Chen Rui felt the tenderness in those blue eyes, and his heart warmed. Isabella’s meaning was clear to him. The deception of the first death was that Eudora deceived the Breeze Shadow Boots, resulting in the tragic death of her family. She sank in hatred like a living dead. The second deception was that Chen Rui pretended to be ‘Charles’ and deceived her heart. The subsequent incidents of the Snow Dallet and the Breeze Shadow Boots completely untangled the dead knot in her heart and let her regain her true life.

“ Cheh , exchanging love glances. You think I don’t exist?” The poison dragon put away the [Armor of Faith], “By the way, why are you all here?”

“Similar to your current situation, a trace of our souls has been separated and merged with this world forever. It is like a connection that can transcend the limitations of space. For example, my main body is still sleeping in [Moon Kingdom], digesting Sariel’s power and kingdom. If my consciousness leaves, my soul is still here, but it is just unconsciously accepting the faith power back to the original body. As long as we get the permission of the controller, we can enter this world at any time through the connection of this soul. “

With that said, Python looked at the galaxy in the distance and sighed, “I didn’t know if the real Kingdom of God has this kind of power, but obviously, this world is very close to the Kingdom of God. Taking God conferring into account, maybe one day, there will be an existence beyond the Kingdom of God. Of course, now Chen Rui and us are far from being strong enough to be called ‘God’, so don’t carry the slightest self-confidence. This time of day, Yini, Zola and I will all enter the training ground for various kinds of training. Zola should be here soon. Although Catherine is busy with state affairs, she will also come to training from time to time. After you are familiar with the newly acquired power, you can also join the training. I will ‘guide’ you well.”

Hearing the last sentence, Paglio shuddered and muttered, “You want to take revenge on me again? Madwoman, I won’t…”

“What?” It was clearly the voice of Ms. Fairy Dragon, which startled Paglio again.

If there was anything worse than running into a terrifying madwoman, it was running into 2 terrifying madwomen at the same time. Master Poison Dragon unhesitatingly excused himself to familiarize himself with his newfound power, and he immediately withdrew his consciousness from the ‘world’.

chapters.title: Chapter 1130: Taboo! The Seventh Silver Box
chapters.body:
Chapter 1130: Taboo! The Seventh Silver Box

“Am I missing something?” Ms. Fairy Dragon asked innocently as Paglio faded away.

“No, you came at the right time.” Chen Rui smiled at Zola and turned his attention to Python. “Python, I have a question and I want to get the answer.”

“Sir, please ask.”

“How many days did the Originator use to create this world? You once told me that the Originator took 3 days to destroy everything that was originally, then another 3 days to create everything that is now. But, someone told me today that the Originator created the whole world in 7 days.”

“Just what someone told you?” When Chen Rui asked the question, Python’s eyes lit up a little, but when she heard the last sentence, her eyes dimmed again, seemingly disappointed.

“I wish to know the real answer.”

“It is said that the universe was originally chaotic. The Originator spent 3 days destroying everything that was not suitable for life, then he spent 3 days creating a big universe centered on this main plane.”

Chen Rui frowned. These words were no different from what she said before . Python’s tone changed, “In fact, there is another day between destruction and creation. That is between ‘nothing’ and ‘being’. It shows the supreme mystery of accommodating ‘being’ and ‘nothing’ at the same time.”

Being and nothing?

Chen Rui suddenly thought of the most famous Taoist classic book in his previous life, ‘Tao Te Ching’. There was a sentence at the beginning: ‘Nothing’ is called the beginning of heaven and earth; ‘being’ is called the mother of all things.

The way of being and nothing is the way to spy on the infinite mysteries of the universe.

Tao Te Ching should have nothing to do with this. But no matter which world or plane it is, some things are common.

“It turns out there is still such a day between 3 days and 3 days. It is really 7 days.” Chen Rui nodded slowly. Suddenly, he thought of something, and he was shocked, “That’s right, silver box!”

“Yes!” Python’s eyes brightened. “Sir’s response is quick. That’s why the silver box is called 1/2 and 1/7 of something. Many people know this rumor, but don’t understand the specific meaning. The so-called 1/2 refers to the complete destruction and creation origin respectively. This is the usual explanation and is understood by ordinary people with strength. However, most people do not know what the so-called 1/7 is—— There is actually a third party between creation and destruction. According to the number of silver boxes, the seventh silver box is a real taboo!”

“Taboo?” Chen Rui frowned, “Can’t you say it yet?”

Python shook her head, “Actually, in front of you, there’s nothing I can’t say. It’s just that you have to remember some things yourself.”

“Now I know what it means by ‘repeated rumors become a fact’. There are already many people who think that I’m ‘someone’. Even I, who has always believed that I’m not ‘that person’, am no longer sure whether I am ‘that person’ in this kind of influence. “Chen Rui shook his head, “However, if your judgment is only based on the 7 artifacts or this strange world of stars, then you may be really disappointed. No matter who I’m, I want to know what this so-called taboo is, instead of waiting eagerly for the so-called ‘memory recovery’. Python, please answer me. “

Python stared at him for a moment and sighed, “I’ll just say one thing. You should be able to guess the biggest taboo in this world that is kept secret by all top powerhouses.”

The biggest taboo? Chen Rui fell into contemplation. The Abyss? Or

Isabella, who had been listening, asked tentatively, “God?”

Chen Rui, whose mind was running at a high speed, suddenly thought of the huge ‘corpses’ in the Chaos Realm, and he blurted out, “Twilight of the Gods?”

Could it be that the seventh silver box or the supreme power between ‘being’ and ‘nothing’ caused the death or sleep of the gods?

Python didn’t answer, “Actually, I’m not sure whether this is the biggest secret.”

Chen Rui sighed, “You mean ‘I’ am the one who knows this best?”

“Yes.” This time, Python answered quite firmly, “Perhaps when you can fully control all the 7 artifacts, you will get the answer you want.”

“All the 7 artifacts?” Chen Rui pondered and said nothing. Among the current 7 artifacts, in the order of analysis, they are the God-Eating Mask, Sword of Fallen Angel, Wrath King Armor, Bloody Ring, Breeze Shadow Boots, and Illusive Demon Shield. These 6 pieces have been completely assimilated, and the last piece left is the Dark Shadow Cape, also known as the ‘Void Badge’.

For some reason, this one is a bit different from the previous 6. The progress of [Deep Analysis] is extremely slow.

Judging from the information revealed by Python, the 7 artifacts are likely to be related to the 7th most mysterious silver box? And the ‘master’ of the 7 artifacts is Chen Rui – To be precise, the misunderstood ‘someone’. If I connect this information…

The more Chen Rui thought about it, the more shocked he became.

Seeing that the expression on his face was constantly changing, Python interjected, “Until you have the corresponding strength, even knowing the truth is useless. Instead, you will be distracted by it. It is better to transfer this desire to the pursuit of strength.”

Chen Rui nodded. Python was right. Twilight of the Gods and the 7th silver box are all distant things. The most urgent thing is how to deal with the agreement between the 3 light archangels and Satan.

At this time, there are only more than 2 years left before Gabriel’s 3-year period. This will be the biggest test. Time waits for no one. I must comprehend the mystery of the Purple Pole Star Emperor as soon as possible and possess the strength to confront the peak stage of the Pseudo-God head-on.

“1 more thing; it’s about Athena’s child.” Python’s words immediately diverted everyone’s attention, especially Chen Rui.

Paglio couldn’t help but ask, “Does Athena’s child also have the bloodline of God?”

“The bloodline of God is not inherited by every child. I don’t know if that child has the bloodline of God, but I can basically confirm 1 thing now- Destruction.” Python looked at Chen Rui’s nervous expression, “Don’t worry, it’s not a bad thing. I mean this kid is born with a strong talent for destruction origin.”

“Destruction origin talent.” Zola mused, “In this way, the child’s training of attack power will be multiplied with half the effort. And the child may also have special talent skills.”

Isabella thought in a different direction than Zola. She immediately grasped another key point, “Why does Athena’s child have the gift of destruction origin? Does this have any direct connection with her pregnancy?”

When Python said this, Chen Rui remembered it and calculated the time of conception. It was exactly when he and Python reached an agreement to comprehend the complete destruction origin.

Python had already said the answer, “As we all know, the stronger the strength, the more difficult it is for a person to give birth to offspring. Even a human whose fertility rate is stronger than that of the demons cannot avoid this rule. With the strength of both of them, It is not easy to give birth to offspring. The reason why Athena is pregnant is directly related to the complete destruction origin that sir comprehends. It should be under the action of some mysterious power that the power of the destruction origin promotes the creation of the descendant. At the same time, it is also inheritable.”

It suddenly dawned upon Chen Rui. No wonder Athena suddenly became pregnant. It is actually the effect of the destruction origin!

“However, the inheritance of this origin is unique. If you want to give birth to other descendants, you can only rely on normal combination.”

“By the way, doesn’t Chen Rui still have a complete creation origin?” Isabella’s blue eyes flashed movingly. “Does this mean that at least 1 child with the gift of creation origin will be born?!”

As soon as these words came out, Zola’s eyes lit up.

Python smiled indifferently, “Theoretically, this is the case, but the reason Athena can get pregnant, of course, luck is one aspect. The most important thing is her own physique. She should be the most capable of carrying the power of the destruction origin. Creation origin also needs the corresponding bearing physique. Unfortunately, you don’t have this kind of physique.”

“Light-element physique?” Isabella responded immediately, then she showed a frustrated expression.

Light-element physique was common in the human world, but in this Demon Realm, especially in the harem troupe, there was no such thing. Even the holy relic of the Snow Dallet could only stimulate the power of the light element to cause mutation. It couldn’t really convert the completely opposite dark element physique into a light element.

Python emphasizes a sentence, “Accurately speaking, it is pure light-element physique. In fact, the destruction origin should not be compatible with the bloodline physique of 7 great royal families, so it chose the great demon body of pure dark element.”

The destruction origin is incompatible with the bloodline of the 7 great royal families? This sentence made Isabella ponder.

“Then, what about her?” Zola’s eyes turned to a person.

Veronica was taken aback, “Me?”

This time, all eyes turned to her.

“Veronica was originally a human, but unfortunately she is now a soul entity.” Python thought for a while, “If I use my secret technique to transfer her soul entity to another human body, it is theoretically feasible. But first, we need to find the best body. It is not an easy task to fit the light element body of her soul. Besides, my soul fusion secret technique can only ensure that the battle effectiveness will not be affected. As for the birth of a child, there is no guarantee.”

Isabella and Zola looked at each other and spoke up, “I think we can try it if there is a chance.”

Veronica was Chen Rui’s earliest first love, and she was amicable. Anyway, this relationship was already there. It was better than the guy who used the child as an excuse to go to the human world to mess with ladies.

“It’s getting farther and farther. This kind of thing, let’s talk about it later.” Chen Rui mediated.

Even Veronica, who had always been generous, couldn’t help blushing so much at this time. She immediately made an excuse, “Paglio has just become a God. I will go to see the status of the new Plague Temple and god statue, I’ll also select some oracles to represent him.”

Watching Veronica hurriedly disappear into the Tower of Faith, Zola and Isabella gave Chen Rui an implicit look as they followed Python toward the training ground.

How could Chen Rui not understand the meaning of the 2 madam wives’ gaze. He rubbed his temples, let out a long breath, and put the rest aside for now – Zola, Catherine, Isabella, Python, Paglio. Now there were 5 people who became a God/Goddess of the Super System. Not only their power and Chen Rui’s had been enhanced, but with the increase in the number of Gods of the Super System, he had also begun to vaguely feel a trace of the path.

Although it was impossible to describe what it was, Chen Rui had a hunch that this might be the key to completely mastering the [Pole Star Transformation] and even the entire 6-star enhancement.

chapters.title: Chapter 1131: Thoughts Of The Little Succubus
chapters.body:
Chapter 1131: Thoughts Of The Little Succubus

The peak stage of the Pseudo-God’s comprehension of faith was by no means achievable by an ordinary Kingdom level or Demi-God level powerhouse. For Paglio, who had reached the critical point of power, Sariel’s trace of soul power could be regarded as a catalyst for success. He smoothly completed the 2-star enhancement.

The soul power of the peak stage of the Pseudo-God was extremely powerful. 2-star enhancement did not mean the complete digestion of soul power. Take the poison dragon as an example. After reaching 2-star enhancement, he still hadn’t fully integrated the soul power. Fortunately, with Paglio’s completely stabilized Demi-God strength, coupled with the newly acquired Super System’s kingdom power, it wouldn’t take long to completely absorb this trace of soul power.

In contrast, although Isabella completed the 2-star enhancement earlier, because her realm had not yet reached the Demi-God, she could not exert the true power of faith and life, so it was more difficult for her to digest Sariel’s soul power than Paglio. The rest of the people who had not completed the 2-star enhancement were not to be mentioned.

However, as Python said, since Isabella had comprehended 2-star enhancement at this stage, the training to reach Demi-God would be a smooth road, especially the most difficult real kingdom and life problems at the Demi-God level were resolved in advance.

Paglio, who had completed the 2-star enhancement, was naturally proud. He always showed off his new [Armor of Faith] in front of everyone intentionally. Roman didn’t care at first, but when he heard that Isabella actually comprehended 2-star enhancement, and it was even before Paglio, he couldn’t sit still.

Madam Aunt has already set an example, surpassing Paglio with the Kingdomized strength and completing the 2-star enhancement ahead of schedule. As the Belphegor Royal Family, I naturally cannot hold back leader.

Chen Rui would go to the Holy Light Mountain in more than 2 years to face 3 powerful enemies who were equal to Sariel. In more than 9 years, he would duel Satan, who was even stronger than Sariel. Roman did not want to be a burden as said by Python. He and his 2 wives had all accepted the power of 2-star enhancement and the soul power of peak stage of the Pseudo-God. At least 1 of them must keep up with the pace of those in front. As a man and the leader’s best friend, I have absolute responsibility.

Chen Rui couldn’t help feeling a little guilty when he saw that Roman, uncharacteristically, didn’t go out to flirt with married women, but instead, he stayed in the training ground training all day. But when Delia gave him a thumbs up and Medilu sent a thank you letter on behalf of all the women in the Dark Moon, Chen Rui suddenly felt that he wasn’t doing enough for his female ‘compatriots’.

“Chen Rui, it’s time to eat.” The voice of the little succubus maid interrupted Chen Rui’s thoughts.

Chen Rui nodded, stood up, and looked at Kia who was a little listless. He stepped forward and held the hand of the little succubus, “Kia, are you alright?”

“I’m fine.”

The little succubus maid was obviously in a low mood recently. After learning that Athena’s pregnancy was due to the power of destruction origin and that creation origin could only be conceived by light-element physique, the little maid’s plan to be mommy had been completely crushed. Although she didn’t show much on the surface, Chen Rui could feel the depression from the bottom of her heart. He could no longer see the revitalized look that she used to take the lead in dancing the ‘pregnant dance’ every day.

“What are we eating today?” Chen Rui deliberately found a topic.

“Purple mushroom soup, cows steak, lettuce meatloaf, shredded potato, blue pumpkin sauce, coconut bread, red rice”

With the rapid development of the economy, the improvement of material living standards as well as the circulation and trade of commodities, the Demon Realm’s original relatively simple recipes had become rich and diverse. Many delicacies that were only qualified to be eaten by noble families were seen in the people’s homes.

Chen Rui naturally played a considerable ‘catalyzing’ role in it. The so-called ‘every art had specialization’. His cooking skills were no longer enough to this level. However, as the Royal Highness Prince Consort and the major shareholder of Princess Villa, he had naturally a large number of excellent chefs on hand. As long as he roughly said the food in memory, the top chefs would naturally imagine and create. Of course, due to various factors such as ingredients, a lot of things had changed a little bit. It had become a food with the characteristics of the Demon Realm.

The crops of the Demon Realm were mainly wheat and beans. Wheat was ground into flour to make bread. There were not many people who ate grains directly. Rice only became popular after Chen Rui’s magical land became popular, mainly because of the preference of his previous life.

“That’s all? Why hasn’t that kind of great tonic soup been available recently?” Chen Rui joked deliberately. That kind of soup was a derived product that went with the ‘pregnant dance’. It was a must-have every day that would make his little partner incomparably hard; the effect could be imagined.

“I didn’t make that anymore.” Kia lowered her eyes and bit her lip. “One more thing.”

“Let me guess first,” Chen Rui smiled slightly. “You want Joanna to be the secretary to take care of the government affairs for you so that you can train with Isabella and the others?”

Kia showed a surprised expression, “How do you know?”

“Silly, how can you hide your little actions from the man who watches you every day.” Chen Rui stroked the little succubus’ hair.

Kia sighed, “Am I very materialistic? Seeing that I can’t have a baby for you, then only I thought of training.”

“It’s not materialistic, it’s silly.” Chen Rui said seriously, “You think only training can help me? Every meal in the house is the result of your careful selection and cooking. Your cooking skills are far beyond me. This is the result of your dedication. You even gave up your favorite clothing design for this. You not only have to take care of everyone’s life, but also help Athena with government affairs, take care of her, take care of me, and take care of Duoduo. With you, I basically haven’t bothered about these trivial matters. I can concentrate on doing what I want to do, and I can fight with all my mind. You’re the most important woman standing behind me, and you are irreplaceable. “

Chen Rui’s remarks were not exaggerated. Compared with those women who fought side by side, Kia, who silently contributed behind his back, also moved him and cherished her.

Kia’s eyes suddenly turned red, and Chen Rui hugged her in his arms, “I feel extremely satisfied that such a good woman is willing to give birth to a child for me. It’s a pity that she actually said that she was ‘materialistic’. If it’s not silly, what is it?”

The succubus wrapped her arms around Chen Rui’s neck and buried her wet eyes in his chest. Her shoulders trembled slightly.

“Joanna has always been in charge of internal affairs and the economy. Her ability is obvious to all, and she is competent enough to be a secretary. Lead her to familiarize for a few days, then pass it all to her.”

“Do you agree with my training?” Kia raised her head with a surprise expression in her tearful eyes.

Chen Rui nodded, “Of course, you can actually do whatever you want. I will always support you, just like you have always supported me.”

“Awesome.” The little succubus was overjoyed, then she said awkwardly, “But my strength is too weak; I’m the worst one.”

“That’s because you have to take care of everyone, so you have no time and energy to calm down and train. In fact, your talent is quite good, especially spirit power. Also, you are good at fire and wind element power. If you take the path of a magician, with the auxiliary powers such as star conferring, black potions, and training ground, you can definitely improve your strength quickly. However, haste makes waste on the training road, so you must not rashly advance. Seek for Zola, Delia, and Isabella’s advice when you are free; they are experts in magic.”

“I see. In fact, I just unloaded the secretary’s burden, but I will continue to be responsible for everyone’s life.” The little succubus clenched her fists, sweeping away the previous decadence, “I will work hard, whether it is training or other. Even if I can’t be the top powerhouse, I have to be the top super chef.”

“You’re already a super chef, Ms. Kia.” Chen Rui stroked her hair. “Actually, even having a baby.”

“Have a baby?” The little succubus maid’s ears perked up.

Chen Rui kissed her cheek, leaned into her ear and said, “The power of destruction origin does play a role in Athena’s child, but it’s actually a bit of a trick, and it’s not the only way. According to Python’s speculation, we still have quite a chance using the formal way.”

Kia’s eyes lit up. The little knot that had been entangled in her heart was finally completely untied. A moving blush appeared on her face, “Understood.”

10 seconds later.

Chen Rui’s body trembled slightly as sweat oozed from his forehead, “ Erm , you ‘understood’ too quickly.”

It turned out that the little succubus’ hand had ‘understandably’ touched the lower part of his abdomen.

“Wait a minute! Isn’t it time to eat?” Chen Rui quickly held the hand of the little succubus, but the little succubus’ tongue licked his earlobe, and his hairs stood up.

“Small exercise before meals will help digestion.” The little goblin licked her delicate red lips and giggled while her fingers gently drew circles on his chest.

With just ‘side knocking’, somewhere in Chen Rui involuntarily had a physiological reaction. No doubt that succubus’s spirit talent was very fatal.

Chen Rui swallowed hard, and quickly said, “There’s not enough time now, Paglio and the others are still waiting in the yard for dinner, and Duoduo is also here. Let’s go to dinner first. Isn’t it Athena’s turn today? She’s closed-door training now. How about I come to see you at night?”

If I fall for the little succubus now, I will definitely be teased by the 2 scumbags outside. Besides, my precious daughter Duoduo is also here. Lalaria has a negative example due to the failure in her childhood education. It is better to pay attention to various aspects.

“That’s what you said.” Kia smiled and put away her talent for seduction and winked playfully. “I will wait for you in your favorite clothes at night. If you have any perverted little requests, I can also meet them.”

“What kind of perverted little request. Wasn’t it your initiative?” Chen Rui was speechless. The succubus family was the most proactive and the most open in some respects; it was even above the Asmodeus Royal Family. Certain patterns could indeed satisfy a man’s possessive desire to the greatest extent, but after all, it was only an occasional adjustment of taste.

“Is that so? I don’t remember.” The little succubus looked at him with the innocent look of a victim.

“Okay, I took the initiative, I’m not a good person.” Chen Rui was defeated. “ Uh , let’s go out to eat.”

“Wait a moment!”

“ Ah ?”

“I’ll make a great tonic soup first! You can come out later!”

“”

Seems like I am creating trouble for myself again. Chen Rui scratched his head and looked at the little succubus who had regained her fighting spirit, only to feel that his mood became lighter.

chapters.title: Chapter 1132: Mystery-Solver Lalaria
chapters.body:
Chapter 1132: Mystery-Solver Lalaria

After Kia decided to train, Zola specially tailored a training plan for her, majoring in fire and wind element magic. She would enter the training ground for meditation and training every day. The succubus’ spirit talent was quite good, and the speed of progress was commendable. Unfortunately, her starting point was too low. She was only the peak stage of the Great Demon King, ready to break through to the Demon Emperor.

In addition to training, Kia continued to be responsible for food and taking care of everyone’s life. Compared with before, her life was actually more difficult, but the succubus felt more fulfilled and happier. She would still lead everyone to dance together at a fixed time every day.

With Kia’s strength and progress, it was unknown when she would complete the 2-star enhancement. However, Chen Rui felt that the help and motivation she brought to him now exceeded the 2-star enhancement in a sense.

Roman, Delia, Medilu and others were all working hard, but Olypheus had the most visible effect.

Under the suggestion of Isabella, Chen Rui specially established an ‘advancement reward fund’ for a certain chick. Every time a small realm was broken through, she would be rewarded with 50,000 black crystal coins whereas breaking through the big realm would yield 500,000 black crystal coins. Successfully completing 2-star enhancement would yield 1 million black crystal coins.

As soon as this reward fund was introduced, Ms. Black Dragon’s eyes turned green. She stayed in the training ground for 3 days without coming out. When she came out, she was already at an intermediate stage of Kingdom Level.

In fact, in the ‘treasure hunt’ of the Dead Sea, Olypheus and Lalaria both experienced unimaginable and dangerous battles. Although they were eventually captured, they also accumulated a lot of experience. Now they had settled down, so it was within expectation that they successfully broke through the small realm.

Seeing Ms. Black Dragon proudly pocketing 50,000 black crystal coins, Dodo’s eyes turned green too. At this time, there was less than half of the 6-month deadline for the soul power to recoil. Originally, the slime was cautious every day, but he had a fluke mentality. He just went on like this for more than 3 months. Now when he saw that Olypheus actually took 50,000 solid black crystal coins, Dodo gritted his teeth and became really determined. He followed Olypheus into the training ground every day and stayed there for a few days. When he came out, he was like a starving ghost, eating and drinking desperately. Then, he would go in again. The cycle was repeated.

It seemed that not only would there be brave chick under the heavy reward, but also brave slime. Even if Dodo couldn’t complete the 2-star enhancement, at least there would be a breakthrough in strength.

In contrast, the most depressing one was Lalaria. Originally, Paglio was just a trash fish in her eyes, and she could step on him at will. Now Paglio’s strength had grown by leaps and bounds. She actually couldn’t beat him now!

In fact, Paglio, who was the Plague God, now had the solar system faith power of the Poison Dragon Constellation’, plus the star armor that surpassed the ordinary [Armor of Faith], Lalaria was indeed not an opponent.

What’s more, Paglio also had the Thunder Flail.

For Lalaria, the surprise didn’t stop there. Her qualifications were top-notch in the whole of Dragon Island, especially after being promoted to Demi-God from Kingdom Level a few years ago. Even the elders who strongly despised Lala Loli’s sexual orientation also had to admit the talent of this lesbian dragon. However, after arriving here, Lalaria found herself becoming the slowest person to progress. Having a high starting point was not an excuse to comfort herself. Thinking back to the Bloody Empire’s martial battle competition, Catherine and Zola were only at the Kingdom Level, which were far below her. In just a few years, both Catherine and Zola reached the peak stage of the Demi-God, yet she was still lingering on the early stage of the Demi-God.

Even the power of Roman and Isabella advanced very quickly, which was unbelievable.

It’s all because of that human! That human’s current strength is stronger than the Old Dragon Emperor!

In addition to the known black potions, he should have more secrets, such as the terrifying giant castle in [Moon Kingdom] last time, countless strange creatures…

At present, Zola and others have taken the lead, while the few people behind Kingdom Level are increasing their strength step by step at an unbelievable speed. It is only a matter of time before I am surpassed.

Lalaria couldn’t accept this fact, but she wouldn’t take the initiative to ask Chen Rui. The flat-chested loli was actually very prideful. She had always kept her promise and made clear distinctions of grace and grudge. However, in front of this man, she suffered several losses. From being defeated at the beginning, to the failure of the post-martial battle competition, to the rescue at the Dead Sea, she owed several favors and had never been able to repay. That was the reason why she stayed there shamelessly. Yet now, the repayment plan had not yet succeeded, and her father Dragon Emperor was rescued once again. Her debt was never-ending.

Although the human emphasized that there was no need to calculate too much between friends, Lala Loli didn’t think so. Owing favor was only 1 aspect, Lala Loli’s real purpose was the peerless beauties in the human harem. She coveted each one of them, but unfortunately, she could not seduce them due to the favor owed. Once the debt is paid off, I can, hohohohoho…

Although it was inconvenient to ask for the ‘creditor’, treasure hunting and mystery solving had always been one of Lalaria’s hobbies as a giant dragon, so instead of being discouraged, it aroused her strong interest.

The first target of inquiry was her ‘younger sister’, Olypheus.

Although the daughter of her father should be called ‘elder sister’ in terms of age (the weight was not as heavy as Isabella), Ms. Black Dragon still insisted on the conduct of the bodyguard. She did not help relatives and refused to reveal the boss’ secret. However, Lalaria was very aware of the characteristics of this sister, so a rare gem made Ms. Black Dragon’s morale value pulled to a negative value.

Lala Loli learned from Ms. Black Dragon that the special training ground that Olypheus and the others entered was different from what she could enter. Olypheus could enjoy the highest time law of 1:500, and there was no time limit. After eating that kind of faith fruit, Lalaria could only use the time law of 1:100 at most, and she could only train for 1 hour in real time every day.

In fact, this was the difference between the Super System link targets and non-link targets. Non-linkers could only enter the training ground projection after redeeming the faith fruit from the exchange center. Not only was there a time limit, but the time law with the highest authority also could not be used. If she could successfully complete the 2-star enhancement to get the Goddess position, she could also use the original training ground in the Galaxy Divinity Temple. The time was up to 1:1000.

There is even such a secret! Lala Loli’s teeth were itchy – The effect of this difference alone is quite obvious. I was even ecstatic because of this 1 hour.

When Lala Loli asked the reason, Ms. Black Dragon, who felt a little sorry for the boss (actually because she was afraid of canceling the advancement reward fund), said vaguely, “Boss has a Star Conferring Platform, which can make you a concubine and get a special strength!”

Concubine? The rather obvious word made Lalaria frown.

The second person Lalaria asked was Adeline, a good friend who had been through adversity with her. Compared with Olypheus, Adeline was obviously better at keeping secrets. She just shook her head to show that she didn’t know. In fact, considering the danger last time, Chen Rui had given her the power of 1-star enhancement and 2-star enhancement in order to keep her in the Star Conferring Platform in a critical moment. However, without the permission of Chen Rui, Adeline felt it was inappropriate to reveal this secret.

Adeline’s strength was too weak, and Lalaria did not doubt it. When she asked Delia, Delia only said, “You should ask Chen Rui himself.”

You aren’t helpful at all … At this time, Paglio, who was also a dragon, extended a helping hand of ‘friendship’.

“That guy has this very bastard ability to enhance the powers of women by… with them. Hmph Hmph , you know.”

Lalaria revealed a suspicious expression, “Then you have an affair with him to get where you are now? It seems that you sacrificed a lot.”

Paglio almost choked out with a mouthful of wine, and Roman on the side said in time, “Lalaria, since we are so familiar, I’ll just say it straight. That guy has a different liking than yours. He only has women in his eyes. You see how many beauties he has gotten? His greatest ability is to do that with women, greatly enhancing their power in this way… Haven’t you noticed? All his women’s strength advanced faster than us friends. The most prominent are Zola and Catherine.”

The last sentence was particularly convincing. Lalaria couldn’t help but nodded and looked at Paglio again, “However, why did Paglio advance to Demi-God already?”

“I advance to Demi-God…” The poison dragon rolled his eyes, “mainly because of the power left by my damn dead father. That guy is the brother of the Dragon Emperor of the human world. I went to the human world with Chen Rui last time and he left me with this artifact, Thunder Flail, as well.”

Lalaria had experienced the power of the. She looked at the artifact in the hands of the poison dragon and finally nodded.

Paglio grinned, “Don’t you owe him a favor? Just take this opportunity to pay him back; you can kill 2 birds with 1 stone.”

“Go pick up your soap!” Lala Loli gave the poison dragon a disdainful look, then she turned around and left.

Seeing the figure of Lala Loli walking away angrily, the 2 scumbags, who were afraid that the world would not be chaotic, looked and sneered at each other as they clinked their glasses.

Although the poison dragon and Roman’s words were persuasive, Lalaria was not entirely convinced. The last target she found was Chen Rui’s woman, Kia.

In the harem troupe, Lalaria had the best personal relationship with the little succubus who was good at fashion design and food. The most satisfying men’s clothing on her body was the result of Kia’s own design.

“Kia… can I ask you. Uh , does Chen Rui increase your power when he does that kind of thing with you?”

Kia was taken aback. The [Dual Training] thing is the harem troupe’s privacy. Even Delia and the others don’t know. How did Lalaria know?

Lalaria was not an ignorant chick like Olypheus. Although Kia hesitated to give an accurate answer, her flickering look betrayed the truth. What Paglio and Roman said was actually true!

Paglio’s words echoed in her ears, and Lala Loli’s eyes burned with raging flames. Repay the debt! Become stronger! Beauty harem!

By the way, it can make the old man not have to worry about it. Kill 4 birds with 1 stone! I… I am really a genius! Oh hohohoho…

As for that sacrifice, I’ll take it as being bitten by a dog!

TL: A mad dog is coming for Chen Rui, rip…

chapters.title: Chapter 1133: Little Roman’S Personal Training Consultant
chapters.body:
Chapter 1133: Little Roman’S Personal Training Consultant

“ Wow ! Wow ! Help! Madam Aunt!”

“ Hey , sly human! I give up! Get this crazy guy away!”

The ground trembled, and a violent explosion occurred.

Although there was an anxious shouting, Chen Rui looked at Isabella next to him and smiled very calmly. He opened his mouth to take a piece of bacon fed by the little succubus maid and clinked a glass with Zola.

Ms. Fairy Dragon confirmed the stability of the nearby magical protection enchantment and said 2 numbers, “5, 6.”

Isabella’s blue eyes flashed, and she shook her head, “2, 7.”

“0, 9.” Kia said confidently.

A lightning-like figure shuttled rapidly. Roman’s [Flash] talent had been improved to the extreme. He even used some a secret technique to increase the limit. Unfortunately, he still couldn’t get rid of the figure who was chasing like a shadow behind him. After a few turns, Roman’s speed just slowed down a little, and he was already knocked flying out like a kite with a broken string. He fell and gnawed at the mud.

This blow was definitely not light, but it was not fatal. It just completely crushed all the strength of Student Nephew, rendering him immobile for a while.

After defeating Roman, the graceful figure did not stop. She charged toward Paglio who fled in the other direction with a more berserk momentum.

Paglio shuddered. The star armor of the ‘Poison Dragon Constellation’ suddenly appeared on his body. A powerful force evaporated from his fist as he turned around and hit the oncoming figure.

That figure was tall, handsome and moving, wearing a female version of [Armor of Faith]. She was the young girl version… Uh , to be precise, it was Lalaria in level 1 berserk state.

The whistling fist momentum mixed with violent poison poured toward Lalaria. Lalaria didn’t avoid it. Her figure instantly changed from a young girl to a hotter elder sister. She had activated the highest level 2 berserk talent and punched in return.

The magic enchantment around Chen Rui trembled for a while before calming down. This enchantment was not to protect the environment, but to prevent the battle of several people from affecting the 4 spectators.

The figures of Paglio and Lalaria separated at the same time. They seemed to be on par. However, Lalaria, who had activated the highest berserk state, had a greater advantage in regaining power. Before the poison dragon stood firm, Lalaria had stabilized her body. With a tap of her foot, she appeared in front of Paglio in an instant.

The energy condensed by the elder sister’s right fist turned into the giant dragon claw, and a veritable rising dragon fist launched Paglio’s into the air. Even if the poison dragon had star armor, he was also dazed by this heavy blow. Lalaria’s figure caught up with the poison dragon in mid-air in a blink of an eye. A series of ‘flat meteor punch’ almost blasted Master Poison Dragon into briquettes – if there was no star protection.

If it was more than a month ago, even if Lalaria activated the highest-level berserk transformation, coupled with the talent of [Spiritual Demonic Eyes], she would not be able to force Paglio to this level. However, at this time and place now, even if Paglio had the poison dragon star armor that surpassed the ordinary [Armor of Faith], he could no longer suppress Lalaria. Instead, the opponent sought the opportunity to give him a heavy blow.

This was in the projection training ground.

Due to the special rule, the poison dragon could not use Thunder Flail. They both possessed the buffs of the black potions, the purifying power of 1-star enhancement, the power of star conferring and other auxiliary powers. Nonetheless, Paglio had lost his previous absolute advantage against Lalaria, whose realm was slightly higher than his.

The most important thing was that Master Poison Dragon had a guilty conscience, and Lala Loli was desperate because of rage. When 2 powerhouses met, the brave one would win. Therefore, it was reasonable for Paglio to be beaten now.

Let’s rewind it to one month ago.

When Chen Rui was taking his precious daughter to the street, he instinctively sensed that someone was following him.

When he hid his breath and became a counter-stalker, he found that the stalker was actually Lalaria.

This was just the beginning.

Then Lalaria behaved more and more abnormally. Stalking, peeping… and so on.

This peeping was actually peeking at his bath.

If it was a girl peeking at Chen Rui taking a bath, it would be fine, but it was this Lala Loli who only had a liking for females!

There is definitely a problem. Something is fishy!

Finally 1 day, Lalaria stormed into Chen Rui’s bedroom.

“I’ve decided! Repay the debt with my body!”

Chen Rui was stunned by this majestic and decisive remark.

Also stunned were Isabella and Kia in Chen Rui’s arms.

Then Lala Loli took a leap and lay on the big bed with her limbs stretched out.

“Come on, I owe you once in the duel, once in the martial battle competition, 5 times for 5 people’s lives in the Dead Sea, and once for the Old Dragon Emperor. A total of 8!”

Chen Rui and his 2 wives looked at each other speechlessly.

Dedication of body?

If it were anyone else, Isabella and Kia would definitely suspect that a certain guy was messing around with ladies again, but this chick was too unscientific…

Chen Rui’s eyes were full of confusion- Okay, you said that you will repay with your body, but why did you choose to rush in when I am about to have sex with my wives?

If you’re dedicating your body… what’s with the hedgehog-like armor that you are wearing in your clothes?

Also, that hand, why is it even touching Kia’s buttocks on purpose?

“ Hey , stop your perverted hand!” Chen Rui speechlessly caught Lalaria’s indecent thief hand on the succubus maid’s buttocks – Even woman is not allowed to molest my wives, let alone in front of me!

In fact, this was also a bit unfair to Lalaria. The flat-chested loli really did not intend to molest. It was just a habitual action caused by excessive tension.

Unexpectedly, when he grabbed Lalaria, Lala Loli’s hair suddenly stood up. The initially stretched out limbs instantly turned into a straight stick.

“I… I am molested by a stinky man!”

In the previous battle and the rescue in the Dead Sea, Chen Rui had much more contact with her than this, but at this moment Lalaria, was extremely tense. She suddenly screamed while turning into a huge black dragon.

Boom!

Under Chen Rui’s stunned gaze, half of the whole room was collapsed by the transformed black dragon.

After finally cleaning up the mess, Chen Rui finally figured out that the whole incident was under Isabella’s patient inquiry.

After all, it was caused by the dragon’s self-esteem, especially the forced fiancee’s identity. In fact, at this level, he and Lalaria were at least friends who shared weal and woe. Although this loli had a problem with sexual orientation, she was not bad. If she was really willing to ‘join’, she could be considered a strong comrade-in-arms. The reason for such a misunderstanding was because of the 2 bastards, Paglio and Roman.

“Do you really want to join? Your future training path will be fixed because of this.”

“Are you reluctant to give up those powers? Or do you want me to pay something? Hmph Hmph! Even if we really want to have sex, I will give in. 9 times including this time; you can come and get it at any time. I can keep my word in addition to sincerity!”

Chen Rui rolled his eyes. When you said ‘sincerity’, can you not look at Isabella?

Could that wicked and lusty gaze not stare at Isabella’s chest?

Also, can you keep your words ‘just like being bitten by a dog’ in your mind instead of saying it?

…

In the end, it was Madam Aunt who launched the expert diplomacy and invited Lalaria to join the team. The arrogant flat-chested loli dragon was able to excuse herself from the incident and got the real buff power as she wished.

After receiving a full set of black potions and 1-star enhancement power, plus a month of 1-star enhancement training, Lalaria’s foundation and realm were more consolidated. Following that, she got the title of star conferring, which made her even more powerful. She also digested most of Sariel’s soul power.

After gaining the power, the first thing Lalaria did was to chase down Roman and Paglio who schemed her. After a round of runaway, she almost destroyed the entire yard. Later, Chen Rui came out to make peace. They would be in an armistice on the usual day. Every 3 days, they would go to the training ground to carry out ‘versus training’. They could revenge by then.

Bang bang bang…

“I can’t. I admit defeat!” In the sound of the onslaught, the dire Master Poison Dragon finally fell to the ground like a dead dog, looking exhausted: These days, I can’t afford to offend a desperate maniac. I am so handsome that I am envied by the God; I actually provoked 3 madwomen!

“ Hmph …” Lalaria didn’t launch another fatal blow. Instead, she slowly changed from the elder sister back to young girl, and from young girl back to loli, gasping for breath. As she activated the strongest berserk talent, her consumption just now was also very large. Fortunately, the rules of this training ground were very strange, there was no recoil like in real battles, but she could no longer use berserk for the time being.

“7 minutes and 32 seconds.” Isabella looked at the timer. “The last digit is 2, I won!”

Ms. Fairy Dragon and the little succubus maid sighed together, looking a little frustrated. Zola snapped her finger to cancel the surrounding magic enchantment.

“Athena’s time tonight is mine.” Isabella pursed her lips and smiled, winking at a certain person who was the betting target and could only smirk along.

Madam Aunt then got up, came to Roman’s side, and asked with concern, “Little Roman, are you alright?”

Roman almost didn’t even have the strength to speak. He forced a smile on his face – As a powerful kingdomized person, it was quite amazing to be able to escape several times under Lalaria’s attack.

“Your speed is now more than twice as fast as when you were insta-killed by Lalaria for the first time. Your strength has also increased a lot. The effect of this ‘special training’ seems to be quite obvious… After a dozen more times, not only can you break through the existing realm of strength, you can even completely absorb Sariel’s soul power. If it is repeated a few hundred times, I believe that 2-star enhancement will not be a problem.”

Roman’s smile suddenly froze on his face. Apparently, he forgot that his aunt had the title of ‘Deceit Goddess’. Isabella smiled at Lalaria, “Lalaria, our family’s Little Roman’s training will depend on you in the future.”

Lalaria had a very good impression of Isabella not only due to her beauty. She always remembered Isabella’s favor last time when she helped to convince in order for her to accept the power. Her bared her fangs with a smile, “Don’t worry, from now on, I am his personal training consultant.”

“Wait a minute…” Roman desperately wanted to stop Madam Aunt’s entrustment, but the personal training consultant stepped on his chest, choking him from speaking.

“Don’t worry, if anything happens to you, I will take good care of Delia and Medilu for you. Oh Hohohohoho …”

Roman fainted right away.

chapters.title: Chapter 1134: Guests
chapters.body:
Chapter 1134: Guests

When Lalaria’s rampage finally subsided, the Dark Moon’s madam lord also completed her closed-door training.

This time, Athena’s originally flat belly became bigger. She finally looked like a pregnant woman. Her strength unexpectedly went directly from the peak stage of the Demon Emperor to the peak stage of the Demon Overlord.

Not only that, the territory owned by Athena actually revealed a powerful breath similar to the kingdom, which was like the destruction power. This meant that Athena’s future entry to the super-level should be fairly easy.

Obviously, this was not entirely due to her own strength. The child that was being conceived should have played a very crucial role. Although Python had said before that Athena’s child had extraordinary talents, Chen Rui couldn’t help but marvel when he saw Athena’s advancement with his own eyes. This was precisely ‘mother is more expensive because of the child’. Catherine had a deep understanding of this at the beginning. Duoduo was definitely the biggest factor for the Dark Shadow Empire’s Her Majesty Empress to have today’s strength.

Generally speaking, the stronger the parent’s strength, the greater the strength and potential of the child. Athena’s children had an extremely rare talent of destruction origin. In turn, the child could strengthen Athena, the mother, so that the child could be born in the strongest state. This was an instinct.

Athena’s pregnancy was different from that of Catherine. Duoduo’s soul was originally mature. She was just born with the blood and power of Catherine while Athena’s child was truly from scratch. Therefore, as the child’s pregnancy progressed, Athena’s power might be further enhanced.

“Actually, it doesn’t matter how strong the child is as long as he (she) is healthy and happy.” Athena touched her slightly bulging and smooth belly. There was a loving expression in her eyes, and that motherly expression made Chen Rui stunned.

“You’re right.” Chen Rui leaned down and put his ear on Athena’s stomach as he felt the still weak life, “Little guy, be healthy and happy with mommy.”

Athena stroked her lover’s hair and smiled tenderly.

“Thank you for your hard work, Athena.” Chen Rui got up and kissed her cheek.

“It’s not hard, I just feel very happy. What are you thinking?”

“I was reminiscing when we first met.” Chen Rui sat down with her body in his arm, “That violent female demon, and that poor burr puzzle.”

Athena rolled her eyes at him angrily, and Chen Rui grinned, “However, I didn’t even think that the valiant, generous and beautiful female swordsman back then would become my beloved little wife; the mommy of my future child. “

Athena looked up into his eyes, and there was an inescapable affection in them.

“Zola and the others have said that these days belong to you.”

This sentence completely induced a passionate war. Athena raised her head, and her red lips took the initiative to kiss Chen Rui’s mouth. While their lips and tongues were intertwined, their breathing began to become rapid as they slowly fell on the bed.

Pregnant female physiques were much more sensitive and prone to emotions. Athena’s pregnancy period was different from that of ordinary humans. It would take at least a few years for the child to be born, so there was no prohibition of abstinence during this period. Of course, compared to the general period, she definitely had to be more careful.

After the closed-door training for such a long time, it was difficult to restrain oneself when one was in love now.

Chen Rui fully activated the “unclothing” attribute that every man should have, opened the hole with ease, and grasped the plumps. Due to pregnancy, the plumps were actually one size bigger. The color of the buds became a little darker, and the rings were several times larger. It had a unique charm.

Before too much teasing, Athena was already paralyzed as soft as mud. The horny mood was flooding uncontrollably. Soon, the room was filled with a lustful sound that made people flush.

Athena, who was a little sleepy because of physique, woke up just before noon the next day. The little maid with a mischievous face walked in. While helping to clean the sheets, she asked, “Do you want help tonight?” Even if the female lord was always bold, she couldn’t help but blush.

However, at lunch, the friends in the harem stopped joking about Athena, because the palace welcomed 2 guests.

Earth Elemental King Moore and Dark Elemental King Hegel.

In the battle of Water Elemental King Lambost against Despair Main Altar, the elemental heart was damaged and solidified into an ice sculpture. Chen Rui wanted to immediately go to Mountain Xilang’s Earth Realm and tell Earth Elemental King Moore the news, but because he was eager to take Duoduo to the human world to treat the ‘cold disease’. As a result, he did not go to Mountain Xilang in person, but asked the legion commander Tim of Walan Fortress to hand a magic crystal over to Moore. In the magic crystal was the battle experience of Despair Main Altar told by Chen Rui, as well as the coordinates of the sea area where Lambost turned into an ice sculpture.

Later, after Chen Rui returned from the human world, he wanted to go to the Earth Realm again, but he received a report from Tim that the Earth Elemental King had left the Earth Realm. Chen Rui guessed that Moore was probably looking for the Dark Elemental King. No doubt today the 2 kings came to the Dark Moon together.

Earth Elemental King Moore was Chen Rui’s old friend, and Dark Elemental King Hegel was no stranger to the people here, especially Paglio, who had a battle with Hegel back then. Times had changed. The mortal enemy back then was now a guest.

“It turns out that the last time you went to the human world and saw the 3 Kings of Light, you actually set a 3-year agreement with Gabriel.” Moore was thoughtful after hearing Chen Rui briefly describe his experiences in the Blazing Flame Hall and the Black Prison Desert.

“Your strength growth is really amazing.” Hegel’s eyes flashed a cold light, “Not only you but also your fellow companions. It seems that some of your consciousness has awakened.”

Chen Rui remembered that when he defeated the Holy Dragon Rodriguez in the Despair Land under the sea, he exposed the secret of being able to control 2 of the 7 artifacts in front of the 3 Kings of Darkness. At that time, Hegel gave him a piece of advice: Before fully integrating all the 7 artifacts, don’t disclose this matter in front of anyone or you will encounter an unimaginable horror disaster.

It turned out that at that time, Hegel had vaguely realized that he might be ‘someone’.

“I don’t have the so-called ‘awakening’. I may be different from someone you imagine.” Chen Rui shook his head, “I don’t think this should be the topic we are going to discuss today.”

“Of course, my friend.” Moore nodded.

“Whether you are or not, when your strength is qualified, I don’t mind using the true strength of dark elements to fight with you in an upright manner.” Hegel sneered, “I have never been your friend, even Moore may also become your mortal enemy in the future.”

“Hegel!” Moore revealed a rare stern tone. “He is my friend, not only the Earth Elemental King but also a friend recognized by the Earth Elemental Messenger.”

“When did you become so indecisive?” Hegel said with a hint of contempt in his icy voice. “You know it! Sooner or later… both you and he will face a fateful decision.”

“Even Gods can’t fully grasp the trajectory of fate. Otherwise, there will be no catastrophe. No one can predict what the future will be like.” Moore said lightly, “I just want to try to grasp my own destiny. Even if I fails before some kind of future or annihilation comes.”

Hegel was silent for a moment. There was no disdain in his eyes, “You’re more courageous than me, or more foolish.”

Moore raised the wine cup, to Hegel, to Chen Rui and others, “To the fools.”

Chen Rui faintly heard some thrilling secrets from the argument between the 2 Elemental Kings just now, but Moore’s words moved him secretly. He raised the wine cup, “No matter what the future is… Cheers to now.”

Everyone raised their glasses one after another. Hegel raised his glass coldly and took a sip, “ Hmph! A boring liquid. Apart from a little diluted Fountain of Vitality, it has no practical value.”

Chen Rui knew this guy’s annoying temper. In fact, he had heard such comments from Moore and Lambost before. He laughed disapprovingly and raised his glass again, “To complaints.”

When it comes to complaining skills, Hegel was much worse than the little mermaid princess.

Except for the 2 Elemental Kings, the friends toasted and drank. The atmosphere suddenly became a lot more chill.

“About the premonition of the crisis that the 3 Kings of Light said…” Moore said solemnly, “I, Lambost, and Hegel also feel the same. Before you went to the Dead Sea, the 3 Kings of Darkness met for this issue. Now you said that 3 Kings of Light has the same hunch, then it can be ascertained that this is a warning for all elementals. I’m afraid it’s not an illusion.”

“Is it the Abyss?” Chen Rui clenched his fists slightly, “After destroying the 3 main altars, we still can’t stop the power of the Abyss?”

“If at the very beginning of the Abyss Calamity, being able to directly destroy the 3 main altars would be almost equivalent to completely cutting off the source of the Abyss’ access to the main plane, but after so many years, the impact of the Abyss has gradually eroded into many corners of this main plane. Even if you destroyed the 3 main altars and some other possible passages, there are more hidden passages.”

Moore paused, and his eyes became more distant, “Those unknown ones, and even the whole future… no one can predict what will happen.”

“Actually, the Elemental Kings’ sense of crisis should have no direct connection with the Abyss.” Hegel also said, “This kind of vision is too one-sided.”

There is no direct connection between the Abyss and the warning signs of the Elemental Kings? Chen Rui frowned and asked tentatively, “Is the Abyss sealed by the power of the original bodies of the Elemental Ki… Elemental Messengers?”

“Who told you that?” Even Moore shook his head.

Chen Rui was taken aback. Isn’t it? I remember the 3 Kings of Light said with great certainty that the Abyss’ main seal is no problem for the time being. Oh, the 3 kings only said that they could sense that the seal of the Abyss was fine, but they did not admit that the Abyss was sealed by the Elemental Kings.

Moore changed the subject, “We’re here today for 1 important thing.”

Chen Rui nodded, “We are friends, please tell me if you have anything.”

“We aren’t looking for you.” Hegel’s eyes turned to Chen Rui’s side, “We’re looking for her.”

Chen Rui frowned. The ‘her’ Hegel said was none other than Ms. Fairy Dragon.

chapters.title: Chapter 1135: Decided
chapters.body:
Chapter 1135: Decided

Note: Changing Element Goddess Crown to Elemental Goddess Crown

“Me?” Zola herself was surprised.

“Of course it’s you, the person recognized by the Elemental Goddess Crown.” Hegel said the key point in 1 sentence.

The Elemental Goddess Crown? Chen Rui’s brows furrowed even tighter. This artifact was originally obtained by Zola in Elf Prophet Alucier’s draw bonus. In return for accepting the Tree of Nature’s quest, he and Zola each had a chance to draw a card. The pattern of the card drawn was the ancient magic card ‘Fate Showdown’ that Chen Rui was very familiar with. As a result, Zola was very lucky and drew a main card ‘Silver Queen’, the strongest order after Golden King while he drew the weakest resource card ‘wood’.

‘Silver Queen’ became the artifact, Elemental Goddess Crown, which played an important role in Zola’s further comprehension of the [6 Elements Kingdom] mystery and even breakthrough to the Demi-God. However, Chen Rui also discovered that the Elemental Kings had a strange attitude when they saw this artifact. In fact, this kind of abnormality appeared after Zola comprehended the [6 Elements Kingdom], but the real reason was still unknown. Today, it was perhaps time to unravel the mystery.

Chen Rui looked directly at Moore, “I want to know the specific reason. Please don’t brush me off or give me ambiguous explanations.”

“There is a sleeping thing that seems to be awakening. It will bring unpredictable consequences, so we need the power of Zola.” Moore said the name of the thing, “Elemental Goddess Staff.”

The name ‘Elemental Goddess Staff’ naturally conjures up images of the Elemental Goddess Crown that Zola already owned. Chen Rui reacted immediately, asking, “Artifact? Or another part of the artifact set?”

“Yes,” Moore nodded. “The Elemental Goddess Armament left by the Goddessod who controls the elements is composed of 3 artifacts. The Elemental Goddess Crown, the Elemental Goddess Staff, and the Elemental Goddess Robe.”

“A Goddess who controls elements?”

Hegel replied, “Yes, it’s Elemental Goddess. Now we want Zola’s help to control the Elemental Goddess Staff. If it succeeds, Zola can not only have this artifact. And her strength will be directly promoted to the Pseudo-God Level.”

When Ms. Fairy Dragon heard ‘promote to the Pseudo-God Level’, her purple eyes lit up. Paglio and others also showed their shocked expression because Pseudo-God was the level closest to God. The strength gap between Demi-God and Pseudo-God was almost worlds apart. Of course, the promotion from Demi-God to Pseudo-God was more difficult than from Kingdom Level to Demi-God. The most difficult thing for Pseudo-God was to condense the Pseudo-Godhood and Pseudo-God Kingdom. Auglas spent 1,000 years and even after obtaining Rodriguez’s Pseudo-God Dragon Power Essence to condense the Pseudo-Godhood. Now Hegel said that Zola could actually be promoted directly to the Pseudo-God. How could they not be surprised?

“What if, what if it fails?” Chen Rui wasn’t fooled by Hegel’s claims of benefits. His primary concern was not whether Zola could be promoted to the Pseudo-God but her safety.

Moore pondered a little and said the answer, “With our full support, her life is not in danger, but if she fails, she will not only lose the Elemental Goddess Crown. It will also make her strength regress, and she will not be able to activate the power of the six elements kingdom.”

Everyone fell silent, including Master Poison Dragon who looked jealous. The Elemental Goddess Crown was fine, but the [6 Elements Kingdom] was Fairy Dragon’s strongest kingdom talent. Zola risked her life to master it successfully. There was also the six elements source power that Chen Rui obtained through hardships. Zola’s strongest move “[Element’s Fury]” was also derived from the six elements kingdom power.

Ordinary Demi-God peak stage might never seek to way to the Pseudo-God. But if she failed to advance to the Pseudo-God, there wouldn’t be such a huge risk either. It was up to Zola to decide.

Chen Rui and Zola’s voices blurted out almost simultaneously.

“No!”

“Okay!”

It was Chen Rui who refused and Zola who agreed.

Chen Rui shook his head at Zola, but he saw a rare determination in Zola’s purple eyes. Zola didn’t look at Chen Rui again. She just asked the Earth Elemental King, “Since you guys came to me especially, it must be a serious matter. If I refuse, what special things will happen?”

“The warning sign of the Elemental Kings may be one of them.” Moore sighed. “Actually, the Elemental Goddess Staff’s awakening is a bit sudden. It is much earlier than we expected. If Lambost’s water elemental heart hadn’t broken, maybe the situation is not so serious. However, even if that is the case, we will ask Zola to help, because she is the one who is recognized by the Elemental Goddess Crown. It will greatly increase the chances of success. Once the Elemental Goddess Staff awakens, it is uncontrollable., If it induces some kind of change, then the consequences will even trigger a terrifying calamity no less than the Abyss.”

There is actually a terrifying calamity no less than the Abyss! Chen Rui couldn’t help being shocked.

Zola nodded, “Okay, I promise you.”

“Zola!”

“I’m your woman, but not…” Fairy Dragon bit her lip, “I have my own freedom. This is my choice.”

Even if Zola wasn’t obedient to Chen Rui, she would usually listen to Chen Rui. However, her meaning or tone was surprisingly determined.

Chen Rui wasn’t angry. He just nodded slowly, “Okay, I’ll go with you.”

“I’m afraid not.” It was Moore who said this. The Earth Elemental King sighed, “Because that place is the world of elements, that is, the elemental world.”

Athena asked, “Why can’t Chen Rui go to elemental world?”

“The elemental world is different from ordinary planes. Unless there is a powerful force over the entire plane, only the approved Elemental Messenger can enter and exit freely.”

“Elemental Messenger?” Isabella, who had the sharpest mind, seemed to understand something.

“By the time Zola was recognized by the Elemental Goddess Crown, she already had another identity. That is the Elemental Messenger.”

Elemental Messenger! Chen Rui clenched his fist secretly. That bastard prophet, Alucier, actually hid such an important matter!

Isabella asked again, “Is this Elemental Messenger of Zola different from yours?”

“Elemental Messenger is the commander of elements, which can maximize the power of elements beyond the ordinary level.” Moore explained, “As for me in the elemental world, I should be called Main Elemental Messenger. It is the highest level Elemental Messenger. There are only 6 main Elemental Messengers in the elemental world.”

The 6 highest level Main Elemental Messengers obviously correspond to the 6 Elemental Kings of the main plane. The Elemental King should be the avatar of the Main Elemental Messenger. Due to some kind of restriction, the Elemental Kings that appeared on the main plane could only exert the power of the Demon Overlord.

Zola said, “When are we leaving?”

“The sooner the better.”

Zola thought about it, “Tomorrow then.”

“Okay!” Hegel stood up.

“I’m very sorry.” Moore glanced at Chen Rui apologetically, “If there is another way, I don’t want Zola to face this risk, I will do my best to protect her. At most a year, she can come back.”

Chen Rui nodded and said nothing more.

“Let’s go, Moore,. Tomorrow morning, we’ll come again.”

After Moore and Hegel left the palace, the others also left sensibly, leaving only Zola and Chen Rui.

The fairy dragon walked slowly to Chen Rui. When she was about to speak, Chen Rui had already said the 1 word.

“Sorry.”

Zola showed a surprised expression. Chen Rui shook his head, “It’s all my fault.”

“No.”

“Zola, I understand.” Chen Rui sighed. “The reason why you agreed is that you want to reach the Pseudo-God state as soon as possible to help me get through the crisis in the Holy Light Mountain. If I have enough strength, you don’t have to take that risk.”

“Yes, but not exactly.” Zola’s purple eyes showed tenderness. “I just want to be by your side. It’s not just me, Yini, Athena and others think the same way. Everyone’s way is different. For example, Kia is to silently stand behind you to support. Although I enjoy your care, I hope to stand by your side and face the powerful enemy together.”

A hint of enlightenment flashed across Chen Rui’s eyes. He nodded thoughtfully, “Yes, this is your freedom and also your choice.”

“Are you angry?” Ms. Fairy Dragon felt a little nervous and took his arm. This sentence was her original words. In front of so many people, she didn’t save face for her own man. This was a big taboo.

“Why would I?” Chen Rui kissed her face, “I have decided.”

“What?”

“Decided to hurry up and do something first.” Chen Rui laughed and gave Zola a princess hug, “My madam goddess, a year is not a short time.”

“What?”

Apparently, a certain Goddess was faking a daze.

The next day, Zola left the Dark Moon with Moore and Hegel.

Soon after, Chen Rui spoke about his real decision in front of everyone.

“What? You are going out for training?”

“Yes.” Chen Rui replied with certainty, “Leave the familiar place, put aside all distractions, treat each day as the last day before the decisive battle, and focus on training wholeheartedly.”

“Cunning human, did you take the wrong medicine?”

“Sir Uncle, did you get caught having affair outside, so you want to go out for refuge?”

“Actually, this is an idea I had a long time ago,” Chen Rui shook his head, “Everyone is working hard, of course I can’t sit back and watch. I have already decided. At most 2 years, I will definitely come back.”

Feeling the firmness in their voices, both Paglio and Roman jeered. After a moment of silence, Athena spoke up, “If, this is your decision.”

“We will support you.” The little succubus maid’s eyes were a little red.

“You cannot secretly face everything alone.” Isabella thought for a while and added.

“ En .” Chen Rui nodded.

“Don’t look at other women anymore.”

“Don’t talk to other women.”

“Don’t fuck other women”

“Don’t bring other women back.”

“Don’t go to the human world to secretly find other women to give birth to children.”

Chen Rui, “…”

chapters.title: Chapter 1136: Original Heart
chapters.body:
Chapter 1136: Original Heart

Super System’s Galaxy Divinity Temple.

“He’s gone?” Python looked at the boundless galaxy as her pale silver pupils reflected the starlight, making her gaze look deep and distant.

“Yes.” Veronica answered, “2 years. He won’t come back and he won’t enter this world again until he reaches a certain level. ‘Treat each day as the last day before the decisive battle, and focus on training wholeheartedly.’ Those are his words.”

“Train out of this most important world?” Python’s eyes flashed with brilliance, “I don’t know if he has really found the direction of his ‘heart’, but I’m looking forward to his strength next time we meet. Has the soul fusion between you and his soul reached the final stage?”

Veronica’s face flushed as she nodded, “ En .”

The fusion of soul entities had indeed reached the highest level. Although she had no body, she could be completely considered as Chen Rui’s woman.

“I can see that you have comprehended a certain level of soul power, but the mystery of the soul is endless. Although your soul talent is very good, your level of understanding is still very shallow. I will teach several secret techniques to you now.”

“Thank you, but mine doesn’t seem to be of any use. I just want to stay here and manage the faith for you Gods and Goddess of these ‘worlds’.”

“You don’t even want to learn the secret technique of soul reincarnation?” Python said lightly, “This secret technique can not only resurrect you, but it can also make you become the mother of a child.”

Veronica’s body shook slightly. Of course, she knew what Python was referring to. Chen Rui possessed 2 origin powers, destruction and creation. These 2 powers could promote the creation of descendants. Athena’s previous pregnancy was due to the destruction origin, but unfortunately, the creation origin required a pure light-element physique, so the Demon Realm’s girls had not been pregnant. The most promising candidate for the mother of the ‘child of creation’ was Veronica, because she was originally a human. Furthermore, she was basically accepted by everyone in the harem. As long as there was a light element body for her to reincarnate, she was likely to be successfully conceived.

“I… want to learn.” Veronica could no longer be calm or reserved. After all, the temptation to have children for the beloved was too great.

“Okay, but you have to train your soul to a certain level according to the method I taught before you can start to learn that kind of reincarnation technique. Not only that, when you and him trained for soul fusion again, the effect will be even better. “

“Thank you, Python.” Veronica said sincerely.

“You don’t have to thank me. I’m just doing it for him.” Python shook her head, “It’s not like your relationship or feeling for him; I can’t explain it any better.”

“Pardon me for saying a few more words. Who do you think he is? I have known him for a long time. Although some changes happened later, his memory has also been re-integrated by some kind of inheritance as if he has become a brand new person. It doesn’t matter who he is to me now… But, I can see that ‘who he is’ is more important to you than who he really is… There may be some contradiction or difficulty…”

“I understand what you mean.” Python suddenly sneered, “The ‘I’ whom you see now is no different from the ‘I’ who entered this world for the first time. Your heart is really naive… I can’t believe that someone would care for a person like me. It’s ridiculous, really ridiculous.”

Veronica bowed her head, “He kept saying that he is not that person. Maybe it was my delusion… I just want to ask you. What you are wrong?”

“Then…” Python was silent for a moment, and her figure gradually faded.

“No regrets.”

After vaguely hearing these 2 words, Python completely disappeared from Veronica’s vision.

Dark Moon Estate.

“Are you still thinking about him? Athena.” Isabella’s voice sounded, “Stand up and move around. It’s good for the child.”

“ En .” Athena stood up, “Don’t you miss him? Yini.”

“Of course I do, but I think everyone misses people with different ways.”

“Different ways of missing?”

“Yes, for you, you protect yourself, take care of your body, and let your child be born healthily. This is the best way to miss him. When he comes back, even if there are no surprises, he will be at ease and happy at least.”

Athena thought for a while, “I see. Thank you, Yini.”

Isabella smiled while Kia hurriedly asked, “What about me?”

“Only you know your own affairs best. I only know that he prefers your high-spirited appearance rather than listlessness. As for the rest, just follow your own heart.”

“Understood!” The little succubus maid nodded and clenched her fists, “I will definitely cheer up!”

“I also miss boss. Sister, what should I do?” Ms. Black Dragon looked thoughtful.

“You… you should choose ‘don’t worry’.”

“Don’t worry?”

“Because the ‘advancement bonus fund’ is still valid… Before your boss left, he specially gave me all the bonuses for safekeeping. It depends on your ability to get them.” Isabella laughed, “Small realm 50,000 black crystal coins, 500,000 for big realm, and 1 million for 2-star enhancement. Just do your best.”
