“It feels really good to be resurrected.” Lambost’s eyes flashed with relief, “No doubt it’s you, Chen Rui. You fulfilled your promise, and it only took 3 years.”

Chen Rui laughed, “I’m amazed at how accurate you are with your time, Lambost. Did you wake up immediately to look at an hourglass or some kind of time item? I wanted to give you a recently popular magic watch. It seems that there is no need for that now.”

“Although you seem very relaxed, I can guess that the process of obtaining the Phantom Ice Spring is by no means easy. I don’t know if the battle marks left on your body are because of the Phantom Ice Spring… With your character, you will immediately come after you get the Phantom Ice Spring.” Lambost nodded, “I’m very grateful and touched. I really understand Moore’s feelings a little bit.”

“Your gratitude and emotion are a little too cheap.” Python’s voice sounded, and her tone was particularly harsh, “Water Elemental King… By the way, you should be called the avatar of the Water Elemental Messenger!”

Lambost glanced at Python, looking extraordinarily calm, “What do you mean by ‘cheap’? The one who chooses to fall…or a Dark God’s servant.”

Python didn’t care about Lambost’s name, “Phantom Ice Spring was obtained from the Holy Light Mountain’s 3 archangels through a fierce battle just now. Do you know how Michael described it when he learned the purpose of obtaining the Phantom Ice Spring?”

“Python, let’s talk about the future in the future. Lambost is my friend now.” Chen Rui stopped Python’s words, “If… one day in the future, we have to become enemies, then I will not be merciful. I will personally end it with these hands, in the name of a former friendship.”

Python was silent for a moment and said nothing. The Water Elemental King took a deep look at Chen Rui and nodded slowly, “This is Lambost’s honor.”

“My honor too.”

After successfully rescuing Lambost, the Water Elemental King returned to the deep blue sea area of water elementals. After the agreement in the Holy Light Mountain and the rescue of Lambost came to an end, Chen Rui relaxed a lot. He took Python directly through the [Star Gate] back to the Dark Moon.

When Chen Rui showed up at the Dark Moon’s residence, he was immediately surrounded.

Athena, Kia, Isabella, Zola, Shea… so many people.

Everyone knew that he was going to the Holy Light Mountain today, and they knew even more that he was going to face the 3 strongest peak stage of the Pseudo-God in the human world. Therefore, they all anxiously waited for his safe return, even Shea especially rushed over.

Seeing that he was fine, everyone was obviously relieved. Some people took out their phones and reported safety to the 2 empresses in the distance.

With those concerned eyes, Chen Rui felt a warmth in his heart and smiled, “Don’t worry, I’m fine.”

Athena looked at him nervously, “Are you really fine?”

“Yes, if you don’t believe, touch…”

Soon, Chen Rui regretted this sentence.

Before Athena could make a move, someone behind him pinched his arm, his other arm was touched, and another finger pinched toward his waist. This action was a bit familiar. There must be no more than 5 suspects.

Immediately afterward, more and more people got involved. Even his buttocks were touched, Chen Rui’s hair stood up, and he faintly heard a hohoho laughter.

When Chen Rui was about to open his mouth to scold the female hooligan, his face was suddenly kneaded and turned into a weird expression. He couldn’t speak for a while. It was not his precious daughter Duoduo who did that, but Shea.

This is outright revenge!

Not long ago, when she deliberately turned a cold face last time, she must be angry being rubbed by me…

As for the one hanging on the back, it must be Her Majesty Empress’ sister. How do I know? Uh, I’ll tell you it’s some kind of evil touch on the back. At this height, who has a smaller chest than Xiao Long Bao …

While fooling around, Chen Rui suddenly caught a glimpse of someone gradually disappearing. The Song of Darkness appeared in his mind.

Loneliness is a feast for 1 person.

However, he was in no mood to think about this more, because Paglio and Roman, the 2 animals, rushed up with signature pens, followed by Lalaria, who was smirking…

After half an hour.

Chen Rui sat silently on the sofa while Kia held back her smile and wiped the ‘message’ from his face with a damp towel, “Welcome back, Royal Highness Prince Consort.”

Looking at the messy face, everyone around him laughed. Even Shea, who had always shown herself as an iceberg beauty, couldn’t keep a straight face.

“It was too much just now, who did it first?” Chen Rui said furiously. They were even ready with the signature pen. There must be premeditation!

“It’s him (her)”! Many voices sounded at the same time. Isabella pointed to Kia, Kia pointed to Paglio, Paglio pointed to Roman, and Roman pointed to Lalaria…

Well, the law does not blame the public, you all win. Chen Rui touched his forehead helplessly, “Who came up with this ‘welcome ceremony’!”

“It’s her!” This time, the target of the ‘accusation’ was consistent, but it wasn’t Isabella or Paglio as Chen Rui expected.

Ms. Fairy Dragon whom everyone pointed had a lost face, “What?”

TL: Then will Zola be forced to fight Chen Rui as well?

chapters.title: Chapter 1150: Dream
chapters.body:
Chapter 1150: Dream

The sky, with no sun or moon, was overcast and cloudy.

Sometimes when the clouds disappeared, various mysterious and gorgeous lights would appear. If it was on another plane of the earth, people generally call this phenomenon ‘Aurora’.

There was no earth underfoot, only islands. Some islands were soil while some islands were pure glaciers. They all suspended in the air and moved slowly as if there was no limitation of gravity.

Zola was flying in this strange space. The felt familiar with the nearby floating islands. What was even more familiar was the power breath that was everywhere in this world.

Elements.

In the magic knowledge system, in order to turn the elements into magic power, one needed spirit power to convert and cast it with a special chant (Powerhouse could compress spells or even cast spells without chanting). This power was magic. To give an inappropriate example, for magic trainers, spirit power was like a ‘bucket’, and magic power was like the ‘water’ in the bucket.

The stronger the spirit power, the bigger the ‘bucket’, and the more and more ‘water’ was poured out. The magic power determined the quality of the ‘water’ in the ‘bucket’. Some ‘water’ was just a clear spring without any harm while others were terrifying ‘sulfuric acid’.

In this world, the application or conversion of elements did not require any special way at all. It was as natural and simple as eating and drinking.

Because this was the elemental plane a.k.a the elemental world.

The elemental world was not a magician’s paradise. On the contrary, all substances that were not pure elements were repelled and annihilated by this plane. In theory, only creatures with complete elements could survive in this world. Although the fairy dragon was the type of dragon that was most friendly with element power, they were not true element bodies after all, so they would not be an exception.

Zola had become an ‘exception’, but it had nothing to do with the strength of the peak stage of the Demi-God. Even a Pseudo-God fairy dragon powerhouse still could not be accommodated by the ‘world’.

The [6 Elements Kingdom] was 1 of the reasons why Zola could move freely in the elemental world and could use element power at will, but it was not the most important; the exquisite crown on her head was the point.

The Elemental Goddess Crown.

This artifact was obtained from the legendary prophet Alucier of the elf tribe in the Jade Forest Sea of the human world. Compared with the ‘wood’ reward Chen Rui got after a hard battle, Zola easily got the Elemental Goddess Crown with just a flip of a magic card.

Too easy.

Alucier once said, “When you accept power, you also accept the responsibility of the fate bestowed”. Chen Rui and Zola didn’t pay much attention at that time. Until the Earth Elemental King and the Dark Elemental King came to the Dark Moon, Zola vaguely understood something.

As the old saying goes, there was no reaping without sowing.

Recognized by the Elemental Goddess Crown had another meaning, that was elemental messenger.

The [6 Elements Kingdom] used elements as ‘believers’, which could be described as inexhaustible; the elemental messenger was the commander of elements, which could maximize the power of elements and exert great power beyond ordinary levels. In fact, Zola was not an official elemental messenger, but under these 2 preconditions, her strength was indeed far better than her peers.

With the step-by-step integration with the Elemental Goddess Crown, Zola’s mind would have a little extra consciousness from time to time, constantly affecting her. When fighting in Sariel’s kingdom, Zola’s understanding of Moon Mirror came from this trace of consciousness, which also prevented Lalaria’s suicide move.

From this consciousness, Zola gained considerable power and a wealth of knowledge. This was also an important reason for her to reach the peak stage of the Demi-God so quickly. However, this awareness was also affecting her will step by step, but Zola was confident that she could control this consciousness. More importantly, this consciousness could make her more powerful; at least not become a burden to her lover.

Back then, her strength far surpassed Chen Rui and became the strength he needed to rely on. Then, he surpassed her step by step at an unimaginable speed, which made Zola feel uncomfortable. It was not jealousy, but she was dissatisfied with herself. Hence, she had been working hard, even forcibly integrating the 6 element source powers at risk, achieving the [6 Elements Kingdom] and reaching the peak stage of the Demi-God step by step.

The speed of this kind of progress was extremely amazing. She was already a genius among geniuses. She was second to none among relatives and friends. However, Fairy Dragon was still dissatisfied, because just when she was about to catch up with his back, she was pulled away again. Chen Rui advanced directly from Demi-God to Pseudo-God, but she was stuck at the peak stage of the Demi-God.

This bottleneck, for many people, was nothing but a natural moat that might not be crossed in their entire lives.

Therefore, after the Earth Elemental King and the Dark Elemental King made a request to go to the elements world to deal with the ‘Elemental Goddess Staff’ and explained that her power could be advanced Pseudo-God, despite the possibility of encountering danger or even losing the [6 Elements Kingdom] forever, Zola agreed without hesitation despite Chen Rui’s objection.

Fortunately, Chen Rui understood her choice very well and blamed all the faults on himself. Instead of being affected, the relationship between the 2 deepened.

No matter what she chose, there was a pair of strong and warm hands behind her to support her.

Subsequently, Zola followed the 2 Elemental Kings into the elemental world.

The entrance to the elemental world was a channel opened by the power of the origin fragment. At the moment of entering, Zola felt that her body and soul had been decomposed into countless free elements. She could only vaguely feel this state when she launched ultimate moves like [Element’s Fury]. Now, she actually had this feeling all the time.

In this way, her element sensing power could always be kept at the most refined level, which was of great benefit to the improvement of strength or the comprehension of bottlenecks.

Not everyone could ‘enjoy’ this ‘welfare’, because over time, one would be truly annihilated and become the most basic element.

At this time, the Elemental Goddess Crown played a role that could not be comprehended before. It firmly protected Zola’s body and soul. Not only did she not get annihilated, but it further refined her strongest [6 Elements Kingdom].

Zola originally thought that her [6 Elements Kingdom] had reached an unprecedented level of purity, but after entering this tempering state, she realized that there were still so many ‘impurities’” and flaws in the kingdom.

In the days that followed, Zola spent almost 3/4 of the time fighting, battling strange creatures condensed by various elements. The battle had made the [6 Elements Kingdom] more and more refined; the degree of integration between Zola and the Elemental Goddess Crown had also been strengthened step by step; the control and sense of elements had reached a new height. She had also vaguely sensed the feeling of breaking through the bottleneck.

To this extent, she could truly be called an ‘elemental messenger’.

After Zola entered the elemental world, the Earth Elemental King and the Dark Elemental King never showed up until Zola’s control of elements really reached the level of ‘elemental messenger’. She felt more than 4 mysterious and powerful gazes staring at her from the space.

There was a violent tremor in the distant space as a large area of collapse actually appeared, turning the nearby floating islands into dust.

It was not the first time that this kind of tremor had appeared. Especially after Zola had really controlled the element power, she could clearly sense the power of that tremor. It was not just the space was collapsing, and it was spreading. If it didn’t stop, sooner or later, the entire elemental world would be destroyed.

This was the source of the awakening ‘doom calamity’ that the 2 kings said, and it was also the key to her breakthrough to Pseudo-God: The Elemental Goddess Staff!

Zola took a deep breath, raised the power of the [6 Elements Kingdom] to the highest point, turned herself into a colorful light and resolutely rushed toward the most dangerous space that was collapsing.

At the moment when she was close to the collapse, the [6 Elements Kingdom] suddenly became disordered. It was originally a solid and complementary structure, but now it was mixed up. This was a very dangerous scene. Once the opposing element powers collided with each other, it was [Element’s Fury ] imploding in her body. The consequences would be unimaginable.

Zola did not step back or restrain her strength. She gritted her teeth and continued to charge forward with all her strength. The chaotic element power finally collapsed. At the same time as the 6 elements fully erupted, the original consciousness of the Elemental Goddess Crown expanded instantly. Before Zola had time to react, her entire consciousness had been covered.

Time and space stopped. There was only 1 voice left in the space, calling her in the soul.

The voice was blurred in her memory. She couldn’t remember most of it.

The only thing that she could vaguely remember was only 4 words.

The meaning of existence……

The blurry state continued. In the confusion, her life and death were unknown until there was something in her right hand, which seemed to be a long staff.

The long staff gave her a feeling of bloodline connection as if it were part of her body.

Just when her consciousness was barely awake, she was horrified to find that the hand holding the long staff began to become transparent. Her muscles, bones, and blood vessels were all visible, then all these were turning into colorful particles: Elements!

The ‘colors’ then spread to her whole body. In the blink of an eye, she became a complete elemental creature!

“No!”

Zola screamed and opened her eyes.

There was neither a collapsed space nor a collapsed kingdom. It was just the familiar room and the cold purple moonlight outside the window.

Ms. Fairy Dragon’s first reaction was to look at her right hand. She was so nervous that she even held her breath.

There was no color, no transparency, no elements. It was still the hand that was as white as jade.

The fairy dragon breathed a sigh of relief. Chen Rui’s concerned voice came from the side, “What’s the matter, Zola? You had a nightmare?”

“ En .”

“Look, there’s even a cold sweat.” A soft towel magically appeared in his hand, and he carefully wiped the sweat off her forehead. Zola enjoyed the warmth and thoughtfulness very much. For some reason, she had a little anxiety of losing him. She moved toward his arms.

“What are you dreaming about?” Chen Rui kissed her face, “Are you still blaming me for not taking you to the Holy Light Mountain this time?”

“A little bit.” Ms. Fairy Dragon answered honestly.

“I’m sorry, because this time it’s all the peak stage of the Pseudo-God, and you’ve been to the Holy Light Mountain last time. You know the situation there. Even me…” As Chen Rui was talking, he suddenly saw that 1 of Zola’s pupils seemed to become colorful. He couldn’t help but be startled.

“What’s wrong?” Zola couldn’t help but wonder why he stopped halfway through his words.

When Chen Rui looked again, the pupils were clearly still the usual purple. He just thought that he saw wrongly because of poor lighting. He shook his head, “It’s nothing, your eyes… are beautiful.”

“ Oh .” Zola responded casually as her heart was filled with sweetness.

(Forget it, I reluctantly forgive you)

“Actually……”

Just as Chen Rui was about to explain, Zola suddenly got down on top of him. The pair of plumps squeezed against his chest.

The 2 had an intimate moment last night, and they were naked. After resting for a night, they had recovered their stamina. As a man who was ‘beyond’ normal, Chen Rui immediately developed some kind of normal natural reaction.

“What?” The beautiful-eyed lady was obviously in a habitual fake daze.

“Nothing, you can do whatever you want…”

“Then, from now until dawn, I will be on top.”

“ Ah ?”

“No?”

“ Uh , okay…”

chapters.title: Chapter 1151: The True Meaning Of Death
chapters.body:
Chapter 1151: The True Meaning Of Death

After successfully passing the ‘test’ of the Covenant of the Holy Light Mountain, Chen Rui’s life returned to peace.

There were voices of laughter from time to time in the house. Chen Rui usually accompanied his beloved wives and baby daughter, joked with his friends, and sometimes ‘traveled far’ to the Bloody Empire and the Dark Shadow Empire to be the Special Psychological (Physical) Consultant of her Majesty Empresses.

Although there was still Satan’s 10-year contract, but with his current strength, especially after the test of the Holy Light Mountain battle, there was no need to panic as before. The only thing that he had not been slacking was training.

Not only Chen Rui but also the rest of the people. There was indeed a certain relationship between the previous tense atmosphere and the training habits developed, but it was more of an active and conscious behavior.

This time, the special training of the Ghastly Floating Land had started again. Except for Pseudo-God Python and Zola, the 3 empresses who had no time to spare, the pregnant Athena and the non-combatants, almost all the members of the family and friends group participated in this training.

For Chen Rui, the more Gods in the ‘universe’ of the Super System, the purer and larger the faith, and the stronger his own power. This had been fully verified in the battle of the Holy Light Mountain. Even Raphael, who had the almost immortal [Body of Light Recovery], might not be able to take the [All Star God View] that contained the power of 18 Gods.

Since the number of super links was not infinite and the targets of super link could not be expanded indefinitely, Chen Rui must carefully screen. The most important factor was of course reliability. Several reliable friends such as Tetenis and Aldas had become a new batch of people who had received 1-star enhancement, and the 2 subordinates Celine and Sicali were originally given 1-star enhancement. In the spirit of ‘no waste’, Chen Rui also gave both of them 2-star enhancement. Whether these people could comprehend the mystery of 2-star enhancement depended on luck.

Only Guradam, Alice, Medilu, Joanna and Ina who had accepted the 2-star enhancement hadn’t succeeded yet. Compared with the other 4, Guradam was particularly conspicuous.

This corpse necromancer was so gifted that he was able to grow in strength at the most astonishing rate in the Ghastly Floating Land by turning into a wandering spirit to devour the ‘same kind’. Not only that, Guradam was also proficient in dark element magic. he had achieved unprecedented brilliant achievements in the undead magic territory that derived from the dark element. In terms of strength and intelligence, he was a powerful person. Yet, he actually had not completed the 2-star enhancement!

According to Python, strength was only 1 of the factors for the success of 2-star enhancement, but it was not the only one. The key was the comprehension of faith and life. For example, Adeline, who was not a combat type, completed 2-star enhancement earlier than Roman and others to become the Goddess of music. No matter which way it was, inner persistence was a necessary condition.

The inner persistence was largely proportional to the degree of loyalty or trust. For example, Samuel’s strength was far inferior to Guradam, but his loyalty to Chen Rui could be described as a firm believer, who could sacrifice his life for his master without hesitation. It was this kind of persistence that made Samuel grasp the true meaning of ‘loyalty’ and become the god in charge of ‘loyalty’ and ‘faithfulness’.

In contrast, Guradam was only willing to sign the master-subordinate contract back then. Although he made great contributions in the battle between Shea and Obsidian, he was only passively submissive, not loyal.

This time, the corpse necromancer entered the Chaos Realm with everyone. Relying on the ‘gold fingers’ of devouring the wandering spirits to constantly devour the enemies of the same level, his strength actually reached the peak stage of the Kingdom level in one fell swoop.

It was at this time that Guradam looked for Chen Rui.

Chen Rui was surprised that the subordinate whose relationship was on the fringe suddenly asked for advice in private. What was even more strange was the subject that Guradam had brought up.

“‘The true meaning of the death power?” Chen Rui felt a little surprised.

“Yes.” Guradam nodded. “Master’s current strength has already stood at the peak stage of the world. Please give me some guidance.”

Chen Rui shook his head, “It’s not that I am holding back on purpose, but my path of strength is different from that of ordinary people. My understanding of ‘death’ is not as good as yours, so how can I answer your doubts?”

“I asked Madam Python before. Madam Python said that only master could possibly help me.”

“Python?” Chen Rui frowned slightly. Python has always been dissatisfied with Guradam’s loyalty and the progress of 2-star enhancement. Does she have another purpose?

“Actually,” Guradam bowed his head, “It wasn’t that I’m eager to advance to Demi-God when I reached the peak stage of the Kingdom Level, but this comprehension was imminent for me. Before, I used to turn into a wandering spirit to devour the soul power of countless wandering spirits by tricky methods, and my strength leaped from the early stage of the Kingdom Level to the peak stage of the Kingdom Level in one fell swoop. But I didn’t expect that what I devour is only superficial power. The unconscious soul power of the dead is all stagnant in my soul. Not only can’t it be absorbed, but also my soul is constantly being eroded and divided. If this goes on, my soul will be completely annihilated, becoming the true wandering spirit who loses the sense of autonomy. The only way is to comprehend the true meaning of ‘death’, to turn the soul power I devoured into my own use and to completely solve my crisis. “

“How could this be?” Chen Rui’s brows furrowed even tighter. Generally speaking, a corpse necromancer was immortal. As long as the soul essence in the life box was not damaged, even if the body was annihilated, he would not die, but now Guradam himself said there was something wrong with his soul. It was useless even if the life box was hidden in a mysterious place.

Once Guradam’s soul disappeared, the life box would also be automatically destroyed, leaving only an unconscious body of the peak stage of the Kingdom Level. This was no different from the other wandering spirits in the Ghastly Floating Land.

So, Guradam immediately approached Chen Rui for advice after getting a pointer from Python.

“To be honest, the way of death is an unfamiliar field to me, and all I have is the power of the destruction origin.” A faint light appeared in Chen Rui’s hands, and Guradam could clearly sense the chilling and pure destruction power “But, Guradam, you should be well aware that from the cognitive point of view of a corpse necromancer who possesses the power of the undead, ‘destruction, and ‘death’ are 2 completely different concepts.”

“Master’s guidance gave me a lot of inspiration back then,” Guradam shook his head, “Madam Python said that even she can’t do anything; only the master can make me comprehend the true meaning of ‘death’.”

Chen Rui pondered in silence. No matter what Python’s intention is, it really gives me a big problem.

The real value of Guradam was not his own strength, but his special talent. As the most outstanding undead magician, the undead corpse necromancer, Guradam could control a huge army of undead legion and play an important role in future plans. He was a subordinate that could not be easily given up even without regard to loyalty issues.

Guradam’s current situation was somewhat similar to his own state and soul power that could not keep up with the skyrocketing power. The most important thing was that the power of the wandering spirits that he devoured might make Guradam’s soul ‘explode’ at any time. It was like an ordinary person without internal force in martial arts novels, who was suddenly instilled with decades of internal force, and he did not have the corresponding method to channel and activate it, so it was not surprising that one day he exploded and died.

Therefore, what Guradam needed most was the ‘method’ that matched the current power. If he could comprehend the so-called ‘true meaning of death’, he could not only absorb those unconscious soul power but also his power was likely to be improved to a higher level.

The problem was that Chen Rui himself didn’t know anything about the undead power. The ‘ancient legacy’ that fooled Guradam back then was actually stolen from some other games.

Seeing Chen Rui pondering expression, Guradam didn’t make a sound to interrupt and stood respectfully for a long time before Chen Rui spoke up, “I can think of only 1 method to make you comprehend the power of death.”

Guradam was overjoyed and hurriedly asked, “What method?”

“I not only have the power of the destruction origin but also the power of creation origin.” Chen Rui’s hands showed a completely different power breath compared to the destruction origin. “Comprehending the creation origin was much more difficult for me than the destruction origin. Especially at the initial stage, I was almost annihilated. However, I took a different approach and took a crucial step, that is, comprehend creation with the completely opposite destruction origin! Satan, who was regarded as the closest to God, also tried this kind of reverse comprehension, comprehending the destruction origin through the creation origin.”

Guradam had lived for thousands of years, so he naturally understood, “Master means to comprehend ‘death power’ from ‘life power’?”

“I can’t give you more by going straight to the ‘death’ way, but I have some means for ‘life’.” The creation origin and destruction origin in Chen Rui’s hands disappeared instantly, replaced by a black flame full of vitality. This kind of vitality gave Guradam a strong sense of crisis: Nirvana power, which was the nemesis of the undead.

At the same time, a crystal clear white crown appeared on Chen Rui’s head. The divine breath radiated even made Guradam’s soul tremble.

[Divine Healing], the most powerful healing that could heal all kinds of serious injuries, and it could almost bring back the dead, but for the undead, it was no less than a deadly blade if it was activated on Guradam.

“Guradam, these 2 powers, both of which will bring danger to life, can be described as a near-death situation, have you considered it clearly?”

The corpse necromancer was silent for a while before he spoke up, “Instead of losing my soul and becoming a wandering spirit unconsciously, it is better to choose a way to die while I am conscious. Besides, although this path is a life-and-death, there is still a way to live. Before that, master, please keep 1 thing for me.”

Chen Rui looked at a box handed over by the corpse necromancer. He felt the soul fluctuations in it, and he was shocked, “This is…”

“My life box.”

Corpse necromancers had no flesh and blood; they had a temporary body. They generally store their soul essence in some kind of container. As long as the soul essence did not die, they could use bodies to resurrect infinitely. This soul container was also called a life box.

Without eliminating the life box, the corpse necromancer would never be truly annihilated unless he encountered the current soul crisis.

Guradam asked Chen Rui to keep the life box, which undoubtedly gave him his lifeline.

“Actually, it has nothing to do with loyalty or anything at this time.” Guradam sighed, “Anyway, this box may become a waste at any time.”

Once Guradam could not comprehend the true meaning of the power of death, his soul would be devoured by the wandering spirits, completely bereft of itself, rendering the life box meaningless.

“Understood. The ‘loyalty’ you recognize is actually just because of strength; surrender to the powerhouse. “Chen Rui smiled slightly and the life box disappeared in his hand. Although the life box had a certain soul power, it was not real life after all, so the storage warehouse could store it. “However, I appreciate your confession. I accept the life box. When you are ready, I will help you comprehend the power of death. If you really can’t bear it and annihilate or lose yourself and become a wandering spirit, I will bury you or your life box with my own hands. “

“Thank you, master.” The corpse necromancer showed a respectful expression and bowed deeply, not because of the passive behavior caused by the Star Conferring Platform ‘Emperor Deterrence’ but with heartfelt respect.

chapters.title: Chapter 1152: Death God And Rule Energy
chapters.body:
Chapter 1152: Death God And Rule Energy

“This salt-baked purple walnut kernel is a new product I picked at the Green Shade Estate trade fair this time.” Alice took out a few bags of snacks and gave another to Adeline, “Everyone tries it.”

Adeline tasted it and said in surprise, “It’s delicious, Alice.”

“Really good.” Athena nodded approvingly.

“It’s hard to stop eating.” Kia usually liked to eat this kind of small snack, and she finished half a bag at once, “No wonder Chen Rui likes to eat so much. It’s really troublesome for our little princess to make a special trip to the Green Shade Estate.”

The little succubus maid revealed the real intention of Alice as the lord who did not hesitate to leave the Dark Moon to go to the Green Shade Estate to buy this salt-baked purple walnut kernel. Alice blushed and retorted, “Teacher Zola also likes it. “

“It’s a pity that Chen Rui took Paglio and the others to the Ghastly Floating Land for training. Zola went to Python’s kingdom for closed-door training.” Athena knew Alice’s thoughts and smiled, “None of them could taste it immediately.”

“ Yeah .” Alice’s mood was a little down. This time she rushed back excitedly, but Chen Rui was not there. “But it’s great that everyone likes it, especially Duoduo.”

Duoduo on the side had already finished eating the few in her hands, and spoke up, “Sister Alice, I want more.”

“It’s auntie.” Alice diligently corrected the little girl’s habitual mistakes. She simply took 2 bags and handed them to Duoduo.

“Understood, Sister Alice.” Duoduo’s use of the title was ‘unchangeable’. She suddenly thought about it and put away a bag, “Daddy likes to eat. This bag is reserved for daddy.”

“Duoduo is such a good girl.” Kia picked up Duoduo and fondly touched Duoduo’s braid, “No wonder Duoduo’s daddy said that his daughter is the apple of his eyes.”

“Don’t worry, Duoduo. Aunt Alice has a lot more here.” Alice took out a big bag, “This is for Duoduo’s daddy.”

“Okay!” Duoduo leaned over and kissed Alice and Kia again. Suddenly, the little girl stood up from Kia’s arms and flew in the usual direction of the [Star Gate].

“Daddy!”

Duoduo had a special sense with Fire Phoenix Stigmata and could always immediately sense Chen Rui’s arrival.

No doubt, Chen Rui’s figure appeared in everyone’s vision. Athena and others all stood up.

“Welcome back.” Kia poured him a glass of juice.

“I’m back.” Chen Rui drank the juice, “That place didn’t do me much good. I just brought them in and could have come out long ago. As Guradam had some training problems, I just came back today. “

“It’s just in time to come back.” Athena laughed, “Alice happened to…”

“Daddy eats this.” Duoduo had already stuffed a walnut into Chen Rui’s mouth.

“It’s salt-baked? Daddy likes it the most.” Chen Rui stroked Duoduo’s head, “Thank you, Duoduo.”

“This is what Alice bought for you from the Green Shade Estate.” Athena’s words made Alice’s eyes lit up, and she cast a grateful look.

“Alice went to the Green Shade Estate?” Chen Rui thought of something, and said sternly, “Although it is killing the mood, but… Alice, you are now the lord of the Dark Moon. Your every move is under the attention of the estate. So, you can’t act as recklessly as before going wherever you want.”

“ Oh .” Alice responded and lowered her head. Athena saw that Alice’s eyes were a little red. As she was about to speak, she suddenly saw Chen Rui startled slightly and fell into a special state.

It wasn’t the first time Chen Rui appeared like this. Athena immediately understood. Kia responded the fastest and took Duoduo from Chen Rui’s arms. Adeline took Alice aside and comforted a few words.

Chen Rui’s reaction was naturally due to the Super System. Judging from the fluctuations in sense, the Super System had created a God again.

His consciousness entered the Galaxy Divinity Temple and instantly appeared in the Tower of Faith.

In front of the Tower of Faith, in addition to Veronica, there was a mysterious figure covered in a black cloak.

“Guradam.” Although Chen Rui had already vaguely anticipated who would become the new God, he was still secretly surprised when he saw the cloaked figure.

“Master!” Guradam’s voice was filled with uncontrollable excitement. He gave Chen Rui a deep bow. This respect was more sincere than ever before.

“It’s unbelievable; so fast.” Chen Rui’s surprise also came from the bottom of his heart. Just 2 days before he left the Ghastly Floating Land and returned to the Dark Moon residence, Guradam entered a specially made ‘cage’.

This ‘cage’ was made with the mystery of ancient runes, but its basic power was the most deadly Nirvana power for Guradam. Even without any special attack, it was enough to make the soul of the corpse necromancer in it suffer a constant torment.

However, compared to the [Divine Healing] that he received a few days ago, at least it screamed tragically like being splashed with sulfuric acid.

The ‘cage’ also had another terrifying attribute, that was constantly shrinking. Once it shrunk to the limit, the body of Guradam would be completely annihilated, and his soul would be irreparably damaged. When Guradam was desperately accepting [Divine Healing], his soul had already suffered considerable damage, and the power of the devoured wandering spirits began to attack frequently. If he was seriously injured again, he would explode in advance, completely lose his soul and become a real wandering spirit.

This was proposed by Guradam himself. This once-famous dark element magician had the fortitude of ‘ all or nothing’, which was evident when he converted himself into a corpse necromancer at the risk of annihilation.

In Guradam’s view, if he couldn’t comprehend the true meaning of death, the disappearance of self-consciousness was only a matter of time. Therefore, he went all out. Once he really failed, he would accept his fate.

Judging from the breath emanating from Guradam, it was clear that the desperate gamble had succeeded.

“Welcome to this ‘world’, the Death God.” Veronica bowed to Guradam.

When Guradam appeared in the Galaxy Divinity Temple before, he was guided by Veronica into the Tower of Faith to become the Death God. The corpse necromancer was not a fool. He had heard the name of Veronica from others and knew that she was 1 of the ‘madam’. He hurriedly bowed to her.

In fact, with Veronica’s savvy and familiarity with the ‘world’ of the Super System, becoming a Goddess was not a problem. It was just that she didn’t find a light element body that completely matched her soul. Even if she mastered Python’s secret technique, she couldn’t be resurrected. There was also a small wish within this: To give birth to a ‘creation’ child for Chen Rui after the resurrection.

Secondly, there were more and more Gods in the Super System, and faith inevitably affected and impacted each other. Although every God had a corresponding oracle, without her, the highest oracle who controlled the overall situation, perhaps it would cause all kinds of chaos.

From the perspective of the Super System’s faith, Veronica was no less important than any other God.

“Very good, Sir Death God.” Chen Rui looked at Guradam’s outfit, “You look even more badass if paired with a large scythe.”

“That melee combat weapon is useless for me. Did master forget that I’m a magic trainer? Obviously, a wand is more suitable for me.” Guradam obviously couldn’t understand the sarcasm of the crossover guy.

Chen Rui shrugged at his misunderstanding, “Okay.”

“Master, before I leave, I have something important to report.”

“What’s the matter?” Guradam’s solemnity caught Chen Rui’s attention.

“It’s about the law fragment. Back when the master first took me into the Ghastly Floating Land, I’ve been researching the topic of wandering spirits and law fragments. Why the wandering spirits create law fragments after disappearing. There is a lot of randomness in this creation. Not every wandering spirit will produce fragments. For this reason, I also risked converting myself into a wandering spirit using a secret undead technique. It was after comprehending the meaning of death today and after getting the huge faith related to ‘death’ from master’s ‘world’, that I understood the mystery.”

Chen Rui realized that the main purpose of Guradam turning into a wandering spirit was actually for this kind of research. Speaking of which, in terms of academic research, Guradam and Zola had the same obsession. If this world also had knowledge and academic gods, the fairy dragon and corpse necromancer were definitely a true believer.

“Mystery?” Chen Rui’s mind moved.

“The law fragment should be the essence of the remnant faith of the dead soul.” The bright red light in Guradam’s cloak became more and more shining, “With the way of death I now comprehend, coupled with the huge ‘death’ faith power of this ‘world’, I can directly create a similar law energy entity. However, it is inferior to a real law fragment in terms of energy intensity and purity. Besides, if it is used to increase one’s strength, the effect will be much worse.”

“Great!” Chen Rui was overjoyed. He immediately thought of the ‘rule energy’ needed by the City of Stars, which was the most important use of law fragment now.

Rule energy was the highest grade energy in the City of Stars. Whether it was the ‘super evolution’ of the 3 main cannons or the creation of super-level creatures, a large amount of ‘rule energy’ was required. Previously, it could only be obtained by hunting the wandering spirits and converting the law fragment. The chance of hunting the wandering spirits to get law fragments was very small. During the training period of Chen Rui’s team, the number of wandering spirits seemed to be decreasing. If this went on, it would eventually exhaust one day.

Now, after comprehending the true meaning of death, Guradam could actually use the Death God’s faith of the Super System to create his own rule energy. Even if the purity was inferior to the real law fragment, it could be converted into a large amount of rule energy. This meant that as long as this method worked, the energy crisis of the City of Stars was tantamount to finding a complete solution.

“Well, get used to the newly acquired faith and life force, then try to merge the original undead kingdom with the Death God Kingdom of this ‘world’. Python is very experienced in this area. If you don’t understand, you can ask her for help. After that, you and I go to the Blue Lake Mountain Range and try to see if the created law energy entity can be converted into the special energy of the ancient alchemy civilization.”

“As ordered. I’ll leave first.” Guradam bowed, and his figure gradually disappeared.

“I’m going to be busy too. This new God still has a lot of problems that need to be solved immediately.” Veronica smiled at Chen Rui. Chen Rui nodded and exited the Super System.

His consciousness returned to the body of the Dark Moon residence, and Chen Rui set his eyes on Alice. Although Princess Loli’s eyes were a little red, she still looked at Chen Rui who was dumbfounded.

“Alice, where did we stop?”

“You said I can’t be headstrong…” Princess Loli lowered her head again.

“Yes, you are not young anymore. Whether you are a princess or a lord, you should pay attention to your words and deeds.”

“ Oh …” Alice lowered her head, but she felt extremely aggrieved.

“Also,” Chen Rui paused, walked in front of Alice, and touched her head affectionately, “I like the things you bought back very much. Thank you.”

Alice’s ears perked up, and her teary eyes suddenly lit up.

“Then, brother… Let’s go to the Blue Lake Mountain Range for a picnic tomorrow! Then we’ll go to the City of Stars to fight! Treat it as a thank you gift for me!”

“Picnic! Daddy!” Duoduo also raised her hand happily.

“ Uh … alright.”

The madam lord clearly still wanted to play. Chen Rui felt a little bit of a failure as his sentimental preaching just now fell onto a deaf ear.

However, at times like this, having fun is the most important thing, isn’t it?

chapters.title: Chapter 1153: Emergency At Dinner
chapters.body:
Chapter 1153: Emergency At Dinner

The trial of the Ghastly Floating Land had finally come to an end. Everyone in this special training had achieved certain results. Paglio finally got his wish to break through the realm of 2 years, catch up with Lala Loli, and reach the intermediate stage of the Demi-God.

Although Master Poison Dragon advanced, his sense of urgency did not diminish in the slightest, because Isabella had successfully broken through to the level of Demi-God, followed closely. No one could guarantee when he would be caught up. Although Lalaria was in the same realm as him, this lily loli had received careful guidance from Python. She was far better than him in using the power of Demi-God level. He had also learned several secret techniques. Unless he used the Thunder Flail, he still had no winning odds.

At present, there were 4 people in the group of relatives and friends who had reached Demi-God: Catherine, Lalaria, Paglio, and Isabella.

Isabella’s comprehension of 2-star evolution was even before Paglio. Relying on the power of the Super System, she comprehended the real kingdom long ago. It was only a matter of time before she could break through to Demi-God.

The strength of everyone else had improved accordingly. It was worth mentioning that the most diligent Samuel had finally entered the super-level.

For Chen Rui, the biggest gain was the Corpse Necromancer Guradam. This time, Guradam not only comprehended 2-star evolution to become the ‘Death God’ of the Super System, which increased Chen Rui’s solid power a lot, especially [All Star God View], but that wasn’t the biggest surprise. The real surprise was that Guradam had cracked the mystery of the law fragment. He could create an energy entity similar to the law fragment with the faith power of Death God. The amount created was quite considerable.

After the experiment and analysis of the Blue Lake Mountain Range the City of Stars, it had been confirmed that the energy entity made by Guradam could be converted into the highest grade rule energy. Although the ‘quality’ and ‘quantity’ were inferior to the real law fragment, it was equivalent to providing a most reliable source of rule energy. As long as Guradam and Chen Rui were not dead, they could produce endless law energy.

This meant that the City of Stars could continuously produce super-level units within the upper limit of the number of controls. The 3 main cannons, which were extremely energy-consuming, could also exert their strongest power.

Since then, Chen Rui’s most troublesome high-grade energy problem in the City of Stars had finally been solved successfully. As for the law fragments and law crystal balls obtained in the Ghastly Floating Land, Chen Rui had collected them. At least in the future, it could be used to quickly increase the strength of some people. Of course, this method of improvement had certain ‘side effects’, such as it was more difficult to break through the realm after super-level, and so on. Nevertheless, for ordinary people, especially those who couldn’t break through to super in a lifetime, it was definitely a treasure that could cause turmoil and war.

When Chen Rui preached to Alice last time, although Princess Royal Highness and Madam lord didn’t seem to care much, she still restrained herself after all. Princess Royal Highness adopted the strategy of a certain female fox to suppress, support, and empathize with several existing big families, not because of a series of problems in these families, but because of political needs. After this movement, coupled with the implementation of a series of ‘new’ measures in Dark Moon Estate, the true prestige of the new lord was slowly established.

After all, Alice was not a person who could sit down quietly. Meanwhile, Joanna, Samuel and others under her command were very capable, so after her status was stabilized, the Royal Highness Little Princess easily became a ‘supervisor’, except for some major decisions, the rest were simply handed over to Joanna and others – Anyway, these are the people of brother, so they are absolutely credible (Hmph Hmph, I, the princess will too be the person of brother sooner or later).

Chen Rui was quite helpless about this. Fortunately, the Dark Moon had a solid foundation, and the main power was in the hands of his own people.

The real reason for Dark Moon Estate to change the lord was not targeting the Wales Family, but because Athena wanted to concentrate on being a mother-to-be and couldn’t take care of estate affairs, so she offered to resign. As Shea’s only sister, the first princess of the empire, Alice was also the recognized best candidate to take over the Fallen Angel Empire and the Demon Realm’s largest estate.

Having said that, if someone else took over the estate, let alone Shea, even Chen Rui who developed this estate would not agree.

Another reason Shea put Alice in the Dark Moon was that this sister’s heart had been tied to Chen Rui many years ago, and it had never been shaken. It was no longer a simple or vague ‘like’. Although as the first princess of the empire, marriage was destined to serve the interests of the empire, and there were countless suitors, Shea did not force Alice. She had already pursued a rare happiness, why not let this most beloved sister realize her wish?

As for the size of a certain guy’s crystal harem… I will still condemn and be mean when necessary and not hesitant. Anyway, it is the fault of the man.

So Shea said an implicit word to Chen Rui, “Alice is not young anymore.”

This sentence fully showed the attitude of being an empress and a sister at the same time. In fact, although Alice looked like a pure loli, her personality seemed to never grow up. However, her age was indeed no longer a loli.

Chen Rui was very aware of the thoughts of the Royal Highness Little Princess. Over the years, it would be a lie to say that he was completely indifferent, so he has given her a corresponding promise, but the problem was… that small body. He, who accepted celestial education for many years, inevitably developed a strong sense of guilt.

Let’s go with the flow…

“Brother?” Alice looked at Chen Rui with a distracted look and puffed up her bun face angrily, “I made this steamed red-spotted fish with my own hands with great difficulty. Why did you hold up the chopsticks for so long, but didn’t even have a bite?”

“Because that chopstick is too hard to hold, even harder than a knife.” Roman sighed and looked at the 2 bamboo chopsticks in front of him, “I don’t know how the leader can use it so well. He can even hold tofu.”

“Little Roman, it’s not difficult.” Isabella lightly picked up a few beans with chopsticks and put it into her mouth.

“Qualification issue.” Delia shook her head, took a piece of stewed pork ribs, and put it in Athena’s bowl, “Athena, eat more of this; the child needs nutrition.”

Athena smiled and nodded, “ En .”

“Aunt Athena, you eat this.” Duoduo picked up a fish ball and carefully placed it beside Athena’s mouth.

“Duoduo good girl, aunty likes you the most.” Athena opened her mouth to take the fish ball and touched Duoduo’s little face lovingly.

Seeing that Little Duoduo could use chopsticks, Roman was completely defeated.

Chen Rui then regained his senses, stretched out his chopsticks and tasted a big mouthful of the steamed red-spotted fish brought by Alice, then he nodded, “ Yum , Alice’s level is getting higher and higher.”

Alice was secretly proud, then Ms. Black Dragon, who likes to eat fish the most, rushed over, “I’ll try it!”

“Don’t eat too much.” Alice said boasting, “I made this especially for my brother. If you like it, next time you go to the Princess Villa, I will make it for you myself.”

“It seems to be quite fresh,” Ms. Black Dragon took a bite to taste, and suddenly frowned, “Wait a minute, why is the meat on the back so hard… Alice, it’s clearly undercooked!”

“Impossible!” Alice was stunned. She quickly poked with her chopsticks. No doubt, the fish meat was only soft on the surface, but the meat inside was red and hard. It was really undercooked.

“It’s a matter of heat, it’s okay. The taste in front is really good; you can taste it. Alice made this with love.” Seeing Alice’s sad face, Chen Rui touched her head, “ Hmm , how about you put some sauce and steam it for a while. It will definitely taste better.”

“ En !” Alice felt warm in her heart. She happily carried the plate to the kitchen.

“Sir Uncle, your tricks to coax a little girl are as good as your chopsticks skil.” Roman squeezed his eyes, “How about you teach me some tricks when you have time?”

Will you die if you don’t stir up trouble for a minute? Chen Rui ignored Roman directly.

“Speaking of which, I also want to learn. My ideal is to open a harem bigger than you,” Lala Loli also winked, “If it is really useful, I can consider sacrificing my precious body to accompany you papapa . Hohohohoho …”

Chen Rui also ignored Lalaria, and the voice of Isabella’s laughter came from his mind, “When did you hook up with Lalaria? How many times have you had papapa ? You did a good job of keeping secrets; we don’t even know.”

This was 1 of the special functions of the Super System god, [Heart Talk].

They could turn on the mind call state and communicate with each other within a certain distance. No one else would know.

This kind of mind call state was not a simple ‘private chat’, but it was equivalent to a ‘platform’. With special permission from Chen Rui, multiple people could talk at the same time, just like a separate chat channel in another world.

Kia’s voice also sounded, “It’s so sad… No wonder you still can’t get your spirits up after I changed a lot of postures when we were making out recently.”

Chen Rui was speechless: What do you mean ‘can’t lift up the spirit’? Not to mention I ejaculated several times a night, you little succubus also lost your soul so many times, how can you say such unconscionable words?

“Why did you keep Alice waiting so long if you even provoked Lalaria?” Athena sighed. “It’s so disappointing.”

“Are all men so greedy? Even Lalaria who only likes women? It seems that I have to ask Olypheus to be careful in the future.”

“Yini, Athena, I heard that in the Dead Sea, besides Helen, there is a friend who used to fight side by side. It seems to be Adeline’s sister. What’s her name…”

“You all are getting farther and farther away. I really didn’t have a relationship with Lalaria…”

Chen Rui had a big headache. Looking at the sneers of the 3 madam wives in reality, he knew that he had been tricked by the team. He couldn’t help but wipe a cold sweat, but fortunately, he only opened the ‘private chat’ permission for the wives, if added the others, his head would surely explode.

At this moment, a voice came to his mind again, “Chen Rui! Chen Rui!”

Again? Chen Rui simply ignored it, and he suddenly felt that something was amiss with the sound – It’s Python?

Isn’t Python training with Zola in the [Doom Calamity Kingdom] of the Bloody Empire?

By the way, how could Python join this harem’s private chat ‘channel’?

Neither distance nor authority is possible…

No, it should be Galaxy Divinity Temple!

This is the trace of soul consciousness that separated after ‘becoming a God’!

“Chen Rui!”

The calling sounded again, and Chen Rui entered the Galaxy Divinity Temple without thinking.

Python’s voice appeared anxiously in the main hall of the Galaxy Divinity Temple. She disappeared after leaving only 3 sentences.

“Come to the [Doom Calamity Kingdom], we have met a strong enemy!”

“Bring Paglio along!”

“Quick!”

chapters.title: Chapter 1154: Plague
chapters.body:
Chapter 1154: Plague

Chen Rui, who quit the Super System, stood up abruptly, surprising everyone who was enjoying dinner.

“Paglio, follow me immediately.”

“What happened?” Athena asked worriedly.

“Zola and Python have met a strong enemy, and Python wants Paglio to go with me.”

Me? Paglio pointed to his nose in surprise. Even Python herself couldn’t deal with the “strong enemy”, what’s the use of me? Is that madam trying to fool me again…

Master Poison Dragon felt a headache, but from Chen Rui’s expression, it could be seen that this matter should be serious and not a joke, so Paglio stood up immediately without any hesitation, “Let’s go.”

“Be careful.” Several voices said at the same time, not only Athena and others, but also Krobelus.

“We will.” Chen Rui nodded and said to Athena, “Tell Alice for me.”

With a flash of light, Paglio entered the space of the Tower of Glory, and the [Star Gate] appeared in front of Chen Rui at the same time. They both disappeared in place.

This scene stunned Alice at the door of the kitchen in the distance. Looking at the fish still steaming in the pot, she couldn’t help pouted, but hearing the last sentence made the little princess bit her lip and smiled again. Brother still has me in her mind.

In the palace of the Bloody Empire, a space door with faint starlight opened. Chen Rui flew out.

Judging from Python’s previous performance, the battle situation should be very critical, so Chen Rui didn’t go to see Tiffany and directly shifted above the original Mechanic Association building.

During the war with Sariel 3 years ago, in order not to disturb the ordinary people nearby, the Mechanic Association moved to a new location. The original building included the Book Collection Hall where Sariel’s sub-kingdom was located was all isolated under Tiffany’s special order.

Later, Python devoured Sariel’s [Moon Kingdom], which had been improved and rebuilt over the years to perfectly replace the original 4th floor of the Book Collection Hall, so the old site of the Mechanic Association had been isolated until now. The 4th floor of the new Book Collection Hall was never open.

As far as Chen Rui knew, during the period when he led his family and friends to the Ghastly Floating Land for special training, the 4th floor of the Book Collection Hall that Python built was nearly completed. She was planning to transfer the entire sub-kingdom to the new location. Unexpectedly, there was such an emergency.

Looking down from this position, there was a strange power breath scattered nearby. Even the ancient runes protective magic circles arranged by Chen Rui himself in the past seemed broken. This special power breath seemed to have weakened the protective power of the rune array.

This was still the remnant power breath overflowing from Python’s [Doom Calamity Kingdom]. Just judging from this remnant power breath, the enemy’s strength was by no means inferior to Python!

Chen Rui thought for a while, but he did not release Paglio and flew directly to the Book Collection Hall.

The Book Collection Hall building was badly damaged. The closer he got, the stronger the power breath became. When Chen Rui was approaching, the Super System had already warned about a lethal poison. Chen Rui frowned and accelerated into the Book Collection Hall.

It was not the first time he went to Python’s [Doom Calamity Kingdom]. Although the journey was extremely fast, countless traces of destruction could still be seen with peripheral vision, including the outer space of the kingdom. In the blink of an eye, Chen Rui had already entered [Doom Calamity Kingdom].

After entering [Doom Calamity Kingdom], Chen Rui immediately discovered the abnormality of this sub-kingdom.

Part of Python’s [Doom Calamity Kingdom] was a swamp. The ground was black, but there was vigorous vitality inside. However, Chen Rui felt lifeless right now. Whether it was the sky or the earth, it was covered with a dark blue color, which made people feel extraordinarily depressed.

With the constant reminders from the Super System, Chen Rui’s heart sank. With the strength of Python, [Doom Calamity Kingdom] was actually contaminated with a special power. This showed how threatening the incoming person was. The Breeze Shadow Boots appeared under his feet, and his speed accelerated again.

After flying for a while, he finally sensed something. As the highest controller of the Super System, within a certain distance, Chen Rui could sense the existence and movement of the linker. He immediately flew in the direction of the sense.

The oppressive power ahead was getting stronger and stronger. The source was that there was a dark blue object suspended in the far sky, which was actually a crystal structure cage. The unconscious person in the cage was Fairy Dragon Zola!

Chen Rui immediately flew forward. Before he could get close, he was already contaminated with a strange dark blue, then he was repelled by a huge force. At the same time, waves of eroding power were swiftly invading his body and soul. Might!

With a thought, Chen Rui activated the [Pole Star Transformation] in an instant, and the resistance was greatly weakened immediately. However, the dark blue crystal cage seemed to be some kind of living thing. The more Chen Rui resisted the pressure and approached, the more it began to gather strength. Zola inside showed a faint painful expression.

This situation surprised Chen Rui. He stepped back quickly. Feeling the special power breath contained in this might, he thought of Python’s previous words. He released Paglio from the Tower of Glory right away.

As soon as Paglio came out of the Tower of Glory, he immediately felt the strange dark blue breath and blurted out, “Plague power!”

Chen Rui suddenly realized why Python specially declared to bring Paglio.

Paglio looked at the situation around the cage, “Such a pure plague power. This level should have reach the highest level of the Pseudo-God, and the structure of this cage is also quite troublesome. If we forcibly squeeze or attack from outside, the plague power will explode with twice the power.”

Paglio’s words made Chen Rui break out in a cold sweat. Luckily, he didn’t try to forcefully break the cage just now, “Is there a way to rescue Zola?”

“If it’s other Pseudo-God’s power, I can’t help it at all. As for this plague power… I’m the ‘Plague God’.” The poison dragon shrugged his shoulders, “Go find Python. Leave her to me.”

As Paglio said, he had already equipped with star armor. The delicate armor was intertwined with silver and emerald light. Starlights appeared around his body. The poison dragon drew a mysterious trajectory with his hands. The shining stars faintly formed a special constellation. Under the illumination of this “constellation”, Zola’s dark blue cage began to become a little thinner. The dark blue in the space also began to fade rapidly.

Chen Rui heaved a sigh of relief. He flickered and disappeared into a flash of lightning.

Although [Doom Calamity Kingdom] had a large area, with the strength of [Purple Pole Star Transformation] and the speed of the Breeze Shadow Boots, it didn’t take much time for him to travel. However, he shuttled back and forth several times, but he didn’t sense Python. He only saw the exaggerated traces of destruction on the ground, indicating a terrifying battle that happened not long ago. The life of the entire kingdom seemed to vanish.

Chen Rui frowned tightly. After receiving the news from Python, he had already come at the fastest speed, but he was still one step.

Python’s strength could now compete with Michael’s. This was her “home field” and even with the help of Zola, but it was still destroyed to such an extent. She was even forced to ask Chen Rui for help. This showed the strength of the enemy or maybe enemies.

3 archangels?

It should be impossible. Even if the 3 archangels came to the Demon Realm, they would not know that the kingdom of Python is here.

This was originally Sariel’s kingdom, but besides our own people, only the 3 archangels knows that Sariel had been eliminated. It is very likely that this enemy is coming for Sariel, but he is also Python’s enemy at the same time?

Chen Rui quickly speculated about various possibilities in his mind, and he came to the previous dark blue cage.

At this time, Paglio’s constellation power had turned into a vortex, sucking up the nearby plague power. The entire kingdom was gradually recovering.

The plague that was enough to “infect” the peak stage of the Pseudo-Godkingdom might be a great source of energy for Paglio.

Of course, this was just the targeted absorption of pure energy. If the peak stage of the Pseudo-God really stood in front of Paglio and moved his little finger, it would be enough to crush the poison dragon to death.

Soon, the cage that imprisoned Zola was looming for a while before disappearing. Zola fell down, but she was caught by Chen Rui who appeared in an instant.

Paglio’s power was indeed quite effective. The dark blue on the Fairy Dragon’s face gradually faded. She finally opened her eyes.

“Chen Rui!” Zola exclaimed, “Where’s Python?”

Chen Rui shook his head, “I received an urgent call from the trace of Python’s soul in the ‘world’. I just rushed to [Doom Calamity Kingdom], and I only saw you trapped here, but I didn’t find Python. Who is the enemy? Even you and Python are not his opponent?”

“I don’t know. I’ve been in closed-door training in Python’s kingdom. Suddenly, I was awakened by a shockwave, then I heard an emergency call from Python with soul power, saying that a strong enemy is coming and let me escape first and notify you for rescue.” Zola recalled the scene at that time, “I accepted Python’s transfer power, and I was about to escape from this kingdom, but I was discovered by the enemy. The enemies are 2 men. Both of whom were very powerful. I was imprisoned by one of them, then I lost consciousness…”

No doubt more than one enemy! Chen Rui asked again, “When you were imprisoned, was Python also caught?”

“No, she fled to the other side, trying to lure the two of them away so that I could escape successfully. But an enemy with black hair and blue eyes saw through her intention and attacked me. Before I lost consciousness, I seemed to see that after imprisoning me, this person also chased after Python.”

Chen Rui already understood what happened. Python’s strategy was correct. She successfully lured the enemies away. The enemy was in a hurry, so he only temporarily imprisoned Zola. Now he came immediately and brought Paglio, who could dissolve the plague power, and successfully rescued Zola.

However, since Python chose to escape, the enemies must be at the peak stage of the Pseudo-God too, and they had formidable strength. She couldn’t 1vs2 them. Splitting soul into the Super System to send a message wasn’t an easy task. Being distracted in such a dangerous battle was lethal, no wonder she only said 3 sentences. Therefore, the most important thing at present was to rescue her.

TL: There are still more Pseudo-God in Demon Realm?

chapters.title: Chapter 1155: Whereabouts
chapters.body:
Chapter 1155: Whereabouts

Zola had been successfully rescued, but Python’s whereabouts were still unknown, and the entire [Doom Calamity Kingdom]’s life had been wiped out by the enemy’s plague. If another super-level trainer’s sub-kingdom was destroyed in such a way, the person’s strength would long be reduced tremendously. He could only consume the power of Pseudo-Godhood. Fortunately, the kingdom that Python really relied on was the doom calamity constellation of the Super System, so she wasn’t greatly affected. But in the face of 2 powerful enemies of equal strength, especially the kind of disease that might have a certain restraint effect on her doom calamity, this battle must be extremely dangerous, so he must provide aid as soon as possible.

The problem is that the peak of the Pseudo-God’s speed and shifting are too fast. Now I don’t know which direction Python escaped to, plus there is no new news from the Super System, so I can’t split up to search.

No matter where I look for Python, Zola definitely cannot stay here. Not only because she has not fully recovered from the plague power effect, but also in order to prevent the other party from accidentally returning and putting her in danger again. Therefore, Chen Rui first brought Paglio and Zola to leave the [Doom Calamity Kingdom].

After leaving the old site of Mechanic Association, Chen Rui accidentally sensed the new link target again, which turned out to be Tiffany.

Since the plague might could weaken the protective magic circle, the plague power leaked out. Even if there was only an extremely weak power left, it was not something ordinary people could resist.

In the area where the plague power spread, many residents suddenly fell sick. Some were unconscious, some were weak, some had acne all over their bodies, itching unbearably…

Fortunately, this area was a designated isolated area back then. If it was a densely populated block, once an outbreak occurred, the consequences would be disastrous.

Since Tiffany became an empress, her prestige had been getting higher and higher. When such a strange epidemic happened in the capital, she took the lead and went to the front line to inspect it in person. However, the plague power was beyond imagination. Even a few guards around Tiffany were infected. This undoubtedly worsened the situation.

If Tiffany didn’t have the safeguard of the Super System’s faith power, and had advanced as a super powerhouse, she would be difficult to resist.

When Tiffany was in a hurry, a familiar voice suddenly came from her mind, “Tiffany.”

“Chen Rui!” It was not the first time that Tiffany used the ‘private chat channel’, and her tense heart suddenly relaxed a lot. She felt that as long as this man was around, no matter how difficult things were, she would have a backbone. This kind of feeling was something that she couldn’t have alone on that cold throne. It was also the most cherished thing in her mind after the catastrophe that almost killed her heart.

“Don’t let other people, including your guards, enter this area again.” Chen Rui told her the whole story in the most succinct words, “Paglio will solve the source soon. The disease will be under control.”

“ En .” Tiffany immediately ordered the evacuation. Just in case, the magician legion teamed up to cast a temporary enchantment to seal off the plague area.

At the same time, Paglio activated the ability of ‘Plague God’, devouring all the remaining plague power. No doubt the plague had stopped spreading. The symptoms of those patients were recovering rapidly. At most, they were weak after the disease.

“Zola, are you okay?”

Zola nodded to Tiffany, closed her eyes and channeled her strength to restore her physical strength. The poison dragon devoured a large amount of plague power, so he was also quietly ‘digesting’ the power in the room of the temporary headquarters.

“Thanks to you and Paglio, otherwise if the plague spreads in the capital…” Tiffany finally took off her usual cold-blooded empress mask after her subordinates retreated. She breathed a sigh of relief and revealed a coquettish personality.

Chen Rui nodded, “Python’s situation is very bad now, and she is in urgent need of rescue, but I don’t know which direction she fled to.”

“I can send someone to check around, but in this case, it will inevitably delay a lot of time.”

“If it’s about this incident…” A familiar voice sounded, “Maybe I can give you the answer.”

“Really?” Chen Rui’s eyes lit up. He looked at the figure that appeared at the door.

Raizen.

After disappearing for several years, Raizen’s strength had reached the peak stage of the Kingdom level. Raizen was not a linker of the Super System. He was able to reach such a state in a short period of time with his own training, which was worthy of being a top powerhouse. Of course, this ‘top’ referred to the general category.

However, if the peak stage of the Kingdom level wanted to break through to Demi-God, one must solve the biggest problem of the real kingdom. Chen Rui’s relatives and friends used the golden finger of the Super System to obtain the real faith kingdom by comprehending the 2-star enhancement. So far, there were only 3 people, Catherine, Paglio, and Isabella obtained their kingdoms this way. The rest such as Zola, Lalaria all comprehended before ‘becoming a god’.

After Raizen appeared, Tiffany’s face turned cold instantly. Her eyes exuded a faint cold air. The soft and relaxed expression just now was gone, “I remember I told the imperial guards not to allow anyone to approach.”

“It seems that the execution rate of your orders is not ideal… or is my residual prestige as the ex-ruler is more stubborn than you imagined?” Raizen’s attitude was also very cold, “If I were you, the first thing I would do is to execute all the imperial guards.”

“You’re you, I’m me. What I want to do will not be influenced by you.” Tiffany said coldly, “Besides, you also know that you are a ‘former’ ruler. If you can’t let go of power, I can give you a chance to make a comeback, but you also have to face failure and all consequences.”

Chen Rui shook his head secretly. The relationship between the father and daughter is still the same, not much stronger than the enemy. However, now he was more concerned about Raizen’s previous topic, and asked, “Your Majesty Raizen, I want to know the ‘answer’ you said just now.”

“Actually, it’s useless even if you know the answer.” Raizen shook his head, “You are the planner of the current Demon Realm’s alliance of the 3 empires. If you think that your life and death have no effect on this situation, I will not stop you from courting death.”

“It seems that my importance is more ‘stubborn’ than I imagined. Even Your Majesty Raizen doesn’t want this son-in-law to die.” Chen Rui frowned, “But why do you think that by going, I am ‘courting death’?”

Raizen snorted when he heard the word ‘son-in-law’. He looked at Tiffany, and said a word, “Satan.”

Chen Rui was shocked. He finally understood that 1 of the enemies chasing and killing Python was actually Satan!

His mind began to think quickly: When I joined forces with Satan to face Despair Lord Dillosro in the Dead Sea, I had signed a contract with Satan. As long as I kill Dillosro first, Satan will not do anything against me within 10 years.

Satan does abide by the contract. He has not appeared in front of me in the past few years or used the 3 empires to target me, but that is all. The contract does not stipulate that Satan must abandon the ‘Dark Divinity Temple’ plan. In fact, Satan is unlikely to agree to such terms.

Then Satan must be actively preparing for something related to the Dark Divinity Temple in the dark. This time it should be just a coincidence that he came to ‘deal with’ Python. Because almost no one knows that Sariel has been replaced by Python, Satan’s purpose this time is likely to seek Sariel’s cooperation. The purpose is self-evident – Satan, Sariel, plus another peak stage of the Pseudo-God helper who imprisoned Zola. The 3 Pseudo-Gods can follow the example of the 3 archangels of the human world and use the Dark Divinity Temple as a tool to firmly control the faith of the entire Demon Realm in their hands.

Although Sariel and Satan are enemies, in the face of such huge interests, enemies can also become friends. If Sariel is not willing, he can at least get rid of this potential threat by fighting 2 vs 1.

Perhaps Satan has another purpose, which is to intervene in the 3 empires with the help of Sariel and another person, kill me, and continue to promote the plan of Dark Divinity Temple. Because Satan only signed the contract with me, whereas the other 2 are not restricted.

It is possible that Satan’s purpose is coercion by coming with his accomplices. However, they did not see Sariel, but found Python by accident. Python did not hesitate to sacrifice her body back then to defeat Satan, Sariel and others and escape with a silver box. Then, she disappeared without a trace. She was an enemy in the first place. The Book of Destruction was very important to Satan’s plan. At present, Satan had collected 2 pages of the Book of Destruction, only missing the last page in Python’s hand. He even wants to bet to get my creation origin to barely complete the incomplete destruction origin. Now that he met Python, he not only feels furious, but he also feels lucky to meet her by chance. Satan’s first reaction must be to kill Python, grab the silver box, collect the Book of Destruction, and solve the biggest problem of the Dark Divinity Temple.

Chen Rui’s thoughts turned, and he already had a general outline of the ins and outs of the matter in his mind. He asked quickly, “Your Majesty Raizen, please tell me which direction Satan has gone to.”

Raizen’s eyes narrowed, but he didn’t speak.

“Chen Rui has no time to delay with you.” Tiffany’s voice became more and more cold, “You have been training at the Dark Furnace in the western suburbs all these years. If my guess is correct, you should be coming from there. “

“The Dark Furnace?” It was not the first time Chen Rui heard of this place. The Dark Furnace was the most dangerous secret place of the royal family in the Bloody Empire. It was extremely dangerous. Many Mammon Royal Family had lost their lives in it over the years. When Raizen was training in the Dark Furnace, he was plotted against by the Dark Elemental King instigated by Teris. Although he broke through to the Kingdom Level, he was almost eliminated by Midnight Sun in the Town Nimbus battle.

From Raizen’s expression, it could be seen that Tiffany guessed right. Chen Rui knew that Raizen should be in the Dark Furnace closed-door training. When he felt the terrifying enemy coming, and the direction was the Bloody Empire, Raizen immediately returned to the capital. After he heard about the plague, he rushed here immediately.

No matter how bad Raizen’s relationship with Tiffany had been these years, as a father, he was much better than that mother after all. Especially after Tiffany returned after the disaster, some of the things he did were to help Tiffany, whether in public or private.

However, due to the very tough personalities of the father and daughter, so far, there was still no sign of breaking the ice in the relationship.

After being exposed by Tiffany, Raizen knew that he could not stop Chen Rui with his own strength, so he simply said, “When I was training in the Dark Furnace, I sensed danger, so I quickly got out and saw that the Dark Furnace was turned into a strange space by Satan. That kind of space gave me a strong sense of fear, so I fled in a hurry. After you think about it clearly, decide for yourself if you want to go or stay.”

Chen Rui nodded, looked at Zola and Paglio, gave Tiffany a ‘ don’t worry’ gaze, and instantly disappeared in place.

TL: Could the Dark Furnace be a page of the Book of Destruction?

chapters.title: Chapter 1156: Abaddon
chapters.body:
Chapter 1156: Abaddon

“Are you so determined to be a widow?” After Chen Rui disappeared, Raizen looked at his daughter with glimmering eyes, “You yourself have been in the Mountain Seckred for so many years, you should be very clear about what enemies your husband is about to face.”

“There is a bastard who likes widows the most, but it’s a pity that he’s not here. As for that cunning human, even if you have been dead for tens of thousands of years, that guy will still be alive and kicking.” A lazy voice sounded. It was Paglio who finished ‘digesting’.

Back then, Raizen alone defeated Paglio, Zola and Chen Rui in the Warlock Fortress. Later, Paglio participated in the Martial Battle Competition of the Bloody Empire. Both of them were no stranger to each other. When Raizen sensed the vague breath in Paglio, he was secretly surprised, “Is there a way for him to escape?”

“Your news is too late, Raizen.” The poison dragon shook his finger, “Is it because of ‘retirement’ that even your mind and eyesight have degenerated? No matter how powerful Satan is, he is still in the category of Pseudo-God after all; he isn’t a God yet right.”

“What do you mean?” Raizen frowned.

“The peak stage of the Pseudo-God that I know, in addition to Satan, there are 4 others – The human world’s Holy Church’s 3 archangels Michael, Gabriel and Raphael plus Sariel of the Demon Realm with the power of the Evil Pupil and immortality. About 3 years ago, Sariel had already died in the hands of Chen Rui. A few months ago, that guy took a madwoman to the Holy Light Mountain to fight with the 3 strongest angels, then they came back as if nothing had happened without any missing parts.”

“How is this possible?!” Raizen was shocked and couldn’t help blurting out.

No wonder Raizen was surprised. In the martial battle competition of the Bloody Empire, Chen Rui defeated Demi-God Lalaria and advanced to the final with a sweeping momentum. Meanwhile, Raizen was easily defeated by Lalaria in the quarter-finals. The strength rank was obvious. With Raizen’s current strength, he was not the opponent of Chen Rui back then. He had expected that Chen Rui’s strength might also improve over the years, but he did not expect to leap to this level!
