Pseudo-God! Peak stage of the Pseudo-God! He also killed Sariel, who is supposed to be a powerhouse of the same level as Satan!

“How is it impossible?” Master Poison Dragon shook his head with the vicissitudes of life, “Don’t look at me now as an intermediate stage of the Demi-God, but comparing only brings rage. In front of that guy and his women, I can only bow my head and become an apprentice. The mad woman who is recuperating over there… Uh , Zola, her strength is at the intermediate stage of the Pseudo-God, and Catherine reached the peak stage of the Demi-God 3 years ago. Now she may have touched the bottleneck fo the Pseudo-God. As for the person Chen Rui is going to save now is a terrifying madwoman who is eligible to be hunted down by Satan and his accomplice. You should be able to imagine her strength. Speaking of which… Hmph Hmph , that madwoman might have an affair with the cunning human.”

Although the last sentence was purely made up by the poison dragon, the amount of information contained in these words was enough to make Raizen speechless in shock. Not to mention he once defeated Paglio, Zola, and Catherine at the beginning, but now even Paglio, who was the weakest, had already climbed to a height that he could only look up to.

Raizen was silent for a while, raised his head and stared at the sky as if there were a pair of eyes staring at him: You will go further than me, right?

“There is still a long way to go.” Raizen whispered to himself, glanced at Tiffany, and left the room.

The Dark Furnace.

Under the power of Satan, this secret realm of the original Mammon Royal Family had become an independent world.

In the dark sky, there was a red light as if there was red lightning shining behind the dark clouds. The ground was a black land, exuding terrifying high temperature, but it unbelievably gave people a completely opposite cold feeling.

The sky in the distance was vibrating violently. 2 huge forces were constantly crossing and colliding. 2 eyes were calmly watching the confrontation between the 2 forces. He seemed to be integrated with the whole world, which almost made people unaware of its existence.

In the violent impact, the 2 forces in the air separated again.

Python was panting slightly. She was exuding black mist all over and was wearing a dark red armor. There were a few bloodstains on her face cut by sharp blades. The countless capillaries near the wounds bulged slightly, spreading out like fine spider webs. They covered half of her face in an instant, making her look particularly ferocious.

Opposite Python was a man with short black hair. His eyes glowed with dark blue light, and the armor on his body was also dark blue as the main color. There were half-foot-long nails on the 10 fingers. They were shining with cold light like blades. The wounds on Python’s face were caused by these sharp nails.

Python’s pupils flickered. Blue smoke came out from the bloodstains on her face, expelling the foreign force from her body. The abnormal diffusion on her face quickly disappeared, “Your plague power is useless to me, Abaddon.”

“Indeed, but your poison power is also useless to me, even with the power of Sariel’s doom calamity.” The man named Abaddon smiled grimly, “I haven’t seen you for so many years, you have surprised me enough. I thought you only had the soul left, but unexpectedly, you found an amazing body. Even I would be afraid of that powerful melee combat ability. What is even more surprising is that you actually defeated Sariel and devoured his power. It is a pity that you did not get his Evil Pupil, so you cannot compete with my Soul Eyes. Our talents counter each other. If I’m alone, I’m not sure that I can beat you. Unfortunately, it is 2 vs 1 now. Plus, it is in this kind of place; you have no chance of winning.”

Python shook his head, “There are no absolutes. I don’t think I’m doomed.”

“You’re not a person who can’t recognize reality. We were old friends back then. If you choose to surrender, with that friendship…”

“I have a friendship with you?” Python smiled disdainfully, “I just remember that there was a guy with malicious intentions whose eyeballs were almost gouged out by me.”

“Men are inevitably enchanted by beauty sometimes.” Abaddon said nonchalantly, “Your body seems more attractive now. Of course, as a soul talent, what fascinates me most is your soul. I can sense that you should have a special soul fusion ability…”

“I’m not surprised by your shamelessness, but I didn’t expect that a guy who always thought he was the closest to God would let go of his pride to bully less with more.” Python interrupted Abaddon as she looked contemptuously at Satan who was watching the battle in the distance. When Satan and Abaddon were chasing her before, they deliberately forced her to the west where Satan’s sub-kingdom world was.

In this kingdom, Python’s power had been suppressed to a certain extent. Even if Satan didn’t make a move, just watching the battle from a distance was enough to distract her and make her unable to exert her strongest power.

The most troublesome thing was that Satan was not doing nothing. When Abaddon was fighting with her, he had already spread the might, completely sealing the nearby space. Plus the troublesome time might, the chance of successfully escaping was almost zero.

As Python spoke, she calculated quickly in her mind— In addition to the Mountain Seckred, Satan actually has a second sub-kingdom. This sub-kingdom that has been hidden all this time should have been 1 of Satan’s backup plans to use against Sariel.

Whether it was Satan or Abaddon, they were not inferior to her in strength, especially Abaddon’s power could her more. Now such a fight was obviously consuming her power. They wanted to pay the lowest price to catch her in one fell swoop.

The only hope was that Chen Rui, who received the message from the soul, came to the rescue. Because when the consciousness merged with a trace of the soul in the ‘world’, the original body would be in an unconscious state. The 3-sentence message alone made her pay a high price. If she was not in her own [Doom Calamity Kingdom] at that time, she would have been severely injured.

“What I want to do is all based on my heart. You have no say to tell me what to do, and my pride is beyond your comprehension.” Satan looked directly into Python’s eyes indifferently, “Actually, there is no point in buying time like this. Even if your little dragon friend is also imprisoned by Abaddon’s plague cage. Unless you choose to annihilate yourself, you can only be captured and hand over the last page of the Book of Destruction!”

Python rolled her eyes, “You came to Sariel just for some kind of cooperation. Why do you have to put me to death or surrender? Since I have the Book of Destruction, why can’t I become a collaborator? Maybe, you think I am not as easy to control or fool as Abaddon or Sariel?”

“You can still provoke our relationship at this time; as expected of Python.” Satan glanced at Abaddon, “It is undeniable that whether it is me, Abaddon or Sariel, we all have considerable ambitions. Maybe one day, when we gain great power, we will turn against each other again. However, common goals and interests can at least allow us to see the hope that one day will come. Before that, I can cooperate with them with confidence. And you… I can only describe it as ‘dangerous’.”

“May I take that as a compliment?” Python asked with a sneer.

“Perhaps only that person can make you follow with all your heart. It’s a pity that that person… No matter what, you will never have such a chance.” With that said, Satan exuded a cold murderous aura, “For the sake of us being the fallen one back then, I will give you the last chance to make a choice: Surrender or annihilation!”

Python shook her head slowly, “You don’t know the answers to some questions. Now that we are already at this step, there is no need to talk nonsense. Even if I’m annihilated, you will have to pay a heavy price. Besides, you will never be able to get the Book of Destruction!”

“It is undeniable that if you put all your eggs in one basket, we will not be unscathed, but I want to remind you that,” Abaddon stuck out his tongue and licked the blood on his nails, which was more of a psychological pressure, “even if you detonate your Pseudo-Godhood, I also have the opportunity to ingest your soul fragments at the last moment. Then you will really suffer at that time. Our talents counter each other after all”

Python snorted. Before he could speak, Satan frowned suddenly, “Someone broke in!”

This sentence brightened Python’s eyes, and Abaddon said disapprovingly, “The kind of insensible ants, just annihilate them at will!”

“The speed of the other party is very fast! He is coming straight at us!”

As soon as Satan’s words ended, a purple lightning pierced the dark red clouds in the sky.

Abaddon showed a moving expression. He finally understood why Satan used ‘very fast’ to describe it. In terms of speed alone, even he had to be afraid!

In the next second, a figure appeared in front of the 3 of them.

“It’s you!” Satan looked at the figure shining with purple starlight with disbelief on his face.

It’s actually him!

Moreover, judging from the speed just now…

Python’s laughter sounded, “Satan, now you should understand why I said you don’t know the answer when you said I’ve no chance to follow someone again…”

chapters.title: Chapter 1157: Angel Of Death
chapters.body:
Chapter 1157: Angel Of Death

“Are you okay?” Chen Rui could see that Python’s injury was not serious, but fortunately, her momentum was still strong.

“If you come later, it may be very bad.” Python had really relaxed as she shrugged, “It seems that what I have is ‘luck’ instead of ‘doom’.”

Chen Rui understood the meaning of her last sentence. He smiled slightly and set his eyes on Satan and Abaddon, “Long time no see, Satan. Who is this person? Your partner?”

Satan’s eyes narrowed, but the light in his pupils became more and more menacing. He wanted to see through Chen Rui’s soul, but all he saw was a vastness as deep as the starry sky. He actually had an unfathomable feeling.

“You don’t even know ‘Dark Angel of Death’ Abaddon? It seems that you still have a lot of things you haven’t remembered…” Satan finally withdrew the power in his gaze, “Under this situation, you actually cooperated with Python. What a surprise.”

“Looks like he’s an acquaintance?” Abaddon looked at Chen Rui. His pupils flickered, and a plague power rushed toward Chen Rui silently, “It should not be someone unknown to have this level of power. Why do I have no impression of this guy at all?”

Satan pretended to not see Abaddon’s move, saying, “You can call him ‘Richard’… Let’s call him that for now.”

“What a clumsy little trick. It seems that Satan’s taste is getting lower and lower.” Chen Rui snorted, and the layer of dark blue color on the star armor disappeared, “Abaddon? Unfortunately, I haven’t heard of you either. But even if you don’t make a move, I won’t let you go just because you imprisoned my woman.”

“Your woman?” Abaddon glanced at Python, “You should be talking about the beauty dragon before. It seems that you have released her from the plague prison? But my cage is not so simple…”

Chen Rui didn’t say anything about Paglio canceling Zola’s plague prison, but he just looked at Satan, “Satan, do you want to fight me?”

“Of course, unfortunately…” Satan shook his head, “Now is not the time.”

“Satan?” Abaddon was taken aback. The faint breath from this ‘Richard’ should have reached the peak stage of the Pseudo-God. He is at the same level as me and possesses a terrifying speed talent. Judging from Satan’s tone and attitude, he should also be an enemy that should not be underestimated, but Satan is actually unwilling to fight with him! So, am I fighting against 2? Even if Python’s current strength is discounted, I’m afraid I won’t be able to defend myself…

“I signed into a contract with him 3 years ago. 10 years… that is, 7 years later, there will be a battle. Before that, I will not fight him.”

Satan’s explanation made Abaddon understand. Since it was a powerhouse of the same level, the contract could not be torn up, but what Abaddon didn’t expect was that when Chen Rui and Satan made the contract, Chen Rui was just an ‘intermediate stage of the Pseudo-God’.

For Satan, this contract or agreement with ‘him’ had extraordinary significance, and he was unwilling to forcibly violate it, which was also a kind of pride. In fact, if Satan really tried to void the contract, he would be even more surprised. Python had the same surprise back then.

“No wonder… when you found me, you said that you would not appear in public for a few years, and let Sariel and I start the matter of the Dark Divinity Temple in the Demon Realm Empire.” Abaddon realized, “This contract should be one of the main reasons.”

Chen Rui was secretly shocked when he heard the words. As he expected, although Satan admitted defeat in the last bet fight and promised to fight him 10 years later, he did not stop the Dark Divinity Temple plan. This visit to the Bloody Empire to ‘visit’ Sariel was part of the plan. The original intention was to unite or eradicate Sariel through coercion and lure, so that the Dark Divinity Temple plan could be further implemented smoothly, at least without hindrance. If the problem of Sariel was solved, then the next step must be for Sariel and Abaddon to repeat Satan’s method a few years ago, control the 3 empires, and then build the so-called temple to control the faith of the entire Demon Realm in their hands.

All in all, this time he found Python by accident. She could be used. If Chen Rui hadn’t taken the risk to kill Sariel and Python hadn’t recovered so quickly, then even if he could limit Satan with a 10-year agreement, they had to face terrifying opponents like Abaddon and Sariel now.

Anyway, it is indeed good luck after all.

“However, my contract target is only him.” Satan said lightly, and a powerful breath emerged from the kingdom, locking Python from a distance.

“Understood.” The dark blue in Abaddon’s eyes surged, “Then leave this ‘Richard’ to me. If it’s 1 vs 1, I have absolute confidence.”

“Perhaps… no matter who wins or loses between both of you, I will be disappointed.” A black armor appeared on Satan’s body with a cold crystal light. Suddenly, he showed a strange smile to Chen Rui, “Let me see how much strength you have recovered.”

“You will be really disappointed.” Chen Rui glanced back at Python, “1 vs 1. Any problem?”

“My sub-kingdom has been destroyed, so I may not last long.” Python sighed, “Do your best. If you can, better finish the battle quickly.”

Hearing Python’s words, Chen Rui became more confident, because he knew that the sub-kingdom was not as important to Python as the ordinary Pseudo-God. It seemed that Python had not used the last trump card in the previous battle. The reason for saying this must be to plot against Satan by surprise.

“If you really can’t hold on, just send me a voice transmission. As long as there is no special interference, I can keep you in the ‘world’ at any time.” Chen Rui’s voice sounded in Python’s mind. It was obviously the harem exclusive ‘private chat’ channel.

“I have only 1 request. No matter what happens, don’t take me away before I speak up.” Python didn’t say much. She turned her attention completely to Satan. After all, this was at least an opponent comparable to Michael, and she was also injured, so she had to be focused.

If she retreated prematurely, it would also affect Chen Rui’s battle situation.

“Quick battle?” The long nails on the 5 fingers of Abaddon’s right hand slowly moved around, like 5 extremely sharp daggers, “I should be the one who said this. As long as I kill this guy, you will completely fall into despair, right? I will let him know what the horror of death is.”

“If you can get rid of him, I can consider real surrender.” Python’s laughter had a strange charm, which seemed to contain special confidence.

“It seems that you really care about this guy to actually say such a thing.” Abaddon exposed Python’s provocative method, “But I don’t have much patience. Even if you don’t try to provoke me, I will finish him off immediately.”

“Let’s wait and see.” Python said something with a pun, and her figure slowly flew to the side like a fallen leaf. When she moved, Satan’s figure also moved.

Chen Rui and Abaddon lowered slowly toward the ground. Abaddon’s seemingly habitually circling 5 fingers drew strange marks, making Chen Rui, who was always watching his opponent’s movements, feel dazzled. At this moment, Abaddon’s figure moved.

The 2 figures passed each other before they slowly landed on the ground.

There were 3 bloodstains on Chen Rui’s face. Although the wounds were small, fresh blood flowed out continuously. The blood was actually dark blue, and a strange feeling spread from the wounds. But soon, the blood stopped flowing. The dark blue blood also turned red, and the wounds gradually faded away.

Abaddon covered his neck, where there was also a knife-like wound. This ‘knife’ did less damage to the body, but the key was that his soul felt slightly torn apart.

Abaddon’s gaze set on Chen Rui’s knife-like palm, and he no longer had any contempt toward Chen Rui. The pure plague power seemed to have no effect on this enemy, and the sword qi launched mid-air by that palm could actually directly hurt the soul. He seems to be a formidable enemy.

Chen Rui was also full of vigilance. This Abaddon’s attack was the strangest among the opponents he had encountered. If it weren’t for his [Analytical Eyes] and his instinct, he would fall for the opponent’s deceitful means.

This was not a contest like the Holy Light Mountain with reservations, but a real life-and-death battle without any restrictions. Only the last one standing was the real winner.

Chen Rui’s figure flashed and appeared behind Abaddon, and the [Aura Blade] in his hand emitted a strong sharp qi, slashing toward Abaddon’s neck. With his current strength of the [Pole Star Transformation] plus the [Wind Escape] buff of the Breeze Shadow Boots, even in the peak stage of the Pseudo-God, his speed was the top existence. Abaddon couldn’t dodge. He turned around and parried the [Aura Blade] with long nails. It made a metallic impact as sparks splashed everywhere.

Although Abaddon withstood the slash, he sensed a warning in his mind. He leaned back abruptly, narrowly avoiding the sword qi which pierced through his nails. A tuft of his hair was cut off. Chen Rui was about to pursue even more, but he suddenly felt that his palm seemed to be bound by something. As he checked, he realized it was those long nails!

The nails, which were harder than metal, had bent into a hook shape and clasped his palm. If it wasn’t for [Aura Blade]’s palm, which was equally hard, the hook would have been embedded into his palm.

Both of them lost the ability to move 1 hand, so they punched each other’s chest at the same time. After discovering the opponent’s intentions, they also had no intention of stopping or parrying.

“ Bang! ” The 2 figures separated again. They flew back for more than 10 meters before they stabilized their figures. Abaddon’s breastplate had a slightly dented fist mark, and Chen Rui’s star armor also had a few inconspicuous cracks.

Abaddon’s attack contained a special penetration for the soul, like a needle prick. Chen Rui took a deep breath, and channeled the Star Power, quickly relieving the tingling sensation. Abaddon was also suffering. Although the opponent had withdrawn his punches, the force like a huge wave was still surging wave after wave, making his blood surge for a while.

Chen Rui used left fist, which was a bit of a disadvantage, but his star armor was fused with the Wrath King Armor, so Abaddon was hit harder.

This round was almost even. Both of them became more cautious.

TL: This Abaddon is just an enhanced version of Paglio. Unless he had another might, otherwise no chance for Chen Rui to lose. Python vs Satan seems more interesting…

chapters.title: Chapter 1158: [Eternal Calamity]
chapters.body:
Chapter 1158: [Eternal Calamity]

The brilliance intertwined by the dark blue light and the purple starlight gradually extinguished, gradually turning back into the 2 figures.

In just a few blinks, Chen Rui and Abaddon had clashed with lightning speed for several rounds. There was no special big move or might, but the cracks in the armor of the 2 had expanded a lot. Some wounds were still faintly bleeding, which showed the degree of danger. If one was not careful, he might receive a fatal blow.

In the hand-to-hand trial combat just now, both of them had a certain understanding of each other. Abaddon’s attack was weird and insidious while Chen Rui’s was plain and simple. They had completely opposite styles. Both of them had an uncomfortable feeling of being restrained.

“You’re more difficult to deal with than I imagined.” With that said, 6 pairs of dark blue wings slowly unfolded, and the 10 dagger-like nails crossed in front of Abaddon’s chest. Although he spoke in his mouth, his gaze locked on the opponent did not relax at all.

“Same to you.” Chen Rui also stared closely at Abaddon, looking for the next opportunity to attack.

Race: Fallen Angel

Comprehensive Strength Assessment: SSSS+

Physique: SSSS+, Strength: SSSS+, Spirit: SSSS+, Speed: SSSS.

Attribute: Soul Eye, Plague, Annihilation, Destruction, Death Summon.

Risk level: High.

Suddenly, a strange smile appeared on Abaddon’s face, and his dark blue pupils began to glow a little.

In Chen Rui’s eyes, Abaddon’s figure gradually became blurred. There seemed to be several figures, but when he looked closely, there was only 1 figure.

“The warm-up is almost over. The fun is only now beginning.” Amidst Abaddon’s sinister laughter, the figures once again multiplied in Chen Rui’s blurred vision. It was more than last time.

The ‘fuzziness’ this time seemed to even shake the soul. After repeating several times, there were Abaddons in various attacking postures in all directions. The number continued to increase, and suddenly there were dozens or hundreds of avatars.

Chen Rui concentrated his mind with all his strength, and he found that all the Abaddons were gone. He had been wrapped by countless dark blue wings. Each wing was a sharp ‘nail’ like a knife.

Before Chen Rui could react, the wings all over the sky intertwined and wrapped up, and the star wings on Chen Rui’s back immediately wrapped him up like a defensive dome. Countless sparks were created when the wings collided with the star wings.

The dark blue wings were like a large array, circulating at a special acceleration. The star wings took more and more pressure as cracks began to appear.

The defensive ability of [Star Guardian Wings] was far above general defensive shield, and there was still a chance to reflect the opponent’s attack, but Abaddon’s attack became more and more violent with the ‘big array’ spun. If he continued to be passive like this, the star wings’ protection would break down sooner or later.

However, there were wings approaching from all directions now. He couldn’t sense Abaddon’s figure at all.

At this moment, 7 huge white light balls appeared in the dark blue wing array. They were connected by a special power. Almost at the same time, the 7 light balls exploded.

Bang Bang Bang…

The wing array collapsed. Abaddon’s figure retreated for a dozen meters. 12 wings had become broken, and the dark blue wings all over the space also dimmed and disappeared.

“How do you know where my hiding place is?!” Abaddon was horrified. His [Demonic Wings Array] just now was a combination of attack and defense. The attack contained the most proficient ‘destruction’ mystery. As the frequency of attacks increased, the power would increase. In terms of defense, the attack and damage suffered by him would be shared by the entire array.

The only possible flaw or ‘array eye’ in this almost perfect formation was his own position. Therefore, he used the talent of the Soul Eyes to hide himself, and he kept changing position so that the enemy could not detect him. Unexpectedly, this enemy saw through his hidden secret technique at a glance. What’s even more terrifying was that the destruction power released by the 7 light ball explosions was purer than the destruction mystery of the [Demonic Wings Array]!

“It’s not difficult to see through you. I have at least 2 methods.” Although Chen Rui’s words were a psychological tactic, he was not bragging. In addition to the [Analytical Eyes], he could also use the Evil Pupil to dissolve the opponent’s soul deception, effectively judging the real location of the enemy.

Abaddon’s pupils were constricted. He possessed the Soul Eyes, so he felt that Chen Rui’s words were not boasting: This enemy poses too much threat! I must get rid of him with all my strength!

Abaddon straightened his arms and chanted. The originally dark sky became darker and darker. The bright clouds in the sky had disappeared, and it turned dark blue with a few faint starlights.

This kind of starlight was completely different from the brilliance of [Purple Pole Star Transformation]. It looked extraordinarily weird.

The surrounding land was full of endless ruins and cemeteries. It was shrouded in oppressive darkness. The cold wind whistled incessantly, and the whole land showed no sign of life at all. It looked lifeless, which was somewhat similar to Python’s [Doom Calamity Kingdom] that got destroyed, but it was even creepier than [Doom Calamity Kingdom].

“People live in the world without awakening, better let them die lowly.” Abaddon already had a strange horn in his hand. The horn that sounded like singing sounded from the sky. It seemed as ethereal and unpredictable as God. He merged into the darkness once again.

Chen Rui clearly felt the strong pressure from the soul. The Star Power in his body seemed to be stuck in a quagmire, unable to channel normally. At the moment when the horn chanting ended, the sky suddenly brightened, and a faint blue star whistled Chen Rui. The speed and power were extremely astonishing.

In this same level of offense and defense, it was as if ordinary people on the earth faced a bullet, almost no chance of survival.

“[Swift As Wind]!” Chen Rui immediately activated the speed might. Coupled with the power of [Wind Escape] of the Breeze Shadow Boots that greatly increased the movement speed, he dodged the blow of the star at that very moment. After a burst of intense tremors, an exaggerated huge crater was blasted out on the ground.

Immediately afterward, the sky lit up with starlights one after another, and countless meteors plummeted down like a super giant meteor rain magic rooted in the sky. The speed and range of strikes were extremely astonishing.

Chen Rui channeled the speed might and tried his best to dodge. In just a few minutes, the 2 [Sparkle] that tripled the speed had been used up, so he had to activate the [Wind Body] to pair with the Illusive Demon Shield to reduce the damage to the greatest extent as he continued to dodge and defend.

([Wind Body] – He could use the opponent’s attack power to slide backward, greatly reducing damage; the effective time is 10 minutes.)

Chen Rui didn’t dodge passively. The [Analytical Eyes] had already found Abaddon’s figure hidden in the darkness. His figure instantly changed into 3 figures that shot out a purple-red light at the same time. The 3 purple lights formed an independent triangular space that enclosed Abaddon’s real body in it.

Then, in the meteor rain that fell all over the sky, the ‘triangle’ suddenly shattered. The fusion of destruction and creation power erupted into a terrifying power that annihilated everything.

[Dimension Destruction]!

Abaddon seemed to have no time to dodge. His body was torn apart and dissipated in the broken ‘vacuum’. The meteor shower also slowly stopped.

It seemed that he successfully ‘killed’ Abaddon, but Chen Rui frowned. Abaddon’s data disappeared in the [Analytical Eyes], but he clearly felt that this enemy not only did not die, but his breath became more and more terrifying.

[Dimension Destruction] did not kill Abaddon!

“It’s quite an astonishing ultimate move. Unfortunately, in this land of death, no one can control death except me.” Abaddon’s voice sounded from all directions. Chen Rui had already come to his senses. It should be a special kingdom might. All the power of [Dimension Destruction] is diverted by the weird power of space. It seems that this kingdom is really not simple.

All of a sudden, Chen Rui had an even more dangerous omen as a large amount of black smoke came out of the craters smashed out by the meteor rain on the ground. An eerie breath spread out. Even when Chen Rui sensed it with spirit in the distance, he felt like his blood was freezing cold. This cold power even penetrated into his soul.

Chen Rui, who just witnessed Guradam becoming a God not long ago, was no stranger to this power. Death!

The death power possessed by Guradam was formed by the condensed countless faiths in the galaxy. It was more refined and pure than Abaddon. If Guradam could reach the level of Abaddon, then in terms of ‘death’ alone, he must surpass Abaddon. But now the gap between Guradam and Abaddon was like a thousand miles away, so it couldn’t be compared.

Those craters seemed to be connected by intangible power, forming strange symbols. Chen Rui could tell at a glance that these were ancient runes. The meaning was: To summon death from the netherworld and destruction.

It turned out that the ultimate purpose of the previous meteor rain was not to attack, but to summon!

“You should be able to see something. Not bad.” Abaddon’s voice sounded again. At this time the [Analytical Eyes] had lost his location. He should be hiding outside the range of [Analysis] or in a special space, “I especially want to praise your killing move just now. If it wasn’t for that move, I wouldn’t have opened the summoning door so easily.”

The craters all over the ground became deeper, exuding a faint blue light like a bottomless abyss. The rising black smoke had covered the entire sky. The runes on the ground were connected as one and merged into a dark blue huge hole.

In the black smoke gushing out of the hole, countless mysterious figures began to appear.

Not the ordinary undead such as skeletons and phantoms that Chen Rui expected, but a kind of ‘demonic beasts’ that he had never seen before. They were about the size of a horse, with a human head and a beast body, curly long black hair, and wearing a golden crown. The facial features of a man were faintly visible. The fangs of a beast were seen in the mouth. The body was covered with an exoskeleton similar to iron armor. The back was the wings of an insect, and the tail was a scorpion tail with a sharp poisonous string that glowed black and cold light.

This kind of demonic beast had a terrifying and strange appearance, exuding strong death and destruction breaths all over their bodies. Even Chen Rui sensed the danger. The most terrifying thing was that their number rose to a terrifying level in an instant. In the blink of an eye, they had spread all over the entire kingdom. Just the sound of insect wings vibrating made Chen Rui feel sick and nauseous.

“Let me introduce first, these are undead demonic locusts from the netherworld.” Abaddon laughed grimly, “I never expected to use my strongest move to deal with an unknown person like you. No matter how powerful you are, you will turn into nothingness in this [Eternal Calamity]!”

With that said, the army of undead locusts rushed toward Chen Rui like a tide.

Chen Rui tapped his foot, and he had already appeared in the distant sky. The demonic locusts reacted extremely quickly, and they fired poisonous stings from the scorpion tails one after another.

The poisonous stings all over the sky rushed toward Chen Rui like a rain of arrows. Not only was the speed astounding, but the density was quite high. Not to mention counterattack, there was no room for dodging. He could not use the advantage of speed.

This extremely intensive attack could no longer be defended by [Star Guardian Wings]. Chen Rui immediately activated the most powerful defensive shield skill. A translucent ball quickly appeared around his body, blocking the poisonous stings.

However, the sharpness of the poisonous stings was still beyond imagination, especially the astonishing number. Under successive attacks, hundreds of tiny cracks appeared on the defensive shield very quickly. The crack spread rapidly. Before the defensive shield was completely broken, it had already been pierced by many poisonous strings.

Chen Rui wore the star armor fused with the Wrath King Armor, but his body couldn’t be completely covered by the Wrath King Armor. Some parts were just ordinary star armor, which were inevitably pierced through by the poisonous strings. Although the poisonous strings were small, their power was astonishing. Strange power spread rapidly from the wounds, accompanied by a terrifying cold air that could freeze his soul.

Chen Rui shivered several times in a row. The damage and poison caused by the poisonous stings were secondary, the most uncomfortable was the chillness from the stings, which pierced through the soul. It was almost impossible to suppress.

Chen Rui’s thoughts changed sharply, and he shifted again. Instead of retreating, he rushed into the swarm of demonic locusts – Since I can only be beaten passively from a long distance, then I should deal with these monsters in close stance. Aoe skills such as [Destructive Aura Blow] will do the trick!

Chen Rui turned into a purple lightning bolt and rushed into the swarm of demonic locusts. Wherever he went, the ugly monsters were all torn apart and dissipated in black smoke.

After a few turns, there were several huge gaps in the army of the demonic locust. Chen Rui was only slightly injured with several cracks in the star armor.

However, Chen Rui was not as relaxed as he appeared on the surface. Not only did he consume a lot of strength, but his soul was also seriously damaged. The special attribute of those demonic locusts was quite weird. Every time he attacked them, his soul would be shaken strangely. Especially when killing the demonic locusts, his soul would be shocked violently. This special attribute was somewhat similar to the wandering spirits of the Ghastly Floating Land. He could neither attack nor defend, which was very tricky.

The black smoke from the huge hole continued to rise slowly, recondensing into the demonic locusts. The gaps that were cleared by Chen Rui were filled in the blink of an eye.

The undead demonic locust no doubt lived up to its name of being undead and immortal. Chen Rui frowned tightly. If he continued to fight like this, he would be exhausted sooner or later.

Chen Rui glanced through the endless demonic army and stopped at the huge hole formed by ancient runes that was emitting black smoke. That was the source of summoning these terrifying monsters.

With this in mind, Chen Rui’s whole body was burning with scorching flames. In the flashing red light full of violent breath, a huge and sinuous crimson huge beast was quickly formed. Amid the shout, hundreds of seething [Scorching Dragon Roar] flew toward the huge unfathomable hole.

chapters.title: Chapter 1159: [Eternal Night] And Singing
chapters.body:
Chapter 1159: [Eternal Night] And Singing

“[Cut]!”

Satan’s voice sounded, and countless spider web-like fissures appeared in the space around Python instantly, as if the space was divided by countless sharp blades. Everything within the range of this [Cut] might was split.

Python’s whole body turned into a wisp of black mist. No matter how sharp the sword was, it couldn’t cut through the smoke of nothingness.

Satan frowned. He recognized that this was the doom calamity might secret technique that combined the power of destruction origin. It looked like a simple cloud of smoke, but all attacks close to the smoke were avoided by a special method.

The use of this kind of doom calamity power was by no means inferior to Sariel who had been studying ‘doom calamity’ for many years. Although it did not have the terrifying offensive power like [Doom Calamity 7 Chapters], it was a defensive skill that was no less than that.

How long has Python killed Sariel? She can actually integrate doom calamity to such a state!

The fierceness in Satan’s eyes was flourishing, “[Collapse Extermination]!”

The space changed from the split state to distortion and collapsed again, but it still had no effect on the mist state transformed by Python. However, Satan’s real intention was not to destroy Python’s defense with [Collapse Extermination], but to use this destructive attack to force Python to maintain a defensive state. Immediately after, Satan raised his right hand to the sky, with 5 fingers spread out. Light beams shone from the red clouds in the sky, as if the sun was shining through the clouds.

However, these clouds that seemed to contain flames project a green radiance, exuding a cold breath that was completely opposite to the flames. It was like the cold light reflected by the dark glacier.

Satan’s raised hand became the center of all the light beams, and his cold and stern voice sounded through the space, “My body came out of the glowing gem. Under the apocalypse, it is still flawless.”

The light beams began to change as the sound of might spread. They quickly decomposed and bent. In the blink of an eye, they were decomposed into countless serpentine rays, which meandered and flew toward the mist transformed by Python, interlacing and circling.

The mist was originally intangible, but when it was surrounded by the snake-shaped rays, it turned back into a woman’s body again. She was entangled by dense snake-shaped green ropes.

Satan had activated this skill in the fight with Dillosro (avatar). Even Dillosro couldn’t break free.

“[Collapse Extermination]! [Cut]!” The 2 mights were activated again. This kind of rapid switching between different mights and simultaneous activation was originally quite difficult, but Satan did it with ease. The subtlety of control was even slightly better than that of Michael whom Python faced at the beginning.

Python was trapped by the green ropes. This time she could no longer use the secret technique to dodge. She didn’t panic. She just quietly watched the rapidly fissioning space around her. A slightly hoarse voice sounded.

“Everything in the world is impermanent and uncertain; what is gained is lost.”

When the word ‘lost’ was mentioned, the green ropes as well as the collapse and cutting of the space disappeared at the same time.

“What a deprivation might. It’s much more refined than it was back then. It’s worthy of Python.” Satan didn’t attack immediately, but nodded in praise, “Unfortunately, I won’t let the mistake back then happen again. This sub-kingdom is originally the foundation of the Dark Divinity Temple in my plan. Let it become your grave…”

“You want to kill me so soon? You don’t even want the Book of Destruction?” Python looked calm as if she was talking about something that had nothing to do with her.

“Since you have followed ‘him’, then the Book of Destruction must be in ‘his’ hands. This correctly explains some doubts 3 years ago. It turns out that the Book of Destruction has always been in ‘his’ hands. What a smart calculation!”

Python laughed, “After I knew you gave ‘him’ 10 years, my first reaction was, you will regret it.”

“That’s not necessarily true! You should worry about yourself first.” Satan said coldly, “To me, you have no value now, only a threat. To let you die with no pain in ‘[Eternal Night]’ is my last tribute to you as an ‘old friend’.”

With that said, Satan’s palms were crossed on his shoulders. His gaze suddenly became as deep as an endless night, and the 12 black wings spread behind him.

“I descend from the black clouds. The Holy Spirit is blasphemed because of me, the glory is darkened because of me. Everyone in the world is a hypocrite. Only my nature is completely pure…”

Every time Satan read a word, his body became blurred, and the sense of crisis in Python’s heart became even stronger. She wanted to activate the deprivation might, but her vision had become pitch black. She had lost Satan’s location. Vision, soul, life… everything was plunged into darkness full of mysterious power.

Python was horrified to feel that in this darkness, the flow of time seemed to suddenly speed up countless times, skipping the ‘middle’ from the ‘beginning’ and coming directly to the ‘end’.

All the might or secret skills she activated were blocked by some kind of huge ‘rule’ because of this kind of ‘skipping’ feeling.

Not only power, but life as well.

Before the flower of life could bloom in its most beautiful form, it had withered.

That feeling seemed to carry a bit of inexplicable sadness, but it also seemed to be a relief.

Everything returned to the darkness of the end.

This was [Eternal Night].

Satan’s night-like pupils shrunk suddenly as he saw a little bit of starlight shining in the endless darkness.

With this kind of starlight, the darkness was no longer the end of the endless, but the beginning of hope faintly revealed.

In the starlight, a faint singing voice sounded.

The deep voice sang the voice of a lonely soul, revealing an indescribable special charm.

At this moment, the dark sadness of [Eternal Night] seemed to have been assimilated by the singing. It was no longer possible to display the previous power of covering everything.

Amidst the singing, a figure slowly walked out of the darkness with beautiful stars behind it. It was not dazzling, but it emitted a soft light like a gem embedded in the darkness.

Looking at Python whose figure became clearer, Satan didn’t speak, but the unprecedented dignified expression was enough to explain everything. Satan’s eyes narrowed, but his gaze became more and more fierce as if he had made some kind of determination. All of a sudden, he launched [Eternal Night] power to fight the [Song of Darkness]’.

This move relieved the pressure Python was facing, but she didn’t feel relaxed. Instead, she instinctively felt a stronger vigilance as if a greater danger was about to come.

Python once fought Michael head-on in the ancient arena, and the power of Satan’s [Eternal Night] just now was almost as powerful as Michael’s most powerful move [Glorious Light Forgiveness] that had merged with the faith of the Holy Light Mountain. However, judging from Satan’s current momentum, it seems that he still reserves some power. Could it be that Satan has even stronger power?

Python didn’t dare to risk it. She immediately condensed the power of [Song of Darkness], ready to launch it at any time.

In the kingdom of death.

Hundreds of gigantic Scorching Dragons roared in mid-air, smashing all the way with astonishing momentum. They went down toward the huge deep hole on the ground.

The shining red light hit the huge hole accurately, and a berserk destruction breath poured straight in. The space along the way was trembling, and all the black smoke was washed away without a trace.

However, after such power entered the dark blue cave, it caused no fluctuation as if it hit nothing. Instead, the black smoke that gushed out became thicker. All the previously destroyed demonic locusts recovered. The death breath of the entire land had not weakened in the slightest.

“It’s a fancy move, but unfortunately for this summoning gate, any form of attack will be converted into the energy of the summoning. With this alone, I’m invincible.” Abaddon’s laughter sounded all around again, “However, if you don’t attack, how can you resist the continuous stream of undead demonic locusts? It’s a painful dilemma… In order to end your suffering, as a benevolent death controller, I bestow upon you… death .”

As soon as the words ended, the summoning gate that was originally a rising black smoke shot up into the sky, forming a huge phantasm in the air. It vaguely resembled Abaddon. He stretched out his claw-like palm and waved toward Chen Rui.

An inexplicable feeling of powerlessness surged up in Chen Rui’s mind. He was unable to resist and escape as if that was really the God who ruled over death. Even if he could travel through the space, he could not escape death.

This feeling of ‘waiting to die’ was only fleeting before it was replaced by an extremely dangerous feeling. Chen Rui, who had experienced many battles, immediately came to his senses: It must be Abaddon’s soul might!

At this time, the giant claw was less than 5 meters away from Chen Rui, and Chen Rui’s star armor had several cracks under the pressure of the extremely sharp wind. Some parts even spurted blood. When he was about to be crushed to pieces, the black smoke, the demonic locusts, the giant claw… everything suddenly slowed down.

When the ‘slowness’ returned to normal, Chen Rui had disappeared. At the same time, a pale red light beam shot straight out from above, piercing through Abaddon’s huge phantasm. The light beam had powerful destruction power. Even the space was divided in half by it.

[True Red Extinction]!

The phantasm paused for a moment before collapsing. Chen Rui could clearly see that Abaddon’s phantasm was actually formed by countless undead demonic locusts. Nevertheless, these locusts had a special attribute of immortality. Even if they were turned into smoke, they quickly recondensed again.

“I didn’t expect you to have such a powerful time might! No wonder Satan value you so much! You also have the daunting power of destruction might, but unfortunately, you have no chance to compete with Satan, because you met me, Dark Death Angel Abaddon! This kingdom of death is perfect. Even ‘time’ can only delay ‘death’ temporarily, but it cannot be truly avoided!” Amidst the smoke, Abaddon’s huge phantasm condensed again.

“Dark Death Angel Abaddon, I remember this name,” Chen Rui took a deep breath and calmed down completely, “You’re the weirdest opponent I have ever experienced. This kingdom of death is also profound. In my opinion, the summoning gate that attracts the most attention seems to be the flaw or source to stop the summoning, but it is actually the strongest point. However… I have found a way to really defeat you.” RS

chapters.title: Chapter 1160: Crazy
chapters.body:
Chapter 1160: Crazy

“You? Beat me?” Abaddon laughed contemptuously, “Ridiculous! This perfect kingdom doesn’t have any weaknesses at all!”

“The so-called perfection is just that the flaws are covered up well.” Chen Rui’s eyes flashed with confidence, “It’s still the summoning door! This place that seems to be the weakest but is actually the strongest is actually the biggest misunderstanding, or a trap. This is also the real weakness! You put your strengths and weaknesses at the same point. False and real, specious; it can cloud the opponent’s perception and judgment. It is indeed a very clever layout.”

“ Hmph , talk nonsense! No matter how you attack the summoning gate, the result will only be the same as before!”

“Previously…” Chen Rui shook his head, “It was just because the method was wrong. In this kingdom of yours, for the rest of the attribute power, whether it is time or destruction… death is an ‘absolute’ existence. Therefore, for the previous attack, only in the face of 2 powers, death is ‘relative’: ‘Life’ and ‘death’.”

With that said, a black flame appeared in Chen Rui’s hands. This flame contained vigorous vitality, and at the same time, the space around him was full of lush greenery. Under the action of this power, his injuries recovered quickly. All kinds of uncomfortable states had disappeared.

1 of the 4 kingdoms, [Spring Kingdom] that incorporated Nirvana power.

Abaddon’s tone was a bit more disdainful, “This kind of ‘life’ power looks legit, but unfortunately, it’s just a shape. At most, it will let you linger on for a while. If you say it can break my death power, you are just deceiving yourself.”

“Indeed, this level of ‘life’ power is not enough to crush your kingdom, and it is almost impossible to even stimulate the weakness of the summoning gate.” Chen Rui did not deny, “Then, there is only one way left – The power of ‘death’.”

“Nonsense! In this kingdom, I’m the only master who controls death…”

Abaddon’s words came to an abrupt end because at this moment, a constellation appeared behind Chen Rui.

This area of large and small stars shone with a dim light which was different from ordinary stars. The distribution of stars followed special laws. They seemed to be an interconnected whole.

What made Abaddon unable to believe was that this cluster of stars contained his familiar faith power— Death!

That kind of faith was so pure; it was even higher than the death faith possessed by him, the Dark Death Angel!

What Chen Rui activated was the power of Death Constellation possessed by Guradam!

This was 1 of the relevant mysteries of [All Star Gods View] that he newly comprehended. As the highest controller of the Galaxy Divinity Temple, within a limited time limit, he could channel the constellation power of the Super System Star Gods and integrate with himself to exert the strongest power.

The Death Constellation was activated with the power of the [Purple POle Star Transformation], the peak stage of the Pseudo-God, which far exceeded the one that Guradam himself launched. Of course, the more and purer of the faith obtained by the God on the planet, the more buffs they could give to Chen Rui, and the stronger the power he could exert.

Guradam had not been a God for a long time, but death had always been the most revered existence of life. Hence, under Veronica’s efforts, the faith power of ‘death’ had expanded to an astonishing level in a short period of time.

“It’s just an illusion!” Abaddon yelled, “Go to hell!”

The huge phantasm condensed by countless undead demonic locusts attacked Chen Rui again, and Chen Rui who merged with the Death Constellation turned into a dark starlight, rushing straight toward the phantasm.

The giant claw launched by Abaddon was pierced by the starlight, and a big hole appeared. Unlike before, the black smoke near the hole seemed to be devoured by the dark starlight. It couldn’t be recovered instantly.

In no time, the dark starlight had already pierced through Abaddon’s phantasm, and it flew straight to the huge summoning gate on the ground.

Countless undead demonic locusts flocked desperately to the starlight. They were fearless to death. Chen Rui felt quite a lot of pressure, but he felt Abaddon’s panic more, so he became more determined. When he was one step away from the summoning gate, Abaddon activated all his secret skills and power at all costs, trying his best to stop Chen Rui. Even if he managed to break through, he would be severely injured.

“ Boom! “

At the last moment of approaching the summoning gate, Chen Rui’s body was finally crushed by Abaddon’s power. Abaddon just breathed a sigh of relief, then he saw that body turned into countless flies and continued to fly forward.

“The Earth Badge! No!” Abaddon was shocked. Before he could react, the ‘flies’ had already rushed into the summoning gate.

A few seconds later, the kingdom of death suddenly fell silent. The rising countless black smoke as well as the undead demonic locusts all turned into glittering entities before they cracked and scattered one after another. At the same time, the huge summoning gate began to shatter. In the blink of an eye, everything turned into dust and disappeared without a trace.

Abaddon’s figure reappeared in the space, panting violently. He gritted his teeth and looked at Chen Rui, “Damn guy, you actually destroyed my summoning gate! However, the ‘death’ power you just launched is hard to sustain in the end. Otherwise, I will suffer a serious injury. It can be seen that you should not be able to activate that power again. On the contrary, the kingdom of death will not really die. The summoning gate will be reborn again soon. At that time, I will put you…”

“There is no ‘at that time’.” Chen Rui said flatly, “Because your kingdom is about to collapse completely.”

Abaddon was about to retort, then he suddenly met Chen Rui’s eyes. The peak stage of the Pseudo-God’s eyesight was intimidating. Abaddon had already seen clearly what was in those pupils in an instant,

Galaxy! In the eyes of this enemy, Abaddon saw countless stars forming a vast galaxy which was endless!

The previous ‘death’ star group (constellation) is among them, but it is only a small part of the endless galaxy. There are more than a dozen constellations with the same power!

Abaddon’s soul trembled. There was an unprecedented sense of crisis in his mind. Then, he saw the galaxy again, not in the eyes of the enemy, but behind that person!

Real endless galaxy!

Outside the kingdom of death, Python was still confronting Satan. Although the power of the [Song of Darkness] had been charged to the peak, Python was still calm and ready.

Opposite her, Satan hovered quietly as his eyes tightly locked on Python. However, there was no breath of power surge around him as if he had completely given up fighting, but this made the ominous omen in Python’s mind even stronger.

She had been injured before, so if she attacked with all her strength at this time, it would be a desperate move. Once something unpredictable happened, she would lose even the power to escape.

The most important thing was that now was not the time when she was besieged by Satan and Abaddon where she had no choice but to go all out. She only needed to delay the time and wait for Chen Rui to defeat Abaddon. Therefore, she must hold on. At the very least, she couldn’t become the hostage that would threaten Chen Rui.

When Python was vigilant, she suddenly found that the surrounding atmosphere became suffocating. The vague sense of oppression was getting stronger and stronger. The red light glowed from Satan’s deep black pupils, and a huge thing appeared behind him. It was a disk with a huge pointer in the center. It looked like a clock at first glance. There were countless golden symbols engraved on the disk. They were not ancient runes, but runes with another meaning. With the strength of Python, she could clearly feel that these runes contain infinite mystery and power.

The huge pointer was black and in the shape of a snake. Satan was standing on the pointer as if he was one with the disc. The power of the whole disk was above everything. Even Python could only look up at it.

“You actually…” As 1 of the former masters of the silver box, Python already understood what kind of power this is. Her pupils shrank, “You merge yourself with the Book of Destruction…”

Satan looked at Python coldly, “You should be proud. You are the first opponent to let me activate this power!”

“No, you can’t merge the Book of Destruction yet. What you merged is 2/3 of the Destruction Vessels, so you are using the power of those 2 pages of the Book of Destruction,” Python’s eyes fixed on Satan, ” This process is no different from suicide. If there is one mistake, your body and soul will be assimilated by the Book of Destruction. Even Michael who has the complete Book of Creation dares not do this. It seems the word ‘crazy’ should be more suitable for you.”

“How can a character like Michael compare with me!” Satan said proudly as he slowly raised his hands. The pointer moved down by one notch. Python sensed that the space was instantly filled with the origin power that could destroy everything. The [Song of Darkness] she had been brewing trembled inexplicably and began to disintegrate rapidly.

“If you use this kind of power that is close to taboo, you will have to pay a considerable price. It seems that you are determined to kill me today. Then… you can do what you want.” Instead of panicking, Python laughed as the power of [Song of Darkness] began to change rapidly, turning into a ball of white light that surrounded the body. As soon as the breath of the white light radiated out, the power of the nearby destruction origin suddenly became a little disordered. Even Satan felt a strong sense of danger.

“This is… Creation!” This time it was Satan’s turn to be shocked, “How could you have such a perfect and complete creation origin! Could it be the Book of Creation?”

Python did not answer this question, and she suddenly smiled, “Although my creation power is far inferior to the Book of Destruction, it is the real origin power from the Book of Creation whereas your Book of Destruction is not complete. In this case, you should know what will happen if the origins of the Book of Creation and the Book of Destruction collide with each other.”

“You will die.”

“That’s right, but you may die too. At least you will be severely injured, and you will even lose control of the Book of Destruction.” While Python was talking, the white light became more and more pure. There seemed to be no hesitation.

If either of the powers of the 2 parties was not the origin power of the Book of Creation or the Book of Destruction, then such devastation would not happen. Coincidentally, what Satan owned was the Book of Destruction. Meanwhile, Python comprehended the creation power of the Book of Creation when she fused with Chen Rui’s soul.

Satan stared at the extremely dangerous white light around Python as he pondered over and over again. Finally, he stopped the spread of destructive power as the redness in his eyes faded a bit, “Then…”

“Let’s die together.” Python smiled, and the plain sentence startled Satan drastically. The white light suddenly spread out in an extremely bright manner, forming a huge burning flame that enveloped Python. Even the pair of wings behind her turned pure white.

Satan didn’t expect Python to be so crazy. The Book of Destruction was not a power that could be easily canceled. It was too late to switch to other powers, so he could only deal with it.

At this moment, the entire Dark Furnace suddenly trembled violently. The solidified pitch-black space in the distance suddenly emitted an extremely intense starlight.

In the next second, the pitch-black space was completely shattered by the starlight.

That cluster of pitch-black space was Abaddon’s kingdom. Even the aftermath of the previous battle between Satan and Python did not shake that kingdom, but now it was annihilated and destroyed!

Python stared at the incomparably bright starlight as her eyes reflected the beating splendor. The burning white flame of creation finally began to cancel, “It seems that we don’t have to die this time.”

chapters.title: Chapter 1162: Coercion
chapters.body:
Chapter 1162: Coercion

Satan didn’t seem to hear Python’s words as there was only the brilliant darkness left in his vision.

Such ‘brilliance’ was no stranger to Satan as this was the second time he had seen it. The first time was in the battle of Despair Main Altar in the Dead Sea, where ‘that person’ burst out this power in Dillosro’s body, completely destroying Dillosro’s avatar. It caused Satan to fall short, losing to him who was still at the intermediate stage of the Pseudo-God.

Satan and Abaddon were considered old rivals before. They were no strangers to each other’s power characteristics. The immortal kingdom of death was extremely difficult to deal with. If Satan himself did not take the risk of using the Book of Destruction and just use the strongest ultimate [Eternal Night], he certainly couldn’t destroy the kingdom of death so thoroughly. Now ‘he’ completely defeated Abaddon in such a short period of time with an overwhelming advantage!

Satan could clearly sense that the faith power and life force contained in the profound meaning of the stars far surpassed him. It could truly be described as ‘vast and boundless’. The 2 ‘areas’ of the strongest constellation (Phoenix Constellation and Rainbow Constellation) increased to more than a dozen now. The explosive power was not as simple as ordinary addition!

If it is not Abaddon who is facing this blow, but me… With the Book of Destruction, can I take it? Satan fell silent for a while. He glanced at the calm Python, sighed secretly, and finally gave up on a certain thought as he put away the power of the Book of Destruction.

After the kingdom of death was completely annihilated, the starlights gradually faded. The 2 figures on the ground appeared in the vision.

Chen Rui stood quietly. The star armor on his body only showed cracks, giving people a sense of steadfastness as if nothing could shake his will and soul.

In sharp contrast to it was Abaddon on the opposite side. This previously arrogant Dark Death Angel didn’t even have the strength to stand up. He could only barely kneel on the ground. His [Armor of Faith] was torn apart, and shocking wounds could be seen everywhere. All 10 of the sharp blade’s nails had been broken. He was gasping for breath. His breath had dropped sharply.

Python didn’t look at Satan anymore. She went straight to Chen Rui. Satan also didn’t make a move behind her back. Since Abaddon was defeated, it was pointless to continue this fight.

“Abaddon, your failure is really timely.” Python laughed with undisguised teasing, “Both Satan and I should thank you.”

Chen Rui looked at Satan in surprise, but Satan just showed a cold face without explaining. Abaddon also took a look at Satan. He was currently severely injured and his strength was greatly damaged, so he could only count on this ‘companion’.

How would Python not know what Abaddon was thinking, so she added another sentence with a grin, “Satan, since you can abide by the 10-year agreement with ‘him’, then temporarily put aside the grievances between me and you, including what happened today! 7 years later, after the agreement between you and him is completed and if you are still alive, I will finish you myself. I will swear on ‘his’ name that I will not use any means to hinder or deal with you during this period… But, I have 1 condition.”

“Condition?” Satan followed Python’s gaze to look at Abaddon, and he had already understood it. He quickly weighed the stakes, and he finally nodded, “Okay!”

This scene made Abaddon’s heart sink completely. In fact, there was no friendship between him and Satan, just a relationship of mutual benefit. Now facing such a powerful enemy as ‘Richard’, coupled with Python who didn’t seem to lose much combat power, it was reasonable for Satan to give up his ‘ally’ for his own benefit.

“Abaddon, you are lucky. It seems that the artifact Royal Spirit Claw took the fatal blow for you. In any case, your life is saved in the end. If I were you, I would not be sure to escape from that move. “

With that said, Python brushed her hair leisurely, “However, your kingdom has completely collapsed, and your injuries are also very serious. At most, there is only one chance for your survival. What I need to remind you is, don’t get too hopeful about this. Even if you self-explode your Pseudo-Godhood, I have a good chance of ingesting your soul fragments— By then you will be in a living hell. Who asks our talents to restrain each other?”

The last few words of Python were almost a copy of what Abaddon said to her before. Abaddon felt a strong sense of helplessness in his mind. He never expected that ‘history’ would repeat itself so quickly. All of a sudden, he thought of 1 thing, and he cast a surprised gaze on Chen Rui, “Python actually called you ‘sir’? Also, the shield you used before, was it the Water Badge? In the end… you also used the Earth Badge!”

“Although it’s a little slow, you finally realized it.” Python’s smile was a little more profound, “Did you think of someone?”

“It turns out…” Abaddon shuddered. He looked at Chen Rui as if he had seen a ghost with strong fear in his eyes, “You’re ‘him’! You’re actually ‘him’!”

Another misunderstanding . Chen Rui sighed as he glanced at the expressions on Satan and Python’s faces. He simply did not explain and shook his head, “It doesn’t matter who I’m. You should think about your current situation more! “

“No! You won’t kill me!” After understanding Chen Rui’s ‘identity’, Abaddon seemed to have completely lost his fighting spirit. His body trembled slightly as he shouted, “Don’t forget. Your woman is still under my control!”

As soon as these words came out, even Satan shook his head secretly. It was understandable that he wanted to save his life, but he didn’t even have the courage to fight for the last time. It was really embarrassing to just blackmail a woman to escape.

Control? Zola? Python frowned upon hearing this, and she asked Chen Rui during the mind call, “Did you bring Paglio this time?”

Chen Rui also replied in his mind, “I brought him. Before I came here, Paglio had already canceled the plague power spreading around Zola and your sub-kingdom with the power of Plague God. It’s just that your lives in [Doom Calamity Kingdom] are also…”

“I know. This Abaddon is vicious and cunning. He is well-versed in the secret technique of the soul. He is even above me. I’m afraid ordinary contracts can’t completely restrain him. Don’t believe the nonsense of his surrender. After a while, sir will directly use the power of the Evil Pupil to lock his Soul Eyes. I’m 90% sure to prevent his Pseudo-Godhood from self-exploding. As long as we can seal his Pseudo-Godhood, then it will be a matter of sir’s thought to kill him or force him to surrender.”

Chen Rui nodded. Then, he was suddenly startled as he saw an image appear in the space above Abaddon. The figure inside was Zola, who was recuperating with her eyes closed.

“If you want your woman to live, let me go!” Abaddon’s eyes flashed, and Zola in the image suddenly covered her head with a painful expression.

Chen Rui and Python were taken aback. Hasn’t Paglio dispelled the plague that Zola was infected with?

“Do you think this woman is only affected by the plague might?” Abaddon noticed Chen Rui’s surprised expression, “Although I don’t know what method you used to dispel the plague might on this woman, I can be sure that what you canceled is just plague power.”

“The Soul Eyes!” Python had already understood it, “You actually planted a soul puppet seed on her body at the cost of your power!”

“In the beginning, I just wanted to completely control a potential Pseudo-God. Now it seems that this step is correct.” Abaddon stood up slowly, “You should be very clear about what soul puppet seed means. That dragon woman’s strength is at the intermediate stage of the Pseudo-God, so she cannot compete with the soul puppet seed at the peak stage of the Pseudo-God. I can activate Soul Eyes at any time to activate the soul puppet seed and devour her soul. Even if she does not die, she will become an unconscious idiot!”

The soul puppet seed was a mutated power of the Soul Eyes, which could separate a trace of the soul and sneak into the target’s body. It would take root and sprout like a seed. As time goes by, it would control the opponent step by step, making him a completely obedient servant. However, the soul puppet seed needed to consume Abaddon’s most origin soul power, and it would form a special connection.

Once the soul puppet seed was damaged, Abaddon’s soul would also be damaged or even be strongly recoiled, so he generally would not use it lightly.

Chen Rui listened to Python explain the situation of the soul puppet seed from the mind call, and he was very anxious. I didn’t expect Abaddon to actually plant such an unexpected secret trick!

According to Python, Chen Rui might try to use the power of the Evil Pupil to cancel the soul puppet seed, but it was not guaranteed to be effective. Moreover, Zola was not here, so he could not save her from far.

“Let me leave safely! Otherwise, I will activate the soul puppet seed now!”

Chen Rui knew that he couldn’t be anxious. His expression had gradually ‘recovered’ from the previous surprise, “Cancel the soul puppet seed first. I can let you live.”

“That will only put me into a dead end.” Abaddon sneered. He glanced at Satan with fleeing resentment. He had already made up his mind. As long as I could escape this time, I would revenge in double. Especially toward Python and Satan!

Satan keenly grasped Abaddon’s hidden hatred, and an intangible force had quietly locked Abaddon.

Despite being severely injured, Abaddon’s soul sense was still keen, so he also noticed Satan’s actions. He set his sight on Chen Rui, “We are all smart people! I won’t delay with you like this! I’m leaving here now. If I suffer any attack, no matter who it is, I will immediately activate the soul puppet seed!”

Obviously, the attacker Abaddon referred to was not only Python, but also Satan.

After Abaddon finished speaking, his figure slowly flew backward. Satan narrowed his eyes and was about to make a move. When Abaddon’s eyes flashed, Zola in the image once again covered her head in pain. Chen Rui shouted decisively, “Stop it!”

Abaddon paused and looked at Satan who was ready to attack, “I won’t repeat it a second time. I’m absolutely sure to let the soul puppet seed explode completely before any of you try to kill or capture me! If you want your woman to be buried with me, try it!”

TL: This is really unexpected, but can he still stir any wave?

chapters.title: Chapter 1161: Change
chapters.body:
Chapter 1161: Change

Chen Rui looked at the increasingly painful Zola in the image, and he secretly clenched his fists. He instantly appeared in front of Satan who was about to make a move.

“Maybe you really have a special ability to cancel the contract, but you have to think clearly, what you will betray is not only the contract but also the promise.” Satan’s eyes became extremely sharp, “I just want to ask, are you going to break the promise I have always kept and fight with me now?”

Chen Rui remained silent. Abaddon felt the hesitation in his mind. He intended to lure the 2 to fight each other, so as to escape in the chaos. He didn’t say much at the moment as he activated the power of the soul puppet seed again.

The struggling Zola had fallen to the ground, seeming to suffer unbearable pain.

Chen Rui was so furious that he couldn’t keep calm anymore. His eyes were about to burst into flames. At this moment, the image suddenly changed unexpectedly. Zola’s body actually exploded!

This scene made Chen Rui boil in anger, “Zola!”

In an instant, Chen Rui felt that the blood all over his body was concentrated on his head. His whole body was burning with complete rage.

Die!

Abaddon must die!

Abaddon was horrified. This woman is the biggest trump card to save my life. I obviously just stimulated the soul puppet seed to intensify the pain of the other party. How could it burst?

“Wait a minute, look at Zola!” Python’s voice sounded in Chen Rui’s mind.

Chen Rui woke up suddenly. At the same time, he felt that Zola’s link had not disappeared, so he quickly looked at the image. It turned out that Zola’s body did not disappear, but it scattered into a group of colorful ‘clouds’, which seemed to be composed of countless fine particles that faintly condensed into a human form.

Right, Zola’s spiritual link in the Super System has not disappeared. She is still alive!

“This is…” Even Satan showed a surprised expression.

What does this form represent? While Chen Rui was terrified, he saw the fluttering Abaddon suddenly fall to the ground, covering his head in pain and howling.

“How is it possible! My soul… no!”

“What happened to Zola?” Chen Rui quickly asked Python in his mind.

“I’m not very sure, but one thing is certain: Abaddon’s soul puppet seed was devoured by Zola instead. His soul suffers a terrifying recoil. That’s why he was in agony.”

Now that Zola is out of control, I must not let the previous scene repeat again!

Abaddon must not live!

A cold light flashed in Chen Rui’s eyes, and the star power of Death Constellation had already condensed in his hand instantly. He attacked toward Abaddon.

Satan attacked faster than Chen Rui. The dark power had already enveloped Abaddon. Abaddon’s body shook, and a large area of lacerations appeared in an instant. A lot of black smoke came out of the wound as he desperately healed the wound.

When Abaddon tried his best to fight against Satan, Chen Rui’s attack arrived. Under the mutual cancellation of death power, Abaddon’s body was completely torn apart.

Abaddon let out a deafening scream. When his body split, he burst into a creepy red light. He finally used the last resort to detonate the Pseudo-Godhood.

Before the red light spread, everything slowed down instantly, and Chen Rui’s voice sounded, “[Slow—As—Forest].”

Time might.

This time might was controlled quite finely. Python and Satan were not affected. At the moment when the time was about to resume, Python’s voice sounded first, “[Deprivation]! [Doom]!”

The 2 kinds of might erupted almost simultaneously, [Deprivation] weakened the red light instantly, and the following [Doom] weakened the red light again.

When the time returned to normal, the red light’s power had weakened by half, but it was still extremely powerful. However, Chen Rui couldn’t activate [Slow As Forest] again in such a short period of time. At this time, Satan appeared in front of the red light in an instant, and his eyes were shining brightly. In the next second, the red light that was close at hand disappeared.

Immediately afterward, a terrifying earthquake came from the distant space. Countless space fissures spread rapidly as if a terrifying explosion had occurred in a certain enclosed space.

The space fissures spread all the way to the vicinity of them. Everything along the way was reduced to ashes, but within a few meters around the 3 of them, there was no movement at all.

This was Holy Light Robe’s special ability, [Absolute Barrier] – Create a protective force field with a diameter of 5 meters, which could protect against attacks of any form or intensity without moving. The duration was 10 seconds. It could be used once in every 24 hours.

After the 10-second duration, the explosive power had been greatly weakened. Chen Rui activated the [Unshakable Like Mountain] might again, and the golden light extended out, wrapping the core force field of the explosion. The golden light continued to vibrate as cracks continued to appear on the surrounding ground, but it was unable to crush the golden light after all. It finally gradually extinguished.

At the most critical moment just now, Chen Rui, Python, and Satan made moves at the same time. Chen Rui slowed down the time, delaying the Pseudo-Godhood’s explosion, Python weakened the power of the big explosion with [Deprivation] and [Doom] might while Satan activated the time acceleration might. Before the power of the big explosion fully erupted, he transferred it into the enclosed space of the kingdom. Then, Chen Rui activated the protective power to block the destruction of the final explosion.

The 3 of them had surprising tacit in this cooperation. They finally eliminated the terrifying explosion.

Chen Rui removed his protective power. Python breathed a sigh of relief, but she frowned, “Lucky guy! He still escaped. Abaddon’s soul escape technique is no doubt a little tricky.”

“It’s just a weak remnant soul.” Satan said coldly, “He has already lost the Pseudo-Godhood, so there is nothing to be afraid of. If you were like that back then, you wouldn’t be so troublesome to me today.”

Python smiled lightly, “Still minding the previous battle? I was just forced without any other choices.”

“ Hmph! ” Satan thought to himself that he couldn’t argue with this kind of lunatic, especially a madwoman. He turned to look at Chen Rui, “This sub-kingdom was originally the most important foundation of the Dark Divinity Temple in my plan. Now it has almost completely collapsed. I will keep this account in mind.”

Before Chen Rui could speak, Python answered, “If it wasn’t for his protection, you would have suffered a bit just now.”

In fact, Chen Rui didn’t really help Satan deliberately just now. He activated [Absolute Barrier] as an instinctive reaction. [Absolute Barrier] provided protection within 5 meters without any distinction. Satan just happened to be within the range. As for the following [Unshakable Like Mountain], it was more to prevent the explosive power from spreading and endangering innocent people in the Bloody Empire.

“That kind of explosive force may not be able to hurt me!” Satan didn’t ‘appreciate’ as he looked directly at Chen Rui, “I know you have the last page of the Book of Destruction. I will definitely get it!”

Chen Rui was worried about Zola’s safety, and he didn’t want to get too entangled with Satan, so he nodded, “Then, just bet on the battle 7 years later. If you can beat me, the last page of the Book of Destruction is yours; if you lose, you must completely abandon the Dark Divinity Temple plan.”

“Deal!” Satan took a deep look at Chen Rui, “Since this is the case, I will temporarily stop the Dark Divinity Temple for 7 years. Python will definitely tell you the secret of my fusion with the destruction origin. This fusion is only the beginning. The battle 7 years later will be even more exciting.”

Chen Rui’s defeat of Abaddon had already proved his strength, plus a Python whose strength was even better than her optimum state back then, even if Satan found another ally of the same level as Abaddon, it would be difficult to suppress Chen Rui and Python to successfully deploy the plans for the Dark Divinity Temple.

What’s more, the strength that Chen Rui showed now made Satan secretly terrified. Only by concentrating all his energy and integrating the destruction origin to increase his strength, would he be able to defeat his opponent 7 years later. During this period, there should be no distractions. Therefore, suspending the Dark Divinity Temple plan was the most sensible choice.

Satan didn’t drag more. His figure gradually faded away. Suddenly, he thought of something in the end, and he sneered, “That woman of yours just now is actually… Hmph! What an ironic fate…”

Ironic fate? Chen Rui frowned at this familiar phrase. Just as he was about to ask, Satan had disappeared.

Python stepped forward, “Let’s go to Zola.”

Chen Rui nodded. He kept Python in the Tower of Glory, opened the [Star Gate], and returned to the palace of the Bloody Empire.

As soon as he returned, he immediately sensed the existence of the linkers. Following the sense, Chen Rui came to a side hall, where he saw Tiffany and Paglio.

“Chen Rui!” Tiffany rushed forward, “There was an earthquake in the capital just now, could it be the Dark Furnace…”

“It’s fine now, but the Dark Furnace has turned into ruins.” Chen Rui released Python, looked around, and didn’t find the fairy dragon he worried the most, “Where’s Zola?”

“Zola seemed to be attacked by some power just now, and then… a strange change occurred.”

Chen Rui once saw Zola’s strange appearance in Abaddon’s image, and he asked, “Where is she now?”

Tiffany shook her head and looked at Paglio, “At that time, I lost my senses, so I couldn’t see or hear anything clearly. Only Paglio could see clearly.”

Paglio spoke up, “Previously, I sensed that something was wrong after canceling Zola’s plague power. Tiffany let her come to this side hall to recuperate while Tiffany and I continued to deal with the plague. When we returned to the side hall, we heard strange sounds coming from inside.
