I saw Zola fall to the ground in great pain as if she was desperately resisting some kind of power. Then, Zola’s body burst open and turned into countless colorful light dots. The breath exuded by the light dots makes one tremble. Tiffany and I can’t even move; even our perception is about to collapse. After this change, Zola immediately resolved the abnormal power in her body, then an entrance appeared in the space above her. All the light dots were absorbed, and Zola disappeared along with it.”

“Space… disappeared?” Chen Rui turned his head to look at the thoughtful Python, “Do you know something?”

“It’s more of guessing, but there is a kind of person who should know more than me and be more real.”

“Elemental King?” Chen Rui asked back, and Python nodded.

Chen Rui took a deep breath. Zola was able to get rid of Abaddon’s control this time, it could be regarded as a miracle of a narrow escape, but that kind of change… There must be a big secret hidden behind it.

Since this secret involved Zola, Chen Rui had to figure it out at all costs.

TL: Would this let Zola be completely dominated by the will of the Elemental Goddess?

chapters.title: Chapter 1163: Goodbye Friend
chapters.body:
Chapter 1163: Goodbye Friend

Note: Sorry for missing 2 chapters from last week. 2 more chapters are released now.

Mountain Xilang.

When Chen Rui set foot on the Earth Realm of the earth elementals again, he couldn’t help but think of his adventures in this underground world. The strong and brave female swordswoman in the past had now become his wife and the mother of his future child; the Elemental King he first met had also become his best friend.

Unlike usual, on the way to Earth Palace, there was not a single earth elemental in sight.

Suspicions arose in Chen Rui’s mind as he walked all the way to the magnificent palace that was perfectly integrated with the earth.

In the huge king’s chamber, there was only 1 figure.

Familiar figure.

1 of Chen Rui’s close friends, Earth Elemental King, Moore.

The Earth Elemental King stared at him while approaching, “I have been waiting for you, Chen Rui.”

Chen Rui frowned, “You already know what happened?”

“Yes.” Moore looked away slightly, “This moment may come sooner or later, but I didn’t expect it to be so soon.”

Chen Rui looked directly into Moore’s eyes, “You knew it was going to happen?”

“Yes.” Moore answered this word again. Although his breath was still at the peak stage of the Demon Overlord, for some reason, Chen Rui felt that there seemed to be many things missing from the king.

“I want to know what happened to Zola?” Chen Rui asked sternly, “No matter what you concealed before, I want to hear the real answer to this matter, instead of a perfunctory and ambiguous answer.”

“Since I’m here waiting for you, I’m not going to give you a perfunctory answer.” Moore sighed, “The real answer is that Zola is already elementalized.”

“Elementalized!” Chen Rui was startled, “What does this mean?”

“This means… she is about to turn into a real element creature, become a part of the elemental world, and most likely will completely lose her original consciousness.”

The result was faster than Chen Rui expected. He had an heartquake, “Why is this happening?”

“Since Zola got the Elemental Goddess Crown… no, maybe since she successfully mastered the [6 Elements Kingdom], she has embarked on a different path.”

“The [6 Elements Kingdom]!” Chen Rui clenched his fists, “What is actually going on?!”

“Although I don’t like the word ‘fate’, I have to lament the unpredictability of fate. The [6 Elements Kingdom] made her touch the faith of elements, which is equivalent to entering the realm of another world. Everything started from there. “

[6 Elements Kingdom]! Chen Rui stood there dumbfounded as if struck by lightning. In order to satisfy Zola’s wish, I tried my best to find the 6 elements source power. Finally, Zola succeeded in the [6 Elements Kingdom], which is the most powerful kingdom of the fairy dragons. Her strength also increased sharply. However, this actually made Zola come to such a dead end today!

It was like with my own hands…

“The [6 Elements Kingdom] doesn’t mean anything. It’s just ‘touching’ elemental faith, which is considered to have a foundation. Besides, Zola is not the first fairy dragon in history to own the [6 Elements Kingdom].” Moore noticed Chen Rui’s self-blame, “If the [6 Elements Kingdom] allowed Zola to touch the faith of elements, then the recognition of the Elemental Goddess Crown gave her the ability to ‘control’ this kind of faith.”

“Elemental Messenger?” Chen Rui thought of what Moore and Hegel said when they arrived at the Dark Moon.

Moore nodded, “Elemental Messenger is the commander of elements. It can maximize the power of elements and exert its greatest power. The reason is that an Elemental Messenger can control the faith of elements. As a creature outside the world of elements, it’s a special case that she can become an Elemental Messenger. The reason is exactly the Elemental Goddess Crown. From the moment Zola got this artifact, her ‘foundation’ became a real ‘qualification’.”

“Qualification?” Chen Rui caught a keyword.

Moore didn’t answer. He just continued on his own, “So when the Elemental Goddess Staff is awakened in advance, we can only turn to Zola who also has the Elemental Goddess Armament. In fact, we were not confident if Zola could control the Elemental Goddess Staff. If Zola failed, not only she would be deprived of the [6 Elements Kingdom], but also the Elemental Goddess Crown, and so on. This is equivalent to losing her ‘qualification’.”

“Maybe that’s the best ending!” Chen Rui’s clenched fists trembled slightly. Even if Zola lost her strength, it doesn’t matter. At least she will be safe and sound.

“Not necessarily. In fact, in that case, there will be 2 endings. First, the Elemental Goddess Crown and the Elemental Goddess Staff will absorb the deprived [6 Elements Kingdom] and fall into silence again; second, the Elemental Goddess Staff and the Elemental Goddess Crown resonate under the power of the [6 Elements Kingdom], erupting a more dangerous shockwave and completely dismantling the seal of the elemental world. The most terrifying doom calamity will come by then. Not only the elemental world, but the entire main planes may be annihilated.”

The entire main plane will be annihilated? Chen Rui’s pupils were constricted. Before he could ask, Moore’s words attracted his attention again, “Fortunately, Zola created a third ending and successfully controlled the Elemental Goddess Staff. Her strength has stepped into Pseudo-God. At the same time, it also allowed her to obtain a further ‘qualification’.”

“It’s ‘qualification’ again! What exactly is it?!”

“The power contained in the artifacts is secondary. The Elemental Goddess Crown symbolizes ‘faith’, the Elemental Goddess Staff symbolizes ‘soul’, and the Elemental Goddess Robe symbolizes ‘life’.” Moore’s gaze became deep, “The true meaning of these 3 elements of the Elemental Goddess Armament is… Godhood!”

“Godhood!” Chen Rui was shocked again, Moore’s words were very clear. It is not Pseudo-Godhood, but Godhood!

The true core of god!

Chen Rui finally understood, “Could it be…the so-called qualification is to inherit the Godhood of the elemental goddess!”

“To be precise, it is the shattered Godhood! In fact, the element origin fragments that the Elemental Kings had been looking for are the fragment projections of the elemental goddess’ Godhood. Only when the 6 origin fragments are all assembled, can the shattered Godhood of the elemental goddess start to condense again. At present, Zola still has the last test before the final qualification, that is…” While Moore said it, suddenly there was a ‘ click ’. A crack appeared in his solid body.

This scene surprised Chen Rui. Ignoring the huge amount of information revealed by those words just now, he exclaimed, “What’s happening to you?”

“I’m fine…” Moore didn’t look at the cracks on his body. “Once she finally obtains the complete inheritance, she will gain unimaginable power, but from another perspective, she will lose even more.”

“ Crack! Crack! Crack! ” There were a few more cracks on Moore’s body, which became more shocking. The Crown of Thorns immediately appeared on Chen Rui’s head, and he activated [Divine Healing]. However, when the strongest healing light fell on Earth Elemental King, it had no effect.

“It’s useless. It’s not an injury.” Moore smiled flatly, “Let’s continue the talk.”

Chen Rui already vaguely understood why Moore or other Elemental Kings were so secretive about some things and refused to disclose them. It turned out that saying these things would cause self-destruction under the influence of some kind of taboo force.

“You don’t need to talk anymore, Moore. You just need to tell me how to save Zola.”

“If you want to achieve this wish, you must listen to me.” Moore shook his head, “It’s the last chance anyway.”

“Last?” Chen Rui was shocked again.

“Elemental Kings are the avatars of the Main Elemental Messengers on the main plane. We have independent consciousness. In addition to accumulating power and knowledge, the most important meaning of existence is to find the Godhood fragment projections of the elemental goddess, which is the origin fragments. Now we have found all the 6 element origin fragments with your help, the mission has been completed. It is time… to return. Not only me, but also other Elemental Kings and elementals.”

“You mean, Lambost, Ogmarton, they all…” Chen Rui’s heart trembled when he thought of the Earth Realm, which was empty and without the earth elementals.

“That’s right. In fact, both my elemental heart and origin fragment have returned. What is in front of you now is the consciousness that has not fully returned. Fortunately, you came here before I completely return.”

“Complete return?” Chen Rui’s heart tightened. The resentment in his heart had completely disappeared, leaving only horror. The elemental hearts and origin fragments of the 6 Elemental Kings had all returned to the world of elements!

“Then ‘Moore’…”

Moore sighed, “‘Moore’ is just a shadow. Even if it has an independent consciousness, it is still a shadow after all. Just like a bubble, it will burst after all. Now the meaning of its existence is over, it will return to the original body. Just like a drop of water enters the sea, it can’t make any waves.”

Chen Rui’s heart trembled. At that time, ‘Moore’s’ independent consciousness would disappear, but the knowledge and experience would be integrated into the soul of the Main Elemental Messenger, which meant that ‘Moore’ would completely cease to exist. Not only Moore, but also Lambost, Delkus, Ogmarton, Sethtine, and Hegel, and all the elementals who ever had independent consciousness.

“I don’t have much time. To make a long story short, Zola’s path is irreversible. If you act rashly now, instead of stopping anything, you will harm her even more. However, nothing is absolute. I have left my last trace of soul power in the Fertile Yuan Soil. When it emits a strong colorful light, it means that Zola has entered the final test. When it emits golden light and splits open, it will open the entrance of the elemental world. You can use faith power to protect yourself and enter the elemental world. At that time, your choice with her will determine your ending, and perhaps the ending of everything…”

Moore just said a few words, and terrifying cracks occurred one after another on his body. Even his face was cracked. His whole body was already crumbling.

“Moore!” Chen Rui felt strong remorse, “It’s all my fault! If I hadn’t found all the origin fragments! None of this would have happened!”

“You’re wrong… this is fate. It will come sooner or later, and it has nothing to do with you. Furthermore, it is because you found the origin fragment that we have been truly relieved. Not only me, but also all the creatures in the elemental world, including the main Elemental Messenger. This is what elementals have been looking forward to. From now on, there will be no more Elemental War…”

“What is the meaning of Elemental War and what is seal of the elemental world? Also, the doom calamity you mentioned on the main plane…” Chen Rui’s voice stopped abruptly, and he didn’t ask further, because the surface of Moore’s body had already begun to disintegrate little by little.

“Lambost asked me to convey a message to you,” Moore’s voice was much weaker, “‘Thank you’.”

Chen Rui gritted his teeth and tried the Holy Grail, the Crown of Thorns and other powers in succession, but they couldn’t stop Moore’s body from collapsing. A strong sadness welled up in his mind.

“It’s surprising. In my impression, water elementals never really say these 2 words to people. You have a strange appeal. The closer one is to you, the more one can feel the ‘authenticity’. If you can, please maintain that precious truth, because it is more precious than power…”

Chen Rui’s eyes were red with hot tears rolling in them.

Moore’s body became thinner when he said this, “Elementals can’t cry, but I can feel the warmth of that sadness… Thank you for everything you did for ‘Moore’. Thank you for your friendship that made me feel ‘my’ existence. If Lambost said ‘thank you’ to you, then what I want to say is – ‘Sorry’. Goodbye, friend.”

Moore’s figure completely disappeared, leaving only the Fertile Yuan Soil lying quietly on the ground. The last words before the annihilation of the Earth Elemental King could be vaguely heard in the air.

“Whether you are that person or not, try to truly transcend fate…”

TL: Hopes the factor of ‘Chen Rui’ will let ‘Moore’ keep living in the Main Elemental Messenger…

chapters.title: Chapter 1164: Future Trajectories
chapters.body:
Chapter 1164: Future Trajectories

In the Dark Moon residence, Chen Rui sat on the ground, looking at the dark clouds covering the sky. He took a sip of wine and remained silent.

Empty wine bottles were lying on the ground. In fact, Chen Rui was not alcoholic, but he was influenced by 2 alcoholic companions. In addition, drinking wine was 1 of the most common etiquette among friends in this world, so his real wine tolerance (without cheating with strength) had gradually been improved, but it was the first time he drank wine for several days like this.

After returning to the Dark Moon from the Earth Realm, apart from drinking wine, Chen Rui hardly ate or did anything else. He just kept silent.

Moore, his best friend, had just left him forever suddenly. He barely had time to accept it, and he also couldn’t accept it.

The remaining 5 Elemental Kings, including the friendly Lambost, Sethtine, and Hegel, who looked the least like a friend, were actually friends.

The feeling of ‘losing’ couldn’t be described in texts or words.

Zola was facing the most dangerous and difficult road. When she needed help and comfort the most, he couldn’t do anything; he couldn’t even be by her side.

Although Moore said that this is fate, if there was no element source powers and no origin fragments, then everything would not be what it is today. So what if I can defeat Raphael, Abaddon or even Michael and Satan? I still can’t change the so-called fate.

Fate… how do I actually transcend it?

Chen Rui took a sip thoughtfully, and he found that the wine bottle in his hand was empty again. Another bottle appeared in his hand. Before he unscrewed the bottle cap, the bottle of wine suddenly came out of his hand and flew into the hand of the figure behind him.

“It’s no fun drinking wine alone.” Paglio’s voice sounded.

“I just want to drink some wine.” The poison dragon sat down next to him and knocked off the bottle cap with his teeth skillfully. He clinked it with the new wine bottle that appeared in Chen Rui’s hand, raised his head, and bottomed up the wine in no time.

“ Hey , you are too stingy to drink wine like this.” Paglio looked at Chen Rui who sipped slowly, “Shouldn’t the guy who drinks to drown his sorrow drink it all in one go?”

Chen Rui shook his head, “The guy who came to persuade people not to drink to drown sorrow, shouldn’t persuade like you, right?”

“I’m not a naggy guy. Besides, so many women have already worried about you. I just want to drink some wine. Give me a few more bottles.” Paglio was not a shy person. He took over all the bottles that Chen Rui took out just now.

“Slow down…” Chen Rui watched Paglio drink the wine, “That is the purple berry wine that Catherine gave me as a tribute. The quantity is limited. It will be gone after drinking it.”

The poison dragon grinned, “ Hehe , the Royal Majesty Empress is yours, what is the big deal with this wine? But then again, the ‘special tribute’ is indeed different. This wine fragrance is extremely mellow, far better than ordinary products. It’s a pity that Roman is about to break through in the closed-door training, otherwise he will definitely come over with a sniff. Take out all you have. Don’t be stingy!”

“Okay, you won.” Chen Rui smiled wryly and took out another 5 bottles, “That’s really all.”

The 2 drank wine and chatted with each other.

“I understand your mood now.” Paglio took a sip of wine, “If it was before, I might not understand it.”

Chen Rui understood the meaning of the poison dragon. In the past, Paglio, who only saw eggshells when he was born, was a completely self-centered guy. He was the standard dragon that would only take care of his interests, but now he was different. He already had friends and lovers. He had risked his life more than once in battle to protect them, so Paglio understood the sadness of losing a close friend.

“There is no need to explain or shirk anything. You have said it yourself. No one is perfect, and life is never smooth. You may have done the right thing, or you may have done the wrong thing, but if you have done it, let it be. Why do you think about it so much? Why don’t you think about what to do in the future?”

With that said, Paglio let out a breath of wine and stretched his waist, “However, whether it is mood or attitude, there is always a process of adaptation or mediation. It’s just like when I just learned that I suddenly had a father in the human world’s Dragon Valley. I even took it out on Pagris on the spot. It took a long time for me to let go of this mental block.”

“I’m not as entangled as you are.” Chen Rui drank the last bit of wine from the wine bottle in his hand, but there was no new wine bottle in his hand, “Actually, it’s not that I can’t think it through, I’m just thinking about some questions.”

“Don’t be so sentimental. I don’t care if you want to die or live. I just want to take the opportunity to satisfy my wine addiction.” Paglio patted his buttocks and stood up, “Little Betty has spoken these days. She asked me to try that secret formula to get babies, but I have to quit wine for a while. It is really sad. She even keeps a close watch. However, it would also be nice to have a daughter as good as Duoduo… See, Duoduo is here as we mention. I’ll go and, find a place to eradicate the wine breath right away, lest the little girl smell it and complain to Little Betty.”

After the poison dragon finished speaking, he dodged and disappeared in place. Chen Rui turned his head and saw a small head protruding from the wall behind him. It was his precious daughter.

“Duoduo.”

Children were actually quite sensitive. Duoduo had long noticed that daddy was depressed, so she had been careful these days to not disturb Chen Rui. Hearing daddy’s calling, the little girl came out immediately. She came to Chen Rui step by step, put her arms around his neck, and gently pressed her face against Chen Rui’s.

“Daddy…”

Chen Rui hugged her daughter lovingly, “What’s wrong?”

“Aunt Kia asks me to call you for dinner.”

“Alright.”

“Daddy, shall we go eat now? Duoduo hasn’t eaten with daddy for a few days…”

Seeing the anticipation flashing in his daughter’s big bright eyes, Chen Rui’s heart suddenly softened. He took a deep breath, stood up, and showed a long-lost smile on his face, “Okay.”

The little girl who had completed the arduous task assigned by Aunt Kia happily flew up and kissed daddy, then she pulled Chen Rui toward the courtyard.

Compared with the haze of this sky, another sky looked bright and dazzling.

The sunlight was scattered on the dense and lush forest sea. Countless light beams were refracted in the canopy, rendering the somewhat cold forest warmer.

There was a small hut in the middle of the dense forest. At the door of the hut, there was a tall and slender female figure, wearing a cool short robe. She had a beautiful face, a pair of silver eyes sparkling, dark green long hair curled slightly, and 2 pointy ears faintly showing on 2 sides.

“Kilanya.”

A hoarse and jerky voice came from the side. It turned out that there was a figure wearing a dark green cloak beside the elf woman. Compared with the elf’s eye-catching temperament, this figure was more like smoke in the dark. If one didn’t look carefully, one might think he was a tree shade.

“Father…” From Kilanya’s address, it could be seen that the man in the cloak was the most famous legendary prophet Alucier of the elf tribe.

“Your mood still doesn’t seem to be better?”

“That’s true.” Kilanya sighed, “No matter which elf it is, knowing that the Tree of Nature was taken away by some treacherous guy and never returned, he will not be in a good mood; it makes me even more depressed that the ‘behind the scene’ of this incident is actually my father.”

“That’s right, I entrusted Finoia to tell that Royal Highness ‘Arthur’ not to let the Tree of Nature return to the forest sea as promised.” Alucier paused the wooden stick in his hand and took a few staggering steps.

“I don’t know why you did this. Father should have heard the dissatisfaction of the tribe. Everyone is questioning your decision to let that person take the Tree of Nature away. You’re the highest instructor of the elf tribe. Over the years, the elves have always believed in you, but the Tree of Nature is the most important holy tree of the elf tribe, and it is also a life tree that involves life and death. It was an unbelievable decision for you to let the outsider control the holy tree. Now that the person did not return on time, at least on the surface, it has caused extremely bad effects. Not only you, the legendary prophet, but even Her Majesty Liv has been implicated.”

“Just like that?” Alucier smiled. Although half of his face looked ferocious and bloated, the other half of his face was full of kindness, “Actually, what makes you most angry is that I’m only telling you the truth now, right?”

Kilanya curled her lips, “ Hmph , sir father has several apprentices, but only 1 daughter, especially your daughter is also the apprentice who has received the most genuine inheritance. Why did you keep it a secret from me for so long? Didn’t you say that I also have the talent of great prophecy?”

“Prophecy is not a gift to be thankful for. On the contrary, the more you can see some future trajectories, the more you will feel struggling and suffering. Moreover, the future we see is just a possible trajectory. Every time we foresee it, it may be different. Perhaps because you see it, it’s changing.”

“Since the future is changing, why do you still insist on letting that human control the Tree of Nature?”

“Because… some things, no matter how many times they are foreseen, will never change.” Alucier sighed, “This is ‘fate’. Fate is stubborn and almost irreversible, but it does not mean absolute. But only relying on foresight is definitely not going to change.”

“So, you try to change it through some changes?” Kilanya was thoughtful. She was suddenly startled, “Then, you let that human keep the Tree of Nature…”

As Alucier’s true apprentice and the owner of the great prophecy talent, Kilanya had already thought of something, but suddenly she didn’t say anything, only showing fear expression on her face.

“The next time you see that human, give this to him.”

Kilanya looked at something that appeared in her hand. She showed an unexpected expression, “This is…”

Alucier didn’t answer, but he just looked up at the sky. The cloudless sky suddenly darkened, the sun was covered by a large cloud, and rumbling thunder sounded in the mist. It seemed to be raining soon.

Behind the cloak, the 2 very different eyes became deep at the same time, as if piercing the dark clouds as well as time and space. After a long while, he murmured, “The sky is about to change.”

chapters.title: Chapter 1165: The Beginning
chapters.body:
Chapter 1165: The Beginning

In the sky covered with red clouds and the thunder became more and more frequent.

There was a large specially-made table in the residential courtyard of Dark Moon Estate. Chen Rui was sitting in front of the table, surrounded by Athena, Kia and Isabella. Isabella was holding Duoduo in her arms. Olypheus, Delia, Medilu, Lalaria and the others sat opposite.

Everyone ignored the thunder in the sky, and they were still chatting and laughing, especially Athena and the ladies, who watched with a smile as Chen Rui ate big mouthfuls. They kept serving him while they ate less.

“You just ate the braised pork from Athena, and a piece of spinach from Isabella, why didn’t you eat the potatoes from me?” The little maid pursed her mouth pitifully.

“How can I remember so much…” Chen Rui finally understood who Duoduo’s usually pitiful gestures were from, “Okay, I eat now, alright?”

Madam Aunt also protested in response, “Wait a minute, it can’t be counted like this. You ate 12 bites of Athena and 11 bites of Kia. Why did you only eat 7 bites of mine?”

“You should be a statistician instead of the head of intel, Yini.” Chen Rui stopped his chopsticks speechlessly, and he looked at the smiling Athena, “General Athena, do you have anything to add on? Let’s settle all at once.”

Athena smiled and shook her head, “I’m not a statistician, but you haven’t eaten anything these days, so you have to make up for it today.”

Make up for it? Doesn’t that mean I have to eat more than 10 bowls? This trick is even more ruthless… Chen Rui could only smile wryly as he looked at the already piled high bowls.

“This is too much.” Kia winked, “It’s better to eat 50 skewers of barbecue, 50 slices of potatoes and 50 spinach.”

Under the instigation of Isabella, a small flame appeared in Duoduo’s hand, “Daddy, you will be malnourished if you don’t eat. I can help you heat up those barbecues.”

Seeing the innocent and serious look of the little girl, Chen Rui felt a touch of warmth in his heart. He raised his hands in surrender, “Okay, do whatever you want.”

He knew very well that Athena and the others deliberately joked to ease his mood, including Paglio’s ‘drink wine with him’ previously, which was also to cheer him up – There are so many people who care about me. I must cheer up immediately.

As the poison dragon said, life cannot be smooth sailing. No matter right or wrong, since some things have happened, I have to bear it and keep going.

For a moment, everyone sensed Chen Rui’s emotional change and smiled at each other.

Just when Chen Rui was about to speak, he was startled. A stone appeared in his hand. An extremely intense colorful light was shining on that stone.

The radiance of the Fertile Yuan Soil attracted the vision of everyone in the house, especially Athena and the others who knew the inside story. They all showed nervous expressions.

Chen Rui clenched his fists: According to the words of Earth Elemental King Moore before he died, this should be the moment when Zola has entered the final test!

“My power…” Kia suddenly exclaimed, “It seems a bit uncontrollable!”

“Me too!” Krobelus and Delia said at the same time.

“And me.” Isabella looked at the disordered water element power in her hand, then at the nonchalant Lalaria and the others. She suddenly realized, “The disrupted one is… the element power!”

With that said, Isabella suddenly burst into flames. It turned out that Duoduo was frightened by the sudden disturbance, and the small flames in her hands lost control and burst out.

This was the fire origin of the phoenix, and its essence was incomparable. Fortunately, Isabella had reached the Demi-God level, and she reacted quickly to stop the flames in time. Otherwise, not only Isabella, but also Kia and Athena beside her would be hurt.

“Aunt Yini! I’m sorry…” Duoduo cried.

“It’s okay, Duoduo. Don’t cry. Just relax and stabilize your strength.” Isabella helped the little girl wipe away her tears, glanced at Athena, and spoke up, “Olypheus, hold Duoduo and go sit there for a while.”

Athena was pregnant now, so she must be protected without any negligence.

“Okay, sister!” Ms. Black Dragon rushed over immediately and took Duoduo. Ms. Black Dragon was a black dragon who had high resistance against any kind of element. Additionally, there was also Lalaria there, who was also a black dragon. Even if something happened to Duoduo, it would not affect others.

The thunder in the sky became more and more loud. From time to time, lightning pierced through the clouds. The color of the lightning was constantly changing, and the element power became more and more disordered.

“Damn it!” Paglio frowned, “How can the elements be so disordered? Even Demi-God Level people are affected?”

“Not only Demi-God, but also Pseudo-God, and everything.” A slightly deep voice came from the direction of the gate, “This is the fluctuation from the elemental world, affecting the entire main plane.”

This sound made Duoduo immediately reveal a vigilant expression. The only person who could pass through the door enchantment without a sound and made Duoduo have such an expression, of course, was Python.

“You’re here.” Chen Rui nodded to Python.

“Well, it’s chaotic outside now, and all the element powers are starting to get out of control. I believe Michael and the others are the ones who have the most headaches, because the light element is also included. But with the Book of Creation, there shouldn’t be too much trouble, but those 3 overbearing guys are going to suffer a bit.”

Python’s guess was correct. At this time, the chaos at the Holy Light Mountain was far higher than that of ordinary towns. Light elements were running around uncontrollably, and they sometimes even mutated into completely opposite dark elements. Facing the believers’ intense panic, the 3 archangels could only join forces to activate the Book of Creation in the Light Divinity Temple to forcibly suppress the element powers in the White Cliff.

Python’s eyes were fixed on the Fertile Yuan Soil, which became more and more colorful, “This is the earth element treasure, Fertile Yuan Soil? Its power seems to be a little special… What does this change mean? Is it related to the missing Zola?”

Chen Rui frowned, “Did you already know something?”

After solving the incident of Abaddon and Satan, Python appeared for the first time. She stayed in the Bloody Empire to recuperate, so she didn’t know what happened in Mountain Xilang. Nonetheless, judging from her expression, she seemed to have understood some secrets.

Python said indifferently, “As I said last time, I was just guessing, and now… you should already know part of the truth.”

“Then what exactly is your guess?”

“It’s just a guess; not the truth. People are always looking for the unknown truth, but the truth is often cruel. When it is revealed, many times you will find that ‘losing’ is far greater than ‘gaining’.” Python shook her head, “Actually, I just saw that Zola seemed to be ‘elementalized’ when she devoured Abaddon’s soul power, plus I have seen her 2 elemental armaments. This matter should be inseparable from the elemental world.”

Chen Rui was not satisfied with such an answer. Recalling the previous scene, he asked again, “Has Satan guessed this too? Why did he say ‘ironic fate’? The same thing happened last time in the Holy Light Mountain. Michael also said this when he heard that I acquired the Phantom Ice Spring to help the Earth Elemental King repair the elemental heart. There is one thing in common here. That is, one side is ‘me’, and the other side is related to the elemental world people. So what the heck do ‘I’ have to do with the elemental world?”

“The truth… you should find it in the elemental world.” Python avoided this topic, “It’s just that the elemental world is a very special existence. Trainers can’t enter the elemental world under normal circumstances, even if it’s pseudo-god.”

“Fertile Yuan Soil can open the door to the elemental world at a certain time.”

“No wonder.” Python withdrew her gaze from the Fertile Yuan Soil, “Its structure should be to use life and soul essence as a bridge to release the purest earth element power and open the portal—it’s a gift from your friend, the Elemental King, right?”

“The last gift.” Chen Rui’s gaze dimmed when he heard Python say “using life and soul essence as a bridge”.

“If my guess is right, this thing can only teleport 1 person.” Python was also a master of soul power. She saw through the soul structure of the Fertile Yuan Soil, “This means that you will enter the elemental world alone. “

Chen Rui raised his eyebrows, “You seem to agree for me to go?”

“If I don’t agree, you will go too. Since it’s useless to object, it’s better to look forward to it and see how far you can go.” Python smiled slightly, “But this trip can’t be taken lightly, because the enemies you will face are stronger than any opponent you have encountered before.”

Chen Rui nodded, “I hope to know more about the elemental world.”

“I know very little about the elemental world. But I know that this plane resists all creatures other than elements, and your strength will definitely be suppressed there. If your opponent is a Main Elemental Messenger, then you will face unprecedented tough battles; if you are facing 2 or more Main Elemental Messengers, I have only 1 advice, run.”

“Is the Main Elemental Messenger so powerful?” Paglio asked a little dissatisfiedly, “Is it stronger than Chen Rui or Ms. Python? You’re the strongest person who can compete with Satan and Michael!”

“The Main Elemental Messenger is an existence second only to the element goddess, roughly equivalent to the level of Veronica in Chen Rui’s ‘world’. Not only are they powerful, but they also have accumulated countless years of experience and wisdom. Based on my current strength, I’m not certain even in ordinary planes, let alone in the elemental world. Unless it is a god or someone with special abilities, the Main Elemental Messenger is almost invincible in the elemental world.”

Paglio gasped. Isabella interjected, “Special abilities? Like?”

“A person recognized by the elemental goddess.” Python’s answer made everyone understand immediately, and they fell silent.

Fertile Yuan Soil suddenly trembled automatically, and the colorful light gradually merged.

At this moment, Chen Rui’s attention was all focused on the golden Fertile Yuan Soil.

That golden light got brighter, and a crack appeared on the Fertile Yuan Soil.

chapters.title: Chapter 1166: The Elemental World
chapters.body:
Chapter 1166: The Elemental World

The cracks on the Fertile Yuan Soil spread rapidly, and it completely shattered with a ‘ bang ’.

At the moment of shattering, the golden light shrouded Chen Rui. Chen Rui thought of Moore’s words, and he let the golden light sink into his body without avoiding it.

Although the Fertile Yuan Soil was shattered, it didn’t completely disappear. Those fragments instantly absorbed a large amount of soil, forming a door in the air. In the eyes of the others, this door was transparent, and there was nothing but a door frame. Only Chen Rui could feel the endless special breath contained behind the door. His soul seemed to be summoned by the space behind the door. More accurately, it was calling the golden light in his body, which was the last trace of life and soul power left by Moore. However, the effectiveness of this power was limited. He must enter as soon as possible, otherwise it would lose its effect.

“Chen Rui!” Athena’s voice sounded behind him.

As soon as Chen Rui turned his head, he saw Athena’s gaze. Thousands of words were gathered in a simple concern.

“Come back safely with Zola.” Athena gently touched her stomach and looked at the people around, “We’ll wait for you.”

“ En .” Chen Rui nodded. Golden light flashed on his body as he flew into the ‘door’. His body also became blurred, and he disappeared soon.

After Chen Rui entered, the door began to crumble rapidly.

As the light flashed, Python’s figure appeared on the opposite side. It turned out that she had already passed through the door at high speed, but unfortunately, she just ‘passed through’ and could not ‘enter’.

No doubt, as she expected before, the elemental world repelled all powers other than elements, and the energy of the Fertile Yuan Soil was only enough to teleport Chen Rui alone.

In the next second, the fragments of Fertile Yuan Soil were completely annihilated, and the solidified soil door disappeared without a trace. Only the lightning dancing in the sky could still be seen.

The moment Chen Rui passed through the soil door, he channeled Star Power to prepare for any danger. However, to his surprise, he didn’t feel any repulsion. Instead, he felt like he had returned to the most comfortable environment like a fish entering the water.

That door had disappeared. There was a whole new world in front of him.

The clouds in the sky flashed with all kinds of gorgeous and dazzling light, constantly changing. There was no land under his feet, just islands floating in the air. This geographical situation was somewhat similar to the Ghastly Floating Land, but this kind of island was not all soil or stone. For example, the nearest one was pure iceland.

The sky was filled with streams of air, faintly revealing a powerful force. Clusters of hurricanes could be seen in the distance. There was lightning flashing in them.

Even a magic fool like Chen Rui could sense the incomparable energy of elements contained in this world. All kinds of elements, even those incompatible elements, were organically combined into a compatible whole.

Elemental world.

‘Hometown’ of Moore, Lambost, Sethtine, and the others.

Zola, here I come… Chen Rui said silently in his mind as he flew forward.

At this moment, Chen Rui discovered something that shocked him—The Breeze Shadow Boots under his feet had lost their acceleration effect!

The Breeze Shadow Boots had the attribute of [Wind Escape], which could greatly increase the speed as long as it was worn, but now Chen Rui felt that the attribute of [Wind Escape] had disappeared. He tried to activate the Breeze Shadow Boots’ [Sparkle] skill to triple the speed. No doubt, there was no reaction at all.

Chen Rui frowned. The God-Eating Mask appeared on his face, but he also could not activate [Demonic Flies Transformation] or [Devour].

After trying all 6 of the ‘7 artifacts’, Chen Rui finally confirmed that all the 7 artifacts were unusable in the elemental world.

Chen Rui was extremely shocked. Starting from the God-Eating Mask, these artifacts had accompanied him through numerous battles, whether large or small. They played a vital role many times, and even saved his life more than once. Yet, in this world, they couldn’t be used!

Chen Rui quickly regained his composure. Although the 7 artifacts could bring a lot of help, they were external objects after all and could not be completely relied on. Next, he tried the most important [Star Gate], and found that the star point couldn’t be set here, but fortunately, it was still possible to activate the original [Star Gate].

At the very least, I can escape from the elemental world with Zola.

After a while, the feeling of being at home in the elemental world had faded. Correspondingly, the surrounding pressure was increasing. The reason was very simple. The golden light energy of the Fertile Yuan Soil in his body could not last long. It was rapidly dissipating.

Chen Rui took a deep breath and felt the mellow and warm soul power. Although it was about to dissipate completely, this feeling had been engraved in his memory, like an eternal friend who would accompany him to face future battles.

Moore’s soul power finally dissipated. Chen Rui suddenly felt his mind and body sink at the same time. The brewing Star Power was quickly decomposed and dissipated. He even lost the ability to fly, getting tossed by the airflow.

Chen Rui tried his best, but he still couldn’t stabilize his figure. He was secretly surprised. In fact, he was mentally prepared, but he didn’t expect it to be more difficult than he imagined. Even without activating the [Pole Star Transformation], his strength had already surpassed ordinary peak stage of the Demi-God. In fact, he could even cross-level fight with the early stage of the Pseudo-God, but here, he couldn’t even fly freely.

This was no longer the simple power suppression that Chen Rui experienced in many kingdoms including the Abyss kingdom before, but a kind of absolute repulsion. Any material and power that was incompatible with this plane would be banned.

It was not only his power that collapsed but also his body. Even the physical strength of the peak stage of the Demi-God could not resist this terrifying repulsion. Chen Rui felt as if he was in an oven. His body and soul were continuously burned until exhausted.

If this continues, it won’t be long before I will be annihilated. And this is without any enemies!

When Chen Rui was about to activate the [Pole Star Transformation], the Super System sent a warning sound in time, “Found continuous erosion of unknown law energy. Do you want to activate [Aura Protection]? During the protection period, it will consume 100,000 Aura Value every minute and faith crystal 1000.”

“Activate!” Chen Rui immediately confirmed to activate it. This kind of [Aura Protection] reminder was passive in nature. It should be automatically prompted when he was seriously threatened by some special nature. It occurred when he was imprisoned by the Shackles of True Flame of Isyorul back then.

The consumption of [Aura Protection] was astonishing. 1 minute cost 100,000 aura and 1000 faith crystals. Then, 1 hour cost 6 million aura and 60,000 faith crystals, but for the massive reserves of aura and faith crystals in the Super System today, it was not a problem.

After activating the [Aura Protection], the feeling of suppression in the soul still existed, but the situation of continuous ‘losing HP’ finally disappeared. He could finally control the power freely, but the consumption of power was obviously much higher than usual.

Now that the most fundamental problem had been solved, Chen Rui no longer had to activate [Pole Star Transformation] anymore. With his current comprehension level of the 6-star enhancement and faith, the [Pole Star Transformation] would not bring any restrictions or ‘side effects’, so it could even be activated repeatedly. Nonetheless, the [Pole Star Transformation] was an extremely power-consuming battle form after all. He had not yet encountered a real enemy, especially in this environment where power consumption was doubled.

After Chen Rui adjusted his state, he flew forward.

After only a few minutes of flying, Chen Rui’s figure suddenly stopped. He saw a translucent creature like a giant snake appearing in the air, rushing toward him. There were countless wriggling figures behind him.

Race: Elemental creature (wind)

Comprehensive Strength Assessment: SS-

Physique: SS-, Strength: SS-, Spirit: SS-, Speed: SS

[Analysis]: Wind attribute, lightning talent.

Risk level: Low.

Kingdom level was not considered strong compared to Chen Rui’s current strength, but what surprised him was that these elemental creatures appeared so suddenly. No matter whether it was his own perception or the [Analytical Eyes], there was no sign in advance.

With a wave of Chen Rui’s hand, the giant snake immediately split into pieces. The giant snakes behind did not flinch or fight recklessly. They spewed out lightning one after another.

Chen Rui was inexperienced in magic, but he had a fairy dragon wife. He had progressed step by step to his current level under Zola’s ‘tempering’, so he was quite familiar with lightning. These giant snakes cast instant lightning, not the element power mobilized by magic spells, but the instinct of elemental creatures. Whether in terms of speed or power, it was far better than ordinary magicians of the same level.

Chen Rui did not retreat but advanced, facing the lightning. He had rushed into the group of giant snakes. In the blink of an eye, the giant snakes disintegrated into nothing.

After advancing for a while, the space in front of him suddenly burst into flames. Horses covered in flames rushed toward the sky.

The fire elemental creature also appeared suddenly this time, but Chen Rui was already mentally prepared. Countless sharp qi appeared in his hands. It didn’t take long for him to eliminate these fire horses.

Chen Rui, who easily defeated his opponent twice, was not in a relaxed mood. These elemental creatures obviously possessed intelligence, but the [Analytical Eyes] could not communicate at all. He could only feel strong hostility. Especially the fire elemental creatures just now, Chen Rui had the ‘Fire Phoenix Stigmata’ given by the little phoenix daughter, which could not only weaken the attack of the fire element power, but it also greatly increased the affinity of fire creatures. However, the hostility of the fire horses had not weakened in the slightest. Instead, they had become more violent.

It seems that the ‘repulsion’ of outsiders is not only by the environment of the elemental world, but also by all creatures that exist.

Chen Rui was flying while thinking. Suddenly, he had an intense warning. He saw countless fine raindrops fall from the dense dark clouds in the sky.

Dark clouds and rain were common natural phenomena, but these raindrops gave Chen Rui a sense of fatal danger. In the blink of an eye, the purple starlight flourished. He had activated the strongest [Pole Star Transformation] without thinking.

A transparent light shield instantly appeared around the purple starlight figure. When the seemingly gentle rain fell on the powerful protective light shield, it left terrifying cracks!

As the ‘rain’ continued, the defensive shield collapsed in just a few seconds. At this time, a black flame was ignited on Chen Rui’s body. This flame contained a powerful life force, evaporating the rain.

However, the ‘steam’ did not dissipate, but it froze quickly. Chen Rui activated [Flame of Nirvana] several times, but he couldn’t dispel or delay the freezing. He could only watch helplessly as his body was quickly frozen.

At this time, the dark clouds in the sky had disintegrated into white water vapor, which converged into a human-shaped face with blurred facial features. Only the dark blue eyes, that were relatively clear, were gazing at the ice sculpture below.

chapters.title: Chapter 1167: The Real Existence Closest To God
chapters.body:
Chapter 1167: The Real Existence Closest To God

The ice sculpture suddenly showed a faint purple light. It turned out that a purple light was shining inside. Then, a crack appeared on the ice sculpture.

The purple light shining from the crack was extremely dazzling. The starlight extended and spread. Subsequently, the frozen ice cube was shattered inch by inch in an instant, revealing the bright figure in it.

Chen Rui didn’t fight back immediately. Instead, he just looked up at the face in the sky.

The fuzzy facial features in the cloud gradually became clear, and the intangible white water vapor condensed into a light blue translucent entity. It looked crystal clear like some kind of gem.

Race: Elemental creature (water).

Comprehensive Strength Assessment: SSSS++

Physique: SSSS+, Strength: SSSS+, Spirit: SSSS++, Speed: SSSS+

[Analysis]: Water attribute, Main Elemental Oracle.

Danger level: Extremely dangerous!

It is actually the strength of SSSS++! Chen Rui was secretly shocked. He had experienced the 2 ‘+’ strength ratings when he was at the Demon Overlord level. It seemed that when he was approaching the highest limit point, there would always be such evaluations beyond the ordinary.

S++ was much stronger than S+, and much closer to super-level; SSSS++ was obviously closer to the level of God than the ordinary peak stage of the Pseudo-God. The Main Elemental Messenger with SSSS++ strength in front was really the closest to god.

Main Elemental Messenger! This must be the Main Elemental Messenger. So, it is called Main Elemental Oracle too!

The Main Elemental Messenger is the highest controller of the entire elemental world below God. There are only 6 of them in total. I didn’t expect to meet one so soon, and it’s the Water Main Elemental Messenger!

A trace of complicated emotions flashed across Chen Rui’s eyes. He thought of Water Elemental King Lambost, an avatar of the Water Main Elemental Messenger. The more important identity of that king was that he once fought side by side with Chen Rui; he even used his elemental heart to protect his friend.

It was a pity that Lambost had returned. As Moore said, these Elemental Kings were just shadows after all. After returning to the original body, the original independent consciousness was like a drop of water in the sea, which was not enough to affect the entire sea.

So, what was in front of him was the Water Main Elemental Messenger, not Lambost.

2 dark blue eyes slowly moved over and met Chen Rui. The strongest of this Water Main Elemental Messenger was spirit power. The level of SSSS++ was far from the ordinary peak stage of the Demi-God. Chen Rui suddenly felt like falling into an ice cellar, and he couldn’t help shivering. In this moment of distraction, the Water Main Elemental Messenger had already launched an attack.

Countless water streams appeared beside Chen Rui, and they converged into a huge river in the blink of an eye. The roaring streams carried terrifying pressure. Chen Rui felt the terrifying crisis before it got close, even greater than the previous ‘rain’.

Chen Rui continuously shifted his body to avoid the turbulent water flow. Originally, the range of shifting was huge, but the water flow seemed to transcend the space. No matter what the distance, he could be easily tracked.

Chen Rui dodged a few times in a wide range, then he saw the water pillars connected around him. At first glance, it seemed to be tracking his trajectory, but when he looked closely, he found that those water pillars gradually devoured everything around him, turning everything into water.

Not long after, the entire space turned into a vast ocean. Even the clouds in the sky turned into a water curtain. This was no longer a river or sea, but a breathtaking ‘water world’!

In the water world, there was a huge power that seemed soft but endless and pervasive.

With such power, it was no wonder that Python once said that it was not sure to defeat the Main Elemental Messenger even in a normal plane, let alone in a super ‘home field’ like the elemental world.

After the water world appeared, the ‘water’ flying around became a deadly weapon. Chen Rui had only dodged for a while, and the star armor on his body had already shown many cracks.

Chen Rui knew that he could not be passive like this. A brilliance flashed in his pupils, and a cold breath contained a huge faith power spread out. The nearby surging water quickly solidified. The solidification spread rapidly. The entire water world gradually slowed down.

It seemed that Chen Rui used water to stop the water and controlled the water world. In fact, this was not water element power, but the [Winter Territory] realized through destruction origin!

[Winter Territory] was derived from the ‘universe’ faith power from the Super System. For the elemental world, this faith power was also an ‘outsider’, but this ‘outsider’ was so powerful that it couldn’t be fully annihilated with the repulsion rule.

The freezing of [Winter Territory] had spread to the feet of the Water Main Elemental Messenger, freezing his feet. The Water Main Elemental Messenger did not dodge or use force to smash the freezing. He just looked down at the feet frozen by the special destructive coldness, he faintly expressed surprise.

“Such a pure and huge faith…” The Water Main Elemental Messenger finally spoke. It was the language of elementals, but Chen Rui could understand it through the [Analytical Eyes]. That voice was strikingly similar to that of Lambost.

Chen Rui knew that the suppression of [Winter Territory] was only temporary. When he tapped his feet, he had already appeared in front of the Water Main Elemental Messenger. Within a short time of shifting, his right arm had condensed a huge destruction might, “[Invade Like Fire]!”

A crimson light shot directly at the Water Main Elemental Messenger. This ray of light had no astonishing momentum, and it looked ordinary, but in the dark blue eyes of the Water Main Elemental Messenger, he could see a ‘world’ in constant destruction contained in the ray of light!

[True Red Extinction]!

This strike [True Red Extinction] contained the destruction might of [Invade Like Fire] and the buff of the [Winter Territory]. Therefore, the destructive power was extremely terrifying. If it was the 3 archangels or Satan and others, perhaps they would not be able to defend it directly.

Chen Rui launched such a powerful killing move without holding back, because he once said something when he used the phantom spring to help Lambost recover his elemental heart.

“If one day in the future, we have to become enemies, then I will not be merciful. I will personally end it with these hands, in the name of a former friendship.”

Wherever the light of [True Red Extinction] passed, the entire space was divided into 2. The solidified ‘waves’ tilted one after another.

The Water Main Elemental Messenger just looked at the red light of destruction approaching at high speed, and he actually didn’t dodge at all. [True Red Extinction] pierced his body without any suspense. The gem-like body shattered and turned into countless particles.

Chen Rui frowned instead. This is too easy. As a powerhouse of SSSS++, the Main Elemental Messenger will definitely not be annihilated like this.

After the Water Main Elemental Messenger was annihilated, the entire frozen water world was quickly evaporated, but the transpired mist quickly recondensed and returned to the form of the Water Main Elemental Messenger. He was intact as if nothing happened just now.

Chen Rui was secretly astonished. Although he was mentally prepared, it was the first time he saw an opponent who could directly withstand the [True Red Extinction] with his body like this. This was not a superficial confrontation. The destruction ‘world’ in [True Red Extinction] seemed to have entered a larger ‘world’. It was constantly ‘melting’ in it. In the end, only the most superficial strength was left in the destruction origin. The Water Main Elemental Messenger easily used a method of transforming to completely eliminate it.

The higher the super-level power went to the upper level, the greater the difference between the small realms. Chen Rui’s comprehension of [Purple Pole Star Transformation] had reached a considerable level, and his strength had already surpassed the ordinary peak stage of the Demi-God. If he combined various combat power factors, even if his basic power had not yet reached ‘++’ level, his combat power should be similar.

It was just that this was the elemental world, and he lost the skills of the 7 artifacts. It was really extremely difficult for him to defeat the Main Elemental Messenger. [All Star Gods View] was the strongest killing move, and also the last trump card. The disadvantage was that it would consume too much power, especially the consumption here was doubled. Even if he could defeat or even kill the Water Main Elemental Messenger, he would almost exhaust his power. Besides, there was more than 1 Main Elemental Messenger.

Most importantly, his real purpose of coming here today was not to challenge the Main Elemental Messenger, but to take away Zola.

The Water Main Elemental Messenger did not continue to attack, but he put away the mental suppression in his eyes as he said the second sentence, “You should be able to understand the words of elemental— I’ll give you a chance. Leave the elemental world now.”

“I will leave.” Chen Rui looked directly into the eyes of the Water Main Elemental Messenger and replied with the [Analytical Eyes]’s soul communication, “but not alone.”

“Courting death.” The voice of the Water Main Elemental Messenger became more and more eerie.

“Where’s Zola?”

The Water Main Elemental Messenger did not answer, “Some of your wishful thinking can only be described as ‘reckless’, I give you a way out for the sake of finding the water origin fragment and restoring the water elemental heart. Since you……”

Before he finished speaking yet, the surrounding breath suddenly became incomparably berserk. Countless scarlet huge beasts roared and surrounded the Water Main Elemental Messenger in the center.

Now that there was no room for talk, he didn’t hesitate at all to activate the [Scorching Dragon Roar] first. This blow contained destructive flame power, which should be able to restrain the Water Main Elemental Messenger.

However, before the power of [Scorching Dragon Roar] erupted, he saw that the body of the Water Main Elemental Messenger had been shattered.

Almost at the same time, Chen Rui suddenly found that the surrounding space was sealed by something. It seemed to be a huge… water bubble?

It turned out that the Water Main Elemental Messenger made a move earlier than Chen Rui. The cunning and wise Water Main Elemental Messenger was probably preparing this when he said the first sentence’bubble’.

The seemingly ordinary ‘bubble’ was actually 1 of the strongest moves of the Water Main Elemental Messenger. It could reflect all attacks infinitely. Even if the enemy did not attack, the bubble would shrink step by step until the imprisoned object was completely annihilated. It was both offensive and defensive. There were almost no flaws.

The Scorching Dragons had completely burst. Under that kind of power, the seemingly fragile bubble was only twisted violently, but it did not shatter. On the contrary, all the Scorching Dragons were actually reflected back, which meant that Chen Rui had to face the power of this ultimate move!

chapters.title: Chapter 1168: The Familiar Feeling
chapters.body:
Chapter 1168: The Familiar Feeling

Both Chen Rui and the Water Main Elemental Messenger were the top super powerhouses. The few turning points in the battle were actually happening in a split second. In the blink of an eye, the ‘bubble’ had been filled with crimson, and the bulging power was reflected again. Going back and forth like this, Chen Rui could no longer be seen in the crimson that was about to disappear. He should have been annihilated and no longer existed.

This victory was expected by the Water Main Elemental Messenger. Just as he was about to leave, he was taken aback.

A cluster of starlight shone in the ‘bubble’. This starlight contained far greater power than before.

A figure that gradually changed from transparent to solid stepped forward step by step. The blow just now didn’t seem to have caused the slightest damage to him.

On the contrary, the ‘bubble’ which contained the highest water element might became thin quickly and eventually disappeared under the starlight.

The Water Main Elemental Messenger’s eyes revealed a dignified expression for the first time. He felt that the cluster of stars behind Chen Rui not only possessed incredible life breath and faith breath, but also that the structure of the large and small stars in the nebula actually made him the Water Main Elemental Messenger had an “illusion” – as if it was a boundless sea. It was unfathomable!

Chen Rui walked in the air toward the Water Main Elemental Messenger step by step. The cluster of nebula behind him seemed more and more boundless,

This was exactly 1 of the constellations of [All Star Gods View], the constellation of the Super System’s Sea Goddess Helen – ‘Sea of Soul Songs’!

Since activating the Death Constellation when facing Abaddon in the Dark Furnace last time, Chen Rui combined the power of the ‘Sea of Soul Songs’ Constellation with his own Star Power before launching it again. Compared to the last time, it was more refined and balanced.

As the Water Main Elemental Messenger drew a circle with both hands, a huge spider web made of countless fine ice crystals appeared beside Chen Rui. Chen Rui stepped on it. A deep crack appeared on the star armor, and a bloody light shot out at the same time.

At this time, the ‘Sea of Soul Songs’ Constellation began to circulate slowly, and the rhythm produced by the circulation faintly turned into a water-like singing. Under this singing, the ‘spider web’ actually melted a little bit. It soon became a water curtain, absorbed by the nebula.

The Water Main Elemental Messenger waved his hands continuously, and various forms of water element attacks came overwhelmingly, but they were absorbed by the nebula without exception.

From all rivers to the sea, flowing back to origin.

This was the secret of the ‘Sea of Soul Songs’.

The momentum and power of the ‘Sea of Soul Songs’ finally moved the Water Main Elemental Messenger: It was not that the profound meaning of this ‘water’ was beyond the level of the main elemental messenger, but because the pure life and faith contained in the ‘Soul Song Sea Area’ had faintly surpassed this plane of all elemental faith!

This was simply unbelievable. The most important thing was that the elemental world could no longer suppress the power of this constellation.

Chen Rui was very aware of his own situation. Although the power of a single constellation could last longer than a super big move like [All Star Gods View], it could not last long after all. He must launch a decisive blow to the Water Main Elemental Messenger as soon as possible.

At this time, the distance between the 2 had been shortened a lot. When the Water Main Elemental Messenger suddenly looked up, he saw Chen Rui’s figure suddenly appearing in the sky, surrounding the Water Main Elemental Messenger.

The Water Main Elemental Messenger immediately had a dangerous omen. Before he could react, 3 light beams containing the power of the ‘Sea of Soul Songs’ Constellation had already shot out, intersecting in 1 place. The surrounding space suddenly was divided to form a special triangular space, blocking the Water Main Elemental Messenger.

[Dimension Destruction]!

Without the slightest delay, the entire space burst open.

At the moment before the explosion, the ‘bubble’ reappeared, but it wrapped the Water Main Elemental Messenger himself. However, under the power of [Dimension Destruction] containing the power of the ‘Sea of Soul Songs’ Constellation, the ‘bubble’ was no longer able to exert the power of reflection. It collapsed in an instant. In the blink of an eye, the Water Main Elemental Messenger in it was completely swallowed by the power of ‘shattering’.

When the vacuum created by [Dimension Destruction] faded away gradually, the Water Main Elemental Messenger’s figure reappeared in Chen Rui’s vision. He was unexpectedly unharmed.

“As expected of the person who defeated Dillosro’s avatar, this blow should have evolved from the ultimate move at that time. The quality of both the mystery and the momentum is far better than before.” The Water Main Elemental Messenger praised. As the original body, he absorbed the consciousness of Lambost, so he naturally remembered the scene of seeing [All Star Gods View] before.

Nevertheless, Lambost’s memory was from 3 years ago. Even someone as knowledgeable and experienced as the Water Main Elemental Messenger would never have imagined that in just 3 years, Chen Rui’s combat power not only reached the level of peak stage of Pseudo-God, but also the power of this move had also increased to the point where it could not be counted.

The blow just now was not [All Star Gods View]’s ‘evolved’ move, but just… a small part of it.

“Where is Zola?” Chen Rui asked the same question as before.

This time, the Water Main Elemental Messenger was silent for a moment before he replied, “Even if you know, it’s useless. Zola has become the 7th Main Elemental Messenger in the elemental world, which means that she will fully accept the will of the elemental goddess to become the leader of the entire elemental world.”

The news that Zola became the 7th Main Elemental Messenger surprised Chen Rui, “Fully accept? Is it the Elemental Goddess Robe?”

“Although you defeated me by chance this time, it is impossible to stop all of this.” The Water Main Elemental Messenger did not answer, but he just said indifferently as his body became thinner.

It turned out that the [Dimension Destruction] that fused the star power of the ‘Sea of Soul Songs’ just now had completely destroyed the body of the Water Main Elemental Messenger.

“As the highest oracle of the elemental goddess, in this world, I will not be truly annihilated. It won’t be long before we meet again…” The Water Main Elemental Messenger’s voice gradually weakened, but his gaze became sharper, “This failure is certainly due to my carelessness, but it also showed your strength. You indeed cannot be underestimated. We will not give you any more luck, unless you escape from this world now.”

“As I said, I will not leave alone; I will take my woman with me.” Chen Rui met the Water Main Elemental Messenger’s gaze without showing any weakness.

“Then we may not have the chance to meet, because you will be dead before that. Whether it is stubbornness or persistence, this is a fatal wrong choice.” The Water Main Elemental Messenger looked up at the sky as he sneered, “Also, you don’t have enough time…”

Not enough time? Subconsciously, Chen Rui followed the gaze of the Water Main Elemental Messenger and looked up at the colorful sky. He was shocked. Could it be…

“You will have new opponents soon. At that time, you will not only face 1 Main Elemental Messenger…” After saying this sentence, the fading body of the Water Main Elemental Messenger completely shattered into pieces and dissipated into countless bubbles.

During the fierce battle with the Water Main Elemental Messenger just now, he understood that in this elemental world, the elemental creature would not really die. They just returned to the most basic unit of elements or convert to other forms. The same was true for the elemental creatures he killed before.

As for the main elemental messenger like Veronica, it should be truly immortal. The Water Main Elemental Messenger was only temporarily defeated. He would soon recondense under the faith power and regain its strength.

And the previous battle made Chen Rui consume far more power than normal. His combat power would inevitably decline.

This battle would make the Main Elemental Messengers re-evaluate his strength. Under normal circumstances, this was a great honor, but judging from the current situation, it would only make things worse.

What Python said had been verified. If he encountered ‘1’ Main Elemental Messenger, he would fall into an unprecedentedly tough battle. So, what about more than 1?

Escape? It is definitely impossible, only to move forward.

Chen Rui didn’t think too much about it. There was a saying that went, “You need to be courageous when things are difficult, and you should still be calm in the face of adversity.” From the very beginning of the crossover otaku to the current Chen Rui, he was no longer afraid of any strong enemies or battles. Especially to protect the most important people.

From what the Water Main Elemental Messenger just said, Zola is likely to be facing the final ‘procedure’ now. When Moore gave me the Fertile Yuan Soil, he also mentioned the ‘final test moment’, so I must rush to her immediately.

The question is, where exactly is Zola now?

While Chen Rui was anxious, the colors in the sky became intense again. Gradually, all the colors began to move. It was not ordinary changes, but flying quickly in 1 direction as if attracted by something.

It must be Zola! Chen Rui immediately shifted away in the direction where the colors moved.

The scope of the elemental world was quite large. A few hours had passed, and Chen Rui himself did not remember that he had activated many times of shifting, but he had not yet reached the source of that ‘attraction’. Even now he had been able to activate [Purple Pole Star Transformation] for a long time, he would also feel a sense of exhaustion.

After a few more shiftings at high speed, Chen Rui finally sensed a faint special breath. Although this breath was weak, it revealed an ancient feeling. Even at his current level, he felt that it was indescribably mysterious and throbbing.

This feeling was a bit familiar as if he had encountered it somewhere.

Chen Rui’s mind moved, and he immediately shifted at full speed in the direction of the breath.

The feeling became clearer and clearer. Ancient, eternal life, immortality… Countless words and ideas emerged from Chen Rui’s mind at the same time. At the same time, there was also a sense of fear. It was as if there was a pair of eyes in the dark, looking down condescendingly at him, who was as small as an ant.

Even with his current strength, under this kind of gaze, he was still an ant!

Chen Rui was shocked, and he finally remembered where he felt this ‘familiar’ terrifying feeling.

Chaos Realm!

Those huge corpses floating in space!

chapters.title: Chapter 1169: Besiege
chapters.body:
Chapter 1169: Besiege

The experience in the Chaos Realm was like a movie replaying in Chen Rui’s mind. Those huge ‘corpses’ were actually small universes. Even if they lost all signs of life, they could still emit an extremely terrifying mental fluctuation unconsciously. If it wasn’t for the protection of the Super System and the Wrath King Armor, Chen Rui might have been turned into a part of that ‘corpse’.

Now his strength had reached the level of peak stage Pseudo-God. Due to different references, it was impossible to compare the power of the ‘corpse’ of the Chaos Realm with the waves in front of him, but he could feel the momentum that overwhelmed everything more clearly.

This kind of power is far from comparable to the might of Pseudo-God. Perhaps it has reached the legendary might of God authority—‘God might’!

Is this the power of the elemental goddess?

1 of the characteristics of Pseudo-God powerhouse was Pseudo-Godhood. The word ‘pseudo’ in front of it represented the gap with the real Godhood. From this perspective, Chen Rui was not actually a Pseudo-God, because he did not have Pseudo- Godhood. He just reached the combat power of Pseudo-God with the [Pole Star Transformation] of the Super System. As the [Pole Star Transformation] turned from ‘blue’ to ‘red’ to the current ‘purple’, the intensity was soaring step by step, the time limit was getting longer and the power was getting stronger, but it was still not the path of ‘Godhood’.

Chen Rui didn’t know what level he would develop to, but he was very aware of the huge gap between his current self and the breath. This was by no means the difference between SSSS+ and SSSS++, but it was a world of difference.

Unless he had the power beyond the existing 6-star enhancement, there was no chance in face of this absolute power.

However, no matter how strong this power was, Chen Rui would not back off because Zola was there. The stronger this power was, the worse Zola’s situation was. He couldn’t let her face it alone.

Chen Rui immediately sped up while shifting forward.

The breath in front of him became more and more intense, and the speed at which the colorful light was attracted also rapidly accelerated. Chen Rui suddenly felt something was amiss, because he had shifted several times, but he was just spinning around in place as if he was being blocked by some force.

Chen Rui stopped and secretly gathered Star Power. The voice containing might spread to the distance, “Wind Main Elemental Messenger?”

An almost completely transparent figure appeared in the space. The originally colorless body gradually turned pale green. The eyes were silver. The curly ‘hair’ was like small whirlwinds.

Race: Elemental creature (wind).

Comprehensive Strength Assessment: SSSS++

Physique: SSSS+, Strength: SSSS+, Spirit: SSSS+, Speed: SSSS++

[Analysis]: Wind attribute, Main Elemental Messenger.

Danger level: Extremely dangerous!

Compared with the Water Main Elemental Messenger, the spirit power of the Wind Main Elemental Messenger was inferior, but his speed had an absolute advantage. He should be the fastest 1 among the 6 Main Elemental Messengers. This was very similar to the characteristics of the elementals on the main plane.

“It’s me.” The Wind Main Elemental Messenger’s tone and gaze were much gentler than those of the Water Main Elemental Messenger. It was also Sethtine’s voice, “I have you in my memory. To become a friend of the Wind Elemental King … or the 6 Elemental Kings, you are no doubt an ordinary person.”

The word ‘friend’ made Chen Rui’s eyes dim while the Wind Main Elemental Messenger sighed, “But since you’re here, I don’t think I need to talk too much nonsense. Make a move.”

Chen Rui also sighed in his mind. The Wind Main Elemental Messenger on the opposite side had already moved. Although Chen Rui was mentally prepared, he was still surprised when he saw the real speed displayed by the Wind Main Elemental Messenger.

The Wind Main Elemental Messenger had appeared by his side. Chen Rui did not fight hard. The sonic blast sounded, and he retreated quickly. Then, he activated the [Sonic Boom] to accelerate. With the current level of [Pole Star Transformation], the speed of [Sonic Boom] was extremely fast like a gale.

However, the Wind Main Elemental Messenger was faster than Chen Rui, appearing behind him in the blink of an eye. The sound of a sonic blast disappeared, and a golden light shone in the air. The [Sonic Boom] was changed into a stronger [Light Boom] technique, and the speed doubled immediately. He turned a corner, bypassed the Wind Main Elemental Messenger, and quickly flew away at lightning speed.

Chen Rui paused again because the Wind Main Elemental Messenger appeared in front of him again. He could clearly sense that the Wind Main Elemental Messenger did not teleport or shift, but just moving. He surpassed Chen Rui despite moving later.

“You’re too slow.” The Wind Main Elemental Messenger shook his head, and Chen Rui was speechless for a while.

[Light Boom] was already the strongest acceleration skill that Chen Rui could launch at present, but he was still easily surpassed. The speed of SSSS++ is no doubt terrifying. If the Breeze Shadow Boots can still be used, I may be able to fight with him, but unfortunately, the 7 artifacts can’t be used.

Chen Rui understood a little bit of the opponent’s mood when he used to rely on the advantage of the Breeze Shadow Boots to fight.

“I’m going to attack.” The Wind Main Elemental Messenger reminded him. Then Chen Rui only felt the phantasm flash, and the opponent had already appeared in front of him. Before he had time to dodge, his body was already blown away by a strong force.

This punch carried the power of thunder, paralyzing half of his body. Before Chen Rui in mid-air could get rid of this debuff state, the [Analytical Eyes] immediately reminded that the Wind Main Elemental Messenger was behind him. The problem was the opponent was too fast. Even if he knew the movement, he couldn’t keep up with it.

In the next second, Chen Rui suffered a heavy blow and fell straight down. The Wind Main Elemental Messenger’s frightening speed advantage undoubtedly brought into play, catching up with Chen Rui again. He grabbed and threw him. Chen Rui felt as if he was in a whirlwind, completely losing his balance. The power in his body was in chaos.

After the Wind Main Elemental Messenger threw Chen Rui, he did not pursue immediately. The power of the wind element began to condense rapidly in his hand. In the blink of an eye, his entire right arm solidified into a sharp long blade. The blade exuded a terrifying sharp qi. If one looked closely, there were countless small wind blades rotating at high speed. The sharp blades of this kind of movement structure were extremely terrifying. Even metal with strong protection could be slashed through instantly.

After the ‘wind blade’ appeared, the Wind Main Elemental Messenger moved and flew close to Chen Rui. At this moment, the gentleness in his eyes disappeared, replaced by a cold and murderous intent. The wind blade slashed at Chen Rui without mercy.

If the slash was successful, even with Chen Rui’s physical strength and star armor defense, he might not be able to escape the doom of being split in half.

Suddenly, the Wind Main Elemental Messenger couldn’t help but feel that this slash seemed to slow down. Not only this slash, but everything around him slowed down. This was not a simple deceleration, but a change in the speed of time… Time might!

The Wind Main Elemental Messenger reacted immediately. Chen Rui disappeared under the blade. In the blink of an eye, all the slowness returned to normal. The Wind Main Elemental Messenger felt that he was actually flying backward. He looked down when he felt pain under his ribs. There was a sunken fist mark!

It turned out that when the time slowed down just now, he had already been hit hard by the opponent!

The fist mark exuded a destruction origin power, constantly destroying the surrounding elements. If it was not dispelled as soon as possible, the fist mark would grow bigger and bigger.

A silver light flashed in the Wind Main Elemental Messenger’s eyes, and the fist marks had gradually calmed down. He revealed a sinister grin that was completely opposite to the gentleness before, “No wonder you can make the Water Main Elemental Messenger suffer, no doubt you are a little bit capable, but your time might cannot last long in this world. As long as you make 1 mistake, you will die.”

“No doubt you are the most fickle wind elementals.” Chen Rui stared at the Wind Main Elemental Messenger, “When it comes to ‘mistake’, I really shouldn’t think too much about it. No matter what, let’s defeat you first.”

“Defeat me?” The Wind Main Elemental Messenger sneered as the wind blade in his hand exuded a strong murderous aura, “Even if you are really ‘that person’, you can’t defeat me here. I’m not the Water Main Elemental Messenger, so I will not dawdle with you. I will kill you with one blow.”

As soon as the words were finished, the Wind Main Elemental Messenger had appeared in front of Chen Rui, and he slashed down like the most intense lightning. There were no extra tricks or following moves, only 1 word: Fast!

This was absolute speed, unstoppable speed!

Even if the opponent had time might, he might not be able to activate it in time!

All of a sudden, the Wind Main Elemental Messenger felt that the blade actually couldn’t fall, not because the opponent was faster than him. On the contrary, Chen Rui didn’t move and just stood where he was. However, a cluster of nebula appeared faintly behind him.
