At this moment, the Wind Main Elemental Messenger felt that what was in front of him was not the enemy, but the boundless sky. No matter how fierce and violent the lightning was, it would never be able to surpass the sky.

Lalaria, the Sky Goddess of the [All Star Gods View]: Sky Constellation!

Once the Wind Main Elemental Messenger was distracted, he had a danger alert in his mind. He retreated at full speed. When he stabilized his figure, he felt a pain in his hand. The wind blade was actually broken in half —— Behind Chen Rui was a sky-like nebula. His palm formed a knife shape, emitting a faint brilliance. It was this simple palm blade that split the wind blade that he condensed with might!

This slash was actually not simple. It was the [Aura Blade] that combines the Sky Constellation.

Or maybe it could be called [Sky Blade].

Chen Rui was about to pursue, then he suddenly saw the data in the [Analytical Eyes]. He turned around, and the ‘Sky Blade’, which was originally planning to slash at the Wind Main Elemental Messenger, turned back.

There was a slight tremor in the space, and a figure appeared. This was a tall body that looked like gold. It looked extremely thick. The [Sky Blade] that split the Wind Main Elemental Messenger’s wind blade just left behind a shallow mark on that body. Furthermore, the mark was recovering rapidly at a speed visible to the naked eye.

With such physique and defense, even without looking at the data of the [Analytical Eyes], Chen Rui could guess that it was the Earth Main Elemental Messenger!

Chen Rui took a few steps back vigilantly. His pupils shrank suddenly, and he looked in another direction, where the light was shining brightly. A body as dazzling as the sun gradually became clear.

The figure on the other side was also dazzling, but more of a burning form, like a raging flame.

“As I said, we will meet soon.” A familiar voice sounded beside the Wind Main Elemental Messenger, the Water Main Elemental Messenger.

“You also said that I will never face only 1 Main Elemental Messenger.” Chen Rui said in a deep voice, “I just didn’t expect that I will meet 5 Main Elemental Messengers at the same time. What about the Dark Main Elemental Messenger? Why didn’t he show up together?”

“I’m already here, you just didn’t notice it.” Another deep voice sounded from the sky above Chen Rui’s head.

Chen Rui saw there was a human figure covered in black mist, and he couldn’t help being surprised. He had been observing the movement of colorful light in the sky before, but he didn’t know when the Dark Main Elemental Messenger appeared.

The 6 Main Elemental Messengers who were the strongest in the elemental world appeared in front of Chen Rui at the same time. It was obvious that he was already in a besiege.

Just 1 of them was enough to make Chen Rui overwhelmed. Now that 6 of them were gathered, how should he deal with it?

chapters.title: Chapter 1170: [Cosmos Annihilation] Vs [All Star Gods View]
chapters.body:
Chapter 1170: [Cosmos Annihilation] Vs [All Star Gods View]

Python once said that if the opponent was a Main Elemental Messenger, then Chen Rui would fall into an unprecedented struggle; if he was facing 2 or more Main Elemental Messengers, there was only 1 advice: Run.

Now Chen Rui was facing all the Main Elemental Messengers, which was the worst possible situation.

Moreover, Chen Rui also discovered that when all the Main Elemental Messengers appeared at the same time, the breath power of the Water Main Elemental Messenger and the Wind Main Elemental Messenger seemed to be much stronger than before. It should be a mutual buff caused by some kind of connection.

This was somewhat similar to the Super System. When the star conferees were present at the same time, they could enhance each other’s strength.

Facing the most severe test, Chen Rui calmed down completely, “It never occurred to me that I would be lucky enough to trigger all the Main Elemental Messengers at the same time. It is a great honor.”

“Honor?” The dazzling Light Main Elemental Messenger was a little more puzzled, “It’s actually this word.”

“It seems that ‘he’ has lost some key memories.” The Dark Main Elemental Messenger also nodded.

“The most important thing is to lose the most important power of control. Otherwise, we should be the ones who are honored.” The Water Main Elemental Messenger, who had fought against Chen Rui, said with a hint of caution, “Even if he loses his memory and his previous combat power, the brand new power he has now acquired should not be underestimated.”

“ Hmph! It’s because you overestimate yourself that you lost.” The voice of the Fire Main Elemental Messenger was as resonant as Ogmarton’s.

The Wind Main Elemental Messenger frowned, “That’s not all. The Water Elemental Messenger is actually right. If it’s 1-on-1, even in the elemental world, I’m not sure I can beat him.”

“But now you are not alone.” The Dark Main Elemental Messenger said sinisterly, “‘He’ must die.”

Chen Rui’s pupils shrank, “It looks like you all plan to attack together?”

If the Main Elemental Messenger attacks at the same time, even if the 3 archangels join forces, even with Satan and Python, we are not their opponents. This kind of supreme ‘treatment’ is actually given to me alone.

“It has to be.” The Water Main Elemental Messenger nodded, “We won’t give you any chance, especially in this kind of place and at this kind of time.”

This kind of place? Chen Rui was even more puzzled. Isn’t this elemental world your home field?

“Elementals don’t like pure massacre. We don’t like to interfere with other worlds, and we are not creatures that repay kindness with enmity.” The Earth Main Elemental Messenger who had been silent all this time said, “You have found the origin fragments and repaired the earth elemental heart and water elemental heart. The Elemental War is also likely to end because of you… From this point of view, even if we don’t try to return your favor, we definitely won’t kill you. Unfortunately, you are ‘him’. When you meet the Water Main Elemental Messenger, we have actually given you a chance to choose. Since you have made a choice, you should have the corresponding awareness. Since the ‘beginning’ of everything is due to you, let your ‘end’ be the conclusion.”

Chen Rui understood it. It is still the misunderstanding. I’m mistaken as someone — This is no longer a ‘wonderful’ misunderstanding that deters the enemy, but a fatal ‘damn’ misunderstanding.

The last sentence especially made him feel puzzled. Because of me?

The elemental world or the origin of something… is because of ‘that person’?

“What if I’m not that person?” Chen Rui shouted.

“Denial is not ‘your’ style.” The Wind Main Elemental Messenger sneered, “But memory loss is an excusable reason. Besides… whoever you are, there is no second result for trying to prevent the resurrection of the elemental goddess.”

“Okay! All that needs to be said has been said!” The Fire Main Elemental Messenger roared, “Now, die!”

In fact, the Main Elemental Messengers had quietly moved to the corresponding positions when speaking. Their breath was connected in a mysterious way to form a hexagram formation, surrounding Chen Rui in the middle.

The hexagram formation was the most common enchantment and magic circle in the Demon Realm. It could produce endless variations and mysteries. This hexagram formation was extremely simple in comparison, but it was the most terrifying hexagram formation that Chen Rui had ever seen.

At this moment, Chen Rui felt that all senses disappeared. Only this hexagram formation was left in the world. In fact, it was not that he hadn’t thought about getting out of their besiege in advance, but he couldn’t do it. Because not only his senses, but also his movement was also sealed.

This combined formation of these Main Elemental Messengers was definitely not as simple as doubling the power of a Main Elemental Messenger, but stacking several times on this basis!

Just from the momentum of this formation, Chen Rui had already begun to feel overwhelmed. The star armor on his body had countless fine cracks. The terrifying feeling of oppression could hardly be described in any words. If this continued, both his body and would collapse.

The breath of the hexagram formation was still increasing. This powerful pressure was too terrifying. Chen Rui was imprisoned within it. The star wings on his back were shattered and annihilated, and blood continued to flow from his mouth and nose. Even if the Main Elemental Messengers didn’t make a move, Chen Rui would be broken completely.

Chen Rui’s body suddenly became transparent as the only effective skill [Mirror Body] had been activated. [Mirror Body] could reflect or refract all attacks of the enemy. In this environment of pure momentum oppression, ‘reflection’ could no longer play its due role. The only function was to relieve Chen Rui’s terrifying oppression.

Chen Rui, who had activated [Mirror Body], suddenly felt the pressure drop greatly, and the blood that had been almost stagnant resumed its flow. At the same time, his senses and soul power were restored.

Chen Rui was very clear that [Mirror Body] was only effective for 10 seconds. That was to say, after these 10 seconds, he would return to the previous life-and-death moment.

When Chen Rui became transparent, the breath of the hexagram formation had continued to skyrocket to an extremely high level. The Main Elemental Messengers did not attack, but they were waiting for [Mirror Body] to wear off. In the Demon Realm, Chen Rui once activated [Mirror Body] in the battle with Dillosro, and he also activated this skill in the previous battle with the Water Main Elemental Messenger. The Main Elemental Messengers and Chen Rui could also be considered to know each other to a certain extent. Now this ‘secret technique’ could actually be activated freely in the hexagram formation, which was surprising. However, this secret technique definitely could not last long, so the Main Elemental Messengers did not rush to make a move.

1 second, 2 seconds, 3 seconds…

This was the real speed of life and death.

Both sides were waiting.

At the moment when Chen Rui’s figure turned from transparent to solid again, the tops of the hexagram shone with intense lights of different colors. Countless crisscrossing horrifying might fill the entire space. During this process, different attributes and even incompatible forces intertwined into an incredible special structure. Some kind of catalysis occurred, making the breath and light more intense, exploding toward Chen Rui overwhelmingly.

Chen Rui had recognized the move, [Cosmos Annihilation]!

This move was similar to Zola’s [Element’s Fury] principle, which used the conflict and fusion between elements to exert destructive force of several times, but it was far more powerful than [Element’s Fury] in terms of structure and power.

Chen Rui once used the element source power of the Elemental Kings to create a [Cosmos Annihilation] buff formation on Raphael’s Brilliant Thunder of Light, which became a terrifying ‘bomb’. Precisely because of this ‘bomb’, the avatar of Hatred Lord Quilliana, the leader of the 3 Rulers of Abyss, plus the Hatred Main Altar, all disappeared under the terrifying power.

Now, what Chen Rui had to face was the real original [Cosmos Annihilation] activated by 6 Main Elemental Messengers!

Python once said that even a God should be afraid when 6 of them make a move together.

The thought of this memory was just a flash in Chen Rui’s brain. Now, at the critical moment of life and death, he had no time to think about more things, and he had nowhere to go. The only thing he could do was to activate the biggest trump card.

I can only bet on this blow.

The intertwined magnificent colors suddenly slowed down, but it was only for a moment. Nonetheless, at this moment, Chen Rui’s surroundings were already shining with bright light.

Countless stars appeared behind him. This was a boundless galaxy flowing with incomparable brilliance. The most eye-catching was the galaxy’s dozens of shining constellations. Each of which was a unique individual and exuded vast breath of life and faith. These constellations were organically integrated into a powerful whole in the galaxy. Even the brilliance of [Cosmos Annihilation] could not conceal that kind of momentum.

Chen Rui’s body was wrapped in flames. His body had become translucent. His facial features, armor, and so on had disappeared. Only countless star spots could be seen inside as he seemed to have turned into a star.

[All Star Gods View]!

Furthermore, it was the strongest [All Star Gods View] ever that Chen Rui launched by burning his vitality!

The 6 Main Elemental Messengers were shocked when they felt the huge and boundless star power at the same time. In no time, the power of ‘Cosmos Annihilation’ erupting from the outside to the inside intertwined with the [All Star Gods View] that exploded from the inside to the outside.

There was no explosion sound.

Only the light was seen.

The light was incomparably dazzling. It was no longer possible to distinguish whether it was starlight or colorful light, leaving only the incomparable blazing and dazzling.

There was no violent shock either.

However, the elemental creatures and islands… everything within a radius of thousands of kilometers turned into nothingness in an instant.

After a long time.

The light finally faded away.

Compared with all the annihilated things around, the figure in the destruction core still survived.

The reason why it was called ‘survived’ was because the armor was broken, and the whole body was a bloody mess. The most miserable part was that the left arm below the shoulder had disappeared.

Chen Rui was panting violently. If he hadn’t used the ‘Earth Constellation’ from [All Star Gods View] to protect his body just now, what would have been annihilated would definitely not only be his left arm, but his entire body.

As for the left hand, with the [Regeneration], it wouldn’t take too long to recover. At the end of the battle in the Crystal Valley, he once dug out his heart, then he recovered fully. However, the prerequisite was that he could have this [Regeneration] time.

Chen Rui’s gaze didn’t slack in the slightest, because none of the 6 Main Elemental Messengers disappeared, Just like him, their bodies were mutilated. The Light Main Elemental Messenger even lost his head.

“He was actually able to resist the [Cosmos Annihilation] that we jointly cast, and he even caused us to suffer this level of damage.” The first to make a sound was actually the Light Main Elemental Messenger. His body began to glow rapidly as his lost head actually re-condensed. It had been vaguely formed in the blink of an eye while the other 5 Main Elemental Messengers were also recovering quickly.

“As expected of ‘that person’!”

“Unfortunately, this is the Elemental World.”

“Your strength has dropped significantly. Meanwhile, for us, the battle has only just begun.”

The voices of the Main Elemental Messengers sounded in Chen Rui’s ears one after another. His heart sank suddenly.

TL: No allies, no more powerful move, what will be his next move?

chapters.title: Chapter 1171: The Meaning Of Existence
chapters.body:
Chapter 1171: The Meaning Of Existence

Soon, the bodies of the 6 Main Elemental Messengers had returned to their original shape, while the weakened breath also rapidly recovered as if the entire elemental world was an endless energy pool, which could continuously replenish the 6 Main Elemental Messengers’ power.

As long as they didn’t suffer the destructive blow of a certain degree, they could fight indefinitely.

Even if they were completely destroyed, they would not really die. It would only take time to be reborn, just like the Water Main Elemental Messenger.

Only now did Chen Rui realize that the main reason why he defeated the Water Main Elemental Messenger was that the other party was too careless.

The [All Star Gods View] and the [Cosmos Annihilation] just now looked like a lose-lose battle on the surface, but strictly speaking, the [All Star Gods View] in the diffuse state was even greater than the [Cosmos Annihilation] in the concentrated state. In fact, it was only because this was the elemental world that the Main Elemental Messengers could be so calm.

Regardless of his injuries, Chen Rui tried his best to adjust the power in his body. Just as the other party said, after he launched the [All Star Gods View] by burning his vitality, his power had dropped significantly. Even if he didn’t take into account his injury, his power alone was not enough to activate another big move with the same power. And for the Main Elemental Messengers whose body and power could regenerate quickly and infinitely, the battle had really just begun.

Even if he could activate it again, the result would only be that he was injured more severely while the Main Elemental Messengers continued to regenerate. If this consumption continued, he would surely be the one who died.

However, there was not much room for thinking now, because the 6 Main Elemental Messengers had once again exuded an amazing power breath. Up to now, no Main Elemental Messenger had dared to underestimate Chen Rui. They also would not have the slightest reservation toward the terrifying opponent who could single-handedly fight with 6 of them.

Although this [Cosmos Annihilation] had not yet been released, once it erupted, its power would definitely be far greater than the previous one.

Chen Rui had no choice. The stars appeared around him again. Due to the strength and momentum this time, it was obviously incomparable with the previous ones.

If the collision just now was considered equally divided, then after the ebb and flow, the advantages and disadvantages of the 2 sides had become more obvious. This was not only clear to Chen Rui himself, but also to the 6 Main Elemental Messengers.

At this moment, the 6 Main Elemental Messengers who were charging the [Cosmos Annihilation] paused at the same time. They raised their heads together, and the speed of the colorful lights in the sky suddenly accelerated.

The high-speed flying colorful lights condensed into clusters of colorful clouds, which quickly spread and soon covered the entire sky. The previous ancient and immortal breath became more and more clear. The whole world began to tremor slightly.

During this tremor, the shape of the colorful clouds changed rapidly, converging into a huge transparent light ball; more precisely, a light cocoon.

There was a figure in the light cocoon. Although it was not very clear, that outline was too familiar to Chen Rui. He blurted out, “Zola!”

Zola was suspended in the center of the light cocoon with her eyes closed. She seemed to have lost consciousness.

“It seems that the 3 Elemental Goddess Armaments have begun to merge.”

“The broken Godhood will also be merged and remade.”

“The will of Madam Rafferty is about to be reborn.”

“…”

The Main Elemental Messengers showed joy one after another, but Chen Rui’s heart sank again and again. He clenched his fists tightly because he couldn’t keep Zola into the Star Conferring Platform through several attempts just now.

Generally speaking, the Star Conferring Platform could keep star conferees within the vision, and it could even ignore the ordinary confinement or space distance, but right now he could not succeed. Obviously, the barrier degree of the light cocoon had far surpassed ordinary space. In other words, the actual distance that seemed to be close at hand was likely to be far away, so the fusion power of the Star Conferring Platform could not be activated.

Perhaps only by breaking through into that light cocoon could he succeed.

But this difficulty was probably much greater than defeating the 6 Main Elemental Messengers. The ancient momentum that overrode everything alone was not something Chen Rui could compete with.

However, for Chen Rui, whether he could do it was one thing, but whether he wanted to do it or not was another topic.

If I do it, I may not be able to succeed; if I don’t do it, I definitely can’t!

Feeling the breath of [All Star Gods View] suddenly strengthened, the Main Elemental Messengers hurriedly waited with concentration, but when the galaxy exploded, it was not to the hexagram formation, but to the colorful clouds in the sky.

It turned out that Chen Rui concentrated the momentum of [All Star Gods View] on one point, and he finally broke through the seal of [Cosmos Annihilation]. He rushed straight to the position of the light cocoon, “Zola!”

This call full of might was not only a voice from the mouth but also a call from the heart.

That ray of galaxy rushed straight toward the light cocoon, but before it touched the nearby colorful clouds, it seemed to encounter some incomparable huge power and suddenly collapsed. Chen Rui’s figure fell like a shooting star. The star armor on his body had been completely shattered. All the wounds had burst open. His consciousness had also faintly blurred.

No, I can’t fall here!

The starlights that were about to disintegrate barely condensed again as Chen Rui tried his best to stabilize his figure. Suddenly, he found that the breath of the Main Elemental Messengers completely locked him on all sides.

“Stupid guy, he actually went to hit the sky… That is already a real God’s domain. Throwing a fist at God will only reap your own consequences.”

“As soon as the Godhood reshaping is complete, the will of Madam Rafferty will return and ‘Zola’ will cease to exist.”

“This is the meaning of her existence, and it is also the meaning of the existence of the fairy dragons.”

The meaning of the existence of the fairy dragons? Chen Rui was taken aback. The Light Main Elemental Messenger spoke up, “This time, we will not give you any chance to disturb the rebirth of the madam goddess again.”

The light of [Cosmos Annihilation] began to shine. Chen Rui was almost out of power. [All Star Gods View] was particularly bleak. Maybe there was really no chance.

At the same time, in another place, the words ‘meaning of existence’ also echoed in a person’s mind.

Zola.

The sound seemed ethereal as if it came from the supreme voice of the space.

“The meaning of your existence, the meaning of the entire fairy dragons’ existence, is for this moment.”

“For the return of the elemental goddess.” Zola’s purple eyes seemed to lose focus as she replied dully.

“Your consciousness and your body will become the foundation of the reshaped Godhood…”

“Unreservedly, dedicate your soul…”

“Dedicate my soul…” Zola followed mechanically as her gaze became more and more dazed.

“You will have the greatest power…”

“The most greatest power…”

“You will own true eternity and immortality…”

“Eternity and immortality…” Zola was subconsciously reciting the sentence when a familiar voice suddenly sounded in her ear.

“Zola!”

The fairy dragon trembled. The voice in the space sounded at the same time, “Have you already understood the meaning of existence? Then let go of your soul and accept the will of immortality!”

“Zola!”

Both voices echoed in the fairy dragon’s soul at the same time.

(The meaning of existence……)

(Zola…)

“I…” Zola, struggling inwardly, panted slightly.

(Dedicate my soul…)

(Zola!)

(Achieve immortality…)

(Zola!)

(It is the meaning of your existence!)

“The meaning of my existence…” Zola’s body trembled.

(Baby, never leave mommy again!)

(If anyone dares to bully you, daddy will beat him up for you!)

(Zola, the ‘bitter drink’ is ready, come and drink. Remember to follow the steps I taught you step by step. It is wrong for you to drink like that.)

(If one day my life comes to an end, please take good care of Chen Rui for me, okay?)

(Aunt Zola, hug Duoduo!)

(Zola, this dress is for you, love it?)

(…)

Countless voices echoed in her ears, and that ethereal voice could no longer control her consciousness as before.

All the voices finally converged into that word: Zola!

This is his voice!

He, them…

“This is… the meaning of my existence.” Tears welled up in Zola’s purple eyes.

The light cocoon in the sky suddenly trembled. Zola in the middle seemed to be struggling. Faint cracks appeared on the light cocoon. The nearby elemental power suddenly became extremely disordered.

This scene shocked the Main Elemental Messengers who were about to launch the biggest blow: At the last moment of Godhood’s reshaping, Zola actually resisted the will of the elemental goddess!

Chen Rui was overjoyed, but at this moment a light beam fell from the sky.

The light beam contained 6 light clusters of different colors, emitting brilliance at the same time and interweaving into a 6-color halo.

The trembling of the light cocoon slowly stopped, and the cracks began to recover quickly.

This was the origin fragment of the 6 elements, which was the projection of Godhood fragments!

Zola in the middle shook, and a deep sigh came to her ear, “The meaning of your existence is an irresistible fate…”

“Irresistible…”

“Fate”

Zola’s consciousness became completely blurred. Her eyes gradually turned into the 6-color halo. She stopped all struggling movements. A colorful light wing began to appear behind her, which outline resembled the wings of a butterfly.

Chen Rui was astounded because he saw that in [All Star Gods View], the light of the ‘Rainbow Constellation’ had quickly dimmed. This means…

As the ‘butterfly wings’ became clearer, the light of the ‘Rainbow Constellation’ had completely dimmed. It was like a candle in the wind that might extinguish at any time.

I can only look at it like this.

Nothing can be done.

Intense anger welled up in Chen Rui’s heart, more toward himself.

The Main Elemental Messengers all heaved a sigh of relief. Although something went wrong, the will of the elemental goddess is obviously irresistible. Now the fusion of the Elemental Goddess Armament is about to be completed, and Godhood, which represents the elemental goddess, is about to be reshaped. Goddess Rafferty’s rebirth is irreversible.

As long as this enemy is finished off, we can completely relieve our worries.

At this moment, the Main Elemental Messengers all focused their attention on the center of the hexagram formation, and the range of the galaxy next to Chen Rui became smaller and smaller as it began to gather together. This should have been a sign of power decline, but the warning signs in the minds of the Main Elemental Messengers became stronger and stronger.

Looking carefully, those constellations actually overlapped as if they were going to merge into one. They all concentrated on Chen Rui.

The next moment, the broken body with only 1 arm burst into an extremely intense light.

chapters.title: Chapter 1172: Eyes
chapters.body:
Chapter 1172: Eyes

In the hexagram formation, the already weak galaxy suddenly shone brightly.

The 19 constellations, including the dimmest Rainbow Constellation, gradually overlapped as if they were going to be fully integrated into his body. In fact, this kind of attempt was not the first time for Chen Rui, but, in the usual training, he failed all attempts without exception.

Because the process was extremely difficult, painful, and too dangerous, and his soul might collapse at any time, he didn’t dare to try it casually. But now, he went all out.

The hexagram formation began to vibrate. Even the powerful breath of [Cosmos Annihilation] began to be a little uncontrollable.

Without the slightest hesitation, the 6 Main Elemental Messengers released the [Cosmos Annihilation]!

Intertwined colorful lights burst toward Chen Rui. The hexagram formation was like a huge mouth, opening and closing its sharp teeth, trying to bite Chen Rui in the center into pieces. This blow was obviously more powerful than before. The 6 Main Elemental Messengers should have gone all out.

The constellations around Chen Rui had almost overlapped by half. The momentum all over his body had also skyrocketed to an extremely terrifying level. Facing the turbulent and terrifying [Cosmos Annihilation], he did not avoid it.

The intertwined colorful light, that originally contained a huge elemental source power and would explode at the touch, actually solidified within a range of 6 meters around him. The 6 Main Elemental Messengers showed unbelievable expressions at the same time. They kept channeling, but the power couldn’t get any closer after all.

Soon, under the horrified gazes of the Main Elemental Messengers, the power of the [Cosmos Annihilation] was repelled bit by bit.

There were no longer golden pupils in Chen Rui’s eyes but dazzling starlights. He seemed to have turned into a dazzling sun. The degree of this kind of compression and fusion had exceeded the limit that could be tolerated during normal training. Although it might result in the annihilation of body and spirit if it continued, Chen Rui still did not stop. Amidst the roar, [Cosmos Annihilation] was completely crushed and the entire hexagram formation also collapsed. The Main Elemental Messengers were blown away one after another.

Chen Rui didn’t look at the 6 Main Elemental Messengers. In his vision, there was only the light cocoon in the sky— The woman whose butterfly wings were gradually becoming clear in the light cocoon!

It was a pity that even though the activated hexagram formation of the 6 Main Elemental Messengers was crushed, the light cocoon in the sky remained motionless.

Not enough……

Not enough to counter the terrifying will of the light cocoon.

Not enough to save Zola!

Her consciousness has begun to blur.

It’s almost time.

The butterfly wings on Zola’s back are almost fully formed.

However, my body and soul have already reached the limit.

I cannot force my way in again.

Zola…

At this moment, Chen Rui suddenly felt that his precarious soul that was on the verge of collapse was wrapped up by something, and the trend of collapse stopped unexpectedly.

Chen Rui, who woke up suddenly, looked back subconsciously. He found that there was something behind him. Even at this moment, he couldn’t help but exclaim.

A cape.

It’s this thing!

1 of the 7 artifacts, the Dark Shadow Cape!

Chen Rui couldn’t believe his eyes. The Dark Shadow Cape was the last of the 7 artifacts that he couldn’t assimilate successfully.

Since entering this elemental world, no matter whether it was the God-Eating Mask, the Breeze Shadow Boots or the Sword of Fallen Angel, none of the 7 artifacts that had been successfully assimilated could be used. However, at this moment, the Dark Shadow Cape appeared behind him, protecting his soul that was about to collapse.

What did that mean?

Chen Rui’s surprise quickly shifted to another matter. His power was disappearing!

Originally, although his consciousness became more and more blurred, the power of the fusion of the [All Star Gods View] became stronger and stronger. But now, the immense power of that fusion was being absorbed by something uncontrollably as they began to fade quickly.

This made the danger of Chen Rui’s collapse disappear, but it also ruined his last hope of saving Zola.

Chen Rui tried his best to control this fading, but unfortunately, he couldn’t.

At this time, he suddenly felt a clear light shining from above. The light revealed a trace of soft and natural power. The injuries of his body and soul were recovering quickly while his stamina and spirit power were also replenished.

Not the Crown of Thorns, but another power!

This ray of light suddenly rose from his own body.

And the power of [All Star Gods View] was also devoured by this ray of light.

As soon as Chen Rui looked up, he saw the phantasm of a big tree in the light.

This tree is… Chen Rui’s eyes widened.

As [All Star Gods View] was absorbed, the big tree became clearer and clearer. Chen Rui felt that all his strength was drained. He completely lost his ability to move.

6 rays of light flew out from the dense canopy and landed on the 6 Main Elemental Messengers who had just recovered from the collapse of the hexagram formation. The 6 Main Elemental Messengers couldn’t move for a moment.

Immediately afterward, an immense light beam spread out from the canopy of the tree, piercing the sky.

The moment the light beam rushed into the sky, the light cocoon, which had been unmoved by the fusion force of [All Star Gods View] before, trembled suddenly.

This trembling became more and more intense. At the same time, the shape of the light beam was also undergoing a certain change.

The change of the light beam directly affected the light cocoon in the opposite cloud. The colorful light formed by the 6 element origin fragments around the light cocoon became more dazzling. They began to overlap. The 6 origin fragments merged into 1, changing from colorful to colorless. The light also became more and more crystal clear.

The Main Elemental Messengers in the distance were stunned. The original process should be that after Zola completely merged with the Elemental Goddess Robe and accepted the baptism of immortal will, she would become the carrier of the elemental goddess. Subsequently, the Elemental Goddess Crown that represented ‘faith’, the Elemental Goddess Staff that represented ‘soul’, and the Elemental Goddess Robe that represented ‘life’ would merge and restore Godhood.

This Godhood was actually incomplete, so it needed the 6 origin fragments (Godhood fragment projection) to repair the structure and reshape.

Once the Godhood was successfully reshaped, the Elemental Goddess Rafferty would be resurrected and truly reborn in the carrier Zola.

The power of the reshaped Godhood would definitely drop a lot, and Zola’s body was not a God body. But Godhood was Godhood after all, as long as she had enough time and faith, she could definitely grow to the original level step by step.

However, the current situation was that Zola had not fully integrated the Elemental Goddess Robe, so the 3 Elemental Goddess Armaments had not been integrated into 1 unit, yet the Godhood fragment projections of the elemental goddess had begun to reshape.

The reshaping of this form could only be regarded as the projection of Godhood at best. And the will of the elemental goddess would be resurrected based on this Godhood projection. This resurrection was naturally as short-lived as a bubble. The will pinned on the projection could not last and would soon dissipate.

The 6 Main Elemental Messengers were shocked and wanted to step forward to stop it, but they were imprisoned by the brilliance released by the big tree earlier, so they couldn’t move for a while.

The pair of colorful butterfly wings behind Zola stopped forming, and the light cocoon was gradually fading. After a while, the origin fragments of the 6 elements had intertwined and merged into a translucent gem-like object that faintly emitted a magnificent halo.

The moment the gem-like object solidified, the light cocoon completely dissipated into the colorful clouds. Above the clouds, something seemed to be slowly unfolding.

A pair of eyes.

These were a pair of incomparably beautiful eyes, and the depth contained in the pupils was comparable to the endless night sky.

Similarly, this was also a pair of cold eyes, because there was an indifference in the gaze that overlooked everything.

Chen Rui was now looking up at these eyes. Not just because of where he was, but because of the insurmountable oppression. Even though he was above the clouds now, he could only look up.

That pair of eyes looked down on everything below indifferently; Zola, Chen Rui, the 6 Main Elemental Messengers, and the big tree. There was no fluctuation in the gaze.

Chen Rui couldn’t help thinking of a sentence in his mind: Heaven and earth are impartial. They treat all of creation as sacrificial straw dogs.

The general idea of this sentence was that there was no real benevolence in heaven and earth. They treat all things equally like sacrificial dog straws (dogs made of grass used in ancient sacrifices) and let them fend for themselves.

Whether it is said that the way of heaven is selfless, or that the way of heaven is impartial, it is ultimately ruthless.

So, does heaven and earth regard itself as a straw dog? Or is everyone except themselves a sacrificial straw dog? When Chen Rui was thinking quickly, the pair of eyes had already looked at the light beam above his head.

At this moment, the indifferent gaze finally changed.

In that light beam, a pair of eyes also opened at some point of time, staring at the eyes in the colorful clouds.

The 2 pairs of eyes looked at each other as if there was only heaven and earth in each other’s eyes. None of the others deserved a second glance.

At this time, in the colorful clouds and the light beam of the big tree, vague facial features and limbs had been condensed. They were as magnificent as heaven and earth.

The person in the clouds was obviously a woman. It should be the Elemental Goddess Rafferty that the 6 Main Elemental Messengers said.

There was a man in the light beam of the big tree. With Chen Rui’s position and the little power left, he could only vaguely sense that it was the outline of a man, but he couldn’t sense more.

At this moment, the 2 were still looking at each other. What Chen Rui could see clearly was the gaze of the elemental goddess. The seemingly indifferent gaze was always staring at the opposite side, flashing an indescribable emotion.

No matter what this emotion was, it was not as ruthless as before.

The man suddenly said something, but Chen Rui couldn’t hear it clearly. A huge hand slowly stretched out from above the big tree.

The elemental goddess still stared at the opposite eye as if she didn’t see that hand coming.

This hand slowly reached out to Goddess Rafferty’s face. The movement seemed gentle, but at the moment of touching, several cracks actually appeared on the goddess’ originally perfect face.

At the same time, the gem-like Godhood projection below also showed cracks.

The elemental goddess didn’t move. Her gaze remained the same.

The hand still did not stop.

The transparent colorless gem below was instantly covered with cracks. The next moment, it was completely shattered.

At the same time, something outside Zola’s body also shattered and disappeared as the pair of butterfly wings gradually disappeared.

Chen Rui was taken aback. When he looked up, the silhouette of the goddess in the clouds had dissipated. From the beginning to the end, until the last moment of annihilation, those eyes were still just watching the other side quietly.

The 6 Main Elemental Messengers could hardly believe what they had witnessed – The elemental goddess Rafferty was annihilated.

TL: Although there are no details between the elemental goddess and the big tree god, there seemed to be a loving relationship…

chapters.title: Chapter 1173: Surprise
chapters.body:
Chapter 1173: Surprise

TL: There is a 7 days free trial on Tier 4 Patreon, feel free to check that out!

Not only the 6 Main Elemental Messengers, Chen Rui was also stunned.

If he hadn’t seen it with his own eyes, he would never have believed that such a situation would happen.

Chen Rui didn’t know that under the influence of the ‘man’, the original Godhood reshaping became Godhood projection reshaping. The projection certainly couldn’t maintain the reborn will of the elemental goddess for a long time. Therefore, even if the man didn’t destroy the elemental goddess will, she would also dissipate within a limited time.

What Chen Rui could sense was that even the newly reshaped elemental goddess Godhood (projection) and will had unparalleled power. Even if the [Analytical Eyes] could not be activated due to distance or space, he could confirm that the kind of power far exceeded the peak stage of the Pseudo-God including SSSS+ and SSSS++ levels.

In all fairness, the man didn’t show oppressive momentum or power over Rafferty. However, he actually easily destroyed the projection that Rafferty descended upon.

Maybe the man had special power that Chen Rui couldn’t understand, but the real reason should be that Elemental Goddess Rafferty didn’t resist. This was absolutely abnormal. There must be a special reason.

As they looked at each other, the 2 must have exchanged many things that outsiders couldn’t know. Due to the angle, Chen Rui couldn’t clearly sense the state of the man above his head, but he could clearly see the gaze of Goddess Rafferty on the opposite side.

Calm.

Even if he couldn’t understand that kind of communication, Chen Rui could still see that kind of calmness throughout, even in the face of annihilation.

Chen Rui had experienced a lot from crossover to the present, and he was not a clueless otaku who was ignorant of worldly emotions. This calmness itself represented a kind of relieved state of mind.

Back then, in Veronica’s eyes, he vaguely saw this kind of tranquility.

After the image of Goddess Rafferty disappeared, the man looked up at Zola in the sky as if he was pondering on something. Chen Rui had a strange feeling that the man’s eyes were actually looking at the farther sky through Zola.

While Chen Rui was wondering, he found that the Dark Shadow Cape behind him suddenly disappeared. At the same time, the big tree above his head, the light beam and the shadow of the man disappeared.

The binding light of the 6 Main Elemental Messengers also disappeared, and the 6 Main Elemental Messengers immediately regained their freedom. Their gazes all focused on him. The gazes seemed to be different from the previous hostility, but Chen Rui still had a high degree of vigilance.

Although the power of the incomplete fusion form [All Star Gods View] that he used riskily completely overwhelmed the [Cosmos Annihilation], and he even had a valuable new insight, the appearance of the phantasm just now emptied his power. Hence, his current combat power had plummeted. He was unable to launch the power of [All Star Gods View] anymore. Meanwhile, the Main Elemental Messengers were immortal existences in the elemental world. Their power was endless. In other words, Chen Rui’s current strength was simply not enough to face any Main Elemental Messenger, let alone 6, so the only way out was to escape!

Chen Rui glanced at Zola in the sky. The light cocoon beside Zola had disappeared now, but perhaps because the pair of butterfly wings had not completely disappeared, he actually still couldn’t keep her into the Star Conferring Platform. On the other hand, the 6 Main Elemental Messengers were already approaching.

Looking at the speed at which the colorful butterfly wings disappeared, it would take at least 3 minutes. For the peak stage of the Pseudo-God, these 3 minutes were enough to kill countless enemies.

When Chen Rui was fully alert, he suddenly found that the dangerous breath on the Main Elemental Messengers disappeared. They did not form the hexagram formation. Instead, they slowly floated over and stood not far from him.

“Don’t be nervous, the battle is over.” The Water Main Elemental Messenger sighed.

The rest of the Main Elemental Messengers didn’t speak, but they looked up at Zola who was still in the sky.

Now that the Main Elemental Messengers had gained the upper hand, there was no need to play any tricks. Chen Rui felt that the other party was really no longer hostile, so he slowly relaxed his tense nerves, but there was an absurd feeling in his mind. The enemies whom he fought desperately just now had inexplicably turned into spectators together.

After careful observation, Chen Rui discovered that the colorful butterfly wings on Zola’s back did not just ‘disappear’, but they converged into her body bit by bit. Finally, the process of convergence was completed. Chen Rui clearly sensed a strong force emanating from Zola’s body. At the same time, in the Super System, it could be seen that the rainbow constellation, which was already dim, shone unprecedentedly. In the galaxy, ‘Knowledge Goddess’ miracles appeared frequently in various places. The believers were all inspired.

Zola’s eyes slowly opened. Without the cover of the light cocoon, her vision became clearer. The moment she opened her eyes, Chen Rui had an illusion as if he saw the pair of eyes looking down on the common people that appeared in the clouds before. This feeling was only fleeting. Soon, her gaze returned to the one that Chen Rui was familiar with.

The first reaction of the fairy dragon waking up was to shift to Chen Rui’s side in an instant. She looked at his broken arm and hugged him tightly regardless of the Main Elemental Messengers beside them. Tears streamed from her eyes.

The moment Chen Rui’s voice woke her up, her consciousness had really awakened, but her body was out of her control later on. Although Zola did not witness the battle that broke Chen Rui’s arm before, she could guess that it was caused during the battle to save her.

Chen Rui touched the fairy dragon’s purple hair, “I’m fine, Zola. It will regenerate soon.”

The more he said this, the more Zola cried, showing her true feelings completely without her usual fake daze appearance.

“ Ugh … I’m sorry to bother both of you for a while.”

It wasn’t until the Water Main Elemental Messenger’s voice sounded that Zola stopped crying. Her gaze looking at the 6 Main Elemental Messengers was full of anger and murderous look. She already had a short staff in her hand, which was made for her by Chen Rui: ‘Secret Shadow’.

Chen Rui was surprised to find that the breath on Zola’s body had actually reached the level of peak stage of the Pseudo-God.

“As I said, the battle is over. No matter what the 2 of you choose next, we want to determine what happened just now.” The Water Main Elemental Messenger’s tone was full of solemnity while the rest of the Main Elemental Messengers nodded one after another. It seemed like they agreed to let the Water Main Elemental Messenger speak on behalf of them.

Chen Rui thought for a while. He didn’t take Zola to run away immediately, but he just nodded to Zola.

The fairy dragon snorted and said in a hostile tone, “You all saw what happened just now. Your goddess has failed to wake up and has been completely annihilated.”

The Water Main Elemental Messenger was not offended, “So, may I ask, have you gained some kind of power?”

“Gained?” Zola said coldly, “From the beginning to the end, I was a victim. I was deceived by all of you to come to the elemental world and inherit the so-called Elemental Goddess Armaments. As a result, my soul was almost swallowed!”

“The Elemental Goddess Armaments now…”

“The most important artifact of the elemental world has been completely shattered now.” Zola sneered, “Do you want to use this as an excuse to let me stay and try to resurrect the elemental goddess?”

“You’re wrong.” The Water Main Elemental Messenger shook his head, “If there is no death, how can there be ‘resurrection’?”

“No death?” Chen Rui was taken aback, “The existence that was annihilated just now…”

“It was Madam Rafferty who was annihilated, but the elemental goddess… may not really be annihilated.”

Chen Rui was even more surprised, “You mean…”

The Water Main Elemental Messenger did not continue to explain, but he looked at Zola, “Actually, the Elemental Goddess Armaments are the same…”

“What?” Zola really didn’t understand this time.

“The so-called ‘Elemental Goddess Armament’ refers to the artifact infused with the will of the elemental goddess. Perhaps one day, the robe on your body will become the new Elemental Goddess Robe, and the scepter in your hand will become the new Elemental Goddess Staff.”

Zola was startled. Chen Rui finally confirmed his guess, “You mean, Zola has become the new elemental goddess?”

No wonder the Water Main Elemental Messenger said that. It turned out it was the ‘former’ goddess, Rafferty, who was annihilated just now. The elemental goddess is not really annihilated.

“I mean ‘maybe’. She is not the elemental goddess yet. Maybe one of her future paths will lead to that direction. Maybe she chooses another path. Maybe she will never succeed. In short, her current existence can be called ‘hope’ to a certain extent.”

Chen Rui quickly activated the [Analytical Eyes]. In the [Analytical Eyes], Zola’s comprehensive strength assessment no doubt became SSSS+, and her analysis attribute had an extra item, ‘Heart of God Blessing!’

Chen Rui suddenly came to his senses. Although Goddess Rafferty’s will disappeared, part of the inheritance ceremony just now had played a role. Zola should have obtained the power of a part of the Godhood fragments!

In other words, now Zola was God’s descendant!

From the words of the Water Main Elemental Messenger, it could be deduced that because Rafferty’s will collapsed, this part of Godhood should be pure power. It would not have the danger of devouring Zola’s soul, so the future choice was entirely on Zola herself.

“Is this the reason why I must continue to stay in the elemental world?” The fairy dragon asked the main point.

“You’re wrong.” The Water Main Elemental Messenger glanced at the rest of the Main Elemental Messenger, “As the successor of the elemental goddess’ Godhood fragment, you have complete freedom whether to stay or leave.”

The fairy dragon was a little surprised, and she took Chen Rui’s arm, “Then I will choose to leave with him. Do you have any objections?”

The key point of this sentence was actually ‘him’ and ‘with’. The Water Main Elemental Messenger looked deeply at Chen Rui, “It turns out we were all wrong.”

Chen Rui somewhat understood the meaning of this sentence, “You’re not the only ones who are wrong.”

“However, Madam Rafferty was eventually annihilated because of you.” The Water Main Elemental Messenger stared closely at Chen Rui, “Then…”

This sentence seemed to be tense. Zola immediately clenched Secret Shadow, ready to fight at any time.

“Thank you.” The Water Main Elemental Messenger suddenly said 2 unexpected words.

Chen Rui was greatly surprised. He suddenly thought of the last words that Moore conveyed to Lambost. When the same voice sounded in his ear, he was in a daze for a moment.

“You can leave now.” The Water Main Elemental Messenger looked at Zola, “In any case, Zola is the 7th Main Elemental Messenger after all. Even if the elemental world is completely annihilated in the future, she can more or less retain the true inheritance of elements.”

“The elemental world will annihilate?” Chen Rui frowned.

“Everything in the world is subject to birth and death, so is ‘plane’ or ‘world’.” The Water Main Elemental Messenger let out a long sigh.

There were too many queries in Chen Rui’s mind, but the other party would definitely not continue. Moreover, he didn’t want to stay in the elemental world anymore, so he nodded to Zola and keep her in the Star Conferring Platform before opening the [Star Gate].

chapters.title: Chapter 1174: Thinking
chapters.body:
Chapter 1174: Thinking

The night was getting darker. In the Dark Moon courtyard, everyone sensed that the chaotic elemental power was gradually subsiding. However, everyone did not let go of their tense hearts. Their eyes were fixed on one position – The place where the [Star Gate] was usually opened.

Finally, the familiar light door appeared in the vision. A figure walked out, and everyone stood up one after another.

“Daddy!” Duoduo was the first to jump toward it.

Not long afterward, the little girl let out a cry of surprise and cried, “Daddy, your hand!”

After a while of commotion, the yard finally returned to calm.

Chen Rui managed to coax his daughter, and he winked at Isabella, signaling her to take the little girl to sleep first. Madam Aunt looked at his broken arm, bit her lip, and finally left with Duoduo in her arms.

Kia’s eyes were red as she carefully helped Chen Rui apply the medicine. Apart from Chen Rui’s left arm, he had dozens of injuries of various sizes. Although she knew that these were external injuries, the main injury had been healed with the Crown of Thorns, and even the severed arm would be regenerated, the little succubus still shed tears in distress.

While talking to Zola, Athena kept glancing at Kia. She was obviously very worried.

Although Zola advanced to the peak stage of the Pseudo-God, she seemed very depressed, because if it wasn’t for her, Chen Rui would not have suffered such serious injuries.

Athena saw through Zola’s thoughts, so she comforted her with gentle words. The fairy dragon and Athena had always been best friends. Their friendship was no less than that of Isabella, the younger sister. Thinking of the person in her mind at the last moment when Rafferty’s will descended, Zola suddenly lost her composure and cried loudly while hugging Athena.

Strength did matter, but it was not the most important.

Chen Rui had no choice but to come to comfort Zola. Zola cried for a while, then she showed extreme fatigue and fell asleep in his arms. During this time, the fairy dragon was under tremendous stress, both physically and mentally. Now that the pressure had dissipated, and she was by the side of the closest people, she was naturally completely relaxed.

A good night’s sleep at this time was good for mental and physical recovery.

Chen Rui asked Kia to help carry Zola into the room. Athena was now the key protected target, so she should not be too emotional. Delia and Medilu, who had been helping to take care of Athena during this time, stood up and accompanied her to rest.

Olypheus came to Chen Rui and offered a bottle of potent healing potion that had been treasured for many years for ‘free’, but Chen Rui tactfully rejected Ms. Black Dragon’s potion, which she repeatedly emphasized that the original price was 10,000 black crystal coins. If he remembered correctly, he gave this potion to Ms. Black Dragon last time.

Lalaria, on the other hand, patted Chen Rui on the shoulder carelessly, wanting to comfort him, but she habitually said, “Even if you can’t come back, I will take good care of your family.” “If you have any accident, your daughter will be my dearest concubine from now on. No, dearest daughter” and so on.

It was Adeline who was well-behaved. Seeing that these 2 guys tended to mess up more than help, she quickly proposed to go back to her room to watch the finale of a certain drama. The eyes of the 2 black dragons lit up, and they quickly disappeared into Chen Rui’s vision. Chen Rui smiled and nodded at Adeline. The naga girl blushed and followed the black dragons away.

Only Paglios, Dodo and Python were left in the yard.

“Why is only one arm? Why not both arm?” Master Poison Dragon was still worried previously. But Chen Rui was fine now, he couldn’t help gloating a few words.

Suddenly, Master Poison Dragon felt a chill down his spine. He turned his head and saw Python’s indifferent gaze. His heart trembled, and he quickly found an excuse as he dragged Ms. Betty back to the room.

Python didn’t even look at Dodo. When she threw a piece of gem or something casually, the slime immediately jumped up and took it, leaving a series of flattery in the air before he disappeared in the blink of an eye. The series of movements were surprisingly proficient; it was obviously not the first time.

“What do you want to ask?” Chen Rui naturally could see the purpose of Python wanting to be alone with him.

“You” Python stared into his eyes as she was hesitant to say, “Do you”

“Do I?” Chen Rui asked back.

Python hesitated for a moment, and she changed her words, “What did you experience in the elemental world?”

“What do you want me to experience in the elemental world?” Chen Rui asked again, “No wonder you supported me so much to enter the elemental world previously! What exactly do you want to ask? Just say it.”

“No need.” Python watched him carefully for a while. Her gaze seemed to dim a bit, and she didn’t continue.

“I’m afraid your efforts are wasted.” Chen Rui shook his head, “However, what I can tell you is that in the elemental world, the 7 artifacts…”

Python seemed startled, and she blurted out, “In the elemental world, then? Did they trigger any changes?”

Chen Rui thought, “What’s the relationship between the 7 artifacts and the elemental world? What I wanted to say is that the 7 artifacts were suddenly unusable in the elemental world.”

Python pondered for a moment and didn’t answer. She shook her head, turned around and left, “I’ll go back first.”

“Python!”

Python paused and stopped.

“Sorry.”

Python was surprised by the sudden apology, so she turned around.

“Although I’m very sorry, I still want to tell you the truth. I am not ‘him’.”

Python was about to say something, but when she suddenly saw the clarity and sincerity in Chen Rui’s gaze, her heart trembled. She turned her head slowly as her figure disappeared into the night.

Chen Rui was silent for a moment. He sighed and walked toward the room.

Python might not be a friend yet, but at least she was a comrade-in-arms and an ally. Maybe he would lose this ally, but he didn’t want to deceive her like this. Originally under the ‘influence’ of many people, Chen Rui was a little shaken about his identity, but after this experience in the elemental world, he had been able to confirm 1 thing: ‘Chen Rui’ is not ‘that person’.

The real ‘that person’ was most probably the mysterious man who annihilated Elemental Goddess Rafferty.

The first condition Python put forward when she surrendered was to collect the 7 artifacts, and the second condition was to defeat Satan.

When Python said the first condition, she actually had a preconceived notion in her mind, thinking that Chen Rui was a certain ‘person’. Because she had witnessed Chen Rui activate 3 of the 7 artifacts, the Sword of Fallen Angel, the Wrath King Armor and the God-Eating Mask, the latter condition was just to confirm this hypothesis. After Chen Rui completed the 2 conditions of Python. Python was more sure of the assumptions in her mind, so she was willing to surrender. Later, a series of events happened, some of which were accidental, but Python became more and more convinced of this.

Therefore, Python could be regarded as following him wholeheartedly, becoming an indispensable main force and even risking her life in battle.

Maybe it was some kind of kindness back then; maybe it was a more complicated bond.

Because of this, Chen Rui didn’t want her to fight at all costs in deception.

So, backtracking on Python’s ‘preconceptions’ now was the 7 artifacts.

This was also the most important reason why many senior powerhouses misunderstood Chen Rui.

Being able to control all the 7 artifacts must be the characteristic of ‘him’. Judging from the information revealed by Python just now, the 7 artifacts may also have an unexpected special relationship with the elemental world.

The 7 artifacts gave Chen Rui 2 surprises in the elemental world. First, after entering the elemental world, the 6 artifacts analyzed could not be used; second, his soul almost collapsed during the forced fusion of [All Star Gods View]. At that time, the Dark Shadow Cape, which had not been assimilated successfully previously, unexpectedly appeared behind him automatically, protecting his soul. Nonetheless, it also drained took away the huge power of [All Star Gods View].

Then, that tree. The man appeared.

It could be deduced from this that the man was most likely ‘him’!

Chen Rui had been misunderstood by many people as ‘that person’!

That person actually annihilated the will of Elemental Goddess Rafferty. That meant kiling God!

Rafferty didn’t resist at all, but she seemed to be relieved?

These 2 must know each other. And their relationship was not ordinary!

From another perspective, the appearance of this man saved Zola. And also let her have the Heart of God Blessing that only God’s descendants had.

There were too many related questions. Why did the Elemental Goddess Staff wake up ‘early’ as the Elemental King said? Was the Abyss sealed in the elemental world? What was Elemental War? If they didn’t control the Elemental Goddess Staff and the Elemental Goddess Robe, what kind of doom calamity would the elemental world bring?

And so on, there were many questions including the Abyss, sacrifice, and so on. However, the answers to these questions were not urgent. Chen Rui only paid attention to one thing now.

That mysterious man!

Chen Rui crossover to this world as a reborn, and he also experienced the Shura incident, so he was extremely sensitive to this point. When did this man exist? Why did he exist in my body?

The most terrifying thing was this man’s strength, which could destroy an existence like Rafferty. Even if there were many unknown factors in it, Chen Rui’s current strength was unmatched. But in any case, the history of being possessed could not be allowed to repeat itself.

Could it be ‘Arthur’ himself?

Probably not, Arthur was Lex the Great’s own son. He could sense the bloodline. Furthermore, now his soul had disappeared. The reason why he can have today’s strength is entirely due to Chen Rui’s countless hard trainings and fightings with the help of the Super System.

There should be no necessary connection between that person and the Super System. Otherwise, he would have already controlled the Galaxy Divinity Temple, and he didn’t need to drain Chen Rui’s power of the ultimate move. So far in the Super System, Chen Rui was still the highest and only ruler, possessing the power to control everything.

Chen Rui had a vague intuition that that person should have appeared with the help of [All Star Gods View]’s huge faith and life power.

By the way, that tree!

It is actually the Tree of Nature of the elf tribe!

What is the secret of the Tree of Nature?

If the Tree of Nature really has such a powerful, even god-killing power, then it didn’t need to borrow my power to eliminate Quilliana’s avatar.

But the Tree of Nature is definitely a key link.

Chen Rui thought quickly, and many memory fragments began to appear in his mind as he suddenly grasped the key point.

Zola opened the ‘Silver Queen’s trump card’ to get the Elemental Goddess Crown. Without knowing it, it is equivalent to having the qualification to become an elemental messenger.

I got the ‘wood’ trump card, defeated Quilliana’s avatar, and revived the Tree of Nature.

I got the permission to take away the Tree of Nature seedlings implanted in the Super System.

Finoia conveyed the news, asking me not to return the Tree of Nature to the elf tribe as promised.

Zola became the Main Elemental Messenger. I enter the elemental world to save her. Elemental Goddess Rafferty appeared, the Tree of Nature appeared along with ‘that person’, and Rafferty was annihilated.

There seems to be some kind of causal relationship between these events?

Whether there is a special connection or not, there is a shadow of a person in it.

Elf prophet, Alucier!

TL: Will Alucier tell him everything?

chapters.title: Chapter 1175: The Child Who Is About To Be Born
chapters.body:
Chapter 1175: The Child Who Is About To Be Born

The matter of the elemental world came to an end for the time being. As the crisis in the elemental world subsided, the main plane gradually returned to normal.

Everything seemed to be back to normal, including Chen Rui’s life. The previous events seemed to be over, but for him, this was just the beginning.

As time passed, Chen Rui’s severed arm had basically completely healed. If there was any difference from before, it was the 7 artifacts. Since that time, the Dark Shadow Cape, that had always been unable to analyze successfully, actually could be used somehow.

[Element Depletion]—Passive special attribute, greatly reduces the damage of elements from 30% to 70%.

[Stealth] – Completely hide oneself, blind the enemy’s senses, and can attack in the stealth state. After being attacked, the concealment will lose effectiveness. The duration is 1 hour. It can be used every 6 hours.

[Reduction]- Directly weaken all attributes of nearby enemies. The reduction was proportional to the comprehensive value of one’s own strength. The greater the strength, the better the reduction effect. The target can be locked. The duration is 30 minutes. It can be used every 6 hours.

The Dark Shadow Cape was indeed a powerful equipment, [Element Depletion] was the nemesis of all magic and element attribute attacks. Coupled with the Asmodeus Royal Family’s own bloodline talent [Element Weakening], it was almost equivalent to being immune from all magic like the black dragon. No wonder Catherine used to deal with those magic-trained enemies almost with ease.

However, there were exceptions here. That was Fairy Dragon Zola. Zola’s magic had reached the extreme level of ’ignoring magic immunity’. Even the real black dragon couldn’t contend with her. Many people had actually been looking forward to the contest between Zola and Catherine. In fact, Zola also had this intention when she was training in the Ghastly Floating Land. But at that time Catherine was only at the peak stage of the Kingdom level, and Zola was already at the intermediate stage of the Demi-God. So the Fairy Dragon didn’t want to bully her. Later, Catherine advanced to Demi-God, and Chen Rui took Duoduo to the human world to seek help, so she ‘missed’ Zola again. When Catherine received part of the power of Duoduo’s Heart of God Blessing to advance to the peak stage of the Demi-God, Zola who was also peak stage of the Demi-God had the chance to compete at the same level.

It was said that the 2 had a ‘friendly’ competition in private. The result of the competition was unknown, but since then, the relationship between Zola and Catherine had become closer. Later, Zola stepped into Pseudo-God because of the opportunity of the elemental world. After a series of changes, she now had the strength of the peak stage of the Pseudo-God. Although Catherine had faintly touched the edge of Pseudo-God, the gap was too far apart after all. There was no point of comparison for the time being.

The skill of [Stealth] was very similar to Chen Rui’s [Sneak]. Both had the effect of concealing. The difference was that in the state of [Stealth], one could actually launch continuous attacks, that was, stealth strikes. On the other hand, [Sneak] would be ineffective once the attack was launched.

The disadvantage of [Stealth] was that it would appear as soon as one was attacked. In the small plain of the Jergal Fortress, Raizen made Catherine appear with an AOE attack. Meanwhile, for [Sneak], as long as one didn’t launch an attack and withstand it, no matter how the opponent uses the AOE attack, it would not appear. Both concealment techniques had their advantages. [Stealth] was more suitable for getting kill in 1 hit and retreating; [Sneak] was more suitable for scouting or escaping.

The benefits of [Element Depletion] were even more self-evident. But the key was to be directly proportional to one’s own strength. No wonder when Catherine’s Nirvana power dropped sharply, she was still unable to defeat Broc even with the Dark Shadow Cape.

The 7 artifacts were all analyzed successfully and could be used. Normally, it would be a great joy for Chen Rui, but after experiencing the battle in the elemental world, Chen Rui’s mood was completely opposite.

No matter how strong the 7 artifacts were, they were just foreign objects. If he relied too much on them, once they lost their effectiveness, it would be like losing his arms in a battle in the elemental world.

More importantly, the 7 artifacts were definitely related to ‘that person’, so Chen Rui no longer intended to use them as frequently as before.

I myself am the real strength I can rely on.

It was not like Chen Rui didn’t doubt the entire Super System before, but the Super System had existed since his crossover, long before he got the first of the 7 artifacts. It should be due to the mobile phone he picked up on Earth. As the master of the Galaxy Divinity Temple and even the entire Super System universe, Chen Rui could be sure that he was the only supreme controller, and he was even above the ‘God’ of each galaxy. In other words, he was the supreme God here.

The Super System was still safe, at least for now. Therefore, the most suspicious thing was the holy tree of the elf tribe that was still on the Star Conferring Platform.

This was a faith creature, and it was also the only growth-type faith creature in the Super System. From the current seedling to the current big tree, its growth speed was amazing. This tree needed to consume 1000 faith crystals every day. So far, in the data shown by the Super System, its function was still ‘unknown’.

There was no need to elaborate on the use of the Tree of Nature for the elf tribe. If Chen Rui destroyed this holy tree, then the elf tribe would lose the ability to reproduce, resulting in extinction. It could be said that the life and death of the elf tribe were in Chen Rui’s grasp at any time. Hence, when the Legendary Prophet Alucier asked Chen Rui to take away the holy tree, which shocked the whole elf tribe. Chen Rui’s title of the ‘Elf King’ came from this.

Originally, Chen Rui planned to return the holy tree to the elf tribe as promised, but Alucier later asked Finoia to tell him not to return the holy tree for the time being. He didn’t know if the appearance of ‘that person’ was related to this.

Chen Rui also secretly observed the Tree of Nature of the Star Conferring Platform, but he found nothing unusual on the surface. Chen Rui thought about it, and did not transplant or try to destroy the Tree of Nature. The elf tribe was naturally 1 of the concerns. However, Chen Rui was also worried about ‘that person’. Although ‘that person’ was unknown, how could he allow someone else to interfere with his business. Chen Rui certainly could not tolerate the existence of such a time bomb. But for now, it was better to be cautious and not to disturb ‘him’, because that was the existence that could destroy Gods. If there was any accident, the consequences would be disastrous.

What Chen Rui had to do now was to further improve his own strength. Originally, he was inevitably a little complacent after being able to faintly overwhelm Michael and Satan. However, in the battle of the elemental world, he encountered the real strength of SSSS++ of the Main Elemental Messenger. When the 7 artifacts could not play a role, he must launch the strongest [All Star Gods View] power in 1-on-1 battle to barely win a fight. Subsequently, he witnessed the existence above the Pseudo-God. As the saying went, there are always people stronger than you. Self-confidence was necessary, but overconfidence would only stop him from moving forward.

In the desperate attempt, the potential and power of [All Star Gods View] had been confirmed. This was undoubtedly an effective way to increase strength. The rest would depend on Chen Rui’s efforts and experiment in day to day training.

One day, Chen Rui had just finished training on the training ground. When his consciousness withdrew from the Super System, he heard a loud sound, which shook even the room with enchantment.

Chen Rui was taken aback. In a flash, he jumped out of the window.

The 2 huts containing sundries in the yard had collapsed. Athena, Alice and others were actually on the opposite side.

“Athena!” Chen Rui appeared in front of Athena instantly, “Are you okay?”

“I’m fine…” Athena smiled wryly, “I’m sorry. I didn’t mean to.”

“You mean…” Chen Rui looked at her swollen belly.

“It’s getting worse these days.” Athena showed an apologetic expression as she looked at Alice and Kia who were still in shock, “Fortunately, no one was hurt.”

It turned out that Athena’s recent state was very abnormal. First of all, her strength had broken through to the intermediate stage of Kingdom level in one fell swoop. This was a good thing. The problem was that her strength sometimes exploded involuntarily, causing damage beyond imagination.

“Zola tried several methods, but none of them helped her control her power. She went to Python this morning to find a solution. She should be back soon.”

“I should be the one to apologize. I’m too obsessed with training these days.” Chen Rui showed an apologetic expression. During this period, he had been troubled by those doubts, especially someone in his body. As a result, he spent more time on training, causing him to almost ignore the people around him.

Athena shook her head, and suddenly her face changed again. Chen Rui immediately had a warning sign, and he grabbed her fist. Chen Rui’s hair suddenly flew back. His clothes bulged up as if blown by the wind, then it returned to normal. The people around didn’t even feel the slightest special feeling.

Isabella and the others who understood immediately saw that Chen Rui had forcibly taken the power of Athena’s explosion. At the same time, he eliminated it in a very clever way.

“No doubt it’s a little bit out of control.” Chen Rui smiled, “But it’s okay, I’ll just be with you.”

With that said, Chen Rui glanced aside where Zola and Python had already appeared. At the moment when Athena’s power lost control just now, Zola and Python had already come to the yard.

Originally, Python would come to the residence from time to time to discuss some training issues with Chen Rui. Since the elemental world war, Python did not come again. This was the first time since then.

Python didn’t take another glance at Chen Rui. She went straight to Athena, examined her body for a while, and nodded, “I saw the power explosion just now. Although I’m not very proficient in subjects like pregnancy, I can be sure that your child is about to be born. These out-of-control states are actually induced by the fetus. Your child is carrying the purest destruction origin, which is not an ordinary person.”

“Will it be born soon?” Not only Chen Rui, but also Athena and others asked in unison. All of them looked surprised.

“This child’s strength has exceeded my previous expectations, but this may not be a good thing for the maternal body. I’m afraid that this kind of power will go out of control in the future, and the power will become more and more powerful… If this continues, the danger of childbirth will also multiply. If you are not careful, not only the lives of those around you, but also Athena herself will be in danger.”

Chen Rui was taken aback, “Then what should we do?”

“No matter what, I will give birth to the child.” Athena’s eyes were full of firmness, which was a firmness that belonged to a mother, “Python, please help me.”
