chapters.title: Chapter 1176: Materials
chapters.body:
Chapter 1176: Materials

Athena’s gaze made Python frown, “To be honest, I’m not completely sure that both mother and child will be safe.”

“At least you can guarantee the child’s safety?” Athena’s eyes lit up.

“Understood.” Python looked deeply into Athena’s eyes before she finally nodded slowly, “I won’t say anything euphemistic. I’m really not sure.”

What if, I mean just in case, I can only choose 1 between the child and the mother, how should I choose? This question, as the parents of the child, you and him must think clearly and answer me. “

Everyone’s hearts tightened. They had been in contact with Python for so long, and she would never exaggerate the facts. Since she said this, it proved that the situation in Athena was not optimistic. The last question was very heavy and very realistic.

“Athena.”

“Child.”

The 2 said 2 different answers.

“Chen Rui! I have something to say.”

“No, you listen to me first.” Chen Rui held Athena’s hand, shook his head, and stopped what she wanted to say, “I know what you want to say, but you are wrong. All the people here are all unique and irreplaceable. These are not sweet words, but sincere words. In many things, I will choose ‘future’, but in this case, I choose ‘now’ and it will not change.”

That decisive tone made Athena’s eyes turn red, “But…”

“There is no ‘but’. If I’m destined to have only 1 daughter in my life, I will not have any regrets.” Chen Rui cast his eyes on Python’s face, “Besides, this is just a ‘what if’ situation, the real hope is still huge, isn’t it?”

“‘There is indeed hope, but if you do nothing, there will definitely be more ‘what ifs’.” Python pondered for a while before she spoke up, “Fortunately, there is a page of the Book of Destruction with you. What I need is the silver box that holds the Book of Destruction. With this container in place, and with some materials, it should increase the chances a lot.”

Chen Rui cheered up, “What do you need? I’ll find them right away!”

“Fountain of Vitality, 2 pieces of the top grade dark shadow crystal, 2 pieces of the top grade best brilliant crystal, 3 golden dragon saliva flowers, 3 thunder heart vines, 5 rainbow calla lilies, 7 purple serene grass, 3 rainbow calla lilies…” Python said the names of a large list of materials. Some of which Chen Rui already had, such as Fountain of Vitality, but most of them were not available. There were even a few names that were unheard of.

Chen Rui hurriedly memorized. When Python finished speaking, he had already made a complete list and calculated it carefully, “The 7 rainbow grasses and rainbow calla lilies are plants of potion materials, but it is said that they are basically extinct. It hasn’t been sold for thousands of years, and potioneers have already found alternative materials. As for ambergris flower, I only know that there is white one, and I have never heard of thunder heart vine.”

“Ambergris flower is the companion plant of dragons. It can gather strength and enhance life force. It is especially effective for the growth of dragon larvae. It is very rare and usually white for crafting potion.” Lalaria next to her said, “There are 3 qualities of dragon saliva flower. The sequence in accordance of low to high quality is white, silver, and gold. Many young dragons like to eat this kind of flower. As far as I know, there are many white dragon saliva flowers, but silver-grade flowers are already quite rare. If it is gold, I can be sure that it is not even in the Dragon Island.”

Chen Rui’s heart sank, and Zola thought about it, “Don’t worry, I remember that Aunt Sophia usually likes to plant flowers and plants. She probably has them there.”

“Her Highness Sophia?”

“She is the first wife of His Highness Pagris, queen of the Dragon Valley.”

Chen Rui suddenly realized that she was the wife of the human world’s Dragon Emperor Pagris.

“I’ve seen thunder heart vine. It’s a rare wind element plant which is helpful for the training for thunder. Unfortunately, the only one from Dragon Island was given by the old man to the blue dragon for training.”

“Wind element plant?” Chen Rui’s mind moved, “The Storm Island! Lalaria, please go to the human world with me this time, alright?”

“If it’s about you alone, I won’t be bothered to deal with it. But Athena is my reserved harem, 1 of my good friends. Okay, I’ll go with you.” Lalaria said to Athena solemnly, “If you want to thank me with your body, I will definitely treat you well. We can even treat that brat as our own.”

Athena, “…”

Your whole family are brats. Chen Rui silently ignored the second half of the weirdo loli’s words, and he suddenly had a flash of inspiration, “Right, human world! Rainbow grass and rainbow calla lilies are neutral plants. Although they are extinct in the Demon Realm, they may not be extinct in the human world! We can start with the potioneer in the human world! “

Python nodded, “In that case, from today onward, I will live here. I will teach Athena a secret technique. With the help of those materials, she can temporarily fuse the Book of Destruction’s container during the delivery time. I calculate that there will be about half a year before the child will be born. There is not much time left for you, but if there is a channel, this time is not too short.”

“Thank you.” Chen Rui said very sincerely. If it wasn’t for Python, he wouldn’t know that Athena and the child would be in such danger.

Python glanced at him indifferently, but she didn’t speak.

“Let’s not further delay. Delia, please contact Celine of the Dark Shadow Empire to find these materials together. Her Custer Family is a top commercial family, and she handles a lot of magic materials usually. This part is what we need. If there is no top grade brilliant crystal, then collect the second grade crystals. After that, I can refine them into the top grade; I will go to the human world to search for some of them, but you have to try your best on your side. We need to try to find all the materials as soon as possible.”

“Don’t worry, leader.” Delia took the list, checked the label part with Chen Rui worryingly, and kept the list until it was confirmed correct.

“Chen Rui, you are going to the human world?” Athena asked.

“ En , I will take Zola, Isabella and Lalaria together. First, we will go to the Storm Island to find thunder heart vine, then Dragon Valley.”

“Then take Alice and Kia with you. When you rescued Tiffany from the human world, you promised them so, and you haven’t fulfilled it until now.”

“I’m sorry.” Chen Rui looked at Alice and Kia as he shook his head, “It’s not that I don’t want to take them there, but our trip is not for fun; it’s about you.”

“It’s just looking around. It’s okay.” Athena explained, “They won’t disturb you, and they can help you collect materials. With the current strength of you and Zola, there shouldn’t be any danger. Besides, I have half a year’s time.”

“Athena.” Kia shook her head, “I have to stay here. I prepare your nutritious meals every day. I’m worried if someone else does it. I won’t go anywhere for the next 6 months.”

Isabella smiled slightly, “I’ll stay too, Athena’s current state is not very stable. Kia’s strength is not enough, so sometimes it’s inconvenient. Moreover, Duoduo also needs to be taken care of. If I didn’t ask Olypheus and Adeline to take her out to play today, she might cry in shock just now.”

What Isabella said was the truth. Athena was at the intermediate stage of the Kingdom level, and she was at the early stage of the Demi-God. As long as she was more careful, there would be no great danger. Kia was different. Her life would probably be in danger in case of any accidents.

“Kia, Yini, you guys.” Athena was so touched that she was speechless for a while.

Alice’s eyes were subconsciously bright when she initially heard that she was going to the human world, but now the more she looked at Athena, the more she felt ashamed. She lowered her head, “This time your matter is really important, so I won’t go. Besides, I’m the lord of the Dark Moon Estate.”

“Forget it.” Isabella unceremoniously exposed the short story of the madam lord, “Our madam lord throws everything to Joanna and the others, the standard slack-off party. Even if she disappears for a year or so, nothing will happen to the estate. Maybe it will be more prosperous without a person who commands blindly.”

“Female fox, who are you talking about blindly giving orders?” Alice had always been at odds with Isabella, so she almost jumped up in anger. But then she gave it a second thought: No, it seems that the female fox is helping me by saying this.

Isabella stopped bickering with Alice and said to Zola, “Say hello to daddy and mommy for me. We will go see them together next time.”

The last time Isabella went to the human world, she was considered a daughter by Zola’s parents. Isabella’s care and tenderness were something that Zola didn’t have. Besides, this Devil’s Snare Flower was also quite blackhearted. Meria and Span regarded her as their own. They got along well. When Meria hugged Isabella to say goodbye back then, she cried more than holding Zola.

“ En , don’t worry.” Zola nodded.

“Okay then, Alice, Lalaria, Zola and I will go together.” Chen Rui thought for a while before agreeing. The light of the Tower of Glory shone on his body, “Everyone has nothing to prepare, right?”

“Athena, help me tell my sister and let Dodo pretend to be me if necessary.” The loli princess glanced at Isabella and said hesitantly, “Also, Sister Yini…”

“Not female fox anymore? Do you want to say: Female fox, you will be my sister from then on?” Isabella imitated Lalaria and laughed “ Oh Hohohoho “.

“ Hmph !” Alice originally wanted to say a few sincere words of thanks, but her mouth flattened again when she heard this sentence. She soon disappeared into the light of the Tower of Glory.

Chen Rui smiled apologetically at Kia, “Kia, after the baby is born safely, you, I, Athena, Isabella, and everyone will go out and have fun together. Python, during this time, I’m counting on you here.”

Kia nodded vigorously as she watched him enter the [Star Gate] together with Athena and others.

Python didn’t look at Chen Rui, but she just looked at the sky as she said something to herself in a voice that only she could hear.

“Is everyone a unique and irreplaceable existence?”

chapters.title: Chapter 1177: When Lesbian Meets Sissy
chapters.body:
Chapter 1177: When Lesbian Meets Sissy

On the Storm Island, a door with starlight was activated. The [Star Gate] opened, and Chen Rui walked out of the light door.

The [Star Gate] was indeed an incredible skill. He crossed these 2 worlds just like his own yard. He could come and go whenever he want without any danger. Moreover, compared with the previous [Star Gate], it was now more convenient to bring people other than himself to crossover the space.

With a flash of golden light, the Tower of Glory had released Zola, Lalaria, and Alice. Although the fusion of the Star Conferring Platform had the same effect, the fusion of the Star Conferring Platform was more for emergency rescue. The longest duration could reach 3 days, and it could only be used once every 12 hours. In order to avoid wasting the usage, which made it unavailable at the critical moment, Chen Rui usually used the Tower of Glory.

In the death fight with Sariel, the Tower of Glory was severely damaged, and its efficacy was greatly reduced. Fortunately, with Chen Rui, the mechanic grand master, and the artifact’s self-healing ability, it finally recovered its power after a long time.

Zola originally escaped from marriage from the Dragon Valley, and she later went to the Dragon Valley with Chen Rui. Naturally, the environment of the human world was not a problem for her, but Lalaria and Alice were different. They had been growing up in a dense dark element environment since childhood. The sky of the Demon Realm was cold ‘moonlight’ even during the daytime. This was the first time they had come to this kind of sun-drenched world with dense light elements, so they were not used to it.

Lalaria’s strength had almost reached the intermediate stage of the Demi-God. After undergoing arduous training, it didn’t take long for her to adapt to the sun.

In contrast, Alice seemed struggling. Since she was a child, Alice really didn’t work hard in training. Even if she had good talent and had received various enhancements, she was only at the early stage Demon King (C-) now, which was the lowest level of Master strength in the human world. After being awarded the ‘Star Apprentice’, she had a speed of A-level, but her actual combat ability was a mess. As soon as the sun above her head shone, she felt dizzy and on the verge of falling, but fortunately, Chen Rui quickly held her.

“Wear this necklace first. It can help you hide the dark element and neutralize the light element. You will get used to it over time.”

“I’m sorry, brother.” Alice was full of expectations at first, but she didn’t expect to be sacked and became a burden as soon as she arrived. Her mood suddenly became down.

“It’s fine. Let’s go.” Chen Rui piggybacked Alice and said to Lalaria, “Are you okay?”

“I’m still okay. But black dragons are relatively pure dark physique. The environment of this light element makes me very uncomfortable, and my power is also suppressed. Do you still have that necklace? Give me one.”

“There’s no necklace anymore, but there is still a bracelet.” Chen Rui took out another bracelet and gave it to the flat-chested loli.

“This bracelet is pretty good. I was worried that the necklace is too girly, then I won’t be able to get girls by then.” Lalaria laughed strangely.

“Well… as long as Madam Lalaria likes it.” Chen Rui was already numb to this lesbian loli. “By the way, this island was originally the location of the wind elementals. There should be many wind element plants. There is likely to be thunder heart vine.”

When it came to the thunder heart vine that Athena needed, Lalaria became serious. She mentioned the characteristics of the thunder heart vine, “This thing is very similar to ordinary tree vines, but my nose is very sensitive. For any woman whom I smell once, even with my eyes closed, I can… Ugh , let’s talk about thunder heart vine. I can identify it by smell. However, this island seems to be too big. There are only a few of us. I’m afraid it’s…”

“We’re not the only ones on the island.” As soon as Chen Rui finished speaking, heavy footsteps could be heard nearby.

“Titans?” Lalaria was also a frequent visitor to the City of Stars at the Blue Lake Mountain Range, so she didn’t seem particularly surprised.

“Not only the titans… but also the lamp spirits and gremlins.” Chen Rui smiled. Storm Island was no longer what it used to be. After the magic game became popular in the human world, Chen Rui established a core control base on Storm Island. The ruins of the ‘Sky Wheel’, an ancient civilization level 4 city that had been abandoned and emptied, was built into the core of the base.

The basic construction personnel in the base were a large number of gremlins brought by Chen Rui from the City of Stars, and a considerable part of the lamp spirits was responsible for assisting research and daily work. He did not bring the crystal beasts, giant crystal beasts, and assemble puppets because the titans were enough as guards. Furthermore, there were also allies of the Dragon Valley and the giant dragon who guarded the teleportation portal.

There was a natural barrier of the storm sea area outside the Storm Island. A few years ago, it was declared as a trial field by the dragons. Outsiders were not allowed to enter, otherwise they were at their own risk. Thus, even ordinary mercenaries dared not approach this sea area now.

The leader of the titans was Oceanus, 1 of the strongest 12 titans. After the City of Stars evolved to level 5 metropolis, it had been able to undergo super evolution. The evolution tank, that allowed the second super evolution, had been developed. By right, this evolution tank was only available to the level 6 capital. Nonetheless, the success rate of the second evolution was too low. At present, the only one who had passed the second super evolution was Oceanus.

The strength of Oceanus had reached that of Demi-God, but the other dozen of the titans who participated in the experiment at the same time failed. The success rate of the second evolution was extremely low, which was simply a bet on luck. Moreover, failure was not simply decreasing strength level, both body and soul would be annihilated. So after several failures, Chen Rui ordered Crystal Phoenix to stop the experiment. After all, the current level of civilization was still far from level 6 the capital. Hence, forcing the experiment would only consume energy and the life of the titans in vain.

The leader of the lamp spirits was also a leader-level powerhouse who had passed the super evolution, called Genmu, whose strength was at the peak stage of the Demon Overlord; the leader of the gremlin was called Vido, who could control gremlin servants to improve work efficiency, make and repair higher grade equipment. Since the gremlin was a non-combat unit, there was no need for super evolution.

As soon as Chen Rui came here, he used the spiritual imprint to summon them. The alchemy creature leaders at the base rushed over immediately.

“Master!” Oceanus, Genmu, and Vido all turned to Chen Rui and bowed.

“Immediately mobilize all the gremlins and the lamp spirits on the island. The titans will be responsible for opening the way and guarding them. We will separately search the entire area of the Storm Island to find out the vines with this characteristic.” Chen Rui described the thunder heart vine characteristics.

With the size of the titans, it was naturally not suitable for this kind of search. However, besides the wind elementals, there were many threatening demonic beasts on the island such as the thunderbird. The lamp spirits were alright, but the gremlins would probably be attacked, so guards were necessary.

The alchemy creatures immediately carried out Chen Rui’s order. In an instant, the island was bubbling with noise. Chen Rui took Alice and others back to the base to wait for news. During this period of time, Alice finally got used to the environment by relying on the power of the necklace and some pointers from Zola.

“Sir, the Cloud Palace suddenly disappeared some time ago, and all the wind elementals are also missing.” In addition to the large team that went out to search, there were also gremlins in the base who maintained their daily work. Genmu, the leader of the lamp spirits, also stayed behind and reported to Chen Rui about the recent situation of the base.

“I know about it.”

The reason for the disappearance of the wind elementals should be the same as that of the earth elementals. It was because of the summoning of the elemental world’s Main Elemental Messenger before. It seems that all the elemental creatures on the main plane have disappeared.

“Master, the dragon representatives who stays behind to guard requested to see you.” A gremlin came to report.

Chen Rui’s plan was to go to the Dragon Valley through the teleportation portal immediately after finding thunder heart vine. He nodded immediately.

10 minutes had passed, but the dragons representative had not come to the hall

Chen Rui and Zola were feeling strange when the gremlin came to report again, “The dragon representatives are stopped by master’s companion outside.”

“Companion?” Chen Rui was taken aback for a moment as he looked at Zola and Alice beside him. Then, he immediately responded, “Lalaria!”

When Chen Rui and Zola walked to the gate, they saw Lalaria standing in front of the 2 dragon representatives. More precisely, it was Lalaria in elder sister form stopping 1 of the dragon representatives who was slender and beautiful.

“Karru? Little beauty, your name is the same as your temperament, full of neutral beauty, and enchanting By the way, my name is Lalaria… Would you like to have a drink with me?” When Lalaria blinked, she actually looked very charming, but her movements were very frivolous. She held up Karru’s chin like a female satyr.

The elder sister form, which was originally used for fighting, was actually used to pick up girls by the flat-chested loli. She is indeed one of the wonders of Dragon Island.

“Are you a dragon too? The breath on your body…” Karru stepped back quickly with her face blushing.

“ Oh Hohoho … You’re quite shy. I like this type.”

Chen Rui interrupted the pervert’s sexual harassment of innocent people very speechlessly, “Lalaria…”

The other dragon representative on the side was a 12 or 13-year-old boy with a handsome appearance. When he saw Chen Rui, he quickly pulled Karru and bowed to the 2, “Sir Richard! Elder Zola!”

“Little Anderlu! It turns out that you and Karru are the dragon’s representatives staying here!” Chen Rui nodded. These 2 representatives of the dragons were his acquaintances.

“Someone you know?” Lalaria’s eyes brightened. She leaned forward and lowered her voice, “How about a deal? I help you identify the thunder heart vine, and you introduce that beauty to me.”

The beauty? Chen Rui and Zola looked at each other with strange eyes.

While Lalaria and Chen Rui were muttering, Little Anderlu whispered to Karru from behind, “That Madam Lalaria seems to have a breath of dark elements.”

“With Sir Richard here, don’t worry.”

“Understood, elder brother.”

With Lalaria’s hearing ability, she could hear clearly. She was about to scold Chen Rui for providing a fake bracelet, but when she heard the last sentence, she froze in place.

Elder brother?

Loli Lala turned around and pointed at Karru tremblingly, “You…”

“Let me introduce,” Chen Rui said, “These 2 are the sons of the Dragon Valley Elder Pelin, Karru and Anderlu.”

“Boy!” Alice on the side had already exclaimed, and Lalaria was dumbfounded as if petrified in place.

It turned out that the ‘beauty’ that Lalaria harassed was Pelin’s eldest son. He was also the poor sissy, Karru, who was beaten and robbed by Zola back then when escaping marriage.

chapters.title: Chapter 1178: Thunder Heart Vine
chapters.body:
Chapter 1178: Thunder Heart Vine

The efficiency of the alchemy creatures was quite high, and soon many vine plants were brought to Chen Rui.

Perhaps the side effect of the transformation, Lalaria completely lost the high spirits she had when she was ‘picking up girls’. She looked weak as she twitched her nose casually in front of a lot of plants, “These are not it.”

“Sir Richard, what plant are you looking for?” Little Anderlu asked curiously.

For Karru, the key words Chen Rui had in his mind were only ‘giving good person card’ and ‘poor sissy who was bullied by Zola since childhood’, but Little Anderlu was different. The little shota gave Chen Rui a pretty good impression.

At the beginning, Little Anderlu came to beg Chen Rui for Samuel’s affairs. Chen Rui rushed to the Dragon Bright Empire in time upon getting the news of Samuel’s crisis to rescue the loyal subordinate. Later, Little Anderlu escaped from the Dragon Valley for Samuel and assisted Samuel to defeat the dragon knight Trinis, who was trying to kill him, in a duel at the risk of being seriously injured.

It could be said that Little Anderlu was Samuel’s most loyal brother. Even when Samuel went to the Demon Realm, he would often miss his fellow giant dragon who was like a brother.

“Thunder heart vine.” Chen Rui didn’t hide it. “It is very important to me. It is related to the life of 1 of my wives.”

“Thunder heart vine… By the way, Karru, didn’t you find some thunder heart vine under the cliff last time?” Little Anderlu’s words lifted Chen Rui’s spirit, and he looked at Karru.

Karru already revered Zola, and he was harassed by Lalaria after being misunderstood as a girl before, so he was on the edge and didn’t hear what his brother said at all. Little Anderlu walked over and said a few words to Karru. He immediately shivered, stood up quickly, and bowed, “Little Anderlu, you stay here to talk to Sir Richard. I’ll pluck it now.”

Hearing the whereabouts of thunder heart vine, Chen Rui finally felt relieved. He said to Little Anderlu, “Little Anderlu, we haven’t seen each other for a few years. Is the Dragon Valley still the same? How is Royal Majesty Pagris… and the great elder couple?”

“Royal Majesty Pagris succeeded in advancement not long ago, and the Dragon Valley also held a 3-day carnival. Madam Meria and Sir Span are both doing very well. Especially Madam Meria, she is highly valued by the Royal Majesty Dragon Emperor. Now the magic game, magic phone, and other important affairs are in charge by Madam Meria.” With that said, Little Anderlu bowed to Chen Rui again, “Speaking of the Dragon Valley, I asked sir to save my companion Samuel last time. Although I don’t know what method sir used, I know that Samuel finally escaped from danger afterward. It should be all thanks to sir. Hereby I would like to express my sincere thanks to sir.”

“Little Anderlu, you are very nice.” Chen Rui glanced at Anderlu approvingly, “I think I should tell you something, but I hope you can keep it secret. In fact, we also met in the Dragon Bright Empire after that. Oh , Samuel was there too… Right, Stanwell and Gueroas as well”

Little Anderlu showed a surprised expression. He suddenly remembered something, and he was taken aback, “You mean that dragon knight duel with Bracklin… Right, Elder Stanwell seemed to be very weird that time. He actually scolded Bracklin. Ah , could it be that the third prince of the Dragon Bright Empire who spoke to Elder Stanwell…”

“You’re smart, Little Anderlu.”

“Then I should call…”

Chen Rui smiled lightly, “Just call me ‘Richard’. Prince ‘Arthur’ should have been ‘dead’ during the Holy Child’s canonization ritual.”

“Understood, sir.”

Little Anderlu had also heard about the change of the Holy Child’s canonization ritual promoted by the Holy Church, but judging from Chen Rui’s appearance here and his ability to defeat Stanwell in the Dragon Valley, the facts were definitely not what the Church claimed. The hidden secrets should be pretty astonishing.

Little Anderlu didn’t ask any further as he bowed again, “Thank you very much sir for your trust. I just want to ask a question, where is Samuel now? There is a special spiritual connection between him and I. I can feel that he should be safe and sound.”

“He is in a very far away place with his 2 wives, Joanna and Ina, and he misses you as a friend too.”

Little Anderlu’s eyes lit up, “I wonder if I can meet him?”

“This is actually a question that requires you to think carefully because…” Just as Chen Rui was talking, he suddenly looked at the door. Karru had returned with a few vines in his hand.

Chen Rui didn’t continue chatting with Little Anderlu. His eyes were fixed on those vines, “Lalaria?”

Lalaria responded listlessly, stepped forward, smelled it, and suddenly grabbed Karru’s arm angrily. How could Karru bear Lalaria’s strength? He suddenly squatted down in pain.

Just when Chen Rui thought there was something wrong with thunder heart vine, Loli Lala yelled in rage, “You’re a grown up man, yet you actually wear perfume for girls!”

Karru was already in so much pain that he couldn’t speak, so Little Anderlu quickly explained, “This is a men’s cologne, which is used by many noble families in the human world…”

Chen Rui was speechless for a while. It has nothing to do with perfume, right? This is just the typical being ashamed into anger.

“Lalaria!” Chen Rui hastily stopped the flat-chested loli who was about to go berserk, “Are these the thunder heart vines that Athena needs?”

“Yes…” Lalaria replied, then she said harshly to Karru, “If I see you use these disgusting things next time, I will throw you into the volcano to bath you!”

The poor sissy could only shake his head with tears in his eyes as he nodded with all his strength. When Chen Rui heard that it was a thunder heart vine, he quickly transplanted it into the galaxy garden. At the same time, he ordered all alchemy creatures to stop searching, and he activated the power of the Crown of Thorns to heal Karru’s arm.

“Thank you very much, Karru.”

“Sir, you are being polite. I know that sir is a good person.” The sissy had a good impression of Chen Rui. The main reason was that Chen Rui married a certain lady that the sissy feared most, which saved the sissy from suffering.

Having found the thunder heart vine so quickly, Chen Rui was naturally in a good mood. Give all the good man cards you want.

Karru’s injury was actually nothing serious, but from his terrified expression, it could be seen that the psychological intimidation and trauma far outweighed the physical trauma—Probably there was another name on sissy’s blacklist now besides Zola.

“You 2 are the representatives of the Dragon Valley in Storm Island now? Just right, I’m going to Dragon Valley now.”

Karru hesitated for a moment and asked, “Sir, can I ask your purpose for going to the Dragon Valley? I’m sorry, I have the responsibility to inform the personnel and purpose on my side. Then, the other side can agree to start the 2-way teleportation.”

“Brother,” Anderlu bumped Karru lightly, “Did you forget? Madam Zola is now an elder, so there is no need for…”

Upon hearing the name of the fairy dragon, the sissy couldn’t help shivering. He finally came to her senses, not daring to look in the direction of a certain elder as he said quickly, “I’m sorry, Zo… Zo…”

When Chen Rui heard that the sissy’s tongue was tied up, he shook his head secretly. Although Darling Zola sometimes likes fake daze and is a bit blackhearted, in general, she is quite cute. How could she leave such a terrifying trauma in Karru’s heart?

“Actually, I want to visit Queen Sophia to see if she has golden dragon saliva flower.”

“Golden dragon saliva flower!” Little Anderlu exclaimed.

Chen Rui quickly asked, “You know?”

Little Anderlu nodded and said with some embarrassment, “Aunt Sophia does have one. She has always regarded it as a treasure. I remember when I was young, a few friends and I tried to steal it more than once, but it triggered the protection inscription and I was trapped inside for a while. After my father picked me up, he beat me up, then Aunt Sophia kindly gave me a silver dragon saliva flower.”

Chen Rui heard from Lalaria about the benefits of dragon saliva flowers to young dragons. He was overjoyed to hear Little Anderlu’s affirmative answer, “Great, let’s go to the Dragon Valley now!”

After receiving the news from Karru and Anderlu that the Elder Zola had returned, the Dragon Valley’s 2-way teleportation array was soon opened.

After Chen Rui took Zola and the 2 ladies through the teleportation portal, the first thing he saw was his Sir Father-in-law and Madam Mother-in-law. After hearing the news of their daughter’s return, Meria and Span immediately appeared in front of the teleportation portal.

“Baby!” Meria excitedly looked at her daughter whom she hadn’t seen for several years, and Zola threw herself into her mother’s arms. No matter whether she was a quasi-goddess or the peak stage of the Pseudo-God, she was her daughter after all.

Chen Rui noticed that the strength of Meria and Span had reached the intermediate stage of the Demi-God. Span could only be regarded as a recovery of strength while Meria was only one step away from breaking through when he left last time. Of course, Chen Rui’s potions also played an important role.

The old father-in-law Elf King Span came over and nodded to Chen Rui, “Welcome back.”

This family-like tone made Chen Rui feel warm, “ En , Uncle Span, let me introduce you. This is Alice, and this is Lalaria. They are my… er , sisters.”

Before the Old Father-in-law Elf King could speak, Meria showed a vigilant expression, “Sisters?”

“Although I owe you a lot of money, we haven’t fallen to the point of selling ourselves as your sister. Besides, my age, Hmph Hmph …” Lalaria looked at Meria carelessly, “We are Zola’s… um , good friend. Since you are Zola’s mommy, you are my aunty as well. Uhm … Zola’s daddy, don’t worry, my goal is your daughter, so your wife is safe for now.”

The last sentence was obviously addressed to Span. The Old Father-in-law Elf King obviously didn’t keep up with such a strange jumping thinking rhythm, so he asked back in surprise, “What?”

“I’m not his sister…” Alice muttered in a dissatisfied tone. She came to Meria and bowed respectfully, “Aunt Meria, hello. I’m Zola… Sister’s younger sister, Alice.”

(Hmph Hmph, Zola and I will be sisters sooner or later!)

Meria looked at Alice, and then at Chen Rui. The scrutiny made Chen Rui a little scared, but Alice’s lovely appearance still made Meria quite like her, “Last time it was Yini, this time it was Alice. Both of them are likable, but there is a guy who is becoming more and more unlikeable… Hey, what happened to your hand?”

Chen Rui looked at the left hand that hadn’t yet fully healed, and he said with a shake, “It’s fine. It’s almost finished growing. It won’t be long before it will be as good as before.”

As soon as Chen Rui’s hand was mentioned, Zola’s eyes turned red, “This is when he risked his life to save me last time…”

Meria’s eyes suddenly softened, and the original bit of blame turned into appreciation and relief. Nonetheless, she still spoke with the tone of reproach, “Young man, don’t be too aggressive…”

A son-in-law who is able to protect my daughter with his life. I can really feel relieved to entrust my daughter to him.

Hearing the concern in Meria’s tone, Chen Rui smiled while the Old Father-in-law Elf King patted his shoulder hard, “It’s fine since it’s okay now.”

At this time, another acquaintance came from the opposite; it was Gueroas.

Seeing Chen Rui and Zola, Gueroas nodded and spoke up, “Royal Majesty Pagris invites Great Elder Meria, Elder Zola and 3 guests to the Holy Spirit Summit.”

TL: Just get the dragon saliva flower and ciao?

chapters.title: Chapter 1179: Courtesy First Before Force
chapters.body:
Chapter 1179: Courtesy First Before Force

Soon after, Chen Rui and the 3 others appeared in the palace of the Holy Spirit Summit.

Although it was not the first time Chen Rui came to this palace, he still felt the grandeur and luxury of this palace.

From the ceiling to the ground, every inch was made of priceless materials. Even without counting other decorations or treasures, the entire palace alone was equivalent to a huge treasure. However, just like the preferences of many dragons, this style was still too ‘Nouveau riche’. It was as if all 10 fingers were covered with rings, for fear that others did not know that they were rich. If there was an elf who was proficient in art and subtle beauty, he would definitely pick out countless faults with this ‘vulgar’ palace full of ‘bronze stink’.

It was a pity that Lalaria was not an elf. From the moment she entered the palace, her eyes were full of shining black crystal coins. Because she didn’t fulfill her promise to marry Chen Rui, Lala Loli’s property was frozen by her father Auglas long ago, plummeting from tall, rich, handsome directly to the short, poor, flat loser dragon. In Lala Loli’s own words, she could only ‘stay under someone’s else house’. In fact, she was living a happy life in the Dark Moon where she ate and drank for free every day, plus she also harassed beauties from time to time.

After finally getting a treasure map, the outcome almost caused the sisters to die together. In the end, it was still that damned human who came to save her. Therefore, she owed him more favors. Now seeing this palace full of black crystal coins, her eyes even popped out.

After all, Lala Loli still had a little self-control. If it was Olypheus, maybe Ms. Black Dragon would immediately stay on the floor and enjoy the feeling of sleeping in a pile of money.

Walking into the hall, Chen Rui saw Pagris, the ruler of the Dragon Valley.

This Sir Dragon Emperor was sitting on the throne in the middle with the elders of the Dragon Valley standing on both sides. It was not the first time Chen Rui met these elders. Compared with the last time the elder council, although many people were absent, they seemed to be all there – Stanwell, Pelin, including the Old Querondit, a dragon potion grand master who once wanted to learn from Chen Rui, were all present.

“Royal Majesty Pagris, we meet again.” Chen Rui lowered his head slightly to express courtesy.

The elders were taken aback, because this kind of etiquette was only used by peers of the same level or status. The attitude of this human last time was not like this. At least, he bowed.

This move also surprised and frightened Meria. She knew Pagris’ character very well. He seemed casual, but he was arrogant and scheming. Although he didn’t know why his son-in-law, who had always been wise, suddenly became so rude, this kind of move would definitely upset Dragon Emperor.

Pagris wasn’t too surprised or dissatisfied, because he had already learned from Stanwell the truth about the last battle at the canonization ceremony of the Holy Light Mountain. The human being in front of me, Meria’s son-in-law, is actually able to ‘fight’ 1 of the 3 supreme angels, the veteran peak stage of the Pseudo-God Raphael!

According to Stanwell, this person easily defeated the 8-winged angel Camael as ‘Arthur’. Later on, in front of Raphael, he dispelled the formation of ancient runes near the canonization platform and took 1 imprisoned woman away calmly. Raphael not only failed to capture him, but also he almost suffered a big loss due to carelessness.

Judging from the depicted situation, the strength gap between the 2 sides is quite obvious. ‘Arthur’ also admitted that he was far from Raphael’s opponent, but it is certain that ‘Arthur’ is definitely not Demi-God, but Pseudo-God!

Analyzing in terms of strength level, even if there is a special secret treasure or secret technique, it is almost impossible for the early stage of the Pseudo-God to escape from the hands of the peak stage of the Pseudo-God; if it is the peak stage Pseudo-God, there should not be such a disparity. Therefore, his strength is probably similar to my current level, which is intermediate stage Pseudo-God — If he made use of Raphael’s contemptuous mentality plus the secret treasures, Pagris would also have the confidence to escape from Raphael.

Although he didn’t know if ‘Richard’ deliberately hid his strength when he was in the Dragon Valley or if his strength didn’t recover for some reason, in any case, the human who appeared in front of him now was a comparable opponent.

“Sir Richard, let’s call you that. I’m glad to see you again.” Pagris smiled as he also lowered his head slightly in return of the courtesy, “Come on, take a seat.”

Pagris’ attitude moved the elders again. The Royal Majesty Dragon Emperor actually recognized the other party’s etiquette!

The fastest responder was Stanwell. He immediately came in front of Chen Rui and set up a chair at a position more than 10 meters below the steps of the Dragon Emperor’s throne. Judging from the decoration and specifications of the chair, it was actually only slightly inferior to the throne. It seemed that it was usually used to entertain distinguished guests of a certain level.

Chen Rui nodded to Stanwell, “Elder Stanwell, thank you for bringing us to the Flaring Sun Volcano last time.”

Last time in Dragon Horn City, Catherine had a conflict with Stanwell because of a misunderstanding while carrying Duoduo. Later, Stanwell took Chen Rui and his companions to the Flaring Sun Volcano, which saved Duoduo a lot of precious time.

Thinking of the misunderstanding last time, Stanwell blushed a little. He bowed and returned to Pagris without saying anything.

After Chen Rui sat down, Pagris looked at Alice and Lalaria, “Why don’t you introduce these 2 beautiful ladies from another world first?”

This sentence revealed the origins of the 2 women. Chen Rui knew that the holy dragon had a special sensing talent for dark elements. Ordinary equipment could not even block this talent. This was also the reason why Karru sensed a strong dark element breath from Lalaria before. Not to mention Pagris’ eyesight, Isabella was seen through even wearing the secret treasure Evil Blue Tear back then.

Alice was not a girl who had never seen a big scene. Before Chen Rui could speak, she had already walked up, gracefully performing the etiquette of the Demon Realm’s noble families, “The Demon Realm’s Fallen Angel Empire First Princess and lord of the Dark Moon Estate, Alice. Lucifer pays respect to Royal Majesty Pagris.”

“Although I’m in the human world, I have also heard the dragons who have returned from training talk about the name of the Dark Moon Estate. I never thought that Princess Royal Highness would be the lord of the largest estate in the Demon Realm at such a young age. It’s amazing.” Pagris’ eyes fell on Lalaria, “So, what about this… Ms. Black Dragon?”

Black dragon! If Alice claimed to be from the ‘Demon Realm’ before already had the elders whispering secretly, then the word ‘black dragon’ that Pagris pointed out made the whispers a lot louder.

The black dragon is the recognized enemy of the holy dragon family. There are almost no black dragons in the human world. Today that ‘Richard’ actually brought a black dragon into the palace of the Holy Spirit Summit openly!

“Since I have to introduce myself in this kind of place, then I have to be more serious. After all, I am the old man’s daughter…” Lalaria’s tone changed. Her whole person actually showed a completely different intimidating temperament from the usual idleness. She met the Dragon Emperor’s scrutiny without showing any weakness, “Demon Realm’s the Dragon Island inheritor, the daughter of the current Dragon Emperor Auglas, Lalaria. Sierrasalomekre.”

This black dragon girl is actually the next Dragon Emperor of the Demon Realm! The elders suddenly became restless.

The giant dragon of the Demon Realm was called the fallen dragon by the human world. The Dragon Island and the Dragon Valley were naturally irreconcilable. The future Dragon Emperor of the Demon Realm actually comes to the Dragon Valley of the human world. Does this mean a war is going to break out?

“ Hey, hey. .. old men over there. Don’t mutter. I didn’t mean to break in to start a war or something.” After Lalaria finished speaking, she returned to her carefree look and pointed at Chen Rui confidently, “I am here today with this guy. If you want to make trouble, beat him first.”

“Madam Lalaria, you seem to have become a lot more cunning.” Chen Rui gave Lala Loli a strange look.

“Of course, who am I? Oh Hohoho …”

With a wave of Pagris’ hand, the restlessness of the elders suddenly fell silent. The Dragon Emperor looked at Lalaria with great interest, “Interesting! Your Highness Lalaria is right. Now is not the time to start a war. Your Highness is admirable in terms of strength, courage, and temperament. Give seats for the 2 Royal Highnesses.”

As a result, there were 2 more seats with a lower specification next to Chen Rui.

“Sir Richard, you have given me a big blow by coming here. You have more people sitting on your side than mine.” Pagris said to Chen Rui with a smile, “You abducted our Dragon Valley’s top genius Elder Zola for such a long time. Don’t tell me this time is just to visit Elder Meria… or me, the self-assertive old friend?”

“To be frank, Your Majesty, this time I came to the Dragon Valley specially to ask for a favor.”

“Please say.”

“I have a wife who has some health problems and is in urgent need of golden dragon saliva flower. I heard that Your Majesty’s Queen, Her Highness Sophia has 1, so I came here to seek Your Majesty’s help with this.”

“Golden dragon saliva flower?” Pagris seemed a little surprised. He thought for a while, “This… I’m afraid I can’t help sir.”

Chen Rui frowned, “Your Majesty, this golden dragon saliva flower is very important to me. I’m willing to pay any price.”

“It’s not about the cost.” Pagris shook his head, “It’s about Sophia… Anyway, I’m sorry.”

This was clearly a refusal attitude. Before Chen Rui could speak, Lalaria on the other side had already let out a cold snort in dissatisfaction, “Why are you haggling with him so much? Just one sentence is enough: If you don’t hand it over, we’ll destroy the Dragon Valley!”

As soon as these words were uttered, the atmosphere in the hall suddenly became suffocating. The Dragon Emperor’s eyes were burning with frightening flames as he stared closely at Chen Rui’s face, “Is this your attitude?”

Although the words were spoken by Lalaria, Lalaria’s power is only at the Demi-God. She would absolutely not dare to court death like this. She must have been instructed by ‘Richard’.

Chen Rui was silent for a moment, “Your Majesty, to tell you the truth, even if we are not real friends, we are partners in multiple aspects. Whether it is magic games, magic phone, or aromatic millet wine… plus Aunt Meria and Uncle Span are Zola’s parents, and also my relatives. I’m willing to exchange the golden dragon saliva flower with items of equivalent or greater value, including artifacts, black potions, or more commercial items… But, if these still can’t satisfy Your Majesty’s appetite, then, sorry, I do not rule out taking it by force.”

After all, the golden dragon saliva flower was the treasure of the Dragon Valley. Moreover, considering Zola’s parents and the relationship with the Dragon Valley in the past, Chen Rui didn’t want to threaten them with force, but he showed courtesy first before force.

After saying the last sentence, Pagris’ facial expression finally changed. Meria and Gueroas were startled, and the elders were also moved. Is this ‘Richard’ looking for death? He actually provoked the Dragon Emperor in the Dragon Valley!

Pagris slowly stood up from the throne, and the power of Pseudo-God spread out, “Well said. I heard that you escaped successfully from Raphael’s hands. I want to see it today.”

Escaped from the hands of Raphael? Except for Stanwell, the elders including Meria were shocked. No wonder the Royal Majesty Dragon Emperor had to treat ‘Richard’ with that kind of courtesy just now.

Pagris’ eyes fell on Chen Rui’s left hand, “Your hand seems to have a problem. I will not take advantage of you, so I will only use one hand or wait for you to recover…”

“Stop being so self-righteous. This guy can easily strangle you with one hand.” Lalaria continued to speak in a calm manner. This sentence almost set the entire hall on fire.

TL: Well said, at least it quicken up the process…

chapters.title: Chapter 1180: Dragon Emperor’S Successor?
chapters.body:
Chapter 1180: Dragon Emperor’S Successor?

Pagris’ eyes had turned into vertical pupils. He exuded a mighty force all over his body. The light in the entire hall was dimmed. Everyone seemed to be in a raging sea, and they couldn’t even breathe.

However, as soon as this terrifying breath approached Chen Rui, it disappeared immediately like snow meeting flame.

“Royal Majesty Dragon Emperor, your news is too late.” Naturally, Lalaria beside Chen Rui was not oppressed by Pagris’ momentum. She released a shocking news again, “The incident that this guy escaped from Raphael’s hands was news from several years ago. Less than a year ago, he had defeated Raphael!”

Defeated Raphael!

Pagris breath froze. He could hardly believe his ears. At this moment, Chen Rui shook his head and denied, “I didn’t defeat Raphael.”

Everyone looked eased, and Chen Rui added, “The actual situation was that I only fought him for 10 minutes, but if it took more than 1 minute, he might die.”

As soon as these words came out, there was a sudden commotion.

In fact, Chen Rui wasn’t exaggerating. If Gabriel hadn’t stopped in time to remind him that the 10 minutes was up, once the [All Star Gods View] was launched, Raphael would be seriously injured if he survived.

What’s more, after going through the elemental world war, now Chen Rui had a deeper comprehension for [All Star Gods View], especially the power of fusion. It was even stronger than when he ‘visited’ the Holy Light Mountain back then. During this period of time, if Raphael’s strength was still the same, Chen Rui was confident of winning.

“Shameless boast!” Pagris sneered. This boast is too exaggerated. A few years ago he was fleeing for his life from Raphael’s hands. In such a short period of time, it has become Raphael narrowly escaping from his hands?

Who is Raphael? 3 archangels, 1 of the strongest peak stage Pseudo-God in the human world!

“He’s not boasting. If it’s you, he doesn’t need to make a move at all; I can do it with one hand.” The voice caused a commotion again. Even the calmest Meria couldn’t help but be startled— It was her daughter, Zola.

Pagris’ vertical pupils contracted slightly. His voice became colder, “You’re my Dragon Valley’s top genius. Even I don’t have your strength when I was your age. As for what you just said, it may become a reality in the future, but now, it can only be described as ‘arrogant’! As an elder, you are qualified to question and challenge the Dragon Emperor’s strength. You may even replace me. Competition is essential for a clan to maintain strength and development. I am also mentally prepared to hand over the throne in the future. The person who accepts the highest position maybe someone else, or it may be you. But it is only the ‘future’, not ‘now’! If you don’t step down…”

Before he finished speaking, Zola’s breath, which was originally only ‘Kingdom level’, skyrocketed in an instant. From Demi-God to the intermediate stage of the Demi-God, then the peak stage… Pagris was shocked suddenly. Because Zola’s breath didn’t stop after reaching the peak stage of the Demi-God. It soared to the early stage of the Pseudo-God, intermediate stage…

Pagris was astounded because Zola’s power of breath was still rising. In the blink of an eye, it had been raised to a level where he couldn’t sense!

When Zola waved her hand, a rainbow appeared under her feet, slowly spreading toward the ‘sea’.

This rainbow wasn’t fast, and it didn’t look particularly mighty, but it was far above the momentum of the sea. Wherever it passed, the sea water was evaporated in an instant.

Before the rainbow arrived. Pagris sensed that his soul had been trembling slightly under the intimidation of the terrifying power. A shining silver armor subconsciously appeared all over his body. However, as the rainbow approached slowly, the armor could not withstand such a powerful pressure. Large cracks actually appeared.

With this incident, the entire imperial palace and even the entire Dragon Valley trembled under this force. Even the protective Dragon Inscription could not suppress it. The nearby dragons were suppressed and couldn’t move. They looked in the direction of the Holy Spirit Summit in horror.

“That’s enough, Zola.” When Chen Rui’s voice sounded, the rainbow immediately stopped spreading and gradually dissipated. The terrifying coercion also disappeared.

Pagris looked in disbelief at Zola who calmly withdrew 1 hand. He struggled to spit out 4 words, “Peak stage of the Pseudo-God…”

The hall suddenly fell silent. Except for Chen Rui, all the dragons gasped.

She is really at the peak stage of the Pseudo-God!

The last time at the elder council, Zola who appeared in front of everyone was only at the peak stage of the Kingdom level. How long has it been?! She actually advanced to the peak stage of the Pseudo-God!

How is this possible?!

“You won.” Pagris withdrew his strength somewhat in a loss, and his voice was incomparably astringent, “Although it feels unbelievable, it is the truth. You’re right, and I was wrong. There is no need to wait for the ‘future’. ‘Now’, I am already not your opponent anymore…”

Pagris was more aware of the gap between peak stage Pseudo-God and intermediate stage Pseudo-God than any dragons elder. Zola just released her breath just now. If we really fight, I’m already lucky to be able to escape. I have no slightest chance of winning. Moreover, according to Zola, the strength of that ‘Richard’ is above her – What she said earlier that he almost killed Raphael should be true!

Pagris was mentally prepared for a battle with Chen Rui, an ‘intermediate stage Pseudo-God’ powerhouse, but he never thought that things would turn into such a situation. He took a deep breath and finally adjusted his mental state. He sighed, “Elder Zola, your strength is beyond doubt. The dragons are lucky to have a genius and powerhouse like you. So, are you ready to accept the throne?”

According to the rules of dragons, Zola, as an elder, had the qualification to replace Dragon Emperor Pagris after successfully ‘challenging’ Dragon Emperor Pagris. As long as the great elder agreed, a meeting of the elder council could be held immediately. After a vote was passed, the throne would be officially handed over. The current great elder was none other than Zola’s mother. Coupled with Zola’s strong strength, there was almost no obstacle to the passing of the elder council.

The elders all looked at each other in blank dismay: The daughter is about to become the Dragon Emperor, and the mother is the great elder—Will the holy dragons that have ruled the Dragon Kingdom for many years be completely replaced by the fairy dragons?

The reason why Pagris took the initiative to propose the handover of the throne was also helpless. Zola’s strength had shocked everyone, and there was an even more unfathomable man behind her. In terms of courage, means, and strategy, it could be called terrifying, as could be seen from the incident where the other party fooled the Holy Church and Raphael. As long as there was ‘Richard’ support, Meria and her daughter would soon be able to firmly control the entire Dragon Valley in their hands.

“Hold on!” Before Zola could answer, Meria spoke first and walked in front of her daughter, “Zola, I’m also astonished by your strength, but I feel more proud in my heart. For a mother, even a little growth of my child will fill me with hope and comfort. However, as the great elder of dragons, I don’t think you are qualified for the position of Dragon Emperor. Apart from strength factors, you are stubborn and love freedom. You don’t know how to adapt, are not good at dealing with people, and control the overall situation… Simply put, with your current ability, you don’t have the quality of a ruler at all. It’s even more impossible for you to do better than Royal Majesty Pagris! Hence, as the great elder, I am the first to oppose you as Dragon Emperor.”

Meria’s tone was stern and sincere. It was definitely not a fake. The elders couldn’t help whispering. Pagris seemed to have a complicated mood in his mind. All of a sudden, admiration, gratitude, and shame mixed together.

Pagris had always been afraid of Meria’s power and prestige. Last time when she supported the promotion of Stanwell, he already wanted to push Meria down from power or even put her in confinement or exile her. Later, Meria took advantage of her son-in-law ‘Richard’ to pull back the disadvantage in one fell swoop. She also cleverly dispersed the power of the great elder to retreat in order to advance. Consequently, she was re-trusted and reused by Pagris. However, deep in Pagris’ heart, he had never really let go of his fear. Meria was probably also aware of this.

However, at this most critical moment, Meria’s response greatly exceeded Pagris’ expectations. At the same time, she convinced him as well. Pagris finally understood why Meria was able to gain the respect and trust of so many dragons. This was a true, competent, and irreplaceable great elder.

Facing the righteous mother, Zola was stunned, “Who said I want to be Dragon Emperor?”

Pagris was also taken aback, “You don’t want to be the ruler of the Dragon Valley?”

Zola looked at Meria, then at Chen Rui, and her glasses flickered, “I never thought about replacing anyone, now and in the future. Mommy is right, you are the most suitable king. No one can do better than you. I just want to make it clear that my husband is not lying and… we want the golden dragon saliva flower.”

(Hmph, what’s so good about the throne? I don’t care at all!)

(Take the 3 empresses as an example. Catherine, Shea, and Tiffany are busy with state affairs every day. Even Shea, who is the closest, can barely see Chen Rui once a month unless he goes to see her.)

(I’m in the Rainbow Valley. I can see him whenever I want!)

Zola was not stupid. Not only did she explain her choice, but she also clearly expressed her support for Pagris in her words. Pagris finally relaxed and nodded slightly to Meria and Zola.

This kind of nod seemed casual, but Meria felt Pagris’ unprecedented sincerity. From then on, there was no barrier between the Dragon Emperor and the great elder. She smiled and said nothing at the moment.

Zola was indeed not a qualified ruler, but many things could be learned from scratch; however, Meria had been the great elder for many years and had seen too many open and secret means. As a mother, she hoped that her daughter could be happy and free.

“However, the golden dragon saliva flower…” Pagris sighed, “Zola, your ‘pursuit’ makes me feel lucky and regretful. If that’s the case, okay, I’ll call Sophia over now.”

“Wait a minute.” Meria frowned, “Zola, if you really want to get the golden dragon saliva flower, I hope you can get it with the consent of Her Highness Sophia without relying on power.”

Zola nodded, “ En , let’s go to Aunt Sophia now. Your Majesty, is it okay?”

Pagris glanced at Meria gratefully, “Of course, Sophia is at the White Jade Palace at the Holy Spirit Summit. Stanwell, you will lead Elder Zola and the 3 guests.”

“As ordered.” Stanwell held back the trembling in his heart as he came in front of the 4 of them.

Chen Rui turned his head to Pagris, “I was really impatient just now. If there’s any offense, please accept my apology as a friend.”

This was a world where strength was paramount. Zola had demonstrated the overwhelming strength of the Pseudo-God peak stage. ‘Richard’ was even stronger than Zola and could defeat Raphael. In terms of the entire main plane, he was definitely the peak existence just below God. Being able to get the kindness of such a peerless powerhouse was absolutely beneficial to the Dragon Valley.

Dragon Emperor Pagris didn’t dare to neglect as he stood up and said, “If Sir Richard is willing, the Dragon Valley will always be sir’s friend.”

Chen Rui nodded and said to Stanwell, “Please lead the way.”

Stanwell bowed. Under the watchful eyes of everyone, he led Chen Rui and the others toward the outside of the hall.

chapters.title: Chapter 1181: Sophia
chapters.body:
Chapter 1181: Sophia

Chen Rui and the 3 others followed Stanwell out of the palace. Zola thought about it and asked, “Elder Stanwell, there is something I want to ask you.”

“Please speak.” Stanwell looked extremely respectful. Zola was no ordinary elder, but someone whose strength was far superior to the Royal Majesty Dragon Emperor. She deserved to be the number one person in the Dragon Valley, not to mention that there was a man with unfathomable power who actually defeated Raphael!

If that ‘brother-in-law’ at the beginning came true… Stanwell secretly smiled bitterly, but Loraine had a very bad impression of ‘Richard’, let alone whether the other party would like his sister. He also couldn’t do it if he were to sell his sister for glory.

Zola didn’t know the unconstrained thinking in Stanwell’s mind. She just asked, “Why did my mommy Meria make such a request just now? Also, when Royal Majesty Pagris mentioned Aunt Sophia and the golden dragon saliva flower, he seemed weird. What’s the story behind it ?”

“There is indeed an unspeakable secret here.” Stanwell nodded, “Elder Zola, after you escaped marriage back then, uh … it has been more than 20,000 years since you left the Dragon Valley to train, so of course you don’t know what happened in the Dragon Valley during this time. In fact… it was during this time that a very unfortunate event befell Your Highness Sophia.”

“Unfortunate event?”

Stanwell sighed and spoke.

In fact, although Zola’s departure made Elder Pelin ashamed, this incident did not cause much follow-up reaction, because soon afterward, the Dragon Valley reported the good news that Queen Sophia was pregnant. It was quite difficult for dragons to conceive, not to mention that Pagris and Sophia were both super powerhouses, which was a great joy for the holy dragon family and the Dragon Valley. That child was likely to become the next Dragon Emperor. Compared to Zola’s escaping marriage, it seemed insignificant. Only Span and Meria were anxiously looking for the missing Zola.

Sophia, who was a mommy for the first time, was very excited. She made a lot of baby clothes and toys by herself. She also found the rarest golden dragon saliva flower with all effort. She carefully planted it as a future gift for her child.

Dragon Emperor Pagris, who was still at the peak stage of the Demi-God at that time, unexpectedly got a glimpse of the way to condense the Pseudo-Godhood. It could be described as double happiness. Pagris immediately chose to train behind closed doors. Anyway, the dragon descendants would take a long time from pregnancy to birth. It could be a few years at the earliest. Otherwise, 10 years, 100 years or even longer.

However, in the third year of Pagris closed-door training, a major event happened in the Dragon Valley. An elder of the holy dragon named Regner took advantage of Dragon Emperor’s closed-door training and Great Elder Meria searching for her daughter and launched a coup.

This coup was not an ordinary power struggle, but a terrifying battle to control and even destroy the entire Dragon Valley. Regner was the fallen one who had been infected by evil forces— This was exactly the same as what happened in the Jade Forest Sea back then. The culprit behind it was the Abyss.

In the fierce battle, Sophia was seriously injured and almost died. Fortunately, Meria rushed back in time after hearing the news, rescued Sophia, and led the remaining dragons to resist Regner and the fallen one. At this time, Pagris finally succeeded in advancing to the Pseudo-God and got out of the training. He killed Regner and the rebellion in one fell swoop to settle the catastrophe. It was a pity that although Sophia’s life was saved, the little life in her belly was annihilated.

Pagris was infuriated about this. During the siege against the Cloud Rider Empire, which was infected by the Abyss forces, Pagris did not care about the ‘Demi-God contract’ that restricted the super powerhouse to attack ordinary people and destroyed 7 cities in a row. Later, it was Gabriel of the Holy Church who stopped Pagris.

Sophia couldn’t take the loss of her baby and she almost collapsed. During those days, she didn’t eat or drink as she just guarded the golden dragon saliva flower that she originally prepared for her child and cried.

In the following years, the golden dragon saliva flower became Sophia’s last sustenance. She took care of it as her own child until now.

After Stanwell finished speaking, Chen Rui fell silent for a moment. Unexpectedly, there was a story about this golden longan flower. For Sophia, it was no longer a simple plant, but a child, and the sustenance of all longing and maternal love.

No wonder Pagris would reject his ‘any exchange’. No wonder Meria would still make such a request after Zola showed the strength of Pseudo-God peak stage.

Alice’s eyes were red. She lost her mother when she was very young, and she didn’t even leave any impression in her mind. She could only vaguely outline it from her sister’s description. Now that she heard about Sophia, she couldn’t hold back her tears.

Zola held Chen Rui’s hand tightly, inexplicably thinking of the sadness and anxiety of her parents after she ran away from home. Meanwhile, Lalaria, who was calm and composed when she faced the Dragon Emperor just now, also lowered her head in silence.

After a while, they had already arrived at the White Jade Palace.

The palace looked much simpler than expected. There was not a single guard or maid. Pagris and Sophia were a couple who went through difficulties together. Although he had married other wives, the position of queen had never changed. The reason why the White Jade Palace was like this was because after that unfortunate incident, Sophia dismissed all the attendants and stayed behind closed doors for many years. She just wanted to stay here alone with the golden dragon saliva flower.

However, Pagris had placed a powerful Dragon Inscription on the gate and its surroundings. Without Sophia’s permission, outsiders were generally unable to enter.

Stanwell came to the gate and spoke respectfully, “Your Highness Sophia, I’m here by the order of Royal Majesty Pagris.”

After a while, the inscription at the door disappeared. Stanwell led everyone through the door and went all the way to the garden behind the palace.

Compared with the simple facilities of the palace seen before, the garden looked lush and green. The plants planted were clearly taken care of carefully. In front was a woman with a thin face and wearing white clothes. The features of silver hair and golden eyes were precisely of the holy dragon family. Her temperament was also quite extraordinary, but the hair that should have been glowing was gray and dull. The original beauty and grace were covered by a haggard expression.

On the ground behind her, there was a half-foot-tall plant that was particularly conspicuous. Among the emerald green branches and leaves was a beautiful pale golden flower. It was full of spirituality and life force.

Golden dragon saliva flower!

The target was so close at hand. That woman was nothing more than an early stage of the Demi-God’s strength. Moreover, her combat power had obviously declined greatly, not to mention Chen Rui or Zola, even Lalaria could easily take it, but the 3 of them did not move. It was not only because of Meria’s order previously, but mostly because of the story Stanwell told.

“Your Highness Sophia.” Stanwell bowed. Sophia had saved his life back then. Although Stanwell’s strength had slightly surpassed Sophia, he still maintained respect from the bottom of his heart every time he met her.

“Elder Stanwell.” Sophia bowed back as she looked at Chen Rui and the others, “May I know what His Majesty wants you to convey?”

Stanwell hesitated for a moment before he finally gritted his teeth and said, “As per His Majesty’s order…”

Without waiting for Stanwell to continue, Chen Rui interrupted suddenly, “It’s just that we, the uninvited guests, want to pay a visit to Your Highness Sophia.”

“This is ……”

“Aunt Sophia, do you still remember me?” Zola said, “I’m Zola from the Rainbow Summit. I remember when I was young, you often took me to the mountains to get bamboo shoots and watch the rainbow after the rain.”

“You’re Elder Meria’s daughter, Zola?” Sophia showed a surprised expression, “As I remember, didn’t you leave the Dragon Valley back then? It seems to be to escape marriage…”

Stanwell said, “ Uh … Your Highness Sophia, Elder Zola has returned to the Dragon Valley a few years ago. Royal Majesty Pagris also officiated the wedding for her.”

“Elder?” Sophia looked even more surprised.

“Elder Zola was praised by His Majesty as the Dragon Valley top genius…” Stanwell paused, and he did not mention the title of ‘top powerhouse’.

“It’s good that you can come back safely. Welcome home, Zola.” Sophia smiled slightly, “I’m sorry, Auntie hasn’t left here these years, nor have I participated in any activities, so I couldn’t attend your wedding.”

When Sophia said so, Zola felt even more guilty. She quickly shook her head to express that it was okay.

“By the way, these people are…”

“This Sir Richard is the husband of Elder Zola, this Her Highness Lalaria is the next Dragon Emperor of the Demon Realm, and this Princess Alice is the lord and first princess of the largest estate of the Demon Realm.”

These few words reveal a lot of information. Sophia couldn’t help being even more surprised: Zola’s husband? Stanwell’s attitude seems to be extremely respectful? And… the next Dragon Emperor of the Demon Realm? The lord of the largest estate of the Demon Realm? They are all little girls?

The Demon Realm… How did they all come to the Dragon Valley? Then Zola’s husband must be related to the Demon Realm, or maybe he is someone with a great background. Surprisingly, Pagris would agree to this kind of marriage and officiate the wedding himself?

Chen Rui nodded to Sophia, “I usually do a lot of research on plants. I heard that Your Highness Sophia also has the same interest. So I brought my 2 younger sisters to visit the White Jade Palace with Zola. Please forgive me for being presumptuous.”

Sophia looked at Zola, then at Chen Rui, then she nodded, “Sir Richard also likes plants?”

Chen Rui nodded, and a colorful mist loomed in his hand. Several plants have appeared on the ground, and they were actually ‘planted’ directly in the soil as if they were meant to be in this garden.

“This is the blue papyrus, and this is the magic grenade sapling…”

“These plants are all special varieties of the Demon Realm.” Sophia took a deep look at Chen Rui, “It’s simply magical. Storage equipment can’t store such vibrant plants. Could this be… Pseudo-God’s sub-kingdom power?”

Chen Rui felt the implicit meaning in Sophia’s gaze. The Royal Highness Queen is obviously a very smart woman. She has vaguely inferred my level of strength from Stanwell’s respectful attitude, and she has not been diverted by the power of the colorful garden. I’m afraid our intentions can’t be concealed…

Sophia’s eyes were fixed on Stanwell who seemed a bit reserved. She was silent for a moment, then she asked sadly, “Is it his order?”

There was a hint of sadness in this voice. Stanwell didn’t dare to meet Sophia’s eyes as he lowered his head, “Yes.”

Sophia sighed, “The one who released that powerful breath just now must be this Sir Richard. Even in this corner full of inscriptions and isolated from the world, I can clearly feel the coercion that overrides everything. Only the golden dragon saliva flower can attract such a powerhouse to a small place like mine.”

Stanwell bowed his head and said, “Actually, it was Elder Zola who released that kind of power breath.”

Sophia was startled as she looked at Zola in surprise, then she smiled wryly, “I didn’t expect that the little girl back then has grown into such a powerhouse. With your strength, even if you don’t force Pagris to abdicate, it is easy to get this dragon saliva flower. “

“I’m sorry, Aunt Sophia.” Zola felt even more sorrow in her heart.

“Then…” Sophia’s body suddenly trembled slightly, “Take it away.”

These few words almost exhausted Sophia’s last strength. Her whole body seemed to be crumbling.
