chapters.title: Chapter 1182: Soul
chapters.body:
Chapter 1182: Soul

“Brother…” Seeing Sophia’s appearance, Alice, who was always sad in her heart, couldn’t help crying, “Let’s think of a way and see if there are such flowers in other places!”

“Dragon saliva flower is the companion plant of the dragons. Only…” Lalaria said half a sentence, and she couldn’t continue anymore.

“We really can’t just take this dragon saliva flower away.” Chen Rui withdrew his hand, quietly released the colorful mist, and took a deep breath, “Its life force is not the strongest, but the meaning of ‘life’ contained in it surpasses any plant I have ever seen. Your Highness Sophia should be watering it with true love and soul these years. If we take it away like this, Your Highness Sophia’s soul and life may collapse at any time.”

The galaxy garden could indeed transplant this dragon saliva flower, but Chen Rui faintly sensed something abnormal, so he didn’t do anything immediately.

“Then, Athena and the unborn child…” Zola couldn’t help but say something as she herself was in a dilemma now.

“Child?” This word shocked Sophia, “The reason why you need this flower is…”

“It’s Athena, brother’s pregnant wife…” Alice wiped away her tears.

Although Alice’s spoke intermittently with a sobbing tone, Sophia had already understood the outline of the matter, so she couldn’t help but look at Chen Rui a few more times. It turns out that it is for his wife and unborn child.

When mentioning the child, Sophia couldn’t help thinking of her own experience, so her eyes turned red, “Sir Richard, if this golden dragon saliva flower can really help your wife and unborn child, please…”

“Your Highness Sophia…” Chen Rui looked at Sophia excitedly. He could sense Sophia’s mood was not because of the disparity in strength or threats, but out of true love and true kindness. Just because she had suffered misfortune, she hoped to prevent others from such misfortune. For this reason, she did not hesitate to sacrifice her greatest sustenance. This alone was worthy of respect.

“It has nothing to do with strength. First of all, please accept my most sincere gratitude as a husband and a father.” Chen Rui bowed deeply to Sophia, but she did not take the golden dragon saliva flower immediately. Instead, he observed carefully for a while.

“Your Highness Sophia, I would like to ask a question that may upset you, but please answer me. Were you around the golden dragon saliva flower all the time when… your baby died? “

Sophia recalled her memory, “At that time, even when I was recuperating on the White Jade Palace bed, I was praying to the Dragon God, but unfortunately… Since then, I have treated this dragon plant, which was originally intended to be a gift to Avril, as her…”

With that said, Sophia covered her face while sobbing.

Chen Rui didn’t express much emotion this time, but he focused on the golden dragon saliva flower. Zola saw that his expression was a little strange, and she asked, “What’s wrong?”

“Do you have any special feelings?”

Zola looked at the golden dragon saliva flower for a while, then she shook her head, “No…”

“It may be my illusion, or it may be…” Chen Rui narrowed his eyes, “You go to their side first.”

Zola nodded. All of a sudden, purple starlight shone from Chen Rui’s body. A boundless breath enveloped the entire garden in an instant.

Stanwell, who was far away, felt as if he was in stormy waves. All his senses were lost. He could only faintly feel an instinctive fear from his soul.

The power of this star… That’s right, it’s the one he launched in the face of Raphael last time!

Compared with the last time, the power breath this time is more than 1000 times stronger!

This trembling feeling even surpassed the level when Zola released her breath just now!

Pagris and the elders of the dragons in the palace at the peak of Holy Spirit Peak also felt it. Pagris was shocked again – Another powerful breath! Not Zola’s, but…

What Zola said is indeed true! That Richard’s strength is even above her!

However, why did this terrifying powerhouse release breath in the White Jade Palace? Could it be Sophia…

As soon as Pagris thought of this, he couldn’t sit still anymore. His figure flickered, and he disappeared from the throne.

Meanwhile, Stanwell’s pressure suddenly disappeared, because he had been pulled over by Zola’s power. With the fairy dragon’s protection, Sophia and others were no longer oppressed by Chen Rui’s momentum.

Once upon a time, Stanwell thought about seeking revenge from ‘Richard’ after his strength improved, but he found it funny now. This wish would never be realized. He could only look up at that figure.

A strange cluster of nebula appeared behind Chen Rui. The moment this cluster of nebula appeared, the feeling of ‘death’ emerged in everyone’s mind, including the Dragon Emperor Pagris who had already shifted over.

Pagris even had a feeling that if he faced this kind of ‘death’, he might not be able to escape even if he tried his best!

The feeling of ‘death’ disappeared immediately. Chen Rui put away the power of [All Star Gods View] and finally nodded, “It really has a sense. This emotion is no longer pure ‘fear’.”

Zola finally understood, “You mean, this dragon saliva flower…”

“Yes, it already has a real soul.”

“Soul!” Sophia was taken aback and immediately responded, “Avril!”

“This trace of soul power is very thin. If it weren’t for my special sense of life and faith, I would have almost overlooked it. As for whether it is the Avril mentioned by Your Highness, I’m not sure.” Chen Rui had another sentence that he didn’t say: Since this was a separate soul, once it was collected with the galaxy garden, that soul would be completely obliterated and become the ordinary golden dragon saliva flower.

“It must be Avril! My child!” Sophia couldn’t believe it. Feeling that the hope that had been extinguished for many years was rekindled. She burst into tears, “Please, save her!”

Chen Rui frowned and said nothing. Alice couldn’t help but speak up, “Brother, please help Her Highness Sophia.”

“Don’t worry, he’s just thinking.” Zola patted Alice’s shoulder and nodded to Pagris behind her.

“This soul is too weak, so I’m not sure. Let’s try it first.” A silver-white goblet appeared in Chen Rui’s hand. This cup was engraved with a pair of wings, exuding a soft and peaceful shine.

Pagris was a person who recognized good items. He was slightly shocked, “Holy Grail!”

This cup was indeed Holy Grail, 1 of the 3 holy relics of light. Holy Grail had the special power of [Holy Soul], which could warm and nourish the damaged soul entity in Holy Grail until it recovered. The recovery time depended on the degree of damage to the soul entity. One could also speed up the recovery speed by sacrificing the power of light during this period.

Pagris only noticed the Holy Grail, but he didn’t see the ring on Chen Rui’s hand, which was 1 of the 7 artifacts, Bloody Ring.

Chen Rui looked at the golden dragon saliva flower carefully, hesitated for a moment, and put away the Holy Grail and Bloody Ring again. It was not because he was afraid of what would happen by activating the 7 artifacts, but because he was really not sure.

His original idea was to use the power of the Bloody Ring to draw out the soul from the dragon saliva flower, then use the Holy Grail to nourish it. Both Veronica and Python are beneficiaries of the Holy Grail, but even Veronica’s soul that was about to dissipate at the beginning was much clearer and stronger than the current one on the golden dragon saliva flower. Once the extraction fails, the soul will completely disappear. Judging from the current situation, the chance of failure is very high.

Chen Rui thought for a while, and a force full of vitality appeared in his hands. The plants in the entire garden seemed to be full of vitality in an instant, and even the withered grass in the corner reappeared green. The golden dragon saliva flower was no exception. This was [Spring Territory] which was fused with Nirvana power. Part of the life force of the golden dragon saliva flower that faded under the fear of ‘death’ might had been fully restored, but in terms of soul, there were still no substantive changes.

The breath in Chen Rui’s hands had changed again. This was a breath different from the previous ‘life’. As the powerhouse at the intermediate stage of the Pseudo-God, Pagris could sense the purity and profundity of this power. Seeing new plants emerge one after another under Chen Rui’s feet which then sprouted and even blossomed at an incredible rate, Pagris finally determined what this power was. He exclaimed, “Creation law!”

“Creation origin law.” Zola corrected him.

Origin power! Pagris was stunned. Could it be the Book of Creation? This is why ‘Richard’ tried his best to sneak into the Holy Light Mountain and fight Raphael?

In fact, Dragon Emperor only guessed a small part of the truth. He didn’t expect that Chen Rui had already been a ‘regular visitor’ to the White Cliff.

“It still doesn’t work…” Chen Rui shook his head and drew a rune in the air with his fingers. Pagris recognized a part of it was the Dragon Inscription. It was actually so precise and perfect. Whether it was the ease of drawing or the attainments of the inscription, it was all above him, the Dragon Emperor!

Dragon Inscription was only a small part. The main body was ancient runes. The 2 were mixed together to form an esoteric novel that even Pagris could not understand. The runes scattered around the golden dragon saliva flower. All of a sudden, the power of the Dragon Inscription stored for tens of thousands of years in the entire White Jade Palace was drained by the rune array around the dragon saliva flower.

This power was originally extremely thick. If it penetrated directly into the dragon saliva flower, it would explode in an instant, but under the action of the inscription array, the majestic power was filtered, purified, and decomposed, and then gently wrapped around the dragon saliva flower, strengthening it bit by bit.

“Its soul power is too weak now. Let’s wait a few days and see.” The starlight on Chen Rui disappeared.

Pagris learned the outline of the matter from Stanwell’s whispered report. Although he found it unbelievable or even absurd, with the powerful strength shown by Chen Rui and Zola, plus the Dragon Emperor himself had agreed in the palace hall before, the 2 taking away the dragon saliva flower was just a matter of effort. There was absolutely no need to go to such lengths to deceive Sophia.

It seems that there is really hope…

“Thank you, sir!” Sophia bowed Chen Rui deeply.

“I can’t guarantee success, but I will definitely do my best.”

This matter was quite troublesome. 1 mistake, and the soul attached to the dragon saliva flower would disappear. It was a thankless work. Chen Rui did not have to do this, he just needed to take the dragon saliva flower and leave, but he chose to help Sophia.

It was not for anything else, just for the love and hope of a mother. Sophia reminded Chen Rui of himself when he lost Duoduo, so he decided to do it.

“Sir Richard.” Pagris also said, “Regardless of success or failure, please accept my sincerest thanks.”

Chen Rui nodded to Pagris, “Although I have set up the rune array, I need to cast spells and observe regularly every day, so I will stay in the Dragon Valley these days. However, my coming to the human world this time has something to do with the safety of my wife and my child. Therefore, the time is limited, so I need Your Majesty to help me find the things on this list. I hope to get them together as much as possible. The price is not a problem.”

Pagris took the list from Chen Rui and looked at it, “Some things are really rare, but please rest assured. I will mobilize all the power and connections of the Dragon Valley to do this. There is no need to worry about the cost, sir. Take it as my gratitude.”

“Thank you.”

TL: Shouldn’t he ask Python, the soul expert herself?

chapters.title: Chapter 1183: The Power Of The Dragon Island Scourge
chapters.body:
Chapter 1183: The Power Of The Dragon Island Scourge

Dragon Valley.

The garden gate of the White Jade Palace.

Alice poked her head out secretly while looking at the back of the woman who was arranging flowers and plants with her head down.

Sophia paused, “Princess Alice?”

Alice, who was discovered, stuck out her tongue and walked out, “Your Highness Sophia.”

In the past few days, Alice followed Chen Rui to the White Jade Palace every day, and she became more and more familiar with Sophia.

Sophia stood up, “Your Highness is here so early today. Have a seat in the lobby first, I’ll get you some snacks.”

Alice quickly said, “No need, Your Highness Sophia. I want to help you tidy up the garden together, is it okay?”

Sophia was slightly taken aback, then she nodded, “Okay.”

Alice jumped over happily and began to help Sophia tidy up. Although she initially made things worse, she quickly adapted to it. After working for a while, her face was covered with sweat.

Sophia took out a towel and wiped Alice’s face. Then, she suddenly saw that Alice’s eye sockets were red. Sophia was taken aback, but thinking of Alice’s actions these days, out of a woman’s sensitivity, she soon understood something. So, she gently hugged Alice in her arms.

Chen Rui didn’t know that Alice had already gone to the White Jade Palace alone. This morning when Zola and him were training, Zola had further comprehended the power of the peak stage of the Pseudo-God. Now she was in closed-door training. Chen Rui didn’t disturb her and ended his training. He walked out of the Rainbow Summit and met Stanwell, “Sir Richard, the materials you need are basically gathered. Some of them haven’t arrived in the Dragon Valley yet; they are probably on their way. At present, only rainbow calla lilies and ice fungus are missing. These 2 plants are very rare. It is said that there is a small amount of it in the Jade Forest Sea, but the elf tribe is currently preparing for the once-a-century New Moon Festival. In the following few months, unless it’s a specially invited guest, the elves won’t see any outsiders…”

“The following few months?” Chen Rui frowned, “I see. Thank you.”

Because of the golden dragon saliva flower in the White Jade Palace, Chen Rui decided to stay in the Dragon Valley temporarily, entrusting the material collection to Dragon Emperor Pagris. Now it seemed that this unintentional move was really a wise move. The Dragon Valley was only a piece of land in the entire human world, but the reputation of dragons had spread to almost every corner. Especially after the ‘debut’ of new inventions such as magic games and magic phones, their influence had grown even further. In just a few days, the materials on the list were basically gathered through various channels. If it were Chen Rui himself, even if he used the power of the Dragon Bright Empire, it would be impossible to have this effect.

As for the rainbow calla lilies and ice fungus, it was impossible for Chen Rui to wait a few months. After the matter in the Dragon Valley was resolved, he would go to the Jade Forest Sea himself. Apart from getting these 2 materials, Chen Rui also wanted to go meet the Legendary Prophet Alucier of the elf tribe as it was time to unravel some of the mysteries.

Regardless of strength, the New Moon Festival of the elf tribe will not stop me. Nevertheless, I still have the identity of the Elf King. Didn’t the elf prophet entrust Finoia to let me keep the Tree of Nature despite ‘overdue’? If I do not get a satisfactory answer, I will simply return the Tree of Nature, which seems fishy, to the elf tribe!

Thinking of this, Chen Rui’s frowning eased. Seeing Stanwell’s hesitation, he asked, “What? Is there anything else?”

“Yes, no! Uhm …”

“Get to the point, Elder Stanwell. Or I’m going to the White Jade Palace right now.”

Stanwell was appointed as the liaison officer. Leaving aside the power of Chen Rui, the identities of Lalaria and Alice were extraordinary, so Stanwell, the confidant elder, was responsible for the reception on behalf of Pagris. He immediately said, “Actually, I don’t know how to put it in words It’s about Royal Highness Lalaria. When she’s in the Dragon Valley these days…”

“Did she cause trouble?” Chen Rui was taken aback. Lalaria was the black dragon of the Demon Realm. Although Pagris had given the order, there was no guarantee that the dragons of the Dragon Valley would not have strong hostility toward her. According to Alice, Lalaria didn’t go back to the Rainbow Summit at all. She just wandered around the Dragon Valley. Maybe she caused some conflict.

“I don’t know how to describe it.” Stanwell sighed, “Anyway, as the liaison officer, my door is almost smashed by those complaining guys recently.”

“The complaining guys?” Chen Rui showed an unexpected expression. He suddenly thought of some powerful attribute of Lalaria, and he asked tentatively, “Do those people… have daughters?”

Stanwell nodded with a wry smile. Chen Rui was suddenly speechless… No doubt!

Chen Rui felt something was wrong again. Lalaria has not been in the Dragon Valley for long, and she is a dragon from another opposing world. How could it be possible in such a short time…

Before he could think about it, the sound of a lot of crystal coins falling came from Stanwell——the ringtone of the magic phone.

Compared with the weird ringtone, what attracted Chen Rui’s attention was the sound from the phone.

“The Gold Brilliance Plaza?” Chen Rui had already heard what was said on the phone. Before Stanwell could speak, he nodded, “I’ll go and have a look.”

Gold Brilliance Plaza.

This was 1 of the 2 major plazas in the Dragon Valley. Even for the huge original bodies of dragons, this was a fairly wide plaza. Now there was already a circle of dragons in the plaza. Some were transformed into human form whereas some maintained the dragon form. Most of these dragons were women, but there were also many men. They all had 1 characteristic in common – young.

In the center of this circle of dragons was a short, flat figure that looked familiar. She was standing on a sculpture, letting out impassioned voices.

…

We are young people.

We sometimes despise the order of things.

Snort at the so-called conformist.

We also fail; even get frustrated and cry.

Because we are young.

Many of us live under the shadow of our parents and grandparents.

A slight mistake or failure, you will shame so-and-so!

The achievements or heights you have achieved are all ‘should’ be achieved!

Not what you ‘want’ to achieve!

Everyone and I know it clearly, even better than those old guys!

Our hearts long for a change!

No need for obedience!

No need for surrender!

No need to suffer!

Maybe we’ll be seen as rebels, being laughed at and fooled…

Perhaps we will suffer more setbacks.

But we will never give up our courage.

Because we are young!

We have the faith to get up again.

We have young blood that the old guys don’t have!

One day, we will get our wish!

One day we’ll surprise those old guys!

One day, when we introduce our names, it will be our sonorous real name, not the ‘child of so-and-so’!

After saying this, all the dragons around excitedly raised their arms and shouted, “Lalaria! Lalaria!”

Chen Rui was dumbfounded. This is not flirting, but a speech, a very provocative speech! Unexpectedly, this lesbian loli, who just messes around, loves to renege on debts, and plays hooligans, has such abilities!

Lalaria laughed, jumped down, and wrapped her arms around the waist of the nearest girl. She suddenly leaned forward and gave a wet kiss. The surrounding dragons were not surprised. Instead, many dragons girls screamed, “Madam Lalaria is so handsome!”

“ Oh Hohoho …” Lalaria let go of the blushing girl, put her hands on her hips, and let out a trademark laugh.

For a moment, the surrounding dragons all imitated Lalaria’s posture and tone as they laughed loudly. The loud and strange laughter resounded over the entire plaza, “ Oh Hohoho …”

Chen Rui broke out in a cold sweat. He finally understood why Lalaria was called the biggest scourge of Dragon Island.

It’s not just as simple as seducing a girl from a good family!

If these dragons listening to speeches in the plaza are compared to a cult, then Lalaria is the absolute cult leader!

In just a few days, Lalaria successfully got a ‘team’!

What’s even more bizarre is that this is the base camp of opposing dragons!

As expected of being the next Dragon Emperor of Dragon Island. Chen Rui was ashamed of himself in terms of this provocative force.

No wonder Stanwell’s house door would be smashed by those parents…

Chen Rui thought for a while, but he didn’t go up to stop Lalaria. He let her enjoy the pleasure of the ‘cult leader’ in the end. Anyway, it won’t take long to find all the materials, then I will bring Lalaria back to the Demon Realm. As soon as the ‘cult leader’ left, the ‘religious members’ will naturally dismiss.

Right now, I’d better go to the White Jade Palace first. Calculating the time, the effect of the rune array should have been completely absorbed in the past few days. Once it is done, I can try to extract the soul of the golden dragon saliva flower.

Chen Rui bypassed the Gold Brilliance Plaza and came to the Holy Spirit Summit.

Entering the White Jade Palace, he saw Alice sitting beside Sophia and talking. The relationship between the 2 seemed very close. Even Sophia couldn’t help showing a rare smile on her haggard face.

“Brother!” Alice saw Chen Rui and rushed to meet him.

“Alice, why did you come here alone? Did you cause trouble for Her Highness Sophia?”

“ Hmph !” Alice said angrily, “Who is causing trouble?! I even helped Aunt Sophia tidy up the garden!”

Chen Rui noticed Alice’s address: Aunt?

In terms of age, Sophia is probably older than Alice’s parents, but I have a fairy dragon wife who is more than 20,000 years old… Okay, this is not the point.

Sophia had already stood up and bowed, “Sir Richard, Alice is very quick in doing things, which helps me a lot. I like her very much.”

Judging from Sophia’s title and attitude, the relationship between the 2 parties seemed to be getting closer. Chen Rui smiled, “That’s good, let’s go see the golden dragon saliva flower.”

The 3 of them went straight to the garden behind the hall. Chen Rui carefully observed the inscription formation around the golden dragon saliva flower that had almost been entirely absorbed, and he nodded, “Your Highness Sophia, the absorption of the dragon saliva flower is faster than imagined. I originally thought that it would only be done tomorrow, but now it seems to be almost done. However, let me be honest with you first. Although this dragon saliva flower has absorbed so much power, the soul power is still too weak. My confidence…”

After these days, Sophia had already made some mental preparations, “Sir Richard has already done what you can. Please do your best and don’t think about other things.”

chapters.title: Chapter 1184: Life
chapters.body:
Chapter 1184: Life

Chen Rui walked in front of the golden dragon saliva flower, and a purple starlight flickered on his body. He activated the [Pole Star Transformation]. While waving his hands, he drew mysterious star marks out of thin air. Countless runes flew out of the ground. All the light was absorbed into the dragon saliva flower, forming a translucent golden vase made of pure energy, wrapping the dragon saliva flower in it.

At this time, the Bloody Ring had appeared on Chen Rui’s finger, and the Holy Grail appeared in the other hand. The ‘golden vase’ wrapping the dragon saliva flower began to release a trace of thin golden light upward. This trace of golden light was not directly absorbed into the Bloody Ring or Holy Grail, but under the control of Chen Rui’s star power, it entered the Bloody Ring bit by bit while being nurtured by the Holy Grail.

The Bloody Ring began to emit a faint light. Chen Rui was still extremely cautious in the [Pole Star Transformation]. Because the soul left by the dragon saliva flower was too weak, even if it was nurtured by the power of the Dragon Inscription during this period, it was still very fragile.

This process was like a pair of huge hands holding a small knife to perform micro-surgery, so it should not be rushed. If he was not careful, the soul would be annihilated. This was why Chen Rui didn’t dare to do it rashly last time.

Time passed by second by second.

It was the first time Chen Rui did such a high-precision operation in the form of [Pole Star Transformation]. This operation might bring him more experience in using Star Power in the future, but now he didn’t think about anything. He put all his mind on the golden dragon saliva flower.

Several times the golden light almost went out, but he tried his best to stabilize it. Sophia and Alice on the side were affected by the tense atmosphere. Sophia clenched her sweaty palms. Alice didn’t even dare to look. She just crossed her hands and lowered her head to pray.

It was finally coming to an end, but this last stage was also the most difficult stage. Sweat was already oozing from Chen Rui’s forehead and the tip of his nose. When the golden light trembled suddenly, Chen Rui hurriedly increased his power output.

At this moment, Lalaria’s laughter came from outside, “ Oh Hohoho …”

The golden light trembled again, and it quickly became dim. Even cracks began to appear on the ‘golden vase’ condensed by the inscription. Chen Rui blurted out, “No!”

Just as Lalaria walked into the garden, she saw this scene. She was shocked, and her laughter stopped abruptly.

The golden vase burst open suddenly, turned into powder and dissipated in the air. The golden light disappeared at the same time.

“So… sorry!” Lalaria was dumbfounded. Originally, the lesbian dragon, who was supported by many ‘believers’ in the Gold Brilliance Plaza, was high-spirited and wanted to find Alice and Chen Rui to show off, but she unexpectedly ruined the most important matter — Didn’t Chen Rui say that the extraction of soul will start tomorrow?

Chen Rui knew well that it had nothing to do with Lalaria. Before she came, the soul of the golden dragon saliva flower was already showing signs of collapse.

This scene caused Sophia to lose her support immediately, and she fell limply to the ground. She just stared at the golden dragon saliva flower obsessively. She even lost the strength to shed tears. Although it was still the same flower, she could clearly feel that it had lost the initial special breath of life.

Alice was still praying. Her hands clasped even tighter with tears welling up from her closed eyes.

Chen Rui felt the soul dissipating in Holy Grail and Bloody Ring. He sighed secretly and lowered his head. He had tried his best.

Suddenly, Chen Rui eyes widened as he sensed something. When he raised his head, he saw the golden light shining again above Alice!

At the same time, the voice of prayer became melodious and ethereal. Even though the strength of the people present was far superior to Alice, there was still a feeling of turmoil in their minds. Alice’s body exuded clusters of soft and warm lights. Under the influence of the light, the golden light began to shine more and more.

This scene surprised both Sophia and Lalaria. Chen Rui raised the Holy Grail and Bloody Ring without thinking. This time it was actually unprecedentedly smooth!

The breath on Alice’s body became stronger and stronger. Chen Rui was moved: Faith power!

That’s right, it’s faith, and it’s so pure and powerful . Chen Rui’s consciousness had already sensed the changes in the Super System. He informed Lalaria and entered the Super System.

When Chen Rui came to the Tower of Faith in the Galaxy Divinity Temple, he found that Veronica was already there. Beside Veronica, there was a short figure. To Chen Rui’s surprise, it was not Alice.

This was a little girl about 5 years old with silver hair and golden eyes. She had exquisite facial features as if carved out of jade. She was looking at everything around her curiously. When seeing Chen Rui, the little girl showed a fearful expression and hid behind Veronica.

Chen Rui looked at the little girl in surprise as the related information automatically appeared in his mind.

Divinity Temple Servant (Can confer star).

Soul Strength: E-

Special attribute——Heart Servant: maintains absolute awe of the controller and ends all rebelling wills. (Can cancel or bestow)

Heart Sacrifice: The controller can sacrifice or kill the servant.

Authority- Currently unavailable (Can cancel or bestow)

Ability – Currently unavailable (Can cancel or bestow.)

This girl should be…

She actually became a Divinity Temple Servant!

Veronica smiled, “I’m glad I have a new partner, but before that, you should cancel the special attribute of that ‘Heart Servant’ first so as not to scare her.”

Chen Rui nodded. He immediately canceled the coercion of the ‘Heart Servant’, then the little girl poked her head out from behind Veronica and looked at him timidly.

“What’s your name?” Chen Rui tried his best to show an amiable smile, but the little girl was startled like a scared rabbit and hid behind Veronica again.

“You don’t look like a good person at all.” Veronica smiled, squatted down, put her arms around the little girl, and whispered something softly. Then, the little girl mustered the courage to come to Chen Rui.

“Your name is Avril, right?” Chen Rui smiled at the little girl. This time, I did not scare her away. In fact, only a very small part of the little girl in front of me is the real ‘Avril’. More of it is the consciousness formed by Sophia’s longing on the dragon saliva flower. In other words, it is the ‘Avril’ imagined and conceived in Sophia’s mind. No wonder the soul power is so weak.

However, for Sophia, this is the most real Avril. Although it only has the strength of E-, it is already a complete soul.

At this time, the Tower of Faith was full of light. Chen Rui’s eyes lit up, “Alice!”

This was indeed an unexpected surprise. Alice, who had always failed to succeed, actually completed the 2-star enhancement at this time and became the 20th Goddess of the Super System!

After the Tower of Faith’s shining ended, Alice appeared in front of her eyes, “Brother!”

Chen Rui touched Alice’s head and nodded in relief.

Veronica bowed, “Congratulations, ‘Life’ Goddess Madam Alice.”

The faith controlled by Alice was ‘life’. Because of this, Avril’s soul was successfully recondensed from an incomplete and weak consciousness to a real and complete soul at the critical juncture. At the same time, she became the second God Servant of the Super System.

“You’re Sister Veronica, right? You can just call me Alice. I often heard sisters mention about you. Please take care of me in the future.” Alice wasn’t reserved and went up to hold Veronica’s arm affectionately.

Princess loli had a secret little book, which recorded all the women related to Chen Rui and the related gossip. Veronica is not only the first oracle, but also a member of the harem. I heard that she will probably become the mother of the ‘creation’ child in the future, so it is necessary to establish a good relationship in advance.

Veronica smiled and nodded, Alice took Avril’s little hand, “Great! Avril, you are fine too. Aunt Sophia will be happy.”

“Madam Alice…” Avril had a natural feeling of closeness to Alice. She did not show the slightest resistance and showed a rare smile instead.

“Call me sister.”

“Sister Alice…”

Calculated by age, Avril was N times older than Alice, but this ‘Avril’ was a newborn complete soul. If it weren’t for the power of the Dragon Inscription absorbed before, it might still be a baby image, so it was understandable for her to call Sister Alice.

“There were more believers in ‘life’ than any other kind of faith before. I have to be busy for a while now.” Veronica looked at Avril, “Avril, you go to the Galaxy Divinity Temple to have a good rest. I will teach you slowly on the future matters.”

“ En .” Avril nodded.

“Brother, let’s go out first and tell Aunt Sophia the good news!”

“OK.”

The consciousness of Chen Rui and Alice left the Super System and returned to the body at the White Jade Palace. Lalaria herself had succeeded in 2-star evolution, so she naturally understood it. She was guarding their bodies carefully and only relaxed her vigilance when Chen Rui and Alice opened their eyes.

Sophia wasn’t sure what happened, but she had a feeling in her heart that the abnormality on Alice should be a big turning point!

“Aunt Sophia!” Alice gleefully came to Sophia’s side.

Alice’s excitement rekindled hope in Sophia’s heart, “Alice, is it…”

“Your Highness Sophia, I’m very happy to tell you that we succeeded! I will explain some situations to you later. Now…” Chen Rui waved his hand, and a shadow in the air gradually became clear.

Sophia wiped her eyes vigorously before she finally confirmed that it wasn’t an illusion. Although she didn’t know how Chen Rui did it, the little girl in front of her gave her a familiar feeling. It’s the golden dragon saliva flower!

No, it’s the daughter I’ve been missing in my heart!

The little girl stared blankly at Sophia, and the 2 felt the connection from the soul at the same time. Regardless of whether Avril was a consciousness or not, they were real mother and daughter.

“Avril!” Sophia excitedly stepped forward and hugged the little girl, but her hands could only pass through the little girl as if the little girl was a shadow.

“ Um … this is what happened. She is living in my kingdom as a soul entity. At present, I can only project her with a certain time limit. I will try to resurrect her in the future.”

This sentence was not perfunctory. Python once taught Veronica the secret soul technique of reincarnation. However, Avril’s soul power was too weak to be applicable for the time being. After the soul power grew to a certain level in the future, she would look for a suitable body for her to be really resurrected.

“Thank you! Thank you!” Sophia could no longer express her gratitude in words.

“Your Highness is welcome. I’m also very grateful for the golden dragon saliva flower you provided. When I have a chance in the future, I will visit the White Jade Palace again with my wife and children.”

“I’m coming too!” Alice raised her hands to sign up.

“Of course.” Chen Rui smiled slightly. A colorful mist appeared in his hand, and he collected the golden dragon saliva flower into the galaxy garden.

This material was finally available. It also marked a successful end to the trip to the Dragon Valley.

TL: Time to unravel the mysteries in the elf tribe?

chapters.title: Chapter 756 - 756 Live Composition! 1
chapters.body:
Chapter 756 - 756 Live Composition! 1

756 Live Composition! 1

Zhou Yan almost vomited blood. “The son of your stepmother! He’s always changing his ways to disgust people.”

“Step… stepmother?”

Zhou Yan was stunned.

Xu Rendong’s confusion didn’t look like a disguise, but… he really didn’t know of the existence of Xu Xinyi and her son.

“I don’t often contact my family,” Xu Rendong said embarrassedly, “And I have two accounts, which my family doesn’t log in all year round.”

He wiped his hands and switched to his wechat account. He saw a message sent by Father Xu two years ago.

[ Are you there? I need to go home. I have something to tell you. ]

Xu Rendong thought for a long time before finally assenting.

Zhou Yan inadvertently glanced at his screen, and the corners of his mouth couldn’t help but twitch.

…..

The dumplings were fast and beautiful. He asked curiously, “What happened?”

Zhou Yan was furious. “His younger brother just posted on Weibo saying that Xu Rendong plagiarized him! He even said that Xu Rendong’s mother is a mistress! Bullshit!”

Xu Rendong said in a low voice, “Whatever they say. True blue will never stain.”

Zhou Yan gritted his teeth. “Why are you still the same as before… Forget it, do whatever you want! I don’t care anymore!”

At this moment, a marketing account released evidence that Xu Rendong had plagiarized Xu Xinyi. However, Xu Xinyi did not say anything this time.

The evidence was very simple, and it hit the nail on the head.

There were a few manuscripts and a link to a foreign music website.

The manuscripts were the scores of several popular songs that Xu Rendong had written over the years.

The link led to Xu Xinyi’s account and the list of songs that had been uploaded over the years.

Probably due to the popularity of the website, the most played song only had a few dozen hits.

But time could not fool people!

Because every song had been released before Xu Rendong!

The netizens immediately cursed in unison.

——

—— — [ Xu Rendong’s acting skills are pretty good. His brother is really pretentious, and he is even more impressive.]

[ Although the Xu brothers aren’t good people, I feel that Xu Rendong is even more disgusting. Copying other people’s music is no different from stealing other people’s children. ]

…

Zhou Yan, who said he didn’t care anymore, stopped trying to learn how to make dumplings and instead, paid attention to the gossip going around online.

When he saw the so-called evidence of plagiarism, he sneered.

It seemed that the “stepmother” had made a move.

Her methods were indeed much more sophisticated.

“Hey, Xu Rendong, where are your previous manuscripts?” Zhou Yan asked.

Xu Rendong answered honestly, “They were all lost. I might have accidentally thrown them away.”

Zhou Yan: … ! !

He was so angry!

This person was a fool!

He had thrown them away once or twice, or perhaps it was a coincidence. They were all lost. It was obviously very suspicious!

It was most likely stolen by a certain someone!

However, those marketing accounts said that Xu Rendong had stolen Xu Xinyi’s manuscript! That was the reason for those stunning songs!

While she was fuming, a calm and gentle voice sounded in her ears:

“I have a way that might prove my innocence.”

Li Jianyu said, “Wow, what method does sister Yi have?”

Ruan Qing gave him an elbow and winked at Xiang Yi.

If Xu Rendong really plagiarized, Xiang Yi would definitely be implicated. She would not be able to clear her name.

Xiang Yi blinked, indicating that he did not need to worry. Then, she slowly placed a dumpling on the drawer.

“We have now fallen into a misunderstanding. We feel that the order of time is the most important.”

“But the most important thing is the quality of the work.

“Or the ability to create the work.”

chapters.title: Chapter 757 - 757 Live Composition! 2
chapters.body:
Chapter 757 - 757 Live Composition! 2

757 Live Composition! 2

Shi Sui instantly understood what Xiang Yi meant and nodded in agreement.

What the little girl wanted seemed like a “competition” between two people, but it was actually Xu Xinyi’s attitude.

If Xu Xinyi agreed, that would mean that there were two possibilities. First, Xu Xinyi really had the ability, and the situation might become more complicated. Second, Xu Xinyi didn’t have the ability, but he would do something to make Xu Rendong take precautions.

If Xu Xinyi did not agree, then it would be even simpler.

He felt guilty.

In short, if Xu Rendong was innocent, then this round would definitely not be a loss.

Zhou Yan was stunned for a moment, but he also reacted. “Yes, yes, yes, if you have what it takes, use your ability to speak!”

Li Jianyu was still confused. “Xiang Yi, you mean… ?”

“It’s very simple. The two of them will compose a new song and release it at the same time. We can set a time limit, like a month, to see how good the two of them are.”

…..

The audience in the live broadcast room:

—— [That’s a solution, but how do we stop plagiarism?]

——[How much money does Xiang Yi receive? She’s being scolded every day, and now she’s still trying to clear the name of others.]

——[Hehe, what if Xu Rendong’s song is exactly the same as Xu Xinyi’s? After all, he has plagiarized it more than once or twice.]

…

Shi Sui seemed to have guessed everyone’s worries, He said lazily, “Everyone’s works will have their own imprint. For example, painters will have their own custom of color mixing and painting techniques. There are similarities between arts, and I think the same is true for music. The styles can be similar, but the soul can not be imitated.”

Xiang Yi said, “That’s right.”

Some busybodies went to Weibo to ask for permission from Xu Xinyi and told him about Xiang Yi’s proposal.

Xu Xinyi saw it, but he felt extremely guilty.

How could he dare to agree to it.

The reason that Xu Rendong only got into the second book was that there was an “accident” during the college entrance examination, so he missed out on two courses.

His famous school was donated by his father Xu. According to normal standards, he wouldn’t be able to get into it at all.

Not to mention his ability to compose music. Even the four oceans didn’t have him.

If they were to compete, they would definitely be exposed!

Therefore, Xu Xinyi immediately posted on Weibo.

[@Xu Xinyi : Brother has a lot of friends, but I have nothing. I will always be alone. I understand. In this world, loneliness is the norm. No one will always protect you from behind. I won’t fight anymore. I will give it to you. Is that okay?]

…

With his previous record of slapping his face, the number of netizens who stood by him this time was obviously less, but there were still people who supported him.

——[Why should we compete just because it’s appropriate? Who does she think she is! Speaking up for the son of a mistress, does she also want to be a mistress?]

…

Xu Xinyi’s mother called again and scolded him.

As the champion of the battle between the wealthy families, how could she not guess that the purpose of the competition was not to compete, but to test him!?

“Idiot! How could I have given birth to such an idiot like you! Aren’t you feeling guilty if you refuse now? This is exactly what they want!”

Xu Xinyi asked in confusion, “Then I… promise her? But Mom, I don’t know how to compose…”

Mrs. Xu smiled confidently, “It’s okay if you don’t know, as long as Xu Rendong knows it! Mom will think of a way to get the manuscript for you! And then find someone to help you revise it better!”

Xu Xinyi suddenly felt that he was stable. “Mom, it’s so good to have you!”

He thickened his skin and sent another message.

[@Xu Xinyi: Some things can be given, and some cannot, such as Father and honor! Set a time, and I’ll accept the challenge.]

chapters.title: Chapter 758 - 758 Live Composition! 3
chapters.body:
Chapter 758 - 758 Live Composition! 3

758 Live Composition! 3

The netizens were enjoying the gossip happily, exclaiming that it was enjoyable.

The heir versus the illegitimate child, there would be a good show to watch!

Many netizens did not mind watching the show, and even gave suggestions for the “battle” between the two of them.

——[Hurry up, set a time, and then the whole live broadcast!]

——[That’s right, that’s right, when the time comes, we’ll see who is the real plagiarist.]

——[What’s the point of all of you fighting online? Why don’t you fight offline? No (Da) , (Lai) , no (da) , (Qi) , (Lai) , (dog head/Dog Head)]

…

Xu Xinyi was full of confidence. He felt that victory was in his grasp.

Xu Rendong, Oh Xu Rendong, you’ve enjoyed enough applause and glory for so many years.

…..

And the position of the successor of the Xu family, how could a dead otaku be worthy of it?

It’s time to give it to me.

Xu Xinyi believed that if he could get the previous manuscript, his mother would definitely be able to help him get the manuscript this time!

Now, all he had to do was wait for Xu Rendong to set the time.

…

Not only Xu Xinyi, the audience in the live broadcast room also thought the same.

After all, composing was an artistic creation. It required a process and could not be accomplished overnight.

The next second.

Xu Rendong, who had learned the whole story through Zhou Yan’s phone, said in a low voice, “Then let’s begin.”

Everyone: ? ? ?

Huh? Begin what?

Xiang Yi was deep in thought. “Do you want to… Compose now?”

Xu Rendong assented and sat down in front of the piano. He turned his head to look at Xiang Yi. “Can I trouble you to give me a theme, Miss Xiang? Just two words will do.”

Xiang Yi thought for a moment. “Then, love?”

Xu Rendong was well-known for his lyrical music style in the past. The theme of love was very suitable for him.

“Okay.” Xu Rendong closed his eyes and fell into thought.

The audience in the live broadcast room was as if they were in a fog:

——[What… What’s going on? Composing right on the spot? How is this possible!?]

——[Where did Xu Rendong get his confidence from? He can compose as he pleases? That’s hilarious. ]

——[I’m waiting for Xu Rendong to roll over. My popcorn is ready.]

…

In the comments section, most of them were mocking him.

There were also Xu Rendong’s loyal fans who were trying their best to protect him.

Unfortunately, they had little effect.

However…

When Xu Rendong opened his eyes and placed his finger on the piano, the scene suddenly fell into silence.

Even the comments in the live broadcast room seemed to have been emptied.

The slow and melodious prelude started the melody of a love song. From the careful probing to the intense passion of love, to the loneliness after a sad breakup…

No matter if it was the melody or the mood, it was impeccable!

After listening to a short paragraph, it was easy to confirm that those songs were indeed made by Xu Rendong.

He had already formed his own unique style. Others could only imitate his appearance, but not his soul.

The audience gradually came back to their senses.

——[This song… is quite nice.]

——[Is it really composed by Xu Rendong? Then he’s really talented!]

——[I can’t believe it! I actually cried listening to it. Is there anyone with big hands who can fill in a word for me? This song is not popular, and the heavens can not tolerate it!]

…

His slender fingers swiped across the black and white keys, marking the perfect ending to the song.

Xiang Yi and the rest clapped.

Zhou Yan hit the drum with all his might, his hands almost turning red. “So good, so good! Xu Rendong is praying! Xu Rendong is the GOAT!”

Xu Rendong smiled shyly, but his eyes were very bright. “Miss Xiang Yi, it’s time for the second question.”

Xiang Yi was stunned. “Eh?”

chapters.title: Chapter 759 - 759 Live Composition! 4
chapters.body:
Chapter 759 - 759 Live Composition! 4

759 Live Composition! 4

“Didn’t you say that there would be a competition?”Xu Rendong asked doubtfully. “How are we going to determine the winners and losers with just one sentence? We should still do three rounds of rock, paper, and scissors until we determine a final winner.”

Upon hearing this, a gentle smile appeared on his face, and faint dimples appeared on his cheeks. “For the second question, how about ‘missing’ as the topic?”

Xu Rendong said, “Alright.”

Zhou Yan, who was at the side, widened his eyes. “Are you crazy? That song just now was enough to prove your strength. Why did you still…”

Shi Sui patted him on the shoulder. “Do you believe him?”

“Of course I believe him. He’s Xu Rendong!”

The young best actor curled his thin lips. “Then believe in his choice. Let’s see what kind of surprise he will bring us.”

This chicken soup for the soul was surprisingly effective on Zhou Yan. He pursed his lips and his tense body gradually relaxed.

No one knew Xu Rendong’s talent better than him.

…..

Yes.

Just trust him.

How could the light of a firefly compete with the Bright Moon?!

…

Xu Rendong was like a ruthless composing machine. He repeated the movements of closing his eyes and composing. The second “missing” still maintained a high standard and high completion rate!

His live composition did not need to be modified at all. He could simply enter the recording studio to record his demo!

The audience watching the livestream was dumbfounded.

Xu Xinyi, who had received the news, was even more dumbfounded.

Why didn’t this Xu Rendong follow the usual pattern?

Come on, this was a composition! Do you think you’re eating a bun? One bite at a time?

Other than surprise, panic followed.

If Xu Rendong was composing live, what should he do?

In the past, his mother had always arranged for part-time workers to steal Xu Rendong’s manuscripts. He would publish them directly, or find someone to make some slight modifications.

However, this time, he could not steal Xu Rendong’s manuscripts. What could he compare with his duel with Xu Rendong?

Endless fear instantly drowned him.

…

At the same time, Xu Rendong took a short break and said, “The third question.”

Xiang Yi pondered for a moment. “For the sake of fairness, why don’t we change the question to someone else?”

Xu Rendong looked troubled.

Some of the audience members caught his expression and began to discuss the conspiracy.

——[Was Xiang Yi bribed? She’s cooperating with Xu Rendong’s performance? ]

——[These questions couldn’t have been set long ago, right? What’s the difference between this and cheating in the exam?]

——[If that’s the case, it’s unfair to Xu Xinyi! Isn’t this obvious bullying? The mistress’s son is still so arrogant and cold!]

…

“I’m sorry,” Xiang Yi said apologetically. “I overlooked it. You don’t want to interact with other people.”

Xu Rendong shook his head. “It’s okay. I can… try harder.”

However, as a sociophobic patient, other than Zhou Yan, Shi Sui, and Xiang Yi whom he was familiar with, he was very resistant to even looking at the other staff members.

Li Jianyu had a flash of inspiration. “Why don’t you choose a question in the live broadcast room? That way, people won’t say that you cheated, and you can just use your phone to choose a question. You don’t have to communicate with others!”

Xu Rendong agreed.

He had a good impression of ‘Two Under One Roof’ in his heart.

In the past, when he was forced to participate in any activity, the staff would always advise him. “Teacher Xu, you have to pull yourself together and face everything. How could you be afraid of socializing? It’s just that your ability to communicate with others has deteriorated after staying at home for a long time. Can’t you just talk to people more?

However, everyone in “Two Under One Roof” would think about the problem from his point of view..

It was really, really warm.

“Thank you for your trouble, everyone. I.. I’ll draw the lots now,” Xu Rendong said softly.

chapters.title: Chapter 760 - 760 True Hardcore Shaming 1
chapters.body:
Chapter 760 - 760 True Hardcore Shaming 1

760 True Hardcore Shaming 1

It was rare for the “Two Under One Roof” live broadcast room to have an interactive function. Many people said that they hated Xu Rendong, but they could not help but click on the question.

Xu Rendong’s beautiful white fingertips lightly tapped on the screen, and the question was fixed on one sentence.

[During winter, I eat hotpot with my friends at home. Next to me, there’s sugar tangerines roasting on the heater. The ginger and cola in the pot are bubbling and heating up.]

Everyone was stunned.

This… What kind of question was this?

The two questions that were suitable previously were both more abstract and had more room for free expression.

But this question was too specific.

Instead, it left people scratching their heads.

How was music used to express eating hotpot? ? How was music used to express roasted tangerines?

…..

Not to mention cola with ginger shreds!

Wasn’t this making things difficult for people! !

Li Jianyu said cheekily, “Hahaha, this doesn’t count. Let’s do it again.”

The guest couldn’t say these words. He would be scolded.

He didn’t care. If he scolded, so be it. After all, he was thick-skinned.

Although Xu Rendong was a nerd, he wasn’t completely ignorant of the ways of the world. He could see that Li Jianyu was helping him out. He gave him a grateful look and said, “It doesn’t matter. Let’s go with this question.”

“Eh?” Before Li Jianyu could react, Xu Rendong’s finger had already played a chord on the piano keys.

He closed his eyes and started playing blindly!

Playing blindly was not difficult, but playing blindly to compose music was twice as difficult!

Some of the audience members who knew music in the live broadcast room were instantly shocked.

——”This is too incredible. I was so angry that I kicked my younger brother, who had been learning the piano for two years and still couldn’t play blind music.”

——”There’s no need to say it out loud. Xu Rendong’s basic skills are really amazing. His fingering, strength, and emotions are all textbook-level demonstrations.”

——”Oh my god, can this question still be expressed in this way? Sob, sob, sob. I don’t know how to describe it, but I feel that this song is so warm!”

…

The soothing music flowed slowly.

Language had its boundaries, but to a certain extent, music was common to all humans.

The crowd indulged in the song, and like Xu Rendong, they subconsciously closed their eyes.

They leaned on Shi Sui’s shoulder and whispered, “In winter, I really want to play this song.”

“Of course.” Shi Sui hugged her.

Zhou Yan, who was beside her, suddenly felt like he was playing gooseberry.

He cleared his throat and leaned to the right out of habit as he listened to Xu Rendong’s song seriously.

He was still… as good as ever.

…

That night, the live broadcast room of “Two Under One Roof” became popular again!

The famous composer Xu Rendong composed 16 songs in a row. The style included lyricism, pop, hot blood, fairy tales, folk songs, rock’n’roll, science fiction…

Every piece was a heavenly sound!

Every piece was enough to be passed down as a classic!

Countless people witnessed his creative talent!

Countless people were in awe of his amazing talent!

——[ Kneel to the boss, Orz ]

——[ Improvisation… This is a level that I can’t reach even if I study for another 10 years ]

——[ Oh dear, every piece is good. I feel that one album is enough! Zhou Yan will definitely sing it well! ]

…

Xu Rendong stood up while propping himself against the piano, but because he was too tired, his body swayed a little.

“Hey, Hey.” Zhou Yan quickly held him. Thinking of his social anxiety, he pursed his lips and was about to let go when he felt a small force grab his sleeve..

“My legs are weak,”Xu Rendong looked at him and said innocently.

Shi Sui felt something and looked sideways. Her little rabbit’s eyes lit up, as if… he had taken a liking to it 🙂

chapters.title: Chapter 1185: Half-Elf
chapters.body:
Chapter 1185: Half-Elf

3 days later, Pagris and Sophia personally sent Chen Rui and others to the teleportation array leading to Storm Island. The Dragon Valley even held a grand farewell ceremony. It was said that many dragons came here spontaneously — Well, most of them were the parents of the children, celebrating that the biggest scourge had finally left the Dragon Valley.

However, Lalaria’s words ‘I will definitely come back’ still frightened many parents.

Chen Rui gained a lot from this trip. Not only did Sophia’s wish come true, Alice also became the ‘Life’ Goddess, the Super System had a second oracle, and more importantly, the materials he wanted to get in the human world were basically gathered, leaving only 2 materials.

Rainbow calla lilies and ice fungus.

These 2 origins were the Jade Forest Sea, and the elf tribe should have them. Since the elf tribe was currently preparing for the New Moon Festival held every 100 years and would not see any outsiders for the time being, the dragons were also unable to negotiate directly with the elf tribe.

From the mouth of the Old Father-in-law Elf King Span, the new moon festival was the birthday of the legendary Moonlight Goddess and 1 of the most important festivals of the elf tribe where the elves from all over the world would return to the Silver Moon Celestial Capital. In this celebration, the elves would hold various activities, including a series of competitions and a selection of various elites of the elf tribe.

It would not be long until the core event of the New Moon Festival, which was Moonlight Goddess’s birthday. Since Span hadn’t been back to the Silver Moon Celestial Capital for a long time, he planned to return to the Jade Forest Sea with Chen Rui to participate in the New Moon Festival this time.

Meria did not accompany him. 1 of the reasons was that she was not favored by the elves in the Jade Forest Sea. The most important thing was that Dragon Emperor Pagris wanted to carry out some reforms in the dragon clan. During this time, the elders frequently convened and held meetings. As the great elder, Meria naturally couldn’t be absent.

Before leaving, Mother-in-law Fairy Dragon secretly pulled her daughter and son-in-law aside for a while. It was none other than to keep an eye on the old father-in-law and eliminate any cheating. Especially the old acquaintances from the past, Kilanya and some other women were on the blacklist. When necessary, force could be used. Meria would all consequences…

For this, Chen Rui could only express deep sympathy to his father-in-law in his mind, but he vowed to complete the task resolutely in his words.

After returning to Storm Island via the teleportation portal, Chen Rui released the Devil’s Snare Ship, left the Storm Sea Area, and went through several empires and teleportation portals. Then, he entered the Blue Glory Empire, that was closest to the elf tribe, and came to the most famous port city, Jaqda.

Jaqda was known as the ‘Magician City’. Traces of the elf tribe and magic civilization could be seen everywhere. It was also the most densely populated place for magicians in the human world, especially the Magician Tower Group. It was an alliance jointly controlled by elves and humans. The organization attracted a large number of magicians to join and became the most important ‘strategic weapon’ of the Blue Glory Empire.

The magician legion of the Blue Glory Empire was also the strongest existence in the entire human world, enough to rival the dragon knight legion of the Dragon Bright Empire.

This was the second time Chen Rui and Zola came here. Back then, they met Lild at the Magician Tower Group here, punished the evil half-elf mage Rialdo. Zola also made a breakthrough and advanced to the Demi-God in the battle with the elf elder Dursa in the Magician Tower Group.

But at this time, the elves were basically not seen in magician city. Therefore, Span the elf was rather eye-catching, because the elves had all returned to the Jade Forest Sea to participate in the New Moon Festival.

Both Alice and Lalaria came to this magician city for the first time, and they were dazzled by all kinds of novelties. Alice bought dozens of things in a row. Many were toys, said to be for Duoduo and Athena’s children. Chen Rui was moved for a while. But Alice had more fun playing by herself. The desire to shop was contagious, especially for female creatures. Zola also bought a lot of things. Even Lala Loli couldn’t help but borrow a large amount of black crystal coins from Chen Rui and squandered them. Anyway, Madam Lalaria didn’t care about the endless debts.

After strolling a few rounds, Alice couldn’t move anymore, but her spirits were still high. Fortunately, there was such a good item as a space ring in this world, otherwise Chen Rui and Span must be carrying loads of bags.

After shopping, everyone left the port by ship and headed for the Jade Forest Sea.

2 days later.

“Brother, how much longer will it be?”

“Probably 10 minutes.”

“Great!” As Alice looked at the dense forest sea along the way, her eyes were bright, “By the way, brother, I heard people in Jaqda say that during this time, no one except elf can enter the Silver Moon Celestial Capital. Shall we disguise as elves?”

“Disguise as an elf? I like the idea.” When Lalaria blinked her eyes, a light flashed. Her ears began to point out, and her hair turned dark green. Her appearance didn’t change much, but Lala Loli was originally a delicate and flat type. Now she looked more like a neutral little loli elf (Shota?).

This was the transformation technique of dragons. Even a black dragon that was the nemesis of magic could easily activate as long as one’s strength and skills were sufficient.

Zola did not use the transformation technique of the dragons. For the fairy dragon who was almost the controller of the elemental world, it was easy to change her appearance. There was no light. Zola had successfully transformed like a flow of water. Her figure and appearance had changed slightly. She looked more agile. With her intellectual temperament, she looked like an extremely charming female elf scholar.

“ Wow !” Alice’s eyes twinkled with little stars, “Sister Zola is so beautiful. Can you help me transform too?”

Zola blinked her eyes, and a beautiful and lovely elf loli immediately appeared behind Chen Rui. The only thing that dissatisfied Alice was that her chest was still flat.

“Daddy Span, you have 3 daughters now.” Alice laughed, then she looked at Chen Rui, “It’s your turn, brother!”

“Well, since everyone has so much fun.” Chen Rui had been using the [Camouflage] to cover up his true face, so now he only needed to change his ears and hair a little.

Chen Rui, who transformed easily, looked at the strange eyes of everyone. He was taken aback and asked, “What’s wrong?”

“Brother, your transformation technique is too awful.” Alice shook her head in dissatisfaction.

Chen Rui was taken aback. Even the peak stage of the Pseudo-God can’t see through this [Camouflage]. Why is it awful?

“Although we haven’t seen many elves.” Lalaria complained, “But you should be the ugliest elf.”

Zola initially shook her head first to show that she didn’t care. Then, after she compared her father’s absolutely handsome face and thought about it, she nodded firmly again.

Chen Rui was speechless. This was the face of a supporting actor anyway, but thinking that elves were all handsome men and beautiful women, it would be too outrageous to transform a common face. Therefore, he simply restored Arthur’s face with a simple photoshop. In the end, the 3 judges voted pass.

Span smiled while looking at the 3 giggling ‘daughters’, “Okay, elves. Get ready. This is already the water boundary of Purple Orchid Port. After 2 turns, we will see the port.”

Soon, the Devil’s Snare Ship carrying 5 ‘elves’ arrived at Purple Orchid Port smoothly. The Purple Orchid Port was guarded by elf guards.

Span took the 4 of them off the ship. The elf guards who greeted them were obviously newcomers. They didn’t recognize Span as the Elf King 20,000 years ago, and Span didn’t reveal his identity. Instead, he simply performed an elf’s general etiquette, “May the Moonlight Goddess bless you, our family rushed back to participate in the New Moon Festival.”

When the elf guard sensed Span’s extraordinary momentum and saw all of them were elves, he bowed back, “Welcome back to the blessed place of the Moonlight Goddess. May the goddess bless you all. Please come here to register first.”

At this moment, another team of elves appeared in front of them. The leader was a blond male elf wearing silver chain armor with a long sword on his back. He was handsome with a small mustache. This elf team was escorting a man. The man was tall and slender with delicate facial features, but there were many blood-red spots on his face and body, which looked very strange. Judging from the slightly pointed ears, he should be a half-elf.

Race: Half-Elf (mutated).

Comprehensive Strength Assessment: A.

Physique: A-, Strength: A, Spirit: A, Speed: A.

[Analysis]: Dark attribute, precise eye, demonic pattern.

Risk level: Low.

A half-elf was a hybrid of the elf tribe and other races whose life was shorter than the real elf, but it was not recognized by the elves nor was it protected by the elf treaty. It had always been a despised existence in the Jade Forest Sea. This was the case with Blanche whom Chen Rui met at the beginning.

The half-elf in front of him was actually a rare dark attribute in the human world. The scars on his face should be the ‘demonic pattern’ as analyzed by the Super System. However, the elf tribe had always regarded themselves as a perfectionist. To put it bluntly, they were easy to judge people by their appearance. They clearly showed considerable disgust for the dark elf’s face.

“Sir Askar!” The elf guard beside Span quickly bowed, “Have you finally caught this lowly dark elf?”

“This guy tried to sneak into the New Moon Festival, and he even injured several of our brothers. Thanks to Sir Askar for taking him down.” Another silver-haired elf gritted his teeth, “This guy must be severely punished! Disturbing the New Moon Festival and hurting the noble elves. I suggest to execute him right now!”

The half-elf showed an expression of indignation. He wanted to say something, but he was suppressed by some force and could not speak out.

Chen Rui noticed that there seemed to be something strange in it. Thinking of the situation that Blanche was discriminated against in the elf tribe, his mind moved slightly to secretly dispel the speech restraint on the half-elf.

“Figor, you shameless villain. You lost to me in arrow shooting, and you promised to let me in, but you actually reneged!”

Askar, who was wearing chain armor, didn’t expect the half-elf to be able to break free from his restraint and speak. He frowned again after hearing the half-elf’s words, and he glanced at Figor.

Figor sneered and said, “It’s useless to argue! You, a half-elf, try to mix into the New Moon Festival. You obviously have ulterior motives. It is also my responsibility to take you down! Sir Askar, it is an extraordinary time for the New Moon Festival. This kind of spy must not be tolerated!”

Askar was showing a contemplative expression, but he finally nodded when he heard the last sentence.

“In the balance of Moonlight Goddess, there is no distinction between high and low. Regardless of whether the target is an elf or a half-elf, one should have a fair heart. Don’t you think so? ‘Sir’ Askar.” It was not Chen Rui who spoke but Span.

These words immediately attracted Askar’s attention. After he glanced at Span, he showed a surprised expression.

Figor didn’t expect that elf to speak for a half-elf. He shouted, “How bold! Who are you? You actually dare to do this to Sir Askar…”

Before finishing speaking, Askar’s furious voice came into Figor’s ears like thunder, “Shut up!”

Under the amazed gaze of all the elf guards, Askar, who showed an excited expression, quickly came to Span, bent down deeply, and performed a grand etiquette, “Your Highness!”

chapters.title: Chapter 1186: The 2 Elf Kings
chapters.body:
Chapter 1186: The 2 Elf Kings

Askar’s bow stunned all the guards, and what surprised the elves was Askar’s address for Span.

Your Highness?

The male elf who can be called Your Highness… There are only a few legendary ones—Hero King!

I actually reprimanded the Elf King whom even Her Majesty Elf Empress has to respect? Figor was dumbfounded.

“Askar, we met again.” Span patted Askar on the shoulder, “You are about to enter super-level. You should be chief commander now.”

“I will always be a magic swordsman who follows Your Highness!” Askar used to be Span’s sword guard, and Span also taught him his sword skills. He followed Span through the rebellion in the Silver Moon Celestial Capital and went through life and death together. Now when he saw his old boss and also his teacher again, he was very excited.

Span looked around at the elf guards who showed an expression of awe and said to the half-elf, “Although I don’t discriminate against half-elves, you are indeed not eligible to participate in the New Moon Festival. No matter what twists and turns there are in the middle, it is the elf guards’ responsibility to stop you. However, I can give you a chance to explain yourself; only once.”

Although the half-elf was not familiar with the history of the elf tribe, he had also heard the legend of the Elf King and vaguely guessed it. He quickly bowed, “Sir, this Figor made a bet with me before, saying that as long as I win in the arrow shooting, he will let me enter the Silver Moon Celestial Capital. However, after he lost to me, he actually didn’t fulfill his promise and framed me as a spy!”

“Nonsense! I…”

“You can explain, but there is only one chance.” Span said flatly.

Figor was only Demon Emperor-level strength. Although Span did not activate any power, he felt an intangible power. He broke into a cold sweat, “I’m 1 of the top Saint magic archers in the tribe. If it weren’t for that despicable half-elf’s evil plot, how could I suddenly miss it?”

As soon as this sentence came out, Chen Rui knew the incident: This Figor obviously lost the game. Instead of fulfilling his promise, he took revenge instead. In other words, Figor didn’t pay attention to the half-elf at the beginning, but he unexpectedly failed. Therefore, he was ashamed into anger and framed the half-elf as a spy. He wanted to kill him to silence him.

“ Hmph ! Lose the arrow shooting and lose the character!” Lalaria’s contemptuous voice sounded.

Figor’s neck was red with embarrassment after being condemned in the public, but this ‘little elf girl’ obviously had a special relationship with the Elf King, so he could only suffer in silence.

“This matter is pretty clear.” Span didn’t even look at Figor.

Askar’s face was dull, and he gave Figor a stern look, “After the New Moon Festival is over, go to the military judge to receive the punishment!”

Figor didn’t dare to say more as he bowed his head and stepped back.

Askar then set his eyes on the half-elf, waved his hand, and canceled the imprisonment, “Half-elf, you can leave now. If you have anything, you have to wait until after the New Moon Festival.”

The half-elf clenched his fists, “No! I have a reason to go!”

Askar narrowed his eyes, and a murderous intent spread, “I won’t repeat it a second time! Half-elf! If you don’t leave, I won’t show mercy!”

The blood patterns on the half-elf’s face glowed brightly as his momentum became stronger and stronger. His power had already risen by a small realm. Obviously, he was going to make a desperate fight. Nonetheless, Askar’s strength had reached the level of S++. Even if the half-elf’s strength had been raised to A+, there was no chance of winning.

The half-elf himself should also understand this, but he still didn’t flinch.

“Wait a minute, Sir Askar. Please allow me to ask this half-elf a few words.” Chen Rui walked up.

“You are…” Askar cast a consulting look at Span.

“He… is my relative, and he is fully qualified to ask.” The qualifications mentioned by Span naturally referred to Chen Rui’s status as the ‘Elf King’.

Of course, Askar couldn’t guess that this strange ‘elf’ was another Hero King from the elf tribe. When he heard that he was a relative of Span, he immediately nodded in awe.

“What’s your name?”

“Taylos.”

“I want to know the reason why you insist on entering the Silver Moon Celestial Capital at this time. You should know that it is very inappropriate and unwise to break in at this time.”

Taylos lowered her head and didn’t answer.

“If the reason is worthy of approval, maybe I can help you.” Chen Rui said something again suddenly, which made Askar frown.

The half-elf was startled, looked up, and saw that Chen Rui’s eyes didn’t contain the slightest look of contempt, so he finally said the answer, “Altani, she is getting engaged today, but! She doesn’t love that elf!”

That’s why . Chen Rui showed an understanding look, “The one she loves is you?”

“She was forced by her family, and they even threatened to kill me! Even if I have to die, I must stop this engagement! She can separate from me, and maybe she will find someone who loves her more and is more suitable for her in the future, but I will never allow her to be forced to marry a man she doesn’t love…”

Before the words were finished, some elves laughed.

“Altani is in love with you? How ridiculous!”

“Not only is it ridiculous, it’s insane!”

“Altani is Elder Cheropan’s younger sister, and 1 of the most beautiful flowers in the elf tribe. How could she fall in love with an ugly dark elf like you!”

“…”

“Some things that look beautiful may not be as beautiful as they look.” Chen Rui said lightly, which made the elf guards feel harsh, but because of Span, they didn’t dare to refute.

“Taylos, are you sure of your judgment?”

“I’m sure!”

Chen Rui nodded, “Well then, I also want to see the result of your confidence and courage, but are you willing to pay any price?”

Taylor’s tone was firm, “I do!”

Askar interrupted decisively, “Wait a minute, sir. You can’t bring a dark elf to the New Moon Festival! Even if you are a relative of His Highness! Otherwise, please forgive me…”

Chen Rui smiled lightly. He said in Askar’s mind with the [Analytical Eyes], “I don’t want to embarrass you, loyal sir chief commander. Although you are obviously favoring your own people, as far as I know, according to the elf tribe rules, if he becomes my subordinate, there should be no problem right?”

Since Chen Rui was now an ‘elf’, it was not surprising for Askar who knew this kind of soul language for telepathic communication. He also said to Chen Rui in the same soul language, “Unless you are a Hero King. Otherwise, if he becomes your subordinate, he isn’t qualified to enter. However, even if it is His Highness Span, doing so will be criticized by others. If you are really His Highness Span’s relative, you shouldn’t put him in such a difficult situation…”

Chen Rui didn’t explain. He just took a few steps forward and looked into Askar’s eyes. When Askar was on guard, he suddenly sensed a special kind of breath. This kind of breath was a fresh and pure force of nature. Just looking at it, he felt as if his mind had been washed and his spirit was lifted.

Askar was shocked. This kind of power is actually…

The natural breath became more and more intense. Askar felt like a drop of water that returned to the sea. The feeling was unprecedentedly comfortable and intimate. His whole soul involuntarily showed a strong nostalgia. Askar finally confirmed: The Tree of Nature!

It is really the power of the holy tree!

Although the holy tree was sealed by Span at the time, it had not been completely free from the erosion of evil forces for 20,000 years. Until a few years ago, a human came to the Silver Moon Celestial Capital, destroyed the evil forces, and made the holy tree truly reborn. Under the instruction of Legendary Prophet Alucier, the Tree of Nature is temporarily kept by the human, and this human is also another elf Hero King after Span for 20,000 years!

This elf… no! He is not an elf!

It was agreed before that the holy tree would return to the celestial capital in 2 years, but it might be due to some special reasons that the human did not return as scheduled, so even if we, the elves, don’t say anything, we feel somewhat dissatisfied with Empress Liv and the legendary prophet in our mind. Now, it is finally time to return the Tree of Nature to the arms of Moonlight Goddess!

While excited, the chief commander finally understood why Span said that Chen Rui ‘had this qualification’. Indeed he does!

Without thinking, Askar immediately gave Chen Rui a deep bow. No matter the identity of this sir or the Tree of Nature he owns, he deserves this great bow.

Chen Rui gave Askar a few words in soul language, asking him to report to Empress Liv, but not to disclose the information to others for the time being.

Askar nodded and looked at half-elf Taylos, “You can follow this sir in.”

The elves were shocked again. The chief commander actually allowed the half-elf to enter the celestial capital at the New Moon Festival, and he is so respectful to that strange elf, showing the same courtesy as the Elf King. What is the origin of this elf?

Taylos was also surprised, but he cared more about his lover in the celestial capital. It was definitely a pleasant surprise to be able to bring in by this sir. If he could really ‘save’ his sweetheart, it would be worth repaying and following, so, the half-elf immediately made a vow to follow.

Chen Rui didn’t ask for anything like a contract because he saw that Taylos wasn’t lying. He just wanted to help this half-elf who was chasing love.

“Sirs, I’ll go first.” Askar bowed to Chen Rui and Span, rode on the silver pegasus led by the guards, and flew away.

Knowing that Askar was going to report to Empress Liv, Chen Rui nodded to everyone, “Let’s go too.”

The elves had basically confirmed Span’s identity, and Chen Rui must also be an important person, so they didn’t ask for registration. They all bowed and sent them off.

After passing the checkpoint at the port, some traces of the New Moon Festival could already be seen along the way. Colorful fluorescent lights appeared in the misty woods, and they emitted pleasant music under the breeze. The nearby vines seemed to be alive, dancing to the music. There were many similar landscapes. Even rare, these decorations or landscapes were integrated with nature, which was natural and amazing.

“It’s so beautiful!” Alice had never seen such a scene in the Demon Realm. Her big eyes were full of shining little stars.

Chen Rui nodded. From the perspective of appreciation, the elves are indeed unparalleled artists.

A group of people appeared ahead. Taylos had spent some time in the Jade Forest Sea, so he recognized that they were the royal guard of honor of the elf tribe. The guard of honor played ethereal and elegant music, and some elves danced lightly. This was the highest level of the welcoming ritual.

Behind the royal guard of honor was a beautiful elf who was graceful and generous and wore a crown. It was Elf Empress Liv.

Empress Liv walked up to Span and the others and nodded slightly. Chen Rui and Span returned the etiquette.

“Welcome, 2 Royal Highnesses.” Empress Liv’s voice was moving as usual.

2 Royal Highnesses!

The shocked Taylor finally realized that the elf he temporarily ’followed’ was actually a legendary Hero King!
