chapters.title: Chapter 1187: Obligation
chapters.body:
Chapter 1187: Obligation

After the 2 parties greeted each other, Empress Liv set her sights on Chen Rui.

Chen Rui smiled, “As you can see, Your Majesty Liv, this look is just more convenient.”

Empress Liv nodded and said, “2 Royal Highnesses, come with me.”

Knowing that Empress Liv would definitely want to ask about the Tree of Nature, Chen Rui rolled his eyes, “Your Majesty Liv, where is Ms. Kilanya?”

“Madam Kilanya?” Empress Liv was taken aback, “She is one of the hosts of the New Moon Festival, so she is at the ceremony. Does Your Highness want her to discuss together?”

“No, Your Majesty misunderstood me, but I heard from His Highness Span earlier, so I wanted to meet her.”

Kilanya was at the top of Meria’s blacklist. When Ms. Fairy Dragon heard this name, her pointed elf’s ears pricked up. Span didn’t expect Chen Rui to say that. He glared at his son-in-law. Chen Rui simply copied his father-in-law’s fake daze secret technique and stared blankly at him.

In fact, Span had already understood the meaning of the son-in-law. The son-in-law would bear the consequences of some matters alone. He did not want Span and Meria to get involved. The Old Father-in-law Elf King thought for a while, and he finally nodded.

Empress Liv thought for a while, and she didn’t force it, “Your Highness Span, then please do what you want.”

Chen Rui looked at Zola and signaled to Ms. Fairy Dragon to take care of the half-elf when necessary. Zola nodded slightly. She and Chen Rui were in the same mind. Sometimes even without a mind call, they could understand each other’s meaning with a gaze.

“Okay, you go for a private meeting with this little elf beauty. We are going to the New Moon Festival. Be careful, don’t make trouble. Otherwise, I will report to Athena and the others. Oh Hohoho… ” Lalaria dragged Zola and Alice to the other side.

The half-elf Taylos who was following behind was sweating on his brow. An elf that dares to call the elf empress ‘little beauty’ in front of her and say such weird things. I’m afraid that she is the only one in history. Even the Elf King is not so outrageous!

Chen Rui could only smile wryly. He said to Empress Liv with an apologetic face, “Forgive me, Your Majesty Liv. Ignore that nonsense guy. She is used to misbehavior. She has only been in the Dragon Valley for a few days, and she has caused a lot of trouble. Almost all the dragons were beating gongs and drums when they left, thankful that the scourge left.”

Originally, Empress Liv was still a little displeased, but when Chen Rui said this, she asked in surprise, “Who is she?”

“The future Dragon Emperor of another world.” Chen Rui shook his head, silently mourning for the future of Dragon Island.

“Another world?” Empress Liv’s gaze was a bit more profound, “The ones who followed you and His Highness Span just now… how many real elves are there?”

“If Your Majesty refers to the ‘real’ elf, then there is only 1: His Highness Span…” Chen Rui grinned, “I don’t intend to offend the elf tribe, but it’s just a coincidence. My friend just want to experience the New Moon Festival of the celestial capital.”

As the 2 chatted, they entered a palace.

Empress Liv waved her hand, and all the servants and guards retreated outside the hall.

“Your Highness Richard, please sit down.” Empress Liv sat down, “First of all, I would like to thank Your Highness for keeping the Tree of Nature in the past few years.”

Sensing the situation, Chen Rui asked, “Does Your Majesty need me to explain why the Tree of Nature was not returned beyond the due date’?”

“I got the answer from Sir Alucier long ago. Although sir prophet didn’t specify the reason, as the elf empress, I still choose to trust Sir Alucier’s judgment.”

“Even if the fate of the elf tribe’s survival is in the hands of a human?”

“Sir Alucier is the guide of the elf tribe, and also the highest instructor of all elves. With his help, the elf tribe has survived countless terrifying crises over the years and can flourish and develop to the current state.” There was a determination in Empress Liv’s flat tone, “Although many elves, including me, still can’t understand the intention of sir prophet, no one has publicly raised objections. Besides, Your Highness is not an ordinary human to be able to easily escape from the hands of Archangel Raphael… I’m glad that such a Pseudo-God powerhouse is the Hero King of our elf tribe instead of an enemy.”

“It appears that Ms. Kilanya has informed Your Majesty of what happened at the Holy Child canonization ceremony at the Holy Light Mountain.”

“Please don’t worry, Your Highness. Apart from Sir Alucier, Madam Kilanya and me, no fourth elf knows.”

“Don’t worry?” Chen Rui shook his head, “It’s just a little… well, we can leave this matter aside.”

Of course, Empress Liv didn’t want to expose the relationship between Chen Rui and the elf tribe, lest it drew revenge from the Holy Light Mountain. Even with Alucier, a prophet of unknown strength, he was no match for the 3 archangels.

But the elf empress didn’t know that all she knew was Chen Rui’s strength that was a few years ago. Now the ‘Hero King’’s personal strength and forces were enough to compete with all 3 archangels. Of course, Chen Rui didn’t explain too much. After thinking about it, he let out a breath of the Tree of Nature, “So, do I need to return the holy tree to the elf tribe now?”

“Great, I never imagined that in just a few years, the Tree of Nature’s breath actually has reached such a level! Your Highness is worthy of the Hero King title.” Empress Liv showed a surprised expression, then she frowned, “It’s just that Sir Alucier once told me that now is not the right time to return the holy tree. Your Highness is here this time…”

“I have 2 purposes for coming here this time.” Chen Rui said straight to the point, “The first thing, I need 5 rainbow calla lilies and 1 ice fungus. Please help me, Your Majesty; the second thing, I want to see Prophet Sir Alucier again.”

Empress Liv pondered for a moment, and replied, “Rainbow calla lilies are rare, but the secret warehouse of the Silver Moon Celestial Capital has them. I will ask people to choose the best 5 in a moment, but ice fungus…”

“Is there any difficulty with ice fungus?”

“Ice fungus has special enchantment and repair power. Compared with rainbow calla lilies, it is not particularly rare. There were quite a few in the Jade Forest Sea. But in the past 20,000 years, in order to seal the holy tree, the ice fungus in the Jade Forest Sea was all plucked by the elves to continuously strengthen the seal enchantment of the treants that were infected by the Abyss power. There is only 1 plant in Sir Alucier’s Psychedelic Forest, and it is currently the only known one in the entire Jade Forest Sea. This ice fungus is not ordinary. It has been nearly 30,000 years old, and it is Alucier’s treasure. However, Sir Alucier just closed the Psychedelic Forest not long ago, announcing that he will not see any outsiders.”

Chen Rui frowned, “Outsiders? I’m not an ‘outsider’, right? Could it be that the title of ‘Elf King’ is just an empty title with no practical value?”

“Your Highness has misunderstood. Even Sir Alucier’s only personal apprentice and only daughter, Kilanya, cannot see him.”

“If I can’t see Alucier, I naturally don’t need to follow the entrustment he asked Finoia to convey. I will return the Tree of Nature to the elf tribe now, and I will never have any relationship with the Jade Forest Sea in the future.”

For Chen Rui, he must get the ice fungus and meet Alucier to solve the mystery of ‘that person’ so that he could get rid of the hidden hazard in his body as soon as possible. However, Chen Rui inevitably felt absurd to threaten the elf empress with returning the Tree of Nature.

“For all the elves in the celestial capital, returning to the blessing of the holy tree is the greatest hope, but…” Empress Liv was taken aback, then she smiled wryly, “I don’t know how to describe my current mood… In fact, Sir Alucier also ordered that if affected by some irresistible factors, those who want to see him can try to enter the Psychedelic Forest directly.”

“Directly ‘enter’? Got it.” Chen Rui narrowed his eyes. “By the way, I have another question. What is the level of Sir Alucier’s strength?”

“The strength of sir prophet is a secret. I only know that when the Tree of Nature was infected 20,000 years ago, the 3 archangels wanted to destroy the Tree of Nature to prevent future troubles, but they gave up their intention when the sir prophet stopped them.”

Let the 3 archangels give up their intentions? Chen Rui thought for a while, then he nodded, “Thank you, Your Majesty.”

“Your Highness is too polite. I will send someone to retrieve the rainbow calla lilies from the secret warehouse. Since the protection of the secret warehouse has been completely closed before the New Moon Festival, it will take a while to reopen. Your Highness may wish to visit the elf tribe’s New Moon Festival first.”

Chen Rui shrugged and said deliberately, “Didn’t they say that only invited special guests can participate? So I was forced to transform into an elf…”

Empress Liv smiled implicitly, “Although Your Highness is a human being, you are also the Hero King of the elf tribe. You are admired by all elfs… There is no need for any invitation. Even your other 3 companions are brought by His Highness Span. Then… what about the half-elf? Isn’t Your Highness exercising the privilege of the Elf King?”

“At that time, maybe I will regain a sense of existence of the so-called elf tribe ‘Hero King’.” Chen Rui took a deep breath, “As for helping Taylos, it was only because I suddenly remembered a certain half-elf friend who was no longer here.”

Blanche.

If Chen Rui could do it all over again, he would definitely choose to leave the Silver Moon Celestial Capital with her so that the tragedy that followed would not happen.

Empress Liv certainly knew who Chen Rui’s ‘half-elf’ friend was, and she sighed.

“Another time, the incident that made the ‘Hero King’ have a sense of existence happened in the Magician Tower Group in Jaqda. I killed Elder Shiro and his half-elf illegitimate son Rialdo in front of Elder Dursa. I believe that Your Majesty already knew about this incident.”

Chen Rui looked up at the bright sky, “Before I make a move, I once said a few words: I may be weak, I may be poor, I may be of low status, or I may be ugly, but in front of life, you and I are equal. I’m not despicable, and you are not noble. When you think you are noble, in fact, you are the most despicable existence.”

Empress Liv was about to say something, but when she heard this, she fell silent.

“Helping the half-elf today, including killing Shiro and Rialdo at that time, I don’t think I’m abusing the privilege of the elf tribe Hero King, but fulfilling the obligations that this honor should fulfill.” Chen Rui looked deeply at Empress Liv without saying more, then he walked out of the hall.

TL: Alucier must know that he is going to get that ice fungus. Why does he want Chen Rui to break into the forest?

chapters.title: Chapter 1188: His And Hers New Moon Festival
chapters.body:
Chapter 1188: His And Hers New Moon Festival

Silver Moon Celestial Capital.

There was a festive atmosphere everywhere. Sweet music and laughter could be heard from time to time, bringing more vigor and vitality to the serene forest.

The New Moon Festival was somewhat similar to that of a trade fair. There were ‘venues’ for various activities everywhere, such as music, sword dance, item trading, riding competitions, and so on. However, in addition to the main ceremony, there were several special venues for archery and riding competitions. The rest of the areas were spontaneous gatherings. For example, the elves, who like music, gather under a big tree to listen to a certain elf playing or singing. Those who liked it sat down to listen on the spot, and those who didn’t like it could go. Even if there was no audience, the elf performing was still enjoying it himself. There were many such small circles.

The elf who wanted to trade items put his own things on a table, and the elf who liked it could put the exchanged items or coins. As long as the 2 parties nod, they could take away the items they like. There was no heated dispute over bargaining. If one was not satisfied, he could put it back on the table again. If the trade failed, one would leave silently.

The New Moon Festival was very lively, but it didn’t seem noisy.

Kilanya, 1 of the elders presiding over the New Moon Festival, walked around various gathering places and venues. Some elves bowed to her along the way from time to time. Kilanya, who seemed to be casually inspecting the places in person, was actually looking left and right as if she was looking for something.

Kilanya’s heartbeat started to speed up after hearing the news that a certain Elf King had returned to the celestial capital. Particularly, Chief Commander Askari also said that when someone talked to Empress Liv, the person once mentioned that His Highness Span wanted to meet ‘her’.

Just this one sentence, and before Askari could say anything else, Kilanya hastily walked out and started the ‘inspection’.

Although the man chose another foreign woman instead of her, Kilanya still had that person in her heart. Even if she channeled her missing into training and learning, she still could not completely forget about him.

Finally, Kilanya found the man in the trading area. Like many elf powerhouses, the signs of age didn’t show on that handsome face, but the momentum in the eyes was more mature and refined. The slightly melancholy gaze added a bit of masculine charm that those kids couldn’t imitate no matter what.

Kilanya saw Span at first glance, but the gaze of joy and anticipation turned into gloominess in an instant, because there was a beautiful elf woman beside Span. She was holding his arm affectionately and walking side by side.

Span also patted the female elf’s face affectionately as the female elf smiled happily. Kilanya could clearly see that the female was holding a delicate gem flower in her hand. Span must have traded it from an elf who was setting up a stall and given it to the female elf.

Kilanya originally came to ‘coincidentally meet’ Span. She didn’t really expect anything to happen, just to meet. Even if it was just saying a few casual words and then passing by. But when Kilanya saw that there was such an intimate female elf beside Span, an unknown anger surged from her heart. She didn’t care about pretending to meet coincidentally and strode forward.

The elves who were about to bow along the way were frightened by that furious look.They hurriedly made way for her. They were wondering which elf dared to cause trouble at the New Moon Festival, which made madam elder so angry.

Span had already sensed that someone was walking toward him in a hurry. When he turned his head, he couldn’t help being startled when he found that it was actually Kilanya.

Kilanya was the daughter of Alucier, the highest instructor in the elf tribe, and a partner who experienced countless battles and adventures with him. Elf’s reaction to emotion was very sensitive. Span had always been very clear of the minds of Kilanya, including Kilanya’s sister, who was also the previous elf empress, Berismi. They were all good sisters, good comrades-in-arms, and good friends, but he just couldn’t find that feeling of being a lover until he met Meria.

20,000 years ago, the elf tribe encountered the Abyss crisis. Span desperately rescued the controlled Kilanya sisters from Ifrit, and he sealed the Tree of Nature at the cost of his life. If Meria hadn’t used the secret technique to share half of her life with him, he would be long gone.

Berismi was seriously injured at the time. She died of depression soon after. Span knew very well that he was part of the reason. He felt that he owed Kilanya and her sister, so he lived with Meria in the Dragon Valley for most of these years and rarely come back to the Jade Forest Sea. Seeing Kilanya again now, Span had mixed feelings, but more of it was the joy of reuniting with old friends, but to his surprise, Kilanya’s expression was surprisingly gloomy.

“Sir, it’s been a long time.” Kilanya walked in front of Span and lowered her head slightly. For some reason, this kind of etiquette and address made Span feel a little creepy. He could only return the courtesy.

Kilanya looked at the ‘female elf’ who was still holding Span’s arm, and lightning flashed in her eyes. Her brow moved slightly. Based on what Span knew about her, it meant that she was already extremely angry.

Kilanya glanced at the surrounding elves with murderous eyes. The kind of momentum was quite like ‘it’s a personal matter, get lost’. The elf elder’s power in the elf tribe was not a joke. With a wink, the elves in the vision, including the vendors were all gone.

After the idlers retreated, Kilanya turned her attention back to Span and immediately and immediately questioned.

“Who is she?”

This cold tone made Span finally react. So it’s because of this!

Before the Royal Highness Elf King could reply, the madam elder’s anger had already erupted like a series of cannons.

“I really didn’t expect that you would be such a person!”

“Don’t you have no room for another person in your heart?”

“Are you worthy of Meria?”

“Are you worthy of my sister, Berismi?”

Kilanya almost said, “Are you worthy of me?” Span was stunned by this continuous explosion while Zola on the side had already helped her father, “What?”

This sentence almost completely triggered Kilanya. On the verge of ‘explosion’, Span said, “Stop messing around, Zola. You should call Aunt Kilanya.”

“Zola?” The fire in Kilanya suddenly went out. Of course she knew who Zola was. She was stunned for a while.

Seeing Kilanya’s dumbfounded look, Span breathed a sigh of relief, “You should have seen her before.”

Kilanya had a fever on her face. She and Zola had met more than once. Zola’s appearance was clearly transformed into an elf’s appearance to follow her father to participate in the New Moon Festival.

No wonder, Span was so affectionate to the ‘female elf’! People are loving father and daughter!

When Zola called ‘Aunt Kilanya’, the elf elder lost all the momentum before. She just nodded in a panic; even her neck was red.

Span shook his head, wanting to get rid of her embarrassment. He said to Zola, “I haven’t seen Kilanya for a long time. We’ll just chat here. You can go with Lalaria and Alice.”

“Chat?” Ms. Fairy Dragon looked at her father and Kilanya with scrutiny. Kilanya is at the top of Mom’s blacklist, and father wants to be alone with her?

Span could only respond with a wry smile. Zola thought about it, and she gave Dad a warning gaze before she left.

On the other side of the archery field, Lalaria drew her bow and hit a round target 50 meters away with an arrow. Looking at Alice with an envious face, she seemed complacent. Just now Alice shot 10 arrows in a row, all of which missed the target without exception. Lalaria’s eyesight and control were much stronger than Alice’s. Although the first 2 arrows missed the target, when the third arrow was shot after some aiming, she had already hit the edge of the target.

The distance of 50 meters was not close. For Lalaria who was playing archery for the first time, it was indeed not bad that she could achieve such a result within 3 arrows.

While Lalaria was feeling proud, she suddenly noticed a lot of elves gathered around. When Alice missed the target with 10 arrows, there weren’t so many people yet. When Lalaria shot, the elves surrounded them.

At the same time, Lalaria noticed that the elves had different gazes. Some were contemptuous, some sighed, and more were pitiful. Alice saw that the atmosphere was not right, so she tactfully escaped first. The surrounding elves began to discuss in a low voice.

“Which family does this child belong to? Her archery skills are actually so bad!”

“Maybe it’s because she’s still young.”

“When I was her age, I already hit the bull’s eye every time!”

“Could it be that she lost her parents when she was a child? No one taught her?”

“…”

Lalaria didn’t expect her favorite results to be strongly despised. She was about to explode when a female elf stepped forward, “Little sister, it doesn’t matter. Sister will teach you.”

Little sister? Lalaria was furious. I’m much older than you short-lived elves.

“ Hmph! Do you think I…” When Lalaria’s eyes fell on the female elf, she couldn’t take it away. This female elf was very beautiful. Even among the elves who were all handsome men and beautiful women, she was particularly outstanding.

“Sister…” Madam Lalaria quickly threw away her integrity and hugged the elf’s slender waist.

When the female elf was hugged by Lalaria, her maternal instinct was triggered. She gently stroked Lalaria’s hair, “What’s your name? Little sister.”

“My name is Lalaria…” Madam Lalaria, who succeeded in her trick easily, buried her head happily in the pair of plump chest.

The female elf only thought that the little elf girl was moved by her, but she never thought that it was a dragon satyr wearing elf skin, “My name is Altani. Let’s go over there, sister will teach you how to shoot arrows.”

Altani? Madam Lalaria froze for a moment. Sounds familiar? Right, it’s the dark elf from before…

Anyway, that dark elf is long gone. Such a beautiful woman should go to me. Whoever snatches her, I will fight desperately. That human is no exception. Oh Hohoho…

On the other hand, Alice, who escaped successfully, did not stay and wait for Lalaria – Anyway, with Lalaria’s strength, she should not be too dangerous here. I better go find brother.

Just now Alice deliberately took Lalaria and Span apart with this kind of premeditations. Solo ‘date’ with brother!

While looking for him, Alice was attracted by the performance.

Under the big tree, a male elf and a group of golden velvet finches were performing, which attracted the applause of many children. The golden velvet finch was a kind of docile bird. It was about the size of a fist. It had a fat body. The whole body was covered with feathers, and the wings were very small. They flapped in the air like fur balls. With the elf music conductor, it made all kinds of naive actions.

“ Wow , it’s so cute.” Girls had the least immunity to this kind of animal, so Alice was immediately attracted.

“Yes.” An elf girl on the side also agreed. This was a girl who was about the same size as Alice. She had pointed ears, green curly hair, exquisite and lovely facial features. Her big eyes were staring at the golden velvet bird, ” I really want to touch it!”

“ En! ” Alice also wanted to touch those cute and fluffy birds. She nodded quickly.

“You want too? Let’s go together!” The elf girl’s eyes lit up, but her face became bitter again, “But that person definitely won’t allow us to touch it.”

Alice thought for a while, and she whispered a few words to the elf girl. The girl’s eyes were beaming, and the 2 lolis looked at each other with wicked smiles.

chapters.title: Chapter 1189: Their New Moon Festival
chapters.body:
Chapter 1189: Their New Moon Festival

After an uproar in the golden velvet finches’ performance venue, the performing elf left in disgrace.

After a gust of wind blew just now, the elf suddenly felt a strange itch on his body, which made him scratch involuntarily. The music was naturally out of tune. The golden velvet finches were controlled by the elf, but under the ‘command’ of this kind of music, they flew around for a while. The scene suddenly became a mess.

At this time, thanks to the 2 ‘kind-hearted’ elf girls who helped him catch the golden velvet birds. After a while, the itching slowly subsided, and the elf naturally had no face to stay here to perform again. After thanking the 2 lolis, he hurried away with the golden velvet finches.

“The touch just now… isn’t bad right.” Alice grinned.

“ En! ” The elf girl with green curly hair nodded quickly. She said with admiration, “You’re amazing. What are those powders made of? I sensed the breath of a part of the plant inside, but it is a plant that I have never seen before. “

Alice took out a small bottle, “This is itch powder, I bought it in Leia… uh , a very remote place. I only used a small dose just now, otherwise he will itch for a long time. If you like it I’ll give it to you, but be careful when using it. Speaking of which, if it wasn’t for the wind you cast, we wouldn’t be able to succeed.”

“ Wow! Thank you!” The green-haired loli took the small bottle, hesitated, and said her real name, “My name is Michelle, what about you?”

“My name is Alice…”

Michelle saw that Alice had no special reaction to her real name, and was still so casual. This made the little elf princess very delighted.

The more the 2 lolis chatted, the closer they became. In the beginning, Alice had almost no friends in the Dark Moon Estate, then she gradually gained a few, whereas Michelle had almost no real friends except Blanche and ‘Richard’ who had disappeared. The 2 hit it off right away and chatted for more than an hour before they knew it.

“ Wow , this is the first time I’ve eaten this kind of green leaf cake. You actually made it yourself. It’s delicious!” Alice ate the dessert that Michelle took out from the space ring.

“The pudding you made is also delicious!” Michelle also ate the small dessert Alice gave, “You’re also amazing!”

“ Haha , it seems that we are both foodies.” Alice laughed and held Michelle’s hand, “Then, I officially announce that we will be partners in the future.”

This is the first time Michelle has heard the word, “Partner?”

“It means friends who cooperate very well.” Alice said proudly, “This is the new word my brother taught me! We can make delicious food together, go to picnics together, put itch powder together, and touch golden velvet finch together… “

Michelle showed a surprised expression and nodded desperately, “ En ! We are partners!”

Alice didn’t know that her new partner was the little princess of the elf tribe. Michelle also didn’t know that the ‘elf’ friend in front of her was actually the little princess of the Demon Realm. Without knowing it, the 2 little princesses became close friends at first sight.

After eliminating a large amount of food while chatting, Michelle touched her swollen belly and said, “Alice, shall we go to the riding arena? There is a friend waiting for me there.”

“OK.”

Just as Alice answered, she heard a familiar voice from the side, “Alice?”

“Brother!” Alice jumped up happily. After meeting a good friend, brother automatically appears in front of my eyes. I am truly blessed by Demon God!

Seeing Alice jumping and hanging on that ‘elf”s neck, Michelle couldn’t help showing an envious expression: So this is the ‘very powerful and I like him very much brother’ that Alice mentioned from time to time!

Michelle had no elder brother. Only her elder sister who had been fighting with her since she was a child. It was even more impossible for her to make such exaggerated actions that violate royal etiquette in public. Even some language habits that were considered unsuitable for the princess status were forced to be corrected.

Chen Rui was used to the ‘Alice’s Big Sitting’, so he didn’t feel anything. He hugged Alice and spun around before putting her down, then he coincidentally saw the elf girl who had initially turned her back to him. He blurted out, “Michelle?”

Michelle was the princess of the elf tribe. It was not surprising to be recognized by an adult elf like ‘Alice’s brother’. To her surprise, Chen Rui didn’t bow cautiously, nor called Your Highness, but just showed a simple smile. That kind of feeling, like being an old friend for many years, made people feel warm and at ease.

Alice asked strangely, “Brother, how did you know Michelle?”

“ Haha , secret.”

Seeing Alice’s puffy bun face, Chen Rui squashed the bun with a smile. This intimate gesture made Michelle envious again.

“Brother, Michelle and I are going to the riding arena to find another friend. Let’s go together.”

Chen Rui nodded and walked toward the riding with the 2 lolis. Originally, he was the only one holding Alice, and Alice was leading Michelle. Later, Alice saw the envy of her good friend, so Chen Rui held a loli in each hand.

The riding arena was a special place with enchantment, where the strength of all participants and mounts was suppressed at the same level. Hence, they could only win by riding skills and the degree of tacit understanding with the mounts.

“It’s called White Wind. Before today, it was the only friend I had left.”

It turned out that Michelle’s ‘friend’ was a pure white unicorn.

“Unicorn?” Alice looked at the unicorn curiously. Chen Rui once said that this kind of demonic beasts were rare and had strong feet, comparable to the Incubus Beast of the Demon Realm.

The unicorn seemed to feel that the blonde ‘elf’ girl’s breath was different from that of ordinary elves. It raised its hooves, looking very hostile.

Michelle quickly stood in front of Alice, “White Wind, this is my new friend Alice. You 2 should get along well in the future.”

The unicorn was a very intelligent creature. Instead of blindly listening to Michelle, it thought she had been bewildered by the ‘enemy’ and appeared even more ferocious. Alice was terrified and leaned against Chen Rui tightly, not daring to move.

At this moment, White Wind had bypassed Michelle and came in front of Chen Rui and Alice. The unicorn was originally aimed at Alice, who was suspected to be the enemy, but when Chen Rui approached, its eyes suddenly showed a puzzled expression as it looked at the ‘elf’ hesitantly.

When Chen Rui stretched out his hand slowly, White Wind felt a familiar breath. It moved its nose again, and it finally confirmed something. It suddenly became excited, snorted, and then took the initiative to move forward, letting the hand touch its face.

Michelle was taken aback. The elves around her also looked over: White Wind is a famous troublemaker in the Jade Forest Sea. Apart from the little princess, no elf can get close to it. Why is it docile now?

“Brother…” Alice saw Chen Rui being friendly with White Wind, so she wanted to touch the unicorn, but she was afraid of being attacked.

“Don’t be afraid, give this to White Wind.”

Chen Rui stuffed a fruit in Alice’s hand. White Wind already knew from the heart-to-heart communication that this ‘girl who was not an elf’ was Chen Rui’s relative, and that aura fruit was its favorite delicacy. Therefore, it turned its head immediately to take the fruit that Alice summoned up the courage to hand over to its mouth.

Alice mustered her courage to touch the unicorn. Seeing that the unicorn didn’t resist, she couldn’t help being overjoyed. With Chen Rui’s support, she rode on White Wind’s back.

White Wind didn’t resist. In fact, it seemed overjoyed that it started running in the riding arena.

This scene caused the surrounding elves’ jaws to drop once again— Is this a docile horse who is easily deceived by a fruit. Is it still the usual fierce unicorn?

“You’re…” Seeing the aura fruit, Michelle finally knew who this ‘Alice’s brother’ who made her feel at ease was. No wonder White Wind was so docile.

Chen Rui smiled at Michelle, “This sentence is a bit late, but I still have to say. We meet again, my friend Michelle.”

Back then, he didn’t dare to recognize her because he offended the Holy Church, so he was afraid that his friends would be hurt. With Chen Rui’s strength now, he could already confront the 3 archangels head-on, so there was no need to be worried as he was back then.

The elf girl threw herself into Chen Rui’s arms with red eyes, “Richard… sobs …”

The surrounding elfs had nothing to say. After the unicorn was abducted by this strange elf, the Royal Highness Little Princess was also acquired.

It took a long time before Michelle calmed down and raised her head, “Can I call you ‘brother’ like Alice?”

“Of course, I’m very happy to have such a lovely sister.” As Chen Rui touched Michelle’s hair, he could clearly feel the pure and flawless emotions of an elf girl. He was also lucky to have such a sister.

At this time, the sound of horns sounded around. The elf girl wiped the tears of joy from her eyes. She looked at White Wind who came back from a lap and waved, “Alice, the riding competition is about to start. There will be many prizes later. Let’s sign up together!”

Soon after, the riding competition began. Looking at the 2 excited lolis on the back of the galloping white unicorn, Chen Rui couldn’t help showing a knowing smile on his face. He turned his head to a direction in the distance, which should be the archery field.

The race had to pass through various magic obstacles. Under the condition of suppressing strength, it was impossible for White Wind to complete it in a short time. Chen Rui thought for a while, activated Alice’s mind call, greeted her, and walked toward the archery field.

The reason why Chen Rui went to the archery field was that he sensed 2 linkers there. At the same time, there were a large number of elves gathered. He didn’t know if Lalaria or Zola caused any trouble, so he planned to go and have a look.

Coming to the archery field, Chen Rui no doubt saw Zola and Lalaria, but the focus of the swarming elves was not them, but the other 2.

2 people were competing in archery.

1 was a handsome silver-haired male elf, and the other was Chen Rui’s new half-elf servant Taylos.
